authors_text: Wei Zhang,Bowen Ma,Feng Qiu,Yu Ding
title: Multi-modal Facial Affective Analysis based on Masked Autoencoder
title_zh: 基于Masked Autoencoder的多模态面部情感分析
abstract: Human affective behavior analysis focuses on analyzing human expressions or other behaviors to enhance the understanding of human psychology. The CVPR 2023 Competition on Affective Behavior Analysis in-the-wild (ABAW) is dedicated to providing high-quality and large-scale Aff-wild2 for the recognition of commonly used emotion representations, such as Action Units (AU), basic expression categories(EXPR), and Valence-Arousal (VA). The competition is committed to making significant strides in improving the accuracy and practicality of affective analysis research in real-world scenarios. In this paper, we introduce our submission to the CVPR 2023: ABAW5. Our approach involves several key components. First, we utilize the visual information from a Masked Autoencoder(MAE) model that has been pre-trained on a large-scale face image dataset in a self-supervised manner. Next, we finetune the MAE encoder on the image frames from the Aff-wild2 for AU, EXPR and VA tasks, which can be regarded as a static and uni-modal training. Additionally, we leverage the multi-modal and temporal information from the videos and implement a transformer-based framework to fuse the multi-modal features. Our approach achieves impressive results in the ABAW5 competition, with an average F1 score of 55.49\% and 41.21\% in the AU and EXPR tracks, respectively, and an average CCC of 0.6372 in the VA track. Our approach ranks first in the EXPR and AU tracks, and second in the VA track. Extensive quantitative experiments and ablation studies demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed method.

The CVPR 2023 Competition on Affective Behavior Analysis in-the-wild (ABAW) is dedicated to providing high-quality and large-scale Aff-wild2 for the recognition of commonly used emotion representations, such as Action Units (AU), basic expression categories(EXPR), and Valence-Arousal (VA). The competition is committed to making significant strides in improving the accuracy and practicality of affective analysis research in real-world scenarios. In this paper, we introduce our submission to the CVPR 2023: ABAW5. Our approach involves several key components. Our approach achieves impressive results in the ABAW5 competition, with an average F1 score of 55.49\% and 41.21\% in the AU and EXPR tracks, respectively, and an average CCC of 0.6372 in the VA track. Our approach ranks first in the EXPR and AU tracks, and second in the VA track. Extensive quantitative experiments and ablation studies demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed method.
abstract_zh: 人类情感行为分析侧重于分析人类表情或其他行为，以增强对人类心理的理解。 CVPR 2023 野外情感行为分析竞赛（ABAW）致力于提供高质量、大规模的 Aff-wild2，用于识别常用的情感表征，如动作单元（AU）、基本表达类别（EXPR）和效价唤醒（VA）等。该竞赛致力于在提高现实场景中情感分析研究的准确性和实用性方面取得重大进展。在本文中，我们介绍了我们向 CVPR 2023 提交的论文：ABAW5。我们的方法涉及几个关键组成部分。首先，我们利用来自掩码自动编码器（MAE）模型的视觉信息，该模型已经以自监督的方式在大规模人脸图像数据集上进行了预训练。接下来，我们对 Aff-wild2 的图像帧上的 MAE 编码器进行微调，用于 AU、EXPR 和 VA 任务，这可以被视为静态和单模态训练。此外，我们利用视频中的多模态和时间信息，并实现基于变压器的框架来融合多模态特征。我们的方法在 ABAW5 竞赛中取得了令人印象深刻的成绩，在 AU 和 EXPR 赛道上的平均 F1 分数分别为 55.49\% 和 41.21\%，在 VA 赛道上的平均 CCC 为 0.6372。我们的方法在 EXPR 和 AU 轨道中排名第一，在 VA 轨道中排名第二。广泛的定量实验和消融研究证明了我们提出的方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于掩码自编码器的多模态面部情感分析方法，用于CVPR 2023 ABAW5竞赛中的情感识别任务。
AI.motivation: 为提升真实场景下情感分析的准确性与实用性，需融合多模态与时序信息以克服单一模态的局限性。
AI.method: 利用预训练的掩码自编码器提取视觉特征，微调后结合视频的多模态时序信息，采用基于Transformer的框架融合特征。
AI.result: 在AU和EXPR任务中分别取得55.49%和41.21%的平均F1分数，在VA任务中获得0.6372的平均CCC，位列竞赛前三。
AI.conclusion: 方法通过多模态融合与特征提取有效提升了情感分析性能，实验与消融研究验证了其有效性。

authors_text: Xinyan Zu,Haiyang Yu,Bin Li,Xiangyang Xue
title: Weakly-Supervised Text Instance Segmentation
title_zh: 弱监督文本实例分割
abstract: Text segmentation is a challenging vision task with many downstream applications. Current text segmentation methods require pixel-level annotations, which are expensive in the cost of human labor and limited in application scenarios. In this paper, we take the first attempt to perform weakly-supervised text instance segmentation by bridging text recognition and text segmentation. The insight is that text recognition methods provide precise attention position of each text instance, and the attention location can feed to both a text adaptive refinement head (TAR) and a text segmentation head. Specifically, the proposed TAR generates pseudo labels by performing two-stage iterative refinement operations on the attention location to fit the accurate boundaries of the corresponding text instance. Meanwhile, the text segmentation head takes the rough attention location to predict segmentation masks which are supervised by the aforementioned pseudo labels. In addition, we design a mask-augmented contrastive learning by treating our segmentation result as an augmented version of the input text image, thus improving the visual representation and further enhancing the performance of both recognition and segmentation. The experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method significantly outperforms weakly-supervised instance segmentation methods on ICDAR13-FST (18.95$\%$ improvement) and TextSeg (17.80$\%$ improvement) benchmarks.
summary: Text segmentation is a challenging vision task with many downstream applications. Current text segmentation methods require pixel-level annotations, which are expensive in the cost of human labor and limited in application scenarios. In this paper, we take the first attempt to perform weakly-supervised text instance segmentation by bridging text recognition and text segmentation. The insight is that text recognition methods provide precise attention position of each text instance, and the attention location can feed to both a text adaptive refinement head (TAR) and a text segmentation head. Specifically, the proposed TAR generates pseudo labels by performing two-stage iterative refinement operations on the attention location to fit the accurate boundaries of the corresponding text instance. Meanwhile, the text segmentation head takes the rough attention location to predict segmentation masks which are supervised by the aforementioned pseudo labels. In addition, we design a mask-augmented contrastive learning by treating our segmentation result as an augmented version of the input text image, thus improving the visual representation and further enhancing the performance of both recognition and segmentation. The experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method significantly outperforms weakly-supervised instance segmentation methods on ICDAR13-FST (18.95$\%$ improvement) and TextSeg (17.80$\%$ improvement) benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 文本分割对于许多下游应用来说是一项具有挑战性的视觉任务。目前的文本分割方法需要像素级标注，其人力成本昂贵且应用场景有限。在本文中，我们首次尝试通过桥接文本识别和文本分割来执行弱监督文本实例分割。我们的见解是，文本识别方法提供每个文本实例的精确注意力位置，并且注意力位置可以馈送到文本自适应细化头（TAR）和文本分割头。具体来说，所提出的 TAR 通过对注意力位置执行两阶段迭代细化操作来生成伪标签，以适应相应文本实例的准确边界。同时，文本分割头采用粗略的注意力位置来预测由上述伪标签监督的分割掩模。此外，我们通过将分割结果视为输入文本图像的增强版本来设计掩模增强对比学习，从而改善视觉表示并进一步增强识别和分割的性能。实验结果表明，该方法在 ICDAR13-FST（18.95$\%$ 改进）和 TextSeg（17.80$\%$ 改进）基准上显着优于弱监督实例分割方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种弱监督文本实例分割方法，通过结合文本识别与分割任务，减少对像素级标注的依赖。
AI.motivation: 现有文本分割方法依赖昂贵的像素级标注，应用受限。文本识别方法能提供文本实例的精确注意力位置，可作为弱监督信号。
AI.method: 设计文本自适应细化头（TAR）通过两阶段迭代优化生成伪标签，并结合分割头预测分割掩码。同时引入掩码增强对比学习，提升视觉表征能力。
AI.result: 在ICDAR13-FST和TextSeg基准测试中分别提升18.95%和17.80%，显著优于现有弱监督实例分割方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过结合文本识别注意力位置与分割任务，提出的方法有效提升了弱监督文本实例分割性能，验证了跨任务协同优化的有效性。

authors_text: Wenhang Ge,Tao Hu,Haoyu Zhao,Shu Liu,Ying-Cong Chen
title: Ref-NeuS: Ambiguity-Reduced Neural Implicit Surface Learning for Multi-View Reconstruction with Reflection
title_zh: Ref-NeuS：通过反射进行多视图重建的模糊性减少神经隐式表面学习
abstract: Neural implicit surface learning has shown significant progress in multi-view 3D reconstruction, where an object is represented by multilayer perceptrons that provide continuous implicit surface representation and view-dependent radiance. However, current methods often fail to accurately reconstruct reflective surfaces, leading to severe ambiguity. To overcome this issue, we propose Ref-NeuS, which aims to reduce ambiguity by attenuating the effect of reflective surfaces. Specifically, we utilize an anomaly detector to estimate an explicit reflection score with the guidance of multi-view context to localize reflective surfaces. Afterward, we design a reflection-aware photometric loss that adaptively reduces ambiguity by modeling rendered color as a Gaussian distribution, with the reflection score representing the variance. We show that together with a reflection direction-dependent radiance, our model achieves high-quality surface reconstruction on reflective surfaces and outperforms the state-of-the-arts by a large margin. Besides, our model is also comparable on general surfaces.
summary: Neural implicit surface learning has shown significant progress in multi-view 3D reconstruction, where an object is represented by multilayer perceptrons that provide continuous implicit surface representation and view-dependent radiance. However, current methods often fail to accurately reconstruct reflective surfaces, leading to severe ambiguity. To overcome this issue, we propose Ref-NeuS, which aims to reduce ambiguity by attenuating the effect of reflective surfaces. Specifically, we utilize an anomaly detector to estimate an explicit reflection score with the guidance of multi-view context to localize reflective surfaces. Afterward, we design a reflection-aware photometric loss that adaptively reduces ambiguity by modeling rendered color as a Gaussian distribution, with the reflection score representing the variance. We show that together with a reflection direction-dependent radiance, our model achieves high-quality surface reconstruction on reflective surfaces and outperforms the state-of-the-arts by a large margin. Besides, our model is also comparable on general surfaces.
abstract_zh: 神经隐式表面学习在多视图 3D 重建方面取得了显着进展，其中对象由多层感知器表示，提供连续的隐式表面表示和视图相关的辐射度。然而，当前的方法通常无法准确地重建反射表面，导致严重的模糊性。为了克服这个问题，我们提出了 Ref-NeuS，其目的是通过减弱反射表面的影响来减少模糊性。具体来说，我们利用异常检测器在多视图上下文的指导下估计显式反射分数以定位反射表面。之后，我们设计了一种反射感知的光度损失，通过将渲染颜色建模为高斯分布来自适应地减少模糊度，反射分数代表方差。我们证明，与反射方向相关的辐射率一起，我们的模型在反射表面上实现了高质量的表面重建，并且大大优于最先进的技术。此外，我们的模型在一般表面上也具有可比性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Ref-NeuS方法，通过减少反射表面的歧义性，提升多视角反射物体的神经隐式表面重建效果。
AI.motivation: 现有神经隐式表面学习方法在处理反射表面时存在严重歧义，导致重建质量下降，需解决反射区域的不确定性问题。
AI.method: 利用异常检测器结合多视角上下文估计反射区域显式得分，并设计反射感知光度损失函数，通过高斯分布建模渲染颜色，以反射得分控制方差，同时结合反射方向依赖的辐射度进行优化。
AI.result: 在反射表面重建任务中显著优于现有SOTA方法，在普通表面任务中表现相当，验证了方法的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: Ref-NeuS通过显式建模反射区域不确定性并自适应调整损失函数，有效解决了反射表面重建中的歧义问题，为复杂材质重建提供了新思路。

search_text: Ref-NeuS: Ambiguity-Reduced Neural Implicit Surface Learning for Multi-View Reconstruction with Reflection Ref-NeuS：通过反射进行多视图重建的模糊性减少神经隐式表面学习 Neural implicit surface learning has shown significant progress in multi-view 3D reconstruction, where an object is represented by multilayer perceptrons that provide continuous implicit surface representation and view-dependent radiance. However, current methods often fail to accurately reconstruct reflective surfaces, leading to severe ambiguity. To overcome this issue, we propose Ref-NeuS, which aims to reduce ambiguity by attenuating the effect of reflective surfaces. Specifically, we utilize an anomaly detector to estimate an explicit reflection score with the guidance of multi-view context to localize reflective surfaces. Afterward, we design a reflection-aware photometric loss that adaptively reduces ambiguity by modeling rendered color as a Gaussian distribution, with the reflection score representing the variance. We show that together with a reflection direction-dependent radiance, our model achieves high-quality surface reconstruction on reflective surfaces and outperforms the state-of-the-arts by a large margin. Besides, our model is also comparable on general surfaces. 神经隐式表面学习在多视图 3D 重建方面取得了显着进展，其中对象由多层感知器表示，提供连续的隐式表面表示和视图相关的辐射度。然而，当前的方法通常无法准确地重建反射表面，导致严重的模糊性。为了克服这个问题，我们提出了 Ref-NeuS，其目的是通过减弱反射表面的影响来减少模糊性。具体来说，我们利用异常检测器在多视图上下文的指导下估计显式反射分数以定位反射表面。之后，我们设计了一种反射感知的光度损失，通过将渲染颜色建模为高斯分布来自适应地减少模糊度，反射分数代表方差。我们证明，与反射方向相关的辐射率一起，我们的模型在反射表面上实现了高质量的表面重建，并且大大优于最先进的技术。此外，我们的模型在一般表面上也具有可比性。 本文提出Ref-NeuS方法，通过减少反射表面的歧义性，提升多视角反射物体的神经隐式表面重建效果。 Wenhang Ge,Tao Hu,Haoyu Zhao,Shu Liu,Ying-Cong Chen cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Ye Wang,Bowei Jiang,Changqing Zou,Rui Ma
title: MXM-CLR: A Unified Framework for Contrastive Learning of Multifold Cross-Modal Representations
title_zh: MXM-CLR：多重跨模态表示对比学习的统一框架
abstract: Multifold observations are common for different data modalities, e.g., a 3D shape can be represented by multi-view images and an image can be described with different captions. Existing cross-modal contrastive representation learning (XM-CLR) methods such as CLIP are not fully suitable for multifold data as they only consider one positive pair and treat other pairs as negative when computing the contrastive loss. In this paper, we propose MXM-CLR, a unified framework for contrastive learning of multifold cross-modal representations. MXM-CLR explicitly models and learns the relationships between multifold observations of instances from different modalities for more comprehensive representation learning. The key of MXM-CLR is a novel multifold-aware hybrid loss which considers multiple positive observations when computing the hard and soft relationships for the cross-modal data pairs. We conduct quantitative and qualitative comparisons with SOTA baselines for cross-modal retrieval tasks on the Text2Shape and Flickr30K datasets. We also perform extensive evaluations on the adaptability and generalizability of MXM-CLR, as well as ablation studies on the loss design and effects of batch sizes. The results show the superiority of MXM-CLR in learning better representations for the multifold data. The code is available at https://github.com/JLU-ICL/MXM-CLR.
summary: Multifold observations are common for different data modalities, e.g., a 3D shape can be represented by multi-view images and an image can be described with different captions. Existing cross-modal contrastive representation learning (XM-CLR) methods such as CLIP are not fully suitable for multifold data as they only consider one positive pair and treat other pairs as negative when computing the contrastive loss. In this paper, we propose MXM-CLR, a unified framework for contrastive learning of multifold cross-modal representations. MXM-CLR explicitly models and learns the relationships between multifold observations of instances from different modalities for more comprehensive representation learning. The key of MXM-CLR is a novel multifold-aware hybrid loss which considers multiple positive observations when computing the hard and soft relationships for the cross-modal data pairs. We conduct quantitative and qualitative comparisons with SOTA baselines for cross-modal retrieval tasks on the Text2Shape and Flickr30K datasets. We also perform extensive evaluations on the adaptability and generalizability of MXM-CLR, as well as ablation studies on the loss design and effects of batch sizes. The results show the superiority of MXM-CLR in learning better representations for the multifold data. The code is available at https://github.com/JLU-ICL/MXM-CLR.
abstract_zh: 多重观察对于不同的数据模态来说很常见，例如，3D 形状可以由多视图图像表示，并且图像可以用不同的标题来描述。现有的跨模态对比表示学习（XM-CLR）方法（例如 CLIP）并不完全适合多重数据，因为它们在计算对比损失时仅考虑一对正数，并将其他对视为负数。在本文中，我们提出了 MXM-CLR，一种用于多重跨模态表示对比学习的统一框架。 MXM-CLR 显式地建模并学习来自不同模式的实例的多重观察之间的关系，以实现更全面的表示学习。 MXM-CLR 的关键是一种新颖的多重感知混合损失，它在计算跨模态数据对的硬和软关系时考虑多个正观测值。我们对 Text2Shape 和 Flickr30K 数据集上的跨模态检索任务的 SOTA 基线进行定量和定性比较。我们还对 MXM-CLR 的适应性和泛化性进行了广泛的评估，并对损失设计和批量大小的影响进行了消融研究。结果表明 MXM-CLR 在学习多重数据的更好表示方面具有优越性。该代码可从 https://github.com/JLU-ICL/MXM-CLR 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MXM-CLR框架，用于处理多模态数据中多视角观测的对比学习，解决现有方法在多折叠数据上的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有跨模态对比学习方法（如CLIP）仅考虑单一正样本对，将其他对视为负样本，无法有效建模多模态数据中多折叠观测间的复杂关系。
AI.method: 设计多折叠感知混合损失函数，同时考虑多个正样本对的硬/软关系，并在Text2Shape和Flickr30K数据集上进行对比实验与消融分析。
AI.result: MXM-CLR在跨模态检索任务中优于SOTA基线，且在适应性、泛化性和损失设计上表现出显著优势。
AI.conclusion: MXM-CLR通过显式建模多折叠观测关系，有效提升了多模态表示学习性能，为复杂数据场景提供了统一解决方案。

authors_text: Alan Lewis,Tim Miller
title: Deceptive Reinforcement Learning in Model-Free Domains
title_zh: 无模型领域中的欺骗性强化学习
comment: 8 pages, 1 reference page, 4 appendix pages, Accepted into International Conference on Automated Planning and Scheduling (ICAPS) 2023
comments: 8 pages, 1 reference page, 4 appendix pages, Accepted into International Conference on Automated Planning and Scheduling (ICAPS) 2023
abstract: This paper investigates deceptive reinforcement learning for privacy preservation in model-free and continuous action space domains. In reinforcement learning, the reward function defines the agent's objective. In adversarial scenarios, an agent may need to both maximise rewards and keep its reward function private from observers. Recent research presented the ambiguity model (AM), which selects actions that are ambiguous over a set of possible reward functions, via pre-trained $Q$-functions. Despite promising results in model-based domains, our investigation shows that AM is ineffective in model-free domains due to misdirected state space exploration. It is also inefficient to train and inapplicable in continuous action space domains. We propose the deceptive exploration ambiguity model (DEAM), which learns using the deceptive policy during training, leading to targeted exploration of the state space. DEAM is also applicable in continuous action spaces. We evaluate DEAM in discrete and continuous action space path planning environments. DEAM achieves similar performance to an optimal model-based version of AM and outperforms a model-free version of AM in terms of path cost, deceptiveness and training efficiency. These results extend to the continuous domain.
summary: This paper investigates deceptive reinforcement learning for privacy preservation in model-free and continuous action space domains. In reinforcement learning, the reward function defines the agent's objective. In adversarial scenarios, an agent may need to both maximise rewards and keep its reward function private from observers. Recent research presented the ambiguity model (AM), which selects actions that are ambiguous over a set of possible reward functions, via pre-trained $Q$-functions. Despite promising results in model-based domains, our investigation shows that AM is ineffective in model-free domains due to misdirected state space exploration. It is also inefficient to train and inapplicable in continuous action space domains. We propose the deceptive exploration ambiguity model (DEAM), which learns using the deceptive policy during training, leading to targeted exploration of the state space. DEAM is also applicable in continuous action spaces. We evaluate DEAM in discrete and continuous action space path planning environments. DEAM achieves similar performance to an optimal model-based version of AM and outperforms a model-free version of AM in terms of path cost, deceptiveness and training efficiency. These results extend to the continuous domain.
abstract_zh: 本文研究了无模型和连续动作空间域中用于隐私保护的欺骗性强化学习。在强化学习中，奖励函数定义了代理的目标。在对抗场景中，代理可能需要最大化奖励并保持其奖励函数对观察者保密。最近的研究提出了模糊性模型（AM），该模型通过预先训练的 $Q$ 函数来选择一组可能的奖励函数中模糊的动作。尽管在基于模型的领域取得了令人鼓舞的结果，但我们的调查表明，由于状态空间探索方向错误，增材制造在无模型领域中无效。它的训练效率也很低，并且不适用于连续动作空间领域。我们提出了欺骗性探索模糊模型（DEAM），该模型在训练过程中学习使用欺骗策略，从而有针对性地探索状态空间。 DEAM 也适用于连续动作空间。我们在离散和连续的动作空间路径规划环境中评估 DEAM。 DEAM 实现了与基于模型的最佳版本的 AM 类似的性能，并且在路径成本、欺骗性和训练效率方面优于无模型版本的 AM。这些结果扩展到连​​续域。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在无模型和连续动作空间领域中，通过欺骗性强化学习实现隐私保护的方法。
AI.motivation: 在对抗性场景中，智能体需在最大化奖励的同时隐藏其奖励函数。现有方法在无模型领域或连续动作空间中存在探索效率低、适用性差等问题。
AI.method: 提出欺骗性探索模糊模型（DEAM），通过训练期间的欺骗策略实现目标状态空间探索，适用于连续动作空间。
AI.result: DEAM在离散和连续动作空间路径规划环境中，路径成本、欺骗性和训练效率均优于无模型AM版本，性能接近基于模型的AM版本。
AI.conclusion: DEAM有效解决了无模型领域和连续动作空间中隐私保护的挑战，实现了更优的性能与效率平衡。

ai_content_json.result: DEAM在离散和连续动作空间路径规划环境中，路径成本、欺骗性和训练效率均优于无模型AM版本，性能接近基于模型的AM版本。
ai_content_json.conclusion: DEAM有效解决了无模型领域和连续动作空间中隐私保护的挑战，实现了更优的性能与效率平衡。

tldr: 本文研究了在无模型和连续动作空间领域中，通过欺骗性强化学习实现隐私保护的方法。
motivation: 在对抗性场景中，智能体需在最大化奖励的同时隐藏其奖励函数。现有方法在无模型领域或连续动作空间中存在探索效率低、适用性差等问题。
method: 提出欺骗性探索模糊模型（DEAM），通过训练期间的欺骗策略实现目标状态空间探索，适用于连续动作空间。
result: DEAM在离散和连续动作空间路径规划环境中，路径成本、欺骗性和训练效率均优于无模型AM版本，性能接近基于模型的AM版本。
conclusion: DEAM有效解决了无模型领域和连续动作空间中隐私保护的挑战，实现了更优的性能与效率平衡。
search_text: Deceptive Reinforcement Learning in Model-Free Domains 无模型领域中的欺骗性强化学习 This paper investigates deceptive reinforcement learning for privacy preservation in model-free and continuous action space domains. In reinforcement learning, the reward function defines the agent's objective. In adversarial scenarios, an agent may need to both maximise rewards and keep its reward function private from observers. Recent research presented the ambiguity model (AM), which selects actions that are ambiguous over a set of possible reward functions, via pre-trained $Q$-functions. Despite promising results in model-based domains, our investigation shows that AM is ineffective in model-free domains due to misdirected state space exploration. It is also inefficient to train and inapplicable in continuous action space domains. We propose the deceptive exploration ambiguity model (DEAM), which learns using the deceptive policy during training, leading to targeted exploration of the state space. DEAM is also applicable in continuous action spaces. We evaluate DEAM in discrete and continuous action space path planning environments. DEAM achieves similar performance to an optimal model-based version of AM and outperforms a model-free version of AM in terms of path cost, deceptiveness and training efficiency. These results extend to the continuous domain. 本文研究了无模型和连续动作空间域中用于隐私保护的欺骗性强化学习。在强化学习中，奖励函数定义了代理的目标。在对抗场景中，代理可能需要最大化奖励并保持其奖励函数对观察者保密。最近的研究提出了模糊性模型（AM），该模型通过预先训练的 $Q$ 函数来选择一组可能的奖励函数中模糊的动作。尽管在基于模型的领域取得了令人鼓舞的结果，但我们的调查表明，由于状态空间探索方向错误，增材制造在无模型领域中无效。它的训练效率也很低，并且不适用于连续动作空间领域。我们提出了欺骗性探索模糊模型（DEAM），该模型在训练过程中学习使用欺骗策略，从而有针对性地探索状态空间。 DEAM 也适用于连续动作空间。我们在离散和连续的动作空间路径规划环境中评估 DEAM。 DEAM 实现了与基于模型的最佳版本的 AM 类似的性能，并且在路径成本、欺骗性和训练效率方面优于无模型版本的 AM。这些结果扩展到连​​续域。 本文研究了在无模型和连续动作空间领域中，通过欺骗性强化学习实现隐私保护的方法。 Alan Lewis,Tim Miller cs.AI,cs.MA

authors_text: Jindong Jiang,Fei Deng,Gautam Singh,Sungjin Ahn
title: Object-Centric Slot Diffusion
title_zh: 以对象为中心的槽扩散
comment: Accepted to NeurIPS 2023 as a Spotlight paper
comments: Accepted to NeurIPS 2023 as a Spotlight paper
abstract: The recent success of transformer-based image generative models in object-centric learning highlights the importance of powerful image generators for handling complex scenes. However, despite the high expressiveness of diffusion models in image generation, their integration into object-centric learning remains largely unexplored in this domain. In this paper, we explore the feasibility and potential of integrating diffusion models into object-centric learning and investigate the pros and cons of this approach. We introduce Latent Slot Diffusion (LSD), a novel model that serves dual purposes: it is the first object-centric learning model to replace conventional slot decoders with a latent diffusion model conditioned on object slots, and it is also the first unsupervised compositional conditional diffusion model that operates without the need for supervised annotations like text. Through experiments on various object-centric tasks, including the first application of the FFHQ dataset in this field, we demonstrate that LSD significantly outperforms state-of-the-art transformer-based decoders, particularly in more complex scenes, and exhibits superior unsupervised compositional generation quality. In addition, we conduct a preliminary investigation into the integration of pre-trained diffusion models in LSD and demonstrate its effectiveness in real-world image segmentation and generation. Project page is available at https://latentslotdiffusion.github.io
summary: The recent success of transformer-based image generative models in object-centric learning highlights the importance of powerful image generators for handling complex scenes. However, despite the high expressiveness of diffusion models in image generation, their integration into object-centric learning remains largely unexplored in this domain. In this paper, we explore the feasibility and potential of integrating diffusion models into object-centric learning and investigate the pros and cons of this approach. We introduce Latent Slot Diffusion (LSD), a novel model that serves dual purposes: it is the first object-centric learning model to replace conventional slot decoders with a latent diffusion model conditioned on object slots, and it is also the first unsupervised compositional conditional diffusion model that operates without the need for supervised annotations like text. Through experiments on various object-centric tasks, including the first application of the FFHQ dataset in this field, we demonstrate that LSD significantly outperforms state-of-the-art transformer-based decoders, particularly in more complex scenes, and exhibits superior unsupervised compositional generation quality. In addition, we conduct a preliminary investigation into the integration of pre-trained diffusion models in LSD and demonstrate its effectiveness in real-world image segmentation and generation. Project page is available at https://latentslotdiffusion.github.io
abstract_zh: 基于变压器的图像生成模型最近在以对象为中心的学习中取得的成功凸显了强大的图像生成器对于处理复杂场景的重要性。然而，尽管扩散模型在图像生成中具有很高的表达能力，但在该领域中，它们与以对象为中心的学习的集成在很大程度上仍未得到探索。在本文中，我们探讨了将扩散模型集成到以对象为中心的学习中的可行性和潜力，并研究了这种方法的优缺点。我们介绍了潜在槽扩散（LSD），这是一种具有双重用途的新颖模型：它是第一个以对象为中心的学习模型，用以对象槽为条件的潜在扩散模型取代传统的槽解码器，而且它也是第一个无需监督注释（如文本）即可运行的无监督组合条件扩散模型。通过对各种以对象为中心的任务的实验，包括 FFHQ 数据集在该领域的首次应用，我们证明 LSD 显着优于最先进的基于 Transformer 的解码器，特别是在更复杂的场景中，并表现出卓越的无监督合成生成质量。此外，我们对 LSD 中预训练扩散模型的集成进行了初步研究，并证明了其在现实世界图像分割和生成中的有效性。项目页面位于 https://latentslotdiffusion.github.io

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于扩散模型的物体中心学习方法Latent Slot Diffusion (LSD)，通过结合扩散模型与物体槽机制，实现复杂场景下的高质量图像生成与分割。
AI.motivation: 尽管扩散模型在图像生成领域表现优异，但其在物体中心学习中的应用尚未被充分探索，现有方法在处理复杂场景时存在局限性。
AI.method: 设计LSD模型，首次用潜在扩散模型替代传统槽解码器，并构建无需监督标注的无监督组合条件扩散框架，通过物体槽条件生成图像。
AI.result: 在多个物体中心任务中，LSD显著优于基于Transformer的解码器，尤其在复杂场景生成质量上表现突出，并成功应用于真实图像分割与生成。
AI.conclusion: LSD验证了扩散模型在物体中心学习中的有效性，为未来研究提供了新方向，尤其在预训练模型整合与实际应用方面具有潜力。

authors_text: Ned Cooper
title: Bridging Deliberative Democracy and Deployment of Societal-Scale Technology
title_zh: 连接协商民主和社会规模技术的部署
abstract: This position paper encourages the Human-Computer Interaction (HCI) community to focus on designing deliberative processes to inform and coordinate technology and policy design for large language models (LLMs) -- a `societal-scale technology'. First, I propose a definition for societal-scale technology and locate LLMs within this definition. Next, I argue that existing processes to ensure the safety of LLMs are insufficient and do not give the systems democratic legitimacy. Instead, we require processes of deliberation amongst users and other stakeholders on questions about the safety of outputs and deployment contexts. This shift in AI safety research and practice will require the design of corporate and public policies that determine how to enact deliberation and the design of interfaces and technical features to translate the outcomes of deliberation into technical development processes. To conclude, I propose roles for the HCI community to ensure deliberative processes inform technology and policy design for LLMs and other societal-scale technology.
summary: This position paper encourages the Human-Computer Interaction (HCI) community to focus on designing deliberative processes to inform and coordinate technology and policy design for large language models (LLMs) -- a `societal-scale technology'. First, I propose a definition for societal-scale technology and locate LLMs within this definition. Next, I argue that existing processes to ensure the safety of LLMs are insufficient and do not give the systems democratic legitimacy. Instead, we require processes of deliberation amongst users and other stakeholders on questions about the safety of outputs and deployment contexts. This shift in AI safety research and practice will require the design of corporate and public policies that determine how to enact deliberation and the design of interfaces and technical features to translate the outcomes of deliberation into technical development processes. To conclude, I propose roles for the HCI community to ensure deliberative processes inform technology and policy design for LLMs and other societal-scale technology.
abstract_zh: 本立场文件鼓励人机交互 (HCI) 社区专注于设计协商流程，以通知和协调大型语言模型 (LLM)（一种“社会规模技术”）的技术和政策设计。首先，我提出了社会规模技术的定义，并将法学硕士置于该定义内。接下来，我认为确保法学硕士安全的现有流程是不够的，并且没有赋予该系统民主合法性。相反，我们需要用户和其他利益相关者就有关输出和部署环境的安全性问题进行审议。人工智能安全研究和实践的这种转变将需要设计企业和公共政策，以确定如何进行审议以及界面和技术功能的设计，以将审议结果转化为技术开发过程。最后，我建议人机交互社区发挥作用，以确保审议过程为法学硕士和其他社会规模技术的技术和政策设计提供信息。

AI.tldr: 呼吁HCI社区设计协商民主机制，以协调大型语言模型等大规模社会技术的部署，并确保其民主合法性。
AI.motivation: 现有LLMs安全措施不足，缺乏民主合法性，需通过协商民主整合多方利益相关者的意见。
AI.method: 通过定义社会规模技术，分析现有安全机制缺陷，并设计支持协商民主的政策与技术接口。
AI.result: 提出协商民主机制在LLMs安全设计中的必要性，并为HCI社区在政策与技术设计中的角色提供方向。
AI.conclusion: 呼吁HCI社区推动协商民主实践，确保大规模社会技术的开发与部署具有民主合法性与社会适应性。

authors_text: Liang Zhang,Yutong Zhang,Jianming Deng,Chen Li
title: DataLight: Offline Data-Driven Traffic Signal Control
title_zh: DataLight：离线数据驱动的交通信号控制
abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) has emerged as a promising solution for addressing traffic signal control (TSC) challenges. While most RL-based TSC systems typically employ an online approach, facilitating frequent active interaction with the environment, learning such strategies in the real world is impractical due to safety and risk concerns. To tackle these challenges, this study introduces an innovative offline data-driven approach, called DataLight. DataLight employs effective state representations and reward function by capturing vehicular speed information within the environment. It then segments roads to capture spatial information and further enhances the spatially segmented state representations with sequential modeling. The experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of DataLight, showcasing superior performance compared to both state-of-the-art online and offline TSC methods. Additionally, DataLight exhibits robust learning capabilities concerning real-world deployment issues. The code is available at https://github.com/LiangZhang1996/DataLight.
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) has emerged as a promising solution for addressing traffic signal control (TSC) challenges. While most RL-based TSC systems typically employ an online approach, facilitating frequent active interaction with the environment, learning such strategies in the real world is impractical due to safety and risk concerns. To tackle these challenges, this study introduces an innovative offline data-driven approach, called DataLight. DataLight employs effective state representations and reward function by capturing vehicular speed information within the environment. It then segments roads to capture spatial information and further enhances the spatially segmented state representations with sequential modeling. The experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of DataLight, showcasing superior performance compared to both state-of-the-art online and offline TSC methods. Additionally, DataLight exhibits robust learning capabilities concerning real-world deployment issues. The code is available at https://github.com/LiangZhang1996/DataLight.
abstract_zh: 强化学习 (RL) 已成为解决交通信号控制 (TSC) 挑战的一种有前景的解决方案。虽然大多数基于强化学习的 TSC 系统通常采用在线方法，促进与环境的频繁主动交互，但由于安全和风险问题，在现实世界中学习此类策略是不切实际的。为了应对这些挑战，本研究引入了一种创新的离线数据驱动方法，称为 DataLight。 DataLight 通过捕获环境内的车辆速度信息来采用有效的状态表示和奖励函数。然后，它对道路进行分段以捕获空间信息，并通过顺序建模进一步增强空间分段的状态表示。实验结果证明了 DataLight 的有效性，与最先进的在线和离线 TSC 方法相比，表现出优越的性能。此外，DataLight 还展示了有关实际部署问题的强大学习能力。代码可在 https://github.com/LiangZhang1996/DataLight 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于离线数据的强化学习方法DataLight，用于解决交通信号控制问题。
AI.motivation: 在线强化学习方法因安全和风险问题难以直接应用于真实世界，需开发无需实时交互的离线数据驱动方案。
AI.method: 通过捕捉车辆速度信息构建状态表示与奖励函数，结合道路分割与序列建模增强空间特征。
AI.result: 实验表明DataLight性能优于现有在线和离线交通信号控制方法，且具备实际部署鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: DataLight为安全高效的交通信号控制提供了可行的离线学习解决方案。

authors_text: Jiawen Zhu,Simiao Lai,Xin Chen,Dong Wang,Huchuan Lu
title: Visual Prompt Multi-Modal Tracking
title_zh: 视觉提示多模式跟踪
abstract: Visible-modal object tracking gives rise to a series of downstream multi-modal tracking tributaries. To inherit the powerful representations of the foundation model, a natural modus operandi for multi-modal tracking is full fine-tuning on the RGB-based parameters. Albeit effective, this manner is not optimal due to the scarcity of downstream data and poor transferability, etc. In this paper, inspired by the recent success of the prompt learning in language models, we develop Visual Prompt multi-modal Tracking (ViPT), which learns the modal-relevant prompts to adapt the frozen pre-trained foundation model to various downstream multimodal tracking tasks. ViPT finds a better way to stimulate the knowledge of the RGB-based model that is pre-trained at scale, meanwhile only introducing a few trainable parameters (less than 1% of model parameters). ViPT outperforms the full fine-tuning paradigm on multiple downstream tracking tasks including RGB+Depth, RGB+Thermal, and RGB+Event tracking. Extensive experiments show the potential of visual prompt learning for multi-modal tracking, and ViPT can achieve state-of-the-art performance while satisfying parameter efficiency. Code and models are available at https://github.com/jiawen-zhu/ViPT.
summary: Visible-modal object tracking gives rise to a series of downstream multi-modal tracking tributaries. To inherit the powerful representations of the foundation model, a natural modus operandi for multi-modal tracking is full fine-tuning on the RGB-based parameters. Albeit effective, this manner is not optimal due to the scarcity of downstream data and poor transferability, etc. In this paper, inspired by the recent success of the prompt learning in language models, we develop Visual Prompt multi-modal Tracking (ViPT), which learns the modal-relevant prompts to adapt the frozen pre-trained foundation model to various downstream multimodal tracking tasks. ViPT finds a better way to stimulate the knowledge of the RGB-based model that is pre-trained at scale, meanwhile only introducing a few trainable parameters (less than 1% of model parameters). ViPT outperforms the full fine-tuning paradigm on multiple downstream tracking tasks including RGB+Depth, RGB+Thermal, and RGB+Event tracking. Extensive experiments show the potential of visual prompt learning for multi-modal tracking, and ViPT can achieve state-of-the-art performance while satisfying parameter efficiency. Code and models are available at https://github.com/jiawen-zhu/ViPT.
abstract_zh: 可见模态目标跟踪产生了一系列下游多模态跟踪支流。为了继承基础模型的强大表示，多模态跟踪的自然操作方法是对基于 RGB 的参数进行全面微调。虽然有效，但由于下游数据稀缺和可迁移性差等原因，这种方式并不是最优的。在本文中，受到语言模型提示学习最近成功的启发，我们开发了视觉提示多模态跟踪（ViPT），它学习模态相关的提示，以使冻结的预训练基础模型适应各种下游多模态跟踪任务。 ViPT 找到了一种更好的方法来刺激大规模预训练的基于 RGB 的模型的知识，同时只引入一些可训练的参数（不到模型参数的 1%）。 ViPT 在多个下游跟踪任务上的性能优于完整的微调范例，包括 RGB+深度、RGB+热和 RGB+事件跟踪。大量实验表明视觉提示学习在多模态跟踪方面的潜力，ViPT 可以在满足参数效率的同时实现最先进的性能。代码和模型可在 https://github.com/jiawen-zhu/ViPT 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为ViPT的视觉提示多模态跟踪方法，通过学习模态相关提示来适应冻结的预训练基础模型，以实现高效的多模态跟踪。
AI.motivation: 传统的全微调方法因下游数据稀缺和迁移能力差而效果不佳，受语言模型中提示学习成功的启发，本文旨在开发一种参数高效的多模态跟踪方法。
AI.method: ViPT通过引入少量可训练参数（不足1%）学习模态相关提示，无需全微调即可激活预训练RGB模型的知识，适应RGB+深度、RGB+热成像等多模态任务。
AI.result: ViPT在多种多模态跟踪任务中优于全微调方法，实现了参数效率与最先进性能的平衡，并提供了代码和模型。
AI.conclusion: 视觉提示学习为多模态跟踪提供了有效且高效的解决方案，ViPT在保持参数效率的同时达到了最先进的性能。

authors_text: Minkyu Jeon,Hyeonjin Park,Hyunwoo J. Kim,Michael Morley,Hyunghoon Cho
title: k-SALSA: k-anonymous synthetic averaging of retinal images via local style alignment
title_zh: k-SALSA：通过局部样式对齐对视网膜图像进行 k 匿名合成平均
abstract: The application of modern machine learning to retinal image analyses offers valuable insights into a broad range of human health conditions beyond ophthalmic diseases. Additionally, data sharing is key to fully realizing the potential of machine learning models by providing a rich and diverse collection of training data. However, the personally-identifying nature of retinal images, encompassing the unique vascular structure of each individual, often prevents this data from being shared openly. While prior works have explored image de-identification strategies based on synthetic averaging of images in other domains (e.g. facial images), existing techniques face difficulty in preserving both privacy and clinical utility in retinal images, as we demonstrate in our work. We therefore introduce k-SALSA, a generative adversarial network (GAN)-based framework for synthesizing retinal fundus images that summarize a given private dataset while satisfying the privacy notion of k-anonymity. k-SALSA brings together state-of-the-art techniques for training and inverting GANs to achieve practical performance on retinal images. Furthermore, k-SALSA leverages a new technique, called local style alignment, to generate a synthetic average that maximizes the retention of fine-grain visual patterns in the source images, thus improving the clinical utility of the generated images. On two benchmark datasets of diabetic retinopathy (EyePACS and APTOS), we demonstrate our improvement upon existing methods with respect to image fidelity, classification performance, and mitigation of membership inference attacks. Our work represents a step toward broader sharing of retinal images for scientific collaboration. Code is available at https://github.com/hcholab/k-salsa.
summary: The application of modern machine learning to retinal image analyses offers valuable insights into a broad range of human health conditions beyond ophthalmic diseases. Additionally, data sharing is key to fully realizing the potential of machine learning models by providing a rich and diverse collection of training data. However, the personally-identifying nature of retinal images, encompassing the unique vascular structure of each individual, often prevents this data from being shared openly. While prior works have explored image de-identification strategies based on synthetic averaging of images in other domains (e.g. facial images), existing techniques face difficulty in preserving both privacy and clinical utility in retinal images, as we demonstrate in our work. We therefore introduce k-SALSA, a generative adversarial network (GAN)-based framework for synthesizing retinal fundus images that summarize a given private dataset while satisfying the privacy notion of k-anonymity. k-SALSA brings together state-of-the-art techniques for training and inverting GANs to achieve practical performance on retinal images. Furthermore, k-SALSA leverages a new technique, called local style alignment, to generate a synthetic average that maximizes the retention of fine-grain visual patterns in the source images, thus improving the clinical utility of the generated images. On two benchmark datasets of diabetic retinopathy (EyePACS and APTOS), we demonstrate our improvement upon existing methods with respect to image fidelity, classification performance, and mitigation of membership inference attacks. Our work represents a step toward broader sharing of retinal images for scientific collaboration. Code is available at https://github.com/hcholab/k-salsa.
abstract_zh: 现代机器学习在视网膜图像分析中的应用为了解眼科疾病以外的广泛人类健康状况提供了宝贵的见解。此外，数据共享是通过提供丰富多样的训练数据集来充分发挥机器学习模型潜力的关键。然而，视网膜图像的个人识别性质，包含每个人独特的血管结构，通常会阻碍这些数据的公开共享。虽然之前的工作已经探索了基于其他领域图像（例如面部图像）的合成平均的图像去识别策略，但正如我们在工作中所证明的那样，现有技术在保护视网膜图像的隐私和临床实用性方面面临着困难。因此，我们引入 k-SALSA，这是一种基于生成对抗网络（GAN）的框架，用于合成视网膜眼底图像，总结给定的私有数据集，同时满足 k-匿名的隐私概念。 k-SALSA 汇集了最先进的 GAN 训练和反转技术，以在视网膜图像上实现实际性能。此外，k-SALSA 利用一种称为局部风格对齐的新技术来生成合成平均值，最大限度地保留源图像中的细粒度视觉模式，从而提高生成图像的临床实用性。在糖尿病视网膜病变的两个基准数据集（EyePACS 和 APTOS）上，我们展示了我们在图像保真度、分类性能和减轻成员推理攻击方面对现有方法的改进。我们的工作代表着朝着更广泛地共享视网膜图像以进行科学合作迈出了一步。代码可在 https://github.com/hcholab/k-salsa 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出k-SALSA方法，通过局部风格对齐生成符合k-匿名性的视网膜图像合成平均，以解决视网膜图像共享中的隐私与临床效用矛盾。
AI.motivation: 视网膜图像因包含个人血管特征而难以共享，现有去标识化方法无法同时保障隐私与临床实用性，阻碍了机器学习模型的训练与协作。
AI.method: 基于生成对抗网络（GAN）的k-SALSA框架，结合最新GAN训练与逆向技术，并引入局部风格对齐策略以保留图像细节。
AI.result: 在EyePACS和APTOS数据集上，k-SALSA在图像保真度、分类性能及抵御成员推理攻击方面优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: k-SALSA为视网膜图像的隐私保护共享提供了可行方案，推动了跨机构的科研合作。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出k-SALSA方法，通过局部风格对齐生成符合k-匿名性的视网膜图像合成平均，以解决视网膜图像共享中的隐私与临床效用矛盾。

search_text: k-SALSA: k-anonymous synthetic averaging of retinal images via local style alignment k-SALSA：通过局部样式对齐对视网膜图像进行 k 匿名合成平均 The application of modern machine learning to retinal image analyses offers valuable insights into a broad range of human health conditions beyond ophthalmic diseases. Additionally, data sharing is key to fully realizing the potential of machine learning models by providing a rich and diverse collection of training data. However, the personally-identifying nature of retinal images, encompassing the unique vascular structure of each individual, often prevents this data from being shared openly. While prior works have explored image de-identification strategies based on synthetic averaging of images in other domains (e.g. facial images), existing techniques face difficulty in preserving both privacy and clinical utility in retinal images, as we demonstrate in our work. We therefore introduce k-SALSA, a generative adversarial network (GAN)-based framework for synthesizing retinal fundus images that summarize a given private dataset while satisfying the privacy notion of k-anonymity. k-SALSA brings together state-of-the-art techniques for training and inverting GANs to achieve practical performance on retinal images. Furthermore, k-SALSA leverages a new technique, called local style alignment, to generate a synthetic average that maximizes the retention of fine-grain visual patterns in the source images, thus improving the clinical utility of the generated images. On two benchmark datasets of diabetic retinopathy (EyePACS and APTOS), we demonstrate our improvement upon existing methods with respect to image fidelity, classification performance, and mitigation of membership inference attacks. Our work represents a step toward broader sharing of retinal images for scientific collaboration. Code is available at https://github.com/hcholab/k-salsa. 现代机器学习在视网膜图像分析中的应用为了解眼科疾病以外的广泛人类健康状况提供了宝贵的见解。此外，数据共享是通过提供丰富多样的训练数据集来充分发挥机器学习模型潜力的关键。然而，视网膜图像的个人识别性质，包含每个人独特的血管结构，通常会阻碍这些数据的公开共享。虽然之前的工作已经探索了基于其他领域图像（例如面部图像）的合成平均的图像去识别策略，但正如我们在工作中所证明的那样，现有技术在保护视网膜图像的隐私和临床实用性方面面临着困难。因此，我们引入 k-SALSA，这是一种基于生成对抗网络（GAN）的框架，用于合成视网膜眼底图像，总结给定的私有数据集，同时满足 k-匿名的隐私概念。 k-SALSA 汇集了最先进的 GAN 训练和反转技术，以在视网膜图像上实现实际性能。此外，k-SALSA 利用一种称为局部风格对齐的新技术来生成合成平均值，最大限度地保留源图像中的细粒度视觉模式，从而提高生成图像的临床实用性。在糖尿病视网膜病变的两个基准数据集（EyePACS 和 APTOS）上，我们展示了我们在图像保真度、分类性能和减轻成员推理攻击方面对现有方法的改进。我们的工作代表着朝着更广泛地共享视网膜图像以进行科学合作迈出了一步。代码可在 https://github.com/hcholab/k-salsa 获取。 本文提出k-SALSA方法，通过局部风格对齐生成符合k-匿名性的视网膜图像合成平均，以解决视网膜图像共享中的隐私与临床效用矛盾。 Minkyu Jeon,Hyeonjin Park,Hyunwoo J. Kim,Michael Morley,Hyunghoon Cho cs.CV,cs.CR

authors_text: Shogo Sato,Yasuhiro Yao,Taiga Yoshida,Takuhiro Kaneko,Shingo Ando,Jun Shimamura
title: Unsupervised Intrinsic Image Decomposition with LiDAR Intensity
title_zh: 利用 LiDAR 强度进行无监督本征图像分解
abstract: Intrinsic image decomposition (IID) is the task that decomposes a natural image into albedo and shade. While IID is typically solved through supervised learning methods, it is not ideal due to the difficulty in observing ground truth albedo and shade in general scenes. Conversely, unsupervised learning methods are currently underperforming supervised learning methods since there are no criteria for solving the ill-posed problems. Recently, light detection and ranging (LiDAR) is widely used due to its ability to make highly precise distance measurements. Thus, we have focused on the utilization of LiDAR, especially LiDAR intensity, to address this issue. In this paper, we propose unsupervised intrinsic image decomposition with LiDAR intensity (IID-LI). Since the conventional unsupervised learning methods consist of image-to-image transformations, simply inputting LiDAR intensity is not an effective approach. Therefore, we design an intensity consistency loss that computes the error between LiDAR intensity and gray-scaled albedo to provide a criterion for the ill-posed problem. In addition, LiDAR intensity is difficult to handle due to its sparsity and occlusion, hence, a LiDAR intensity densification module is proposed. We verified the estimating quality using our own dataset, which include RGB images, LiDAR intensity and human judged annotations. As a result, we achieved an estimation accuracy that outperforms conventional unsupervised learning methods. Dataset link : (https://github.com/ntthilab-cv/NTT-intrinsic-dataset).
summary: Intrinsic image decomposition (IID) is the task that decomposes a natural image into albedo and shade. While IID is typically solved through supervised learning methods, it is not ideal due to the difficulty in observing ground truth albedo and shade in general scenes. Conversely, unsupervised learning methods are currently underperforming supervised learning methods since there are no criteria for solving the ill-posed problems. Recently, light detection and ranging (LiDAR) is widely used due to its ability to make highly precise distance measurements. Thus, we have focused on the utilization of LiDAR, especially LiDAR intensity, to address this issue. In this paper, we propose unsupervised intrinsic image decomposition with LiDAR intensity (IID-LI). Since the conventional unsupervised learning methods consist of image-to-image transformations, simply inputting LiDAR intensity is not an effective approach. Therefore, we design an intensity consistency loss that computes the error between LiDAR intensity and gray-scaled albedo to provide a criterion for the ill-posed problem. In addition, LiDAR intensity is difficult to handle due to its sparsity and occlusion, hence, a LiDAR intensity densification module is proposed. We verified the estimating quality using our own dataset, which include RGB images, LiDAR intensity and human judged annotations. As a result, we achieved an estimation accuracy that outperforms conventional unsupervised learning methods. Dataset link : (https://github.com/ntthilab-cv/NTT-intrinsic-dataset).
abstract_zh: 本征图像分解 (IID) 是将自然图像分解为反照率和阴影的任务。虽然 IID 通常通过监督学习方法来解决，但由于难以观察一般场景中的真实反照率和阴影，因此它并不理想。相反，无监督学习方法目前表现不佳，因为没有解决不适定问题的标准。最近，光探测和测距（LiDAR）由于能够进行高精度距离测量而得到广泛应用。因此，我们重点关注激光雷达的利用，特别是激光雷达强度​​来解决这个问题。在本文中，我们提出了利用 LiDAR 强度进行无监督本征图像分解（IID-LI）。由于传统的无监督学习方法由图像到图像的转换组成，因此简单地输入激光雷达强度​​并不是一种有效的方法。因此，我们设计了强度一致性损失来计算激光雷达强度​​和灰度反照率之间的误差，为不适定问题提供标准。此外，LiDAR强度由于其稀疏性和遮挡而难以处理，因此提出了LiDAR强度致密化模块。我们使用自己的数据集验证了估计质量，其中包括 RGB 图像、LiDAR 强度和人类判断的注释。结果，我们获得了优于传统无监督学习方法的估计精度。数据集链接：（https://github.com/ntthilab-cv/NTT-intrinsic-dataset）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于LiDAR强度的无监督内在图像分解方法（IID-LI），旨在解决传统方法在缺乏真实标注数据时的性能不足问题。
AI.motivation: 传统监督学习方法因难以获取真实场景的光照和反照率标注而受限，而现有无监督方法因病态问题难以有效求解。LiDAR强度数据具有高精度距离测量能力，但未被充分用于内在图像分解任务。
AI.method: 设计了强度一致性损失函数，计算LiDAR强度与灰度反照率间的误差以约束病态问题；提出LiDAR强度密集化模块处理稀疏性和遮挡问题，并基于自建数据集验证方法有效性。
AI.result: 在包含RGB图像、LiDAR强度及人工标注的数据集上，IID-LI方法的估计精度优于传统无监督学习方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入LiDAR强度数据及针对性网络模块，本文有效提升了无监督内在图像分解的性能，为相关研究提供了新思路。

authors_text: Xinhang Li,Xiangyu Zhao,Jiaxing Xu,Yong Zhang,Chunxiao Xing
title: IMF: Interactive Multimodal Fusion Model for Link Prediction
title_zh: IMF：用于链路预测的交互式多模态融合模型
abstract: Link prediction aims to identify potential missing triples in knowledge graphs. To get better results, some recent studies have introduced multimodal information to link prediction. However, these methods utilize multimodal information separately and neglect the complicated interaction between different modalities. In this paper, we aim at better modeling the inter-modality information and thus introduce a novel Interactive Multimodal Fusion (IMF) model to integrate knowledge from different modalities. To this end, we propose a two-stage multimodal fusion framework to preserve modality-specific knowledge as well as take advantage of the complementarity between different modalities. Instead of directly projecting different modalities into a unified space, our multimodal fusion module limits the representations of different modalities independent while leverages bilinear pooling for fusion and incorporates contrastive learning as additional constraints. Furthermore, the decision fusion module delivers the learned weighted average over the predictions of all modalities to better incorporate the complementarity of different modalities. Our approach has been demonstrated to be effective through empirical evaluations on several real-world datasets. The implementation code is available online at https://github.com/HestiaSky/IMF-Pytorch.
summary: Link prediction aims to identify potential missing triples in knowledge graphs. To get better results, some recent studies have introduced multimodal information to link prediction. However, these methods utilize multimodal information separately and neglect the complicated interaction between different modalities. In this paper, we aim at better modeling the inter-modality information and thus introduce a novel Interactive Multimodal Fusion (IMF) model to integrate knowledge from different modalities. To this end, we propose a two-stage multimodal fusion framework to preserve modality-specific knowledge as well as take advantage of the complementarity between different modalities. Instead of directly projecting different modalities into a unified space, our multimodal fusion module limits the representations of different modalities independent while leverages bilinear pooling for fusion and incorporates contrastive learning as additional constraints. Furthermore, the decision fusion module delivers the learned weighted average over the predictions of all modalities to better incorporate the complementarity of different modalities. Our approach has been demonstrated to be effective through empirical evaluations on several real-world datasets. The implementation code is available online at https://github.com/HestiaSky/IMF-Pytorch.
abstract_zh: 链接预测旨在识别知识图中潜在的缺失三元组。为了获得更好的结果，最近的一些研究引入了多模态信息来进行链接预测。然而，这些方法单独利用多模态信息，忽略了不同模态之间复杂的相互作用。在本文中，我们的目标是更好地对模态间信息进行建模，从而引入一种新颖的交互式多模态融合（IMF）模型来集成来自不同模态的知识。为此，我们提出了一个两阶段多模态融合框架，以保留特定模态的知识并利用不同模态之间的互补性。我们的多模态融合模块不是直接将不同模态投影到统一的空间中，而是限制不同模态独立的表示，同时利用双线性池进行融合，并将对比学习作为附加约束。此外，决策融合模块提供所有模态预测的学习加权平均值，以更好地结合不同模态的互补性。通过对几个现实世界数据集的实证评估，我们的方法已被证明是有效的。实现代码可在线获取：https://github.com/HestiaSky/IMF-Pytorch。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种交互式多模态融合模型（IMF），用于知识图谱中的链接预测任务，通过整合多模态信息提升预测效果。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在链接预测中单独使用多模态信息，忽略了不同模态间的复杂交互关系，导致信息利用不充分。
AI.method: 设计两阶段融合框架：1）多模态融合模块通过双线性池化和对比学习独立保留模态特征并融合；2）决策融合模块对多模态预测结果加权平均，强化互补性。
AI.result: 在多个真实数据集上的实验验证了IMF的有效性，代码已开源（GitHub链接提供）。
AI.conclusion: IMF通过建模模态间交互关系，有效提升了多模态信息在链接预测中的利用效率。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种交互式多模态融合模型（IMF），用于知识图谱中的链接预测任务，通过整合多模态信息提升预测效果。
ai_content.motivation: 现有方法在链接预测中单独使用多模态信息，忽略了不同模态间的复杂交互关系，导致信息利用不充分。
ai_content.method: 设计两阶段融合框架：1）多模态融合模块通过双线性池化和对比学习独立保留模态特征并融合；2）决策融合模块对多模态预测结果加权平均，强化互补性。
ai_content.result: 在多个真实数据集上的实验验证了IMF的有效性，代码已开源（GitHub链接提供）。
ai_content.conclusion: IMF通过建模模态间交互关系，有效提升了多模态信息在链接预测中的利用效率。

search_text: IMF: Interactive Multimodal Fusion Model for Link Prediction IMF：用于链路预测的交互式多模态融合模型 Link prediction aims to identify potential missing triples in knowledge graphs. To get better results, some recent studies have introduced multimodal information to link prediction. However, these methods utilize multimodal information separately and neglect the complicated interaction between different modalities. In this paper, we aim at better modeling the inter-modality information and thus introduce a novel Interactive Multimodal Fusion (IMF) model to integrate knowledge from different modalities. To this end, we propose a two-stage multimodal fusion framework to preserve modality-specific knowledge as well as take advantage of the complementarity between different modalities. Instead of directly projecting different modalities into a unified space, our multimodal fusion module limits the representations of different modalities independent while leverages bilinear pooling for fusion and incorporates contrastive learning as additional constraints. Furthermore, the decision fusion module delivers the learned weighted average over the predictions of all modalities to better incorporate the complementarity of different modalities. Our approach has been demonstrated to be effective through empirical evaluations on several real-world datasets. The implementation code is available online at https://github.com/HestiaSky/IMF-Pytorch. 链接预测旨在识别知识图中潜在的缺失三元组。为了获得更好的结果，最近的一些研究引入了多模态信息来进行链接预测。然而，这些方法单独利用多模态信息，忽略了不同模态之间复杂的相互作用。在本文中，我们的目标是更好地对模态间信息进行建模，从而引入一种新颖的交互式多模态融合（IMF）模型来集成来自不同模态的知识。为此，我们提出了一个两阶段多模态融合框架，以保留特定模态的知识并利用不同模态之间的互补性。我们的多模态融合模块不是直接将不同模态投影到统一的空间中，而是限制不同模态独立的表示，同时利用双线性池进行融合，并将对比学习作为附加约束。此外，决策融合模块提供所有模态预测的学习加权平均值，以更好地结合不同模态的互补性。通过对几个现实世界数据集的实证评估，我们的方法已被证明是有效的。实现代码可在线获取：https://github.com/HestiaSky/IMF-Pytorch。 本文提出一种交互式多模态融合模型（IMF），用于知识图谱中的链接预测任务，通过整合多模态信息提升预测效果。 Xinhang Li,Xiangyu Zhao,Jiaxing Xu,Yong Zhang,Chunxiao Xing cs.AI,cs.IR

authors_text: Farhad Aghili
title: Coordination Control of Free-Flyer Manipulators
title_zh: 自由飞行机械臂的协调控制
abstract: This paper presents a method for guiding a robot manipulator to capture and bring a tumbling satellite to a state of rest. The proposed approach includes developing a coordination control for the combined system of the space robot and the target satellite, where the satellite acts as the manipulator payload. This control ensures that the robot tracks the optimal path while regulating the attitude of the chase vehicle to a desired value. Two optimal trajectories are then designed for the pre- and post-capture phases. In the pre-capturing phase, the manipulator manoeuvres are optimized by minimizing a cost function that includes the time of travel and the weighted norms of the end-effector velocity and acceleration, subject to the constraint that the robot end-effector and a grapple fixture on the satellite arrive at the rendezvous point with the same velocity. In the post-grasping phase, the manipulator dumps the initial velocity of the tumbling satellite in minimum time while ensuring that the magnitude of the torque applied to the satellite remains below a safe value. Overall, this method offers a promising solution for effectively capturing and bringing tumbling satellites to a state of rest.
summary: This paper presents a method for guiding a robot manipulator to capture and bring a tumbling satellite to a state of rest. The proposed approach includes developing a coordination control for the combined system of the space robot and the target satellite, where the satellite acts as the manipulator payload. This control ensures that the robot tracks the optimal path while regulating the attitude of the chase vehicle to a desired value. Two optimal trajectories are then designed for the pre- and post-capture phases. In the pre-capturing phase, the manipulator manoeuvres are optimized by minimizing a cost function that includes the time of travel and the weighted norms of the end-effector velocity and acceleration, subject to the constraint that the robot end-effector and a grapple fixture on the satellite arrive at the rendezvous point with the same velocity. In the post-grasping phase, the manipulator dumps the initial velocity of the tumbling satellite in minimum time while ensuring that the magnitude of the torque applied to the satellite remains below a safe value. Overall, this method offers a promising solution for effectively capturing and bringing tumbling satellites to a state of rest.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种引导机器人操纵器捕获翻滚卫星并将其置于静止状态的方法。所提出的方法包括为空间机器人和目标卫星的组合系统开发协调控制，其中卫星充当操纵器的有效载荷。这种控制确保机器人跟踪最佳路径，同时将追逐车辆的姿态调节到期望值。然后为捕获前和捕获后阶段设计两个最佳轨迹。在预捕获阶段，通过最小化成本函数来优化机械手的动作，该成本函数包括行进时间以及末端执行器速度和加速度的加权范数，但受到机器人末端执行器和卫星上的抓斗夹具以相同速度到达交会点的约束。在后抓取阶段，机械臂在最短时间内降低翻滚卫星的初速度，同时确保施加到卫星上的扭矩大小保持在安全值以下。总的来说，这种方法为有效捕获翻滚的卫星并将其置于静止状态提供了一种有前景的解决方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种空间机器人捕获翻滚卫星并使其静止的协调控制方法。
AI.motivation: 在太空任务中，捕获失控的翻滚卫星需要精确的协调控制以确保安全性和效率，传统方法难以同时满足轨迹优化与姿态调节需求。
AI.method: 设计了包含预捕获和后捕获两阶段的最优轨迹控制策略，通过最小化时间成本函数并约束末端速度匹配，结合扭矩安全限制实现卫星姿态稳定。
AI.result: 该方法成功实现了机器人末端与卫星抓捕装置的协同运动，使翻滚卫星在安全扭矩下快速停止。
AI.conclusion: 该协调控制方法为太空捕获任务提供了有效解决方案，兼顾轨迹优化与系统安全性。

authors_text: Arpit Garg,Cuong Nguyen,Rafael Felix,Thanh-Toan Do,Gustavo Carneiro
title: PASS: Peer-Agreement based Sample Selection for training with Noisy Labels
title_zh: 通过：基于同行协议的样本选择，用于带有噪声标签的训练
abstract: The prevalence of noisy-label samples poses a significant challenge in deep learning, inducing overfitting effects. This has, therefore, motivated the emergence of learning with noisy-label (LNL) techniques that focus on separating noisy- and clean-label samples to apply different learning strategies to each group of samples. Current methodologies often rely on the small-loss hypothesis or feature-based selection to separate noisy- and clean-label samples, yet our empirical observations reveal their limitations, especially for labels with instance dependent noise (IDN). An important characteristic of IDN is the difficulty to distinguish the clean-label samples that lie near the decision boundary (i.e., the hard samples) from the noisy-label samples. We, therefore, propose a new noisy-label detection method, termed Peer-Agreement based Sample Selection (PASS), to address this problem. Utilising a trio of classifiers, PASS employs consensus-driven peer-based agreement of two models to select the samples to train the remaining model. PASS is easily integrated into existing LNL models, enabling the improvement of the detection accuracy of noisy- and clean-label samples, which increases the classification accuracy across various LNL benchmarks.
summary: The prevalence of noisy-label samples poses a significant challenge in deep learning, inducing overfitting effects. This has, therefore, motivated the emergence of learning with noisy-label (LNL) techniques that focus on separating noisy- and clean-label samples to apply different learning strategies to each group of samples. Current methodologies often rely on the small-loss hypothesis or feature-based selection to separate noisy- and clean-label samples, yet our empirical observations reveal their limitations, especially for labels with instance dependent noise (IDN). An important characteristic of IDN is the difficulty to distinguish the clean-label samples that lie near the decision boundary (i.e., the hard samples) from the noisy-label samples. We, therefore, propose a new noisy-label detection method, termed Peer-Agreement based Sample Selection (PASS), to address this problem. Utilising a trio of classifiers, PASS employs consensus-driven peer-based agreement of two models to select the samples to train the remaining model. PASS is easily integrated into existing LNL models, enabling the improvement of the detection accuracy of noisy- and clean-label samples, which increases the classification accuracy across various LNL benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 噪声标签样本的普遍存在给深度学习带来了重大挑战，导致过度拟合效应。因此，这推动了噪声标签学习（LNL）技术的出现，该技术专注于分离噪声标签样本和干净标签样本，以便对每组样本应用不同的学习策略。当前的方法通常依赖于小损失假设或基于特征的选择来分离噪声标签样本和干净标签样本，但我们的经验观察揭示了它们的局限性，特别是对于具有实例相关噪声（IDN）的标签。 IDN 的一个重要特征是难以区分决策边界附近的干净标签样本（即硬样本）和噪声标签样本。因此，我们提出了一种新的噪声标签检测方法，称为基于同行协议的样本选择（PASS）来解决这个问题。 PASS 利用三个分类器，采用共识驱动的基于对等的两个模型的协议来选择样本来训练剩余的模型。 PASS 可轻松集成到现有的 LNL 模型中，从而提高噪声和干净标签样本的检测精度，从而提高各种 LNL 基准的分类精度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于同行协议的样本选择方法（PASS），用于解决深度学习中噪声标签训练问题，特别是在实例相关噪声（IDN）场景下提升样本区分能力。
AI.motivation: 现有噪声标签检测方法（如小损失假设或特征选择）难以有效区分IDN中接近决策边界的干净样本与噪声样本，导致模型过拟合问题。
AI.method: 通过构建三个分类器，利用两个模型的共识驱动协议筛选样本，将达成共识的样本用于训练第三个模型，从而提升噪声与干净样本的检测精度。
AI.result: PASS方法在多个LNL基准测试中显著提高了噪声样本检测准确率和分类性能，且可无缝集成到现有LNL框架中。
AI.conclusion: PASS通过多模型共识机制有效解决了IDN场景下的样本区分难题，为噪声标签训练提供了更鲁棒的解决方案。

search_text: PASS: Peer-Agreement based Sample Selection for training with Noisy Labels 通过：基于同行协议的样本选择，用于带有噪声标签的训练 The prevalence of noisy-label samples poses a significant challenge in deep learning, inducing overfitting effects. This has, therefore, motivated the emergence of learning with noisy-label (LNL) techniques that focus on separating noisy- and clean-label samples to apply different learning strategies to each group of samples. Current methodologies often rely on the small-loss hypothesis or feature-based selection to separate noisy- and clean-label samples, yet our empirical observations reveal their limitations, especially for labels with instance dependent noise (IDN). An important characteristic of IDN is the difficulty to distinguish the clean-label samples that lie near the decision boundary (i.e., the hard samples) from the noisy-label samples. We, therefore, propose a new noisy-label detection method, termed Peer-Agreement based Sample Selection (PASS), to address this problem. Utilising a trio of classifiers, PASS employs consensus-driven peer-based agreement of two models to select the samples to train the remaining model. PASS is easily integrated into existing LNL models, enabling the improvement of the detection accuracy of noisy- and clean-label samples, which increases the classification accuracy across various LNL benchmarks. 噪声标签样本的普遍存在给深度学习带来了重大挑战，导致过度拟合效应。因此，这推动了噪声标签学习（LNL）技术的出现，该技术专注于分离噪声标签样本和干净标签样本，以便对每组样本应用不同的学习策略。当前的方法通常依赖于小损失假设或基于特征的选择来分离噪声标签样本和干净标签样本，但我们的经验观察揭示了它们的局限性，特别是对于具有实例相关噪声（IDN）的标签。 IDN 的一个重要特征是难以区分决策边界附近的干净标签样本（即硬样本）和噪声标签样本。因此，我们提出了一种新的噪声标签检测方法，称为基于同行协议的样本选择（PASS）来解决这个问题。 PASS 利用三个分类器，采用共识驱动的基于对等的两个模型的协议来选择样本来训练剩余的模型。 PASS 可轻松集成到现有的 LNL 模型中，从而提高噪声和干净标签样本的检测精度，从而提高各种 LNL 基准的分类精度。 本文提出一种基于同行协议的样本选择方法（PASS），用于解决深度学习中噪声标签训练问题，特别是在实例相关噪声（IDN）场景下提升样本区分能力。 Arpit Garg,Cuong Nguyen,Rafael Felix,Thanh-Toan Do,Gustavo Carneiro cs.CV

authors_text: Nathan Inkawhich
title: A Global Model Approach to Robust Few-Shot SAR Automatic Target Recognition
title_zh: 鲁棒少样本SAR自动目标识别的全局模型方法
abstract: In real-world scenarios, it may not always be possible to collect hundreds of labeled samples per class for training deep learning-based SAR Automatic Target Recognition (ATR) models. This work specifically tackles the few-shot SAR ATR problem, where only a handful of labeled samples may be available to support the task of interest. Our approach is composed of two stages. In the first, a global representation model is trained via self-supervised learning on a large pool of diverse and unlabeled SAR data. In the second stage, the global model is used as a fixed feature extractor and a classifier is trained to partition the feature space given the few-shot support samples, while simultaneously being calibrated to detect anomalous inputs. Unlike competing approaches which require a pristine labeled dataset for pretraining via meta-learning, our approach learns highly transferable features from unlabeled data that have little-to-no relation to the downstream task. We evaluate our method in standard and extended MSTAR operating conditions and find it to achieve high accuracy and robust out-of-distribution detection in many different few-shot settings. Our results are particularly significant because they show the merit of a global model approach to SAR ATR, which makes minimal assumptions, and provides many axes for extendability.
summary: In real-world scenarios, it may not always be possible to collect hundreds of labeled samples per class for training deep learning-based SAR Automatic Target Recognition (ATR) models. This work specifically tackles the few-shot SAR ATR problem, where only a handful of labeled samples may be available to support the task of interest. Our approach is composed of two stages. In the first, a global representation model is trained via self-supervised learning on a large pool of diverse and unlabeled SAR data. In the second stage, the global model is used as a fixed feature extractor and a classifier is trained to partition the feature space given the few-shot support samples, while simultaneously being calibrated to detect anomalous inputs. Unlike competing approaches which require a pristine labeled dataset for pretraining via meta-learning, our approach learns highly transferable features from unlabeled data that have little-to-no relation to the downstream task. We evaluate our method in standard and extended MSTAR operating conditions and find it to achieve high accuracy and robust out-of-distribution detection in many different few-shot settings. Our results are particularly significant because they show the merit of a global model approach to SAR ATR, which makes minimal assumptions, and provides many axes for extendability.
abstract_zh: 在现实场景中，可能并不总是能够为每个类别收集数百个标记样本来训练基于深度学习的 SAR 自动目标识别 (ATR) 模型。这项工作专门解决了少样本 SAR ATR 问题，其中只有少数标记样本可用于支持感兴趣的任务。我们的方法由两个阶段组成。首先，通过对大量多样化且未标记的 SAR 数据进行自监督学习来训练全局表示模型。在第二阶段，全局模型用作固定特征提取器，并训练分类器在给定少数样本支持样本的情况下划分特征空间，同时进行校准以检测异常输入。与需要原始标记数据集通过元学习进行预训练的竞争方法不同，我们的方法从与下游任务几乎没有关系的未标记数据中学习高度可转移的特征。我们在标准和扩展的 MSTAR 操作条件下评估我们的方法，发现它可以在许多不同的少样本设置中实现高精度和鲁棒的分布外检测。我们的结果特别重要，因为它们显示了 SAR ATR 全局模型方法的优点，该方法做出最少的假设，并提供了许多可扩展性的轴。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于全局模型的鲁棒小样本合成孔径雷达（SAR）自动目标识别方法。
AI.motivation: 实际场景中难以获取大量标注样本用于训练SAR自动目标识别模型，需解决小样本条件下的模型性能问题。
AI.method: 分两阶段训练：首先通过自监督学习在未标注SAR数据上构建全局表示模型；其次固定该模型作为特征提取器，结合小样本支持集训练分类器并校准异常检测。
AI.result: 在标准及扩展MSTAR条件下，方法在多种小样本设置中实现高识别准确率和强分布外检测能力。
AI.conclusion: 全局模型方法无需任务相关标注数据即可学习可迁移特征，为SAR目标识别提供灵活可扩展的解决方案。

authors_text: Abdullah Nazib,Riad Hassan,Zahidul Islam,Clinton Fookes
title: Uncertainty Driven Bottleneck Attention U-net for Organ at Risk Segmentation
title_zh: 不确定性驱动的瓶颈注意力 U 网，用于风险器官分割
abstract: Organ at risk (OAR) segmentation in computed tomography (CT) imagery is a difficult task for automated segmentation methods and can be crucial for downstream radiation treatment planning. U-net has become a de-facto standard for medical image segmentation and is frequently used as a common baseline in medical image segmentation tasks. In this paper, we propose a multiple decoder U-net architecture and use the segmentation disagreement between the decoders as attention to the bottleneck of the network for segmentation refinement. While feature correlation is considered as attention in most cases, in our case it is the uncertainty from the network used as attention. For accurate segmentation, we also proposed a CT intensity integrated regularization loss. Proposed regularisation helps model understand the intensity distribution of low contrast tissues. We tested our model on two publicly available OAR challenge datasets. We also conducted the ablation on each datasets with the proposed attention module and regularization loss. Experimental results demonstrate a clear accuracy improvement on both datasets.
summary: Organ at risk (OAR) segmentation in computed tomography (CT) imagery is a difficult task for automated segmentation methods and can be crucial for downstream radiation treatment planning. U-net has become a de-facto standard for medical image segmentation and is frequently used as a common baseline in medical image segmentation tasks. In this paper, we propose a multiple decoder U-net architecture and use the segmentation disagreement between the decoders as attention to the bottleneck of the network for segmentation refinement. While feature correlation is considered as attention in most cases, in our case it is the uncertainty from the network used as attention. For accurate segmentation, we also proposed a CT intensity integrated regularization loss. Proposed regularisation helps model understand the intensity distribution of low contrast tissues. We tested our model on two publicly available OAR challenge datasets. We also conducted the ablation on each datasets with the proposed attention module and regularization loss. Experimental results demonstrate a clear accuracy improvement on both datasets.
abstract_zh: 计算机断层扫描 (CT) 图像中的危及器官 (OAR) 分割对于自动分割方法来说是一项艰巨的任务，但对于下游放射治疗计划至关重要。 U-net 已成为医学图像分割事实上的标准，并经常用作医学图像分割任务中的通用基线。在本文中，我们提出了一种多解码器U-net架构，并利用解码器之间的分割不一致作为对网络瓶颈的关注来进行分割细化。虽然在大多数情况下特征相关性被视为注意力，但在我们的例子中，它是用作注意力的网络的不确定性。为了准确分割，我们还提出了 CT 强度积分正则化损失。所提出的正则化有助于模型理解低对比度组织的强度分布。我们在两个公开可用的 OAR 挑战数据集上测试了我们的模型。我们还使用所提出的注意模块和正则化损失对每个数据集进行了消融。实验结果表明两个数据集的准确性都有明显的提高。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于不确定性的瓶颈注意力U-Net，用于提高CT图像中器官风险分割的准确性
AI.motivation: 现有分割方法在低对比度组织分割中存在挑战，需提升放疗计划中的器官风险分割精度
AI.method: 设计多解码器U-Net，利用解码器分割分歧作为瓶颈注意力，并引入CT强度正则化损失以提升低对比度组织分割
AI.result: 在两个公开数据集上实现准确率提升，消融实验证实注意力模块与正则化损失的有效性
AI.conclusion: 结合不确定性驱动的注意力机制与CT强度正则化可显著提升医学图像分割性能

authors_text: Liu He,Yijuan Lu,John Corring,Dinei Florencio,Cha Zhang
title: Diffusion-based Document Layout Generation
title_zh: 基于扩散的文档布局生成
comment: ef:Document Analysis and Recognition - ICDAR 2023. ICDAR 2023. Lecture Notes in Computer Science, vol 14187. Springer, Cham
comments: ef:Document Analysis and Recognition - ICDAR 2023. ICDAR 2023. Lecture Notes in Computer Science, vol 14187. Springer, Cham
abstract: We develop a diffusion-based approach for various document layout sequence generation. Layout sequences specify the contents of a document design in an explicit format. Our novel diffusion-based approach works in the sequence domain rather than the image domain in order to permit more complex and realistic layouts. We also introduce a new metric, Document Earth Mover's Distance (Doc-EMD). By considering similarity between heterogeneous categories document designs, we handle the shortcomings of prior document metrics that only evaluate the same category of layouts. Our empirical analysis shows that our diffusion-based approach is comparable to or outperforming other previous methods for layout generation across various document datasets. Moreover, our metric is capable of differentiating documents better than previous metrics for specific cases.
summary: We develop a diffusion-based approach for various document layout sequence generation. Layout sequences specify the contents of a document design in an explicit format. Our novel diffusion-based approach works in the sequence domain rather than the image domain in order to permit more complex and realistic layouts. We also introduce a new metric, Document Earth Mover's Distance (Doc-EMD). By considering similarity between heterogeneous categories document designs, we handle the shortcomings of prior document metrics that only evaluate the same category of layouts. Our empirical analysis shows that our diffusion-based approach is comparable to or outperforming other previous methods for layout generation across various document datasets. Moreover, our metric is capable of differentiating documents better than previous metrics for specific cases.
abstract_zh: 我们开发了一种基于扩散的方法来生成各种文档布局序列。布局序列以显式格式指定文档设计的内容。我们新颖的基于扩散的方法在序列域而不是图像域中工作，以便允许更复杂和现实的布局。我们还引入了一个新的指标：文档地球移动器距离 (Doc-EMD)。通过考虑异构类别文档设计之间的相似性，我们解决了仅评估同一类别布局的先前文档度量的缺点。我们的实证分析表明，我们的基于扩散的方法与以前的跨各种文档数据集的布局生成方法相当或优于其他方法。此外，对于特定情况，我们的指标能够比以前的指标更好地区分文档。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于扩散模型的文档布局序列生成方法，以生成更复杂和真实的文档设计。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在图像域生成布局限制了复杂性，且评估指标无法处理不同类别的文档设计，需改进生成方法和评估标准。
AI.method: 提出序列域扩散模型生成布局，并引入Doc-EMD度量异构类别文档设计的相似性。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在多个数据集上优于或匹配现有方法，Doc-EMD能更有效区分文档。
AI.conclusion: 该方法及指标有效提升了文档布局生成的质量和评估能力，推动了相关研究进展。

search_text: Diffusion-based Document Layout Generation 基于扩散的文档布局生成 We develop a diffusion-based approach for various document layout sequence generation. Layout sequences specify the contents of a document design in an explicit format. Our novel diffusion-based approach works in the sequence domain rather than the image domain in order to permit more complex and realistic layouts. We also introduce a new metric, Document Earth Mover's Distance (Doc-EMD). By considering similarity between heterogeneous categories document designs, we handle the shortcomings of prior document metrics that only evaluate the same category of layouts. Our empirical analysis shows that our diffusion-based approach is comparable to or outperforming other previous methods for layout generation across various document datasets. Moreover, our metric is capable of differentiating documents better than previous metrics for specific cases. 我们开发了一种基于扩散的方法来生成各种文档布局序列。布局序列以显式格式指定文档设计的内容。我们新颖的基于扩散的方法在序列域而不是图像域中工作，以便允许更复杂和现实的布局。我们还引入了一个新的指标：文档地球移动器距离 (Doc-EMD)。通过考虑异构类别文档设计之间的相似性，我们解决了仅评估同一类别布局的先前文档度量的缺点。我们的实证分析表明，我们的基于扩散的方法与以前的跨各种文档数据集的布局生成方法相当或优于其他方法。此外，对于特定情况，我们的指标能够比以前的指标更好地区分文档。 提出一种基于扩散模型的文档布局序列生成方法，以生成更复杂和真实的文档设计。 Liu He,Yijuan Lu,John Corring,Dinei Florencio,Cha Zhang cs.CV

authors_text: Julio Candanedo
title: Sparse Partial-Tracing
title_zh: 稀疏部分追踪
abstract: Matrices and more generally multidimensional arrays, form the backbone of computational studies. In this paper we demonstrate increases in computational efficiency by performing partial-tracing/tensor-contractions on sparse-arrays. It was shown that sparse-arrays are really 3 dense-arrays (dense-shape, index-array, and data-array). Dense-array manipulations of these constituent arrays are used to determine the resulting partial-trace. Because computational arrays are used in a verity of different studies, these methods are broadly applicable.
summary: Matrices and more generally multidimensional arrays, form the backbone of computational studies. In this paper we demonstrate increases in computational efficiency by performing partial-tracing/tensor-contractions on sparse-arrays. It was shown that sparse-arrays are really 3 dense-arrays (dense-shape, index-array, and data-array). Dense-array manipulations of these constituent arrays are used to determine the resulting partial-trace. Because computational arrays are used in a verity of different studies, these methods are broadly applicable.
abstract_zh: 矩阵和更普遍的多维数组构成了计算研究的支柱。在本文中，我们证明了通过在稀疏数组上执行部分跟踪/张量收缩来提高计算效率。结果表明，稀疏数组实际上是 3 个密集数组（密集形状、索引数组和数据数组）。这些组成数组的密集数组操作用于确定所得到的部分轨迹。由于计算阵列用于多种不同的研究，因此这些方法具有广泛的适用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过稀疏数组的结构优化部分追踪计算，提升多维数组运算效率。
AI.motivation: 传统密集数组运算在处理高维稀疏数据时存在效率瓶颈，而稀疏数组在科学计算中应用广泛，需更高效的方法。
AI.method: 将稀疏数组分解为密集形状数组、索引数组和数据数组三部分，通过操作这些子数组实现高效的部分追踪计算。
AI.result: 验证了该方法在计算效率上的提升，并证明其在多种计算场景中的通用性。
AI.conclusion: 稀疏数组分解方法为高维数据运算提供了可扩展的高效解决方案，具有广泛的应用前景。

authors_text: Abhilash Pal,Stephan Huber,Cyrine Chaabani,Alessandro Manzotti,Oscar Koller
title: On the Importance of Signer Overlap for Sign Language Detection
title_zh: 论手语重叠对手语检测的重要性
abstract: Sign language detection, identifying if someone is signing or not, is becoming crucially important for its applications in remote conferencing software and for selecting useful sign data for training sign language recognition or translation tasks. We argue that the current benchmark data sets for sign language detection estimate overly positive results that do not generalize well due to signer overlap between train and test partitions. We quantify this with a detailed analysis of the effect of signer overlap on current sign detection benchmark data sets. Comparing accuracy with and without overlap on the DGS corpus and Signing in the Wild, we observed a relative decrease in accuracy of 4.17% and 6.27%, respectively. Furthermore, we propose new data set partitions that are free of overlap and allow for more realistic performance assessment. We hope this work will contribute to improving the accuracy and generalization of sign language detection systems.
summary: Sign language detection, identifying if someone is signing or not, is becoming crucially important for its applications in remote conferencing software and for selecting useful sign data for training sign language recognition or translation tasks. We argue that the current benchmark data sets for sign language detection estimate overly positive results that do not generalize well due to signer overlap between train and test partitions. We quantify this with a detailed analysis of the effect of signer overlap on current sign detection benchmark data sets. Comparing accuracy with and without overlap on the DGS corpus and Signing in the Wild, we observed a relative decrease in accuracy of 4.17% and 6.27%, respectively. Furthermore, we propose new data set partitions that are free of overlap and allow for more realistic performance assessment. We hope this work will contribute to improving the accuracy and generalization of sign language detection systems.
abstract_zh: 手语检测（识别某人是否在手语）对于其在远程会议软件中的应用以及选择有用的手语数据来训练手语识别或翻译任务变得至关重要。我们认为，当前用于手语检测的基准数据集估计了过于积极的结果，由于训练和测试分区之间的手语重叠，这些结果不能很好地概括。我们通过详细分析签名者重叠对当前签名检测基准数据集的影响来量化这一点。比较 DGS 语料库和 Signing in the Wild 上有重叠和没有重叠的准确度，我们观察到准确度相对下降，分别为 4.17% 和 6.27%。此外，我们提出了新的数据集分区，这些分区没有重叠，并且允许更现实的性能评估。我们希望这项工作有助于提高手语检测系统的准确性和通用性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了手语检测数据集中签署者重叠对评估结果的影响，并提出无重叠的数据集划分方法以提升模型泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有手语检测数据集因训练集与测试集间签署者重叠导致评估结果过于乐观，无法真实反映模型性能。
AI.method: 通过分析DGS语料库和Signing in the Wild数据集，对比有无签署者重叠时的检测准确率，并设计新的无重叠数据集划分方案。
AI.result: 去除签署者重叠后，DGS数据集准确率下降4.17%，Signing in the Wild下降6.27%。
AI.conclusion: 签署者重叠会显著影响手语检测模型的评估结果，新划分方法可提供更真实的性能评估基准。

authors_text: Kai Malcolm,Josue Casco-Rodriguez
title: A Comprehensive Review of Spiking Neural Networks: Interpretation, Optimization, Efficiency, and Best Practices
title_zh: 尖峰神经网络的全面回顾：解释、优化、效率和最佳实践
abstract: Biological neural networks continue to inspire breakthroughs in neural network performance. And yet, one key area of neural computation that has been under-appreciated and under-investigated is biologically plausible, energy-efficient spiking neural networks, whose potential is especially attractive for low-power, mobile, or otherwise hardware-constrained settings. We present a literature review of recent developments in the interpretation, optimization, efficiency, and accuracy of spiking neural networks. Key contributions include identification, discussion, and comparison of cutting-edge methods in spiking neural network optimization, energy-efficiency, and evaluation, starting from first principles so as to be accessible to new practitioners.
summary: Biological neural networks continue to inspire breakthroughs in neural network performance. And yet, one key area of neural computation that has been under-appreciated and under-investigated is biologically plausible, energy-efficient spiking neural networks, whose potential is especially attractive for low-power, mobile, or otherwise hardware-constrained settings. We present a literature review of recent developments in the interpretation, optimization, efficiency, and accuracy of spiking neural networks. Key contributions include identification, discussion, and comparison of cutting-edge methods in spiking neural network optimization, energy-efficiency, and evaluation, starting from first principles so as to be accessible to new practitioners.
abstract_zh: 生物神经网络不断激发神经网络性能的突破。然而，神经计算的一个关键领域一直未被充分重视和研究，那就是生物学上合理的、节能的尖峰神经网络，其潜力对于低功耗、移动或其他硬件受限的设置尤其有吸引力。我们对尖峰神经网络的解释、优化、效率和准确性方面的最新进展进行了文献综述。主要贡献包括尖峰神经网络优化、能源效率和评估方面的前沿方法的识别、讨论和比较，从第一原理开始，以便新的从业者能够理解。

AI.tldr: 本文全面回顾了脉冲神经网络在解释性、优化方法、能效及准确性的最新研究进展，并比较了相关技术。
AI.motivation: 尽管生物神经网络启发了性能突破，但生物合理且节能的SNN在硬件受限环境中的潜力尚未被充分研究，亟需系统性综述以指导实践。
AI.method: 通过文献综述方法，系统梳理并比较SNN优化、能效评估及解释性技术，结合基础原理进行分析。
AI.result: 识别并比较了SNN优化与能效评估的前沿方法，总结了提升模型效率与准确性的关键技术。
AI.conclusion: SNN在低功耗应用中具有潜力，但其优化与评估方法仍需进一步研究以推动实际应用。
