authors_text: Lucas Farndale,Robert Insall,Ke Yuan
title: More From Less: Self-Supervised Knowledge Distillation for Routine Histopathology Data
title_zh: 少而多：常规组织病理学数据的自我监督知识蒸馏
abstract: Medical imaging technologies are generating increasingly large amounts of high-quality, information-dense data. Despite the progress, practical use of advanced imaging technologies for research and diagnosis remains limited by cost and availability, so information-sparse data such as H&E stains are relied on in practice. The study of diseased tissue requires methods which can leverage these information-dense data to extract more value from routine, information-sparse data. Using self-supervised deep learning, we demonstrate that it is possible to distil knowledge during training from information-dense data into models which only require information-sparse data for inference. This improves downstream classification accuracy on information-sparse data, making it comparable with the fully-supervised baseline. We find substantial effects on the learned representations, and this training process identifies subtle features which otherwise go undetected. This approach enables the design of models which require only routine images, but contain insights from state-of-the-art data, allowing better use of the available resources.
summary: Medical imaging technologies are generating increasingly large amounts of high-quality, information-dense data. Despite the progress, practical use of advanced imaging technologies for research and diagnosis remains limited by cost and availability, so information-sparse data such as H&E stains are relied on in practice. The study of diseased tissue requires methods which can leverage these information-dense data to extract more value from routine, information-sparse data. Using self-supervised deep learning, we demonstrate that it is possible to distil knowledge during training from information-dense data into models which only require information-sparse data for inference. This improves downstream classification accuracy on information-sparse data, making it comparable with the fully-supervised baseline. We find substantial effects on the learned representations, and this training process identifies subtle features which otherwise go undetected. This approach enables the design of models which require only routine images, but contain insights from state-of-the-art data, allowing better use of the available resources.
abstract_zh: 医学成像技术正在生成越来越多的高质量、信息密集的数据。尽管取得了进展，但先进成像技术在研究和诊断中的实际应用仍然受到成本和可用性的限制，因此在实践中依赖于信息稀疏的数据，例如 H&E 染色。对病变组织的研究需要能够利用这些信息密集的数据从常规的、信息稀疏的数据中提取更多价值的方法。使用自监督深度学习，我们证明可以在训练过程中将知识从信息密集的数据提取到仅需要信息稀疏的数据进行推理的模型中。这提高了信息稀疏数据的下游分类准确性，使其与完全监督的基线相当。我们发现对学习到的表示有很大的影响，并且这个训练过程识别了否则不会被发现的微妙特征。这种方法可以设计出仅需要常规图像的模型，但包含来自最新数据的见解，从而可以更好地利用可用资源。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自监督知识蒸馏方法，通过从信息密集的医疗影像数据中提取知识，提升常规稀疏数据（如H&E染色）的模型性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管医疗影像技术生成了高质量数据，但实际应用受限于成本和可用性，仍依赖信息量较少的常规染色数据，需提升其利用效率。
AI.method: 采用自监督深度学习框架，在训练阶段从信息密集数据中蒸馏知识至仅需稀疏数据进行推理的模型，通过特征迁移增强模型表现。
AI.result: 模型在稀疏数据上的分类准确率显著提升，接近全监督基线；学习到的表示能捕捉细微特征，优化资源利用。
AI.conclusion: 该方法使仅依赖常规图像的模型可融合前沿数据的洞见，有效提升病理分析的实用性与资源利用率。

authors_text: R. James Cotton,Allison DeLillo,Anthony Cimorelli,Kunal Shah,J. D. Peiffer,Shawana Anarwala,Kayan Abdou,Tasos Karakostas
title: Markerless Motion Capture and Biomechanical Analysis Pipeline
title_zh: 无标记运动捕捉和生物力学分析流程
abstract: Markerless motion capture using computer vision and human pose estimation (HPE) has the potential to expand access to precise movement analysis. This could greatly benefit rehabilitation by enabling more accurate tracking of outcomes and providing more sensitive tools for research. There are numerous steps between obtaining videos to extracting accurate biomechanical results and limited research to guide many critical design decisions in these pipelines. In this work, we analyze several of these steps including the algorithm used to detect keypoints and the keypoint set, the approach to reconstructing trajectories for biomechanical inverse kinematics and optimizing the IK process. Several features we find important are: 1) using a recent algorithm trained on many datasets that produces a dense set of biomechanically-motivated keypoints, 2) using an implicit representation to reconstruct smooth, anatomically constrained marker trajectories for IK, 3) iteratively optimizing the biomechanical model to match the dense markers, 4) appropriate regularization of the IK process. Our pipeline makes it easy to obtain accurate biomechanical estimates of movement in a rehabilitation hospital.
summary: Markerless motion capture using computer vision and human pose estimation (HPE) has the potential to expand access to precise movement analysis. This could greatly benefit rehabilitation by enabling more accurate tracking of outcomes and providing more sensitive tools for research. There are numerous steps between obtaining videos to extracting accurate biomechanical results and limited research to guide many critical design decisions in these pipelines. In this work, we analyze several of these steps including the algorithm used to detect keypoints and the keypoint set, the approach to reconstructing trajectories for biomechanical inverse kinematics and optimizing the IK process. Several features we find important are: 1) using a recent algorithm trained on many datasets that produces a dense set of biomechanically-motivated keypoints, 2) using an implicit representation to reconstruct smooth, anatomically constrained marker trajectories for IK, 3) iteratively optimizing the biomechanical model to match the dense markers, 4) appropriate regularization of the IK process. Our pipeline makes it easy to obtain accurate biomechanical estimates of movement in a rehabilitation hospital.
abstract_zh: 使用计算机视觉和人体姿势估计 (HPE) 的无标记运动捕捉有可能扩大精确运动分析的范围。通过更准确地跟踪结果并提供更灵敏的研究工具，这可以极大地有益于康复。从获取视频到提取准确的生物力学结果之间有许多步骤，并且指导这些流程中许多关键设计决策的研究有限。在这项工作中，我们分析了其中的几个步骤，包括用于检测关键点和关键点集的算法、重建生物力学逆运动学轨迹的方法以及优化 IK 过程。我们发现重要的几个功能是：1）使用在许多数据集上训练的最新算法，产生一组密集的生物力学驱动的关键点，2）使用隐式表示来重建平滑的、解剖学约束的 IK 标记轨迹，3）迭代优化生物力学模型以匹配密集标记，4）IK 过程的适当正则化。我们的管道可以轻松获得康复医院运动的准确生物力学估计。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需标记的运动捕捉与生物力学分析流程，通过计算机视觉和人体姿态估计技术实现精确的运动分析。
AI.motivation: 传统运动捕捉依赖标记物，限制了其在康复领域的应用。本文旨在通过无标记方法提升运动分析的准确性与可及性，从而改善康复效果和研究工具。
AI.method: 采用多数据集训练的密集生物力学关键点检测算法，结合隐式表示重建平滑轨迹，通过迭代优化逆运动学模型并加入正则化约束。
AI.result: 开发出可在康复医院中便捷获取精确生物力学运动估计的流程，验证了各关键步骤对提升分析精度的重要性。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法通过优化关键点检测、轨迹重建和逆运动学流程，为无标记运动分析提供了高效且准确的解决方案，有助于推动康复领域的精准化发展。

ai_content_json.result: 开发出可在康复医院中便捷获取精确生物力学运动估计的流程，验证了各关键步骤对提升分析精度的重要性。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 本文方法通过优化关键点检测、轨迹重建和逆运动学流程，为无标记运动分析提供了高效且准确的解决方案，有助于推动康复领域的精准化发展。

tldr: 本文提出了一种无需标记的运动捕捉与生物力学分析流程，通过计算机视觉和人体姿态估计技术实现精确的运动分析。

search_text: Markerless Motion Capture and Biomechanical Analysis Pipeline 无标记运动捕捉和生物力学分析流程 Markerless motion capture using computer vision and human pose estimation (HPE) has the potential to expand access to precise movement analysis. This could greatly benefit rehabilitation by enabling more accurate tracking of outcomes and providing more sensitive tools for research. There are numerous steps between obtaining videos to extracting accurate biomechanical results and limited research to guide many critical design decisions in these pipelines. In this work, we analyze several of these steps including the algorithm used to detect keypoints and the keypoint set, the approach to reconstructing trajectories for biomechanical inverse kinematics and optimizing the IK process. Several features we find important are: 1) using a recent algorithm trained on many datasets that produces a dense set of biomechanically-motivated keypoints, 2) using an implicit representation to reconstruct smooth, anatomically constrained marker trajectories for IK, 3) iteratively optimizing the biomechanical model to match the dense markers, 4) appropriate regularization of the IK process. Our pipeline makes it easy to obtain accurate biomechanical estimates of movement in a rehabilitation hospital. 使用计算机视觉和人体姿势估计 (HPE) 的无标记运动捕捉有可能扩大精确运动分析的范围。通过更准确地跟踪结果并提供更灵敏的研究工具，这可以极大地有益于康复。从获取视频到提取准确的生物力学结果之间有许多步骤，并且指导这些流程中许多关键设计决策的研究有限。在这项工作中，我们分析了其中的几个步骤，包括用于检测关键点和关键点集的算法、重建生物力学逆运动学轨迹的方法以及优化 IK 过程。我们发现重要的几个功能是：1）使用在许多数据集上训练的最新算法，产生一组密集的生物力学驱动的关键点，2）使用隐式表示来重建平滑的、解剖学约束的 IK 标记轨迹，3）迭代优化生物力学模型以匹配密集标记，4）IK 过程的适当正则化。我们的管道可以轻松获得康复医院运动的准确生物力学估计。 本文提出了一种无需标记的运动捕捉与生物力学分析流程，通过计算机视觉和人体姿态估计技术实现精确的运动分析。 R. James Cotton,Allison DeLillo,Anthony Cimorelli,Kunal Shah,J. D. Peiffer,Shawana Anarwala,Kayan Abdou,Tasos Karakostas cs.CV

authors_text: Gaojie Jin,Xinping Yi,Dengyu Wu,Ronghui Mu,Xiaowei Huang
title: Randomized Adversarial Training via Taylor Expansion
title_zh: 通过泰勒展开式的随机对抗训练
abstract: In recent years, there has been an explosion of research into developing more robust deep neural networks against adversarial examples. Adversarial training appears as one of the most successful methods. To deal with both the robustness against adversarial examples and the accuracy over clean examples, many works develop enhanced adversarial training methods to achieve various trade-offs between them. Leveraging over the studies that smoothed update on weights during training may help find flat minima and improve generalization, we suggest reconciling the robustness-accuracy trade-off from another perspective, i.e., by adding random noise into deterministic weights. The randomized weights enable our design of a novel adversarial training method via Taylor expansion of a small Gaussian noise, and we show that the new adversarial training method can flatten loss landscape and find flat minima. With PGD, CW, and Auto Attacks, an extensive set of experiments demonstrate that our method enhances the state-of-the-art adversarial training methods, boosting both robustness and clean accuracy. The code is available at https://github.com/Alexkael/Randomized-Adversarial-Training.
summary: In recent years, there has been an explosion of research into developing more robust deep neural networks against adversarial examples. Adversarial training appears as one of the most successful methods. To deal with both the robustness against adversarial examples and the accuracy over clean examples, many works develop enhanced adversarial training methods to achieve various trade-offs between them. Leveraging over the studies that smoothed update on weights during training may help find flat minima and improve generalization, we suggest reconciling the robustness-accuracy trade-off from another perspective, i.e., by adding random noise into deterministic weights. The randomized weights enable our design of a novel adversarial training method via Taylor expansion of a small Gaussian noise, and we show that the new adversarial training method can flatten loss landscape and find flat minima. With PGD, CW, and Auto Attacks, an extensive set of experiments demonstrate that our method enhances the state-of-the-art adversarial training methods, boosting both robustness and clean accuracy. The code is available at https://github.com/Alexkael/Randomized-Adversarial-Training.
abstract_zh: 近年来，针对对抗样本开发更强大的深度神经网络的研究激增。对抗性训练似乎是最成功的方法之一。为了同时处理对抗性示例的鲁棒性和干净示例的准确性，许多工作开发了增强的对抗性训练方法以实现它们之间的各种权衡。利用训练期间权重更新平滑的研究可能有助于找到平坦最小值并提高泛化能力，我们建议从另一个角度协调鲁棒性与准确性的权衡，即通过在确定性权重中添加随机噪声。随机权重使我们能够通过小高斯噪声的泰勒展开来设计一种新颖的对抗训练方法，并且我们表明新的对抗训练方法可以使损失景观平坦并找到平坦的最小值。通过 PGD、CW 和自动攻击，大量实验表明我们的方法增强了最先进的对抗训练方法，提高了鲁棒性和干净的准确性。代码可在 https://github.com/Alexkael/Randomized-Adversarial-Training 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于泰勒展开的随机对抗训练方法，通过在确定性权重中添加随机噪声，提升模型对对抗样本的鲁棒性及干净数据的准确率。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗训练方法在提升模型鲁棒性时易导致准确率下降，需寻找新的方式平衡两者。研究发现平滑权重更新有助于找到平坦极小值，从而启发通过随机噪声优化训练过程。
AI.method: 在确定性权重中注入小幅度高斯噪声，利用泰勒展开近似扰动影响，设计新型对抗训练框架以平坦化损失景观并寻找更优极小值。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在PGD、CW和Auto Attacks等攻击下，优于现有对抗训练方法，在鲁棒性和干净数据准确率上均取得提升。
AI.conclusion: 随机化权重结合泰勒展开的对抗训练有效缓解了鲁棒性-准确性权衡问题，代码已开源供验证。

authors_text: Natalia Ślusarz,Ekaterina Komendantskaya,Matthew L. Daggitt,Robert Stewart,Kathrin Stark
title: Logic of Differentiable Logics: Towards a Uniform Semantics of DL
title_zh: 可微逻辑的逻辑：迈向深度学习的统一语义
abstract: Differentiable logics (DL) have recently been proposed as a method of training neural networks to satisfy logical specifications. A DL consists of a syntax in which specifications are stated and an interpretation function that translates expressions in the syntax into loss functions. These loss functions can then be used during training with standard gradient descent algorithms. The variety of existing DLs and the differing levels of formality with which they are treated makes a systematic comparative study of their properties and implementations difficult. This paper remedies this problem by suggesting a meta-language for defining DLs that we call the Logic of Differentiable Logics, or LDL. Syntactically, it generalises the syntax of existing DLs to FOL, and for the first time introduces the formalism for reasoning about vectors and learners. Semantically, it introduces a general interpretation function that can be instantiated to define loss functions arising from different existing DLs. We use LDL to establish several theoretical properties of existing DLs, and to conduct their empirical study in neural network verification.
summary: Differentiable logics (DL) have recently been proposed as a method of training neural networks to satisfy logical specifications. A DL consists of a syntax in which specifications are stated and an interpretation function that translates expressions in the syntax into loss functions. These loss functions can then be used during training with standard gradient descent algorithms. The variety of existing DLs and the differing levels of formality with which they are treated makes a systematic comparative study of their properties and implementations difficult. This paper remedies this problem by suggesting a meta-language for defining DLs that we call the Logic of Differentiable Logics, or LDL. Syntactically, it generalises the syntax of existing DLs to FOL, and for the first time introduces the formalism for reasoning about vectors and learners. Semantically, it introduces a general interpretation function that can be instantiated to define loss functions arising from different existing DLs. We use LDL to establish several theoretical properties of existing DLs, and to conduct their empirical study in neural network verification.
abstract_zh: 最近提出了可微逻辑（DL）作为训练神经网络以满足逻辑规范的方法。 DL 由声明规范的语法和将语法中的表达式转换为损失函数的解释函数组成。然后可以在使用标准梯度下降算法进行训练期间使用这些损失函数。现有 DL 的多样性以及处理它们的不同正式程度使得对其属性和实现进行系统比较研究变得困难。本文通过提出一种定义 DL 的元语言来解决这个问题，我们将其称为可微分逻辑的逻辑，或 LDL。在语法上，它将现有 DL 的语法推广到 FOL，并首次引入了向量和学习器推理的形式主义。从语义上讲，它引入了一个通用解释函数，可以实例化该函数来定义由不同现有深度学习产生的损失函数。我们使用 LDL 来建立现有 DL 的几个理论属性，并在神经网络验证中进行实证研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种元语言LDL，用于统一定义和语义化不同可微逻辑（DL），促进其理论分析与比较。
AI.motivation: 现有DL形式多样且形式化程度不一，缺乏统一框架导致难以系统比较其性质与实现。
AI.method: 设计LDL元语言，将DL语法推广至一阶逻辑，并引入向量与学习者的推理形式化，定义通用解释函数以实例化不同DL的损失函数。
AI.result: 通过LDL建立现有DL的理论性质，并在神经网络验证中进行实证研究。
AI.conclusion: LDL为DL提供了统一的语义框架，有助于推动其理论分析与实际应用的深入研究。

authors_text: Nicolas Bousquet,Quentin Deschamps,Aline Parreau
title: Metric dimension parameterized by treewidth in chordal graphs
title_zh: 弦图中树宽参数化的度量维度
abstract: The metric dimension has been introduced independently by Harary, Melter and Slater in 1975 to identify vertices of a graph G using its distances to a subset of vertices of G. A resolving set X of a graph G is a subset of vertices such that, for every pair (u,v) of vertices of G, there is a vertex x in X such that the distance between x and u and the distance between x and v are distinct. The metric dimension of the graph is the minimum size of a resolving set. Computing the metric dimension of a graph is NP-hard even on split graphs and interval graphs. Bonnet and Purohit proved that the metric dimension problem is W[1]-hard parameterized by treewidth. Li and Pilipczuk strenghtened this result by showing that it is NP-hard for graphs of treewidth. In this article, we prove that that metric dimension is FPT parameterized by treewidth in chordal graphs.
summary: The metric dimension has been introduced independently by Harary, Melter and Slater in 1975 to identify vertices of a graph G using its distances to a subset of vertices of G. A resolving set X of a graph G is a subset of vertices such that, for every pair (u,v) of vertices of G, there is a vertex x in X such that the distance between x and u and the distance between x and v are distinct. The metric dimension of the graph is the minimum size of a resolving set. Computing the metric dimension of a graph is NP-hard even on split graphs and interval graphs. Bonnet and Purohit proved that the metric dimension problem is W[1]-hard parameterized by treewidth. Li and Pilipczuk strenghtened this result by showing that it is NP-hard for graphs of treewidth. In this article, we prove that that metric dimension is FPT parameterized by treewidth in chordal graphs.
abstract_zh: 度量维度由 Harary、Melter 和 Slater 于 1975 年独立引入，用于使用图 G 到 G 顶点子集的距离来识别图 G 的顶点。图 G 的解析集 X 是顶点的子集，使得对于 G 的每对 (u,v) 顶点，X 中存在一个顶点 x，使得 x 和 u 之间的距离以及 x 和 v 之间的距离不同。图的度量维度是解析集的最小大小。即使在分割图和区间图上，计算图的度量维度也是 NP 困难的。 Bonnet 和 Purohit 证明了度量维度问题是由树宽参数化的 W[1]-hard 问题。 Li 和 Pilipczuk 通过证明树宽图是 NP 困难的来强化了这一结果。在本文中，我们证明了度量维度是由弦图中的树宽参数化的 FPT。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了弦图中度量维度在树宽参数化下的计算复杂性，并证明其属于FPT问题。
AI.motivation: 度量维度计算在分裂图和区间图中均为NP难，且此前研究显示其在树宽参数化下为W[1]-难。本文旨在探索弦图这一特殊图类是否存在更优的参数化算法。
AI.method: 利用弦图的树分解特性，结合动态规划与参数化算法设计，针对树宽参数构建有效求解框架。
AI.result: 证明弦图中度量维度问题在树宽参数化下属于FPT类，突破了此前在一般图中的W[1]-难结果。
AI.conclusion: 弦图的结构特性使其在树宽参数化下具备可计算性优势，为参数化算法研究提供了新的方向。

authors_text: Zihan Wang,Siyang Song,Cheng Luo,Yuzhi Zhou,Shiling Wu,Weicheng Xie,Linlin Shen
title: Spatio-Temporal AU Relational Graph Representation Learning For Facial Action Units Detection
title_zh: 用于面部动作单元检测的时空 AU 关系图表示学习
abstract: This paper presents our Facial Action Units (AUs) detection submission to the fifth Affective Behavior Analysis in-the-wild Competition (ABAW). Our approach consists of three main modules: (i) a pre-trained facial representation encoder which produce a strong facial representation from each input face image in the input sequence; (ii) an AU-specific feature generator that specifically learns a set of AU features from each facial representation; and (iii) a spatio-temporal graph learning module that constructs a spatio-temporal graph representation. This graph representation describes AUs contained in all frames and predicts the occurrence of each AU based on both the modeled spatial information within the corresponding face and the learned temporal dynamics among frames. The experimental results show that our approach outperformed the baseline and the spatio-temporal graph representation learning allows our model to generate the best results among all ablated systems. Our model ranks at the 4th place in the AU recognition track at the 5th ABAW Competition. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/wzh125/ABAW-5.
summary: This paper presents our Facial Action Units (AUs) detection submission to the fifth Affective Behavior Analysis in-the-wild Competition (ABAW). Our approach consists of three main modules: (i) a pre-trained facial representation encoder which produce a strong facial representation from each input face image in the input sequence; (ii) an AU-specific feature generator that specifically learns a set of AU features from each facial representation; and (iii) a spatio-temporal graph learning module that constructs a spatio-temporal graph representation. This graph representation describes AUs contained in all frames and predicts the occurrence of each AU based on both the modeled spatial information within the corresponding face and the learned temporal dynamics among frames. The experimental results show that our approach outperformed the baseline and the spatio-temporal graph representation learning allows our model to generate the best results among all ablated systems. Our model ranks at the 4th place in the AU recognition track at the 5th ABAW Competition. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/wzh125/ABAW-5.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了我们向第五届情感行为分析野外竞赛 (ABAW) 提交的面部动作单元 (AU) 检测。我们的方法由三个主要模块组成：（i）预先训练的面部表示编码器，它从输入序列中的每个输入面部图像产生强大的面部表示； (ii) 特定于 AU 的特征生成器，专门从每个面部表征中学习一组 AU 特征； (iii)构建时空图表示的时空图学习模块。该图形表示描述了所有帧中包含的 AU，并根据相应面部内的建模空间信息和帧间学习的时间动态来预测每个 AU 的出现。实验结果表明，我们的方法优于基线，并且时空图表示学习使我们的模型能够在所有消融系统中生成最佳结果。我们的模型在第五届 ABAW 竞赛中在 AU 识别赛道中排名第四。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/wzh125/ABAW-5 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于时空图关系表示学习的方法，用于改进面部动作单元（AUs）检测任务。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在面部动作单元检测中难以有效融合时空信息，导致检测精度不足。本文旨在通过构建时空图模型，同时建模面部空间特征与时间动态关系，提升检测性能。
AI.method: 方法包含三个模块：(i) 预训练面部表示编码器提取面部特征；(ii) AU特异性特征生成器学习动作单元特征；(iii) 时空图学习模块构建时空图表示，联合建模帧间时序动态与面部空间关系。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在ABAW-5竞赛中AU识别任务排名第四，优于基线模型及所有消融实验版本，验证了时空图学习的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 时空图表示学习能有效捕捉面部动作单元的时空特征，为AUs检测提供新思路，未来可进一步优化图结构学习策略。

authors_text: Song Zhao,Shiwei Cheng,Chenshuang Zhu
title: 3D Gaze Vis: Sharing Eye Tracking Data Visualization for Collaborative Work in VR Environment
title_zh: 3D Gaze Vis：共享眼动追踪数据可视化以实现 VR 环境中的协作工作
abstract: Conducting collaborative tasks, e.g., multi-user game, in virtual reality (VR) could enable us to explore more immersive and effective experience. However, for current VR systems, users cannot communicate properly with each other via their gaze points, and this would interfere with users' mutual understanding of the intention. In this study, we aimed to find the optimal eye tracking data visualization , which minimized the cognitive interference and improved the understanding of the visual attention and intention between users. We designed three different eye tracking data visualizations: gaze cursor, gaze spotlight and gaze trajectory in VR scene for a course of human heart , and found that gaze cursor from doctors could help students learn complex 3D heart models more effectively. To further explore, two students as a pair were asked to finish a quiz in VR environment, with sharing gaze cursors with each other, and obtained more efficiency and scores. It indicated that sharing eye tracking data visualization could improve the quality and efficiency of collaborative work in the VR environment.
summary: Conducting collaborative tasks, e.g., multi-user game, in virtual reality (VR) could enable us to explore more immersive and effective experience. However, for current VR systems, users cannot communicate properly with each other via their gaze points, and this would interfere with users' mutual understanding of the intention. In this study, we aimed to find the optimal eye tracking data visualization , which minimized the cognitive interference and improved the understanding of the visual attention and intention between users. We designed three different eye tracking data visualizations: gaze cursor, gaze spotlight and gaze trajectory in VR scene for a course of human heart , and found that gaze cursor from doctors could help students learn complex 3D heart models more effectively. To further explore, two students as a pair were asked to finish a quiz in VR environment, with sharing gaze cursors with each other, and obtained more efficiency and scores. It indicated that sharing eye tracking data visualization could improve the quality and efficiency of collaborative work in the VR environment.
abstract_zh: 在虚拟现实 (VR) 中执行协作任务（例如多用户游戏）可以让我们探索更加身临其境和有效的体验。然而，对于当前的VR系统来说，用户无法通过他们的注视点彼此进行正确的交流，这会干扰用户对意图的相互理解。在本研究中，我们的目标是找到最佳的眼动追踪数据可视化，最大限度地减少认知干扰，提高对用户之间视觉注意力和意图的理解。我们为人体心脏课程设计了三种不同的眼动追踪数据可视化：凝视光标、凝视聚光灯和VR场景中的凝视轨迹，发现医生的凝视光标可以帮助学生更有效地学习复杂的3D心脏模型。为了进一步探索，两名学生被要求在 VR 环境中完成测验，彼此共享凝视光标，并获得了更高的效率和分数。这表明共享眼动追踪数据可视化可以提高VR环境中协作工作的质量和效率。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在为虚拟现实环境中的协作任务设计并测试最优的眼动追踪数据可视化方法，以提升用户间的意图理解和协作效率。
AI.motivation: 当前VR系统缺乏有效的视线交流方式，导致用户难以通过视线点进行沟通，影响协作中的意图理解。
AI.method: 设计了三种眼动数据可视化方式（视线光标、视线光斑、视线轨迹），在虚拟现实场景中进行人体心脏课程学习及协作答题实验，对比不同方法的效果。
AI.result: 医生的视线光标帮助学生更高效学习复杂3D心脏模型；协作答题时共享视线光标的学生组效率和得分更高。
AI.conclusion: 共享眼动追踪数据可视化能有效提升VR环境下的协作质量与效率，视线光标是较优方案。

ai_content_json.conclusion: 共享眼动追踪数据可视化能有效提升VR环境下的协作质量与效率，视线光标是较优方案。

tldr: 本文旨在为虚拟现实环境中的协作任务设计并测试最优的眼动追踪数据可视化方法，以提升用户间的意图理解和协作效率。
motivation: 当前VR系统缺乏有效的视线交流方式，导致用户难以通过视线点进行沟通，影响协作中的意图理解。
method: 设计了三种眼动数据可视化方式（视线光标、视线光斑、视线轨迹），在虚拟现实场景中进行人体心脏课程学习及协作答题实验，对比不同方法的效果。
result: 医生的视线光标帮助学生更高效学习复杂3D心脏模型；协作答题时共享视线光标的学生组效率和得分更高。
conclusion: 共享眼动追踪数据可视化能有效提升VR环境下的协作质量与效率，视线光标是较优方案。
search_text: 3D Gaze Vis: Sharing Eye Tracking Data Visualization for Collaborative Work in VR Environment 3D Gaze Vis：共享眼动追踪数据可视化以实现 VR 环境中的协作工作 Conducting collaborative tasks, e.g., multi-user game, in virtual reality (VR) could enable us to explore more immersive and effective experience. However, for current VR systems, users cannot communicate properly with each other via their gaze points, and this would interfere with users' mutual understanding of the intention. In this study, we aimed to find the optimal eye tracking data visualization , which minimized the cognitive interference and improved the understanding of the visual attention and intention between users. We designed three different eye tracking data visualizations: gaze cursor, gaze spotlight and gaze trajectory in VR scene for a course of human heart , and found that gaze cursor from doctors could help students learn complex 3D heart models more effectively. To further explore, two students as a pair were asked to finish a quiz in VR environment, with sharing gaze cursors with each other, and obtained more efficiency and scores. It indicated that sharing eye tracking data visualization could improve the quality and efficiency of collaborative work in the VR environment. 在虚拟现实 (VR) 中执行协作任务（例如多用户游戏）可以让我们探索更加身临其境和有效的体验。然而，对于当前的VR系统来说，用户无法通过他们的注视点彼此进行正确的交流，这会干扰用户对意图的相互理解。在本研究中，我们的目标是找到最佳的眼动追踪数据可视化，最大限度地减少认知干扰，提高对用户之间视觉注意力和意图的理解。我们为人体心脏课程设计了三种不同的眼动追踪数据可视化：凝视光标、凝视聚光灯和VR场景中的凝视轨迹，发现医生的凝视光标可以帮助学生更有效地学习复杂的3D心脏模型。为了进一步探索，两名学生被要求在 VR 环境中完成测验，彼此共享凝视光标，并获得了更高的效率和分数。这表明共享眼动追踪数据可视化可以提高VR环境中协作工作的质量和效率。 本文旨在为虚拟现实环境中的协作任务设计并测试最优的眼动追踪数据可视化方法，以提升用户间的意图理解和协作效率。 Song Zhao,Shiwei Cheng,Chenshuang Zhu cs.HC,cs.CY

authors_text: Muhammed Gouda,Steven Abreu,Alessio Lugnan,Peter Bienstman
title: Training a spiking neural network on an event-based label-free flow cytometry dataset
title_zh: 在基于事件的无标签流式细胞术数据集上训练尖峰神经网络
comment: Accepted to Neuro-Inspired Computational Elements (NICE) conference by ACM in San Antonio, TX, USA, 2023
comments: Accepted to Neuro-Inspired Computational Elements (NICE) conference by ACM in San Antonio, TX, USA, 2023
abstract: Imaging flow cytometry systems aim to analyze a huge number of cells or micro-particles based on their physical characteristics. The vast majority of current systems acquire a large amount of images which are used to train deep artificial neural networks. However, this approach increases both the latency and power consumption of the final apparatus. In this work-in-progress, we combine an event-based camera with a free-space optical setup to obtain spikes for each particle passing in a microfluidic channel. A spiking neural network is trained on the collected dataset, resulting in 97.7% mean training accuracy and 93.5% mean testing accuracy for the fully event-based classification pipeline.
summary: Imaging flow cytometry systems aim to analyze a huge number of cells or micro-particles based on their physical characteristics. The vast majority of current systems acquire a large amount of images which are used to train deep artificial neural networks. However, this approach increases both the latency and power consumption of the final apparatus. In this work-in-progress, we combine an event-based camera with a free-space optical setup to obtain spikes for each particle passing in a microfluidic channel. A spiking neural network is trained on the collected dataset, resulting in 97.7% mean training accuracy and 93.5% mean testing accuracy for the fully event-based classification pipeline.
abstract_zh: 成像流式细胞术系统旨在根据物理特性分析大量细胞或微粒。当前绝大多数系统都会获取大量图像，用于训练深度人工神经网络。然而，这种方法增加了最终设备的等待时间和功耗。在这项正在进行的工作中，我们将基于事件的相机与自由空间光学设置相结合，以获得通过微流体通道的每个粒子的尖峰。在收集的数据集上训练尖峰神经网络，使完全基于事件的分类管道的平均训练准确度达到 97.7%，平均测试准确度达到 93.5%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于事件驱动的无标签流式细胞术分类方法，通过结合事件相机与自由空间光学系统采集微流控通道中粒子的脉冲数据，并利用脉冲神经网络实现高效分类。
AI.motivation: 传统成像流式细胞仪依赖大量图像训练深度网络，导致系统延迟高、功耗大，亟需更高效的数据采集与处理方案。
AI.method: 采用事件相机与自由空间光学系统捕捉微流控通道中粒子的动态特征，生成稀疏脉冲数据集，进而训练脉冲神经网络实现分类。
AI.result: 在完整事件驱动分类流程中，模型达到97.7%的平均训练准确率和93.5%的平均测试准确率。
AI.conclusion: 事件驱动的数据采集结合脉冲神经网络可在保持高分类精度的同时显著降低计算负载，为实时流式细胞分析提供新思路。

authors_text: Bruno Casella,Roberto Esposito,Antonio Sciarappa,Carlo Cavazzoni,Marco Aldinucci
title: Experimenting with Normalization Layers in Federated Learning on non-IID scenarios
title_zh: 在非 IID 场景中试验联邦学习中的归一化层
comment: 10 pages, Submitted to IEEE Transactions on Neural Networks and Learning Systems
comments: 10 pages, Submitted to IEEE Transactions on Neural Networks and Learning Systems
abstract: Training Deep Learning (DL) models require large, high-quality datasets, often assembled with data from different institutions. Federated Learning (FL) has been emerging as a method for privacy-preserving pooling of datasets employing collaborative training from different institutions by iteratively globally aggregating locally trained models. One critical performance challenge of FL is operating on datasets not independently and identically distributed (non-IID) among the federation participants. Even though this fragility cannot be eliminated, it can be debunked by a suitable optimization of two hyper-parameters: layer normalization methods and collaboration frequency selection. In this work, we benchmark five different normalization layers for training Neural Networks (NNs), two families of non-IID data skew, and two datasets. Results show that Batch Normalization, widely employed for centralized DL, is not the best choice for FL, whereas Group and Layer Normalization consistently outperform Batch Normalization. Similarly, frequent model aggregation decreases convergence speed and mode quality.
summary: Training Deep Learning (DL) models require large, high-quality datasets, often assembled with data from different institutions. Federated Learning (FL) has been emerging as a method for privacy-preserving pooling of datasets employing collaborative training from different institutions by iteratively globally aggregating locally trained models. One critical performance challenge of FL is operating on datasets not independently and identically distributed (non-IID) among the federation participants. Even though this fragility cannot be eliminated, it can be debunked by a suitable optimization of two hyper-parameters: layer normalization methods and collaboration frequency selection. In this work, we benchmark five different normalization layers for training Neural Networks (NNs), two families of non-IID data skew, and two datasets. Results show that Batch Normalization, widely employed for centralized DL, is not the best choice for FL, whereas Group and Layer Normalization consistently outperform Batch Normalization. Similarly, frequent model aggregation decreases convergence speed and mode quality.
abstract_zh: 训练深度学习 (DL) 模型需要大量高质量的数据集，这些数据集通常由来自不同机构的数据组合而成。联邦学习（FL）已经成为一种隐私保护数据集池的方法，通过迭代地全局聚合本地训练的模型，采用来自不同机构的协作训练。 FL 的一项关键性能挑战是在联邦参与者之间不独立同分布（非 IID）的数据集上运行。尽管这种脆弱性无法消除，但可以通过两个超参数的适当优化来揭穿：层归一化方法和协作频率选择。在这项工作中，我们对用于训练神经网络 (NN) 的五个不同归一化层、两个非 IID 数据倾斜系列和两个数据集进行了基准测试。结果表明，广泛用于集中式 DL 的批量归一化并不是 FL 的最佳选择，而组归一化和层归一化始终优于批量归一化。同样，频繁的模型聚合会降低收敛速度和模式质量。

AI.tldr: 本文在非独立同分布（non-IID）场景下，通过实验比较不同归一化层对联邦学习（FL）性能的影响。
AI.motivation: 联邦学习在处理non-IID数据时面临性能挑战，传统批量归一化可能不适用，需探索更优归一化方法及协作策略。
AI.method: 基准测试五种归一化层（包括批量、组和层归一化），结合两种non-IID数据偏差类型及两个数据集进行实验。
AI.result: 批量归一化表现不佳，组归一化和层归一化持续优于批量归一化；频繁模型聚合降低收敛速度与模型质量。
AI.conclusion: 在联邦学习中，组归一化和层归一化比批量归一化更有效，且需合理控制模型聚合频率以优化性能。

authors_text: George Stamatelis,Nicholas Kalouptsidis
title: Active hypothesis testing in unknown environments using recurrent neural networks and model free reinforcement learning
title_zh: 使用循环神经网络和无模型强化学习在未知环境中进行主动假设检验
abstract: A combination of deep reinforcement learning and supervised learning is proposed for the problem of active sequential hypothesis testing in completely unknown environments. We make no assumptions about the prior probability, the action and observation sets, and the observation generating process. Our method can be used in any environment even if it has continuous observations or actions, and performs competitively and sometimes better than the Chernoff test, in both finite and infinite horizon problems, despite not having access to the environment dynamics.
summary: A combination of deep reinforcement learning and supervised learning is proposed for the problem of active sequential hypothesis testing in completely unknown environments. We make no assumptions about the prior probability, the action and observation sets, and the observation generating process. Our method can be used in any environment even if it has continuous observations or actions, and performs competitively and sometimes better than the Chernoff test, in both finite and infinite horizon problems, despite not having access to the environment dynamics.
abstract_zh: 针对完全未知环境中的主动序列假设检验问题，提出了深度强化学习和监督学习的结合。我们不对先验概率、动作和观察集以及观察生成过程做出任何假设。我们的方法可以在任何环境中使用，即使它有连续的观察或动作，并且在有限和无限地平线问题中表现得有竞争力，有时甚至比切尔诺夫测试更好，尽管无法访问环境动态。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合深度强化学习与监督学习的方法，用于在完全未知环境中进行主动序贯假设检验。
AI.motivation: 传统假设检验方法通常依赖环境动态模型或先验假设，难以适应连续动作/观测的未知环境，需开发无需环境动态信息的通用方法。
AI.method: 融合循环神经网络（RNN）与模型无关强化学习框架，通过深度强化学习直接学习最优测试策略，无需假设观测生成过程或先验分布。
AI.result: 该方法在有限/无限时间地平线问题中均能竞争性地超越Chernoff检验，且适用于连续动作/观测空间的复杂环境。
AI.conclusion: 提出了一种无需环境动态知识的主动假设检验通用框架，在多种未知环境中展现出优于传统方法的性能。

search_text: Active hypothesis testing in unknown environments using recurrent neural networks and model free reinforcement learning 使用循环神经网络和无模型强化学习在未知环境中进行主动假设检验 A combination of deep reinforcement learning and supervised learning is proposed for the problem of active sequential hypothesis testing in completely unknown environments. We make no assumptions about the prior probability, the action and observation sets, and the observation generating process. Our method can be used in any environment even if it has continuous observations or actions, and performs competitively and sometimes better than the Chernoff test, in both finite and infinite horizon problems, despite not having access to the environment dynamics. 针对完全未知环境中的主动序列假设检验问题，提出了深度强化学习和监督学习的结合。我们不对先验概率、动作和观察集以及观察生成过程做出任何假设。我们的方法可以在任何环境中使用，即使它有连续的观察或动作，并且在有限和无限地平线问题中表现得有竞争力，有时甚至比切尔诺夫测试更好，尽管无法访问环境动态。 本文提出一种结合深度强化学习与监督学习的方法，用于在完全未知环境中进行主动序贯假设检验。 George Stamatelis,Nicholas Kalouptsidis cs.AI,cs.IT

authors_text: Pu Li,Jianwei Guo,Xiaopeng Zhang,Dong-ming Yan
title: SECAD-Net: Self-Supervised CAD Reconstruction by Learning Sketch-Extrude Operations
title_zh: SECAD-Net：通过学习草图拉伸操作进行自我监督 CAD 重建
abstract: Reverse engineering CAD models from raw geometry is a classic but strenuous research problem. Previous learning-based methods rely heavily on labels due to the supervised design patterns or reconstruct CAD shapes that are not easily editable. In this work, we introduce SECAD-Net, an end-to-end neural network aimed at reconstructing compact and easy-to-edit CAD models in a self-supervised manner. Drawing inspiration from the modeling language that is most commonly used in modern CAD software, we propose to learn 2D sketches and 3D extrusion parameters from raw shapes, from which a set of extrusion cylinders can be generated by extruding each sketch from a 2D plane into a 3D body. By incorporating the Boolean operation (i.e., union), these cylinders can be combined to closely approximate the target geometry. We advocate the use of implicit fields for sketch representation, which allows for creating CAD variations by interpolating latent codes in the sketch latent space. Extensive experiments on both ABC and Fusion 360 datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of our method, and show superiority over state-of-the-art alternatives including the closely related method for supervised CAD reconstruction. We further apply our approach to CAD editing and single-view CAD reconstruction. The code is released at https://github.com/BunnySoCrazy/SECAD-Net.
summary: Reverse engineering CAD models from raw geometry is a classic but strenuous research problem. Previous learning-based methods rely heavily on labels due to the supervised design patterns or reconstruct CAD shapes that are not easily editable. In this work, we introduce SECAD-Net, an end-to-end neural network aimed at reconstructing compact and easy-to-edit CAD models in a self-supervised manner. Drawing inspiration from the modeling language that is most commonly used in modern CAD software, we propose to learn 2D sketches and 3D extrusion parameters from raw shapes, from which a set of extrusion cylinders can be generated by extruding each sketch from a 2D plane into a 3D body. By incorporating the Boolean operation (i.e., union), these cylinders can be combined to closely approximate the target geometry. We advocate the use of implicit fields for sketch representation, which allows for creating CAD variations by interpolating latent codes in the sketch latent space. Extensive experiments on both ABC and Fusion 360 datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of our method, and show superiority over state-of-the-art alternatives including the closely related method for supervised CAD reconstruction. We further apply our approach to CAD editing and single-view CAD reconstruction. The code is released at https://github.com/BunnySoCrazy/SECAD-Net.
abstract_zh: 从原始几何体逆向工程 CAD 模型是一个经典但艰巨的研究问题。由于监督设计模式或重建不易编辑的 CAD 形状，以前基于学习的方法严重依赖标签。在这项工作中，我们介绍了 SECAD-Net，这是一种端到端神经网络，旨在以自我监督的方式重建紧凑且易于编辑的 CAD 模型。从现代 CAD 软件中最常用的建模语言中汲取灵感，我们建议从原始形状中学习 2D 草图和 3D 挤压参数，通过将每个草图从 2D 平面挤压到 3D 实体中，可以生成一组挤压圆柱体。通过合并布尔运算（即并集），可以组合这些圆柱体以非常接近目标几何形状。我们提倡使用隐式字段进行草图表示，这样可以通过在草图潜在空间中插入潜在代码来创建 CAD 变体。对 ABC 和 Fusion 360 数据集的大量实验证明了我们的方法的有效性，并显示出优于最先进的替代方案（包括密切相关的监督 CAD 重建方法）。我们进一步将我们的方法应用于 CAD 编辑和单视图 CAD 重建。该代码发布于 https://github.com/BunnySoCrazy/SECAD-Net。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SECAD-Net，一种通过自监督学习从原始几何中重建紧凑且易于编辑的CAD模型的神经网络方法。
AI.motivation: 现有基于学习的方法依赖标签或生成难以编辑的CAD模型，缺乏对可编辑性与自监督学习的结合。
AI.method: 通过学习2D草图和3D挤出参数，结合布尔运算生成挤出圆柱体，利用隐式场表示草图以实现潜在空间插值生成变体。
AI.result: 在ABC和Fusion 360数据集上实验验证了方法有效性，优于现有监督方法，并应用于CAD编辑与单视角重建。
AI.conclusion: SECAD-Net实现了自监督CAD重建与编辑，为生成可编辑模型提供了新思路，代码已开源。

authors_text: Ziqi Gao,S. Kevin Zhou
title: Rethinking Dual-Domain Undersampled MRI reconstruction: domain-specific design from the perspective of the receptive field
title_zh: 重新思考双域欠采样 MRI 重建：从感受野角度进行特定域设计
comment: 2024 IEEE International Symposium on Biomedical Imaging (ISBI)
comments: 2024 IEEE International Symposium on Biomedical Imaging (ISBI)
abstract: Undersampled MRI reconstruction is crucial for accelerating clinical scanning. Dual-domain reconstruction network is performant among SoTA deep learning methods. In this paper, we rethink dual-domain model design from the perspective of the receptive field, which is needed for image recovery and K-space interpolation problems. Further, we introduce domain-specific modules for dual-domain reconstruction, namely k-space global initialization and image-domain parallel local detail enhancement. We evaluate our modules by translating a SoTA method DuDoRNet under different conventions of MRI reconstruction including image-domain, dual-domain, and reference-guided reconstruction on the public IXI dataset. Our model DuDoRNet+ achieves significant improvements over competing deep learning methods.
summary: Undersampled MRI reconstruction is crucial for accelerating clinical scanning. Dual-domain reconstruction network is performant among SoTA deep learning methods. In this paper, we rethink dual-domain model design from the perspective of the receptive field, which is needed for image recovery and K-space interpolation problems. Further, we introduce domain-specific modules for dual-domain reconstruction, namely k-space global initialization and image-domain parallel local detail enhancement. We evaluate our modules by translating a SoTA method DuDoRNet under different conventions of MRI reconstruction including image-domain, dual-domain, and reference-guided reconstruction on the public IXI dataset. Our model DuDoRNet+ achieves significant improvements over competing deep learning methods.
abstract_zh: 欠采样 MRI 重建对于加速临床扫描至关重要。双域重建网络在 SoTA 深度学习方法中表现最佳。在本文中，我们从感受野的角度重新思考双域模型设计，这是图像恢复和K空间插值问题所需要的。此外，我们引入了用于双域重建的域特定模块，即k空间全局初始化和图像域并行局部细节增强。我们通过在不同的 MRI 重建约定（包括公共 IXI 数据集上的图像域、双域和参考引导重建）下转换 SoTA 方法 DuDoRNet 来评估我们的模块。我们的模型 DuDoRNet+ 比竞争深度学习方法取得了显着改进。

AI.tldr: 本文从感受野角度重新设计双域欠采样MRI重建模型，引入域特定模块以提升重建效果。
AI.motivation: 现有双域模型在图像恢复和k空间插值中存在局限，需通过域特定设计提升性能。
AI.method: 提出k空间全局初始化模块与图像域并行局部细节增强模块，基于感受野视角优化双域重建流程。
AI.result: 在IXI数据集上，改进后的DuDoRNet+模型在多种重建方法中显著优于现有深度学习方法。
AI.conclusion: 域特定模块有效提升重建质量，为双域MRI重建提供了新设计思路。

authors_text: Yijun Yang,Huazhu Fu,Angelica I. Aviles-Rivero,Carola-Bibiane Schönlieb,Lei Zhu
title: DiffMIC: Dual-Guidance Diffusion Network for Medical Image Classification
title_zh: DiffMIC：用于医学图像分类的双引导扩散网络
abstract: Diffusion Probabilistic Models have recently shown remarkable performance in generative image modeling, attracting significant attention in the computer vision community. However, while a substantial amount of diffusion-based research has focused on generative tasks, few studies have applied diffusion models to general medical image classification. In this paper, we propose the first diffusion-based model (named DiffMIC) to address general medical image classification by eliminating unexpected noise and perturbations in medical images and robustly capturing semantic representation. To achieve this goal, we devise a dual conditional guidance strategy that conditions each diffusion step with multiple granularities to improve step-wise regional attention. Furthermore, we propose learning the mutual information in each granularity by enforcing Maximum-Mean Discrepancy regularization during the diffusion forward process. We evaluate the effectiveness of our DiffMIC on three medical classification tasks with different image modalities, including placental maturity grading on ultrasound images, skin lesion classification using dermatoscopic images, and diabetic retinopathy grading using fundus images. Our experimental results demonstrate that DiffMIC outperforms state-of-the-art methods by a significant margin, indicating the universality and effectiveness of the proposed model. Our code will be publicly available at https://github.com/scott-yjyang/DiffMIC.
summary: Diffusion Probabilistic Models have recently shown remarkable performance in generative image modeling, attracting significant attention in the computer vision community. However, while a substantial amount of diffusion-based research has focused on generative tasks, few studies have applied diffusion models to general medical image classification. In this paper, we propose the first diffusion-based model (named DiffMIC) to address general medical image classification by eliminating unexpected noise and perturbations in medical images and robustly capturing semantic representation. To achieve this goal, we devise a dual conditional guidance strategy that conditions each diffusion step with multiple granularities to improve step-wise regional attention. Furthermore, we propose learning the mutual information in each granularity by enforcing Maximum-Mean Discrepancy regularization during the diffusion forward process. We evaluate the effectiveness of our DiffMIC on three medical classification tasks with different image modalities, including placental maturity grading on ultrasound images, skin lesion classification using dermatoscopic images, and diabetic retinopathy grading using fundus images. Our experimental results demonstrate that DiffMIC outperforms state-of-the-art methods by a significant margin, indicating the universality and effectiveness of the proposed model. Our code will be publicly available at https://github.com/scott-yjyang/DiffMIC.
abstract_zh: 扩散概率模型最近在生成图像建模中表现出了卓越的性能，引起了计算机视觉界的广泛关注。然而，虽然大量基于扩散的研究都集中在生成任务上，但很少有研究将扩散模型应用于一般医学图像分类。在本文中，我们提出了第一个基于扩散的模型（名为 DiffMIC），通过消除医学图像中的意外噪声和扰动并稳健地捕获语义表示来解决一般医学图像分类问题。为了实现这一目标，我们设计了一种双重条件指导策略，以多个粒度调节每个扩散步骤，以提高逐步区域注意力。此外，我们建议通过在扩散前向过程中实施最大均值差异正则化来学习每个粒度的互信息。我们评估了 DiffMIC 在具有不同图像模式的三个医学分类任务上的有效性，包括超声图像上的胎盘成熟度分级、使用皮肤镜图像的皮肤病变分类以及使用眼底图像的糖尿病视网膜病变分级。我们的实验结果表明，DiffMIC 明显优于最先进的方法，表明所提出模型的普遍性和有效性。我们的代码将在 https://github.com/scott-yjyang/DiffMIC 公开提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DiffMIC模型，利用扩散概率模型解决医学图像分类问题，通过双条件引导策略和互信息学习提升分类效果。
AI.motivation: 扩散模型在生成任务中表现优异，但尚未有效应用于医学图像分类。医学图像常含噪声和扰动，需更鲁棒的语义表征方法。
AI.method: 设计双粒度条件引导策略增强区域注意力，并在扩散过程中引入最大均值差异正则化以学习多粒度互信息。
AI.result: 在超声、皮肤镜和眼底图像的三个医学分类任务中，DiffMIC显著优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: DiffMIC验证了扩散模型在医学图像分类中的有效性，方法具有跨模态通用性，代码已开源。

authors_text: Thomas Dagès,Laurent D. Cohen,Alfred M. Bruckstein
title: A model is worth tens of thousands of examples
title_zh: 一个模型胜过数万个示例
abstract: Traditional signal processing methods relying on mathematical data generation models have been cast aside in favour of deep neural networks, which require vast amounts of data. Since the theoretical sample complexity is nearly impossible to evaluate, these amounts of examples are usually estimated with crude rules of thumb. However, these rules only suggest when the networks should work, but do not relate to the traditional methods. In particular, an interesting question is: how much data is required for neural networks to be on par or outperform, if possible, the traditional model-based methods? In this work, we empirically investigate this question in two simple examples, where the data is generated according to precisely defined mathematical models, and where well-understood optimal or state-of-the-art mathematical data-agnostic solutions are known. A first problem is deconvolving one-dimensional Gaussian signals and a second one is estimating a circle's radius and location in random grayscale images of disks. By training various networks, either naive custom designed or well-established ones, with various amounts of training data, we find that networks require tens of thousands of examples in comparison to the traditional methods, whether the networks are trained from scratch or even with transfer-learning or finetuning.

Since the theoretical sample complexity is nearly impossible to evaluate, these amounts of examples are usually estimated with crude rules of thumb. However, these rules only suggest when the networks should work, but do not relate to the traditional methods. In particular, an interesting question is: how much data is required for neural networks to be on par or outperform, if possible, the traditional model-based methods? In this work, we empirically investigate this question in two simple examples, where the data is generated according to precisely defined mathematical models, and where well-understood optimal or state-of-the-art mathematical data-agnostic solutions are known. A first problem is deconvolving one-dimensional Gaussian signals and a second one is estimating a circle's radius and location in random grayscale images of disks. By training various networks, either naive custom designed or well-established ones, with various amounts of training data, we find that networks require tens of thousands of examples in comparison to the traditional methods, whether the networks are trained from scratch or even with transfer-learning or finetuning.
abstract_zh: 依赖数学数据生成模型的传统信号处理方法已被抛弃，取而代之的是需要大量数据的深度神经网络。由于理论上的样本复杂性几乎无法评估，因此这些例子的数量通常是根据粗略的经验法则来估计的。然而，这些规则仅建议网络何时应该工作，而与传统方法无关。特别是，一个有趣的问题是：神经网络需要多少数据才能达到或超过（如果可能）传统的基于模型的方法？在这项工作中，我们通过两个简单的例子实证研究这个问题，其中数据是根据精确定义的数学模型生成的，并且已知易于理解的最优或最先进的数学数据不可知的解决方案。第一个问题是对一维高斯信号进行反卷积，第二个问题是估计圆盘的随机灰度图像中的半径和位置。通过使用不同数量的训练数据训练各种网络，无论是简单的定制设计的还是完善的网络，我们发现与传统方法相比，网络需要数以万计的示例，无论网络是从头开始训练的，还是通过迁移学习或微调进行训练的。

AI.tldr: 该论文通过两个数学模型生成的数据，比较了深度神经网络与传统信号处理方法在数据需求上的差异。
AI.motivation: 传统数学模型方法因需大量数据而被深度学习取代，但缺乏对神经网络所需数据量与传统方法对比的理论依据。
AI.method: 设计两个数学模型生成数据（一维高斯信号去卷积和图像中圆的参数估计），训练不同规模数据下的神经网络并对比传统方法性能。
AI.result: 实验表明，无论是否使用迁移学习，神经网络需数万级数据才能达到或超越传统方法效果。
AI.conclusion: 传统模型在数据效率上显著优于神经网络，后者需大量数据才能实现竞争力。

authors_text: Fatemeh Pouromran,Yingzi Lin,Sagar Kamarthi
title: Automatic pain recognition from Blood Volume Pulse (BVP) signal using machine learning techniques
title_zh: 使用机器学习技术根据血量脉冲 (BVP) 信号自动识别疼痛
abstract: Physiological responses to pain have received increasing attention among researchers for developing an automated pain recognition sensing system. Though less explored, Blood Volume Pulse (BVP) is one of the candidate physiological measures that could help objective pain assessment. In this study, we applied machine learning techniques on BVP signals to device a non-invasive modality for pain sensing. Thirty-two healthy subjects participated in this study. First, we investigated a novel set of time-domain, frequency-domain and nonlinear dynamics features that could potentially be sensitive to pain. These include 24 features from BVP signals and 20 additional features from Inter-beat Intervals (IBIs) derived from the same BVP signals. Utilizing these features, we built machine learning models for detecting the presence of pain and its intensity. We explored different machine learning models, including Logistic Regression, Random Forest, Support Vector Machines, Adaptive Boosting (AdaBoost) and Extreme Gradient Boosting (XGBoost). Among them, we found that the XGBoost offered the best model performance for both pain classification and pain intensity estimation tasks. The ROC-AUC of the XGBoost model to detect low pain, medium pain and high pain with no pain as the baseline were 80.06 %, 85.81 %, and 90.05 % respectively. Moreover, the XGboost classifier distinguished medium pain from high pain with ROC-AUC of 91%. For the multi-class classification among three pain levels, the XGBoost offered the best performance with an average F1-score of 80.03%. Our results suggest that BVP signal together with machine learning algorithms is a promising physiological measurement for automated pain assessment. This work will have a national impact on accurate pain assessment, effective pain management, reducing drug-seeking behavior among patients, and addressing national opioid crisis.
summary: Physiological responses to pain have received increasing attention among researchers for developing an automated pain recognition sensing system. Though less explored, Blood Volume Pulse (BVP) is one of the candidate physiological measures that could help objective pain assessment. In this study, we applied machine learning techniques on BVP signals to device a non-invasive modality for pain sensing. Thirty-two healthy subjects participated in this study. First, we investigated a novel set of time-domain, frequency-domain and nonlinear dynamics features that could potentially be sensitive to pain. These include 24 features from BVP signals and 20 additional features from Inter-beat Intervals (IBIs) derived from the same BVP signals. Utilizing these features, we built machine learning models for detecting the presence of pain and its intensity. We explored different machine learning models, including Logistic Regression, Random Forest, Support Vector Machines, Adaptive Boosting (AdaBoost) and Extreme Gradient Boosting (XGBoost). Among them, we found that the XGBoost offered the best model performance for both pain classification and pain intensity estimation tasks. The ROC-AUC of the XGBoost model to detect low pain, medium pain and high pain with no pain as the baseline were 80.06 %, 85.81 %, and 90.05 % respectively. Moreover, the XGboost classifier distinguished medium pain from high pain with ROC-AUC of 91%. For the multi-class classification among three pain levels, the XGBoost offered the best performance with an average F1-score of 80.03%. Our results suggest that BVP signal together with machine learning algorithms is a promising physiological measurement for automated pain assessment. This work will have a national impact on accurate pain assessment, effective pain management, reducing drug-seeking behavior among patients, and addressing national opioid crisis.
abstract_zh: 由于开发自动疼痛识别传感系统，对疼痛的生理反应越来越受到研究人员的关注。尽管探索较少，但血量脉搏 (BVP) 是有助于客观疼痛评估的候选生理指标之一。在这项研究中，我们将机器学习技术应用于 BVP 信号，以设计一种非侵入性的疼痛感知方式。三十二名健康受试者参与了这项研究。首先，我们研究了一组可能对疼痛敏感的新颖的时域、频域和非线性动力学特征。其中包括来自 BVP 信号的 24 个特征以及来自相同 BVP 信号的节拍间间隔 (IBI) 的 20 个附加特征。利用这些功能，我们构建了机器学习模型来检测疼痛的存在及其强度。我们探索了不同的机器学习模型，包括逻辑回归、随机森林、支持向量机、自适应提升 (AdaBoost) 和极限梯度提升 (XGBoost)。其中，我们发现 XGBoost 为疼痛分类和疼痛强度估计任务提供了最佳的模型性能。 XGBoost模型以无痛为基线检测低痛、中痛和重痛的ROC-AUC分别为80.06%、85.81%和90.05%。此外，XGboost 分类器区分中度疼痛和高度疼痛的 ROC-AUC 为 91%。对于三个疼痛级别的多类别分类，XGBoost 提供了最佳性能，平均 F1 分数为 80.03%。我们的结果表明，BVP 信号与机器学习算法相结合是一种有前途的自动疼痛评估生理测量方法。这项工作将对准确的疼痛评估、有效的疼痛管理、减少患者的求药行为以及解决全国阿片类药物危机产生全国性的影响。

AI.tldr: 本研究利用机器学习技术分析血容量脉搏（BVP）信号，开发非侵入式疼痛自动识别系统。
AI.motivation: 传统疼痛评估依赖主观报告，而BVP作为潜在客观指标尚未被充分探索，需开发自动化疼痛评估方法。
AI.method: 提取BVP信号的时域、频域及非线性特征（共24个BVP特征和20个IBI特征），采用逻辑回归、随机森林、XGBoost等模型进行疼痛分类与强度估计。
AI.result: XGBoost模型在疼痛检测中表现最佳，ROC-AUC值分别为低痛80.06%、中痛85.81%、高痛90.05%，区分中高痛ROC-AUC达91%，多分类F1均值80.03%。
AI.conclusion: BVP信号结合机器学习可有效实现自动化疼痛评估，有望提升疼痛管理精度并缓解阿片类药物滥用问题。

search_text: Automatic pain recognition from Blood Volume Pulse (BVP) signal using machine learning techniques 使用机器学习技术根据血量脉冲 (BVP) 信号自动识别疼痛 Physiological responses to pain have received increasing attention among researchers for developing an automated pain recognition sensing system. Though less explored, Blood Volume Pulse (BVP) is one of the candidate physiological measures that could help objective pain assessment. In this study, we applied machine learning techniques on BVP signals to device a non-invasive modality for pain sensing. Thirty-two healthy subjects participated in this study. First, we investigated a novel set of time-domain, frequency-domain and nonlinear dynamics features that could potentially be sensitive to pain. These include 24 features from BVP signals and 20 additional features from Inter-beat Intervals (IBIs) derived from the same BVP signals. Utilizing these features, we built machine learning models for detecting the presence of pain and its intensity. We explored different machine learning models, including Logistic Regression, Random Forest, Support Vector Machines, Adaptive Boosting (AdaBoost) and Extreme Gradient Boosting (XGBoost). Among them, we found that the XGBoost offered the best model performance for both pain classification and pain intensity estimation tasks. The ROC-AUC of the XGBoost model to detect low pain, medium pain and high pain with no pain as the baseline were 80.06 %, 85.81 %, and 90.05 % respectively. Moreover, the XGboost classifier distinguished medium pain from high pain with ROC-AUC of 91%. For the multi-class classification among three pain levels, the XGBoost offered the best performance with an average F1-score of 80.03%. Our results suggest that BVP signal together with machine learning algorithms is a promising physiological measurement for automated pain assessment. This work will have a national impact on accurate pain assessment, effective pain management, reducing drug-seeking behavior among patients, and addressing national opioid crisis. 由于开发自动疼痛识别传感系统，对疼痛的生理反应越来越受到研究人员的关注。尽管探索较少，但血量脉搏 (BVP) 是有助于客观疼痛评估的候选生理指标之一。在这项研究中，我们将机器学习技术应用于 BVP 信号，以设计一种非侵入性的疼痛感知方式。三十二名健康受试者参与了这项研究。首先，我们研究了一组可能对疼痛敏感的新颖的时域、频域和非线性动力学特征。其中包括来自 BVP 信号的 24 个特征以及来自相同 BVP 信号的节拍间间隔 (IBI) 的 20 个附加特征。利用这些功能，我们构建了机器学习模型来检测疼痛的存在及其强度。我们探索了不同的机器学习模型，包括逻辑回归、随机森林、支持向量机、自适应提升 (AdaBoost) 和极限梯度提升 (XGBoost)。其中，我们发现 XGBoost 为疼痛分类和疼痛强度估计任务提供了最佳的模型性能。 XGBoost模型以无痛为基线检测低痛、中痛和重痛的ROC-AUC分别为80.06%、85.81%和90.05%。此外，XGboost 分类器区分中度疼痛和高度疼痛的 ROC-AUC 为 91%。对于三个疼痛级别的多类别分类，XGBoost 提供了最佳性能，平均 F1 分数为 80.03%。我们的结果表明，BVP 信号与机器学习算法相结合是一种有前途的自动疼痛评估生理测量方法。这项工作将对准确的疼痛评估、有效的疼痛管理、减少患者的求药行为以及解决全国阿片类药物危机产生全国性的影响。 本研究利用机器学习技术分析血容量脉搏（BVP）信号，开发非侵入式疼痛自动识别系统。 Fatemeh Pouromran,Yingzi Lin,Sagar Kamarthi cs.LG,cs.HC

authors_text: Kolesnikov Dmitry
title: Transfer learning method in the problem of binary classification of chest X-rays
title_zh: 迁移学习方法在胸部X光片二元分类问题中的应用
abstract: The possibility of high-precision and rapid detection of pathologies on chest X-rays makes it possible to detect the development of pneumonia at an early stage and begin immediate treatment. Artificial intelligence can speed up and qualitatively improve the procedure of X-ray analysis and give recommendations to the doctor for additional consideration of suspicious images. The purpose of this study is to determine the best models and implementations of the transfer learning method in the binary classification problem in the presence of a small amount of training data. In this article, various methods of augmentation of the initial data and approaches to training ResNet and DenseNet models for black-and-white X-ray images are considered, those approaches that contribute to obtaining the highest results of the accuracy of determining cases of pneumonia and norm at the testing stage are identified.
summary: The possibility of high-precision and rapid detection of pathologies on chest X-rays makes it possible to detect the development of pneumonia at an early stage and begin immediate treatment. Artificial intelligence can speed up and qualitatively improve the procedure of X-ray analysis and give recommendations to the doctor for additional consideration of suspicious images. The purpose of this study is to determine the best models and implementations of the transfer learning method in the binary classification problem in the presence of a small amount of training data. In this article, various methods of augmentation of the initial data and approaches to training ResNet and DenseNet models for black-and-white X-ray images are considered, those approaches that contribute to obtaining the highest results of the accuracy of determining cases of pneumonia and norm at the testing stage are identified.
abstract_zh: 胸部 X 光检查可以高精度、快速地检测出病变，从而可以在早期阶段发现肺炎的发展情况并立即开始治疗。人工智能可以加速并定性地改进 X 射线分析过程，并向医生提供建议，以进一步考虑可疑图像。本研究的目的是在存在少量训练数据的情况下确定二元分类问题中迁移学习方法的最佳模型和实现。在本文中，考虑了各种增强初始数据的方法以及训练黑白 X 射线图像的 ResNet 和 DenseNet 模型的方法，并确定了那些有助于在测试阶段获得确定肺炎病例和常模的准确性的最高结果的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在研究迁移学习方法在少量训练数据下对胸部X光片二分类（肺炎与正常）的最佳模型和实现方案。
AI.motivation: 早期肺炎检测对治疗至关重要，但受限于数据量小和图像分析复杂性，需通过迁移学习提升AI诊断效率与准确性。
AI.method: 采用数据增强技术，并对比训练ResNet和DenseNet模型在黑白X光图像上的不同方法，筛选最优分类方案。
AI.result: 确定了在测试阶段能实现最高肺炎与正常分类准确率的迁移学习模型及数据增强策略。
AI.conclusion: 迁移学习结合特定网络结构和数据增强方法，可有效解决少量数据下的胸部X光二分类问题，为临床提供可靠辅助诊断方案。

authors_text: Kunhao Liu,Fangneng Zhan,Yiwen Chen,Jiahui Zhang,Yingchen Yu,Abdulmotaleb El Saddik,Shijian Lu,Eric Xing
title: StyleRF: Zero-shot 3D Style Transfer of Neural Radiance Fields
title_zh: StyleRF：神经辐射场的零样本 3D 风格传输
comment: Accepted to CVPR 2023. Project website: https://kunhao-liu.github.io/StyleRF/
comments: Accepted to CVPR 2023. Project website: https://kunhao-liu.github.io/StyleRF/
abstract: 3D style transfer aims to render stylized novel views of a 3D scene with multi-view consistency. However, most existing work suffers from a three-way dilemma over accurate geometry reconstruction, high-quality stylization, and being generalizable to arbitrary new styles. We propose StyleRF (Style Radiance Fields), an innovative 3D style transfer technique that resolves the three-way dilemma by performing style transformation within the feature space of a radiance field. StyleRF employs an explicit grid of high-level features to represent 3D scenes, with which high-fidelity geometry can be reliably restored via volume rendering. In addition, it transforms the grid features according to the reference style which directly leads to high-quality zero-shot style transfer. StyleRF consists of two innovative designs. The first is sampling-invariant content transformation that makes the transformation invariant to the holistic statistics of the sampled 3D points and accordingly ensures multi-view consistency. The second is deferred style transformation of 2D feature maps which is equivalent to the transformation of 3D points but greatly reduces memory footprint without degrading multi-view consistency. Extensive experiments show that StyleRF achieves superior 3D stylization quality with precise geometry reconstruction and it can generalize to various new styles in a zero-shot manner.
summary: 3D style transfer aims to render stylized novel views of a 3D scene with multi-view consistency. However, most existing work suffers from a three-way dilemma over accurate geometry reconstruction, high-quality stylization, and being generalizable to arbitrary new styles. We propose StyleRF (Style Radiance Fields), an innovative 3D style transfer technique that resolves the three-way dilemma by performing style transformation within the feature space of a radiance field. StyleRF employs an explicit grid of high-level features to represent 3D scenes, with which high-fidelity geometry can be reliably restored via volume rendering. In addition, it transforms the grid features according to the reference style which directly leads to high-quality zero-shot style transfer. StyleRF consists of two innovative designs. The first is sampling-invariant content transformation that makes the transformation invariant to the holistic statistics of the sampled 3D points and accordingly ensures multi-view consistency. The second is deferred style transformation of 2D feature maps which is equivalent to the transformation of 3D points but greatly reduces memory footprint without degrading multi-view consistency. Extensive experiments show that StyleRF achieves superior 3D stylization quality with precise geometry reconstruction and it can generalize to various new styles in a zero-shot manner.
abstract_zh: 3D 风格迁移旨在渲染具有多视图一致性的 3D 场景的风格化新颖视图。然而，大多数现有的工作都面临着精确的几何重建、高质量的风格化以及可推广到任意新风格的三向困境。我们提出了 StyleRF（风格辐射场），这是一种创新的 3D 风格转移技术，通过在辐射场的特征空间内执行风格转换来解决三向困境。 StyleRF 采用高级特征的显式网格来表示 3D 场景，通过体渲染可以可靠地恢复高保真几何形状。此外，它根据参考风格转换网格特征，这直接导致高质量的零样本风格迁移。 StyleRF 由两项创新设计组成。第一个是采样不变的内容转换，使转换对采样的3D点的整体统计量不变，从而保证多视图一致性。第二个是 2D 特征图的延迟样式变换，它相当于 3D 点的变换，但大大减少了内存占用，而不会降低多视图一致性。大量实验表明，StyleRF 通过精确的几何重建实现了卓越的 3D 风格化质量，并且可以以零样本的方式推广到各种新风格。

AI.tldr: 本文提出StyleRF方法，解决神经辐射场的零样本3D风格迁移问题，实现多视角一致的高质量风格化渲染。
AI.motivation: 现有3D风格迁移方法难以同时保证几何重建精度、风格化质量及对新风格的泛化能力，存在三重矛盾。
AI.method: 通过辐射场特征空间进行风格转换，设计采样不变内容变换和2D特征图延迟风格转换，实现几何重建与风格迁移的解耦。
AI.result: 实验表明StyleRF在几何精度和风格化质量上优于现有方法，且能零样本泛化到多种新风格。
AI.conclusion: StyleRF通过特征空间操作有效解决了3D风格迁移的三重矛盾，为神经辐射场风格化提供新思路。

search_text: StyleRF: Zero-shot 3D Style Transfer of Neural Radiance Fields StyleRF：神经辐射场的零样本 3D 风格传输 3D style transfer aims to render stylized novel views of a 3D scene with multi-view consistency. However, most existing work suffers from a three-way dilemma over accurate geometry reconstruction, high-quality stylization, and being generalizable to arbitrary new styles. We propose StyleRF (Style Radiance Fields), an innovative 3D style transfer technique that resolves the three-way dilemma by performing style transformation within the feature space of a radiance field. StyleRF employs an explicit grid of high-level features to represent 3D scenes, with which high-fidelity geometry can be reliably restored via volume rendering. In addition, it transforms the grid features according to the reference style which directly leads to high-quality zero-shot style transfer. StyleRF consists of two innovative designs. The first is sampling-invariant content transformation that makes the transformation invariant to the holistic statistics of the sampled 3D points and accordingly ensures multi-view consistency. The second is deferred style transformation of 2D feature maps which is equivalent to the transformation of 3D points but greatly reduces memory footprint without degrading multi-view consistency. Extensive experiments show that StyleRF achieves superior 3D stylization quality with precise geometry reconstruction and it can generalize to various new styles in a zero-shot manner. 3D 风格迁移旨在渲染具有多视图一致性的 3D 场景的风格化新颖视图。然而，大多数现有的工作都面临着精确的几何重建、高质量的风格化以及可推广到任意新风格的三向困境。我们提出了 StyleRF（风格辐射场），这是一种创新的 3D 风格转移技术，通过在辐射场的特征空间内执行风格转换来解决三向困境。 StyleRF 采用高级特征的显式网格来表示 3D 场景，通过体渲染可以可靠地恢复高保真几何形状。此外，它根据参考风格转换网格特征，这直接导致高质量的零样本风格迁移。 StyleRF 由两项创新设计组成。第一个是采样不变的内容转换，使转换对采样的3D点的整体统计量不变，从而保证多视图一致性。第二个是 2D 特征图的延迟样式变换，它相当于 3D 点的变换，但大大减少了内存占用，而不会降低多视图一致性。大量实验表明，StyleRF 通过精确的几何重建实现了卓越的 3D 风格化质量，并且可以以零样本的方式推广到各种新风格。 本文提出StyleRF方法，解决神经辐射场的零样本3D风格迁移问题，实现多视角一致的高质量风格化渲染。 Kunhao Liu,Fangneng Zhan,Yiwen Chen,Jiahui Zhang,Yingchen Yu,Abdulmotaleb El Saddik,Shijian Lu,Eric Xing cs.CV

authors_text: Jingwen Ye,Songhua Liu,Xinchao Wang
title: Partial Network Cloning
title_zh: 部分网络克隆
abstract: In this paper, we study a novel task that enables partial knowledge transfer from pre-trained models, which we term as Partial Network Cloning (PNC). Unlike prior methods that update all or at least part of the parameters in the target network throughout the knowledge transfer process, PNC conducts partial parametric "cloning" from a source network and then injects the cloned module to the target, without modifying its parameters. Thanks to the transferred module, the target network is expected to gain additional functionality, such as inference on new classes; whenever needed, the cloned module can be readily removed from the target, with its original parameters and competence kept intact. Specifically, we introduce an innovative learning scheme that allows us to identify simultaneously the component to be cloned from the source and the position to be inserted within the target network, so as to ensure the optimal performance. Experimental results on several datasets demonstrate that, our method yields a significant improvement of 5% in accuracy and 50% in locality when compared with parameter-tuning based methods. Our code is available at https://github.com/JngwenYe/PNCloning.
summary: In this paper, we study a novel task that enables partial knowledge transfer from pre-trained models, which we term as Partial Network Cloning (PNC). Unlike prior methods that update all or at least part of the parameters in the target network throughout the knowledge transfer process, PNC conducts partial parametric "cloning" from a source network and then injects the cloned module to the target, without modifying its parameters. Thanks to the transferred module, the target network is expected to gain additional functionality, such as inference on new classes; whenever needed, the cloned module can be readily removed from the target, with its original parameters and competence kept intact. Specifically, we introduce an innovative learning scheme that allows us to identify simultaneously the component to be cloned from the source and the position to be inserted within the target network, so as to ensure the optimal performance. Experimental results on several datasets demonstrate that, our method yields a significant improvement of 5% in accuracy and 50% in locality when compared with parameter-tuning based methods. Our code is available at https://github.com/JngwenYe/PNCloning.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们研究了一项新任务，该任务能够从预训练模型中进行部分知识转移，我们将其称为部分网络克隆（PNC）。与在整个知识转移过程中更新目标网络中的全部或至少部分参数的现有方法不同，PNC从源网络进行部分参数“克隆”，然后将克隆的模块注入目标，而不修改其参数。由于转移的模块，目标网络有望获得额外的功能，例如对新类的推理；无论何时需要，克隆的模块都可以轻松地从目标中删除，而其原始参数和能力保持不变。具体来说，我们引入了一种创新的学习方案，使我们能够同时识别要从源克隆的组件和要插入目标网络中的位置，从而确保最佳性能。多个数据集上的实验结果表明，与基于参数调整的方法相比，我们的方法在准确度上显着提高了 5%，在局部性上显着提高了 50%。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/JngwenYe/PNClone 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为部分网络克隆（PNC）的新方法，通过从预训练模型中克隆部分参数模块并注入目标网络，实现知识迁移，同时保持目标网络原有参数不变。
AI.motivation: 传统知识迁移方法需持续更新目标网络参数，可能导致原有参数被覆盖或功能丢失，而PNC通过模块化克隆实现灵活的功能扩展与回滚。
AI.method: 设计了一种联合学习方案，同步确定源网络中需克隆的组件及目标网络中插入位置，确保模块兼容性与性能最优。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上，PNC相较参数微调方法准确率提升5%，局部性指标提升50%，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: PNC通过参数克隆而非更新实现高效知识迁移，兼具功能增强与模块可逆性，适用于需动态调整模型能力的场景。

authors_text: Lijun Sheng,Jian Liang,Ran He,Zilei Wang,Tieniu Tan
title: AdaptGuard: Defending Against Universal Attacks for Model Adaptation
title_zh: AdaptGuard：防御模型适应的通用攻击
abstract: Model adaptation aims at solving the domain transfer problem under the constraint of only accessing the pretrained source models. With the increasing considerations of data privacy and transmission efficiency, this paradigm has been gaining recent popularity. This paper studies the vulnerability to universal attacks transferred from the source domain during model adaptation algorithms due to the existence of malicious providers. We explore both universal adversarial perturbations and backdoor attacks as loopholes on the source side and discover that they still survive in the target models after adaptation. To address this issue, we propose a model preprocessing framework, named AdaptGuard, to improve the security of model adaptation algorithms. AdaptGuard avoids direct use of the risky source parameters through knowledge distillation and utilizes the pseudo adversarial samples under adjusted radius to enhance the robustness. AdaptGuard is a plug-and-play module that requires neither robust pretrained models nor any changes for the following model adaptation algorithms. Extensive results on three commonly used datasets and two popular adaptation methods validate that AdaptGuard can effectively defend against universal attacks and maintain clean accuracy in the target domain simultaneously. We hope this research will shed light on the safety and robustness of transfer learning. Code is available at https://github.com/TomSheng21/AdaptGuard.
summary: Model adaptation aims at solving the domain transfer problem under the constraint of only accessing the pretrained source models. With the increasing considerations of data privacy and transmission efficiency, this paradigm has been gaining recent popularity. This paper studies the vulnerability to universal attacks transferred from the source domain during model adaptation algorithms due to the existence of malicious providers. We explore both universal adversarial perturbations and backdoor attacks as loopholes on the source side and discover that they still survive in the target models after adaptation. To address this issue, we propose a model preprocessing framework, named AdaptGuard, to improve the security of model adaptation algorithms. AdaptGuard avoids direct use of the risky source parameters through knowledge distillation and utilizes the pseudo adversarial samples under adjusted radius to enhance the robustness. AdaptGuard is a plug-and-play module that requires neither robust pretrained models nor any changes for the following model adaptation algorithms. Extensive results on three commonly used datasets and two popular adaptation methods validate that AdaptGuard can effectively defend against universal attacks and maintain clean accuracy in the target domain simultaneously. We hope this research will shed light on the safety and robustness of transfer learning. Code is available at https://github.com/TomSheng21/AdaptGuard.
abstract_zh: 模型自适应旨在解决仅访问预训练源模型约束下的域转移问题。随着对数据隐私和传输效率的日益考虑，这种范式最近越来越受欢迎。本文研究了由于恶意提供者的存在而在模型自适应算法中对从源域转移的普遍攻击的脆弱性。我们将普遍的对抗性扰动和后门攻击作为源端的漏洞进行探索，并发现它们在适应后仍然存在于目标模型中。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一个名为AdaptGuard的模型预处理框架，以提高模型自适应算法的安全性。 AdaptGuard通过知识蒸馏避免直接使用有风险的源参数，并利用调整半径下的伪对抗样本来增强鲁棒性。 AdaptGuard 是一个即插即用的模块，既不需要强大的预训练模型，也不需要对以下模型自适应算法进行任何更改。对三个常用数据集和两种流行适应方法的广泛结果验证了 AdaptGuard 可以有效防御通用攻击，同时在目标域中保持干净的准确性。我们希望这项研究能够揭示迁移学习的安全性和稳健性。代码可在 https://github.com/TomSheng21/AdaptGuard 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出AdaptGuard框架，通过知识蒸馏和伪对抗样本增强，解决模型适配过程中源模型存在的普遍攻击和后门攻击问题。
AI.motivation: 模型适配在隐私和传输效率需求下日益重要，但源模型可能包含恶意攻击（如普遍对抗扰动和后门攻击），这些攻击在适配后仍会残留在目标模型中，威胁安全性。
AI.method: 设计AdaptGuard预处理框架，通过知识蒸馏避免直接使用源模型参数，并利用调整半径的伪对抗样本提升目标模型鲁棒性，且无需修改后续适配算法或依赖安全预训练模型。
AI.result: 在三个常用数据集和两种适配方法上验证，AdaptGuard能有效防御普遍攻击，同时保持目标域的准确率。
AI.conclusion: AdaptGuard为迁移学习的安全性与鲁棒性提供了新思路，揭示了模型适配中防御普遍攻击的重要性。

authors_text: Yufeng Yin,Minh Tran,Di Chang,Xinrui Wang,Mohammad Soleymani
title: Multi-modal Facial Action Unit Detection with Large Pre-trained Models for the 5th Competition on Affective Behavior Analysis in-the-wild
title_zh: 第五届野外情感行为分析大赛大型预训练模型多模态面部动作单元检测
abstract: Facial action unit detection has emerged as an important task within facial expression analysis, aimed at detecting specific pre-defined, objective facial expressions, such as lip tightening and cheek raising. This paper presents our submission to the Affective Behavior Analysis in-the-wild (ABAW) 2023 Competition for AU detection. We propose a multi-modal method for facial action unit detection with visual, acoustic, and lexical features extracted from the large pre-trained models. To provide high-quality details for visual feature extraction, we apply super-resolution and face alignment to the training data and show potential performance gain. Our approach achieves the F1 score of 52.3% on the official validation set of the 5th ABAW Challenge.
summary: Facial action unit detection has emerged as an important task within facial expression analysis, aimed at detecting specific pre-defined, objective facial expressions, such as lip tightening and cheek raising. This paper presents our submission to the Affective Behavior Analysis in-the-wild (ABAW) 2023 Competition for AU detection. We propose a multi-modal method for facial action unit detection with visual, acoustic, and lexical features extracted from the large pre-trained models. To provide high-quality details for visual feature extraction, we apply super-resolution and face alignment to the training data and show potential performance gain. Our approach achieves the F1 score of 52.3% on the official validation set of the 5th ABAW Challenge.
abstract_zh: 面部动作单元检测已成为面部表情分析中的一项重要任务，旨在检测特定的预定义的客观面部表情，例如嘴唇收紧和脸颊抬起。本文介绍了我们向 2023 年野外情感行为分析 (ABAW) AU 检测竞赛提交的材料。我们提出了一种用于面部动作单元检测的多模态方法，该方法利用从大型预训练模型中提取的视觉、听觉和词汇特征。为了为视觉特征提取提供高质量的细节，我们将超分辨率和面部对齐应用于训练数据并显示潜在的性能增益。我们的方法在第五届 ABAW 挑战赛的官方验证集上取得了 52.3% 的 F1 分数。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多模态面部动作单元检测方法，用于情感行为分析竞赛，结合视觉、声学和词汇特征以提高检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法可能未能充分挖掘多模态信息与大预训练模型的潜力，需通过融合多源特征提升面部动作单元检测的准确性。
AI.method: 采用多模态方法，从大预训练模型中提取视觉、声学和词汇特征，并通过超分辨率和人脸对齐技术优化视觉特征质量。
AI.result: 在ABAW 2023竞赛官方验证集上达到52.3%的F1分数。
AI.conclusion: 多模态特征融合与大模型预训练技术有效提升了面部动作单元检测性能，为相关竞赛提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Yixun Liang,Hao He,Shishi Xiao,Hao Lu,Yingcong Chen
title: Label Name is Mantra: Unifying Point Cloud Segmentation across Heterogeneous Datasets
title_zh: 标签名称为 Mantra：跨异构数据集统一点云分割
abstract: Point cloud segmentation is a fundamental task in 3D vision that serves a wide range of applications. Although great progresses have been made these years, its practical usability is still limited by the availability of training data. Existing approaches cannot make full use of multiple datasets on hand due to the label mismatch among different datasets. In this paper, we propose a principled approach that supports learning from heterogeneous datasets with different label sets. Our idea is to utilize a pre-trained language model to embed discrete labels to a continuous latent space with the help of their label names. This unifies all labels of different datasets, so that joint training is doable. Meanwhile, classifying points in the continuous 3D space by their vocabulary tokens significantly increase the generalization ability of the model in comparison with existing approaches that have fixed decoder architecture. Besides, we also integrate prompt learning in our framework to alleviate data shifts among different data sources. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our model outperforms the state-of-the-art by a large margin.
summary: Point cloud segmentation is a fundamental task in 3D vision that serves a wide range of applications. Although great progresses have been made these years, its practical usability is still limited by the availability of training data. Existing approaches cannot make full use of multiple datasets on hand due to the label mismatch among different datasets. In this paper, we propose a principled approach that supports learning from heterogeneous datasets with different label sets. Our idea is to utilize a pre-trained language model to embed discrete labels to a continuous latent space with the help of their label names. This unifies all labels of different datasets, so that joint training is doable. Meanwhile, classifying points in the continuous 3D space by their vocabulary tokens significantly increase the generalization ability of the model in comparison with existing approaches that have fixed decoder architecture. Besides, we also integrate prompt learning in our framework to alleviate data shifts among different data sources. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our model outperforms the state-of-the-art by a large margin.
abstract_zh: 点云分割是 3D 视觉中的一项基本任务，具有广泛的应用前景。尽管这些年来取得了巨大进步，但其实际可用性仍然受到训练数据可用性的限制。由于不同数据集之间的标签不匹配，现有方法无法充分利用现有的多个数据集。在本文中，我们提出了一种原则方法，支持从具有不同标签集的异构数据集进行学习。我们的想法是利用预先训练的语言模型，借助标签名称将离散标签嵌入到连续的潜在空间中。这统一了不同数据集的所有标签，以便联合训练是可行的。同时，与具有固定解码器架构的现有方法相比，通过词汇标记对连续 3D 空间中的点进行分类显着提高了模型的泛化能力。此外，我们还在我们的框架中集成了即时学习，以减轻不同数据源之间的数据转移。大量的实验表明，我们的模型大大优于最先进的模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种跨异构数据集的点云分割方法，通过统一不同数据集的标签空间来提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有点云分割方法因数据集间标签不匹配问题，难以有效利用多源数据，限制了实际应用效果。
AI.method: 利用预训练语言模型将离散标签嵌入连续潜在空间，结合词汇标记分类和提示学习技术，实现跨数据集标签统一与模型泛化。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上显著优于现有最先进方法，验证了方法的有效性与优越性。
AI.conclusion: 通过标签语义对齐与提示学习，成功解决了异构数据集间的分割难题，为跨数据集学习提供了新思路。
