search_text: FedRight: An Effective Model Copyright Protection for Federated Learning FedRight：联邦学习版权保护的有效模型 Federated learning (FL), an effective distributed machine learning framework, implements model training and meanwhile protects local data privacy. It has been applied to a broad variety of practice areas due to its great performance and appreciable profits. Who owns the model, and how to protect the copyright has become a real problem. Intuitively, the existing property rights protection methods in centralized scenarios (e.g., watermark embedding and model fingerprints) are possible solutions for FL. But they are still challenged by the distributed nature of FL in aspects of the no data sharing, parameter aggregation, and federated training settings. For the first time, we formalize the problem of copyright protection for FL, and propose FedRight to protect model copyright based on model fingerprints, i.e., extracting model features by generating adversarial examples as model fingerprints. FedRight outperforms previous works in four key aspects: (i) Validity: it extracts model features to generate transferable fingerprints to train a detector to verify the copyright of the model. (ii) Fidelity: it is with imperceptible impact on the federated training, thus promising good main task performance. (iii) Robustness: it is empirically robust against malicious attacks on copyright protection, i.e., fine-tuning, model pruning, and adaptive attacks. (iv) Black-box: it is valid in the black-box forensic scenario where only application programming interface calls to the model are available. Extensive evaluations across 3 datasets and 9 model structures demonstrate FedRight's superior fidelity, validity, and robustness. 联邦学习（FL）是一种有效的分布式机器学习框架，实现模型训练的同时保护本地数据隐私。由于其良好的性能和可观的利润，它已被应用于广泛的实践领域。模型的所有权归谁，如何保护版权成为现实问题。直观上，现有的中心化场景下的产权保护方法（例如水印嵌入和模型指纹）是FL的可能解决方案。但他们仍然受到 FL 分布式特性在无数据共享、参数聚合和联合训练设置等方面的挑战。我们首次将FL的版权保护问题形式化，并提出FedRight基于模型指纹来保护模型版权，即通过生成对抗性示例作为模型指纹来提取模型特征。 FedRight 在四个关键方面优于以前的工作：（i）有效性：它提取模型特征以生成可转移的指纹来训练检测器来验证模型的版权。 (ii)保真度：它对联邦训练的影响难以察觉，因此有望实现良好的主要任务性能。 (iii) 鲁棒性：根据经验，它对于版权保护的恶意攻击（即微调、模型剪枝和自适应攻击）具有鲁棒性。 (iv) 黑盒：它在黑盒取证场景中有效，其中只能对模型进行应用程序编程接口调用。对 3 个数据集和 9 个模型结构的广泛评估证明了 FedRight 卓越的保真度、有效性和稳健性。 本文提出FedRight方法，通过模型指纹技术解决联邦学习中的模型版权保护问题。 Jinyin Chen,Mingjun Li,Mingjun Li,Haibin Zheng cs.CR,cs.AI

authors_text: Xiaoqi Zhao,Youwei Pang,Lihe Zhang,Huchuan Lu,Lei Zhang
title: Towards Diverse Binary Segmentation via A Simple yet General Gated Network
title_zh: 通过简单而通用的门控网络实现多样化的二进制分段
abstract: In many binary segmentation tasks, most CNNs-based methods use a U-shape encoder-decoder network as their basic structure. They ignore two key problems when the encoder exchanges information with the decoder: one is the lack of interference control mechanism between them, the other is without considering the disparity of the contributions from different encoder levels. In this work, we propose a simple yet general gated network (GateNet) to tackle them all at once. With the help of multi-level gate units, the valuable context information from the encoder can be selectively transmitted to the decoder. In addition, we design a gated dual branch structure to build the cooperation among the features of different levels and improve the discrimination ability of the network. Furthermore, we introduce a "Fold" operation to improve the atrous convolution and form a novel folded atrous convolution, which can be flexibly embedded in ASPP or DenseASPP to accurately localize foreground objects of various scales. GateNet can be easily generalized to many binary segmentation tasks, including general and specific object segmentation and multi-modal segmentation. Without bells and whistles, our network consistently performs favorably against the state-of-the-art methods under 10 metrics on 33 datasets of 10 binary segmentation tasks.
summary: In many binary segmentation tasks, most CNNs-based methods use a U-shape encoder-decoder network as their basic structure. They ignore two key problems when the encoder exchanges information with the decoder: one is the lack of interference control mechanism between them, the other is without considering the disparity of the contributions from different encoder levels. In this work, we propose a simple yet general gated network (GateNet) to tackle them all at once. With the help of multi-level gate units, the valuable context information from the encoder can be selectively transmitted to the decoder. In addition, we design a gated dual branch structure to build the cooperation among the features of different levels and improve the discrimination ability of the network. Furthermore, we introduce a "Fold" operation to improve the atrous convolution and form a novel folded atrous convolution, which can be flexibly embedded in ASPP or DenseASPP to accurately localize foreground objects of various scales. GateNet can be easily generalized to many binary segmentation tasks, including general and specific object segmentation and multi-modal segmentation. Without bells and whistles, our network consistently performs favorably against the state-of-the-art methods under 10 metrics on 33 datasets of 10 binary segmentation tasks.
abstract_zh: 在许多二值分割任务中，大多数基于 CNN 的方法都使用 U 形编码器-解码器网络作为其基本结构。他们忽略了编码器与解码器交换信息时的两个关键问题：一是它们之间缺乏干扰控制机制，二是没有考虑不同编码器级别的贡献差异。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个简单而通用的门控网络（GateNet）来同时解决所有这些问题。在多级门单元的帮助下，来自编码器的有价值的上下文信息可以选择性地传输到解码器。此外，我们设计了门控双分支结构，以建立不同级别特征之间的协作，提高网络的判别能力。此外，我们引入了“折叠”操作来改进空洞卷积，形成一种新颖的折叠空洞卷积，它可以灵活地嵌入到ASPP或DenseASPP中以准确定位各种尺度的前景物体。 GateNet 可以很容易地推广到许多二元分割任务，包括通用和特定对象分割以及多模态分割。没有花里胡哨的东西，我们的网络在 10 个二进制分割任务的 33 个数据集上的 10 个指标下始终表现优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种简单通用的门控网络GateNet，解决二值分割中编码器-解码器信息交互的干扰控制与层级贡献差异问题，提升分割性能。
AI.motivation: 现有U型网络在编码器-解码器信息交互时缺乏干扰控制机制，且未考虑不同编码层级的贡献差异，导致分割精度受限。
AI.method: 设计多级门控单元选择性传递上下文信息，构建门控双分支结构增强特征协作，并引入Fold操作改进空洞卷积以提升多尺度定位能力。
AI.result: 在10类二值分割任务的33个数据集上，GateNet在10项指标中均优于现有方法，且无需复杂配置即可实现稳定性能提升。
AI.conclusion: GateNet通过门控机制与结构创新有效解决了二值分割的关键问题，验证了其方法在多样任务中的通用性与有效性。

authors_text: Andrzej Pelc
title: Explorable families of graphs
title_zh: 可探索的图族
abstract: Graph exploration is one of the fundamental tasks performed by a mobile agent in a graph. An $n$-node graph has unlabeled nodes, and all ports at any node of degree $d$ are arbitrarily numbered $0,\dots, d-1$. A mobile agent, initially situated at some starting node $v$, has to visit all nodes of the graph and stop. In the absence of any initial knowledge of the graph the task of deterministic exploration is often impossible. On the other hand, for some families of graphs it is possible to design deterministic exploration algorithms working for any graph of the family. We call such families of graphs {\em explorable}. Examples of explorable families are all finite families of graphs, as well as the family of all trees. In this paper we study the problem of which families of graphs are explorable. We characterize all such families, and then ask the question whether there exists a universal deterministic algorithm that, given an explorable family of graphs, explores any graph of this family, without knowing which graph of the family is being explored. The answer to this question turns out to depend on how the explorable family is given to the hypothetical universal algorithm. If the algorithm can get the answer to any yes/no question about the family, then such a universal algorithm can be constructed. If, on the other hand, the algorithm can be only given an algorithmic description of the input explorable family, then such a universal deterministic algorithm does not exist.
summary: Graph exploration is one of the fundamental tasks performed by a mobile agent in a graph. An $n$-node graph has unlabeled nodes, and all ports at any node of degree $d$ are arbitrarily numbered $0,\dots, d-1$. A mobile agent, initially situated at some starting node $v$, has to visit all nodes of the graph and stop. In the absence of any initial knowledge of the graph the task of deterministic exploration is often impossible. On the other hand, for some families of graphs it is possible to design deterministic exploration algorithms working for any graph of the family. We call such families of graphs {\em explorable}. Examples of explorable families are all finite families of graphs, as well as the family of all trees. In this paper we study the problem of which families of graphs are explorable. We characterize all such families, and then ask the question whether there exists a universal deterministic algorithm that, given an explorable family of graphs, explores any graph of this family, without knowing which graph of the family is being explored. The answer to this question turns out to depend on how the explorable family is given to the hypothetical universal algorithm. If the algorithm can get the answer to any yes/no question about the family, then such a universal algorithm can be constructed. If, on the other hand, the algorithm can be only given an algorithmic description of the input explorable family, then such a universal deterministic algorithm does not exist.
abstract_zh: 图探索是移动代理在图中执行的基本任务之一。 $n$ 节点图具有未标记的节点，且任意度为 $d$ 的节点处的所有端口都被任意编号为 $0,\dots, d-1$。最初位于某个起始节点 $v$ 的移动代理必须访问图中的所有节点并停止。在缺乏图的任何初始知识的情况下，确定性探索的任务通常是不可能的。另一方面，对于某些图族，可以设计适用于该族的任何图的确定性探索算法。我们称这样的图族为“可探索的”。可探索族的例子是所有有限图族，以及所有树族。在本文中，我们研究了哪些图族是可探索的问题。我们描述所有这些族的特征，然后提出一个问题：是否存在一种通用的确定性算法，在给定一个可探索的图族的情况下，该算法可以探索该族的任何图，而不知道正在探索该族的哪个图。这个问题的答案取决于如何将可探索的族赋予假设的通用算法。如果算法能够得到关于家庭的任何是/否问题的答案，那么就可以构建这样的通用算法。另一方面，如果算法只能给出输入可探索族的算法描述，则这样的通用确定性算法不存在。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了哪些图家族是可探索的，并探讨是否存在通用的确定性算法来探索这些家族中的任意图。
AI.motivation: 在缺乏图结构先验知识的情况下，移动代理需要确定性地探索图。某些图家族（如树）存在此类算法，但通用算法的存在性尚不明确。
AI.method: 通过刻画可探索图家族的特征，并分析通用算法在不同输入条件下的可行性（能否回答任意问题或仅依赖算法描述）。
AI.result: 当通用算法能回答关于图家族的任意布尔问题时，存在通用算法；若仅依赖算法描述，则不存在此类通用算法。
AI.conclusion: 可探索图家族的通用算法存在性取决于输入方式，而非图家族本身的性质。

search_text: Explorable families of graphs 可探索的图族 Graph exploration is one of the fundamental tasks performed by a mobile agent in a graph. An $n$-node graph has unlabeled nodes, and all ports at any node of degree $d$ are arbitrarily numbered $0,\dots, d-1$. A mobile agent, initially situated at some starting node $v$, has to visit all nodes of the graph and stop. In the absence of any initial knowledge of the graph the task of deterministic exploration is often impossible. On the other hand, for some families of graphs it is possible to design deterministic exploration algorithms working for any graph of the family. We call such families of graphs {\em explorable}. Examples of explorable families are all finite families of graphs, as well as the family of all trees. In this paper we study the problem of which families of graphs are explorable. We characterize all such families, and then ask the question whether there exists a universal deterministic algorithm that, given an explorable family of graphs, explores any graph of this family, without knowing which graph of the family is being explored. The answer to this question turns out to depend on how the explorable family is given to the hypothetical universal algorithm. If the algorithm can get the answer to any yes/no question about the family, then such a universal algorithm can be constructed. If, on the other hand, the algorithm can be only given an algorithmic description of the input explorable family, then such a universal deterministic algorithm does not exist. 图探索是移动代理在图中执行的基本任务之一。 $n$ 节点图具有未标记的节点，且任意度为 $d$ 的节点处的所有端口都被任意编号为 $0,\dots, d-1$。最初位于某个起始节点 $v$ 的移动代理必须访问图中的所有节点并停止。在缺乏图的任何初始知识的情况下，确定性探索的任务通常是不可能的。另一方面，对于某些图族，可以设计适用于该族的任何图的确定性探索算法。我们称这样的图族为“可探索的”。可探索族的例子是所有有限图族，以及所有树族。在本文中，我们研究了哪些图族是可探索的问题。我们描述所有这些族的特征，然后提出一个问题：是否存在一种通用的确定性算法，在给定一个可探索的图族的情况下，该算法可以探索该族的任何图，而不知道正在探索该族的哪个图。这个问题的答案取决于如何将可探索的族赋予假设的通用算法。如果算法能够得到关于家庭的任何是/否问题的答案，那么就可以构建这样的通用算法。另一方面，如果算法只能给出输入可探索族的算法描述，则这样的通用确定性算法不存在。 本文研究了哪些图家族是可探索的，并探讨是否存在通用的确定性算法来探索这些家族中的任意图。 Andrzej Pelc cs.DS

authors_text: Zhongying Deng,Shujun Wang,Angelica I Aviles-Rivero,Zoe Kourtzi,Carola-Bibiane Schönlieb
title: HIBMatch: Hypergraph Information Bottleneck for Semi-supervised Alzheimer's Progression
title_zh: HIBMatch：半监督阿尔茨海默病进展的超图信息瓶颈
comment: Accepted to the IEEE Journal of Biomedical and Health Informatics (To appear)
comments: Accepted to the IEEE Journal of Biomedical and Health Informatics (To appear)
abstract: Alzheimer's disease progression prediction is critical for patients with early Mild Cognitive Impairment (MCI) to enable timely intervention and improve their quality of life. While existing progression prediction techniques demonstrate potential with multimodal data, they are highly limited by their reliance on labelled data and fail to account for a key element of future progression prediction: not all features extracted at the current moment may be relevant for predicting progression several years later. To address these limitations in the literature, we design a novel semi-supervised multimodal learning hypergraph architecture, termed HIBMatch, by harnessing hypergraph knowledge based on information bottleneck and consistency regularisation strategies. Firstly, our framework utilises hypergraphs to represent multimodal data, encompassing both imaging and non-imaging modalities. Secondly, to harmonise relevant information from the currently captured data for future MCI conversion prediction, we propose a Hypergraph Information Bottleneck (HIB) that discriminates against irrelevant information, thereby focusing exclusively on harmonising relevant information for future MCI conversion prediction. Thirdly, our method enforces consistency regularisation between the HIB and a discriminative classifier to enhance the robustness and generalisation capabilities of HIBMatch under both topological and feature perturbations. Finally, to fully exploit the unlabeled data, HIBMatch incorporates a cross-modal contrastive loss for data efficiency. Extensive experiments on the Alzheimer's Disease Neuroimaging Initiative (ADNI) dataset demonstrate that our proposed HIBMatch framework surpasses existing state-of-the-art methods in Alzheimer's disease prognosis.
summary: Alzheimer's disease progression prediction is critical for patients with early Mild Cognitive Impairment (MCI) to enable timely intervention and improve their quality of life. While existing progression prediction techniques demonstrate potential with multimodal data, they are highly limited by their reliance on labelled data and fail to account for a key element of future progression prediction: not all features extracted at the current moment may be relevant for predicting progression several years later. To address these limitations in the literature, we design a novel semi-supervised multimodal learning hypergraph architecture, termed HIBMatch, by harnessing hypergraph knowledge based on information bottleneck and consistency regularisation strategies. Firstly, our framework utilises hypergraphs to represent multimodal data, encompassing both imaging and non-imaging modalities. Secondly, to harmonise relevant information from the currently captured data for future MCI conversion prediction, we propose a Hypergraph Information Bottleneck (HIB) that discriminates against irrelevant information, thereby focusing exclusively on harmonising relevant information for future MCI conversion prediction. Thirdly, our method enforces consistency regularisation between the HIB and a discriminative classifier to enhance the robustness and generalisation capabilities of HIBMatch under both topological and feature perturbations. Finally, to fully exploit the unlabeled data, HIBMatch incorporates a cross-modal contrastive loss for data efficiency. Extensive experiments on the Alzheimer's Disease Neuroimaging Initiative (ADNI) dataset demonstrate that our proposed HIBMatch framework surpasses existing state-of-the-art methods in Alzheimer's disease prognosis.
abstract_zh: 阿尔茨海默病进展预测对于早期轻度认知障碍 (MCI) 患者至关重要，以便及时干预并改善他们的生活质量。虽然现有的进展预测技术展示了多模态数据的潜力，但它们受到对标记数据的依赖的高度限制，并且未能考虑未来进展预测的关键要素：并非当前提取的所有特征都可能与预测几年后的进展相关。为了解决文献中的这些局限性，我们通过利用基于信息瓶颈和一致性正则化策略的超图知识，设计了一种新颖的半监督多模态学习超图架构，称为 HIBMatch。首先，我们的框架利用超图来表示多模态数据，包括成像和非成像模态。其次，为了协调当前捕获的数据中的相关信息以用于未来的 MCI 转换预测，我们提出了一种超图信息瓶颈（HIB），它可以区分不相关的信息，从而专注于协调未来 MCI 转换预测的相关信息。第三，我们的方法强制 HIB 和判别分类器之间的一致性正则化，以增强 HIBMatch 在拓扑和特征扰动下的鲁棒性和泛化能力。最后，为了充分利用未标记的数据，HIBMatch 结合了跨模式对比损失来提高数据效率。对阿尔茨海默病神经影像计划 (ADNI) 数据集的大量实验表明，我们提出的 HIBMatch 框架在阿尔茨海默病预后方面超越了现有的最先进方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出HIBMatch框架，利用超图信息瓶颈和一致性正则化策略，解决阿尔茨海默病进展预测中标签数据依赖和特征相关性不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖大量标签数据且未考虑当前特征对未来进展预测的相关性，导致预测效果受限。
AI.method: 构建超图表示多模态数据，设计超图信息瓶颈（HIB）筛选关键信息，结合分类器一致性正则化与跨模态对比损失，提升半监督学习效率。
AI.result: 在ADNI数据集上，HIBMatch在阿尔茨海默病预后预测任务中优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: HIBMatch通过超图建模与信息瓶颈机制，有效融合多模态数据并提升半监督场景下的预测鲁棒性，为疾病进展预测提供新思路。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出HIBMatch框架，利用超图信息瓶颈和一致性正则化策略，解决阿尔茨海默病进展预测中标签数据依赖和特征相关性不足的问题。

authors_text: Ning Zhang,Francesco Nex,George Vosselman,Norman Kerle
title: Channel-Aware Distillation Transformer for Depth Estimation on Nano Drones
title_zh: 用于纳米无人机深度估计的通道感知蒸馏变压器
abstract: Autonomous navigation of drones using computer vision has achieved promising performance. Nano-sized drones based on edge computing platforms are lightweight, flexible, and cheap, thus suitable for exploring narrow spaces. However, due to their extremely limited computing power and storage, vision algorithms designed for high-performance GPU platforms cannot be used for nano drones. To address this issue this paper presents a lightweight CNN depth estimation network deployed on nano drones for obstacle avoidance. Inspired by Knowledge Distillation (KD), a Channel-Aware Distillation Transformer (CADiT) is proposed to facilitate the small network to learn knowledge from a larger network. The proposed method is validated on the KITTI dataset and tested on a nano drone Crazyflie, with an ultra-low power microprocessor GAP8.
summary: Autonomous navigation of drones using computer vision has achieved promising performance. Nano-sized drones based on edge computing platforms are lightweight, flexible, and cheap, thus suitable for exploring narrow spaces. However, due to their extremely limited computing power and storage, vision algorithms designed for high-performance GPU platforms cannot be used for nano drones. To address this issue this paper presents a lightweight CNN depth estimation network deployed on nano drones for obstacle avoidance. Inspired by Knowledge Distillation (KD), a Channel-Aware Distillation Transformer (CADiT) is proposed to facilitate the small network to learn knowledge from a larger network. The proposed method is validated on the KITTI dataset and tested on a nano drone Crazyflie, with an ultra-low power microprocessor GAP8.
abstract_zh: 使用计算机视觉的无人机自主导航已经取得了可喜的性能。基于边缘计算平台的纳米无人机重量轻、灵活且廉价，适合探索狭窄的空间。然而，由于其计算能力和存储极其有限，为高性能GPU平台设计的视觉算法无法用于纳米无人机。为了解决这个问题，本文提出了一种部署在纳米无人机上用于避障的轻量级 CNN 深度估计网络。受知识蒸馏（KD）的启发，提出了通道感知蒸馏变压器（CADiT）来促进小型网络从较大的网络中学习知识。所提出的方法在 KITTI 数据集上进行了验证，并在配备超低功耗微处理器 GAP8 的纳米无人机 Crazyflie 上进行了测试。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种轻量级CNN深度估计网络CADiT，用于在纳米无人机上实现避障，通过知识蒸馏从大网络中学习知识。
AI.motivation: 纳米无人机计算能力和存储空间有限，传统GPU平台的视觉算法无法直接应用，需开发轻量化模型以实现自主导航。
AI.method: 受知识蒸馏启发，设计通道感知蒸馏Transformer（CADiT），通过通道级特征蒸馏使小网络学习大网络知识，并在KITTI数据集和Crazyflie纳米无人机上验证。
AI.result: 方法在KITTI数据集上验证有效，并成功部署于搭载GAP8超低功耗微处理器的Crazyflie纳米无人机，实现高效深度估计。
AI.conclusion: CADiT为资源受限的纳米无人机部署深度估计提供了可行方案，平衡了模型精度与计算效率。

ai_content_json.result: 方法在KITTI数据集上验证有效，并成功部署于搭载GAP8超低功耗微处理器的Crazyflie纳米无人机，实现高效深度估计。
ai_content_json.conclusion: CADiT为资源受限的纳米无人机部署深度估计提供了可行方案，平衡了模型精度与计算效率。

tldr: 本文提出一种轻量级CNN深度估计网络CADiT，用于在纳米无人机上实现避障，通过知识蒸馏从大网络中学习知识。
motivation: 纳米无人机计算能力和存储空间有限，传统GPU平台的视觉算法无法直接应用，需开发轻量化模型以实现自主导航。
method: 受知识蒸馏启发，设计通道感知蒸馏Transformer（CADiT），通过通道级特征蒸馏使小网络学习大网络知识，并在KITTI数据集和Crazyflie纳米无人机上验证。
result: 方法在KITTI数据集上验证有效，并成功部署于搭载GAP8超低功耗微处理器的Crazyflie纳米无人机，实现高效深度估计。
conclusion: CADiT为资源受限的纳米无人机部署深度估计提供了可行方案，平衡了模型精度与计算效率。
search_text: Channel-Aware Distillation Transformer for Depth Estimation on Nano Drones 用于纳米无人机深度估计的通道感知蒸馏变压器 Autonomous navigation of drones using computer vision has achieved promising performance. Nano-sized drones based on edge computing platforms are lightweight, flexible, and cheap, thus suitable for exploring narrow spaces. However, due to their extremely limited computing power and storage, vision algorithms designed for high-performance GPU platforms cannot be used for nano drones. To address this issue this paper presents a lightweight CNN depth estimation network deployed on nano drones for obstacle avoidance. Inspired by Knowledge Distillation (KD), a Channel-Aware Distillation Transformer (CADiT) is proposed to facilitate the small network to learn knowledge from a larger network. The proposed method is validated on the KITTI dataset and tested on a nano drone Crazyflie, with an ultra-low power microprocessor GAP8. 使用计算机视觉的无人机自主导航已经取得了可喜的性能。基于边缘计算平台的纳米无人机重量轻、灵活且廉价，适合探索狭窄的空间。然而，由于其计算能力和存储极其有限，为高性能GPU平台设计的视觉算法无法用于纳米无人机。为了解决这个问题，本文提出了一种部署在纳米无人机上用于避障的轻量级 CNN 深度估计网络。受知识蒸馏（KD）的启发，提出了通道感知蒸馏变压器（CADiT）来促进小型网络从较大的网络中学习知识。所提出的方法在 KITTI 数据集上进行了验证，并在配备超低功耗微处理器 GAP8 的纳米无人机 Crazyflie 上进行了测试。 本文提出一种轻量级CNN深度估计网络CADiT，用于在纳米无人机上实现避障，通过知识蒸馏从大网络中学习知识。 Ning Zhang,Francesco Nex,George Vosselman,Norman Kerle cs.RO,cs.CV

authors_text: Bochao Huang,Pin
title: Social Occlusion Inference with Vectorized Representation for Autonomous Driving
title_zh: 自动驾驶矢量化表示的社会遮挡推理
abstract: Autonomous vehicles must be capable of handling the occlusion of the environment to ensure safe and efficient driving. In urban environment, occlusion often arises due to other vehicles obscuring the perception of the ego vehicle. Since the occlusion condition can impact the trajectories of vehicles, the behavior of other vehicles is helpful in making inferences about the occlusion as a remedy for perceptual deficiencies. This paper introduces a novel social occlusion inference approach that learns a mapping from agent trajectories and scene context to an occupancy grid map (OGM) representing the view of ego vehicle. Specially, vectorized features are encoded through the polyline encoder to aggregate features of vectors into features of polylines. A transformer module is then utilized to model the high-order interactions of polylines. Importantly, occlusion queries are proposed to fuse polyline features and generate the OGM without the input of visual modality. To verify the performance of vectorized representation, we design a baseline based on a fully transformer encoder-decoder architecture mapping the OGM with occlusion and historical trajectories information to the ground truth OGM. We evaluate our approach on an unsignalized intersection in the INTERACTION dataset, which outperforms the state-of-the-art results.
summary: Autonomous vehicles must be capable of handling the occlusion of the environment to ensure safe and efficient driving. In urban environment, occlusion often arises due to other vehicles obscuring the perception of the ego vehicle. Since the occlusion condition can impact the trajectories of vehicles, the behavior of other vehicles is helpful in making inferences about the occlusion as a remedy for perceptual deficiencies. This paper introduces a novel social occlusion inference approach that learns a mapping from agent trajectories and scene context to an occupancy grid map (OGM) representing the view of ego vehicle. Specially, vectorized features are encoded through the polyline encoder to aggregate features of vectors into features of polylines. A transformer module is then utilized to model the high-order interactions of polylines. Importantly, occlusion queries are proposed to fuse polyline features and generate the OGM without the input of visual modality. To verify the performance of vectorized representation, we design a baseline based on a fully transformer encoder-decoder architecture mapping the OGM with occlusion and historical trajectories information to the ground truth OGM. We evaluate our approach on an unsignalized intersection in the INTERACTION dataset, which outperforms the state-of-the-art results.
abstract_zh: 自动驾驶车辆必须能够应对环境遮挡，以确保安全高效的驾驶。在城市环境中，由于其他车辆遮挡了本车的感知，常常会出现遮挡。由于遮挡条件会影响车辆的轨迹，因此其他车辆的行为有助于推断遮挡，作为感知缺陷的补救措施。本文介绍了一种新颖的社交遮挡推理方法，该方法学习从智能体轨迹和场景上下文到代表自我车辆视图的占用网格图（OGM）的映射。具体来说，矢量化特征通过折线编码器进行编码，将矢量特征聚合为折线特征。然后利用变压器模块对折线的高阶交互进行建模。重要的是，提出了遮挡查询来融合折线特征并生成 OGM，而无需输入视觉模态。为了验证矢量化表示的性能，我们设计了一个基于完全变换器编码器-解码器架构的基线，将具有遮挡和历史轨迹信息的 OGM 映射到地面实况 OGM。我们在 INTERACTION 数据集中的无信号交叉口上评估了我们的方法，该方法优于最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于向量化表示的社会遮挡推断方法，用于自动驾驶中的环境遮挡处理。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶车辆需应对其他车辆导致的环境遮挡问题，传统视觉模态受限时需通过其他车辆行为推断遮挡状态以提升感知鲁棒性。
AI.method: 通过多段线编码器提取向量化特征，利用Transformer建模多段线高阶交互，并设计遮挡查询模块生成无需视觉输入的占用网格图（OGM）。
AI.result: 在INTERACTION数据集的无信号交叉口场景中，该方法优于现有最先进算法。
AI.conclusion: 向量化表示与Transformer结合的遮挡推断方法能有效提升自动驾驶在复杂城市环境中的感知能力。

authors_text: Aleksandr Laptev,Vladimir Bataev,Igor Gitman,Boris Ginsburg
title: Powerful and Extensible WFST Framework for RNN-Transducer Losses
title_zh: 针对 RNN-Transducer 损失的强大且可扩展的 WFST 框架
comment: To appear in Proc. ICASSP 2023, June 04-10, 2023, Rhodes island, Greece. 5 pages, 5 figures, 3 tables
comments: To appear in Proc. ICASSP 2023, June 04-10, 2023, Rhodes island, Greece. 5 pages, 5 figures, 3 tables
abstract: This paper presents a framework based on Weighted Finite-State Transducers (WFST) to simplify the development of modifications for RNN-Transducer (RNN-T) loss. Existing implementations of RNN-T use CUDA-related code, which is hard to extend and debug. WFSTs are easy to construct and extend, and allow debugging through visualization. We introduce two WFST-powered RNN-T implementations: (1) "Compose-Transducer", based on a composition of the WFST graphs from acoustic and textual schema -- computationally competitive and easy to modify; (2) "Grid-Transducer", which constructs the lattice directly for further computations -- most compact, and computationally efficient. We illustrate the ease of extensibility through introduction of a new W-Transducer loss -- the adaptation of the Connectionist Temporal Classification with Wild Cards. W-Transducer (W-RNNT) consistently outperforms the standard RNN-T in a weakly-supervised data setup with missing parts of transcriptions at the beginning and end of utterances. All RNN-T losses are implemented with the k2 framework and are available in the NeMo toolkit.
summary: This paper presents a framework based on Weighted Finite-State Transducers (WFST) to simplify the development of modifications for RNN-Transducer (RNN-T) loss. Existing implementations of RNN-T use CUDA-related code, which is hard to extend and debug. WFSTs are easy to construct and extend, and allow debugging through visualization. We introduce two WFST-powered RNN-T implementations: (1) "Compose-Transducer", based on a composition of the WFST graphs from acoustic and textual schema -- computationally competitive and easy to modify; (2) "Grid-Transducer", which constructs the lattice directly for further computations -- most compact, and computationally efficient. We illustrate the ease of extensibility through introduction of a new W-Transducer loss -- the adaptation of the Connectionist Temporal Classification with Wild Cards. W-Transducer (W-RNNT) consistently outperforms the standard RNN-T in a weakly-supervised data setup with missing parts of transcriptions at the beginning and end of utterances. All RNN-T losses are implemented with the k2 framework and are available in the NeMo toolkit.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一个基于加权有限状态传感器 (WFST) 的框架，以简化 RNN 传感器 (RNN-T) 损失修改的开发。 RNN-T 的现有实现使用 CUDA 相关代码，难以扩展和调试。 WFST 易于构建和扩展，并允许通过可视化进行调试。我们介绍两种由 WFST 驱动的 RNN-T 实现：（1）“Compose-Transducer”，基于来自声学和文本模式的 WFST 图的组合——计算上具有竞争力且易于修改； (2)“Grid-Transducer”，直接构建晶格以进行进一步计算——最紧凑，计算效率最高。我们通过引入新的 W-Transducer 损失（使用通配符对联结主义时间分类进行调整）来说明可扩展性的简易性。 W-Transducer (W-RNNT) 在弱监督数据设置中始终优于标准 RNN-T，在话语的开头和结尾处缺少转录部分。所有 RNN-T 损失均通过 k2 框架实现，并且可在 NeMo 工具包中找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于加权有限状态转换器（WFST）的框架，简化RNN-Transducer（RNN-T）损失的修改开发。
AI.motivation: 现有RNN-T实现依赖CUDA代码，扩展性和调试困难，而WFST易于构建、扩展且支持可视化调试。
AI.method: 引入两种WFST驱动的RNN-T实现：Compose-Transducer（基于声学和文本图的组合）与Grid-Transducer（直接构建网格结构），并提出新的W-Transducer损失（W-RNNT）。
AI.result: W-RNNT在弱监督数据（缺失开头和结尾转录）中持续优于标准RNN-T，所有实现基于k2框架并集成于NeMo工具包。
AI.conclusion: WFST框架提升了RNN-T损失的可扩展性与效率，新方法在特定场景下表现更优，且代码已开源可用。

Existing implementations of RNN-T use CUDA-related code, which is hard to extend and debug. WFSTs are easy to construct and extend, and allow debugging through visualization. We introduce two WFST-powered RNN-T implementations: (1) "Compose-Transducer", based on a composition of the WFST graphs from acoustic and textual schema -- computationally competitive and easy to modify; (2) "Grid-Transducer", which constructs the lattice directly for further computations -- most compact, and computationally efficient. We illustrate the ease of extensibility through introduction of a new W-Transducer loss -- the adaptation of the Connectionist Temporal Classification with Wild Cards. W-Transducer (W-RNNT) consistently outperforms the standard RNN-T in a weakly-supervised data setup with missing parts of transcriptions at the beginning and end of utterances. All RNN-T losses are implemented with the k2 framework and are available in the NeMo toolkit. 本文提出了一个基于加权有限状态传感器 (WFST) 的框架，以简化 RNN 传感器 (RNN-T) 损失修改的开发。 RNN-T 的现有实现使用 CUDA 相关代码，难以扩展和调试。 WFST 易于构建和扩展，并允许通过可视化进行调试。我们介绍两种由 WFST 驱动的 RNN-T 实现：（1）“Compose-Transducer”，基于来自声学和文本模式的 WFST 图的组合——计算上具有竞争力且易于修改； (2)“Grid-Transducer”，直接构建晶格以进行进一步计算——最紧凑，计算效率最高。我们通过引入新的 W-Transducer 损失（使用通配符对联结主义时间分类进行调整）来说明可扩展性的简易性。 W-Transducer (W-RNNT) 在弱监督数据设置中始终优于标准 RNN-T，在话语的开头和结尾处缺少转录部分。所有 RNN-T 损失均通过 k2 框架实现，并且可在 NeMo 工具包中找到。 本文提出基于加权有限状态转换器（WFST）的框架，简化RNN-Transducer（RNN-T）损失的修改开发。 Aleksandr Laptev,Vladimir Bataev,Igor Gitman,Boris Ginsburg eess.AS,cs.AI,cs.CL,cs.LG,cs.SD

authors_text: Xiaoqi Zhao,Shijie Chang,Youwei Pang,Jiaxing Yang,Lihe Zhang,Huchuan Lu
title: Adaptive Multi-source Predictor for Zero-shot Video Object Segmentation
title_zh: 用于零样本视频对象分割的自适应多源预测器
comment: Accepted to IJCV 2024. Code is available at: https://github.com/Xiaoqi-Zhao-DLUT/Multi-Source-APS-ZVOS. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2108.05076
comments: Accepted to IJCV 2024. Code is available at: https://github.com/Xiaoqi-Zhao-DLUT/Multi-Source-APS-ZVOS. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2108.05076
abstract: Static and moving objects often occur in real-life videos. Most video object segmentation methods only focus on extracting and exploiting motion cues to perceive moving objects. Once faced with the frames of static objects, the moving object predictors may predict failed results caused by uncertain motion information, such as low-quality optical flow maps. Besides, different sources such as RGB, depth, optical flow and static saliency can provide useful information about the objects. However, existing approaches only consider either the RGB or RGB and optical flow. In this paper, we propose a novel adaptive multi-source predictor for zero-shot video object segmentation (ZVOS). In the static object predictor, the RGB source is converted to depth and static saliency sources, simultaneously. In the moving object predictor, we propose the multi-source fusion structure. First, the spatial importance of each source is highlighted with the help of the interoceptive spatial attention module (ISAM). Second, the motion-enhanced module (MEM) is designed to generate pure foreground motion attention for improving the representation of static and moving features in the decoder. Furthermore, we design a feature purification module (FPM) to filter the inter-source incompatible features. By using the ISAM, MEM and FPM, the multi-source features are effectively fused. In addition, we put forward an adaptive predictor fusion network (APF) to evaluate the quality of the optical flow map and fuse the predictions from the static object predictor and the moving object predictor in order to prevent over-reliance on the failed results caused by low-quality optical flow maps. Experiments show that the proposed model outperforms the state-of-the-art methods on three challenging ZVOS benchmarks. And, the static object predictor precisely predicts a high-quality depth map and static saliency map at the same time.

However, existing approaches only consider either the RGB or RGB and optical flow. In this paper, we propose a novel adaptive multi-source predictor for zero-shot video object segmentation (ZVOS). In the static object predictor, the RGB source is converted to depth and static saliency sources, simultaneously. In the moving object predictor, we propose the multi-source fusion structure. First, the spatial importance of each source is highlighted with the help of the interoceptive spatial attention module (ISAM). Second, the motion-enhanced module (MEM) is designed to generate pure foreground motion attention for improving the representation of static and moving features in the decoder. Furthermore, we design a feature purification module (FPM) to filter the inter-source incompatible features. By using the ISAM, MEM and FPM, the multi-source features are effectively fused. In addition, we put forward an adaptive predictor fusion network (APF) to evaluate the quality of the optical flow map and fuse the predictions from the static object predictor and the moving object predictor in order to prevent over-reliance on the failed results caused by low-quality optical flow maps. Experiments show that the proposed model outperforms the state-of-the-art methods on three challenging ZVOS benchmarks. And, the static object predictor precisely predicts a high-quality depth map and static saliency map at the same time.
abstract_zh: 静态和移动的物体经常出现在现实生活的视频中。大多数视频对象分割方法仅专注于提取和利用运动线索来感知移动对象。一旦面对静态物体的帧，运动物体预测器可能会因不确定的运动信息（例如低质量的光流图）而导致预测失败的结果。此外，RGB、深度、光流和静态显着性等不同来源可以提供有关对象的有用信息。然而，现有方法仅考虑 RGB 或 RGB 和光流。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于零镜头视频对象分割（ZVOS）的新型自适应多源预测器。在静态对象预测器中，RGB 源同时转换为深度和静态显着性源。在运动目标预测器中，我们提出了多源融合结构。首先，借助内感受空间注意模块（ISAM）突出每个来源的空间重要性。其次，运动增强模块（MEM）旨在生成纯前景运动注意力，以改善解码器中静态和运动特征的表示。此外，我们设计了一个特征净化模块（FPM）来过滤源间不兼容的特征。通过使用ISAM、MEM和FPM，有效地融合了多源特征。此外，我们提出了一种自适应预测融合网络（APF）来评估光流图的质量，并融合静态目标预测器和运动目标预测器的预测，以防止过度依赖低质量光流图导致的失败结果。实验表明，所提出的模型在三个具有挑战性的 ZVOS 基准测试中优于最先进的方法。并且，静态对象预测器同时精确预测高质量的深度图和静态显着性图。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自适应多源预测器，用于解决零样本视频目标分割（ZVOS）中静态和动态物体分割的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅依赖运动线索分割动态物体，在静态物体帧上表现不佳，且未充分利用RGB、深度、光流等多源信息。
AI.method: 设计静态物体预测器（转换RGB为深度和静态显著性）、动态物体预测器（包含空间注意力模块ISAM、运动增强模块MEM和特征净化模块FPM），并引入自适应预测器融合网络（APF）动态融合预测结果。
AI.result: 在三个ZVOS基准数据集上优于现有最先进方法，静态预测器可同时生成高质量深度图和静态显著性图。
AI.conclusion: 通过多源特征融合与自适应预测机制，有效解决了ZVOS中静态/动态物体分割的挑战，提升了分割精度与鲁棒性。

authors_text: Wuyuan Xie,Shukang Wang,Sukun Tian,Lirong Huang,Ye Liu,Miaohui Wang
title: Just Noticeable Visual Redundancy Forecasting: A Deep Multimodal-driven Approach
title_zh: 值得注意的视觉冗余预测：一种深度多模态驱动的方法
abstract: Just noticeable difference (JND) refers to the maximum visual change that human eyes cannot perceive, and it has a wide range of applications in multimedia systems. However, most existing JND approaches only focus on a single modality, and rarely consider the complementary effects of multimodal information. In this article, we investigate the JND modeling from an end-to-end homologous multimodal perspective, namely hmJND-Net. Specifically, we explore three important visually sensitive modalities, including saliency, depth, and segmentation. To better utilize homologous multimodal information, we establish an effective fusion method via summation enhancement and subtractive offset, and align homologous multimodal features based on a self-attention driven encoder-decoder paradigm. Extensive experimental results on eight different benchmark datasets validate the superiority of our hmJND-Net over eight representative methods.
summary: Just noticeable difference (JND) refers to the maximum visual change that human eyes cannot perceive, and it has a wide range of applications in multimedia systems. However, most existing JND approaches only focus on a single modality, and rarely consider the complementary effects of multimodal information. In this article, we investigate the JND modeling from an end-to-end homologous multimodal perspective, namely hmJND-Net. Specifically, we explore three important visually sensitive modalities, including saliency, depth, and segmentation. To better utilize homologous multimodal information, we establish an effective fusion method via summation enhancement and subtractive offset, and align homologous multimodal features based on a self-attention driven encoder-decoder paradigm. Extensive experimental results on eight different benchmark datasets validate the superiority of our hmJND-Net over eight representative methods.
abstract_zh: 最小可觉差异（JND）是指人眼无法感知的最大视觉变化，在多媒体系统中有着广泛的应用。然而，现有的JND方法大多只关注单一模态，很少考虑多模态信息的互补效应。在本文中，我们从端到端同源多模态角度研究 JND 建模，即 hmJND-Net。具体来说，我们探索了三种重要的视觉敏感模式，包括显着性、深度和分割。为了更好地利用同源多模态信息，我们通过求和增强和减法偏移建立了有效的融合方法，并基于自注意力驱动的编码器-解码器范式对齐同源多模态特征。在八个不同基准数据集上的广泛实验结果验证了我们的 hmJND-Net 相对于八种代表性方法的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种端到端的同源多模态方法hmJND-Net，用于预测视觉不可察觉差异（JND），通过融合显著性、深度和分割三种视觉敏感模态信息提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有JND方法多局限于单一模态，未能有效利用多模态信息的互补性，而人类视觉感知本质上是多模态协同作用的结果。
AI.method: 构建包含显著性、深度和分割三类模态的同源特征融合框架，通过求和增强与差值偏移机制结合自注意力驱动的编码器-解码器结构对齐多模态特征。
AI.result: 在八个基准数据集上验证了hmJND-Net优于八个代表性方法，在JND预测任务中取得更优性能表现。
AI.conclusion: 多模态信息融合能有效提升JND建模精度，所提出的hmJND-Net为多媒体系统中的视觉冗余预测提供了新思路。

authors_text: Miaohui Wang,Zhuowei Xu,Mai Xu,Weisi Lin
title: Blind Multimodal Quality Assessment of Low-light Images
title_zh: 低光图像的盲多模态质量评估
abstract: Blind image quality assessment (BIQA) aims at automatically and accurately forecasting objective scores for visual signals, which has been widely used to monitor product and service quality in low-light applications, covering smartphone photography, video surveillance, autonomous driving, etc. Recent developments in this field are dominated by unimodal solutions inconsistent with human subjective rating patterns, where human visual perception is simultaneously reflected by multiple sensory information. In this article, we present a unique blind multimodal quality assessment (BMQA) of low-light images from subjective evaluation to objective score. To investigate the multimodal mechanism, we first establish a multimodal low-light image quality (MLIQ) database with authentic low-light distortions, containing image-text modality pairs. Further, we specially design the key modules of BMQA, considering multimodal quality representation, latent feature alignment and fusion, and hybrid self-supervised and supervised learning. Extensive experiments show that our BMQA yields state-of-the-art accuracy on the proposed MLIQ benchmark database. In particular, we also build an independent single-image modality Dark-4K database, which is used to verify its applicability and generalization performance in mainstream unimodal applications. Qualitative and quantitative results on Dark-4K show that BMQA achieves superior performance to existing BIQA approaches as long as a pre-trained model is provided to generate text description. The proposed framework and two databases as well as the collected BIQA methods and evaluation metrics are made publicly available on here.
summary: Blind image quality assessment (BIQA) aims at automatically and accurately forecasting objective scores for visual signals, which has been widely used to monitor product and service quality in low-light applications, covering smartphone photography, video surveillance, autonomous driving, etc. Recent developments in this field are dominated by unimodal solutions inconsistent with human subjective rating patterns, where human visual perception is simultaneously reflected by multiple sensory information. In this article, we present a unique blind multimodal quality assessment (BMQA) of low-light images from subjective evaluation to objective score. To investigate the multimodal mechanism, we first establish a multimodal low-light image quality (MLIQ) database with authentic low-light distortions, containing image-text modality pairs. Further, we specially design the key modules of BMQA, considering multimodal quality representation, latent feature alignment and fusion, and hybrid self-supervised and supervised learning. Extensive experiments show that our BMQA yields state-of-the-art accuracy on the proposed MLIQ benchmark database. In particular, we also build an independent single-image modality Dark-4K database, which is used to verify its applicability and generalization performance in mainstream unimodal applications. Qualitative and quantitative results on Dark-4K show that BMQA achieves superior performance to existing BIQA approaches as long as a pre-trained model is provided to generate text description. The proposed framework and two databases as well as the collected BIQA methods and evaluation metrics are made publicly available on here.
abstract_zh: 盲图像质量评估（BIQA）旨在自动、准确地预测视觉信号的客观分数，已广泛用于监控弱光应用中的产品和服务质量，涵盖智能手机摄影、视频监控、自动驾驶等。该领域的最新发展以与人类主观评分模式不一致的单峰解决方案为主，其中人类视觉感知由多种感官信息同时反映。在本文中，我们提出了一种独特的低光图像盲多模态质量评估（BMQA），从主观评估到客观评分。为了研究多模态机制，我们首先建立一个多模态低光图像质量（MLIQ）数据库，该数据库具有真实的低光畸变，包含图像-文本模态对。此外，我们专门设计了 BMQA 的关键模块，考虑多模态质量表示、潜在特征对齐和融合以及混合自监督和监督学习。大量实验表明，我们的 BMQA 在所提出的 MLIQ 基准数据库上产生了最先进的准确性。特别是，我们还构建了独立的单图像模态Dark-4K数据库，用于验证其在主流单模态应用中的适用性和泛化性能。 Dark-4K 上的定性和定量结果表明，只要提供预训练模型来生成文本描述，BMQA 就能实现优于现有 BIQA 方法的性能。所提出的框架和两个数据库以及收集的 BIQA 方法和评估指标已在此处公开发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种盲多模态低光图像质量评估框架（BMQA），结合图像与文本模态信息，实现从主观评价到客观评分的自动化质量预测。
AI.motivation: 现有单模态低光图像质量评估方法与人类多感官感知机制不一致，难以准确反映主观评分规律，需通过多模态信息融合提升评估准确性。
AI.method: 构建包含真实低光失真图像-文本对的多模态低光图像质量（MLIQ）数据库，设计多模态质量表征、潜在特征对齐与融合模块，结合自监督与监督学习的混合训练策略，并建立单图像模态Dark-4K数据库验证泛化性。
AI.result: BMQA在MLIQ基准数据集上达到SOTA精度，在Dark-4K数据集上通过预训练模型生成文本描述即可超越现有盲图像质量评估（BIQA）方法，且框架、数据库及评估方法已开源。
AI.conclusion: 多模态融合显著提升低光图像质量评估性能，提出的框架与数据库为后续研究提供重要基准，验证了多模态感知机制在质量评估中的有效性。

Further, we specially design the key modules of BMQA, considering multimodal quality representation, latent feature alignment and fusion, and hybrid self-supervised and supervised learning. Extensive experiments show that our BMQA yields state-of-the-art accuracy on the proposed MLIQ benchmark database. In particular, we also build an independent single-image modality Dark-4K database, which is used to verify its applicability and generalization performance in mainstream unimodal applications. Qualitative and quantitative results on Dark-4K show that BMQA achieves superior performance to existing BIQA approaches as long as a pre-trained model is provided to generate text description. authors_text: Shiyu Tian,Hongxin Wei,Yiqun Wang,Lei Feng
title: CroSel: Cross Selection of Confident Pseudo Labels for Partial-Label Learning
title_zh: CroSel：用于部分标签学习的置信伪标签的交叉选择
abstract: Partial-label learning (PLL) is an important weakly supervised learning problem, which allows each training example to have a candidate label set instead of a single ground-truth label. Identification-based methods have been widely explored to tackle label ambiguity issues in PLL, which regard the true label as a latent variable to be identified. However, identifying the true labels accurately and completely remains challenging, causing noise in pseudo labels during model training. In this paper, we propose a new method called CroSel, which leverages historical predictions from the model to identify true labels for most training examples. First, we introduce a cross selection strategy, which enables two deep models to select true labels of partially labeled data for each other. Besides, we propose a novel consistency regularization term called co-mix to avoid sample waste and tiny noise caused by false selection. In this way, CroSel can pick out the true labels of most examples with high precision. Extensive experiments demonstrate the superiority of CroSel, which consistently outperforms previous state-of-the-art methods on benchmark datasets. Additionally, our method achieves over 90\% accuracy and quantity for selecting true labels on CIFAR-type datasets under various settings.
summary: Partial-label learning (PLL) is an important weakly supervised learning problem, which allows each training example to have a candidate label set instead of a single ground-truth label. Identification-based methods have been widely explored to tackle label ambiguity issues in PLL, which regard the true label as a latent variable to be identified. However, identifying the true labels accurately and completely remains challenging, causing noise in pseudo labels during model training. In this paper, we propose a new method called CroSel, which leverages historical predictions from the model to identify true labels for most training examples. First, we introduce a cross selection strategy, which enables two deep models to select true labels of partially labeled data for each other. Besides, we propose a novel consistency regularization term called co-mix to avoid sample waste and tiny noise caused by false selection. In this way, CroSel can pick out the true labels of most examples with high precision. Extensive experiments demonstrate the superiority of CroSel, which consistently outperforms previous state-of-the-art methods on benchmark datasets. Additionally, our method achieves over 90\% accuracy and quantity for selecting true labels on CIFAR-type datasets under various settings.
abstract_zh: 部分标签学习（PLL）是一个重要的弱监督学习问题，它允许每个训练示例都有一个候选标签集而不是单个真实标签。基于识别的方法已被广泛探索来解决 PLL 中的标签歧义问题，该方法将真实标签视为待识别的潜在变量。然而，准确、完整地识别真实标签仍然具有挑战性，这会在模型训练期间导致伪标签中出现噪声。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为 CroSel 的新方法，它利用模型的历史预测来识别大多数训练示例的真实标签。首先，我们引入交叉选择策略，该策略使两个深度模型能够为彼此选择部分标记数据的真实标签。此外，我们提出了一种新颖的一致性正则化术语，称为“co-mix”，以避免错误选择造成的样本浪费和微小噪音。通过这种方式，CroSel 可以高精度地挑选出大多数示例的真实标签。大量的实验证明了 CroSel 的优越性，它在基准数据集上始终优于以前最先进的方法。此外，我们的方法在各种设置下在 CIFAR 类型数据集上选择真实标签的准确性和数量达到了 90% 以上。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为CroSel的方法，用于解决部分标签学习（PLL）中标签模糊性问题，通过交叉选择策略和一致性正则化项提高伪标签的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于识别的方法在部分标签学习中难以准确且完整地识别真实标签，导致模型训练过程中伪标签噪声较大，影响性能。
AI.method: CroSel方法引入交叉选择策略，利用两个深度模型相互选择部分标签数据的真实标签，并提出一致性正则化项co-mix以减少误选导致的噪声和样本浪费。
AI.result: 实验表明，CroSel在基准数据集上持续优于现有最先进方法，在CIFAR类型数据集上真实标签选择的准确率和数量均超过90%。
AI.conclusion: CroSel通过交叉选择和一致性正则化有效提升了真实标签的识别精度，为部分标签学习提供了高效解决方案。

authors_text: Aris Tsirigotis,George Sarantoglou,Stavros Deligiannidis,Kostas Sozos,Adonis Bogris,Charis Mesaritakis
title: Integrated Photonic Accelerator Based on Optical Spectrum Slicing for Convolutional Neural Networks
title_zh: 基于卷积神经网络光谱切片的集成光子加速器
abstract: In this work we numerically analyze a passive photonic integrated neuromorphic accelerator based on hardware-friendly optical spectrum slicing nodes. The proposed scheme can act as a fully analogue convolutional layer, preprocessing information directly in the optical domain. The proposed scheme allows the extraction of meaningful spatio-temporal features from the incoming data, thus when used prior to a simple fully connected digital single layer network it can boost performance with negligible power consumption. Numerical simulations using the MNIST dataset confirmed the acceleration properties of the proposed scheme, where 10 neuromorphic nodes can replace the convolutional layers of a sophisticated LeNet-5 network, thus reducing the number of total floating point operations per second (FLOPS) by 98% while offering a 97.2% classification accuracy.
summary: In this work we numerically analyze a passive photonic integrated neuromorphic accelerator based on hardware-friendly optical spectrum slicing nodes. The proposed scheme can act as a fully analogue convolutional layer, preprocessing information directly in the optical domain. The proposed scheme allows the extraction of meaningful spatio-temporal features from the incoming data, thus when used prior to a simple fully connected digital single layer network it can boost performance with negligible power consumption. Numerical simulations using the MNIST dataset confirmed the acceleration properties of the proposed scheme, where 10 neuromorphic nodes can replace the convolutional layers of a sophisticated LeNet-5 network, thus reducing the number of total floating point operations per second (FLOPS) by 98% while offering a 97.2% classification accuracy.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们对基于硬件友好的光谱切片节点的无源光子集成神经形态加速器进行了数值分析。所提出的方案可以充当完全模拟的卷积层，直接在光域中预处理信息。所提出的方案允许从输入数据中提取有意义的时空特征，因此当在简单的全连接数字单层网络之前使用时，它可以以可忽略的功耗提高性能。使用 MNIST 数据集的数值模拟证实了所提出方案的加速特性，其中 10 个神经形态节点可以取代复杂的 LeNet-5 网络的卷积层，从而将每秒总浮点运算数 (FLOPS) 减少 98%，同时提供 97.2% 的分类精度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于光学光谱切片的被动光子集成神经形态加速器，用于卷积神经网络。
AI.motivation: 为了提高卷积神经网络的计算效率并降低功耗，需要一种新的硬件友好型加速方法。
AI.method: 该方法利用光学光谱切片节点，在光学域内直接预处理信息，实现全模拟卷积层。
AI.result: 使用MNIST数据集进行的数值模拟表明，10个神经形态节点可以替代LeNet-5网络的卷积层，将FLOPS减少98%，同时保持97.2%的分类准确率。
AI.conclusion: 该方案在保持高分类准确率的同时显著降低了计算复杂度和功耗，适用于未来的光子神经网络加速器设计。

search_text: Integrated Photonic Accelerator Based on Optical Spectrum Slicing for Convolutional Neural Networks 基于卷积神经网络光谱切片的集成光子加速器 In this work we numerically analyze a passive photonic integrated neuromorphic accelerator based on hardware-friendly optical spectrum slicing nodes. The proposed scheme can act as a fully analogue convolutional layer, preprocessing information directly in the optical domain. The proposed scheme allows the extraction of meaningful spatio-temporal features from the incoming data, thus when used prior to a simple fully connected digital single layer network it can boost performance with negligible power consumption. Numerical simulations using the MNIST dataset confirmed the acceleration properties of the proposed scheme, where 10 neuromorphic nodes can replace the convolutional layers of a sophisticated LeNet-5 network, thus reducing the number of total floating point operations per second (FLOPS) by 98% while offering a 97.2% classification accuracy. 在这项工作中，我们对基于硬件友好的光谱切片节点的无源光子集成神经形态加速器进行了数值分析。所提出的方案可以充当完全模拟的卷积层，直接在光域中预处理信息。所提出的方案允许从输入数据中提取有意义的时空特征，因此当在简单的全连接数字单层网络之前使用时，它可以以可忽略的功耗提高性能。使用 MNIST 数据集的数值模拟证实了所提出方案的加速特性，其中 10 个神经形态节点可以取代复杂的 LeNet-5 网络的卷积层，从而将每秒总浮点运算数 (FLOPS) 减少 98%，同时提供 97.2% 的分类精度。 本文提出了一种基于光学光谱切片的被动光子集成神经形态加速器，用于卷积神经网络。 Aris Tsirigotis,George Sarantoglou,Stavros Deligiannidis,Kostas Sozos,Adonis Bogris,Charis Mesaritakis cs.ET,eess.IV,physics.optics

authors_text: Pengfei Wang,Zhaoxiang Zhang,Zhen Lei,Lei Zhang
title: Sharpness-Aware Gradient Matching for Domain Generalization
title_zh: 用于域泛化的锐度感知梯度匹配
abstract: The goal of domain generalization (DG) is to enhance the generalization capability of the model learned from a source domain to other unseen domains. The recently developed Sharpness-Aware Minimization (SAM) method aims to achieve this goal by minimizing the sharpness measure of the loss landscape. Though SAM and its variants have demonstrated impressive DG performance, they may not always converge to the desired flat region with a small loss value. In this paper, we present two conditions to ensure that the model could converge to a flat minimum with a small loss, and present an algorithm, named Sharpness-Aware Gradient Matching (SAGM), to meet the two conditions for improving model generalization capability. Specifically, the optimization objective of SAGM will simultaneously minimize the empirical risk, the perturbed loss (i.e., the maximum loss within a neighborhood in the parameter space), and the gap between them. By implicitly aligning the gradient directions between the empirical risk and the perturbed loss, SAGM improves the generalization capability over SAM and its variants without increasing the computational cost. Extensive experimental results show that our proposed SAGM method consistently outperforms the state-of-the-art methods on five DG benchmarks, including PACS, VLCS, OfficeHome, TerraIncognita, and DomainNet. Codes are available at https://github.com/Wang-pengfei/SAGM.
summary: The goal of domain generalization (DG) is to enhance the generalization capability of the model learned from a source domain to other unseen domains. The recently developed Sharpness-Aware Minimization (SAM) method aims to achieve this goal by minimizing the sharpness measure of the loss landscape. Though SAM and its variants have demonstrated impressive DG performance, they may not always converge to the desired flat region with a small loss value. In this paper, we present two conditions to ensure that the model could converge to a flat minimum with a small loss, and present an algorithm, named Sharpness-Aware Gradient Matching (SAGM), to meet the two conditions for improving model generalization capability. Specifically, the optimization objective of SAGM will simultaneously minimize the empirical risk, the perturbed loss (i.e., the maximum loss within a neighborhood in the parameter space), and the gap between them. By implicitly aligning the gradient directions between the empirical risk and the perturbed loss, SAGM improves the generalization capability over SAM and its variants without increasing the computational cost. Extensive experimental results show that our proposed SAGM method consistently outperforms the state-of-the-art methods on five DG benchmarks, including PACS, VLCS, OfficeHome, TerraIncognita, and DomainNet. Codes are available at https://github.com/Wang-pengfei/SAGM.
abstract_zh: 领域泛化（DG）的目标是增强从源领域学习的模型到其他未见过的领域的泛化能力。最近开发的清晰度感知最小化（SAM）方法旨在通过最小化损失景观的清晰度度量来实现这一目标。尽管 SAM 及其变体已表现出令人印象深刻的 DG 性能，但它们可能并不总是以较小的损耗值收敛到所需的平坦区域。在本文中，我们提出了两个条件来确保模型能够以较小的损失收敛到平坦最小值，并提出了一种称为锐度感知梯度匹配（SAGM）的算法，以满足提高模型泛化能力的两个条件。具体来说，SAGM 的优化目标将同时最小化经验风险、扰动损失（即参数空间邻域内的最大损失）以及它们之间的差距。通过隐式调整经验风险和扰动损失之间的梯度方向，SAGM 在不增加计算成本的情况下提高了 SAM 及其变体的泛化能力。大量实验结果表明，我们提出的 SAGM 方法在五个 DG 基准上始终优于最先进的方法，包括 PACS、VLCS、OfficeHome、TerraIncognita 和 DomainNet。代码可在 https://github.com/Wang-pengfei/SAGM 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Sharpness-Aware Gradient Matching (SAGM)的新算法，用于提升领域泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 尽管Sharpness-Aware Minimization (SAM)方法在领域泛化任务中表现优异，但其可能无法始终收敛到具有小损失值的平坦区域。因此，本文旨在提出一种新的算法，以确保模型能够收敛到这样的平坦最小值。
AI.method: SAGM通过同时最小化经验风险、扰动损失（即参数空间中邻域内的最大损失）以及它们之间的差距，隐式对齐经验风险和扰动损失的梯度方向，从而提高模型的泛化能力。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，SAGM方法在五个领域泛化基准测试（PACS、VLCS、OfficeHome、TerraIncognita和DomainNet）上均优于最先进的方法。
AI.conclusion: SAGM方法在不增加计算成本的情况下有效提升了模型的领域泛化能力，是一种有效的领域泛化算法。

authors_text: Guan-Ting Lin,Qingming Tang,Chieh-Chi Kao,Viktor Rozgic,Chao Wang
title: Weight-sharing Supernet for Searching Specialized Acoustic Event Classification Networks Across Device Constraints
title_zh: 用于跨设备约束搜索专业声学事件分类网络的权重共享超级网
abstract: Acoustic Event Classification (AEC) has been widely used in devices such as smart speakers and mobile phones for home safety or accessibility support. As AEC models run on more and more devices with diverse computation resource constraints, it became increasingly expensive to develop models that are tuned to achieve optimal accuracy/computation trade-off for each given computation resource constraint. In this paper, we introduce a Once-For-All (OFA) Neural Architecture Search (NAS) framework for AEC. Specifically, we first train a weight-sharing supernet that supports different model architectures, followed by automatically searching for a model given specific computational resource constraints. Our experimental results showed that by just training once, the resulting model from NAS significantly outperforms both models trained individually from scratch and knowledge distillation (25.4% and 7.3% relative improvement). We also found that the benefit of weight-sharing supernet training of ultra-small models comes not only from searching but from optimization.
summary: Acoustic Event Classification (AEC) has been widely used in devices such as smart speakers and mobile phones for home safety or accessibility support. As AEC models run on more and more devices with diverse computation resource constraints, it became increasingly expensive to develop models that are tuned to achieve optimal accuracy/computation trade-off for each given computation resource constraint. In this paper, we introduce a Once-For-All (OFA) Neural Architecture Search (NAS) framework for AEC. Specifically, we first train a weight-sharing supernet that supports different model architectures, followed by automatically searching for a model given specific computational resource constraints. Our experimental results showed that by just training once, the resulting model from NAS significantly outperforms both models trained individually from scratch and knowledge distillation (25.4% and 7.3% relative improvement). We also found that the benefit of weight-sharing supernet training of ultra-small models comes not only from searching but from optimization.
abstract_zh: 声学事件分类 (AEC) 已广泛应用于智能扬声器和手机等设备中，以实现家庭安全或辅助功能支持。随着 AEC 模型在越来越多具有不同计算资源限制的设备上运行，开发经过调整以针对每个给定计算资源限制实现最佳精度/计算权衡的模型变得越来越昂贵。在本文中，我们介绍了 AEC 的一次性（OFA）神经架构搜索（NAS）框架。具体来说，我们首先训练一个支持不同模型架构的权重共享超网，然后在给定特定计算资源约束的情况下自动搜索模型。我们的实验结果表明，仅训练一次，NAS 生成的模型就显着优于从头开始单独训练的模型和知识蒸馏的模型（相对提升 25.4% 和 7.3%）。我们还发现，超小模型的权重共享超网训练的好处不仅来自搜索，还来自优化。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于权重共享超网络的神经架构搜索框架，用于在不同计算资源约束下优化声学事件分类模型。
AI.motivation: 随着声学事件分类模型在多种计算资源受限设备上的应用，单独训练或知识蒸馏方法成本高昂且效果有限，需更高效的模型搜索方案。
AI.method: 训练一个支持多种架构的权重共享超网络，随后根据具体计算约束自动搜索最优子网络，结合搜索与优化优势。
AI.result: 单次训练后，NAS方法在准确率/计算量比上分别优于从头训练和知识蒸馏25.4%和7.3%，且超小模型优化效果显著。
AI.conclusion: 权重共享超网络结合自动搜索能高效生成适应不同设备约束的专用声学事件分类模型，优化过程对性能提升至关重要。

ai_content_json.result: 单次训练后，NAS方法在准确率/计算量比上分别优于从头训练和知识蒸馏25.4%和7.3%，且超小模型优化效果显著。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 权重共享超网络结合自动搜索能高效生成适应不同设备约束的专用声学事件分类模型，优化过程对性能提升至关重要。

tldr: 本文提出一种基于权重共享超网络的神经架构搜索框架，用于在不同计算资源约束下优化声学事件分类模型。
motivation: 随着声学事件分类模型在多种计算资源受限设备上的应用，单独训练或知识蒸馏方法成本高昂且效果有限，需更高效的模型搜索方案。
method: 训练一个支持多种架构的权重共享超网络，随后根据具体计算约束自动搜索最优子网络，结合搜索与优化优势。
result: 单次训练后，NAS方法在准确率/计算量比上分别优于从头训练和知识蒸馏25.4%和7.3%，且超小模型优化效果显著。
conclusion: 权重共享超网络结合自动搜索能高效生成适应不同设备约束的专用声学事件分类模型，优化过程对性能提升至关重要。
search_text: Weight-sharing Supernet for Searching Specialized Acoustic Event Classification Networks Across Device Constraints 用于跨设备约束搜索专业声学事件分类网络的权重共享超级网 Acoustic Event Classification (AEC) has been widely used in devices such as smart speakers and mobile phones for home safety or accessibility support. As AEC models run on more and more devices with diverse computation resource constraints, it became increasingly expensive to develop models that are tuned to achieve optimal accuracy/computation trade-off for each given computation resource constraint. In this paper, we introduce a Once-For-All (OFA) Neural Architecture Search (NAS) framework for AEC. Specifically, we first train a weight-sharing supernet that supports different model architectures, followed by automatically searching for a model given specific computational resource constraints. Our experimental results showed that by just training once, the resulting model from NAS significantly outperforms both models trained individually from scratch and knowledge distillation (25.4% and 7.3% relative improvement). We also found that the benefit of weight-sharing supernet training of ultra-small models comes not only from searching but from optimization. 声学事件分类 (AEC) 已广泛应用于智能扬声器和手机等设备中，以实现家庭安全或辅助功能支持。随着 AEC 模型在越来越多具有不同计算资源限制的设备上运行，开发经过调整以针对每个给定计算资源限制实现最佳精度/计算权衡的模型变得越来越昂贵。在本文中，我们介绍了 AEC 的一次性（OFA）神经架构搜索（NAS）框架。具体来说，我们首先训练一个支持不同模型架构的权重共享超网，然后在给定特定计算资源约束的情况下自动搜索模型。我们的实验结果表明，仅训练一次，NAS 生成的模型就显着优于从头开始单独训练的模型和知识蒸馏的模型（相对提升 25.4% 和 7.3%）。我们还发现，超小模型的权重共享超网训练的好处不仅来自搜索，还来自优化。 本文提出一种基于权重共享超网络的神经架构搜索框架，用于在不同计算资源约束下优化声学事件分类模型。 Guan-Ting Lin,Qingming Tang,Chieh-Chi Kao,Viktor Rozgic,Chao Wang cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Ziyang Ye,Haiyang Yu,Bin Li
title: Uncertainty-aware U-Net for Medical Landmark Detection
title_zh: 用于医学地标检测的不确定性感知 U-Net
abstract: Heatmap-based methods play an important role in anatomical landmark detection. However, most current heatmap-based methods assume that the distributions of all landmarks are the same and the distribution of each landmark is isotropic, which may not be in line with reality. For example, the landmark on the jaw is more likely to be located along the edge and less likely to be located inside or outside the jaw. Manually annotating tends to follow similar rules, resulting in an anisotropic distribution for annotated landmarks, which represents the uncertainty in the annotation. To estimate the uncertainty, we propose a module named Pyramid Covariance Predictor to predict the covariance matrices of the target Gaussian distributions, which determine the distributions of landmarks and represent the uncertainty of landmark annotation. Specifically, the Pyramid Covariance Predictor utilizes the pyramid features extracted by the encoder of the backbone U-Net and predicts the Cholesky decomposition of the covariance matrix of the landmark location distribution. Experimental results show that the proposed Pyramid Covariance Predictor can accurately predict the distributions and improve the performance of anatomical landmark detection.
summary: Heatmap-based methods play an important role in anatomical landmark detection. However, most current heatmap-based methods assume that the distributions of all landmarks are the same and the distribution of each landmark is isotropic, which may not be in line with reality. For example, the landmark on the jaw is more likely to be located along the edge and less likely to be located inside or outside the jaw. Manually annotating tends to follow similar rules, resulting in an anisotropic distribution for annotated landmarks, which represents the uncertainty in the annotation. To estimate the uncertainty, we propose a module named Pyramid Covariance Predictor to predict the covariance matrices of the target Gaussian distributions, which determine the distributions of landmarks and represent the uncertainty of landmark annotation. Specifically, the Pyramid Covariance Predictor utilizes the pyramid features extracted by the encoder of the backbone U-Net and predicts the Cholesky decomposition of the covariance matrix of the landmark location distribution. Experimental results show that the proposed Pyramid Covariance Predictor can accurately predict the distributions and improve the performance of anatomical landmark detection.
abstract_zh: 基于热图的方法在解剖标志检测中发挥着重要作用。然而，目前大多数基于热图的方法都假设所有地标的分布相同，并且每个地标的分布是各向同性的，这可能与现实不符。例如，下颌上的界标更有可能位于边缘，而不太可能位于下颌内部或外部。手动注释往往遵循类似的规则，导致注释标志的各向异性分布，这代表注释中的不确定性。为了估计不确定性，我们提出了一个名为金字塔协方差预测器的模块来预测目标高斯分布的协方差矩阵，该矩阵确定地标的分布并表示地标注释的不确定性。具体来说，金字塔协方差预测器利用主干 U-Net 的编码器提取的金字塔特征，并预测地标位置分布的协方差矩阵的 Cholesky 分解。实验结果表明，所提出的金字塔协方差预测器可以准确预测分布并提高解剖标志检测的性能。

AI.tldr: 提出一种考虑标注不确定性的U-Net模型，用于医学图像中的解剖标志点检测。
AI.motivation: 现有热图方法假设所有标志点分布相同且各向同性，但实际标注存在各向异性，需考虑不确定性以提高检测精度。
AI.method: 设计金字塔协方差预测模块，利用U-Net编码器的多尺度特征预测地标位置分布的协方差矩阵Cholesky分解，建模标注不确定性。
AI.result: 实验验证该模块能准确预测地标分布，提升医学图像标志点检测的准确率和鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 通过建模标注不确定性，提出的不确定性感知U-Net有效提升了医学标志点检测的精度和可靠性。

authors_text: Boyan Wan,Yifei Shi,Kai Xu
title: SOCS: Semantically-aware Object Coordinate Space for Category-Level 6D Object Pose Estimation under Large Shape Variations
title_zh: SOCS：大形状变化下类别级 6D 物体姿态估计的语义感知物体坐标空间
abstract: Most learning-based approaches to category-level 6D pose estimation are design around normalized object coordinate space (NOCS). While being successful, NOCS-based methods become inaccurate and less robust when handling objects of a category containing significant intra-category shape variations. This is because the object coordinates induced by global and rigid alignment of objects are semantically incoherent, making the coordinate regression hard to learn and generalize. We propose Semantically-aware Object Coordinate Space (SOCS) built by warping-and-aligning the objects guided by a sparse set of keypoints with semantically meaningful correspondence. SOCS is semantically coherent: Any point on the surface of a object can be mapped to a semantically meaningful location in SOCS, allowing for accurate pose and size estimation under large shape variations. To learn effective coordinate regression to SOCS, we propose a novel multi-scale coordinate-based attention network. Evaluations demonstrate that our method is easy to train, well-generalizing for large intra-category shape variations and robust to inter-object occlusions.
summary: Most learning-based approaches to category-level 6D pose estimation are design around normalized object coordinate space (NOCS). While being successful, NOCS-based methods become inaccurate and less robust when handling objects of a category containing significant intra-category shape variations. This is because the object coordinates induced by global and rigid alignment of objects are semantically incoherent, making the coordinate regression hard to learn and generalize. We propose Semantically-aware Object Coordinate Space (SOCS) built by warping-and-aligning the objects guided by a sparse set of keypoints with semantically meaningful correspondence. SOCS is semantically coherent: Any point on the surface of a object can be mapped to a semantically meaningful location in SOCS, allowing for accurate pose and size estimation under large shape variations. To learn effective coordinate regression to SOCS, we propose a novel multi-scale coordinate-based attention network. Evaluations demonstrate that our method is easy to train, well-generalizing for large intra-category shape variations and robust to inter-object occlusions.
abstract_zh: 大多数基于学习的类别级 6D 姿态估计方法都是围绕归一化对象坐标空间 (NOCS) 设计的。虽然基于 NOCS 的方法取得了成功，但在处理包含显着类别内形状变化的类别对象时，它会变得不准确且鲁棒性较差。这是因为由对象的全局和刚性对齐引起的对象坐标在语义上是不连贯的，使得坐标回归难以学习和泛化。我们提出了语义感知对象坐标空间（SOCS），通过对具有语义意义对应的稀疏关键点集引导的对象进行扭曲和对齐来构建。 SOCS 在语义上是一致的：物体表面上的任何点都可以映射到 SOCS 中语义上有意义的位置，从而可以在较大的形状变化下进行准确的姿态和尺寸估计。为了学习 SOCS 的有效坐标回归，我们提出了一种新颖的基于多尺度坐标的注意力网络。评估表明，我们的方法易于训练，对于较大的类别内形状变化具有良好的泛化性，并且对于对象间遮挡具有鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种语义感知的物体坐标空间（SOCS），用于解决类别级6D物体姿态估计中大形状变化带来的挑战。
AI.motivation: 基于归一化物体坐标空间（NOCS）的方法在处理具有显著类内形状变化的物体时精度下降，因其全局刚性对齐导致语义不一致。
AI.method: 通过稀疏语义关键点引导的变形对齐生成SOCS，并设计多尺度坐标注意力网络实现坐标回归。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法训练简单，对大形状变化和物体间遮挡具有良好的泛化性和鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: SOCS通过语义一致性映射有效解决了类别级姿态估计中的形状变化问题，为复杂场景提供了新思路。

search_text: SOCS: Semantically-aware Object Coordinate Space for Category-Level 6D Object Pose Estimation under Large Shape Variations SOCS：大形状变化下类别级 6D 物体姿态估计的语义感知物体坐标空间 Most learning-based approaches to category-level 6D pose estimation are design around normalized object coordinate space (NOCS). While being successful, NOCS-based methods become inaccurate and less robust when handling objects of a category containing significant intra-category shape variations. This is because the object coordinates induced by global and rigid alignment of objects are semantically incoherent, making the coordinate regression hard to learn and generalize. We propose Semantically-aware Object Coordinate Space (SOCS) built by warping-and-aligning the objects guided by a sparse set of keypoints with semantically meaningful correspondence. SOCS is semantically coherent: Any point on the surface of a object can be mapped to a semantically meaningful location in SOCS, allowing for accurate pose and size estimation under large shape variations. To learn effective coordinate regression to SOCS, we propose a novel multi-scale coordinate-based attention network. Evaluations demonstrate that our method is easy to train, well-generalizing for large intra-category shape variations and robust to inter-object occlusions. 大多数基于学习的类别级 6D 姿态估计方法都是围绕归一化对象坐标空间 (NOCS) 设计的。虽然基于 NOCS 的方法取得了成功，但在处理包含显着类别内形状变化的类别对象时，它会变得不准确且鲁棒性较差。这是因为由对象的全局和刚性对齐引起的对象坐标在语义上是不连贯的，使得坐标回归难以学习和泛化。我们提出了语义感知对象坐标空间（SOCS），通过对具有语义意义对应的稀疏关键点集引导的对象进行扭曲和对齐来构建。 SOCS 在语义上是一致的：物体表面上的任何点都可以映射到 SOCS 中语义上有意义的位置，从而可以在较大的形状变化下进行准确的姿态和尺寸估计。为了学习 SOCS 的有效坐标回归，我们提出了一种新颖的基于多尺度坐标的注意力网络。评估表明，我们的方法易于训练，对于较大的类别内形状变化具有良好的泛化性，并且对于对象间遮挡具有鲁棒性。 本文提出了一种语义感知的物体坐标空间（SOCS），用于解决类别级6D物体姿态估计中大形状变化带来的挑战。 Boyan Wan,Yifei Shi,Kai Xu cs.CV

authors_text: Jiayang Bai,Zhen He,Shan Yang,Jie Guo,Zhenyu Chen,Yan Zhang,Yanwen Guo
title: Local-to-Global Panorama Inpainting for Locale-Aware Indoor Lighting Prediction
title_zh: 用于区域感知室内照明预测的局部到全局全景修复
abstract: Predicting panoramic indoor lighting from a single perspective image is a fundamental but highly ill-posed problem in computer vision and graphics. To achieve locale-aware and robust prediction, this problem can be decomposed into three sub-tasks: depth-based image warping, panorama inpainting and high-dynamic-range (HDR) reconstruction, among which the success of panorama inpainting plays a key role. Recent methods mostly rely on convolutional neural networks (CNNs) to fill the missing contents in the warped panorama. However, they usually achieve suboptimal performance since the missing contents occupy a very large portion in the panoramic space while CNNs are plagued by limited receptive fields. The spatially-varying distortion in the spherical signals further increases the difficulty for conventional CNNs. To address these issues, we propose a local-to-global strategy for large-scale panorama inpainting. In our method, a depth-guided local inpainting is first applied on the warped panorama to fill small but dense holes. Then, a transformer-based network, dubbed PanoTransformer, is designed to hallucinate reasonable global structures in the large holes. To avoid distortion, we further employ cubemap projection in our design of PanoTransformer. The high-quality panorama recovered at any locale helps us to capture spatially-varying indoor illumination with physically-plausible global structures and fine details.
summary: Predicting panoramic indoor lighting from a single perspective image is a fundamental but highly ill-posed problem in computer vision and graphics. To achieve locale-aware and robust prediction, this problem can be decomposed into three sub-tasks: depth-based image warping, panorama inpainting and high-dynamic-range (HDR) reconstruction, among which the success of panorama inpainting plays a key role. Recent methods mostly rely on convolutional neural networks (CNNs) to fill the missing contents in the warped panorama. However, they usually achieve suboptimal performance since the missing contents occupy a very large portion in the panoramic space while CNNs are plagued by limited receptive fields. The spatially-varying distortion in the spherical signals further increases the difficulty for conventional CNNs. To address these issues, we propose a local-to-global strategy for large-scale panorama inpainting. In our method, a depth-guided local inpainting is first applied on the warped panorama to fill small but dense holes. Then, a transformer-based network, dubbed PanoTransformer, is designed to hallucinate reasonable global structures in the large holes. To avoid distortion, we further employ cubemap projection in our design of PanoTransformer. The high-quality panorama recovered at any locale helps us to capture spatially-varying indoor illumination with physically-plausible global structures and fine details.
abstract_zh: 从单视角图像预测全景室内照明是计算机视觉和图形学中的一个基本但非常不适定的问题。为了实现区域感知和鲁棒预测，这个问题可以分解为三个子任务：基于深度的图像变形、全景修复和高动态范围（HDR）重建，其中全景修复的成功起着关键作用。最近的方法主要依靠卷积神经网络（CNN）来填充扭曲全景图中缺失的内容。然而，由于缺失的内容在全景空间中占据了很大一部分，而 CNN 却受到有限的感受野的困扰，因此它们通常无法达到最佳性能。球形信号中空间变化的失真进一步增加了传统 CNN 的难度。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种从局部到全局的大规模全景修复策略。在我们的方法中，首先在扭曲的全景图上应用深度引导的局部修复，以填充小但密集的孔。然后，设计了一个名为 PanoTransformer 的基于变压器的网络，以在大洞中产生合理的全局结构。为了避免失真，我们在 PanoTransformer 的设计中进一步采用了立方体贴图投影。在任何地点恢复的高质量全景图有助于我们捕捉空间变化的室内照明以及物理上合理的全局结构和精细细节。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于室内照明预测的全景修复方法，旨在从单视角图像中预测全景室内照明。
AI.motivation: 预测全景室内照明是一个基础但高度不适定的问题。现有方法依赖卷积神经网络进行全景修复，但因卷积神经网络的感受野有限，难以处理全景图像中大范围的缺失内容，从而导致性能不佳。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种局部到全局的全景修复策略。首先利用深度引导的局部修复填充小而密集的缺失区域，然后设计一个基于Transformer的网络PanoTransformer，用于生成大缺失区域的合理全局结构，并采用立方体贴图投影以避免失真。
AI.result: 该方法能够高质量地恢复全景图像，从而捕捉到具有物理合理全局结构和精细细节的空间变化室内照明。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了传统CNN在处理全景图像缺失内容时的不足，为室内照明预测提供了更准确和鲁棒的解决方案。

search_text: Local-to-Global Panorama Inpainting for Locale-Aware Indoor Lighting Prediction 用于区域感知室内照明预测的局部到全局全景修复 Predicting panoramic indoor lighting from a single perspective image is a fundamental but highly ill-posed problem in computer vision and graphics. To achieve locale-aware and robust prediction, this problem can be decomposed into three sub-tasks: depth-based image warping, panorama inpainting and high-dynamic-range (HDR) reconstruction, among which the success of panorama inpainting plays a key role. Recent methods mostly rely on convolutional neural networks (CNNs) to fill the missing contents in the warped panorama. However, they usually achieve suboptimal performance since the missing contents occupy a very large portion in the panoramic space while CNNs are plagued by limited receptive fields. The spatially-varying distortion in the spherical signals further increases the difficulty for conventional CNNs. To address these issues, we propose a local-to-global strategy for large-scale panorama inpainting. In our method, a depth-guided local inpainting is first applied on the warped panorama to fill small but dense holes. Then, a transformer-based network, dubbed PanoTransformer, is designed to hallucinate reasonable global structures in the large holes. To avoid distortion, we further employ cubemap projection in our design of PanoTransformer. The high-quality panorama recovered at any locale helps us to capture spatially-varying indoor illumination with physically-plausible global structures and fine details. 从单视角图像预测全景室内照明是计算机视觉和图形学中的一个基本但非常不适定的问题。为了实现区域感知和鲁棒预测，这个问题可以分解为三个子任务：基于深度的图像变形、全景修复和高动态范围（HDR）重建，其中全景修复的成功起着关键作用。最近的方法主要依靠卷积神经网络（CNN）来填充扭曲全景图中缺失的内容。然而，由于缺失的内容在全景空间中占据了很大一部分，而 CNN 却受到有限的感受野的困扰，因此它们通常无法达到最佳性能。球形信号中空间变化的失真进一步增加了传统 CNN 的难度。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种从局部到全局的大规模全景修复策略。在我们的方法中，首先在扭曲的全景图上应用深度引导的局部修复，以填充小但密集的孔。然后，设计了一个名为 PanoTransformer 的基于变压器的网络，以在大洞中产生合理的全局结构。为了避免失真，我们在 PanoTransformer 的设计中进一步采用了立方体贴图投影。在任何地点恢复的高质量全景图有助于我们捕捉空间变化的室内照明以及物理上合理的全局结构和精细细节。 本文提出了一种用于室内照明预测的全景修复方法，旨在从单视角图像中预测全景室内照明。 Jiayang Bai,Zhen He,Shan Yang,Jie Guo,Zhenyu Chen,Yan Zhang,Yanwen Guo cs.CV

authors_text: Thanh Vu,Baochen Sun,Bodi Yuan,Alex Ngai,Yueqi Li,Jan-Michael Frahm
title: Supervision Interpolation via LossMix: Generalizing Mixup for Object Detection and Beyond
title_zh: 通过 LossMix 进行监督插值：泛化目标检测及其他领域的混合
comment: AAAI-24 Camera Ready Version, with supplementary material, 15 pages
comments: AAAI-24 Camera Ready Version, with supplementary material, 15 pages
abstract: The success of data mixing augmentations in image classification tasks has been well-received. However, these techniques cannot be readily applied to object detection due to challenges such as spatial misalignment, foreground/background distinction, and plurality of instances. To tackle these issues, we first introduce a novel conceptual framework called Supervision Interpolation (SI), which offers a fresh perspective on interpolation-based augmentations by relaxing and generalizing Mixup. Based on SI, we propose LossMix, a simple yet versatile and effective regularization that enhances the performance and robustness of object detectors and more. Our key insight is that we can effectively regularize the training on mixed data by interpolating their loss errors instead of ground truth labels. Empirical results on the PASCAL VOC and MS COCO datasets demonstrate that LossMix can consistently outperform state-of-the-art methods widely adopted for detection. Furthermore, by jointly leveraging LossMix with unsupervised domain adaptation, we successfully improve existing approaches and set a new state of the art for cross-domain object detection.
summary: The success of data mixing augmentations in image classification tasks has been well-received. However, these techniques cannot be readily applied to object detection due to challenges such as spatial misalignment, foreground/background distinction, and plurality of instances. To tackle these issues, we first introduce a novel conceptual framework called Supervision Interpolation (SI), which offers a fresh perspective on interpolation-based augmentations by relaxing and generalizing Mixup. Based on SI, we propose LossMix, a simple yet versatile and effective regularization that enhances the performance and robustness of object detectors and more. Our key insight is that we can effectively regularize the training on mixed data by interpolating their loss errors instead of ground truth labels. Empirical results on the PASCAL VOC and MS COCO datasets demonstrate that LossMix can consistently outperform state-of-the-art methods widely adopted for detection. Furthermore, by jointly leveraging LossMix with unsupervised domain adaptation, we successfully improve existing approaches and set a new state of the art for cross-domain object detection.
abstract_zh: 数据混合增强在图像分类任务中的成功广受好评。然而，由于空间错位、前景/背景区分和多个实例等挑战，这些技术不能轻易应用于对象检测。为了解决这些问题，我们首先引入一种称为监督插值（SI）的新颖概念框架，它通过放松和概括 Mixup 为基于插值的增强提供了新的视角。基于 SI，我们提出了 LossMix，这是一种简单但通用且有效的正则化，可以增强目标检测器等的性能和鲁棒性。我们的主要见解是，我们可以通过插入混合数据的损失误差而不是真实标签来有效地规范混合数据的训练。 PASCAL VOC 和 MS COCO 数据集的实证结果表明，LossMix 始终优于广泛采用的最先进的检测方法。此外，通过联合利用 LossMix 和无监督域适应，我们成功改进了现有方法，并为跨域对象检测设定了新的技术水平。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为LossMix的新数据增强方法，通过损失插值解决目标检测中的数据混合挑战，并提升检测性能。
AI.motivation: 传统数据混合方法（如Mixup）在图像分类中效果显著，但难以直接应用于目标检测任务，因为空间对齐、前景背景区分及多实例等问题导致效果受限。
AI.method: 提出监督插值（SI）框架，通过插值混合样本的损失误差而非真实标签，设计LossMix正则化方法，增强检测模型的鲁棒性和泛化能力。
AI.result: 在PASCAL VOC和MS COCO数据集上，LossMix优于现有先进方法；结合无监督领域自适应后，跨域目标检测性能达到新状态。
AI.conclusion: LossMix有效解决了目标检测中的数据混合难题，其损失插值策略具有广泛适用性，并为跨域检测提供了新思路。

search_text: Supervision Interpolation via LossMix: Generalizing Mixup for Object Detection and Beyond 通过 LossMix 进行监督插值：泛化目标检测及其他领域的混合 The success of data mixing augmentations in image classification tasks has been well-received. However, these techniques cannot be readily applied to object detection due to challenges such as spatial misalignment, foreground/background distinction, and plurality of instances. To tackle these issues, we first introduce a novel conceptual framework called Supervision Interpolation (SI), which offers a fresh perspective on interpolation-based augmentations by relaxing and generalizing Mixup. Based on SI, we propose LossMix, a simple yet versatile and effective regularization that enhances the performance and robustness of object detectors and more. Our key insight is that we can effectively regularize the training on mixed data by interpolating their loss errors instead of ground truth labels.
