Furthermore, by jointly leveraging LossMix with unsupervised domain adaptation, we successfully improve existing approaches and set a new state of the art for cross-domain object detection. 数据混合增强在图像分类任务中的成功广受好评。然而，由于空间错位、前景/背景区分和多个实例等挑战，这些技术不能轻易应用于对象检测。为了解决这些问题，我们首先引入一种称为监督插值（SI）的新颖概念框架，它通过放松和概括 Mixup 为基于插值的增强提供了新的视角。基于 SI，我们提出了 LossMix，这是一种简单但通用且有效的正则化，可以增强目标检测器等的性能和鲁棒性。我们的主要见解是，我们可以通过插入混合数据的损失误差而不是真实标签来有效地规范混合数据的训练。 PASCAL VOC 和 MS COCO 数据集的实证结果表明，LossMix 始终优于广泛采用的最先进的检测方法。此外，通过联合利用 LossMix 和无监督域适应，我们成功改进了现有方法，并为跨域对象检测设定了新的技术水平。 本文提出一种名为LossMix的新数据增强方法，通过损失插值解决目标检测中的数据混合挑战，并提升检测性能。 Thanh Vu,Baochen Sun,Bodi Yuan,Alex Ngai,Yueqi Li,Jan-Michael Frahm cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Yinsheng He,Xingyu Li
title: Whole-slide-imaging Cancer Metastases Detection and Localization with Limited Tumorous Data
title_zh: 利用有限的肿瘤数据进行全玻片成像癌症转移检测和定位
abstract: Recently, various deep learning methods have shown significant successes in medical image analysis, especially in the detection of cancer metastases in hematoxylin and eosin (H&E) stained whole-slide images (WSIs). However, in order to obtain good performance, these research achievements rely on hundreds of well-annotated WSIs. In this study, we tackle the tumor localization and detection problem under the setting of few labeled whole slide images and introduce a patch-based analysis pipeline based on the latest reverse knowledge distillation architecture. To address the extremely unbalanced normal and tumorous samples in training sample collection, we applied the focal loss formula to the representation similarity metric for model optimization. Compared with prior arts, our method achieves similar performance by less than ten percent of training samples on the public Camelyon16 dataset. In addition, this is the first work that show the great potential of the knowledge distillation models in computational histopathology.
summary: Recently, various deep learning methods have shown significant successes in medical image analysis, especially in the detection of cancer metastases in hematoxylin and eosin (H&E) stained whole-slide images (WSIs). However, in order to obtain good performance, these research achievements rely on hundreds of well-annotated WSIs. In this study, we tackle the tumor localization and detection problem under the setting of few labeled whole slide images and introduce a patch-based analysis pipeline based on the latest reverse knowledge distillation architecture. To address the extremely unbalanced normal and tumorous samples in training sample collection, we applied the focal loss formula to the representation similarity metric for model optimization. Compared with prior arts, our method achieves similar performance by less than ten percent of training samples on the public Camelyon16 dataset. In addition, this is the first work that show the great potential of the knowledge distillation models in computational histopathology.
abstract_zh: 最近，各种深度学习方法在医学图像分析方面取得了显着的成功，特别是在苏木精和伊红（H＆E）染色的全幻灯片图像（WSI）中检测癌症转移方面。然而，为了获得良好的性能，这些研究成果依赖于数百个注释良好的 WSI。在本研究中，我们解决了在少量标记的整个幻灯片图像的情况下的肿瘤定位和检测问题，并引入了基于最新逆向知识蒸馏架构的基于补丁的分析流程。为了解决训练样本集合中正常样本和肿瘤样本极度不平衡的问题，我们将焦点损失公式应用于表示相似度度量中以进行模型优化。与现有技术相比，我们的方法在公共 Camelyon16 数据集上仅用不到 10% 的训练样本即可实现相似的性能。此外，这是第一个展示知识蒸馏模型在计算组织病理学中巨大潜力的工作。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于少量标注数据的全切片图像癌症转移检测与定位方法。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法依赖大量标注数据，而实际场景中肿瘤标注数据稀缺且样本不平衡。
AI.method: 采用基于反向知识蒸馏架构的补丁分析流程，并结合焦点损失函数优化模型。
AI.result: 在Camelyon16数据集上，使用不足10%训练样本即可达到与现有方法相当的性能。
AI.conclusion: 知识蒸馏模型在计算病理学中展现出巨大应用潜力。

search_text: Whole-slide-imaging Cancer Metastases Detection and Localization with Limited Tumorous Data 利用有限的肿瘤数据进行全玻片成像癌症转移检测和定位 Recently, various deep learning methods have shown significant successes in medical image analysis, especially in the detection of cancer metastases in hematoxylin and eosin (H&E) stained whole-slide images (WSIs). However, in order to obtain good performance, these research achievements rely on hundreds of well-annotated WSIs. In this study, we tackle the tumor localization and detection problem under the setting of few labeled whole slide images and introduce a patch-based analysis pipeline based on the latest reverse knowledge distillation architecture. To address the extremely unbalanced normal and tumorous samples in training sample collection, we applied the focal loss formula to the representation similarity metric for model optimization. Compared with prior arts, our method achieves similar performance by less than ten percent of training samples on the public Camelyon16 dataset. In addition, this is the first work that show the great potential of the knowledge distillation models in computational histopathology. 最近，各种深度学习方法在医学图像分析方面取得了显着的成功，特别是在苏木精和伊红（H＆E）染色的全幻灯片图像（WSI）中检测癌症转移方面。然而，为了获得良好的性能，这些研究成果依赖于数百个注释良好的 WSI。在本研究中，我们解决了在少量标记的整个幻灯片图像的情况下的肿瘤定位和检测问题，并引入了基于最新逆向知识蒸馏架构的基于补丁的分析流程。为了解决训练样本集合中正常样本和肿瘤样本极度不平衡的问题，我们将焦点损失公式应用于表示相似度度量中以进行模型优化。与现有技术相比，我们的方法在公共 Camelyon16 数据集上仅用不到 10% 的训练样本即可实现相似的性能。此外，这是第一个展示知识蒸馏模型在计算组织病理学中巨大潜力的工作。 本文提出一种基于少量标注数据的全切片图像癌症转移检测与定位方法。 Yinsheng He,Xingyu Li eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Wenwen Tong,Jiangwei Xie,Tianyu Li,Hanming Deng,Xiangwei Geng,Ruoyi Zhou,Dingchen Yang,Bo Dai,Lewei Lu,Hongyang Li
title: 3D Data Augmentation for Driving Scenes on Camera
title_zh: 摄像头驾驶场景的 3D 数据增强
abstract: Driving scenes are extremely diverse and complicated that it is impossible to collect all cases with human effort alone. While data augmentation is an effective technique to enrich the training data, existing methods for camera data in autonomous driving applications are confined to the 2D image plane, which may not optimally increase data diversity in 3D real-world scenarios. To this end, we propose a 3D data augmentation approach termed Drive-3DAug, aiming at augmenting the driving scenes on camera in the 3D space. We first utilize Neural Radiance Field (NeRF) to reconstruct the 3D models of background and foreground objects. Then, augmented driving scenes can be obtained by placing the 3D objects with adapted location and orientation at the pre-defined valid region of backgrounds. As such, the training database could be effectively scaled up. However, the 3D object modeling is constrained to the image quality and the limited viewpoints. To overcome these problems, we modify the original NeRF by introducing a geometric rectified loss and a symmetric-aware training strategy. We evaluate our method for the camera-only monocular 3D detection task on the Waymo and nuScences datasets. The proposed data augmentation approach contributes to a gain of 1.7% and 1.4% in terms of detection accuracy, on Waymo and nuScences respectively. Furthermore, the constructed 3D models serve as digital driving assets and could be recycled for different detectors or other 3D perception tasks.
summary: Driving scenes are extremely diverse and complicated that it is impossible to collect all cases with human effort alone. While data augmentation is an effective technique to enrich the training data, existing methods for camera data in autonomous driving applications are confined to the 2D image plane, which may not optimally increase data diversity in 3D real-world scenarios. To this end, we propose a 3D data augmentation approach termed Drive-3DAug, aiming at augmenting the driving scenes on camera in the 3D space. We first utilize Neural Radiance Field (NeRF) to reconstruct the 3D models of background and foreground objects. Then, augmented driving scenes can be obtained by placing the 3D objects with adapted location and orientation at the pre-defined valid region of backgrounds. As such, the training database could be effectively scaled up. However, the 3D object modeling is constrained to the image quality and the limited viewpoints. To overcome these problems, we modify the original NeRF by introducing a geometric rectified loss and a symmetric-aware training strategy. We evaluate our method for the camera-only monocular 3D detection task on the Waymo and nuScences datasets. The proposed data augmentation approach contributes to a gain of 1.7% and 1.4% in terms of detection accuracy, on Waymo and nuScences respectively. Furthermore, the constructed 3D models serve as digital driving assets and could be recycled for different detectors or other 3D perception tasks.
abstract_zh: 驾驶场景极其多样且复杂，仅靠人力不可能收集所有案例。虽然数据增强是丰富训练数据的有效技术，但自动驾驶应用中相机数据的现有方法仅限于 2D 图像平面，这可能无法最佳地增加 3D 现实场景中的数据多样性。为此，我们提出了一种名为 Drive-3DAug 的 3D 数据增强方法，旨在增强 3D 空间中摄像机上的驾驶场景。我们首先利用神经辐射场 (NeRF) 重建背景和前景物体的 3D 模型。然后，通过将具有适当位置和方向的 3D 对象放置在预定义的有效背景区域中，可以获得增强的驾驶场景。这样，可以有效地扩大培训数据库的规模。然而，3D 对象建模受到图像质量和有限视点的限制。为了克服这些问题，我们通过引入几何校正损失和对称感知训练策略来修改原始 NeRF。我们在 Waymo 和 nuScences 数据集上评估了我们的仅相机单目 3D 检测任务的方法。所提出的数据增强方法使 Waymo 和 nuScences 的检测精度分别提高了 1.7% 和 1.4%。此外，构建的 3D 模型可作为数字驾驶资产，并可回收用于不同的探测器或其他 3D 感知任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Drive-3DAug的3D数据增强方法，通过神经辐射场（NeRF）重建驾驶场景的3D模型，并在预定义区域放置调整后的3D对象以扩充训练数据。
AI.motivation: 现有相机数据增强方法局限于2D图像平面，难以有效提升3D真实场景的数据多样性，而驾驶场景的复杂性需要更丰富的3D数据支持。
AI.method: 利用NeRF重建背景和前景物体的3D模型，通过在预定义区域放置调整位置和朝向的3D物体生成增强场景；改进NeRF的几何校正损失和对称感知训练策略以解决建模限制。
AI.result: 在Waymo和nuScenes数据集上，相机单目3D检测任务的准确率分别提升1.7%和1.4%；构建的3D模型可作为数字驾驶资产复用。
AI.conclusion: Drive-3DAug通过3D空间增强有效提升了驾驶场景数据多样性，同时生成的3D模型具有跨任务复用价值，为自动驾驶感知任务提供了新思路。

authors_text: Saptarshi Purkayastha,Rohan Isaac,Sharon Anthony,Shikhar Shukla,Elizabeth A. Krupinski,Joshua A. Danish,Judy W. Gichoya
title: A general-purpose AI assistant embedded in an open-source radiology information system
title_zh: 嵌入开源放射信息系统的通用人工智能助手
comment: Full research paper version of the demo paper accepted at the AIME 2023 - 21st International Conference of Artificial Intelligence in Medicine
comments: Full research paper version of the demo paper accepted at the AIME 2023 - 21st International Conference of Artificial Intelligence in Medicine
abstract: Radiology AI models have made significant progress in near-human performance or surpassing it. However, AI model's partnership with human radiologist remains an unexplored challenge due to the lack of health information standards, contextual and workflow differences, and data labeling variations. To overcome these challenges, we integrated an AI model service that uses DICOM standard SR annotations into the OHIF viewer in the open-source LibreHealth Radiology Information Systems (RIS). In this paper, we describe the novel Human-AI partnership capabilities of the platform, including few-shot learning and swarm learning approaches to retrain the AI models continuously. Building on the concept of machine teaching, we developed an active learning strategy within the RIS, so that the human radiologist can enable/disable AI annotations as well as "fix"/relabel the AI annotations. These annotations are then used to retrain the models. This helps establish a partnership between the radiologist user and a user-specific AI model. The weights of these user-specific models are then finally shared between multiple models in a swarm learning approach.
summary: Radiology AI models have made significant progress in near-human performance or surpassing it. However, AI model's partnership with human radiologist remains an unexplored challenge due to the lack of health information standards, contextual and workflow differences, and data labeling variations. To overcome these challenges, we integrated an AI model service that uses DICOM standard SR annotations into the OHIF viewer in the open-source LibreHealth Radiology Information Systems (RIS). In this paper, we describe the novel Human-AI partnership capabilities of the platform, including few-shot learning and swarm learning approaches to retrain the AI models continuously. Building on the concept of machine teaching, we developed an active learning strategy within the RIS, so that the human radiologist can enable/disable AI annotations as well as "fix"/relabel the AI annotations. These annotations are then used to retrain the models. This helps establish a partnership between the radiologist user and a user-specific AI model. The weights of these user-specific models are then finally shared between multiple models in a swarm learning approach.
abstract_zh: 放射学人工智能模型在接近人类或超越人类的性能方面取得了重大进展。然而，由于缺乏健康信息标准、上下文和工作流程差异以及数据标签变化，人工智能模型与人类放射科医生的合作仍然是一个尚未探索的挑战。为了克服这些挑战，我们将使用 DICOM 标准 SR 注释的 AI 模型服务集成到开源 LibreHealth 放射信息系统 (RIS) 的 OHIF 查看器中。在本文中，我们描述了该平台新颖的人机合作能力，包括用于持续重新训练人工智能模型的小样本学习和群体学习方法。基于机器教学的概念，我们在 RIS 内开发了一种主动学习策略，以便人类放射科医生可以启用/禁用 AI 注释以及“修复”/重新标记 AI 注释。然后使用这些注释来重新训练模型。这有助于在放射科医生用户和特定于用户的人工智能模型之间建立合作伙伴关系。这些特定于用户的模型的权重最终在群体学习方法中的多个模型之间共享。

AI.tldr: 本文提出将基于DICOM标准的AI模型嵌入开源放射科信息系统（RIS），通过协作学习方法增强放射科医生与AI的协同工作能力。
AI.motivation: 现有放射学AI模型与人类放射科医生的协作面临医疗信息标准缺失、工作流程差异及数据标注不一致等挑战，亟需建立有效的AI-人类协作框架。
AI.method: 集成DICOM SR标注的AI服务至OHIF查看器，结合主动学习策略、少样本学习和群体学习方法，允许放射科医生动态调整AI标注并用于模型迭代优化。
AI.result: 实现了支持用户定制的AI模型训练与权重共享的平台，通过群体学习提升模型泛化能力，促进AI与放射科医生的实时协作。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过标准化接口和协作学习机制，为放射学领域AI与人类专家的深度融合提供了可扩展的解决方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出将基于DICOM标准的AI模型嵌入开源放射科信息系统（RIS），通过协作学习方法增强放射科医生与AI的协同工作能力。
ai_content.motivation: 现有放射学AI模型与人类放射科医生的协作面临医疗信息标准缺失、工作流程差异及数据标注不一致等挑战，亟需建立有效的AI-人类协作框架。
ai_content.method: 集成DICOM SR标注的AI服务至OHIF查看器，结合主动学习策略、少样本学习和群体学习方法，允许放射科医生动态调整AI标注并用于模型迭代优化。

search_text: A general-purpose AI assistant embedded in an open-source radiology information system 嵌入开源放射信息系统的通用人工智能助手 Radiology AI models have made significant progress in near-human performance or surpassing it. However, AI model's partnership with human radiologist remains an unexplored challenge due to the lack of health information standards, contextual and workflow differences, and data labeling variations. To overcome these challenges, we integrated an AI model service that uses DICOM standard SR annotations into the OHIF viewer in the open-source LibreHealth Radiology Information Systems (RIS). In this paper, we describe the novel Human-AI partnership capabilities of the platform, including few-shot learning and swarm learning approaches to retrain the AI models continuously. Building on the concept of machine teaching, we developed an active learning strategy within the RIS, so that the human radiologist can enable/disable AI annotations as well as "fix"/relabel the AI annotations. These annotations are then used to retrain the models. This helps establish a partnership between the radiologist user and a user-specific AI model. The weights of these user-specific models are then finally shared between multiple models in a swarm learning approach. 放射学人工智能模型在接近人类或超越人类的性能方面取得了重大进展。然而，由于缺乏健康信息标准、上下文和工作流程差异以及数据标签变化，人工智能模型与人类放射科医生的合作仍然是一个尚未探索的挑战。为了克服这些挑战，我们将使用 DICOM 标准 SR 注释的 AI 模型服务集成到开源 LibreHealth 放射信息系统 (RIS) 的 OHIF 查看器中。在本文中，我们描述了该平台新颖的人机合作能力，包括用于持续重新训练人工智能模型的小样本学习和群体学习方法。基于机器教学的概念，我们在 RIS 内开发了一种主动学习策略，以便人类放射科医生可以启用/禁用 AI 注释以及“修复”/重新标记 AI 注释。然后使用这些注释来重新训练模型。这有助于在放射科医生用户和特定于用户的人工智能模型之间建立合作伙伴关系。这些特定于用户的模型的权重最终在群体学习方法中的多个模型之间共享。 本文提出将基于DICOM标准的AI模型嵌入开源放射科信息系统（RIS），通过协作学习方法增强放射科医生与AI的协同工作能力。 Saptarshi Purkayastha,Rohan Isaac,Sharon Anthony,Shikhar Shukla,Elizabeth A. Krupinski,Joshua A. Danish,Judy W. Gichoya cs.AI,cs.HC

authors_text: Denisa Qori McDonald,Richard Valett,Lev Saunders,Genevieve Dion,Ali Shokoufandeh
title: Recognizing Complex Gestures on Minimalistic Knitted Sensors: Toward Real-World Interactive Systems
title_zh: 识别简约针织传感器上的复杂手势：走向现实世界的交互系统
abstract: Developments in touch-sensitive textiles have enabled many novel interactive techniques and applications. Our digitally-knitted capacitive active sensors can be manufactured at scale with little human intervention. Their sensitive areas are created from a single conductive yarn, and they require only few connections to external hardware. This technique increases their robustness and usability, while shifting the complexity of enabling interactivity from the hardware to computational models. This work advances the capabilities of such sensors by creating the foundation for an interactive gesture recognition system. It uses a novel sensor design, and a neural network-based recognition model to classify 12 relatively complex, single touch point gesture classes with 89.8% accuracy, unfolding many possibilities for future applications. We also demonstrate the system's applicability and robustness to real-world conditions through its performance while being worn and the impact of washing and drying on the sensor's resistance.
summary: Developments in touch-sensitive textiles have enabled many novel interactive techniques and applications. Our digitally-knitted capacitive active sensors can be manufactured at scale with little human intervention. Their sensitive areas are created from a single conductive yarn, and they require only few connections to external hardware. This technique increases their robustness and usability, while shifting the complexity of enabling interactivity from the hardware to computational models. This work advances the capabilities of such sensors by creating the foundation for an interactive gesture recognition system. It uses a novel sensor design, and a neural network-based recognition model to classify 12 relatively complex, single touch point gesture classes with 89.8% accuracy, unfolding many possibilities for future applications. We also demonstrate the system's applicability and robustness to real-world conditions through its performance while being worn and the impact of washing and drying on the sensor's resistance.
abstract_zh: 触敏纺织品的发展催生了许多新颖的交互技术和应用。我们的数字编织电容式有源传感器可以在几乎不需要人工干预的情况下大规模制造。它们的敏感区域由单根导电纱线创建，并且只需很少的外部硬件连接。这项技术提高了它们的鲁棒性和可用性，同时将实现交互性的复杂性从硬件转移到计算模型。这项工作通过为交互式手势识别系统奠定了基础，提高了此类传感器的功能。它采用新颖的传感器设计和基于神经网络的识别模型，以 89.8% 的准确率对 12 个相对复杂的单触点手势类别进行分类，为未来的应用展现了多种可能性。我们还通过佩戴时的性能以及清洗和干燥对传感器电阻的影响，展示了系统在现实条件下的适用性和鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于极简针织传感器的复杂手势识别系统，通过计算模型实现交互功能。
AI.motivation: 传统交互硬件复杂且易损，需将交互复杂度转移至计算模型，同时实现大规模可制造的柔性传感器。
AI.method: 设计单导电纱线构成的针织电容传感器，结合神经网络模型对12类复杂单点手势进行分类。
AI.result: 在实际穿戴场景下达到89.8%的分类准确率，验证了传感器在洗涤干燥等真实环境中的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为可穿戴交互系统提供了高鲁棒性的基础，展示了针织传感器在现实场景中的广泛应用潜力。

authors_text: Su Zhang,Ziyuan Zhao,Cuntai Guan
title: Multimodal Continuous Emotion Recognition: A Technical Report for ABAW5
title_zh: 多模态连续情绪识别：ABAW5 技术报告
comment: 6 pages. 1 figure. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2203.13031
comments: 6 pages. 1 figure. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2203.13031
abstract: We used two multimodal models for continuous valence-arousal recognition using visual, audio, and linguistic information. The first model is the same as we used in ABAW2 and ABAW3, which employs the leader-follower attention. The second model has the same architecture for spatial and temporal encoding. As for the fusion block, it employs a compact and straightforward channel attention, borrowed from the End2You toolkit. Unlike our previous attempts that use Vggish feature directly as the audio feature, this time we feed the pre-trained VGG model using logmel-spectrogram and finetune it during the training. To make full use of the data and alleviate over-fitting, cross-validation is carried out. The code is available at https://github.com/sucv/ABAW3.
summary: We used two multimodal models for continuous valence-arousal recognition using visual, audio, and linguistic information. The first model is the same as we used in ABAW2 and ABAW3, which employs the leader-follower attention. The second model has the same architecture for spatial and temporal encoding. As for the fusion block, it employs a compact and straightforward channel attention, borrowed from the End2You toolkit. Unlike our previous attempts that use Vggish feature directly as the audio feature, this time we feed the pre-trained VGG model using logmel-spectrogram and finetune it during the training. To make full use of the data and alleviate over-fitting, cross-validation is carried out. The code is available at https://github.com/sucv/ABAW3.
abstract_zh: 我们使用两种多模态模型，利用视觉、音频和语言信息进行连续价唤醒识别。第一个模型与我们在 ABAW2 和 ABAW3 中使用的相同，它采用了领导者-跟随者注意力。第二个模型具有相同的空间和时间编码架构。至于融合块，它采用了紧凑且直接的通道注意力机制，借用自 End2You 工具包。与我们之前直接使用 Vggish 特征作为音频特征的尝试不同，这次我们使用 logmel-spectrogram 为预训练的 VGG 模型提供数据，并在训练过程中对其进行微调。为了充分利用数据并减轻过度拟合，进行交叉验证。该代码可在 https://github.com/sucv/ABAW3 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种多模态模型用于连续情感识别，结合视觉、音频和语言信息进行效价-唤醒度预测。
AI.motivation: 改进先前模型在音频特征提取和模态融合方面的不足，通过预训练VGG网络和通道注意力机制提升性能。
AI.method: 采用领导者-跟随者注意力机制和时空编码架构，使用预训练VGG网络处理logmel频谱图并进行微调，结合紧凑的通道注意力模块进行多模态融合。
AI.result: 通过交叉验证缓解过拟合问题，代码已开源但未明确给出具体性能指标。
AI.conclusion: 多模态融合与改进的音频处理方法有效提升连续情感识别效果，为后续研究提供可复现的框架。

authors_text: Zhaozheng Chen,Qianru Sun
title: Extracting Class Activation Maps from Non-Discriminative Features as well
title_zh: 也从非歧视性特征中提取类激活图
abstract: Extracting class activation maps (CAM) from a classification model often results in poor coverage on foreground objects, i.e., only the discriminative region (e.g., the "head" of "sheep") is recognized and the rest (e.g., the "leg" of "sheep") mistakenly as background. The crux behind is that the weight of the classifier (used to compute CAM) captures only the discriminative features of objects. We tackle this by introducing a new computation method for CAM that explicitly captures non-discriminative features as well, thereby expanding CAM to cover whole objects. Specifically, we omit the last pooling layer of the classification model, and perform clustering on all local features of an object class, where "local" means "at a spatial pixel position". We call the resultant K cluster centers local prototypes - represent local semantics like the "head", "leg", and "body" of "sheep". Given a new image of the class, we compare its unpooled features to every prototype, derive K similarity matrices, and then aggregate them into a heatmap (i.e., our CAM). Our CAM thus captures all local features of the class without discrimination. We evaluate it in the challenging tasks of weakly-supervised semantic segmentation (WSSS), and plug it in multiple state-of-the-art WSSS methods, such as MCTformer and AMN, by simply replacing their original CAM with ours. Our extensive experiments on standard WSSS benchmarks (PASCAL VOC and MS COCO) show the superiority of our method: consistent improvements with little computational overhead.
summary: Extracting class activation maps (CAM) from a classification model often results in poor coverage on foreground objects, i.e., only the discriminative region (e.g., the "head" of "sheep") is recognized and the rest (e.g., the "leg" of "sheep") mistakenly as background. The crux behind is that the weight of the classifier (used to compute CAM) captures only the discriminative features of objects. We tackle this by introducing a new computation method for CAM that explicitly captures non-discriminative features as well, thereby expanding CAM to cover whole objects. Specifically, we omit the last pooling layer of the classification model, and perform clustering on all local features of an object class, where "local" means "at a spatial pixel position". We call the resultant K cluster centers local prototypes - represent local semantics like the "head", "leg", and "body" of "sheep". Given a new image of the class, we compare its unpooled features to every prototype, derive K similarity matrices, and then aggregate them into a heatmap (i.e., our CAM). Our CAM thus captures all local features of the class without discrimination. We evaluate it in the challenging tasks of weakly-supervised semantic segmentation (WSSS), and plug it in multiple state-of-the-art WSSS methods, such as MCTformer and AMN, by simply replacing their original CAM with ours. Our extensive experiments on standard WSSS benchmarks (PASCAL VOC and MS COCO) show the superiority of our method: consistent improvements with little computational overhead.
abstract_zh: 从分类模型中提取类激活图（CAM）通常会导致前景对象的覆盖率较差，即仅识别出判别区域（例如“羊”的“头”），而其余区域（例如“羊”的“腿”）被错误地识别为背景。背后的关键是分类器的权重（用于计算 CAM）仅捕获对象的判别特征。我们通过引入一种新的 CAM 计算方法来解决这个问题，该方法也显式捕获非歧视性特征，从而将 CAM 扩展到覆盖整个对象。具体来说，我们省略了分类模型的最后一个池化层，并对对象类的所有局部特征进行聚类，其中“局部”意味着“在空间像素位置”。我们将所得的 K 个聚类中心称为局部原型 - 表示局部语义，如“羊”的“头”、“腿”和“身体”。给定该类的新图像，我们将其未池化的特征与每个原型进行比较，导出 K 个相似度矩阵，然后将它们聚合成热图（即我们的 CAM）。因此，我们的 CAM 能够毫无歧视地捕捉班级的所有本地特征。我们在弱监督语义分割 (WSSS) 的挑战性任务中对其进行评估，并将其插入多种最先进的 WSSS 方法中，例如 MCTformer 和 AMN，只需用我们的 CAM 替换它们的原始 CAM。我们对标准 WSSS 基准（PASCAL VOC 和 MS COCO）进行的广泛实验表明了我们方法的优越性：一致的改进，计算开销很小。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新的类激活图（CAM）计算方法，通过捕捉非判别性特征来扩展CAM覆盖整个目标物体。
AI.motivation: 传统CAM仅关注判别性区域（如羊的头部），导致物体其他部分（如腿部）被误认为背景，无法完整覆盖目标物体。
AI.method: 移除分类模型最后一层池化层，对物体类别的所有局部特征进行聚类，生成局部原型（如头部、腿部、躯干）。通过比较新图像的未池化特征与原型，生成相似度矩阵并聚合为完整热图。
AI.result: 在PASCAL VOC和MS COCO弱监督语义分割基准测试中，该方法在多个SOTA模型（如MCTformer、AMN）上实现一致性能提升，且计算开销极小。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式建模非判别性特征，本文方法有效扩展了CAM的覆盖范围，显著提升了弱监督语义分割任务的性能。

search_text: Extracting Class Activation Maps from Non-Discriminative Features as well 也从非歧视性特征中提取类激活图 Extracting class activation maps (CAM) from a classification model often results in poor coverage on foreground objects, i.e., only the discriminative region (e.g., the "head" of "sheep") is recognized and the rest (e.g., the "leg" of "sheep") mistakenly as background. The crux behind is that the weight of the classifier (used to compute CAM) captures only the discriminative features of objects. We tackle this by introducing a new computation method for CAM that explicitly captures non-discriminative features as well, thereby expanding CAM to cover whole objects. Specifically, we omit the last pooling layer of the classification model, and perform clustering on all local features of an object class, where "local" means "at a spatial pixel position". We call the resultant K cluster centers local prototypes - represent local semantics like the "head", "leg", and "body" of "sheep". Given a new image of the class, we compare its unpooled features to every prototype, derive K similarity matrices, and then aggregate them into a heatmap (i.e., our CAM). Our CAM thus captures all local features of the class without discrimination. We evaluate it in the challenging tasks of weakly-supervised semantic segmentation (WSSS), and plug it in multiple state-of-the-art WSSS methods, such as MCTformer and AMN, by simply replacing their original CAM with ours. Our extensive experiments on standard WSSS benchmarks (PASCAL VOC and MS COCO) show the superiority of our method: consistent improvements with little computational overhead. 从分类模型中提取类激活图（CAM）通常会导致前景对象的覆盖率较差，即仅识别出判别区域（例如“羊”的“头”），而其余区域（例如“羊”的“腿”）被错误地识别为背景。背后的关键是分类器的权重（用于计算 CAM）仅捕获对象的判别特征。我们通过引入一种新的 CAM 计算方法来解决这个问题，该方法也显式捕获非歧视性特征，从而将 CAM 扩展到覆盖整个对象。具体来说，我们省略了分类模型的最后一个池化层，并对对象类的所有局部特征进行聚类，其中“局部”意味着“在空间像素位置”。我们将所得的 K 个聚类中心称为局部原型 - 表示局部语义，如“羊”的“头”、“腿”和“身体”。给定该类的新图像，我们将其未池化的特征与每个原型进行比较，导出 K 个相似度矩阵，然后将它们聚合成热图（即我们的 CAM）。因此，我们的 CAM 能够毫无歧视地捕捉班级的所有本地特征。我们在弱监督语义分割 (WSSS) 的挑战性任务中对其进行评估，并将其插入多种最先进的 WSSS 方法中，例如 MCTformer 和 AMN，只需用我们的 CAM 替换它们的原始 CAM。我们对标准 WSSS 基准（PASCAL VOC 和 MS COCO）进行的广泛实验表明了我们方法的优越性：一致的改进，计算开销很小。 本文提出一种新的类激活图（CAM）计算方法，通过捕捉非判别性特征来扩展CAM覆盖整个目标物体。 Zhaozheng Chen,Qianru Sun cs.CV

authors_text: Zhaohu Xing,Lei Zhu,Lequan Yu,Zhiheng Xing,Liang Wan
title: HybridMIM: A Hybrid Masked Image Modeling Framework for 3D Medical Image Segmentation
title_zh: HybridMIM：用于 3D 医学图像分割的混合掩模图像建模框架
abstract: Masked image modeling (MIM) with transformer backbones has recently been exploited as a powerful self-supervised pre-training technique. The existing MIM methods adopt the strategy to mask random patches of the image and reconstruct the missing pixels, which only considers semantic information at a lower level, and causes a long pre-training time.This paper presents HybridMIM, a novel hybrid self-supervised learning method based on masked image modeling for 3D medical image segmentation.Specifically, we design a two-level masking hierarchy to specify which and how patches in sub-volumes are masked, effectively providing the constraints of higher level semantic information. Then we learn the semantic information of medical images at three levels, including:1) partial region prediction to reconstruct key contents of the 3D image, which largely reduces the pre-training time burden (pixel-level); 2) patch-masking perception to learn the spatial relationship between the patches in each sub-volume (region-level).and 3) drop-out-based contrastive learning between samples within a mini-batch, which further improves the generalization ability of the framework (sample-level). The proposed framework is versatile to support both CNN and transformer as encoder backbones, and also enables to pre-train decoders for image segmentation. We conduct comprehensive experiments on four widely-used public medical image segmentation datasets, including BraTS2020, BTCV, MSD Liver, and MSD Spleen. The experimental results show the clear superiority of HybridMIM against competing supervised methods, masked pre-training approaches, and other self-supervised methods, in terms of quantitative metrics, timing performance and qualitative observations. The codes of HybridMIM are available at https://github.com/ge-xing/HybridMIM
summary: Masked image modeling (MIM) with transformer backbones has recently been exploited as a powerful self-supervised pre-training technique. The existing MIM methods adopt the strategy to mask random patches of the image and reconstruct the missing pixels, which only considers semantic information at a lower level, and causes a long pre-training time.This paper presents HybridMIM, a novel hybrid self-supervised learning method based on masked image modeling for 3D medical image segmentation.Specifically, we design a two-level masking hierarchy to specify which and how patches in sub-volumes are masked, effectively providing the constraints of higher level semantic information. Then we learn the semantic information of medical images at three levels, including:1) partial region prediction to reconstruct key contents of the 3D image, which largely reduces the pre-training time burden (pixel-level); 2) patch-masking perception to learn the spatial relationship between the patches in each sub-volume (region-level).and 3) drop-out-based contrastive learning between samples within a mini-batch, which further improves the generalization ability of the framework (sample-level). The proposed framework is versatile to support both CNN and transformer as encoder backbones, and also enables to pre-train decoders for image segmentation. We conduct comprehensive experiments on four widely-used public medical image segmentation datasets, including BraTS2020, BTCV, MSD Liver, and MSD Spleen. The experimental results show the clear superiority of HybridMIM against competing supervised methods, masked pre-training approaches, and other self-supervised methods, in terms of quantitative metrics, timing performance and qualitative observations. The codes of HybridMIM are available at https://github.com/ge-xing/HybridMIM
abstract_zh: 具有 Transformer 主干的蒙版图像建模 (MIM) 最近被开发为一种强大的自监督预训练技术。现有的MIM方法采用屏蔽图像随机斑块并重建缺失像素的策略，仅考虑较低级别的语义信息，导致预训练时间较长。本文提出了HybridMIM，一种基于屏蔽图像建模的新型混合自监督学习方法，用于3D医学图像分割。具体来说，我们设计了一个两级屏蔽层次结构来指定子体积中的哪些斑块被屏蔽以及如何屏蔽，有效提供了更高级别语义信息的约束。然后我们在三个层面上学习医学图像的语义信息，包括：1）部分区域预测来重建3D图像的关键内容，这很大程度上减少了预训练时间负担（像素级）； 2）斑块掩蔽感知，以学习每个子体积（区域级）中斑块之间的空间关系。3）小批量内样本之间基于drop-out的对比学习，这进一步提高了框架的泛化能力（样本级）。所提出的框架具有多功能性，可支持 CNN 和 Transformer 作为编码器主干，并且还能够预训练用于图像分割的解码器。我们对四个广泛使用的公共医学图像分割数据集（包括 BraTS2020、BTCV、MSD Liver 和 MSD Spleen）进行了全面的实验。实验结果表明，在定量指标、计时性能和定性观察方面，HybridMIM 相对于竞争监督方法、屏蔽预训练方法和其他自监督方法具有明显的优势。 HybridMIM的代码可以在https://github.com/ge-xing/HybridMIM获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出HybridMIM框架，通过结合多层级掩码策略和自监督学习方法，提升3D医学图像分割的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有掩码图像建模（MIM）方法仅利用低层语义信息，导致预训练时间过长且分割效果受限，需引入更高层次语义约束以优化模型效率与精度。
AI.method: 设计两级掩码层次结构，结合像素级部分区域预测、区域级块掩码感知和样本级基于丢弃的对比学习，支持CNN和Transformer作为编码器，并预训练分割解码器。
AI.result: 在BraTS2020、BTCV等四个医学数据集上，HybridMIM在定量指标、时间效率和定性结果上均优于监督方法及其他自监督方法。
AI.conclusion: HybridMIM通过多层级语义约束和灵活架构，显著提升了3D医学图像分割的效率与泛化能力，具有广泛的应用价值。

authors_text: Yue Meng,Chuchu Fan
title: Hybrid Systems Neural Control with Region-of-Attraction Planner
title_zh: 具有吸引力区域规划器的混合系统神经控制
abstract: Hybrid systems are prevalent in robotics. However, ensuring the stability of hybrid systems is challenging due to sophisticated continuous and discrete dynamics. A system with all its system modes stable can still be unstable. Hence special treatments are required at mode switchings to stabilize the system. In this work, we propose a hierarchical, neural network (NN)-based method to control general hybrid systems. For each system mode, we first learn an NN Lyapunov function and an NN controller to ensure the states within the region of attraction (RoA) can be stabilized. Then an RoA NN estimator is learned across different modes. Upon mode switching, we propose a differentiable planner to ensure the states after switching can land in next mode's RoA, hence stabilizing the hybrid system. We provide novel theoretical stability guarantees and conduct experiments in car tracking control, pogobot navigation, and bipedal walker locomotion. Our method only requires 0.25X of the training time as needed by other learning-based methods. With low running time (10-50X faster than model predictive control (MPC)), our controller achieves a higher stability/success rate over other baselines such as MPC, reinforcement learning (RL), common Lyapunov methods (CLF), linear quadratic regulator (LQR), quadratic programming (QP) and Hamilton-Jacobian-based methods (HJB). The project page is on https://mit-realm.github.io/hybrid-clf.
summary: Hybrid systems are prevalent in robotics. However, ensuring the stability of hybrid systems is challenging due to sophisticated continuous and discrete dynamics. A system with all its system modes stable can still be unstable. Hence special treatments are required at mode switchings to stabilize the system. In this work, we propose a hierarchical, neural network (NN)-based method to control general hybrid systems. For each system mode, we first learn an NN Lyapunov function and an NN controller to ensure the states within the region of attraction (RoA) can be stabilized. Then an RoA NN estimator is learned across different modes. Upon mode switching, we propose a differentiable planner to ensure the states after switching can land in next mode's RoA, hence stabilizing the hybrid system. We provide novel theoretical stability guarantees and conduct experiments in car tracking control, pogobot navigation, and bipedal walker locomotion. Our method only requires 0.25X of the training time as needed by other learning-based methods. With low running time (10-50X faster than model predictive control (MPC)), our controller achieves a higher stability/success rate over other baselines such as MPC, reinforcement learning (RL), common Lyapunov methods (CLF), linear quadratic regulator (LQR), quadratic programming (QP) and Hamilton-Jacobian-based methods (HJB). The project page is on https://mit-realm.github.io/hybrid-clf.
abstract_zh: 混合系统在机器人技术中很普遍。然而，由于复杂的连续和离散动力学，确保混合系统的稳定性具有挑战性。一个所有系统模式都稳定的系统仍然可能不稳定。因此，在模式切换时需要特殊处理以稳定系统。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于分层神经网络（NN）的方法来控制通用混合系统。对于每种系统模式，我们首先学习一个 NN Lyapunov 函数和一个 NN 控制器，以确保吸引区域 (RoA) 内的状态能够稳定。然后跨不同模式学习 RoA NN 估计器。在模式切换时，我们提出了一个可微的规划器，以确保切换后的状态能够落在下一个模式的 RoA 中，从而稳定混合系统。我们提供新颖的理论稳定性保证，并在汽车跟踪控制、pogobot 导航和双足步行器运动方面进行实验。我们的方法只需要其他基于学习的方法所需的训练时间的 0.25 倍。由于运行时间短（比模型预测控制 (MPC) 快 10-50 倍），我们的控制器比其他基线（例如 MPC、强化学习 (RL)、常见李亚普诺夫方法 (CLF)、线性二次调节器 (LQR)、二次规划 (QP) 和基于哈密顿-雅可比的方法 (HJB)）实现了更高的稳定性/成功率。项目页面位于 https://mit-realm.github.io/hybrid-clf。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于神经网络的分层控制方法，用于稳定混合系统的模式切换过程，并通过区域吸引力规划确保系统整体稳定性。
AI.motivation: 混合系统在机器人领域广泛应用，但其连续动态与离散动态的复杂性导致稳定性难以保证，尤其在模式切换时容易引发系统不稳定。
AI.method: 为每个系统模式学习神经网络Lyapunov函数和控制器，再训练跨模式的区域吸引力（RoA）估计器，并设计可微分规划器确保切换后状态落入下一模式的RoA。
AI.result: 训练时间仅为其他方法的1/4，运行速度比MPC快10-50倍，在多任务实验中稳定性/成功率显著优于MPC、RL、CLF等基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过理论保证和高效实现，为混合系统控制提供了稳定且快速的解决方案，适用于复杂机器人控制场景。

However, ensuring the stability of hybrid systems is challenging due to sophisticated continuous and discrete dynamics. A system with all its system modes stable can still be unstable. Hence special treatments are required at mode switchings to stabilize the system. In this work, we propose a hierarchical, neural network (NN)-based method to control general hybrid systems. For each system mode, we first learn an NN Lyapunov function and an NN controller to ensure the states within the region of attraction (RoA) can be stabilized. Then an RoA NN estimator is learned across different modes. Upon mode switching, we propose a differentiable planner to ensure the states after switching can land in next mode's RoA, hence stabilizing the hybrid system. We provide novel theoretical stability guarantees and conduct experiments in car tracking control, pogobot navigation, and bipedal walker locomotion. Our method only requires 0.25X of the training time as needed by other learning-based methods. With low running time (10-50X faster than model predictive control (MPC)), our controller achieves a higher stability/success rate over other baselines such as MPC, reinforcement learning (RL), common Lyapunov methods (CLF), linear quadratic regulator (LQR), quadratic programming (QP) and Hamilton-Jacobian-based methods (HJB). authors_text: Zhaohu Xing,Liang Wan,Huazhu Fu,Guang Yang,Lei Zhu
title: Diff-UNet: A Diffusion Embedded Network for Volumetric Segmentation
title_zh: Diff-UNet：用于体积分割的扩散嵌入式网络
abstract: In recent years, Denoising Diffusion Models have demonstrated remarkable success in generating semantically valuable pixel-wise representations for image generative modeling. In this study, we propose a novel end-to-end framework, called Diff-UNet, for medical volumetric segmentation. Our approach integrates the diffusion model into a standard U-shaped architecture to extract semantic information from the input volume effectively, resulting in excellent pixel-level representations for medical volumetric segmentation. To enhance the robustness of the diffusion model's prediction results, we also introduce a Step-Uncertainty based Fusion (SUF) module during inference to combine the outputs of the diffusion models at each step. We evaluate our method on three datasets, including multimodal brain tumors in MRI, liver tumors, and multi-organ CT volumes, and demonstrate that Diff-UNet outperforms other state-of-the-art methods significantly. Our experimental results also indicate the universality and effectiveness of the proposed model. The proposed framework has the potential to facilitate the accurate diagnosis and treatment of medical conditions by enabling more precise segmentation of anatomical structures. The codes of Diff-UNet are available at https://github.com/ge-xing/Diff-UNet
summary: In recent years, Denoising Diffusion Models have demonstrated remarkable success in generating semantically valuable pixel-wise representations for image generative modeling. In this study, we propose a novel end-to-end framework, called Diff-UNet, for medical volumetric segmentation. Our approach integrates the diffusion model into a standard U-shaped architecture to extract semantic information from the input volume effectively, resulting in excellent pixel-level representations for medical volumetric segmentation. To enhance the robustness of the diffusion model's prediction results, we also introduce a Step-Uncertainty based Fusion (SUF) module during inference to combine the outputs of the diffusion models at each step. We evaluate our method on three datasets, including multimodal brain tumors in MRI, liver tumors, and multi-organ CT volumes, and demonstrate that Diff-UNet outperforms other state-of-the-art methods significantly. Our experimental results also indicate the universality and effectiveness of the proposed model. The proposed framework has the potential to facilitate the accurate diagnosis and treatment of medical conditions by enabling more precise segmentation of anatomical structures. The codes of Diff-UNet are available at https://github.com/ge-xing/Diff-UNet
abstract_zh: 近年来，去噪扩散模型在为图像生成建模生成语义上有价值的像素级表示方面取得了显着的成功。在这项研究中，我们提出了一种新颖的端到端框架，称为 Diff-UNet，用于医学体积分割。我们的方法将扩散模型集成到标准 U 形架构中，以有效地从输入体积中提取语义信息，从而为医学体积分割提供出色的像素级表示。为了增强扩散模型预测结果的鲁棒性，我们还在推理过程中引入了基于步骤不确定性的融合（SUF）模块，以组合每个步骤的扩散模型的输出。我们在三个数据集上评估我们的方法，包括 MRI 中的多模态脑肿瘤、肝脏肿瘤和多器官 CT 体积，并证明 Diff-UNet 显着优于其他最先进的方法。我们的实验结果也表明了所提出模型的普遍性和有效性。所提出的框架有可能通过更精确地分割解剖结构来促进医疗状况的准确诊断和治疗。 Diff-UNet的代码可以在https://github.com/ge-xing/Diff-UNet获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Diff-UNet的新型端到端框架，用于医学体积分割，通过将扩散模型嵌入标准U型架构并结合步骤不确定性融合模块，提升分割精度。
AI.motivation: 传统分割方法在医学图像复杂结构和噪声干扰下表现不足，需更鲁棒的模型提取语义信息并提升分割精度。
AI.method: 将去噪扩散模型整合至U型网络架构中，设计步骤不确定性融合模块（SUF）在推理阶段融合各步骤输出，增强预测稳定性。
AI.result: 在多模态脑肿瘤MRI、肝肿瘤及多器官CT数据集上显著优于现有先进方法，验证了模型的通用性与有效性。
AI.conclusion: Diff-UNet通过扩散模型与U型网络的结合及SUF模块优化，为医学影像精准分割提供了新方法，有望辅助疾病诊断与治疗。

authors_text: Guandong Li,Xian Yang
title: Smartbanner: Intelligent banner design framework that strikes a balance between creative freedom and design rules
title_zh: Smartbanner：智能横幅设计框架，在创意自由和设计规则之间取得平衡
comment: ef:Published 23 November 2022 Art Multimedia Tools and Applications
comments: ef:Published 23 November 2022 Art Multimedia Tools and Applications
abstract: Companies use banners extensively to promote their products, and the intelligent automatic synthesis of banners is a challenging event. Under the premise of inputting only a small amount of information such as product, text and size, it can synthesize styles with high freedom and richness, but at the same time, it must satisfy the design specifications of advertisers for advertising and scenes. We propose an intelligent banner design framework that strikes a balance between creative freedom and design rules, called smartbanner. Smartbanner consists of planner, actuator, adjuster and generator. The banner is synthesized through the combined framework, which fully liberates the designer and reduces the threshold and cost of design. It increases the click-through rate by 30%, improves the human efficiency of designers by 500% under the condition of ensuring the quality of creation, and synthesizes hundreds of millions of pictures in batches throughout the year.

The banner is synthesized through the combined framework, which fully liberates the designer and reduces the threshold and cost of design. It increases the click-through rate by 30%, improves the human efficiency of designers by 500% under the condition of ensuring the quality of creation, and synthesizes hundreds of millions of pictures in batches throughout the year.
abstract_zh: 企业广泛使用横幅广告来宣传自己的产品，而横幅广告的智能自动合成是一项具有挑战性的事情。在仅输入产品、文字、尺寸等少量信息的前提下，就可以合成出自由度高、丰富度高的样式，但同时必须满足广告主对广告和场景的设计规范。我们提出了一种智能横幅设计框架，可以在创意自由和设计规则之间取得平衡，称为 smartbanner。 Smartbanner由规划器、执行器、调节器和生成器组成。通过组合框架合成横幅，充分解放设计师，降低设计门槛和成本。点击率提升30%，在保证创作质量的情况下，设计师人力效率提升500%，全年批量合成上亿张图片。

AI.method: 构建包含规划器、执行器、调整器和生成器的四模块框架，通过组合协作实现符合设计规则的多样化横幅合成。
AI.result: 提升点击率30%，设计师效率提高500%，全年可批量生成数亿张图片，确保创作质量的前提下降低设计门槛与成本。
AI.conclusion: Smartbanner框架有效平衡创意与规范，显著提升广告设计效率与效果，为自动化广告生成提供可行方案。

search_text: Smartbanner: Intelligent banner design framework that strikes a balance between creative freedom and design rules Smartbanner：智能横幅设计框架，在创意自由和设计规则之间取得平衡 Companies use banners extensively to promote their products, and the intelligent automatic synthesis of banners is a challenging event. Under the premise of inputting only a small amount of information such as product, text and size, it can synthesize styles with high freedom and richness, but at the same time, it must satisfy the design specifications of advertisers for advertising and scenes. We propose an intelligent banner design framework that strikes a balance between creative freedom and design rules, called smartbanner. Smartbanner consists of planner, actuator, adjuster and generator. The banner is synthesized through the combined framework, which fully liberates the designer and reduces the threshold and cost of design. It increases the click-through rate by 30%, improves the human efficiency of designers by 500% under the condition of ensuring the quality of creation, and synthesizes hundreds of millions of pictures in batches throughout the year. 企业广泛使用横幅广告来宣传自己的产品，而横幅广告的智能自动合成是一项具有挑战性的事情。在仅输入产品、文字、尺寸等少量信息的前提下，就可以合成出自由度高、丰富度高的样式，但同时必须满足广告主对广告和场景的设计规范。我们提出了一种智能横幅设计框架，可以在创意自由和设计规则之间取得平衡，称为 smartbanner。 Smartbanner由规划器、执行器、调节器和生成器组成。通过组合框架合成横幅，充分解放设计师，降低设计门槛和成本。点击率提升30%，在保证创作质量的情况下，设计师人力效率提升500%，全年批量合成上亿张图片。 本文提出了一种名为Smartbanner的智能横幅设计框架，旨在平衡创意自由与设计规范，实现高效自动化的横幅生成。 Guandong Li,Xian Yang cs.HC,cs.MM

authors_text: Mingjie Li,Bingqian Lin,Zicong Chen,Haokun Lin,Xiaodan Liang,Xiaojun Chang
title: Dynamic Graph Enhanced Contrastive Learning for Chest X-ray Report Generation
title_zh: 用于胸部 X 射线报告生成的动态图增强对比学习
comment: Accepted by CVPR 2023. Project page: https://github.com/mlii0117/DCL
comments: Accepted by CVPR 2023. Project page: https://github.com/mlii0117/DCL
abstract: Automatic radiology reporting has great clinical potential to relieve radiologists from heavy workloads and improve diagnosis interpretation. Recently, researchers have enhanced data-driven neural networks with medical knowledge graphs to eliminate the severe visual and textual bias in this task. The structures of such graphs are exploited by using the clinical dependencies formed by the disease topic tags via general knowledge and usually do not update during the training process. Consequently, the fixed graphs can not guarantee the most appropriate scope of knowledge and limit the effectiveness. To address the limitation, we propose a knowledge graph with Dynamic structure and nodes to facilitate medical report generation with Contrastive Learning, named DCL. In detail, the fundamental structure of our graph is pre-constructed from general knowledge. Then we explore specific knowledge extracted from the retrieved reports to add additional nodes or redefine their relations in a bottom-up manner. Each image feature is integrated with its very own updated graph before being fed into the decoder module for report generation. Finally, this paper introduces Image-Report Contrastive and Image-Report Matching losses to better represent visual features and textual information. Evaluated on IU-Xray and MIMIC-CXR datasets, our DCL outperforms previous state-of-the-art models on these two benchmarks.
summary: Automatic radiology reporting has great clinical potential to relieve radiologists from heavy workloads and improve diagnosis interpretation. Recently, researchers have enhanced data-driven neural networks with medical knowledge graphs to eliminate the severe visual and textual bias in this task. The structures of such graphs are exploited by using the clinical dependencies formed by the disease topic tags via general knowledge and usually do not update during the training process. Consequently, the fixed graphs can not guarantee the most appropriate scope of knowledge and limit the effectiveness. To address the limitation, we propose a knowledge graph with Dynamic structure and nodes to facilitate medical report generation with Contrastive Learning, named DCL. In detail, the fundamental structure of our graph is pre-constructed from general knowledge. Then we explore specific knowledge extracted from the retrieved reports to add additional nodes or redefine their relations in a bottom-up manner. Each image feature is integrated with its very own updated graph before being fed into the decoder module for report generation. Finally, this paper introduces Image-Report Contrastive and Image-Report Matching losses to better represent visual features and textual information. Evaluated on IU-Xray and MIMIC-CXR datasets, our DCL outperforms previous state-of-the-art models on these two benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 自动放射学报告具有巨大的临床潜力，可以减轻放射科医生的繁重工作量并改善诊断解释。最近，研究人员利用医学知识图增强了数据驱动的神经网络，以消除该任务中严重的视觉和文本偏差。此类图的结构是通过一般知识使用疾病主题标签形成的临床依赖性来利用的，并且通常在训练过程中不会更新。因此，固定的图不能保证知识的最合适范围并限制了有效性。为了解决这一限制，我们提出了一种具有动态结构和节点的知识图，以促进通过对比学习生成医疗报告，称为 DCL。具体来说，我们图的基本结构是根据常识预先构建的。然后，我们探索从检索到的报告中提取的特定知识，以添加额外的节点或以自下而上的方式重新定义它们的关系。每个图像特征在被输入解码器模块以生成报告之前都与其自己的更新图形集成。最后，本文介绍了图像报告对比和图像报告匹配损失，以更好地表示视觉特征和文本信息。在 IU-Xray 和 MIMIC-CXR 数据集上进行评估，我们的 DCL 在这两个基准上优于之前最先进的模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种动态图增强对比学习方法（DCL），用于改进胸部X光报告生成，通过动态调整知识图结构和节点来提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖静态知识图，无法在训练过程中动态更新，导致知识范围受限且影响生成效果。
AI.method: 基于通用知识构建初始知识图，通过检索报告提取特定知识动态添加节点或调整关系，结合图像-报告对比损失和匹配损失优化特征表示。
AI.result: 在IU-Xray和MIMIC-CXR数据集上，DCL方法优于现有最先进模型，验证了动态知识图与对比学习的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 动态知识图结构与对比学习的结合有效提升了医学报告生成质量，未来可进一步探索更灵活的动态图建模方式。

search_text: Dynamic Graph Enhanced Contrastive Learning for Chest X-ray Report Generation 用于胸部 X 射线报告生成的动态图增强对比学习 Automatic radiology reporting has great clinical potential to relieve radiologists from heavy workloads and improve diagnosis interpretation. Recently, researchers have enhanced data-driven neural networks with medical knowledge graphs to eliminate the severe visual and textual bias in this task. The structures of such graphs are exploited by using the clinical dependencies formed by the disease topic tags via general knowledge and usually do not update during the training process. Consequently, the fixed graphs can not guarantee the most appropriate scope of knowledge and limit the effectiveness. To address the limitation, we propose a knowledge graph with Dynamic structure and nodes to facilitate medical report generation with Contrastive Learning, named DCL. In detail, the fundamental structure of our graph is pre-constructed from general knowledge. Then we explore specific knowledge extracted from the retrieved reports to add additional nodes or redefine their relations in a bottom-up manner. Each image feature is integrated with its very own updated graph before being fed into the decoder module for report generation. Finally, this paper introduces Image-Report Contrastive and Image-Report Matching losses to better represent visual features and textual information. Evaluated on IU-Xray and MIMIC-CXR datasets, our DCL outperforms previous state-of-the-art models on these two benchmarks. 自动放射学报告具有巨大的临床潜力，可以减轻放射科医生的繁重工作量并改善诊断解释。最近，研究人员利用医学知识图增强了数据驱动的神经网络，以消除该任务中严重的视觉和文本偏差。此类图的结构是通过一般知识使用疾病主题标签形成的临床依赖性来利用的，并且通常在训练过程中不会更新。因此，固定的图不能保证知识的最合适范围并限制了有效性。为了解决这一限制，我们提出了一种具有动态结构和节点的知识图，以促进通过对比学习生成医疗报告，称为 DCL。具体来说，我们图的基本结构是根据常识预先构建的。然后，我们探索从检索到的报告中提取的特定知识，以添加额外的节点或以自下而上的方式重新定义它们的关系。每个图像特征在被输入解码器模块以生成报告之前都与其自己的更新图形集成。最后，本文介绍了图像报告对比和图像报告匹配损失，以更好地表示视觉特征和文本信息。在 IU-Xray 和 MIMIC-CXR 数据集上进行评估，我们的 DCL 在这两个基准上优于之前最先进的模型。 本文提出一种动态图增强对比学习方法（DCL），用于改进胸部X光报告生成，通过动态调整知识图结构和节点来提升模型性能。 Mingjie Li,Bingqian Lin,Zicong Chen,Haokun Lin,Xiaodan Liang,Xiaojun Chang cs.CV

authors_text: Peiwen Pan,Huan Wang,Chenyi Wang,Chang Nie
title: ABC: Attention with Bilinear Correlation for Infrared Small Target Detection
title_zh: ABC：红外小目标检测的双线性相关注意力
abstract: Infrared small target detection (ISTD) has a wide range of applications in early warning, rescue, and guidance. However, CNN based deep learning methods are not effective at segmenting infrared small target (IRST) that it lack of clear contour and texture features, and transformer based methods also struggle to achieve significant results due to the absence of convolution induction bias. To address these issues, we propose a new model called attention with bilinear correlation (ABC), which is based on the transformer architecture and includes a convolution linear fusion transformer (CLFT) module with a novel attention mechanism for feature extraction and fusion, which effectively enhances target features and suppresses noise. Additionally, our model includes a u-shaped convolution-dilated convolution (UCDC) module located deeper layers of the network, which takes advantage of the smaller resolution of deeper features to obtain finer semantic information. Experimental results on public datasets demonstrate that our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance. Code is available at https://github.com/PANPEIWEN/ABC
summary: Infrared small target detection (ISTD) has a wide range of applications in early warning, rescue, and guidance. However, CNN based deep learning methods are not effective at segmenting infrared small target (IRST) that it lack of clear contour and texture features, and transformer based methods also struggle to achieve significant results due to the absence of convolution induction bias. To address these issues, we propose a new model called attention with bilinear correlation (ABC), which is based on the transformer architecture and includes a convolution linear fusion transformer (CLFT) module with a novel attention mechanism for feature extraction and fusion, which effectively enhances target features and suppresses noise. Additionally, our model includes a u-shaped convolution-dilated convolution (UCDC) module located deeper layers of the network, which takes advantage of the smaller resolution of deeper features to obtain finer semantic information. Experimental results on public datasets demonstrate that our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance. Code is available at https://github.com/PANPEIWEN/ABC
abstract_zh: 红外小目标检测（ISTD）在预警、救援和制导方面有着广泛的应用。然而，基于CNN的深度学习方法在分割红外小目标（IRST）方面效果不佳，因为它缺乏清晰的轮廓和纹理特征，而基于Transformer的方法由于缺乏卷积归纳偏差也难以取得显着的结果。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种称为双线性相关注意力（ABC）的新模型，该模型基于 Transformer 架构，并包含一个卷积线性融合变压器（CLFT）模块，该模块具有用于特征提取和融合的新颖注意力机制，可有效增强目标特征并抑制噪声。此外，我们的模型还包括位于网络较深层的 U 形卷积扩张卷积（UCDC）模块，它利用较深层特征的较小分辨率来获取更精细的语义信息。公共数据集上的实验结果表明，我们的方法实现了最先进的性能。代码可在 https://github.com/PANPEIWEN/ABC 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于双线性相关注意力机制的模型ABC，用于改进红外小目标检测（ISTD）任务。
AI.motivation: 传统CNN方法因红外小目标缺乏明显轮廓和纹理特征效果不佳，而基于Transformer的方法因缺少卷积归纳偏置也难以取得显著成果，需融合两者优势。
AI.method: 设计包含卷积线性融合Transformer（CLFT）模块和U型卷积-空洞卷积（UCDC）模块的ABC模型，CLFT通过新型注意力机制增强目标特征并抑制噪声，UCDC利用深层小分辨率特征提取精细语义信息。
AI.result: 在公开数据集上实验表明，ABC方法达到最先进水平，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: ABC通过结合CNN与Transformer优势，有效提升了红外小目标检测性能，验证了双线性相关注意力机制与UCDC模块的有效性。

ai_content.method: 设计包含卷积线性融合Transformer（CLFT）模块和U型卷积-空洞卷积（UCDC）模块的ABC模型，CLFT通过新型注意力机制增强目标特征并抑制噪声，UCDC利用深层小分辨率特征提取精细语义信息。

search_text: ABC: Attention with Bilinear Correlation for Infrared Small Target Detection ABC：红外小目标检测的双线性相关注意力 Infrared small target detection (ISTD) has a wide range of applications in early warning, rescue, and guidance. However, CNN based deep learning methods are not effective at segmenting infrared small target (IRST) that it lack of clear contour and texture features, and transformer based methods also struggle to achieve significant results due to the absence of convolution induction bias. To address these issues, we propose a new model called attention with bilinear correlation (ABC), which is based on the transformer architecture and includes a convolution linear fusion transformer (CLFT) module with a novel attention mechanism for feature extraction and fusion, which effectively enhances target features and suppresses noise. Additionally, our model includes a u-shaped convolution-dilated convolution (UCDC) module located deeper layers of the network, which takes advantage of the smaller resolution of deeper features to obtain finer semantic information. Experimental results on public datasets demonstrate that our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance. Code is available at https://github.com/PANPEIWEN/ABC 红外小目标检测（ISTD）在预警、救援和制导方面有着广泛的应用。然而，基于CNN的深度学习方法在分割红外小目标（IRST）方面效果不佳，因为它缺乏清晰的轮廓和纹理特征，而基于Transformer的方法由于缺乏卷积归纳偏差也难以取得显着的结果。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种称为双线性相关注意力（ABC）的新模型，该模型基于 Transformer 架构，并包含一个卷积线性融合变压器（CLFT）模块，该模块具有用于特征提取和融合的新颖注意力机制，可有效增强目标特征并抑制噪声。此外，我们的模型还包括位于网络较深层的 U 形卷积扩张卷积（UCDC）模块，它利用较深层特征的较小分辨率来获取更精细的语义信息。公共数据集上的实验结果表明，我们的方法实现了最先进的性能。代码可在 https://github.com/PANPEIWEN/ABC 获取 本文提出一种基于双线性相关注意力机制的模型ABC，用于改进红外小目标检测（ISTD）任务。 Peiwen Pan,Huan Wang,Chenyi Wang,Chang Nie cs.CV

authors_text: Shengqin Jiang,Yuan Gao,Bowen Li,Fengna Cheng,Renlong Hang,Qingshan Liu
title: Remote Sensing Object Counting with Online Knowledge Learning
title_zh: 遥感物体计数与在线知识学习
comment: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Geoscience and Remote Sensing, 2025
comments: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Geoscience and Remote Sensing, 2025
abstract: Efficient models for remote sensing object counting are urgently required for applications in scenarios with limited computing resources, such as drones or embedded systems. A straightforward yet powerful technique to achieve this is knowledge distillation, which steers the learning of student networks by leveraging the experience of already-trained teacher networks. However, it faces a pair of challenges: Firstly, due to its two-stage training nature, a longer training period is essential, especially as the training samples increase. Secondly, despite the proficiency of teacher networks in transmitting assimilated knowledge, they tend to overlook the latent insights gained during their learning process. To address these challenges, we introduce an online distillation learning method for remote sensing object counting. It builds an end-to-end training framework that seamlessly integrates two distinct networks into a unified one. It comprises a shared shallow module, a teacher branch, and a student branch. The shared module serving as the foundation for both branches is dedicated to learning some primitive information. The teacher branch utilizes prior knowledge to reduce the difficulty of learning and guides the student branch in online learning. In parallel, the student branch achieves parameter reduction and rapid inference capabilities by means of channel reduction. This design empowers the student branch not only to receive privileged insights from the teacher branch but also to tap into the latent reservoir of knowledge held by the teacher branch during the learning process. Moreover, we propose a relation-in-relation distillation method that allows the student branch to effectively comprehend the evolution of the relationship of intra-layer teacher features among different inter-layer features. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our method.

A straightforward yet powerful technique to achieve this is knowledge distillation, which steers the learning of student networks by leveraging the experience of already-trained teacher networks. However, it faces a pair of challenges: Firstly, due to its two-stage training nature, a longer training period is essential, especially as the training samples increase. Secondly, despite the proficiency of teacher networks in transmitting assimilated knowledge, they tend to overlook the latent insights gained during their learning process. To address these challenges, we introduce an online distillation learning method for remote sensing object counting. It builds an end-to-end training framework that seamlessly integrates two distinct networks into a unified one. It comprises a shared shallow module, a teacher branch, and a student branch. The shared module serving as the foundation for both branches is dedicated to learning some primitive information. The teacher branch utilizes prior knowledge to reduce the difficulty of learning and guides the student branch in online learning. In parallel, the student branch achieves parameter reduction and rapid inference capabilities by means of channel reduction. This design empowers the student branch not only to receive privileged insights from the teacher branch but also to tap into the latent reservoir of knowledge held by the teacher branch during the learning process. Moreover, we propose a relation-in-relation distillation method that allows the student branch to effectively comprehend the evolution of the relationship of intra-layer teacher features among different inter-layer features. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our method.
abstract_zh: 对于计算资源有限的场景（例如无人机或嵌入式系统）的应用，迫切需要高效的遥感物体计数模型。实现这一目标的一种简单而强大的技术是知识蒸馏，它通过利用已经训练有素的教师网络的经验来引导学生网络的学习。然而，它面临着两个挑战：首先，由于其两阶段训练的性质，较长的训练周期是必要的，特别是随着训练样本的增加。其次，尽管教师网络在传播同化知识方面很熟练，但他们往往忽视了在学习过程中获得的潜在见解。为了解决这些挑战，我们引入了一种用于遥感对象计数的在线蒸馏学习方法。它构建了一个端到端的训练框架，将两个不同的网络无缝集成到一个统一的网络中。它包括一个共享浅层模块、一个教师分支和一个学生分支。作为两个分支基础的共享模块致力于学习一些原始信息。教师分支利用先验知识降低学习难度，指导学生分支在线学习。同时，学生分支通过通道缩减的方式实现参数缩减和快速推理能力。这种设计使学生分支不仅能够从教师分支获得特权见解，而且还能在学习过程中挖掘教师分支所拥有的潜在知识库。此外，我们提出了一种关系中关系蒸馏方法，使学生分支能够有效地理解不同层间特征之间层内教师特征关系的演变。大量的实验证明了我们方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种在线知识学习方法，用于解决遥感图像目标计数中模型效率与性能的平衡问题。
AI.motivation: 现有知识蒸馏方法存在训练周期长、教师网络未充分利用学习过程中的潜在知识等缺陷，难以满足无人机等资源受限场景的实时性需求。
AI.method: 构建端到端框架包含共享浅层模块、教师分支和学生分支，通过通道缩减实现参数压缩，并提出关系-关系蒸馏方法捕捉教师网络特征演化规律。
AI.result: 实验验证该方法在保持高计数精度的同时，显著提升了模型推理速度和训练效率。
AI.conclusion: 在线知识学习框架有效整合了教师网络的先验知识与学生网络的轻量化优势，为遥感目标计数提供了新的解决方案。

authors_text: Yi-Han Lin,Xunquan Chen,Ryoichi Takashima,Tetsuya Takiguchi
title: Zero-shot Sound Event Classification Using a Sound Attribute Vector with Global and Local Feature Learning
title_zh: 使用具有全局和局部特征学习的声音属性向量进行零样本声音事件分类
abstract: This paper introduces a zero-shot sound event classification (ZS-SEC) method to identify sound events that have never occurred in training data. In our previous work, we proposed a ZS-SEC method using sound attribute vectors (SAVs), where a deep neural network model infers attribute information that describes the sound of an event class instead of inferring its class label directly. Our previous method showed that it could classify unseen events to some extent; however, the accuracy for unseen events was far inferior to that for seen events. In this paper, we propose a new ZS-SEC method that can learn discriminative global features and local features simultaneously to enhance SAV-based ZS-SEC. In the proposed method, while the global features are learned in order to discriminate the event classes in the training data, the spectro-temporal local features are learned in order to regress the attribute information using attribute prototypes. The experimental results show that our proposed method can improve the accuracy of SAV-based ZS-SEC and can visualize the region in the spectrogram related to each attribute.
summary: This paper introduces a zero-shot sound event classification (ZS-SEC) method to identify sound events that have never occurred in training data. In our previous work, we proposed a ZS-SEC method using sound attribute vectors (SAVs), where a deep neural network model infers attribute information that describes the sound of an event class instead of inferring its class label directly. Our previous method showed that it could classify unseen events to some extent; however, the accuracy for unseen events was far inferior to that for seen events. In this paper, we propose a new ZS-SEC method that can learn discriminative global features and local features simultaneously to enhance SAV-based ZS-SEC. In the proposed method, while the global features are learned in order to discriminate the event classes in the training data, the spectro-temporal local features are learned in order to regress the attribute information using attribute prototypes. The experimental results show that our proposed method can improve the accuracy of SAV-based ZS-SEC and can visualize the region in the spectrogram related to each attribute.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了一种零样本声音事件分类（ZS-SEC）方法来识别训练数据中从未发生过的声音事件。在我们之前的工作中，我们提出了一种使用声音属性向量（SAV）的 ZS-SEC 方法，其中深度神经网络模型推断描述事件类声音的属性信息，而不是直接推断其类标签。我们之前的方法表明它可以在一定程度上对看不见的事件进行分类；然而，未见事件的准确性远远低于已见事件的准确性。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的 ZS-SEC 方法，可以同时学习有区别的全局特征和局部特征，以增强基于 SAV 的 ZS-SEC。在所提出的方法中，在学习全局特征以区分训练数据中的事件类的同时，学习谱时局部特征以使用属性原型回归属性信息。实验结果表明，我们提出的方法可以提高基于SAV的ZS-SEC的准确性，并且可以可视化频谱图中与每个属性相关的区域。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于声音属性向量（SAV）的零样本声事件分类方法，通过同时学习全局特征和局部特征提升分类性能。
AI.motivation: 先前基于SAV的方法在未见过的声事件分类上准确率显著低于已见事件，需改进特征学习以增强模型对未见类别的泛化能力。
AI.method: 结合全局特征学习（用于区分训练类别）与局部频谱-时域特征学习（通过属性原型回归属性信息），实现对SAV的增强。
AI.result: 实验表明方法提升了SAV-based ZS-SEC的准确率，并可可视化频谱图中与每个属性相关的区域。
AI.conclusion: 通过联合学习全局判别特征与局部属性相关特征，该方法有效改进了基于SAV的零样本声事件分类性能并增强了可解释性。

conclusion: 通过联合学习全局判别特征与局部属性相关特征，该方法有效改进了基于SAV的零样本声事件分类性能并增强了可解释性。
search_text: Zero-shot Sound Event Classification Using a Sound Attribute Vector with Global and Local Feature Learning 使用具有全局和局部特征学习的声音属性向量进行零样本声音事件分类 This paper introduces a zero-shot sound event classification (ZS-SEC) method to identify sound events that have never occurred in training data. In our previous work, we proposed a ZS-SEC method using sound attribute vectors (SAVs), where a deep neural network model infers attribute information that describes the sound of an event class instead of inferring its class label directly. Our previous method showed that it could classify unseen events to some extent; however, the accuracy for unseen events was far inferior to that for seen events. In this paper, we propose a new ZS-SEC method that can learn discriminative global features and local features simultaneously to enhance SAV-based ZS-SEC. In the proposed method, while the global features are learned in order to discriminate the event classes in the training data, the spectro-temporal local features are learned in order to regress the attribute information using attribute prototypes. The experimental results show that our proposed method can improve the accuracy of SAV-based ZS-SEC and can visualize the region in the spectrogram related to each attribute. 本文介绍了一种零样本声音事件分类（ZS-SEC）方法来识别训练数据中从未发生过的声音事件。在我们之前的工作中，我们提出了一种使用声音属性向量（SAV）的 ZS-SEC 方法，其中深度神经网络模型推断描述事件类声音的属性信息，而不是直接推断其类标签。我们之前的方法表明它可以在一定程度上对看不见的事件进行分类；然而，未见事件的准确性远远低于已见事件的准确性。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的 ZS-SEC 方法，可以同时学习有区别的全局特征和局部特征，以增强基于 SAV 的 ZS-SEC。在所提出的方法中，在学习全局特征以区分训练数据中的事件类的同时，学习谱时局部特征以使用属性原型回归属性信息。实验结果表明，我们提出的方法可以提高基于SAV的ZS-SEC的准确性，并且可以可视化频谱图中与每个属性相关的区域。 本文提出一种基于声音属性向量（SAV）的零样本声事件分类方法，通过同时学习全局特征和局部特征提升分类性能。 Yi-Han Lin,Xunquan Chen,Ryoichi Takashima,Tetsuya Takiguchi cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Youshan Zhang
title: Lung segmentation with NASNet-Large-Decoder Net
title_zh: 使用 NASNet-Large-Decoder Net 进行肺部分割
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2106.12054
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2106.12054
abstract: Lung cancer has emerged as a severe disease that threatens human life and health. The precise segmentation of lung regions is a crucial prerequisite for localizing tumors, which can provide accurate information for lung image analysis. In this work, we first propose a lung image segmentation model using the NASNet-Large as an encoder and then followed by a decoder architecture, which is one of the most commonly used architectures in deep learning for image segmentation. The proposed NASNet-Large-decoder architecture can extract high-level information and expand the feature map to recover the segmentation map. To further improve the segmentation results, we propose a post-processing layer to remove the irrelevant portion of the segmentation map. Experimental results show that an accurate segmentation model with 0.92 dice scores outperforms state-of-the-art performance.
summary: Lung cancer has emerged as a severe disease that threatens human life and health. The precise segmentation of lung regions is a crucial prerequisite for localizing tumors, which can provide accurate information for lung image analysis. In this work, we first propose a lung image segmentation model using the NASNet-Large as an encoder and then followed by a decoder architecture, which is one of the most commonly used architectures in deep learning for image segmentation. The proposed NASNet-Large-decoder architecture can extract high-level information and expand the feature map to recover the segmentation map. To further improve the segmentation results, we propose a post-processing layer to remove the irrelevant portion of the segmentation map. Experimental results show that an accurate segmentation model with 0.92 dice scores outperforms state-of-the-art performance.
abstract_zh: 肺癌已成为威胁人类生命和健康的严重疾病。肺部区域的精确分割是肿瘤定位的重要前提，可以为肺部图像分析提供准确的信息。在这项工作中，我们首先提出使用 NASNet-Large 作为编码器的肺部图像分割模型，然后是解码器架构，这是图像分割深度学习中最常用的架构之一。所提出的 NASNet-Large-decoder 架构可以提取高级信息并扩展特征图以恢复分割图。为了进一步改善分割结果，我们提出了一个后处理层来删除分割图的不相关部分。实验结果表明，骰子得分为 0.92 的准确分割模型优于最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于NASNet-Large编码器和解码器结构的肺部分割模型，旨在提高肺部区域分割的准确性。
AI.motivation: 肺癌威胁人类健康，精确分割肺部区域对肿瘤定位和图像分析至关重要，但现有方法存在分割精度不足的问题。
AI.method: 采用NASNet-Large作为编码器提取高层特征，结合解码器恢复特征图，并引入后处理层去除分割结果中的无关区域。
AI.result: 实验表明，该模型在Dice分数上达到0.92，优于当前最先进的分割方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的NASNet-Large-Decoder模型有效提升了肺部分割精度，为肺部疾病分析提供了可靠的技术支持。

authors_text: Firas Al-Hindawi,Md Mahfuzur Rahman Siddiquee,Teresa Wu,Han Hu,Ying Sun
title: Domain-knowledge Inspired Pseudo Supervision (DIPS) for Unsupervised Image-to-Image Translation Models to Support Cross-Domain Classification
title_zh: 用于无监督图像到图像转换模型的领域知识启发伪监督（DIPS）以支持跨域分类
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2212.09107
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2212.09107
abstract: The ability to classify images is dependent on having access to large labeled datasets and testing on data from the same domain that the model can train on. Classification becomes more challenging when dealing with new data from a different domain, where gathering and especially labeling a larger image dataset for retraining a classification model requires a labor-intensive human effort. Cross-domain classification frameworks were developed to handle this data domain shift problem by utilizing unsupervised image-to-image translation models to translate an input image from the unlabeled domain to the labeled domain. The problem with these unsupervised models lies in their unsupervised nature. For lack of annotations, it is not possible to use the traditional supervised metrics to evaluate these translation models to pick the best-saved checkpoint model. This paper introduces a new method called Domain-knowledge Inspired Pseudo Supervision (DIPS) which utilizes domain-informed Gaussian Mixture Models to generate pseudo annotations to enable the use of traditional supervised metrics. This method was designed specifically to support cross-domain classification applications contrary to other typically used metrics such as the FID which were designed to evaluate the model in terms of the quality of the generated image from a human-eye perspective. DIPS proves its effectiveness by outperforming various GAN evaluation metrics, including FID, when selecting the optimal saved checkpoint model. It is also evaluated against truly supervised metrics. Furthermore, DIPS showcases its robustness and interpretability by demonstrating a strong correlation with truly supervised metrics, highlighting its superiority over existing state-of-the-art alternatives. The code and data to replicate the results can be found on the official Github repository: https://github.com/Hindawi91/DIPS
summary: The ability to classify images is dependent on having access to large labeled datasets and testing on data from the same domain that the model can train on. Classification becomes more challenging when dealing with new data from a different domain, where gathering and especially labeling a larger image dataset for retraining a classification model requires a labor-intensive human effort. Cross-domain classification frameworks were developed to handle this data domain shift problem by utilizing unsupervised image-to-image translation models to translate an input image from the unlabeled domain to the labeled domain. The problem with these unsupervised models lies in their unsupervised nature. For lack of annotations, it is not possible to use the traditional supervised metrics to evaluate these translation models to pick the best-saved checkpoint model. This paper introduces a new method called Domain-knowledge Inspired Pseudo Supervision (DIPS) which utilizes domain-informed Gaussian Mixture Models to generate pseudo annotations to enable the use of traditional supervised metrics. This method was designed specifically to support cross-domain classification applications contrary to other typically used metrics such as the FID which were designed to evaluate the model in terms of the quality of the generated image from a human-eye perspective. DIPS proves its effectiveness by outperforming various GAN evaluation metrics, including FID, when selecting the optimal saved checkpoint model. It is also evaluated against truly supervised metrics. Furthermore, DIPS showcases its robustness and interpretability by demonstrating a strong correlation with truly supervised metrics, highlighting its superiority over existing state-of-the-art alternatives. The code and data to replicate the results can be found on the official Github repository: https://github.com/Hindawi91/DIPS
abstract_zh: 图像分类的能力取决于能否访问大型标记数据集以及对来自模型可以训练的同一域的数据进行测试。当处理来自不同领域的新数据时，分类变得更具挑战性，其中收集并特别标记更大的图像数据集以重新训练分类模型需要劳动密集型的人力。跨域分类框架的开发是为了通过利用无监督的图像到图像转换模型将输入图像从未标记域转换到标记域来处理这种数据域转移问题。这些无监督模型的问题在于它们的无监督性质。由于缺乏注释，不可能使用传统的监督指标来评估这些翻译模型以选择保存最好的检查点模型。本文介绍了一种称为领域知识启发伪监督（DIPS）的新方法，该方法利用领域信息高斯混合模型来生成伪注释，以支持传统监督指标的使用。该方法专门设计用于支持跨域分类应用，这与其他常用指标（例如 FID）相反，FID 旨在从人眼角度评估生成图像的质量。在选择最佳保存的检查点模型时，DIPS 通过优于包括 FID 在内的各种 GAN 评估指标来证明其有效性。它还根据真正受监督的指标进行评估。此外，DIPS 通过展示与真正监督指标的强相关性来展示其稳健性和可解释性，强调其相对于现有最先进替代方案的优越性。复制结果的代码和数据可以在官方 Github 存储库上找到：https://github.com/Hindawi91/DIPS

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为DIPS的方法，利用领域知识生成伪监督信号，以提升无监督图像到图像翻译模型在跨领域分类任务中的性能。
AI.motivation: 跨领域分类面临目标域数据标注成本高的问题，传统无监督翻译模型因缺乏标注无法有效评估，导致难以选择最佳模型检查点。
AI.method: 基于领域知识构建高斯混合模型生成伪标注，通过伪监督信号替代真实标签，使传统监督指标（如分类准确率）可应用于模型评估。
AI.result: DIPS在选择最佳模型检查点时优于FID等生成模型评估指标，并与真实监督指标呈现强相关性，验证了其鲁棒性和有效性。
AI.conclusion: DIPS通过伪监督机制解决了无监督翻译模型评估难题，在跨领域分类任务中展现出优于现有方法的性能。

authors_text: Jianye Yi,Xiaopin Zhong,Weixiang Liu,Wenxuan Zhu,Zongze Wu,Yuanlong Deng
title: Edge-aware Plug-and-play Scheme for Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 用于语义分割的边缘感知即插即用方案
abstract: Semantic segmentation is a classic and fundamental computer vision problem dedicated to assigning each pixel with its corresponding class. Some recent methods introduce edge-based information for improving the segmentation performance. However these methods are specific and limited to certain network architectures, and they can not be transferred to other models or tasks. Therefore, we propose an abstract and universal edge supervision method called Edge-aware Plug-and-play Scheme (EPS), which can be easily and quickly applied to any semantic segmentation models. The core is edge-width/thickness preserving guided for semantic segmentation. The EPS first extracts the Edge Ground Truth (Edge GT) with a predefined edge thickness from the training data; and then for any network architecture, it directly copies the decoder head for the auxiliary task with the Edge GT supervision. To ensure the edge thickness preserving consistantly, we design a new boundarybased loss, called Polar Hausdorff (PH) Loss, for the auxiliary supervision. We verify the effectiveness of our EPS on the Cityscapes dataset using 22 models. The experimental results indicate that the proposed method can be seamlessly integrated into any state-of-the-art (SOTA) models with zero modification, resulting in promising enhancement of the segmentation performance.
summary: Semantic segmentation is a classic and fundamental computer vision problem dedicated to assigning each pixel with its corresponding class. Some recent methods introduce edge-based information for improving the segmentation performance. However these methods are specific and limited to certain network architectures, and they can not be transferred to other models or tasks. Therefore, we propose an abstract and universal edge supervision method called Edge-aware Plug-and-play Scheme (EPS), which can be easily and quickly applied to any semantic segmentation models. The core is edge-width/thickness preserving guided for semantic segmentation. The EPS first extracts the Edge Ground Truth (Edge GT) with a predefined edge thickness from the training data; and then for any network architecture, it directly copies the decoder head for the auxiliary task with the Edge GT supervision. To ensure the edge thickness preserving consistantly, we design a new boundarybased loss, called Polar Hausdorff (PH) Loss, for the auxiliary supervision. We verify the effectiveness of our EPS on the Cityscapes dataset using 22 models. The experimental results indicate that the proposed method can be seamlessly integrated into any state-of-the-art (SOTA) models with zero modification, resulting in promising enhancement of the segmentation performance.
abstract_zh: 语义分割是一个经典且基本的计算机视觉问题，致力于为每个像素分配其相应的类别。最近的一些方法引入了基于边缘的信息来提高分割性能。然而这些方法是特定的并且仅限于某些网络架构，并且不能转移到其他模型或任务。因此，我们提出了一种抽象且通用的边缘监督方法，称为边缘感知即插即用方案（EPS），它可以轻松快速地应用于任何语义分割模型。核心是用于语义分割的边缘宽度/厚度保留引导。 EPS首先从训练数据中提取具有预定义边缘厚度的边缘地面实况（Edge GT）；然后对于任何网络架构，它都会直接复制解码器头以用于具有 Edge GT 监督的辅助任务。为了确保边缘厚度保持一致，我们设计了一种新的基于边界的损失，称为 Polar Hausdorff (PH) 损失，用于辅助监督。我们使用 22 个模型验证了 EPS 在 Cityscapes 数据集上的有效性。实验结果表明，所提出的方法可以零修改地无缝集成到任何最先进的（SOTA）模型中，从而有望提高分割性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通用的边缘感知即插即用方案（EPS），用于提升语义分割模型的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于边缘信息的方法局限于特定网络架构，无法跨模型或任务迁移，缺乏通用性。
AI.method: 通过预定义边缘厚度提取边缘真值（Edge GT），并设计极坐标Hausdorff（PH）损失函数，将边缘监督模块直接嵌入任意分割模型的解码器头部。
AI.result: 在Cityscapes数据集上验证了22种模型，均未修改原模型结构即可提升分割性能。
AI.conclusion: EPS方案实现了跨模型的边缘监督通用化，有效提升了语义分割的边界精度。
