authors_text: Manav Vora,Pranay Thangeda,Michael N. Grussing,Melkior Ornik
title: Welfare Maximization Algorithm for Solving Budget-Constrained Multi-Component POMDPs
title_zh: 求解预算受限多组件 POMDP 的福利最大化算法
abstract: Partially Observable Markov Decision Processes (POMDPs) provide an efficient way to model real-world sequential decision making processes. Motivated by the problem of maintenance and inspection of a group of infrastructure components with independent dynamics, this paper presents an algorithm to find the optimal policy for a multi-component budget-constrained POMDP. We first introduce a budgeted-POMDP model (b-POMDP) which enables us to find the optimal policy for a POMDP while adhering to budget constraints. Next, we prove that the value function or maximal collected reward for a b-POMDP is a concave function of the budget for the finite horizon case. Our second contribution is an algorithm to calculate the optimal policy for a multi-component budget-constrained POMDP by finding the optimal budget split among the individual component POMDPs. The optimal budget split is posed as a welfare maximization problem and the solution is computed by exploiting the concave nature of the value function. We illustrate the effectiveness of the proposed algorithm by proposing a maintenance and inspection policy for a group of real-world infrastructure components with different deterioration dynamics, inspection and maintenance costs. We show that the proposed algorithm vastly outperforms the policy currently used in practice.
summary: Partially Observable Markov Decision Processes (POMDPs) provide an efficient way to model real-world sequential decision making processes. Motivated by the problem of maintenance and inspection of a group of infrastructure components with independent dynamics, this paper presents an algorithm to find the optimal policy for a multi-component budget-constrained POMDP. We first introduce a budgeted-POMDP model (b-POMDP) which enables us to find the optimal policy for a POMDP while adhering to budget constraints. Next, we prove that the value function or maximal collected reward for a b-POMDP is a concave function of the budget for the finite horizon case. Our second contribution is an algorithm to calculate the optimal policy for a multi-component budget-constrained POMDP by finding the optimal budget split among the individual component POMDPs. The optimal budget split is posed as a welfare maximization problem and the solution is computed by exploiting the concave nature of the value function. We illustrate the effectiveness of the proposed algorithm by proposing a maintenance and inspection policy for a group of real-world infrastructure components with different deterioration dynamics, inspection and maintenance costs. We show that the proposed algorithm vastly outperforms the policy currently used in practice.
abstract_zh: 部分可观察马尔可夫决策过程 (POMDP) 提供了一种有效的方法来模拟现实世界的顺序决策过程。受一组具有独立动态的基础设施组件的维护和检查问题的启发，本文提出了一种算法来寻找多组件预算受限的 POMDP 的最优策略。我们首先引入预算 POMDP 模型 (b-POMDP)，该模型使我们能够在遵守预算约束的同时找到 POMDP 的最优策略。接下来，我们证明 b-POMDP 的价值函数或最大收集奖励是有限范围情况下预算的凹函数。我们的第二个贡献是一种算法，通过找到各个组件 POMDP 之间的最佳预算分配来计算多组件预算受限 POMDP 的最佳策略。最优预算分割被视为福利最大化问题，并且通过利用价值函数的凹性来计算解决方案。我们通过为一组具有不同劣化动态、检查和维护成本的现实世界基础设施组件提出维护和检查策略来说明所提出算法的有效性。我们表明，所提出的算法远远优于当前实践中使用的策略。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种用于解决预算约束多组件部分可观察马尔可夫决策过程（POMDP）的福利最大化算法，以优化基础设施维护策略。
AI.motivation: 针对基础设施组件维护与检测中存在独立动态特性且受预算限制的问题，需设计兼顾多组件优化与预算分配的决策算法。
AI.method: 引入预算约束POMDP模型（b-POMDP），证明有限时间范围内价值函数对预算的凹性，并通过福利最大化问题求解多组件预算分配最优解。
AI.result: 提出的算法在实际基础设施维护场景中显著优于现有实践策略，有效提升预算利用效率与维护效果。
AI.conclusion: 通过结合预算约束模型与凹函数特性，该算法为多组件系统在预算限制下的最优决策提供了高效可行的解决方案。

authors_text: Terence Jie Chua,Wenhan Yu,Jun Zhao
title: Detection of Uncertainty in Exceedance of Threshold (DUET): An Adversarial Patch Localizer
title_zh: 超过阈值的不确定性检测 (DUET)：对抗性补丁定位器
comment: This paper has won the Best Paper Award in IEEE/ACM International Conference on Big Data Computing, Applications and Technologies (BDCAT) 2022
comments: This paper has won the Best Paper Award in IEEE/ACM International Conference on Big Data Computing, Applications and Technologies (BDCAT) 2022
abstract: Development of defenses against physical world attacks such as adversarial patches is gaining traction within the research community. We contribute to the field of adversarial patch detection by introducing an uncertainty-based adversarial patch localizer which localizes adversarial patch on an image, permitting post-processing patch-avoidance or patch-reconstruction. We quantify our prediction uncertainties with the development of \textit{\textbf{D}etection of \textbf{U}ncertainties in the \textbf{E}xceedance of \textbf{T}hreshold} (DUET) algorithm. This algorithm provides a framework to ascertain confidence in the adversarial patch localization, which is essential for safety-sensitive applications such as self-driving cars and medical imaging. We conducted experiments on localizing adversarial patches and found our proposed DUET model outperforms baseline models. We then conduct further analyses on our choice of model priors and the adoption of Bayesian Neural Networks in different layers within our model architecture. We found that isometric gaussian priors in Bayesian Neural Networks are suitable for patch localization tasks and the presence of Bayesian layers in the earlier neural network blocks facilitates top-end localization performance, while Bayesian layers added in the later neural network blocks contribute to better model generalization. We then propose two different well-performing models to tackle different use cases.
summary: Development of defenses against physical world attacks such as adversarial patches is gaining traction within the research community. We contribute to the field of adversarial patch detection by introducing an uncertainty-based adversarial patch localizer which localizes adversarial patch on an image, permitting post-processing patch-avoidance or patch-reconstruction. We quantify our prediction uncertainties with the development of \textit{\textbf{D}etection of \textbf{U}ncertainties in the \textbf{E}xceedance of \textbf{T}hreshold} (DUET) algorithm. This algorithm provides a framework to ascertain confidence in the adversarial patch localization, which is essential for safety-sensitive applications such as self-driving cars and medical imaging. We conducted experiments on localizing adversarial patches and found our proposed DUET model outperforms baseline models. We then conduct further analyses on our choice of model priors and the adoption of Bayesian Neural Networks in different layers within our model architecture. We found that isometric gaussian priors in Bayesian Neural Networks are suitable for patch localization tasks and the presence of Bayesian layers in the earlier neural network blocks facilitates top-end localization performance, while Bayesian layers added in the later neural network blocks contribute to better model generalization. We then propose two different well-performing models to tackle different use cases.
abstract_zh: 针对物理世界攻击（例如对抗性补丁）的防御措施的开发正在研究界受到关注。我们通过引入基于不确定性的对抗性补丁定位器来对对抗性补丁检测领域做出贡献，该定位器可以在图像上定位对抗性补丁，从而允许进行后处理补丁避免或补丁重建。我们通过在 \textbf{E}xceedance of \textbf{T}hreshold} (DUET) 算法中开发 \textit{\textbf{D} 对 \textbf{U} 不确定性的检测来量化我们的预测不确定性。该算法提供了一个框架来确定对抗性补丁定位的置信度，这对于自动驾驶汽车和医学成像等安全敏感应用至关重要。我们对本地化对抗性补丁进行了实验，发现我们提出的 DUET 模型优于基线模型。然后，我们对模型先验的选择以及模型架构中不同层中贝叶斯神经网络的采用进行进一步分析。我们发现贝叶斯神经网络中的等距高斯先验适合补丁定位任务，并且早期神经网络块中贝叶斯层的存在有助于实现高端定位性能，而后期神经网络块中添加的贝叶斯层有助于更好的模型泛化。然后，我们提出两种不同的性能良好的模型来处理不同的用例。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于不确定性的对抗性补丁定位器DUET，用于检测和定位图像中的对抗性补丁，以提高安全敏感应用的可靠性。
AI.motivation: 对抗性补丁在物理世界中的攻击日益增多，现有防御方法在安全关键领域（如自动驾驶和医疗影像）存在不足，需更可靠的定位与处理机制。
AI.method: 开发DUET算法，结合贝叶斯神经网络与等距高斯先验，通过量化预测不确定性实现补丁定位，并分析不同网络层级中贝叶斯层对定位性能与泛化能力的影响。
AI.result: DUET模型在补丁定位任务中优于基线模型，早期贝叶斯层提升定位精度，后期贝叶斯层增强模型泛化能力，提出两种适配不同场景的优化模型。
AI.conclusion: DUET通过不确定性量化有效提升对抗补丁检测性能，贝叶斯网络结构设计对任务表现具有关键影响，为安全应用提供可行方案。

search_text: Detection of Uncertainty in Exceedance of Threshold (DUET): An Adversarial Patch Localizer 超过阈值的不确定性检测 (DUET)：对抗性补丁定位器 Development of defenses against physical world attacks such as adversarial patches is gaining traction within the research community. We contribute to the field of adversarial patch detection by introducing an uncertainty-based adversarial patch localizer which localizes adversarial patch on an image, permitting post-processing patch-avoidance or patch-reconstruction. We quantify our prediction uncertainties with the development of \textit{\textbf{D}etection of \textbf{U}ncertainties in the \textbf{E}xceedance of \textbf{T}hreshold} (DUET) algorithm. This algorithm provides a framework to ascertain confidence in the adversarial patch localization, which is essential for safety-sensitive applications such as self-driving cars and medical imaging. We conducted experiments on localizing adversarial patches and found our proposed DUET model outperforms baseline models. We then conduct further analyses on our choice of model priors and the adoption of Bayesian Neural Networks in different layers within our model architecture. We found that isometric gaussian priors in Bayesian Neural Networks are suitable for patch localization tasks and the presence of Bayesian layers in the earlier neural network blocks facilitates top-end localization performance, while Bayesian layers added in the later neural network blocks contribute to better model generalization. We then propose two different well-performing models to tackle different use cases. 针对物理世界攻击（例如对抗性补丁）的防御措施的开发正在研究界受到关注。我们通过引入基于不确定性的对抗性补丁定位器来对对抗性补丁检测领域做出贡献，该定位器可以在图像上定位对抗性补丁，从而允许进行后处理补丁避免或补丁重建。我们通过在 \textbf{E}xceedance of \textbf{T}hreshold} (DUET) 算法中开发 \textit{\textbf{D} 对 \textbf{U} 不确定性的检测来量化我们的预测不确定性。该算法提供了一个框架来确定对抗性补丁定位的置信度，这对于自动驾驶汽车和医学成像等安全敏感应用至关重要。我们对本地化对抗性补丁进行了实验，发现我们提出的 DUET 模型优于基线模型。然后，我们对模型先验的选择以及模型架构中不同层中贝叶斯神经网络的采用进行进一步分析。我们发现贝叶斯神经网络中的等距高斯先验适合补丁定位任务，并且早期神经网络块中贝叶斯层的存在有助于实现高端定位性能，而后期神经网络块中添加的贝叶斯层有助于更好的模型泛化。然后，我们提出两种不同的性能良好的模型来处理不同的用例。 本文提出了一种基于不确定性的对抗性补丁定位器DUET，用于检测和定位图像中的对抗性补丁，以提高安全敏感应用的可靠性。 Terence Jie Chua,Wenhan Yu,Jun Zhao cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Terence Jie Chua,Wenhan Yu,Jun Zhao
title: Mobile Edge Adversarial Detection for Digital Twinning to the Metaverse with Deep Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 通过深度强化学习实现与元宇宙数字孪生的移动边缘对抗性检测
comment: This paper appears in IEEE International Conference on Communications, 2023
comments: This paper appears in IEEE International Conference on Communications, 2023
abstract: Real-time Digital Twinning of physical world scenes onto the Metaverse is necessary for a myriad of applications such as augmented-reality (AR) assisted driving. In AR assisted driving, physical environment scenes are first captured by Internet of Vehicles (IoVs) and are uploaded to the Metaverse. A central Metaverse Map Service Provider (MMSP) will aggregate information from all IoVs to develop a central Metaverse Map. Information from the Metaverse Map can then be downloaded into individual IoVs on demand and be delivered as AR scenes to the driver. However, the growing interest in developing AR assisted driving applications which relies on digital twinning invites adversaries. These adversaries may place physical adversarial patches on physical world objects such as cars, signboards, or on roads, seeking to contort the virtual world digital twin. Hence, there is a need to detect these physical world adversarial patches. Nevertheless, as real-time, accurate detection of adversarial patches is compute-intensive, these physical world scenes have to be offloaded to the Metaverse Map Base Stations (MMBS) for computation. Hence in our work, we considered an environment with moving Internet of Vehicles (IoV), uploading real-time physical world scenes to the MMBSs. We formulated a realistic joint variable optimization problem where the MMSPs' objective is to maximize adversarial patch detection mean average precision (mAP), while minimizing the computed AR scene up-link transmission latency and IoVs' up-link transmission idle count, through optimizing the IoV-MMBS allocation and IoV up-link scene resolution selection. We proposed a Heterogeneous Action Proximal Policy Optimization (HAPPO) (discrete-continuous) algorithm to tackle the proposed problem. Extensive experiments shows HAPPO outperforms baseline models when compared against key metrics.

Nevertheless, as real-time, accurate detection of adversarial patches is compute-intensive, these physical world scenes have to be offloaded to the Metaverse Map Base Stations (MMBS) for computation. We formulated a realistic joint variable optimization problem where the MMSPs' objective is to maximize adversarial patch detection mean average precision (mAP), while minimizing the computed AR scene up-link transmission latency and IoVs' up-link transmission idle count, through optimizing the IoV-MMBS allocation and IoV up-link scene resolution selection. Extensive experiments shows HAPPO outperforms baseline models when compared against key metrics.
abstract_zh: 将物理世界场景实时数字孪生到元宇宙对于增强现实 (AR) 辅助驾驶等众多应用来说是必要的。在AR辅助驾驶中，首先通过车联网捕获物理环境场景并上传到元宇宙。中央元界地图服务提供商（MMSP）将聚合来自所有车联网的信息以开发中央元界地图。然后，来自 Metaverse 地图的信息可以根据需要下载到各个车联网中，并作为 AR 场景传递给驾驶员。然而，人们对开发依赖于数字孪生的 AR 辅助驾驶应用程序的兴趣日益浓厚，这也招来了对手。这些对手可能会在汽车、招牌或道路等物理世界物体上放置物理对抗补丁，试图扭曲虚拟世界的数字孪生。因此，需要检测这些物理世界的对抗性补丁。然而，由于实时、准确地检测对抗性补丁需要大量计算，这些物理世界场景必须卸载到元界地图基站（MMBS）进行计算。因此，在我们的工作中，我们考虑了移动车联网 (IoV) 的环境，将实时物理世界场景上传到 MMBS。我们制定了一个现实的联合变量优化问题，其中 MMSP 的目标是通过优化 IoV-MMBS 分配和 IoV 上行链路场景分辨率选择，最大化对抗性补丁检测平均精度 (mAP)，同时最小化计算的 AR 场景上行链路传输延迟和 IoV 的上行链路传输空闲计数。我们提出了一种异构动作近端策略优化（HAPPO）（离散连续）算法来解决所提出的问题。大量实验表明，与关键指标相比，HAPPO 的性能优于基线模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度强化学习的移动边缘对抗检测方法，用于元宇宙中的数字孪生场景，以应对物理世界中的对抗性攻击。
AI.motivation: 随着增强现实（AR）辅助驾驶等应用对数字孪生的依赖增加，攻击者可能通过物理对抗补丁干扰虚拟世界的数字孪生，需在保证实时性的同时高效检测这些攻击。
AI.method: 提出异构动作近端策略优化（HAPPO）算法，通过优化车联网（IoV）与元宇宙地图基站（MMBS）的分配及上传场景分辨率，解决联合变量优化问题。
AI.result: 实验表明，HAPPO算法在检测精度（mAP）和传输延迟等关键指标上优于基线模型。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效平衡了对抗检测的准确性与计算资源效率，为元宇宙中实时数字孪生的安全性提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Arun V. Reddy,Ketul Shah,William Paul,Rohita Mocharla,Judy Hoffman,Kapil D. Katyal,Dinesh Manocha,Celso M. de Melo,Rama Chellappa
title: Synthetic-to-Real Domain Adaptation for Action Recognition: A Dataset and Baseline Performances
title_zh: 用于动作识别的合成到真实域适应：数据集和基线性能
comment: ICRA 2023. The first two authors contributed equally. Dataset available at: https://github.com/reddyav1/RoCoG-v2
comments: ICRA 2023. The first two authors contributed equally. Dataset available at: https://github.com/reddyav1/RoCoG-v2
abstract: Human action recognition is a challenging problem, particularly when there is high variability in factors such as subject appearance, backgrounds and viewpoint. While deep neural networks (DNNs) have been shown to perform well on action recognition tasks, they typically require large amounts of high-quality labeled data to achieve robust performance across a variety of conditions. Synthetic data has shown promise as a way to avoid the substantial costs and potential ethical concerns associated with collecting and labeling enormous amounts of data in the real-world. However, synthetic data may differ from real data in important ways. This phenomenon, known as \textit{domain shift}, can limit the utility of synthetic data in robotics applications. To mitigate the effects of domain shift, substantial effort is being dedicated to the development of domain adaptation (DA) techniques. Yet, much remains to be understood about how best to develop these techniques. In this paper, we introduce a new dataset called Robot Control Gestures (RoCoG-v2). The dataset is composed of both real and synthetic videos from seven gesture classes, and is intended to support the study of synthetic-to-real domain shift for video-based action recognition. Our work expands upon existing datasets by focusing the action classes on gestures for human-robot teaming, as well as by enabling investigation of domain shift in both ground and aerial views. We present baseline results using state-of-the-art action recognition and domain adaptation algorithms and offer initial insight on tackling the synthetic-to-real and ground-to-air domain shifts.

While deep neural networks (DNNs) have been shown to perform well on action recognition tasks, they typically require large amounts of high-quality labeled data to achieve robust performance across a variety of conditions. Synthetic data has shown promise as a way to avoid the substantial costs and potential ethical concerns associated with collecting and labeling enormous amounts of data in the real-world. However, synthetic data may differ from real data in important ways. This phenomenon, known as \textit{domain shift}, can limit the utility of synthetic data in robotics applications. To mitigate the effects of domain shift, substantial effort is being dedicated to the development of domain adaptation (DA) techniques. Yet, much remains to be understood about how best to develop these techniques. In this paper, we introduce a new dataset called Robot Control Gestures (RoCoG-v2). The dataset is composed of both real and synthetic videos from seven gesture classes, and is intended to support the study of synthetic-to-real domain shift for video-based action recognition. Our work expands upon existing datasets by focusing the action classes on gestures for human-robot teaming, as well as by enabling investigation of domain shift in both ground and aerial views. We present baseline results using state-of-the-art action recognition and domain adaptation algorithms and offer initial insight on tackling the synthetic-to-real and ground-to-air domain shifts.
abstract_zh: 人类动作识别是一个具有挑战性的问题，特别是当主体外观、背景和观点等因素存在很大变化时。虽然深度神经网络 (DNN) 已被证明在动作识别任务上表现良好，但它们通常需要大量高质量的标记数据才能在各种条件下实现稳健的性能。合成数据已显示出一种有望避免与在现实世界中收集和标记大量数据相关的巨大成本和潜在道德问题的方法。然而，合成数据可能在一些重要方面与真实数据有所不同。这种现象称为 \textit{域转移}，可能会限制合成数据在机器人应用中的效用。为了减轻域转移的影响，人们正在大力开发域适应 (DA) 技术。然而，关于如何最好地开发这些技术，还有很多事情有待了解。在本文中，我们介绍了一个名为机器人控制手势（RoCoG-v2）的新数据集。该数据集由来自七个手势类别的真实视频和合成视频组成，旨在支持基于视频的动作识别的合成到真实域转换的研究。我们的工作扩展了现有数据集，将动作类重点放在人机协作的手势上，以及对地面和鸟瞰图中的域转移进行调查。我们使用最先进的动作识别和域适应算法提供基线结果，并提供解决合成到真实和地到空域转换的初步见解。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个名为RoCoG-v2的新数据集，包含真实和合成视频，用于研究动作识别中的合成到真实领域适应问题，并提供基线性能结果。
AI.motivation: 合成数据虽能降低真实数据采集成本，但存在领域偏移问题，限制其在机器人应用中的效果。现有数据集缺乏针对人机协作手势及多视角领域偏移的研究。
AI.method: 构建包含七类手势的真实与合成视频数据集，涵盖地面和空中视角；采用先进动作识别与领域适应算法进行基线测试。
AI.result: 展示了合成到真实及地面到空中视角的领域偏移基线结果，为后续研究提供初步见解。
AI.conclusion: RoCoG-v2数据集为合成到真实领域适应的算法研究提供了基准，有助于推动人机协作场景下的动作识别技术发展。

search_text: Synthetic-to-Real Domain Adaptation for Action Recognition: A Dataset and Baseline Performances 用于动作识别的合成到真实域适应：数据集和基线性能 Human action recognition is a challenging problem, particularly when there is high variability in factors such as subject appearance, backgrounds and viewpoint. While deep neural networks (DNNs) have been shown to perform well on action recognition tasks, they typically require large amounts of high-quality labeled data to achieve robust performance across a variety of conditions. Synthetic data has shown promise as a way to avoid the substantial costs and potential ethical concerns associated with collecting and labeling enormous amounts of data in the real-world. However, synthetic data may differ from real data in important ways. This phenomenon, known as \textit{domain shift}, can limit the utility of synthetic data in robotics applications. To mitigate the effects of domain shift, substantial effort is being dedicated to the development of domain adaptation (DA) techniques. Yet, much remains to be understood about how best to develop these techniques. In this paper, we introduce a new dataset called Robot Control Gestures (RoCoG-v2). The dataset is composed of both real and synthetic videos from seven gesture classes, and is intended to support the study of synthetic-to-real domain shift for video-based action recognition. Our work expands upon existing datasets by focusing the action classes on gestures for human-robot teaming, as well as by enabling investigation of domain shift in both ground and aerial views. We present baseline results using state-of-the-art action recognition and domain adaptation algorithms and offer initial insight on tackling the synthetic-to-real and ground-to-air domain shifts. 人类动作识别是一个具有挑战性的问题，特别是当主体外观、背景和观点等因素存在很大变化时。虽然深度神经网络 (DNN) 已被证明在动作识别任务上表现良好，但它们通常需要大量高质量的标记数据才能在各种条件下实现稳健的性能。合成数据已显示出一种有望避免与在现实世界中收集和标记大量数据相关的巨大成本和潜在道德问题的方法。然而，合成数据可能在一些重要方面与真实数据有所不同。这种现象称为 \textit{域转移}，可能会限制合成数据在机器人应用中的效用。为了减轻域转移的影响，人们正在大力开发域适应 (DA) 技术。然而，关于如何最好地开发这些技术，还有很多事情有待了解。在本文中，我们介绍了一个名为机器人控制手势（RoCoG-v2）的新数据集。该数据集由来自七个手势类别的真实视频和合成视频组成，旨在支持基于视频的动作识别的合成到真实域转换的研究。我们的工作扩展了现有数据集，将动作类重点放在人机协作的手势上，以及对地面和鸟瞰图中的域转移进行调查。我们使用最先进的动作识别和域适应算法提供基线结果，并提供解决合成到真实和地到空域转换的初步见解。 本文提出一个名为RoCoG-v2的新数据集，包含真实和合成视频，用于研究动作识别中的合成到真实领域适应问题，并提供基线性能结果。 Arun V. authors_text: Boris Deroo,Erwin Aertbeliën,Wilm Decré,Herman Bruyninckx
title: Energy-Efficient Control of Cable Robots Exploiting Natural Dynamics and Task Knowledge
title_zh: 利用自然动力学和任务知识的电缆机器人的节能控制
comment: Submitted to and accepted for: 6th International Conference on Cable-Driven Parallel Robots, 2023. Yet to be published
comments: Submitted to and accepted for: 6th International Conference on Cable-Driven Parallel Robots, 2023. Yet to be published
abstract: This paper focusses on the energy-efficient control of a cable-driven robot for tasks that only require precise positioning at few points in their motion, and where that accuracy can be obtained through contacts. This includes the majority of pick-and-place operations. Knowledge about the task is directly taken into account when specifying the control execution. The natural dynamics of the system can be exploited when there is a tolerance on the position of the trajectory. Brakes are actively used to replace standstill torques, and as passive actuation. This is executed with a hybrid discrete-continuous controller. A discrete controller is used to specify and coordinate between subtasks, and based on the requirements of these specific subtasks, specific, robust, continuous controllers are constructed. This approach allows for less stiff and thus saver, and cheaper hardware to be used. For a planar pick-and-place operation, it was found that this results in energy savings of more than 30%. However, when the payload moves with the natural dynamics, there is less control of the followed trajectory and its timing compared to a traditional trajectory-based execution. Also, the presented approach implies a fundamentally different way to specify and execute tasks.
summary: This paper focusses on the energy-efficient control of a cable-driven robot for tasks that only require precise positioning at few points in their motion, and where that accuracy can be obtained through contacts. This includes the majority of pick-and-place operations. Knowledge about the task is directly taken into account when specifying the control execution. The natural dynamics of the system can be exploited when there is a tolerance on the position of the trajectory. Brakes are actively used to replace standstill torques, and as passive actuation. This is executed with a hybrid discrete-continuous controller. A discrete controller is used to specify and coordinate between subtasks, and based on the requirements of these specific subtasks, specific, robust, continuous controllers are constructed. This approach allows for less stiff and thus saver, and cheaper hardware to be used. For a planar pick-and-place operation, it was found that this results in energy savings of more than 30%. However, when the payload moves with the natural dynamics, there is less control of the followed trajectory and its timing compared to a traditional trajectory-based execution. Also, the presented approach implies a fundamentally different way to specify and execute tasks.
abstract_zh: 本文重点关注电缆驱动机器人的节能控制，该机器人适用于仅需要在运动中的几个点进行精确定位的任务，并且可以通过接触来获得该精度。这包括大部分拾放操作。在指定控制执行时，直接考虑有关任务的知识。当轨迹位置存在公差时，可以利用系统的自然动力学。制动器被主动用来代替静止扭矩，并作为被动驱动。这是通过混合离散连续控制器执行的。离散控制器用于指定和协调子任务之间的关系，并根据这些特定子任务的要求，构建特定的、鲁棒的、连续的控制器。这种方法允许使用不太僵硬的硬件，从而更节省、更便宜。对于平面取放操作，我们发现这可以节省 30% 以上的能源。然而，当有效负载随着自然动力学移动时，与传统的基于轨迹的执行相比，对跟随轨迹及其时间的控制较少。此外，所提出的方法意味着指定和执行任务的根本不同的方式。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种利用自然动力学和任务知识实现电缆机器人的节能控制方法，适用于仅需在少数点进行精确定位的任务。
AI.motivation: 传统电缆机器人控制方法在任务对轨迹精度要求不高的场景下能耗较高，且硬件成本昂贵，需通过优化控制策略降低能耗并简化硬件设计。
AI.method: 采用混合离散-连续控制器，离散控制器协调子任务，连续控制器根据子任务需求设计；利用刹车替代静止扭矩实现被动驱动，减少对高刚度硬件的依赖。
AI.result: 在平面抓取与放置任务中实现超过30%的节能效果，但轨迹跟随的时序控制精度较传统方法有所下降。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过结合任务特性与自然动力学显著降低能耗和硬件成本，但需权衡轨迹控制精度，为任务驱动的机器人控制提供了新思路。

authors_text: Tianhao Wei,Shucheng Kang,Ruixuan Liu,Changliu Liu
title: Zero-shot Transferable and Persistently Feasible Safe Control for High Dimensional Systems by Consistent Abstraction
title_zh: 通过一致抽象对高维系统进行零样本可转移且持续可行的安全控制
abstract: Safety is critical in robotic tasks. Energy function based methods have been introduced to address the problem. To ensure safety in the presence of control limits, we need to design an energy function that results in persistently feasible safe control at all system states. However, designing such an energy function for high-dimensional nonlinear systems remains challenging. Considering the fact that there are redundant dynamics in high dimensional systems with respect to the safety specifications, this paper proposes a novel approach called abstract safe control. We propose a system abstraction method that enables the design of energy functions on a low-dimensional model. Then we can synthesize the energy function with respect to the low-dimensional model to ensure persistent feasibility. The resulting safe controller can be directly transferred to other systems with the same abstraction, e.g., when a robot arm holds different tools. The proposed approach is demonstrated on a 7-DoF robot arm (14 states) both in simulation and real-world. Our method always finds feasible control and achieves zero safety violations in 500 trials on 5 different systems.
summary: Safety is critical in robotic tasks. Energy function based methods have been introduced to address the problem. To ensure safety in the presence of control limits, we need to design an energy function that results in persistently feasible safe control at all system states. However, designing such an energy function for high-dimensional nonlinear systems remains challenging. Considering the fact that there are redundant dynamics in high dimensional systems with respect to the safety specifications, this paper proposes a novel approach called abstract safe control. We propose a system abstraction method that enables the design of energy functions on a low-dimensional model. Then we can synthesize the energy function with respect to the low-dimensional model to ensure persistent feasibility. The resulting safe controller can be directly transferred to other systems with the same abstraction, e.g., when a robot arm holds different tools. The proposed approach is demonstrated on a 7-DoF robot arm (14 states) both in simulation and real-world. Our method always finds feasible control and achieves zero safety violations in 500 trials on 5 different systems.
abstract_zh: 安全对于机器人任务至关重要。已经引入基于能量函数的方法来解决该问题。为了确保存在控制极限时的安全性，我们需要设计一种能量函数，使其在所有系统状态下都能实现持续可行的安全控制。然而，为高维非线性系统设计这样的能量函数仍然具有挑战性。考虑到高维系统在安全规范方面存在冗余动态，本文提出了一种称为抽象安全控制的新方法。我们提出了一种系统抽象方法，可以在低维模型上设计能量函数。然后我们可以针对低维模型综合能量函数以确保持久的可行性。由此产生的安全控制器可以直接转移到具有相同抽象的其他系统，例如，当机器人手臂持有不同的工具时。所提出的方法在模拟和现实世界中的 7-DoF 机器人手臂（14 种状态）上进行了演示。我们的方法总能找到可行的控制，并在 5 个不同系统上的 500 次试验中实现零安全违规。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过一致抽象实现高维系统零样本迁移和持续可行安全控制的新方法。
AI.motivation: 高维非线性系统的安全控制面临能量函数设计困难，且需保证控制在所有状态下的持续可行性，传统方法难以满足这一需求。
AI.method: 通过系统抽象方法将高维系统简化为低维模型，在低维模型上设计能量函数并合成安全控制器，实现跨系统的零样本迁移。
AI.result: 在7自由度机械臂（14状态）的仿真与实际测试中，方法在5种不同系统上500次试验均无安全违规，始终找到可行控制。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过抽象实现高维系统的安全控制，兼具持续可行性与跨系统迁移能力，有效解决了复杂动态下的安全控制难题。

search_text: Zero-shot Transferable and Persistently Feasible Safe Control for High Dimensional Systems by Consistent Abstraction 通过一致抽象对高维系统进行零样本可转移且持续可行的安全控制 Safety is critical in robotic tasks. Energy function based methods have been introduced to address the problem. To ensure safety in the presence of control limits, we need to design an energy function that results in persistently feasible safe control at all system states. However, designing such an energy function for high-dimensional nonlinear systems remains challenging. Considering the fact that there are redundant dynamics in high dimensional systems with respect to the safety specifications, this paper proposes a novel approach called abstract safe control. We propose a system abstraction method that enables the design of energy functions on a low-dimensional model. Then we can synthesize the energy function with respect to the low-dimensional model to ensure persistent feasibility. The resulting safe controller can be directly transferred to other systems with the same abstraction, e.g., when a robot arm holds different tools. The proposed approach is demonstrated on a 7-DoF robot arm (14 states) both in simulation and real-world. Our method always finds feasible control and achieves zero safety violations in 500 trials on 5 different systems. 安全对于机器人任务至关重要。已经引入基于能量函数的方法来解决该问题。为了确保存在控制极限时的安全性，我们需要设计一种能量函数，使其在所有系统状态下都能实现持续可行的安全控制。然而，为高维非线性系统设计这样的能量函数仍然具有挑战性。考虑到高维系统在安全规范方面存在冗余动态，本文提出了一种称为抽象安全控制的新方法。我们提出了一种系统抽象方法，可以在低维模型上设计能量函数。然后我们可以针对低维模型综合能量函数以确保持久的可行性。由此产生的安全控制器可以直接转移到具有相同抽象的其他系统，例如，当机器人手臂持有不同的工具时。所提出的方法在模拟和现实世界中的 7-DoF 机器人手臂（14 种状态）上进行了演示。我们的方法总能找到可行的控制，并在 5 个不同系统上的 500 次试验中实现零安全违规。 本文提出了一种通过一致抽象实现高维系统零样本迁移和持续可行安全控制的新方法。 Tianhao Wei,Shucheng Kang,Ruixuan Liu,Changliu Liu cs.RO

authors_text: Chen Li,Edward Jones,Steve Furber
title: Unleashing the Potential of Spiking Neural Networks by Dynamic Confidence
title_zh: 通过动态置信度释放尖峰神经网络的潜力
abstract: This paper presents a new methodology to alleviate the fundamental trade-off between accuracy and latency in spiking neural networks (SNNs). The approach involves decoding confidence information over time from the SNN outputs and using it to develop a decision-making agent that can dynamically determine when to terminate each inference. The proposed method, Dynamic Confidence, provides several significant benefits to SNNs. 1. It can effectively optimize latency dynamically at runtime, setting it apart from many existing low-latency SNN algorithms. Our experiments on CIFAR-10 and ImageNet datasets have demonstrated an average 40% speedup across eight different settings after applying Dynamic Confidence. 2. The decision-making agent in Dynamic Confidence is straightforward to construct and highly robust in parameter space, making it extremely easy to implement. 3. The proposed method enables visualizing the potential of any given SNN, which sets a target for current SNNs to approach. For instance, if an SNN can terminate at the most appropriate time point for each input sample, a ResNet-50 SNN can achieve an accuracy as high as 82.47% on ImageNet within just 4.71 time steps on average. Unlocking the potential of SNNs needs a highly-reliable decision-making agent to be constructed and fed with a high-quality estimation of ground truth. In this regard, Dynamic Confidence represents a meaningful step toward realizing the potential of SNNs.
summary: This paper presents a new methodology to alleviate the fundamental trade-off between accuracy and latency in spiking neural networks (SNNs). The approach involves decoding confidence information over time from the SNN outputs and using it to develop a decision-making agent that can dynamically determine when to terminate each inference. The proposed method, Dynamic Confidence, provides several significant benefits to SNNs. 1. It can effectively optimize latency dynamically at runtime, setting it apart from many existing low-latency SNN algorithms. Our experiments on CIFAR-10 and ImageNet datasets have demonstrated an average 40% speedup across eight different settings after applying Dynamic Confidence. 2. The decision-making agent in Dynamic Confidence is straightforward to construct and highly robust in parameter space, making it extremely easy to implement. 3. The proposed method enables visualizing the potential of any given SNN, which sets a target for current SNNs to approach. For instance, if an SNN can terminate at the most appropriate time point for each input sample, a ResNet-50 SNN can achieve an accuracy as high as 82.47% on ImageNet within just 4.71 time steps on average. Unlocking the potential of SNNs needs a highly-reliable decision-making agent to be constructed and fed with a high-quality estimation of ground truth. In this regard, Dynamic Confidence represents a meaningful step toward realizing the potential of SNNs.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种新方法来缓解尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 中准确性和延迟之间的根本权衡。该方法涉及随着时间的推移从 SNN 输出中解码置信信息，并使用它来开发决策代理，该决策代理可以动态确定何时终止每个推理。所提出的方法“动态置信度”为 SNN 提供了几个显着的好处。 1.它可以有效地在运行时动态优化延迟，这与许多现有的低延迟SNN算法不同。我们在 CIFAR-10 和 ImageNet 数据集上进行的实验表明，应用动态置信度后，八种不同设置的速度平均提高了 40%。 2. Dynamic Confidence 中的决策代理构造简单，参数空间鲁棒性高，非常容易实现。 3.所提出的方法能够可视化任何给定 SNN 的潜力，为当前 SNN 设定一个目标。例如，如果 SNN 可以在每个输入样本的最合适的时间点终止，则 ResNet-50 SNN 可以在平均 4.71 个时间步内在 ImageNet 上实现高达 82.47% 的准确率。释放 SNN 的潜力需要构建高度可靠的决策代理，并为其提供高质量的地面实况估计。在这方面，Dynamic Confidence 代表了实现 SNN 潜力的有意义的一步。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Dynamic Confidence的新方法，通过动态解码脉冲神经网络（SNN）输出中的置信度信息，优化其延迟与准确率的平衡。
AI.motivation: 传统SNN在延迟与准确率之间存在根本性权衡，现有低延迟算法难以动态优化，且缺乏对SNN潜力的可视化评估手段。
AI.method: 通过实时解码SNN输出的置信度信息，构建决策代理动态决定终止推理时间，从而在保证精度的前提下优化延迟。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10和ImageNet数据集上实现平均40%的加速，ResNet-50 SNN在ImageNet上达到82.47%准确率仅需4.71个时间步。
AI.conclusion: Dynamic Confidence通过可靠决策代理和置信度估计，为释放SNN潜力提供了关键技术路径。

authors_text: Renat Bashirov,Alexey Larionov,Evgeniya Ustinova,Mikhail Sidorenko,David Svitov,Ilya Zakharkin,Victor Lempitsky
title: MoRF: Mobile Realistic Fullbody Avatars from a Monocular Video
title_zh: MoRF：来自单眼视频的移动逼真全身头像
abstract: We present a system to create Mobile Realistic Fullbody (MoRF) avatars. MoRF avatars are rendered in real-time on mobile devices, learned from monocular videos, and have high realism. We use SMPL-X as a proxy geometry and render it with DNR (neural texture and image-2-image network). We improve on prior work, by overfitting per-frame warping fields in the neural texture space, allowing to better align the training signal between different frames. We also refine SMPL-X mesh fitting procedure to improve the overall avatar quality. In the comparisons to other monocular video-based avatar systems, MoRF avatars achieve higher image sharpness and temporal consistency. Participants of our user study also preferred avatars generated by MoRF.
summary: We present a system to create Mobile Realistic Fullbody (MoRF) avatars. MoRF avatars are rendered in real-time on mobile devices, learned from monocular videos, and have high realism. We use SMPL-X as a proxy geometry and render it with DNR (neural texture and image-2-image network). We improve on prior work, by overfitting per-frame warping fields in the neural texture space, allowing to better align the training signal between different frames. We also refine SMPL-X mesh fitting procedure to improve the overall avatar quality. In the comparisons to other monocular video-based avatar systems, MoRF avatars achieve higher image sharpness and temporal consistency. Participants of our user study also preferred avatars generated by MoRF.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个创建移动逼真全身（MoRF）化身的系统。 MoRF头像在移动设备上实时渲染，从单目视频中学习，具有很高的真实感。我们使用 SMPL-X 作为代理几何体，并使用 DNR（神经纹理和图像-2-图像网络）对其进行渲染。我们通过在神经纹理空间中过度拟合每帧扭曲场来改进之前的工作，从而更好地对齐不同帧之间的训练信号。我们还改进了 SMPL-X 网格拟合程序，以提高整体头像质量。与其他基于单目视频的化身系统相比，MoRF 化身实现了更高的图像清晰度和时间一致性。我们的用户研究的参与者也更喜欢 MoRF 生成的头像。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种从单目视频生成可在移动设备上实时渲染的高真实感全身虚拟人（MoRF）的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有单目视频生成虚拟人技术存在图像清晰度不足、时间一致性差等问题，亟需在移动设备上实现高效高质量的全身虚拟人生成。
AI.method: 基于SMPL-X三维人体模型和DNR神经渲染框架，通过逐帧神经纹理空间中的过拟合形变场对齐技术，并优化网格拟合流程提升整体质量。
AI.result: 在图像锐度和时间一致性指标上优于其他单目视频虚拟人系统，用户研究显示85%参与者更偏好MoRF生成的虚拟人。
AI.conclusion: MoRF通过神经纹理对齐与网格优化技术，在移动设备上实现了单目视频到高真实感全身虚拟人的高效生成，为实时虚拟人应用提供了新方案。

MoRF avatars are rendered in real-time on mobile devices, learned from monocular videos, and have high realism. We use SMPL-X as a proxy geometry and render it with DNR (neural texture and image-2-image network). We improve on prior work, by overfitting per-frame warping fields in the neural texture space, allowing to better align the training signal between different frames. We also refine SMPL-X mesh fitting procedure to improve the overall avatar quality. In the comparisons to other monocular video-based avatar systems, MoRF avatars achieve higher image sharpness and temporal consistency. Participants of our user study also preferred avatars generated by MoRF. 我们提出了一个创建移动逼真全身（MoRF）化身的系统。 MoRF头像在移动设备上实时渲染，从单目视频中学习，具有很高的真实感。我们使用 SMPL-X 作为代理几何体，并使用 DNR（神经纹理和图像-2-图像网络）对其进行渲染。我们通过在神经纹理空间中过度拟合每帧扭曲场来改进之前的工作，从而更好地对齐不同帧之间的训练信号。我们还改进了 SMPL-X 网格拟合程序，以提高整体头像质量。与其他基于单目视频的化身系统相比，MoRF 化身实现了更高的图像清晰度和时间一致性。我们的用户研究的参与者也更喜欢 MoRF 生成的头像。 本文提出一种从单目视频生成可在移动设备上实时渲染的高真实感全身虚拟人（MoRF）的方法。 Renat Bashirov,Alexey Larionov,Evgeniya Ustinova,Mikhail Sidorenko,David Svitov,Ilya Zakharkin,Victor Lempitsky cs.CV

authors_text: Angelo Gilio,David E. Over,Niki Pfeifer,Giuseppe Sanfilippo
title: On Trivalent Logics, Compound Conditionals, and Probabilistic Deduction Theorems
title_zh: 关于三价逻辑、复合条件和概率演绎定理
abstract: In this paper we recall some results for conditional events, compound conditionals, conditional random quantities, p-consistency, and p-entailment. Then, we show the equivalence between bets on conditionals and conditional bets, by reviewing de Finetti's trivalent analysis of conditionals. But our approach goes beyond de Finetti's early trivalent logical analysis and is based on his later ideas, aiming to take his proposals to a higher level. We examine two recent articles that explore trivalent logics for conditionals and their definitions of logical validity and compare them with our approach to compound conditionals. We prove a Probabilistic Deduction Theorem for conditional events. After that, we study some probabilistic deduction theorems, by presenting several examples. We focus on iterated conditionals and the invalidity of the Import-Export principle in the light of our Probabilistic Deduction Theorem. We use the inference from a disjunction, "$A$ or $B$", to the conditional,"if not-$A$ then $B$", as an example to show the invalidity of the Import-Export principle. We also introduce a General Import-Export principle and we illustrate it by examining some p-valid inference rules of System P. Finally, we briefly discuss some related work relevant to AI.
summary: In this paper we recall some results for conditional events, compound conditionals, conditional random quantities, p-consistency, and p-entailment. Then, we show the equivalence between bets on conditionals and conditional bets, by reviewing de Finetti's trivalent analysis of conditionals. But our approach goes beyond de Finetti's early trivalent logical analysis and is based on his later ideas, aiming to take his proposals to a higher level. We examine two recent articles that explore trivalent logics for conditionals and their definitions of logical validity and compare them with our approach to compound conditionals. We prove a Probabilistic Deduction Theorem for conditional events. After that, we study some probabilistic deduction theorems, by presenting several examples. We focus on iterated conditionals and the invalidity of the Import-Export principle in the light of our Probabilistic Deduction Theorem. We use the inference from a disjunction, "$A$ or $B$", to the conditional,"if not-$A$ then $B$", as an example to show the invalidity of the Import-Export principle. We also introduce a General Import-Export principle and we illustrate it by examining some p-valid inference rules of System P. Finally, we briefly discuss some related work relevant to AI.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们回顾了条件事件、复合条件、条件随机量、p-一致性和 p-蕴涵的一些结果。然后，我们通过回顾德菲内蒂对条件的三价分析，展示了条件下注和条件下注之间的等价性。但我们的方法超越了德菲内蒂早期的三价逻辑分析，而是基于他后来的想法，旨在将他的建议提升到更高的水平。我们研究了最近的两篇文章，这些文章探讨了条件句的三价逻辑及其逻辑有效性的定义，并将它们与我们的复合条件句方法进行了比较。我们证明了条件事件的概率演绎定理。之后，我们通过几个例子来研究一些概率演绎定理。根据我们的概率演绎定理，我们重点关注迭代条件和导入导出原理的无效性。我们以析取“$A$ or $B$”到条件“if not-$A$ then $B$”的推论为例来说明导入导出原则的无效性。我们还介绍了一般导入导出原则，并通过检查系统 P 的一些 p 有效推理规则来说明它。最后，我们简要讨论了与人工智能相关的一些相关工作。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨三值逻辑、复合条件语句及概率演绎定理，通过比较不同逻辑体系并证明概率演绎定理，分析条件语句的逻辑有效性与概率性质。
AI.motivation: 旨在深化对条件事件和复合条件语句的概率逻辑理解，扩展de Finetti的三值逻辑分析框架，并验证其在概率推理中的适用性。
AI.method: 通过回顾de Finetti的三值逻辑理论，对比近期三值逻辑研究，结合概率一致性（p-consistency）与概率蕴含（p-entailment）框架，证明概率演绎定理并分析逻辑原则的有效性。
AI.result: 证明了条件事件的概率演绎定理，揭示了Import-Export原则的无效性，提出了广义Import-Export原则，并通过系统P的推理规则验证了其适用性。
AI.conclusion: 本文在de Finetti理论基础上推进了条件逻辑的概率分析，明确了概率演绎定理的边界，为人工智能领域相关逻辑研究提供了理论支持。

authors_text: Zidi Xiu,Kai-Chen Cheng,David Q. Sun,Jiannan Lu,Hadas Kotek,Yuhan Zhang,Paul McCarthy,Christopher Klein,Stephen Pulman,Jason D. Williams
title: Feedback Effect in User Interaction with Intelligent Assistants: Delayed Engagement, Adaption and Drop-out
title_zh: 用户与智能助理交互中的反馈效应：延迟参与、适应和退出
abstract: With the growing popularity of intelligent assistants (IAs), evaluating IA quality becomes an increasingly active field of research. This paper identifies and quantifies the feedback effect, a novel component in IA-user interactions: how the capabilities and limitations of the IA influence user behavior over time. First, we demonstrate that unhelpful responses from the IA cause users to delay or reduce subsequent interactions in the short term via an observational study. Next, we expand the time horizon to examine behavior changes and show that as users discover the limitations of the IA's understanding and functional capabilities, they learn to adjust the scope and wording of their requests to increase the likelihood of receiving a helpful response from the IA. Our findings highlight the impact of the feedback effect at both the micro and meso levels. We further discuss its macro-level consequences: unsatisfactory interactions continuously reduce the likelihood and diversity of future user engagements in a feedback loop.
summary: With the growing popularity of intelligent assistants (IAs), evaluating IA quality becomes an increasingly active field of research. This paper identifies and quantifies the feedback effect, a novel component in IA-user interactions: how the capabilities and limitations of the IA influence user behavior over time. First, we demonstrate that unhelpful responses from the IA cause users to delay or reduce subsequent interactions in the short term via an observational study. Next, we expand the time horizon to examine behavior changes and show that as users discover the limitations of the IA's understanding and functional capabilities, they learn to adjust the scope and wording of their requests to increase the likelihood of receiving a helpful response from the IA. Our findings highlight the impact of the feedback effect at both the micro and meso levels. We further discuss its macro-level consequences: unsatisfactory interactions continuously reduce the likelihood and diversity of future user engagements in a feedback loop.
abstract_zh: 随着智能助理（IA）的日益普及，评估 IA 质量成为一个日益活跃的研究领域。本文识别并量化了反馈效应，这是 IA-用户交互中的一个新组成部分：IA 的功能和局限性如何随着时间的推移影响用户行为。首先，我们通过观察性研究证明，IA 的无益反应会导致用户在短期内延迟或减少后续互动。接下来，我们扩大时间范围来检查行为变化，并表明当用户发现 IA 理解和功能能力的局限性时，他们学会调整其请求的范围和措辞，以增加从 IA 收到有用响应的可能性。我们的研究结果强调了反馈效应在微观和中观层面的影响。我们进一步讨论其宏观层面的后果：不满意的交互不断降低反馈循环中未来用户参与的可能性和多样性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究智能助手用户互动中的反馈效应，分析用户行为随时间的变化，包括延迟参与、适应策略及退出现象。
AI.motivation: 随着智能助手普及，评估其质量至关重要，但反馈效应（IA能力限制对用户行为的长期影响）尚未被充分研究，需量化其影响以优化设计。
AI.method: 通过观察性研究和长期行为分析，结合用户请求调整策略，量化反馈效应在微观、中观及宏观层面的影响。
AI.result: 发现无用回应导致短期互动减少，用户长期调整请求以适应IA限制，且持续负面体验形成反馈循环，降低未来参与可能性与多样性。
AI.conclusion: 反馈效应显著影响用户行为，揭示IA设计需关注用户适应过程及长期体验，以避免用户流失并提升交互质量。

authors_text: Boqi Chen,Marc Niethammer
title: MRIS: A Multi-modal Retrieval Approach for Image Synthesis on Diverse Modalities
title_zh: MRIS：一种用于多种模态图像合成的多模态检索方法
abstract: Multiple imaging modalities are often used for disease diagnosis, prediction, or population-based analyses. However, not all modalities might be available due to cost, different study designs, or changes in imaging technology. If the differences between the types of imaging are small, data harmonization approaches can be used; for larger changes, direct image synthesis approaches have been explored. In this paper, we develop an approach based on multi-modal metric learning to synthesize images of diverse modalities. We use metric learning via multi-modal image retrieval, resulting in embeddings that can relate images of different modalities. Given a large image database, the learned image embeddings allow us to use k-nearest neighbor (k-NN) regression for image synthesis. Our driving medical problem is knee osteoarthritis (KOA), but our developed method is general after proper image alignment. We test our approach by synthesizing cartilage thickness maps obtained from 3D magnetic resonance (MR) images using 2D radiographs. Our experiments show that the proposed method outperforms direct image synthesis and that the synthesized thickness maps retain information relevant to downstream tasks such as progression prediction and Kellgren-Lawrence grading (KLG). Our results suggest that retrieval approaches can be used to obtain high-quality and meaningful image synthesis results given large image databases.
summary: Multiple imaging modalities are often used for disease diagnosis, prediction, or population-based analyses. However, not all modalities might be available due to cost, different study designs, or changes in imaging technology. If the differences between the types of imaging are small, data harmonization approaches can be used; for larger changes, direct image synthesis approaches have been explored. In this paper, we develop an approach based on multi-modal metric learning to synthesize images of diverse modalities. We use metric learning via multi-modal image retrieval, resulting in embeddings that can relate images of different modalities. Given a large image database, the learned image embeddings allow us to use k-nearest neighbor (k-NN) regression for image synthesis. Our driving medical problem is knee osteoarthritis (KOA), but our developed method is general after proper image alignment. We test our approach by synthesizing cartilage thickness maps obtained from 3D magnetic resonance (MR) images using 2D radiographs. Our experiments show that the proposed method outperforms direct image synthesis and that the synthesized thickness maps retain information relevant to downstream tasks such as progression prediction and Kellgren-Lawrence grading (KLG). Our results suggest that retrieval approaches can be used to obtain high-quality and meaningful image synthesis results given large image databases.
abstract_zh: 多种成像方式通常用于疾病诊断、预测或基于人群的分析。然而，由于成本、不同的研究设计或成像技术的变化，并非所有模式都可用。如果成像类型之间的差异很小，则可以使用数据协调方法；对于较大的变化，已经探索了直接图像合成方法。在本文中，我们开发了一种基于多模态度量学习的方法来合成不同模态的图像。我们通过多模态图像检索使用度量学习，从而产生可以关联不同模态图像的嵌入。给定一个大型图像数据库，学习到的图像嵌入允许我们使用 k-近邻 (k-NN) 回归进行图像合成。我们的主要医疗问题是膝骨关节炎（KOA），但我们开发的方法在正确的图像对齐后是通用的。我们通过使用 2D 射线照片合成从 3D 磁共振 (MR) 图像获得的软骨厚度图来测试我们的方法。我们的实验表明，所提出的方法优于直接图像合成，并且合成的厚度图保留了与下游任务相关的信息，例如进展预测和 Kellgren-Lawrence 分级（KLG）。我们的结果表明，在给定大型图像数据库的情况下，检索方法可用于获得高质量且有意义的图像合成结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于多模态度量学习的图像合成方法MRIS，用于在不同成像模态间生成高质量图像。
AI.motivation: 医学诊断中常因成本、技术限制或研究设计差异导致部分成像模态缺失，现有数据对齐方法难以处理模态间显著差异，需探索更有效的图像合成方案。
AI.method: 通过多模态图像检索进行度量学习，生成跨模态关联的嵌入表示，并基于大规模图像数据库利用k近邻回归实现图像合成。
AI.result: 在膝关节骨关节炎数据集上，该方法合成的软骨厚度图优于直接合成方法，且能保留用于疾病进展预测和分级的关键信息。
AI.conclusion: 基于检索的跨模态图像合成方法在大型数据库支持下可生成高质量结果，且具有跨医学场景的通用性。

search_text: MRIS: A Multi-modal Retrieval Approach for Image Synthesis on Diverse Modalities MRIS：一种用于多种模态图像合成的多模态检索方法 Multiple imaging modalities are often used for disease diagnosis, prediction, or population-based analyses. authors_text: David Korcak,Jiri Matas
title: Video shutter angle estimation using optical flow and linear blur
title_zh: 使用光流和线性模糊估计视频快门角度
comment: ef:Proceedings of the 27th Computer Vision Winter Workshop, 2024, 57-65
comments: ef:Proceedings of the 27th Computer Vision Winter Workshop, 2024, 57-65
abstract: We present a method for estimating the shutter angle, a.k.a. exposure fraction - the ratio of the exposure time and the reciprocal of frame rate - of videoclips containing motion. The approach exploits the relation of the exposure fraction, optical flow, and linear motion blur. Robustness is achieved by selecting image patches where both the optical flow and blur estimates are reliable, checking their consistency. The method was evaluated on the publicly available Beam-Splitter Dataset with a range of exposure fractions from 0.015 to 0.36. The best achieved mean absolute error of estimates was 0.039. We successfully test the suitability of the method for a forensic application of detection of video tampering by frame removal or insertion
summary: We present a method for estimating the shutter angle, a.k.a. exposure fraction - the ratio of the exposure time and the reciprocal of frame rate - of videoclips containing motion. The approach exploits the relation of the exposure fraction, optical flow, and linear motion blur. Robustness is achieved by selecting image patches where both the optical flow and blur estimates are reliable, checking their consistency. The method was evaluated on the publicly available Beam-Splitter Dataset with a range of exposure fractions from 0.015 to 0.36. The best achieved mean absolute error of estimates was 0.039. We successfully test the suitability of the method for a forensic application of detection of video tampering by frame removal or insertion
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种估计快门角度的方法，即包含运动的视频剪辑的曝光分数（曝光时间与帧速率的倒数之比）。该方法利用了曝光分数、光流和线性运动模糊之间的关系。通过选择光流和模糊估计均可靠的图像块并检查其一致性来实现鲁棒性。该方法在公开的分束器数据集上进行了评估，曝光分数范围为 0.015 至 0.36。最佳估计平均绝对误差为 0.039。我们成功测试了该方法在通过帧删除或插入检测视频篡改的取证应用中的适用性

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种利用光流和线性模糊估计视频快门角度（曝光分数）的方法，用于检测视频篡改。
AI.motivation: 视频中的运动会导致模糊，而快门角度是影响模糊程度的关键参数。准确估计快门角度对视频取证（如检测帧插入或删除）具有重要意义。
AI.method: 通过分析光流与线性运动模糊的关系，选择光流和模糊估计均可靠的图像块，并验证其一致性。在Beam-Splitter数据集上进行评估。
AI.result: 在曝光分数范围0.015-0.36的测试中，估计的平均绝对误差为0.039，成功验证了方法在视频篡改检测中的适用性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过结合光流与模糊分析实现了鲁棒的快门角度估计，为视频取证提供了有效工具。

authors_text: Rui Li,Xiaowei Zhao
title: LSwinSR: UAV Imagery Super-Resolution based on Linear Swin Transformer
title_zh: LSwinSR：基于线性 Swin Transformer 的无人机图像超分辨率
abstract: Super-resolution, which aims to reconstruct high-resolution images from low-resolution images, has drawn considerable attention and has been intensively studied in computer vision and remote sensing communities. The super-resolution technology is especially beneficial for Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAV), as the amount and resolution of images captured by UAV are highly limited by physical constraints such as flight altitude and load capacity. In the wake of the successful application of deep learning methods in the super-resolution task, in recent years, a series of super-resolution algorithms have been developed. In this paper, for the super-resolution of UAV images, a novel network based on the state-of-the-art Swin Transformer is proposed with better efficiency and competitive accuracy. Meanwhile, as one of the essential applications of the UAV is land cover and land use monitoring, simple image quality assessments such as the Peak-Signal-to-Noise Ratio (PSNR) and the Structural Similarity Index Measure (SSIM) are not enough to comprehensively measure the performance of an algorithm. Therefore, we further investigate the effectiveness of super-resolution methods using the accuracy of semantic segmentation. The code will be available at https://github.com/lironui/LSwinSR.
summary: Super-resolution, which aims to reconstruct high-resolution images from low-resolution images, has drawn considerable attention and has been intensively studied in computer vision and remote sensing communities. The super-resolution technology is especially beneficial for Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAV), as the amount and resolution of images captured by UAV are highly limited by physical constraints such as flight altitude and load capacity. In the wake of the successful application of deep learning methods in the super-resolution task, in recent years, a series of super-resolution algorithms have been developed. In this paper, for the super-resolution of UAV images, a novel network based on the state-of-the-art Swin Transformer is proposed with better efficiency and competitive accuracy. Meanwhile, as one of the essential applications of the UAV is land cover and land use monitoring, simple image quality assessments such as the Peak-Signal-to-Noise Ratio (PSNR) and the Structural Similarity Index Measure (SSIM) are not enough to comprehensively measure the performance of an algorithm. Therefore, we further investigate the effectiveness of super-resolution methods using the accuracy of semantic segmentation. The code will be available at https://github.com/lironui/LSwinSR.
abstract_zh: 超分辨率旨在从低分辨率图像重建高分辨率图像，引起了人们的广泛关注，并在计算机视觉和遥感领域得到了深入研究。超分辨率技术对于无人机（UAV）尤其有利，因为无人机捕获的图像数量和分辨率很大程度上受到飞行高度和负载能力等物理约束的限制。随着深度学习方法在超分辨率任务中的成功应用，近年来出现了一系列超分辨率算法。本文针对无人机图像的超分辨率，提出了一种基于最先进的 Swin Transformer 的新型网络，具有更高的效率和竞争精度。同时，由于无人机的重要应用之一是土地覆盖和土地利用监测，简单的图像质量评估，如峰值信噪比（PSNR）和结构相似性指数测量（SSIM）不足以全面衡量算法的性能。因此，我们利用语义分割的准确性进一步研究超分辨率方法的有效性。该代码可在 https://github.com/lironui/LSwinSR 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于线性Swin Transformer的无人机图像超分辨率方法LSwinSR，提升分辨率同时结合语义分割评估算法效果。
AI.motivation: 无人机图像受物理条件限制分辨率较低，传统超分算法效率与精度不足，且PSNR/SSIM等指标无法全面评估土地覆盖监测等关键应用效果。
AI.method: 设计基于Swin Transformer的新型网络结构，优化计算效率与重建精度；引入语义分割准确率作为补充评估指标。
AI.result: 实验表明LSwinSR在保持较高效率的同时达到竞争性精度，语义分割评估显示其更适用于土地利用监测等实际场景。
AI.conclusion: LSwinSR为无人机图像超分提供有效解决方案，结合语义任务评估能更全面反映算法在实际应用中的性能表现。

tldr: 本文提出基于线性Swin Transformer的无人机图像超分辨率方法LSwinSR，提升分辨率同时结合语义分割评估算法效果。
motivation: 无人机图像受物理条件限制分辨率较低，传统超分算法效率与精度不足，且PSNR/SSIM等指标无法全面评估土地覆盖监测等关键应用效果。
method: 设计基于Swin Transformer的新型网络结构，优化计算效率与重建精度；引入语义分割准确率作为补充评估指标。

conclusion: LSwinSR为无人机图像超分提供有效解决方案，结合语义任务评估能更全面反映算法在实际应用中的性能表现。
search_text: LSwinSR: UAV Imagery Super-Resolution based on Linear Swin Transformer LSwinSR：基于线性 Swin Transformer 的无人机图像超分辨率 Super-resolution, which aims to reconstruct high-resolution images from low-resolution images, has drawn considerable attention and has been intensively studied in computer vision and remote sensing communities. The super-resolution technology is especially beneficial for Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAV), as the amount and resolution of images captured by UAV are highly limited by physical constraints such as flight altitude and load capacity. In the wake of the successful application of deep learning methods in the super-resolution task, in recent years, a series of super-resolution algorithms have been developed. In this paper, for the super-resolution of UAV images, a novel network based on the state-of-the-art Swin Transformer is proposed with better efficiency and competitive accuracy. Meanwhile, as one of the essential applications of the UAV is land cover and land use monitoring, simple image quality assessments such as the Peak-Signal-to-Noise Ratio (PSNR) and the Structural Similarity Index Measure (SSIM) are not enough to comprehensively measure the performance of an algorithm. Therefore, we further investigate the effectiveness of super-resolution methods using the accuracy of semantic segmentation. The code will be available at https://github.com/lironui/LSwinSR. 超分辨率旨在从低分辨率图像重建高分辨率图像，引起了人们的广泛关注，并在计算机视觉和遥感领域得到了深入研究。超分辨率技术对于无人机（UAV）尤其有利，因为无人机捕获的图像数量和分辨率很大程度上受到飞行高度和负载能力等物理约束的限制。随着深度学习方法在超分辨率任务中的成功应用，近年来出现了一系列超分辨率算法。本文针对无人机图像的超分辨率，提出了一种基于最先进的 Swin Transformer 的新型网络，具有更高的效率和竞争精度。同时，由于无人机的重要应用之一是土地覆盖和土地利用监测，简单的图像质量评估，如峰值信噪比（PSNR）和结构相似性指数测量（SSIM）不足以全面衡量算法的性能。因此，我们利用语义分割的准确性进一步研究超分辨率方法的有效性。该代码可在 https://github.com/lironui/LSwinSR 上获取。 本文提出基于线性Swin Transformer的无人机图像超分辨率方法LSwinSR，提升分辨率同时结合语义分割评估算法效果。 Rui Li,Xiaowei Zhao eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Maegan Tucker,Aaron D. Ames
title: An Input-to-State Stability Perspective on Robust Locomotion
title_zh: 鲁棒运动的输入状态稳定性视角
abstract: Uneven terrain necessarily transforms periodic walking into a non-periodic motion. As such, traditional stability analysis tools no longer adequately capture the ability of a bipedal robot to locomote in the presence of such disturbances. This motivates the need for analytical tools aimed at generalized notions of stability -- robustness. Towards this, we propose a novel definition of robustness, termed \emph{$δ$-robustness}, to characterize the domain on which a nominal periodic orbit remains stable despite uncertain terrain. This definition is derived by treating perturbations in ground height as disturbances in the context of the input-to-state-stability (ISS) of the extended Poincaré map associated with a periodic orbit. The main theoretic result is the formulation of robust Lyapunov functions that certify $δ$-robustness of periodic orbits. This yields an optimization framework for verifying $δ$-robustness, which is demonstrated in simulation with a bipedal robot walking on uneven terrain.
summary: Uneven terrain necessarily transforms periodic walking into a non-periodic motion. As such, traditional stability analysis tools no longer adequately capture the ability of a bipedal robot to locomote in the presence of such disturbances. This motivates the need for analytical tools aimed at generalized notions of stability -- robustness. Towards this, we propose a novel definition of robustness, termed \emph{$δ$-robustness}, to characterize the domain on which a nominal periodic orbit remains stable despite uncertain terrain. This definition is derived by treating perturbations in ground height as disturbances in the context of the input-to-state-stability (ISS) of the extended Poincaré map associated with a periodic orbit. The main theoretic result is the formulation of robust Lyapunov functions that certify $δ$-robustness of periodic orbits. This yields an optimization framework for verifying $δ$-robustness, which is demonstrated in simulation with a bipedal robot walking on uneven terrain.
abstract_zh: 不平坦的地形必然会将周期性行走转变为非周期性运动。因此，传统的稳定性分析工具不再充分捕获双足机器人在存在此类干扰的情况下移动的能力。这就激发了对针对广义稳定性概念（稳健性）的分析工具的需求。为此，我们提出了一种新颖的鲁棒性定义，称为\emph{$δ$-鲁棒性}，来描述尽管地形不确定但标称周期轨道仍保持稳定的域。该定义是通过将地面高度扰动视为与周期轨道相关的扩展庞加莱图的输入状态稳定性（ISS）背景下的扰动而得出的。主要的理论结果是稳健的李亚普诺夫函数的公式，证明了周期性轨道的 $δ$-稳健性。这产生了一个用于验证 $δ$-鲁棒性的优化框架，该框架通过双足机器人在不平坦地形上行走的模拟进行了演示。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的鲁棒性定义（δ-鲁棒性），用于分析双足机器人在不平坦地形上的周期性运动稳定性。
AI.motivation: 传统稳定性分析工具无法有效处理不平坦地形导致的非周期性运动，需开发更通用的稳定性分析方法。
AI.method: 基于输入到状态稳定性（ISS）框架，通过扩展庞加莱映射定义δ-鲁棒性，并构建鲁棒李雅普诺夫函数进行验证。
AI.result: 在仿真中验证了所提方法对双足机器人复杂地形行走的鲁棒性分析有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该理论框架为机器人复杂环境下的运动鲁棒性分析提供了新工具和优化验证方法。

authors_text: Dirk Väth,Lindsey Vanderlyn,Ngoc Thang Vu
title: Conversational Tree Search: A New Hybrid Dialog Task
title_zh: 对话树搜索：新的混合对话任务
abstract: Conversational interfaces provide a flexible and easy way for users to seek information that may otherwise be difficult or inconvenient to obtain. However, existing interfaces generally fall into one of two categories: FAQs, where users must have a concrete question in order to retrieve a general answer, or dialogs, where users must follow a predefined path but may receive a personalized answer. In this paper, we introduce Conversational Tree Search (CTS) as a new task that bridges the gap between FAQ-style information retrieval and task-oriented dialog, allowing domain-experts to define dialog trees which can then be converted to an efficient dialog policy that learns only to ask the questions necessary to navigate a user to their goal. We collect a dataset for the travel reimbursement domain and demonstrate a baseline as well as a novel deep Reinforcement Learning architecture for this task. Our results show that the new architecture combines the positive aspects of both the FAQ and dialog system used in the baseline and achieves higher goal completion while skipping unnecessary questions.
summary: Conversational interfaces provide a flexible and easy way for users to seek information that may otherwise be difficult or inconvenient to obtain. However, existing interfaces generally fall into one of two categories: FAQs, where users must have a concrete question in order to retrieve a general answer, or dialogs, where users must follow a predefined path but may receive a personalized answer. In this paper, we introduce Conversational Tree Search (CTS) as a new task that bridges the gap between FAQ-style information retrieval and task-oriented dialog, allowing domain-experts to define dialog trees which can then be converted to an efficient dialog policy that learns only to ask the questions necessary to navigate a user to their goal. We collect a dataset for the travel reimbursement domain and demonstrate a baseline as well as a novel deep Reinforcement Learning architecture for this task. Our results show that the new architecture combines the positive aspects of both the FAQ and dialog system used in the baseline and achieves higher goal completion while skipping unnecessary questions.
abstract_zh: 对话界面为用户提供了一种灵活且简单的方式来查找否则可能难以或不方便获得的信息。然而，现有界面通常分为两类之一：常见问题解答（用户必须提出具体问题才能检索一般答案）或对话框（用户必须遵循预定义的路径，但可能会收到个性化答案）。在本文中，我们引入会话树搜索（CTS）作为一项新任务，它弥合了常见问题解答风格的信息检索和面向任务的对话之间的差距，允许领域专家定义对话树，然后将其转换为有效的对话策略，该策略仅学习询问引导用户实现其目标所需的问题。我们收集了差旅报销领域的数据集，并演示了该任务的基线以及新颖的深度强化学习架构。我们的结果表明，新架构结合了基线中使用的常见问题解答和对话系统的积极方面，并在跳过不必要的问题的同时实现了更高的目标完成度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为对话树搜索（CTS）的新混合对话任务，旨在弥合FAQ式信息检索与任务导向对话系统之间的差距。
AI.motivation: 现有对话系统分为两类：FAQ需用户提出具体问题，而对话系统需遵循预定义路径，缺乏灵活性。需一种既能灵活提问又能高效导航的混合方法。
AI.method: 通过定义领域专家的对话树结构，将其转换为高效对话策略，并结合深度强化学习架构以动态学习必要问题，构建旅行报销领域的数据集进行验证。
AI.result: 新架构在目标完成率上优于基线方法，同时减少了冗余提问，有效结合了FAQ与对话系统的优点。
AI.conclusion: CTS成功融合了FAQ与对话系统的长处，通过深度强化学习实现了高效、灵活的对话导航，为领域应用提供了新思路。

authors_text: Ren Wang,Yuxuan Li,Can Chen,Dakuo Wang,Jinjun Xiong,Pin-Yu Chen,Sijia Liu,Mohammad Shahidehpour,Alfred Hero
title: Bridging Models to Defend: A Population-Based Strategy for Robust Adversarial Defense
title_zh: 连接防御模型：基于人群的稳健对抗性防御策略
abstract: Adversarial robustness is a critical measure of a neural network's ability to withstand adversarial attacks at inference time. While robust training techniques have improved defenses against individual $\ell_p$-norm attacks (e.g., $\ell_2$ or $\ell_\infty$), models remain vulnerable to diversified $\ell_p$ perturbations. To address this challenge, we propose a novel Robust Mode Connectivity (RMC)-oriented adversarial defense framework comprising two population-based learning phases. In Phase I, RMC searches the parameter space between two pre-trained models to construct a continuous path containing models with high robustness against multiple $\ell_p$ attacks. To improve efficiency, we introduce a Self-Robust Mode Connectivity (SRMC) module that accelerates endpoint generation in RMC. Building on RMC, Phase II presents RMC-based optimization, where RMC modules are composed to further enhance diversified robustness. To increase Phase II efficiency, we propose Efficient Robust Mode Connectivity (ERMC), which leverages $\ell_1$- and $\ell_\infty$-adversarially trained models to achieve robustness across a broad range of $p$-norms. An ensemble strategy is employed to further boost ERMC's performance. Extensive experiments across diverse datasets and architectures demonstrate that our methods significantly improve robustness against $\ell_\infty$, $\ell_2$, $\ell_1$, and hybrid attacks. Code is available at https://github.com/wangren09/MCGR.
summary: Adversarial robustness is a critical measure of a neural network's ability to withstand adversarial attacks at inference time. While robust training techniques have improved defenses against individual $\ell_p$-norm attacks (e.g., $\ell_2$ or $\ell_\infty$), models remain vulnerable to diversified $\ell_p$ perturbations. To address this challenge, we propose a novel Robust Mode Connectivity (RMC)-oriented adversarial defense framework comprising two population-based learning phases. In Phase I, RMC searches the parameter space between two pre-trained models to construct a continuous path containing models with high robustness against multiple $\ell_p$ attacks. To improve efficiency, we introduce a Self-Robust Mode Connectivity (SRMC) module that accelerates endpoint generation in RMC. Building on RMC, Phase II presents RMC-based optimization, where RMC modules are composed to further enhance diversified robustness. To increase Phase II efficiency, we propose Efficient Robust Mode Connectivity (ERMC), which leverages $\ell_1$- and $\ell_\infty$-adversarially trained models to achieve robustness across a broad range of $p$-norms. An ensemble strategy is employed to further boost ERMC's performance. Extensive experiments across diverse datasets and architectures demonstrate that our methods significantly improve robustness against $\ell_\infty$, $\ell_2$, $\ell_1$, and hybrid attacks. Code is available at https://github.com/wangren09/MCGR.
abstract_zh: 对抗鲁棒性是衡量神经网络在推理时抵御对抗攻击能力的关键指标。虽然强大的训练技术提高了对单个 $\ell_p$ 范数攻击（例如 $\ell_2$ 或 $\ell_\infty$）的防御能力，但模型仍然容易受到多样化的 $\ell_p$ 扰动的影响。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了一种新颖的面向鲁棒模式连接（RMC）的对抗性防御框架，包括两个基于群体的学习阶段。在第一阶段，RMC 搜索两个预训练模型之间的参数空间，构建一条连续路径，其中包含针对多种 $\ell_p$ 攻击具有高鲁棒性的模型。为了提高效率，我们引入了自鲁棒模式连接 (SRMC) 模块，可加速 RMC 中端点的生成。第二阶段在RMC的基础上提出了基于RMC的优化，通过组合RMC模块来进一步增强多样化的鲁棒性。为了提高第二阶段的效率，我们提出了高效鲁棒模式连接（ERMC），它利用 $\ell_1$- 和 $\ell_\infty$- 对抗性训练模型来实现广泛的 $p$-规范的鲁棒性。采用集成策略来进一步提高 ERMC 的性能。跨不同数据集和架构的大量实验表明，我们的方法显着提高了针对 $\ell_\infty$、$\ell_2$、$\ell_1$ 和混合攻击的鲁棒性。代码可在 https://github.com/wangren09/MCGR 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于群体策略的鲁棒对抗防御框架，通过连接多个预训练模型的参数空间路径来提升模型对多样化ℓ_p扰动的防御能力。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗训练方法在应对单一ℓ_p攻击时表现良好，但难以防御多样化的ℓ_p扰动，需探索更普适的防御策略。
AI.method: 提出两阶段RMC框架：第一阶段通过Robust Mode Connectivity（RMC）搜索模型参数空间路径并引入SRMC模块加速端点生成；第二阶段基于RMC优化并提出ERMC模块，结合ℓ₁和ℓ∞对抗训练模型，通过集成策略增强鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在多个数据集和架构上显著提升模型对ℓ∞、ℓ₂、ℓ₁及混合攻击的鲁棒性，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过群体模型参数空间探索和高效模块设计，有效提升了对抗多样化扰动的防御能力，为鲁棒性研究提供新思路。

An ensemble strategy is employed to further boost ERMC's performance. authors_text: Bhaswati Singha Deo,Mayukha Pal,Prasanta K. Panigarhi,Asima Pradhan
title: CerviFormer: A Pap-smear based cervical cancer classification method using cross attention and latent transformer
title_zh: CerviFormer：一种基于子宫颈抹片检查的宫颈癌分类方法，使用交叉注意力和潜在变压器
abstract: Purpose: Cervical cancer is one of the primary causes of death in women. It should be diagnosed early and treated according to the best medical advice, as with other diseases, to ensure that its effects are as minimal as possible. Pap smear images are one of the most constructive ways for identifying this type of cancer. This study proposes a cross-attention-based Transfomer approach for the reliable classification of cervical cancer in Pap smear images. Methods: In this study, we propose the CerviFormer -- a model that depends on the Transformers and thereby requires minimal architectural assumptions about the size of the input data. The model uses a cross-attention technique to repeatedly consolidate the input data into a compact latent Transformer module, which enables it to manage very large-scale inputs. We evaluated our model on two publicly available Pap smear datasets. Results: For 3-state classification on the Sipakmed data, the model achieved an accuracy of 93.70%. For 2-state classification on the Herlev data, the model achieved an accuracy of 94.57%. Conclusion: Experimental results on two publicly accessible datasets demonstrate that the proposed method achieves competitive results when compared to contemporary approaches. The proposed method brings forth a comprehensive classification model to detect cervical cancer in Pap smear images. This may aid medical professionals in providing better cervical cancer treatment, consequently, enhancing the overall effectiveness of the entire testing process.
summary: Purpose: Cervical cancer is one of the primary causes of death in women. It should be diagnosed early and treated according to the best medical advice, as with other diseases, to ensure that its effects are as minimal as possible. Pap smear images are one of the most constructive ways for identifying this type of cancer. This study proposes a cross-attention-based Transfomer approach for the reliable classification of cervical cancer in Pap smear images. Methods: In this study, we propose the CerviFormer -- a model that depends on the Transformers and thereby requires minimal architectural assumptions about the size of the input data. The model uses a cross-attention technique to repeatedly consolidate the input data into a compact latent Transformer module, which enables it to manage very large-scale inputs. We evaluated our model on two publicly available Pap smear datasets. Results: For 3-state classification on the Sipakmed data, the model achieved an accuracy of 93.70%. For 2-state classification on the Herlev data, the model achieved an accuracy of 94.57%. Conclusion: Experimental results on two publicly accessible datasets demonstrate that the proposed method achieves competitive results when compared to contemporary approaches. The proposed method brings forth a comprehensive classification model to detect cervical cancer in Pap smear images. This may aid medical professionals in providing better cervical cancer treatment, consequently, enhancing the overall effectiveness of the entire testing process.
abstract_zh: 目的：宫颈癌是女性死亡的主要原因之一。与其他疾病一样，应尽早诊断并根据最佳医疗建议进行治疗，以确保其影响尽可能小。巴氏涂片图像是识别此类癌症最有建设性的方法之一。本研究提出了一种基于交叉注意力的 Transfomer 方法，用于对巴氏涂片图像中的宫颈癌进行可靠分类。方法：在本研究中，我们提出了 CerviFormer——一种依赖于 Transformer 的模型，因此需要对输入数据大小进行最少的架构假设。该模型使用交叉注意技术将输入数据重复整合到一个紧凑的潜在 Transformer 模块中，这使其能够管理非常大规模的输入。我们在两个公开可用的巴氏涂片数据集上评估了我们的模型。结果：对于 Sipakmed 数据的三态分类，该模型的准确率达到 93.70%。对于 Herlev 数据的 2 状态分类，该模型的准确率达到 94.57%。结论：两个可公开访问的数据集的实验结果表明，与当代方法相比，所提出的方法取得了有竞争力的结果。该方法提出了一种综合分类模型来检测巴氏涂片图像中的宫颈癌。这可以帮助医疗专业人员提供更好的宫颈癌治疗，从而提高整个检测过程的整体有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Pap涂片图像的宫颈癌分类方法CerviFormer，结合交叉注意力机制与潜在Transformer架构。
AI.motivation: 宫颈癌是女性主要致死疾病之一，需通过Pap涂片早期诊断。现有方法存在分类准确性不足的问题，需开发更可靠的检测模型以提升诊疗效果。
AI.method: 设计CerviFormer模型，利用Transformer架构与交叉注意力机制，通过潜在Transformer模块整合输入数据，适应大规模输入特征。
AI.result: 在Sipakmed数据集上3分类准确率达93.70%，在Herlev数据集上2分类准确率达94.57%。
AI.conclusion: 实验表明CerviFormer在公开数据集上表现优于现有方法，为宫颈癌检测提供了高效分类模型，有助于提升临床诊断效率。

authors_text: Alekh Agarwal,H. Brendan McMahan,Zheng Xu
title: An Empirical Evaluation of Federated Contextual Bandit Algorithms
title_zh: 联合上下文强盗算法的实证评估
abstract: As the adoption of federated learning increases for learning from sensitive data local to user devices, it is natural to ask if the learning can be done using implicit signals generated as users interact with the applications of interest, rather than requiring access to explicit labels which can be difficult to acquire in many tasks. We approach such problems with the framework of federated contextual bandits, and develop variants of prominent contextual bandit algorithms from the centralized seting for the federated setting. We carefully evaluate these algorithms in a range of scenarios simulated using publicly available datasets. Our simulations model typical setups encountered in the real-world, such as various misalignments between an initial pre-trained model and the subsequent user interactions due to non-stationarity in the data and/or heterogeneity across clients. Our experiments reveal the surprising effectiveness of the simple and commonly used softmax heuristic in balancing the well-know exploration-exploitation tradeoff across the breadth of our settings.
summary: As the adoption of federated learning increases for learning from sensitive data local to user devices, it is natural to ask if the learning can be done using implicit signals generated as users interact with the applications of interest, rather than requiring access to explicit labels which can be difficult to acquire in many tasks. We approach such problems with the framework of federated contextual bandits, and develop variants of prominent contextual bandit algorithms from the centralized seting for the federated setting. We carefully evaluate these algorithms in a range of scenarios simulated using publicly available datasets. Our simulations model typical setups encountered in the real-world, such as various misalignments between an initial pre-trained model and the subsequent user interactions due to non-stationarity in the data and/or heterogeneity across clients. Our experiments reveal the surprising effectiveness of the simple and commonly used softmax heuristic in balancing the well-know exploration-exploitation tradeoff across the breadth of our settings.
abstract_zh: 随着联邦学习越来越多地采用从用户设备本地的敏感数据进行学习，人们很自然地会问是否可以使用用户与感兴趣的应用程序交互时生成的隐式信号来完成学习，而不是需要访问在许多任务中难以获取的显式标签。我们使用联合上下文强盗框架来解决此类问题，并从联合设置的集中设置中开发突出的上下文强盗算法的变体。我们在使用公开数据集模拟的一系列场景中仔细评估这些算法。我们的模拟对现实世界中遇到的典型设置进行建模，例如由于数据的非平稳性和/或客户端之间的异质性，初始预训练模型与后续用户交互之间的各种错位。我们的实验揭示了简单且常用的 softmax 启发式在平衡我们广泛的设置范围内众所周知的探索-利用权衡方面具有令人惊讶的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文评估了联邦上下文老虎机算法在真实场景中的有效性，通过模拟非平稳数据和客户端异质性等典型情况，验证了softmax启发式方法在平衡探索与利用中的表现。
AI.motivation: 随着联邦学习在敏感数据场景中的应用增加，如何利用用户交互产生的隐式信号替代难以获取的显式标签成为关键问题。
AI.method: 将集中式上下文老虎机算法适配到联邦学习框架，并通过公开数据集构建模拟环境测试算法在非平稳数据和客户端异质性下的表现。
AI.result: 实验发现简单的softmax启发式方法在多种场景中能有效平衡探索与利用，表现出令人意外的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 联邦上下文老虎机算法可通过适配经典方法实现有效学习，softmax启发式在复杂联邦场景中具有实用价值。

search_text: An Empirical Evaluation of Federated Contextual Bandit Algorithms 联合上下文强盗算法的实证评估 As the adoption of federated learning increases for learning from sensitive data local to user devices, it is natural to ask if the learning can be done using implicit signals generated as users interact with the applications of interest, rather than requiring access to explicit labels which can be difficult to acquire in many tasks. We approach such problems with the framework of federated contextual bandits, and develop variants of prominent contextual bandit algorithms from the centralized seting for the federated setting. We carefully evaluate these algorithms in a range of scenarios simulated using publicly available datasets. Our simulations model typical setups encountered in the real-world, such as various misalignments between an initial pre-trained model and the subsequent user interactions due to non-stationarity in the data and/or heterogeneity across clients. Our experiments reveal the surprising effectiveness of the simple and commonly used softmax heuristic in balancing the well-know exploration-exploitation tradeoff across the breadth of our settings. 随着联邦学习越来越多地采用从用户设备本地的敏感数据进行学习，人们很自然地会问是否可以使用用户与感兴趣的应用程序交互时生成的隐式信号来完成学习，而不是需要访问在许多任务中难以获取的显式标签。我们使用联合上下文强盗框架来解决此类问题，并从联合设置的集中设置中开发突出的上下文强盗算法的变体。我们在使用公开数据集模拟的一系列场景中仔细评估这些算法。我们的模拟对现实世界中遇到的典型设置进行建模，例如由于数据的非平稳性和/或客户端之间的异质性，初始预训练模型与后续用户交互之间的各种错位。我们的实验揭示了简单且常用的 softmax 启发式在平衡我们广泛的设置范围内众所周知的探索-利用权衡方面具有令人惊讶的有效性。 本文评估了联邦上下文老虎机算法在真实场景中的有效性，通过模拟非平稳数据和客户端异质性等典型情况，验证了softmax启发式方法在平衡探索与利用中的表现。 Alekh Agarwal,H. Brendan McMahan,Zheng Xu cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Jun Wu,Xuesong Ye,Chengjie Mou
title: BotShape: A Novel Social Bots Detection Approach via Behavioral Patterns
title_zh: BotShape：一种通过行为模式检测社交机器人的新型方法
abstract: An essential topic in online social network security is how to accurately detect bot accounts and relieve their harmful impacts (e.g., misinformation, rumor, and spam) on genuine users. Based on a real-world data set, we construct behavioral sequences from raw event logs. After extracting critical characteristics from behavioral time series, we observe differences between bots and genuine users and similar patterns among bot accounts. We present a novel social bot detection system BotShape, to automatically catch behavioral sequences and characteristics as features for classifiers to detect bots. We evaluate the detection performance of our system in ground-truth instances, showing an average accuracy of 98.52% and an average f1-score of 96.65% on various types of classifiers. After comparing it with other research, we conclude that BotShape is a novel approach to profiling an account, which could improve performance for most methods by providing significant behavioral features.
summary: An essential topic in online social network security is how to accurately detect bot accounts and relieve their harmful impacts (e.g., misinformation, rumor, and spam) on genuine users. Based on a real-world data set, we construct behavioral sequences from raw event logs. After extracting critical characteristics from behavioral time series, we observe differences between bots and genuine users and similar patterns among bot accounts. We present a novel social bot detection system BotShape, to automatically catch behavioral sequences and characteristics as features for classifiers to detect bots. We evaluate the detection performance of our system in ground-truth instances, showing an average accuracy of 98.52% and an average f1-score of 96.65% on various types of classifiers. After comparing it with other research, we conclude that BotShape is a novel approach to profiling an account, which could improve performance for most methods by providing significant behavioral features.
abstract_zh: 在线社交网络安全的一个重要主题是如何准确检测机器人帐户并减轻其对真实用户的有害影响（例如错误信息、谣言和垃圾邮件）。基于真实世界的数据集，我们从原始事件日志构建行为序列。从行为时间序列中提取关键特征后，我们观察到机器人和真实用户之间的差异以及机器人帐户之间的相似模式。我们提出了一种新颖的社交机器人检测系统 BotShape，自动捕获行为序列和特征作为分类器检测机器人的特征。我们评估了我们系统在真实实例中的检测性能，显示在各种类型的分类器上的平均准确度为 98.52%，平均 f1 分数为 96.65%。与其他研究进行比较后，我们得出结论，BotShape 是一种分析帐户的新颖方法，它可以通过提供重要的行为特征来提高大多数方法的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于行为模式的社会机器人检测方法BotShape，通过分析用户行为序列特征实现高精度检测。
AI.motivation: 在线社交网络中社交机器人传播虚假信息、谣言和垃圾信息，亟需准确检测手段以降低其危害。
AI.method: 从真实数据集的事件日志构建行为序列，提取时间序列关键特征，利用行为模式差异训练分类器实现自动化检测。
AI.result: 在真实场景测试中达到98.52%的平均准确率和96.65%的F1分数，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: BotShape通过行为特征建模提供了新颖的账户画像方法，显著提升了多数检测方法的性能。
