authors_text: Joel Honkamaa,Pekka Marttinen
title: SITReg: Multi-resolution architecture for symmetric, inverse consistent, and topology preserving image registration
title_zh: SITReg：用于对称、逆一致和拓扑保留图像配准的多分辨率架构
comment: Accepted for publication at the Journal of Machine Learning for Biomedical Imaging (MELBA) https://melba-journal.org/2024:026
comments: Accepted for publication at the Journal of Machine Learning for Biomedical Imaging (MELBA) https://melba-journal.org/2024:026
abstract: Deep learning has emerged as a strong alternative for classical iterative methods for deformable medical image registration, where the goal is to find a mapping between the coordinate systems of two images. Popular classical image registration methods enforce the useful inductive biases of symmetricity, inverse consistency, and topology preservation by construction. However, while many deep learning registration methods encourage these properties via loss functions, no earlier methods enforce all of them by construction. Here, we propose a novel registration architecture based on extracting multi-resolution feature representations which is by construction symmetric, inverse consistent, and topology preserving. We also develop an implicit layer for memory efficient inversion of the deformation fields. Our method achieves state-of-the-art registration accuracy on three datasets. The code is available at https://github.com/honkamj/SITReg.
summary: Deep learning has emerged as a strong alternative for classical iterative methods for deformable medical image registration, where the goal is to find a mapping between the coordinate systems of two images. Popular classical image registration methods enforce the useful inductive biases of symmetricity, inverse consistency, and topology preservation by construction. However, while many deep learning registration methods encourage these properties via loss functions, no earlier methods enforce all of them by construction. Here, we propose a novel registration architecture based on extracting multi-resolution feature representations which is by construction symmetric, inverse consistent, and topology preserving. We also develop an implicit layer for memory efficient inversion of the deformation fields. Our method achieves state-of-the-art registration accuracy on three datasets. The code is available at https://github.com/honkamj/SITReg.
abstract_zh: 深度学习已成为可变形医学图像配准的经典迭代方法的有力替代方法，其目标是找到两个图像的坐标系之间的映射。流行的经典图像配准方法通过构造强制对称性、逆一致性和拓扑保存的有用归纳偏差。然而，虽然许多深度学习注册方法通过损失函数鼓励这些属性，但早期的方法没有通过构造来强制执行所有这些属性。在这里，我们提出了一种基于提取多分辨率特征表示的新颖配准架构，该架构通过构造对称、逆一致和拓扑保持来实现。我们还开发了一个隐式层，用于变形场的内存有效反转。我们的方法在三个数据集上实现了最先进的配准精度。该代码可在 https://github.com/honkamj/SITReg 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多分辨率深度学习架构SITReg，实现对称、逆一致且拓扑保持的医学图像配准。
AI.motivation: 传统图像配准方法通过结构保证对称性、逆一致性和拓扑保持性，而现有深度学习方法仅通过损失函数鼓励这些属性，未从结构上强制实现。
AI.method: 设计多分辨率特征提取架构，通过构造确保对称性、逆一致性及拓扑保持性，并开发隐式层实现变形场高效逆运算。
AI.result: 在三个医学图像数据集上达到最先进配准精度，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: SITReg通过结构设计同时满足关键配准属性，在准确性与内存效率上优于现有方法。

The code is available at https://github.com/honkamj/SITReg. 深度学习已成为可变形医学图像配准的经典迭代方法的有力替代方法，其目标是找到两个图像的坐标系之间的映射。流行的经典图像配准方法通过构造强制对称性、逆一致性和拓扑保存的有用归纳偏差。然而，虽然许多深度学习注册方法通过损失函数鼓励这些属性，但早期的方法没有通过构造来强制执行所有这些属性。在这里，我们提出了一种基于提取多分辨率特征表示的新颖配准架构，该架构通过构造对称、逆一致和拓扑保持来实现。我们还开发了一个隐式层，用于变形场的内存有效反转。我们的方法在三个数据集上实现了最先进的配准精度。该代码可在 https://github.com/honkamj/SITReg 获取。 本文提出一种多分辨率深度学习架构SITReg，实现对称、逆一致且拓扑保持的医学图像配准。 Joel Honkamaa,Pekka Marttinen cs.CV

authors_text: Kaixin Xiong,Shi Gong,Xiaoqing Ye,Xiao Tan,Ji Wan,Errui Ding,Jingdong Wang,Xiang Bai
title: CAPE: Camera View Position Embedding for Multi-View 3D Object Detection
title_zh: CAPE：用于多视图 3D 对象检测的摄像机视图位置嵌入
comment: Accepted by CVPR2023. Code is available
comments: Accepted by CVPR2023. Code is available
abstract: In this paper, we address the problem of detecting 3D objects from multi-view images. Current query-based methods rely on global 3D position embeddings (PE) to learn the geometric correspondence between images and 3D space. We claim that directly interacting 2D image features with global 3D PE could increase the difficulty of learning view transformation due to the variation of camera extrinsics. Thus we propose a novel method based on CAmera view Position Embedding, called CAPE. We form the 3D position embeddings under the local camera-view coordinate system instead of the global coordinate system, such that 3D position embedding is free of encoding camera extrinsic parameters. Furthermore, we extend our CAPE to temporal modeling by exploiting the object queries of previous frames and encoding the ego-motion for boosting 3D object detection. CAPE achieves state-of-the-art performance (61.0% NDS and 52.5% mAP) among all LiDAR-free methods on nuScenes dataset. Codes and models are available on \href{https://github.com/PaddlePaddle/Paddle3D}{Paddle3D} and \href{https://github.com/kaixinbear/CAPE}{PyTorch Implementation}.
summary: In this paper, we address the problem of detecting 3D objects from multi-view images. Current query-based methods rely on global 3D position embeddings (PE) to learn the geometric correspondence between images and 3D space. We claim that directly interacting 2D image features with global 3D PE could increase the difficulty of learning view transformation due to the variation of camera extrinsics. Thus we propose a novel method based on CAmera view Position Embedding, called CAPE. We form the 3D position embeddings under the local camera-view coordinate system instead of the global coordinate system, such that 3D position embedding is free of encoding camera extrinsic parameters. Furthermore, we extend our CAPE to temporal modeling by exploiting the object queries of previous frames and encoding the ego-motion for boosting 3D object detection. CAPE achieves state-of-the-art performance (61.0% NDS and 52.5% mAP) among all LiDAR-free methods on nuScenes dataset. Codes and models are available on \href{https://github.com/PaddlePaddle/Paddle3D}{Paddle3D} and \href{https://github.com/kaixinbear/CAPE}{PyTorch Implementation}.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们解决了从多视图图像中检测 3D 对象的问题。当前基于查询的方法依靠全局 3D 位置嵌入 (PE) 来学习图像和 3D 空间之间的几何对应关系。我们声称，由于相机外参的变化，直接将 2D 图像特征与全局 3D PE 交互可能会增加学习视图变换的难度。因此，我们提出了一种基于 CAmera 视图位置嵌入的新方法，称为 CAPE。我们在局部相机视图坐标系而不是全局坐标系下形成 3D 位置嵌入，这样 3D 位置嵌入就无需编码相机外部参数。此外，我们通过利用先前帧的对象查询并对自我运动进行编码以增强 3D 对象检测，将 CAPE 扩展到时间建模。 CAPE 在 nuScenes 数据集上的所有无 LiDAR 方法中实现了最先进的性能（61.0% NDS 和 52.5% mAP）。代码和模型可在 \href{https://github.com/PaddlePaddle/Paddle3D}{Paddle3D} 和 \href{https://github.com/kaixinbear/CAPE}{PyTorch Implementing} 上找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于相机视角位置嵌入（CAPE）的多视角3D目标检测方法，旨在无需激光雷达的情况下提升检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于查询的方法依赖全局3D位置嵌入，但直接交互2D图像特征与全局3D嵌入会因相机外参变化增加视角转换的学习难度。
AI.method: 在局部相机视角坐标系下构建3D位置嵌入，避免编码相机外参，并通过融合前帧目标查询及自运动信息扩展至时序建模。
AI.result: 在nuScenes数据集上达到LiDAR-free方法的最先进性能（NDS 61.0%，mAP 52.5%）。
AI.conclusion: CAPE通过局部坐标系嵌入与时序建模有效提升了多视角3D目标检测的准确性。

authors_text: Lotte Nijskens,Cornelis,AT van den Berg,Joost JC Verhoeff,Matteo Maspero
title: Exploring contrast generalisation in deep learning-based brain MRI-to-CT synthesis
title_zh: 探索基于深度学习的大脑 MRI 到 CT 合成中的对比泛化
comment: Preprint submitted to Physica Medica on 2023-02-16 for review. Also published in Zenodo at https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.7742642
comments: Preprint submitted to Physica Medica on 2023-02-16 for review. Also published in Zenodo at https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.7742642
abstract: Background: Synthetic computed tomography (sCT) has been proposed and increasingly clinically adopted to enable magnetic resonance imaging (MRI)-based radiotherapy. Deep learning (DL) has recently demonstrated the ability to generate accurate sCT from fixed MRI acquisitions. However, MRI protocols may change over time or differ between centres resulting in low-quality sCT due to poor model generalisation. Purpose: investigating domain randomisation (DR) to increase the generalisation of a DL model for brain sCT generation. Methods: CT and corresponding T1-weighted MRI with/without contrast, T2-weighted, and FLAIR MRI from 95 patients undergoing RT were collected, considering FLAIR the unseen sequence where to investigate generalisation. A ``Baseline'' generative adversarial network was trained with/without the FLAIR sequence to test how a model performs without DR. Image similarity and accuracy of sCT-based dose plans were assessed against CT to select the best-performing DR approach against the Baseline. Results: The Baseline model had the poorest performance on FLAIR, with mean absolute error (MAE)=106$\pm$20.7 HU (mean$\pmσ$). Performance on FLAIR significantly improved for the DR model with MAE=99.0$\pm$14.9 HU, but still inferior to the performance of the Baseline+FLAIR model (MAE=72.6$\pm$10.1 HU). Similarly, an improvement in $γ$-pass rate was obtained for DR vs Baseline. Conclusions: DR improved image similarity and dose accuracy on the unseen sequence compared to training only on acquired MRI. DR makes the model more robust, reducing the need for re-training when applying a model on sequences unseen and unavailable for retraining.
summary: Background: Synthetic computed tomography (sCT) has been proposed and increasingly clinically adopted to enable magnetic resonance imaging (MRI)-based radiotherapy. Deep learning (DL) has recently demonstrated the ability to generate accurate sCT from fixed MRI acquisitions. However, MRI protocols may change over time or differ between centres resulting in low-quality sCT due to poor model generalisation. Purpose: investigating domain randomisation (DR) to increase the generalisation of a DL model for brain sCT generation. Methods: CT and corresponding T1-weighted MRI with/without contrast, T2-weighted, and FLAIR MRI from 95 patients undergoing RT were collected, considering FLAIR the unseen sequence where to investigate generalisation. A ``Baseline'' generative adversarial network was trained with/without the FLAIR sequence to test how a model performs without DR. Image similarity and accuracy of sCT-based dose plans were assessed against CT to select the best-performing DR approach against the Baseline. Results: The Baseline model had the poorest performance on FLAIR, with mean absolute error (MAE)=106$\pm$20.7 HU (mean$\pmσ$). Performance on FLAIR significantly improved for the DR model with MAE=99.0$\pm$14.9 HU, but still inferior to the performance of the Baseline+FLAIR model (MAE=72.6$\pm$10.1 HU). Similarly, an improvement in $γ$-pass rate was obtained for DR vs Baseline. Conclusions: DR improved image similarity and dose accuracy on the unseen sequence compared to training only on acquired MRI. DR makes the model more robust, reducing the need for re-training when applying a model on sequences unseen and unavailable for retraining.
abstract_zh: 背景：合成计算机断层扫描（sCT）已被提出并越来越多地应用于临床，以实现基于磁共振成像（MRI）的放射治疗。深度学习 (DL) 最近展示了从固定 MRI 采集中生成准确 sCT 的能力。然而，MRI 协议可能会随着时间的推移而改变，或者中心之间存在差异，从而导致由于模型泛化不良而导致 sCT 质量低下。目的：研究域随机化 (DR)，以提高脑 sCT 生成的 DL 模型的泛化能力。方法：收集了 95 名接受 RT 的患者的 CT 和相应的有/无对比的 T1 加权 MRI、T2 加权和 FLAIR MRI，考虑到 FLAIR 是需要调查概括的看不见的序列。使用/不使用 FLAIR 序列训练“基线”生成对抗网络，以测试模型在没有 DR 的情况下的表现。根据 CT 评估基于 sCT 的剂量计划的图像相似性和准确性，以根据基线选择性能最佳的 DR 方法。结果：Baseline 模型在 FLAIR 上的性能最差，平均绝对误差 (MAE)=106$\pm$20.7 HU (mean$\pmσ$)。 DR 模型的 FLAIR 性能显着提高，MAE=99.0$\pm$14.9 HU，但仍低于 Baseline+FLAIR 模型的性能 (MAE=72.6$\pm$10.1 HU)。同样，与基线相比，DR 的 $γ$ 通过率有所提高。结论：与仅对采集的 MRI 进行训练相比，DR 提高了未见过序列的图像相似性和剂量准确性。 DR 使模型更加稳健，减少了将模型应用于看不见且无法重新训练的序列时重新训练的需要。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了通过领域随机化（DR）提高基于深度学习的脑部MRI到CT合成模型的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: MRI协议在不同中心或时间可能变化，导致模型泛化能力不足，生成的合成CT（sCT）质量下降，影响放疗计划准确性。
AI.method: 收集95例接受放疗患者的CT和多模态MRI数据，使用生成对抗网络（GAN）模型，对比基线模型（含/不含FLAIR序列）与DR方法在图像相似性和剂量计划准确性上的表现。
AI.result: 基线模型在FLAIR序列上的平均绝对误差（MAE）为106±20.7 HU，DR模型改善至99.0±14.9 HU，但仍低于使用FLAIR训练的基线+FLAIR模型（72.6±10.1 HU）。DR方法显著提升了γ通过率。
AI.conclusion: 领域随机化能增强模型对未见序列的鲁棒性，减少因序列不可用导致的重新训练需求，但效果仍弱于直接使用目标序列训练。

Similarly, an improvement in $γ$-pass rate was obtained for DR vs Baseline. Conclusions: DR improved image similarity and dose accuracy on the unseen sequence compared to training only on acquired MRI. DR makes the model more robust, reducing the need for re-training when applying a model on sequences unseen and unavailable for retraining. 背景：合成计算机断层扫描（sCT）已被提出并越来越多地应用于临床，以实现基于磁共振成像（MRI）的放射治疗。深度学习 (DL) 最近展示了从固定 MRI 采集中生成准确 sCT 的能力。然而，MRI 协议可能会随着时间的推移而改变，或者中心之间存在差异，从而导致由于模型泛化不良而导致 sCT 质量低下。目的：研究域随机化 (DR)，以提高脑 sCT 生成的 DL 模型的泛化能力。方法：收集了 95 名接受 RT 的患者的 CT 和相应的有/无对比的 T1 加权 MRI、T2 加权和 FLAIR MRI，考虑到 FLAIR 是需要调查概括的看不见的序列。使用/不使用 FLAIR 序列训练“基线”生成对抗网络，以测试模型在没有 DR 的情况下的表现。根据 CT 评估基于 sCT 的剂量计划的图像相似性和准确性，以根据基线选择性能最佳的 DR 方法。结果：Baseline 模型在 FLAIR 上的性能最差，平均绝对误差 (MAE)=106$\pm$20.7 HU (mean$\pmσ$)。 DR 模型的 FLAIR 性能显着提高，MAE=99.0$\pm$14.9 HU，但仍低于 Baseline+FLAIR 模型的性能 (MAE=72.6$\pm$10.1 HU)。同样，与基线相比，DR 的 $γ$ 通过率有所提高。结论：与仅对采集的 MRI 进行训练相比，DR 提高了未见过序列的图像相似性和剂量准确性。 DR 使模型更加稳健，减少了将模型应用于看不见且无法重新训练的序列时重新训练的需要。 本文探讨了通过领域随机化（DR）提高基于深度学习的脑部MRI到CT合成模型的泛化能力。 Lotte Nijskens,Cornelis,AT van den Berg,Joost JC Verhoeff,Matteo Maspero physics.med-ph,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Furkan Kaynar,Sudarshan Rajagopalan,Shaobo Zhou,Eckehard Steinbach
title: Remote Task-oriented Grasp Area Teaching By Non-Experts through Interactive Segmentation and Few-Shot Learning
title_zh: 非专家通过交互式分段和少镜头学习进行远程任务导向的掌握领域教学
comment: Presented at the AAAI Workshop on Artificial Intelligence for User-Centric Assistance in at-Home Tasks (2023)
comments: Presented at the AAAI Workshop on Artificial Intelligence for User-Centric Assistance in at-Home Tasks (2023)
abstract: A robot operating in unstructured environments must be able to discriminate between different grasping styles depending on the prospective manipulation task. Having a system that allows learning from remote non-expert demonstrations can very feasibly extend the cognitive skills of a robot for task-oriented grasping. We propose a novel two-step framework towards this aim. The first step involves grasp area estimation by segmentation. We receive grasp area demonstrations for a new task via interactive segmentation, and learn from these few demonstrations to estimate the required grasp area on an unseen scene for the given task. The second step is autonomous grasp estimation in the segmented region. To train the segmentation network for few-shot learning, we built a grasp area segmentation (GAS) dataset with 10089 images grouped into 1121 segmentation tasks. We benefit from an efficient meta learning algorithm for training for few-shot adaptation. Experimental evaluation showed that our method successfully detects the correct grasp area on the respective objects in unseen test scenes and effectively allows remote teaching of new grasp strategies by non-experts.
summary: A robot operating in unstructured environments must be able to discriminate between different grasping styles depending on the prospective manipulation task. Having a system that allows learning from remote non-expert demonstrations can very feasibly extend the cognitive skills of a robot for task-oriented grasping. We propose a novel two-step framework towards this aim. The first step involves grasp area estimation by segmentation. We receive grasp area demonstrations for a new task via interactive segmentation, and learn from these few demonstrations to estimate the required grasp area on an unseen scene for the given task. The second step is autonomous grasp estimation in the segmented region. To train the segmentation network for few-shot learning, we built a grasp area segmentation (GAS) dataset with 10089 images grouped into 1121 segmentation tasks. We benefit from an efficient meta learning algorithm for training for few-shot adaptation. Experimental evaluation showed that our method successfully detects the correct grasp area on the respective objects in unseen test scenes and effectively allows remote teaching of new grasp strategies by non-experts.
abstract_zh: 在非结构化环境中运行的机器人必须能够根据预期的操作任务区分不同的抓取方式。拥有一个允许从远程非专家演示中学习的系统可以非常可行地扩展机器人面向任务的抓取的认知技能。为了实现这一目标，我们提出了一个新颖的两步框架。第一步涉及通过分割掌握区域估计。我们通过交互式分割接收新任务的抓取区域演示，并从这几个演示中学习，以估计给定任务在未见过的场景上所需的抓取区域。第二步是分割区域中的自主抓取估计。为了训练用于少样本学习的分割网络，我们构建了一个掌握区域分割 (GAS) 数据集，其中包含 10089 个图像，分为 1121 个分割任务。我们受益于有效的元学习算法，用于训练小样本适应。实验评估表明，我们的方法成功地检测到未见过的测试场景中各个物体上的正确抓取区域，并有效地允许非专家远程教授新的抓取策略。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过交互式分割和少样本学习实现远程任务导向抓取区域教学的框架，使非专家能够远程指导机器人完成新任务的抓取策略学习。
AI.motivation: 机器人在非结构化环境中需根据任务需求区分不同抓取方式，但传统方法依赖专家示范，限制了扩展性。需开发允许非专家远程教学的系统以提升机器人认知能力。
AI.method: 两步框架：1）通过交互式分割获取新任务的抓取区域示范，利用少样本学习估计未知场景的抓取区域；2）在分割区域内自主估算抓取位置。构建包含10089张图像的抓取区域分割数据集（GAS），采用高效元学习算法训练模型。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法能准确检测新测试场景中目标物体的抓取区域，并有效支持非专家通过远程教学传授新抓取策略。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法通过交互分割与少样本学习结合，实现了任务导向的抓取区域教学，验证了非专家远程教学在机器人抓取任务中的可行性。

authors_text: Kris K. Dreher,Leonardo Ayala,Melanie Schellenberg,Marco Hübner,Jan-Hinrich Nölke,Tim J. Adler,Silvia Seidlitz,Jan Sellner,Alexander Studier-Fischer,Janek Gröhl,Felix Nickel,Ullrich Köthe,Alexander Seitel,Lena Maier-Hein
title: Unsupervised Domain Transfer with Conditional Invertible Neural Networks
title_zh: 使用条件可逆神经网络的无监督域转移
abstract: Synthetic medical image generation has evolved as a key technique for neural network training and validation. A core challenge, however, remains in the domain gap between simulations and real data. While deep learning-based domain transfer using Cycle Generative Adversarial Networks and similar architectures has led to substantial progress in the field, there are use cases in which state-of-the-art approaches still fail to generate training images that produce convincing results on relevant downstream tasks. Here, we address this issue with a domain transfer approach based on conditional invertible neural networks (cINNs). As a particular advantage, our method inherently guarantees cycle consistency through its invertible architecture, and network training can efficiently be conducted with maximum likelihood training. To showcase our method's generic applicability, we apply it to two spectral imaging modalities at different scales, namely hyperspectral imaging (pixel-level) and photoacoustic tomography (image-level). According to comprehensive experiments, our method enables the generation of realistic spectral data and outperforms the state of the art on two downstream classification tasks (binary and multi-class). cINN-based domain transfer could thus evolve as an important method for realistic synthetic data generation in the field of spectral imaging and beyond.
summary: Synthetic medical image generation has evolved as a key technique for neural network training and validation. A core challenge, however, remains in the domain gap between simulations and real data. While deep learning-based domain transfer using Cycle Generative Adversarial Networks and similar architectures has led to substantial progress in the field, there are use cases in which state-of-the-art approaches still fail to generate training images that produce convincing results on relevant downstream tasks. Here, we address this issue with a domain transfer approach based on conditional invertible neural networks (cINNs). As a particular advantage, our method inherently guarantees cycle consistency through its invertible architecture, and network training can efficiently be conducted with maximum likelihood training. To showcase our method's generic applicability, we apply it to two spectral imaging modalities at different scales, namely hyperspectral imaging (pixel-level) and photoacoustic tomography (image-level). According to comprehensive experiments, our method enables the generation of realistic spectral data and outperforms the state of the art on two downstream classification tasks (binary and multi-class). cINN-based domain transfer could thus evolve as an important method for realistic synthetic data generation in the field of spectral imaging and beyond.
abstract_zh: 合成医学图像生成已发展成为神经网络训练和验证的关键技术。然而，一个核心挑战仍然存在于模拟和真实数据之间的领域差距。虽然使用循环生成对抗网络和类似架构的基于深度学习的域转移已经在该领域取得了实质性进展，但在某些用例中，最先进的方法仍然无法生成训练图像，从而在相关下游任务上产生令人信服的结果。在这里，我们使用基于条件可逆神经网络（cINN）的域转移方法来解决这个问题。作为一个特殊的优势，我们的方法通过其可逆架构本质上保证了循环一致性，并且可以通过最大似然训练有效地进行网络训练。为了展示我们的方法的通用适用性，我们将其应用于不同尺度的两种光谱成像模式，即高光谱成像（像素级）和光声断层扫描（图像级）。根据综合实验，我们的方法能够生成真实的光谱数据，并在两个下游分类任务（二元和多类）上优于现有技术。因此，基于 cINN 的域转移可以发展成为光谱成像及其他领域中真实合成数据生成的重要方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于条件可逆神经网络（cINN）的无监督领域迁移方法，解决合成医学图像与真实数据间的领域差距问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法如Cycle GAN在生成训练图像时存在领域迁移效果不足，难以满足下游任务需求，需更高效且保证循环一致性的解决方案。
AI.method: 利用cINN的可逆特性实现固有循环一致性，通过最大似然训练优化网络，并在两种光谱成像模态（高光谱成像与光声断层扫描）中验证方法通用性。
AI.result: 生成的光谱数据具有更高真实性，在二分类和多分类任务中优于现有方法，验证了cINN在领域迁移中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: cINN为合成数据生成提供了新思路，有望在光谱成像及其他领域成为重要技术手段。

According to comprehensive experiments, our method enables the generation of realistic spectral data and outperforms the state of the art on two downstream classification tasks (binary and multi-class). cINN-based domain transfer could thus evolve as an important method for realistic synthetic data generation in the field of spectral imaging and beyond. 合成医学图像生成已发展成为神经网络训练和验证的关键技术。然而，一个核心挑战仍然存在于模拟和真实数据之间的领域差距。虽然使用循环生成对抗网络和类似架构的基于深度学习的域转移已经在该领域取得了实质性进展，但在某些用例中，最先进的方法仍然无法生成训练图像，从而在相关下游任务上产生令人信服的结果。在这里，我们使用基于条件可逆神经网络（cINN）的域转移方法来解决这个问题。作为一个特殊的优势，我们的方法通过其可逆架构本质上保证了循环一致性，并且可以通过最大似然训练有效地进行网络训练。为了展示我们的方法的通用适用性，我们将其应用于不同尺度的两种光谱成像模式，即高光谱成像（像素级）和光声断层扫描（图像级）。根据综合实验，我们的方法能够生成真实的光谱数据，并在两个下游分类任务（二元和多类）上优于现有技术。因此，基于 cINN 的域转移可以发展成为光谱成像及其他领域中真实合成数据生成的重要方法。 本文提出基于条件可逆神经网络（cINN）的无监督领域迁移方法，解决合成医学图像与真实数据间的领域差距问题。 Kris K. Dreher,Leonardo Ayala,Melanie Schellenberg,Marco Hübner,Jan-Hinrich Nölke,Tim J. Adler,Silvia Seidlitz,Jan Sellner,Alexander Studier-Fischer,Janek Gröhl,Felix Nickel,Ullrich Köthe,Alexander Seitel,Lena Maier-Hein eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Francesco Salmaso,Mirko Trisolini,Camilla Colombo
title: A machine learning and feature engineering approach for the prediction of the uncontrolled re-entry of space objects
title_zh: 用于预测空间物体失控再入的机器学习和特征工程方法
abstract: The continuously growing number of objects orbiting around the Earth is expected to be accompanied by an increasing frequency of objects re-entering the Earth's atmosphere. Many of these re-entries will be uncontrolled, making their prediction challenging and subject to several uncertainties. Traditionally, re-entry predictions are based on the propagation of the object's dynamics using state-of-the-art modelling techniques for the forces acting on the object. However, modelling errors, particularly related to the prediction of atmospheric drag may result in poor prediction accuracies. In this context, we explore the possibility to perform a paradigm shift, from a physics-based approach to a data-driven approach. To this aim, we present the development of a deep learning model for the re-entry prediction of uncontrolled objects in Low Earth Orbit (LEO). The model is based on a modified version of the Sequence-to-Sequence architecture and is trained on the average altitude profile as derived from a set of Two-Line Element (TLE) data of over 400 bodies. The novelty of the work consists in introducing in the deep learning model, alongside the average altitude, three new input features: a drag-like coefficient (B*), the average solar index, and the area-to-mass ratio of the object. The developed model is tested on a set of objects studied in the Inter-Agency Space Debris Coordination Committee (IADC) campaigns. The results show that the best performances are obtained on bodies characterised by the same drag-like coefficient and eccentricity distribution as the training set.
summary: The continuously growing number of objects orbiting around the Earth is expected to be accompanied by an increasing frequency of objects re-entering the Earth's atmosphere. Many of these re-entries will be uncontrolled, making their prediction challenging and subject to several uncertainties. Traditionally, re-entry predictions are based on the propagation of the object's dynamics using state-of-the-art modelling techniques for the forces acting on the object. However, modelling errors, particularly related to the prediction of atmospheric drag may result in poor prediction accuracies. In this context, we explore the possibility to perform a paradigm shift, from a physics-based approach to a data-driven approach. To this aim, we present the development of a deep learning model for the re-entry prediction of uncontrolled objects in Low Earth Orbit (LEO). The model is based on a modified version of the Sequence-to-Sequence architecture and is trained on the average altitude profile as derived from a set of Two-Line Element (TLE) data of over 400 bodies. The novelty of the work consists in introducing in the deep learning model, alongside the average altitude, three new input features: a drag-like coefficient (B*), the average solar index, and the area-to-mass ratio of the object. The developed model is tested on a set of objects studied in the Inter-Agency Space Debris Coordination Committee (IADC) campaigns. The results show that the best performances are obtained on bodies characterised by the same drag-like coefficient and eccentricity distribution as the training set.
abstract_zh: 绕地球轨道运行的物体数量不断增加，预计物体重新进入地球大气层的频率也会增加。许多重返大气层都是不受控制的，这使得它们的预测具有挑战性，并受到一些不确定性的影响。传统上，再入预测基于物体动力学的传播，使用最先进的建模技术来模拟作用在物体上的力。然而，建模误差，特别是与大气阻力预测相关的建模误差，可能会导致预测精度较差。在这种背景下，我们探索执行范式转变的可能性，从基于物理的方法到数据驱动的方法。为此，我们开发了一种深度学习模型，用于预测低地球轨道（LEO）中不受控制的物体的再入。该模型基于序列到序列架构的修改版本，并根据从 400 多个物体的一组两线元 (TLE) 数据得出的平均高度剖面进行训练。这项工作的新颖之处在于，在深度学习模型中除了平均高度之外，还引入了三个新的输入特征：类阻力系数 (B*)、平均太阳指数和物体的面积质量比。所开发的模型在机构间空间碎片协调委员会（IADC）活动中研究的一组物体上进行了测试。结果表明，在具有与训练集相同的阻力系数和偏心率分布的物体上获得了最佳性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的模型，用于预测低地球轨道上失控空间物体的再入时间，通过引入新的特征工程方法改进预测精度。
AI.motivation: 传统物理建模方法因大气阻力预测误差导致再入预测准确性不足，需探索数据驱动方法以应对不确定性。
AI.method: 采用改进的序列到序列架构，结合超过400个物体的TLE数据训练模型，并引入拖曳系数、太阳指数和面积质量比三个新特征。
AI.result: 模型在IADC测试集上表现最佳，尤其适用于与训练集具有相同拖曳系数和偏心率分布的物体。
AI.conclusion: 数据驱动方法可有效提升再入预测准确性，但其性能依赖于测试对象与训练数据在关键特征上的相似性。

authors_text: Behrouz Ahadzadeh,Moloud Abdar,Fatemeh Safara,Abbas Khosravi,Mohammad Bagher Menhaj,Ponnuthurai Nagaratnam Suganthan
title: SFE: A Simple, Fast and Efficient Feature Selection Algorithm for High-Dimensional Data
title_zh: SFE：一种简单、快速、高效的高维数据特征选择算法
abstract: In this paper, a new feature selection algorithm, called SFE (Simple, Fast, and Efficient), is proposed for high-dimensional datasets. The SFE algorithm performs its search process using a search agent and two operators: non-selection and selection. It comprises two phases: exploration and exploitation. In the exploration phase, the non-selection operator performs a global search in the entire problem search space for the irrelevant, redundant, trivial, and noisy features, and changes the status of the features from selected mode to non-selected mode. In the exploitation phase, the selection operator searches the problem search space for the features with a high impact on the classification results, and changes the status of the features from non-selected mode to selected mode. The proposed SFE is successful in feature selection from high-dimensional datasets. However, after reducing the dimensionality of a dataset, its performance cannot be increased significantly. In these situations, an evolutionary computational method could be used to find a more efficient subset of features in the new and reduced search space. To overcome this issue, this paper proposes a hybrid algorithm, SFE-PSO (particle swarm optimization) to find an optimal feature subset. The efficiency and effectiveness of the SFE and the SFE-PSO for feature selection are compared on 40 high-dimensional datasets. Their performances were compared with six recently proposed feature selection algorithms. The results obtained indicate that the two proposed algorithms significantly outperform the other algorithms, and can be used as efficient and effective algorithms in selecting features from high-dimensional datasets.
summary: In this paper, a new feature selection algorithm, called SFE (Simple, Fast, and Efficient), is proposed for high-dimensional datasets. The SFE algorithm performs its search process using a search agent and two operators: non-selection and selection. It comprises two phases: exploration and exploitation. In the exploration phase, the non-selection operator performs a global search in the entire problem search space for the irrelevant, redundant, trivial, and noisy features, and changes the status of the features from selected mode to non-selected mode. In the exploitation phase, the selection operator searches the problem search space for the features with a high impact on the classification results, and changes the status of the features from non-selected mode to selected mode. The proposed SFE is successful in feature selection from high-dimensional datasets. However, after reducing the dimensionality of a dataset, its performance cannot be increased significantly. In these situations, an evolutionary computational method could be used to find a more efficient subset of features in the new and reduced search space. To overcome this issue, this paper proposes a hybrid algorithm, SFE-PSO (particle swarm optimization) to find an optimal feature subset. The efficiency and effectiveness of the SFE and the SFE-PSO for feature selection are compared on 40 high-dimensional datasets. Their performances were compared with six recently proposed feature selection algorithms. The results obtained indicate that the two proposed algorithms significantly outperform the other algorithms, and can be used as efficient and effective algorithms in selecting features from high-dimensional datasets.
abstract_zh: 本文针对高维数据集提出了一种新的特征选择算法，称为 SFE（简单、快速、高效）。 SFE 算法使用搜索代理和两个运算符（非选择和选择）来执行搜索过程。它包括两个阶段：勘探和开发。在探索阶段，非选择算子在整个问题搜索空间中对不相关的、冗余的、琐碎的和噪声的特征进行全局搜索，并将特征的状态从选择模式改变为非选择模式。在开发阶段，选择算子在问题搜索空间中搜索对分类结果影响较大的特征，并将特征的状态从非选择模式更改为选择模式。所提出的 SFE 在高维数据集中的特征选择方面取得了成功。然而，数据集降维后，其性能并不能得到显着提升。在这些情况下，可以使用进化计算方法在新的和缩小的搜索空间中找到更有效的特征子集。为了克服这个问题，本文提出了一种混合算法，SFE-PSO（粒子群优化）来寻找最佳特征子集。在 40 个高维数据集上比较了 SFE 和 SFE-PSO 用于特征选择的效率和有效性。将它们的性能与最近提出的六种特征选择算法进行了比较。获得的结果表明，所提出的两种算法明显优于其他算法，并且可以作为从高维数据集中选择特征的高效且有效的算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SFE的特征选择算法及其混合版本SFE-PSO，用于高效处理高维数据集的特征选择问题。
AI.motivation: 高维数据集的特征选择面临计算效率和精度的挑战，现有算法在降维后难以进一步提升性能，需更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: SFE算法通过探索阶段（非选择算子全局搜索无关特征）和开发阶段（选择算子筛选关键特征）分两阶段进行特征选择，并结合粒子群优化（PSO）形成混合算法SFE-PSO以优化子集。
AI.result: 在40个高维数据集上实验表明，SFE和SFE-PSO显著优于六种最新算法，能有效选出最优特征子集。
AI.conclusion: SFE及SFE-PSO算法在特征选择任务中兼具高效性与准确性，可作为高维数据处理的有效工具。

The efficiency and effectiveness of the SFE and the SFE-PSO for feature selection are compared on 40 high-dimensional datasets. Their performances were compared with six recently proposed feature selection algorithms. The results obtained indicate that the two proposed algorithms significantly outperform the other algorithms, and can be used as efficient and effective algorithms in selecting features from high-dimensional datasets. 本文针对高维数据集提出了一种新的特征选择算法，称为 SFE（简单、快速、高效）。 SFE 算法使用搜索代理和两个运算符（非选择和选择）来执行搜索过程。它包括两个阶段：勘探和开发。在探索阶段，非选择算子在整个问题搜索空间中对不相关的、冗余的、琐碎的和噪声的特征进行全局搜索，并将特征的状态从选择模式改变为非选择模式。在开发阶段，选择算子在问题搜索空间中搜索对分类结果影响较大的特征，并将特征的状态从非选择模式更改为选择模式。所提出的 SFE 在高维数据集中的特征选择方面取得了成功。然而，数据集降维后，其性能并不能得到显着提升。在这些情况下，可以使用进化计算方法在新的和缩小的搜索空间中找到更有效的特征子集。为了克服这个问题，本文提出了一种混合算法，SFE-PSO（粒子群优化）来寻找最佳特征子集。在 40 个高维数据集上比较了 SFE 和 SFE-PSO 用于特征选择的效率和有效性。将它们的性能与最近提出的六种特征选择算法进行了比较。获得的结果表明，所提出的两种算法明显优于其他算法，并且可以作为从高维数据集中选择特征的高效且有效的算法。 本文提出了一种名为SFE的特征选择算法及其混合版本SFE-PSO，用于高效处理高维数据集的特征选择问题。 Behrouz Ahadzadeh,Moloud Abdar,Fatemeh Safara,Abbas Khosravi,Mohammad Bagher Menhaj,Ponnuthurai Nagaratnam Suganthan cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.NE

authors_text: Raghavendra Selvan,Julian Schön,Erik B Dam
title: Operating critical machine learning models in resource constrained regimes
title_zh: 在资源有限的情况下运行关键的机器学习模型
comment: Accepted to the Resource Efficient Medical Image Analysis workshop at MICCAI-2023. Source code available at https://github.com/raghavian/redl
comments: Accepted to the Resource Efficient Medical Image Analysis workshop at MICCAI-2023. Source code available at https://github.com/raghavian/redl
abstract: The accelerated development of machine learning methods, primarily deep learning, are causal to the recent breakthroughs in medical image analysis and computer aided intervention. The resource consumption of deep learning models in terms of amount of training data, compute and energy costs are known to be massive. These large resource costs can be barriers in deploying these models in clinics, globally. To address this, there are cogent efforts within the machine learning community to introduce notions of resource efficiency. For instance, using quantisation to alleviate memory consumption. While most of these methods are shown to reduce the resource utilisation, they could come at a cost in performance. In this work, we probe into the trade-off between resource consumption and performance, specifically, when dealing with models that are used in critical settings such as in clinics.
summary: The accelerated development of machine learning methods, primarily deep learning, are causal to the recent breakthroughs in medical image analysis and computer aided intervention. The resource consumption of deep learning models in terms of amount of training data, compute and energy costs are known to be massive. These large resource costs can be barriers in deploying these models in clinics, globally. To address this, there are cogent efforts within the machine learning community to introduce notions of resource efficiency. For instance, using quantisation to alleviate memory consumption. While most of these methods are shown to reduce the resource utilisation, they could come at a cost in performance. In this work, we probe into the trade-off between resource consumption and performance, specifically, when dealing with models that are used in critical settings such as in clinics.
abstract_zh: 机器学习方法（主要是深度学习）的加速发展是医学图像分析和计算机辅助干预最近取得突破的原因。众所周知，深度学习模型在训练数据量、计算和能源成本方面的资源消耗是巨大的。这些巨大的资源成本可能会成为在全球诊所部署这些模型的障碍。为了解决这个问题，机器学习社区做出了令人信服的努力，引入资源效率的概念。例如，使用量化来减少内存消耗。虽然这些方法中的大多数都被证明可以减少资源利用率，但它们可能会以性能为代价。在这项工作中，我们探讨了资源消耗和性能之间的权衡，特别是在处理在诊所等关键环境中使用的模型时。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在资源受限环境下运行关键机器学习模型时资源消耗与性能之间的权衡问题。
AI.motivation: 深度学习模型在医疗等关键场景中面临高资源消耗与部署限制的矛盾，现有资源优化方法可能影响模型性能，需探索有效平衡方案。
AI.method: 通过量化等资源优化技术，分析不同资源约束下模型性能的变化，并评估其在关键应用中的可行性。
AI.result: 发现资源优化方法在降低消耗的同时可能引发性能下降，需根据具体场景调整优化策略以维持关键任务可靠性。
AI.conclusion: 在资源受限的临床等关键场景中，需综合考虑资源效率与性能保障，制定针对性的模型优化方案。

authors_text: Xiuding Cai,Jiao Chen,Yaoyao Zhu,Beimin Wang,Yu Yao
title: Towards Real-World Applications of Personalized Anesthesia Using Policy Constraint Q Learning for Propofol Infusion Control
title_zh: 使用策略约束 Q 学习进行异丙酚输注控制，实现个性化麻醉的实际应用
abstract: Automated anesthesia promises to enable more precise and personalized anesthetic administration and free anesthesiologists from repetitive tasks, allowing them to focus on the most critical aspects of a patient's surgical care. Current research has typically focused on creating simulated environments from which agents can learn. These approaches have demonstrated good experimental results, but are still far from clinical application. In this paper, Policy Constraint Q-Learning (PCQL), a data-driven reinforcement learning algorithm for solving the problem of learning anesthesia strategies on real clinical datasets, is proposed. Conservative Q-Learning was first introduced to alleviate the problem of Q function overestimation in an offline context. A policy constraint term is added to agent training to keep the policy distribution of the agent and the anesthesiologist consistent to ensure safer decisions made by the agent in anesthesia scenarios. The effectiveness of PCQL was validated by extensive experiments on a real clinical anesthesia dataset. Experimental results show that PCQL is predicted to achieve higher gains than the baseline approach while maintaining good agreement with the reference dose given by the anesthesiologist, using less total dose, and being more responsive to the patient's vital signs. In addition, the confidence intervals of the agent were investigated, which were able to cover most of the clinical decisions of the anesthesiologist. Finally, an interpretable method, SHAP, was used to analyze the contributing components of the model predictions to increase the transparency of the model.
summary: Automated anesthesia promises to enable more precise and personalized anesthetic administration and free anesthesiologists from repetitive tasks, allowing them to focus on the most critical aspects of a patient's surgical care. Current research has typically focused on creating simulated environments from which agents can learn. These approaches have demonstrated good experimental results, but are still far from clinical application. In this paper, Policy Constraint Q-Learning (PCQL), a data-driven reinforcement learning algorithm for solving the problem of learning anesthesia strategies on real clinical datasets, is proposed. Conservative Q-Learning was first introduced to alleviate the problem of Q function overestimation in an offline context. A policy constraint term is added to agent training to keep the policy distribution of the agent and the anesthesiologist consistent to ensure safer decisions made by the agent in anesthesia scenarios. The effectiveness of PCQL was validated by extensive experiments on a real clinical anesthesia dataset. Experimental results show that PCQL is predicted to achieve higher gains than the baseline approach while maintaining good agreement with the reference dose given by the anesthesiologist, using less total dose, and being more responsive to the patient's vital signs. In addition, the confidence intervals of the agent were investigated, which were able to cover most of the clinical decisions of the anesthesiologist. Finally, an interpretable method, SHAP, was used to analyze the contributing components of the model predictions to increase the transparency of the model.
abstract_zh: 自动麻醉有望实现更精确和个性化的麻醉管理，并将麻醉师从重复性任务中解放出来，使他们能够专注于患者手术护理中最关键的方面。当前的研究通常集中于创建代理可以从中学习的模拟环境。这些方法已经取得了良好的实验效果，但离临床应用还很远。本文提出了策略约束 Q-学习（PCQL），这是一种数据驱动的强化学习算法，用于解决在真实临床数据集上学习麻醉策略的问题。保守 Q-Learning 最初是为了缓解离线环境下 Q 函数高估的问题而引入的。在坐席训练中添加策略约束项，使坐席和麻醉师的策略分布保持一致，确保坐席在麻醉场景下做出更安全的决策。 PCQL 的有效性通过真实临床麻醉数据集的大量实验得到验证。实验结果表明，PCQL 预计将获得比基线方法更高的增益，同时与麻醉师给出的参考剂量保持良好的一致性，使用更少的总剂量，并且对患者的生命体征更加敏感。此外，还研究了药剂的置信区间，这能够涵盖麻醉师的大部分临床决策。最后，使用可解释的方法 SHAP 来分析模型预测的贡献成分，以提高模型的透明度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于策略约束Q学习（PCQL）的强化学习算法，用于解决真实临床数据中的丙泊酚输注控制问题，以实现个性化麻醉。
AI.motivation: 当前自动化麻醉研究多依赖模拟环境，难以直接应用于临床，且现有方法在安全性和个性化方面存在不足。
AI.method: 结合保守Q学习缓解离线过估计问题，并引入策略约束项使智能体决策与麻醉医生保持一致，通过SHAP方法增强模型可解释性。
AI.result: 实验表明PCQL在真实临床数据集上优于基线方法，总用药量更少，对生命体征响应更灵敏，且置信区间覆盖大部分临床决策。
AI.conclusion: PCQL在保持安全性的同时实现了更优的麻醉策略，为个性化麻醉的临床应用提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Jialiang Tan,Yu Chen,Shuyin Jiao
title: Visual Studio Code in Introductory Computer Science Course: An Experience Report
title_zh: 计算机科学入门课程中的 Visual Studio Code：经验报告
abstract: Involving integrated development environments (IDEs) in introductory-level (CS1) programming courses is critical. However, it is difficult for instructors to find a suitable IDE that is beginner friendly and supports strong functionality. In this paper, we report the experience of using Visual Studio Code (VS Code) in a CS1 programming course. We describe our motivation for choosing VS Code and how we introduce it to students. We create comprehensive guidance with hierarchical indexing to help students with diverse programming backgrounds. We perform an experimental evaluation of students' programming experience of using VS Code and validate the VS Code together with guidance as a promising solution for CS1 programming courses.
summary: Involving integrated development environments (IDEs) in introductory-level (CS1) programming courses is critical. However, it is difficult for instructors to find a suitable IDE that is beginner friendly and supports strong functionality. In this paper, we report the experience of using Visual Studio Code (VS Code) in a CS1 programming course. We describe our motivation for choosing VS Code and how we introduce it to students. We create comprehensive guidance with hierarchical indexing to help students with diverse programming backgrounds. We perform an experimental evaluation of students' programming experience of using VS Code and validate the VS Code together with guidance as a promising solution for CS1 programming courses.
abstract_zh: 将集成开发环境 (IDE) 纳入入门级 (CS1) 编程课程至关重要。然而，教师很难找到一款适合初学者且功能强大的IDE。在本文中，我们报告了在 CS1 编程课程中使用 Visual Studio Code (VS Code) 的体验。我们描述了选择 VS Code 的动机以及我们如何向学生介绍它。我们通过分层索引创建全面的指导，以帮助具有不同编程背景的学生。我们对学生使用 VS Code 的编程体验进行实验评估，并验证 VS Code 和指导是否是 CS1 编程课程的一个有前途的解决方案。

AI.motivation: 传统IDE可能复杂难用，需寻找适合初学者且功能强大的IDE以提升教学效果
AI.method: 设计分层索引教学指南并实施实验评估，对比学生使用VS Code的编程体验
AI.result: 实验表明VS Code结合教学指南能有效提升学生编程体验，成为CS1课程的可行方案
AI.conclusion: VS Code凭借其易用性与扩展性，辅以结构化指导，可有效支持入门编程教学

search_text: Visual Studio Code in Introductory Computer Science Course: An Experience Report 计算机科学入门课程中的 Visual Studio Code：经验报告 Involving integrated development environments (IDEs) in introductory-level (CS1) programming courses is critical. However, it is difficult for instructors to find a suitable IDE that is beginner friendly and supports strong functionality. In this paper, we report the experience of using Visual Studio Code (VS Code) in a CS1 programming course. We describe our motivation for choosing VS Code and how we introduce it to students. We create comprehensive guidance with hierarchical indexing to help students with diverse programming backgrounds. We perform an experimental evaluation of students' programming experience of using VS Code and validate the VS Code together with guidance as a promising solution for CS1 programming courses. 将集成开发环境 (IDE) 纳入入门级 (CS1) 编程课程至关重要。然而，教师很难找到一款适合初学者且功能强大的IDE。在本文中，我们报告了在 CS1 编程课程中使用 Visual Studio Code (VS Code) 的体验。我们描述了选择 VS Code 的动机以及我们如何向学生介绍它。我们通过分层索引创建全面的指导，以帮助具有不同编程背景的学生。我们对学生使用 VS Code 的编程体验进行实验评估，并验证 VS Code 和指导是否是 CS1 编程课程的一个有前途的解决方案。 探讨在入门计算机科学课程中使用Visual Studio Code（VS Code）作为教学工具的效果与可行性 Jialiang Tan,Yu Chen,Shuyin Jiao cs.HC,cs.PL

authors_text: Luis C. Garcia-Peraza-Herrera,Sebastien Ourselin,Tom Vercauteren
title: VideoSum: A Python Library for Surgical Video Summarization
title_zh: VideoSum：用于手术视频摘要的 Python 库
abstract: The performance of deep learning (DL) algorithms is heavily influenced by the quantity and the quality of the annotated data. However, in Surgical Data Science, access to it is limited. It is thus unsurprising that substantial research efforts are made to develop methods aiming at mitigating the scarcity of annotated SDS data. In parallel, an increasing number of Computer Assisted Interventions (CAI) datasets are being released, although the scale of these remain limited. On these premises, data curation is becoming a key element of many SDS research endeavors. Surgical video datasets are demanding to curate and would benefit from dedicated support tools. In this work, we propose to summarize surgical videos into storyboards or collages of representative frames to ease visualization, annotation, and processing. Video summarization is well-established for natural images. However, state-of-the-art methods typically rely on models trained on human-made annotations, few methods have been evaluated on surgical videos, and the availability of software packages for the task is limited. We present videosum, an easy-to-use and open-source Python library to generate storyboards from surgical videos that contains a variety of unsupervised methods.
summary: The performance of deep learning (DL) algorithms is heavily influenced by the quantity and the quality of the annotated data. However, in Surgical Data Science, access to it is limited. It is thus unsurprising that substantial research efforts are made to develop methods aiming at mitigating the scarcity of annotated SDS data. In parallel, an increasing number of Computer Assisted Interventions (CAI) datasets are being released, although the scale of these remain limited. On these premises, data curation is becoming a key element of many SDS research endeavors. Surgical video datasets are demanding to curate and would benefit from dedicated support tools. In this work, we propose to summarize surgical videos into storyboards or collages of representative frames to ease visualization, annotation, and processing. Video summarization is well-established for natural images. However, state-of-the-art methods typically rely on models trained on human-made annotations, few methods have been evaluated on surgical videos, and the availability of software packages for the task is limited. We present videosum, an easy-to-use and open-source Python library to generate storyboards from surgical videos that contains a variety of unsupervised methods.
abstract_zh: 深度学习（DL）算法的性能很大程度上受到注释数据的数量和质量的影响。然而，在外科数据科学中，对其的访问是有限的。因此，毫不奇怪，人们进行了大量的研究工作来开发旨在缓解带注释的 SDS 数据稀缺的方法。与此同时，越来越多的计算机辅助干预 (CAI) 数据集正在发布，尽管这些数据集的规模仍然有限。在这些前提下，数据管理正在成为许多 SDS 研究工作的关键要素。手术视频数据集的管理要求很高，并且可以从专用的支持工具中受益。在这项工作中，我们建议将手术视频总结为故事板或代表性帧的拼贴画，以简化可视化、注释和处理。视频摘要对于自然图像来说已经很成熟了。然而，最先进的方法通常依赖于人工注释训练的模型，在手术视频上评估的方法很少，并且用于该任务的软件包的可用性是有限的。我们推出 videosum，一个易于使用的开源 Python 库，用于从包含各种无监督方法的手术视频生成故事板。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为VideoSum的Python库，用于从手术视频中生成故事板或代表性帧的拼贴画，以简化可视化、标注和处理。
AI.motivation: 由于手术数据科学中缺乏标注数据，研究者们致力于开发缓解数据稀缺性的方法。手术视频数据集的整理工作复杂，需要专用工具来简化流程。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种名为VideoSum的开源Python库，包含多种无监督方法，用于从手术视频中生成故事板或代表性帧的拼贴画。
AI.result: VideoSum库能够有效生成手术视频的故事板，为手术视频的可视化、标注和处理提供支持。
AI.conclusion: VideoSum为手术视频的整理和处理提供了实用工具，有助于推动手术数据科学的研究。

authors_text: Dalí F. D. dos Santos,Paulo R. de Faria,Adriano M. Loyola,Sérgio V. Cardoso,Bruno A. N. Travençolo,Marcelo Z. do Nascimento
title: Hematoxylin and eosin stained oral squamous cell carcinoma histological images dataset
title_zh: 苏木精和伊红染色的口腔鳞状细胞癌组织学图像数据集
abstract: Computer-aided diagnosis (CAD) can be used as an important tool to aid and enhance pathologists' diagnostic decision-making. Deep learning techniques, such as convolutional neural networks (CNN) and fully convolutional networks (FCN), have been successfully applied in medical and biological research. Unfortunately, histological image segmentation is often constrained by the availability of labeled training data once labeling histological images for segmentation purposes is a highly-skilled, complex, and time-consuming task. This paper presents the hematoxylin and eosin (H&E) stained oral cavity-derived cancer (OCDC) dataset, a labeled dataset containing H&E-stained histological images of oral squamous cell carcinoma (OSCC) cases. The tumor regions in our dataset are labeled manually by a specialist and validated by a pathologist. The OCDC dataset presents 1,020 histological images of size 640x640 pixels containing tumor regions fully annotated for segmentation purposes. All the histological images are digitized at 20x magnification.
summary: Computer-aided diagnosis (CAD) can be used as an important tool to aid and enhance pathologists' diagnostic decision-making. Deep learning techniques, such as convolutional neural networks (CNN) and fully convolutional networks (FCN), have been successfully applied in medical and biological research. Unfortunately, histological image segmentation is often constrained by the availability of labeled training data once labeling histological images for segmentation purposes is a highly-skilled, complex, and time-consuming task. This paper presents the hematoxylin and eosin (H&E) stained oral cavity-derived cancer (OCDC) dataset, a labeled dataset containing H&E-stained histological images of oral squamous cell carcinoma (OSCC) cases. The tumor regions in our dataset are labeled manually by a specialist and validated by a pathologist. The OCDC dataset presents 1,020 histological images of size 640x640 pixels containing tumor regions fully annotated for segmentation purposes. All the histological images are digitized at 20x magnification.
abstract_zh: 计算机辅助诊断（CAD）可以作为辅助和增强病理学家诊断决策的重要工具。深度学习技术，如卷积神经网络（CNN）和全卷积网络（FCN），已成功应用于医学和生物学研究。不幸的是，一旦为分割目的标记组织学图像是一项高技能、复杂且耗时的任务，组织学图像分割通常会受到标记训练数据的可用性的限制。本文介绍了苏木精和伊红 (H&E) 染色的口腔源性癌症 (OCDC) 数据集，这是一个包含口腔鳞状细胞癌 (OSCC) 病例的 H&E 染色组织学图像的标记数据集。我们数据集中的肿瘤区域由专家手动标记并由病理学家验证。 OCDC 数据集提供了 1,020 个大小为 640x640 像素的组织学图像，其中包含出于分割目的而完全注释的肿瘤区域。所有组织学图像均以 20 倍放大倍数数字化。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个用于口腔鳞状细胞癌（OSCC）分割任务的HE染色组织学图像数据集。
AI.motivation: 深度学习在医学图像分割中需要大量标注数据，但组织学图像标注过程复杂且耗时，现有数据不足。
AI.method: 通过专业人员手动标注并由病理学家验证，构建包含1,020张20倍放大HE染色图像的数据集，每张图像尺寸为640x640像素且肿瘤区域完全标注。
AI.result: 提供了可用于分割任务的标注数据集，包含口腔癌组织学图像的肿瘤区域标注信息。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集为计算机辅助诊断系统开发提供了高质量标注资源，有助于推动病理图像分割技术研究。

authors_text: Thierry Noah Dana-Picard
title: Computer Assisted Proofs and Automated Methods in Mathematics Education
title_zh: 数学教育中的计算机辅助证明和自动化方法
abstract: This survey paper is an expanded version of an invited keynote at the ThEdu'22 workshop, August 2022, in Haifa (Israel). After a short introduction on the developments of CAS, DGS and other useful technologies, we show implications in Mathematics Education, and in the broader frame of STEAM Education. In particular, we discuss the transformation of Mathematics Education into exploration-discovery-conjecture-proof scheme, avoiding usage as a black box . This scheme fits well into the so-called 4 C's of 21st Century Education. Communication and Collaboration are emphasized not only between humans, but also between machines, and between man and machine. Specific characteristics of the outputs enhance the need of Critical Thinking. The usage of automated commands for exploration and discovery is discussed, with mention of limitations where they exist. We illustrate the topic with examples from parametric integrals (describing a "cognitive neighborhood" of a mathematical notion), plane geometry, and the study of plane curves (envelopes, isoptic curves). Some of the examples are fully worked out, others are explained and references are given.
summary: This survey paper is an expanded version of an invited keynote at the ThEdu'22 workshop, August 2022, in Haifa (Israel). After a short introduction on the developments of CAS, DGS and other useful technologies, we show implications in Mathematics Education, and in the broader frame of STEAM Education. In particular, we discuss the transformation of Mathematics Education into exploration-discovery-conjecture-proof scheme, avoiding usage as a black box . This scheme fits well into the so-called 4 C's of 21st Century Education. Communication and Collaboration are emphasized not only between humans, but also between machines, and between man and machine. Specific characteristics of the outputs enhance the need of Critical Thinking. The usage of automated commands for exploration and discovery is discussed, with mention of limitations where they exist. We illustrate the topic with examples from parametric integrals (describing a "cognitive neighborhood" of a mathematical notion), plane geometry, and the study of plane curves (envelopes, isoptic curves). Some of the examples are fully worked out, others are explained and references are given.
abstract_zh: 本调查论文是 2022 年 8 月在海法（以色列）举行的 ThEdu'22 研讨会受邀主题演讲的扩展版本。在简要介绍 CAS、DGS 和其他有用技术的发展之后，我们展示了其对数学教育以及更广泛的 STEAM 教育框架的影响。特别是，我们讨论了数学教育向探索-发现-猜想证明方案的转变，避免用作黑匣子。该计划非常符合所谓的 21 世纪教育 4C。不仅强调人与人之间的沟通与协作，还强调机器与机器之间、人与机器之间的沟通与协作。产出的具体特征增强了批判性思维的需求。讨论了用于探索和发现的自动命令的使用，并提到了它们存在的局限性。我们用参数积分（描述数学概念的“认知邻域”）、平面几何和平面曲线（包络线、等视曲线）研究的例子来说明该主题。一些例子已得到充分阐述，另一些则进行了解释并给出了参考文献。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了计算机辅助证明和自动化方法在数学教育中的应用，探讨其对教学模式和学生能力培养的影响。
AI.motivation: 随着计算机技术的发展，传统数学教育模式面临转型需求，需探索如何利用技术工具提升学生的探索、发现和批判性思维能力。
AI.method: 通过分析计算机代数系统（CAS）、动态几何软件（DGS）等工具的应用案例，结合参数积分、平面几何等具体数学内容进行实证研究。
AI.result: 提出数学教育应转向探索-发现-猜想-证明的模式，与21世纪教育的4C理念（沟通、协作、批判性思维、创造力）相契合，并指出现有技术的局限性。
AI.conclusion: 技术工具能有效促进数学教育创新，但需平衡自动化与人工思维的结合，避免过度依赖技术黑箱。

authors_text: Vanya Bannihatti Kumar,Shanbo Cheng,Ningxin Peng,Yuchen Zhang
title: Visual Information Matters for ASR Error Correction
title_zh: 视觉信息对于 ASR 纠错很重要
abstract: Aiming to improve the Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) outputs with a post-processing step, ASR error correction (EC) techniques have been widely developed due to their efficiency in using parallel text data. Previous works mainly focus on using text or/ and speech data, which hinders the performance gain when not only text and speech information, but other modalities, such as visual information are critical for EC. The challenges are mainly two folds: one is that previous work fails to emphasize visual information, thus rare exploration has been studied. The other is that the community lacks a high-quality benchmark where visual information matters for the EC models. Therefore, this paper provides 1) simple yet effective methods, namely gated fusion and image captions as prompts to incorporate visual information to help EC; 2) large-scale benchmark datasets, namely Visual-ASR-EC, where each item in the training data consists of visual, speech, and text information, and the test data are carefully selected by human annotators to ensure that even humans could make mistakes when visual information is missing. Experimental results show that using captions as prompts could effectively use the visual information and surpass state-of-the-art methods by upto 1.2% in Word Error Rate(WER), which also indicates that visual information is critical in our proposed Visual-ASR-EC dataset
summary: Aiming to improve the Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) outputs with a post-processing step, ASR error correction (EC) techniques have been widely developed due to their efficiency in using parallel text data. Previous works mainly focus on using text or/ and speech data, which hinders the performance gain when not only text and speech information, but other modalities, such as visual information are critical for EC. The challenges are mainly two folds: one is that previous work fails to emphasize visual information, thus rare exploration has been studied. The other is that the community lacks a high-quality benchmark where visual information matters for the EC models. Therefore, this paper provides 1) simple yet effective methods, namely gated fusion and image captions as prompts to incorporate visual information to help EC; 2) large-scale benchmark datasets, namely Visual-ASR-EC, where each item in the training data consists of visual, speech, and text information, and the test data are carefully selected by human annotators to ensure that even humans could make mistakes when visual information is missing. Experimental results show that using captions as prompts could effectively use the visual information and surpass state-of-the-art methods by upto 1.2% in Word Error Rate(WER), which also indicates that visual information is critical in our proposed Visual-ASR-EC dataset
abstract_zh: 为了通过后处理步骤改进自动语音识别 (ASR) 输出，ASR 纠错 (EC) 技术由于其使用并行文本数据的效率而得到了广泛的开发。以前的工作主要集中在使用文本或/和语音数据，当不仅文本和语音信息，而且其他形式（例如视觉信息）对于 EC 也至关重要时，这会阻碍性能增益。挑战主要有两个方面：一是之前的工作未能强调视觉信息，因此很少进行探索。另一个是社区缺乏视觉信息对 EC 模型很重要的高质量基准。因此，本文提供了1）简单而有效的方法，即门控融合和图像描述作为提示，结合视觉信息来帮助EC； 2）大规模基准数据集，即Visual-ASR-EC，其中训练数据中的每一项都由视觉、语音和文本信息组成，测试数据由人类注释者仔细选择，以确保即使是人类在视觉信息缺失时也可能会犯错误。实验结果表明，使用标题作为提示可以有效地利用视觉信息，并且在单词错误率（WER）方面超越最先进的方法高达 1.2％，这也表明视觉信息在我们提出的 Visual-ASR-EC 数据集中至关重要

AI.tldr: 本论文研究如何利用视觉信息提升自动语音识别（ASR）错误校正效果。
AI.motivation: 现有ASR错误校正方法忽视视觉信息，导致性能受限，且缺乏包含视觉信息的高质量基准数据集。
AI.method: 提出门控融合机制与图像字幕提示两种方法整合视觉信息，并构建包含视觉、语音、文本的Visual-ASR-EC数据集。
AI.result: 使用字幕提示的方法在Word Error Rate（WER）上超越现有最佳方法1.2%。
AI.conclusion: 视觉信息对错误校正至关重要，所提方法及数据集为未来研究提供了有效工具与基准。

authors_text: Daochen Zha,Zaid Pervaiz Bhat,Kwei-Herng Lai,Fan Yang,Zhimeng Jiang,Shaochen Zhong,Xia Hu
title: Data-centric Artificial Intelligence: A Survey
title_zh: 以数据为中心的人工智能：一项调查
comment: 38 pages, 6 figues, 5 tables. A companion list of data-centric AI resources is available at https://github.com/daochenzha/data-centric-AI
comments: 38 pages, 6 figues, 5 tables. A companion list of data-centric AI resources is available at https://github.com/daochenzha/data-centric-AI
abstract: Artificial Intelligence (AI) is making a profound impact in almost every domain. A vital enabler of its great success is the availability of abundant and high-quality data for building machine learning models. Recently, the role of data in AI has been significantly magnified, giving rise to the emerging concept of data-centric AI. The attention of researchers and practitioners has gradually shifted from advancing model design to enhancing the quality and quantity of the data. In this survey, we discuss the necessity of data-centric AI, followed by a holistic view of three general data-centric goals (training data development, inference data development, and data maintenance) and the representative methods. We also organize the existing literature from automation and collaboration perspectives, discuss the challenges, and tabulate the benchmarks for various tasks. We believe this is the first comprehensive survey that provides a global view of a spectrum of tasks across various stages of the data lifecycle. We hope it can help the readers efficiently grasp a broad picture of this field, and equip them with the techniques and further research ideas to systematically engineer data for building AI systems. A companion list of data-centric AI resources will be regularly updated on https://github.com/daochenzha/data-centric-AI
summary: Artificial Intelligence (AI) is making a profound impact in almost every domain. A vital enabler of its great success is the availability of abundant and high-quality data for building machine learning models. Recently, the role of data in AI has been significantly magnified, giving rise to the emerging concept of data-centric AI. The attention of researchers and practitioners has gradually shifted from advancing model design to enhancing the quality and quantity of the data. In this survey, we discuss the necessity of data-centric AI, followed by a holistic view of three general data-centric goals (training data development, inference data development, and data maintenance) and the representative methods. We also organize the existing literature from automation and collaboration perspectives, discuss the challenges, and tabulate the benchmarks for various tasks. We believe this is the first comprehensive survey that provides a global view of a spectrum of tasks across various stages of the data lifecycle. We hope it can help the readers efficiently grasp a broad picture of this field, and equip them with the techniques and further research ideas to systematically engineer data for building AI systems. A companion list of data-centric AI resources will be regularly updated on https://github.com/daochenzha/data-centric-AI
abstract_zh: 人工智能（AI）几乎在每个领域都产生着深远的影响。其取得巨大成功的一个重要推动因素是用于构建机器学习模型的丰富且高质量的数据。近年来，数据在人工智能中的作用被显着放大，催生了以数据为中心的人工智能这一新兴概念。研究人员和实践者的注意力逐渐从推进模型设计转向提高数据的质量和数量。在本次调查中，我们讨论了以数据为中心的人工智能的必要性，然后全面介绍了三个以数据为中心的通用目标（训练数据开发、推理数据开发和数据维护）和代表性方法。我们还从自动化和协作的角度整理现有文献，讨论挑战，并列出各种任务的基准。我们相信，这是第一个全面的调查，提供了数据生命周期各个阶段的一系列任务的全局视图。我们希望它能够帮助读者有效地掌握该领域的整体情况，并为他们提供技术和进一步的研究思路，以系统地设计用于构建人工智能系统的数据。以数据为中心的人工智能资源的配套列表将在 https://github.com/daochenzha/data-centric-AI 上定期更新

AI.tldr: 本文综述了数据为中心的人工智能（Data-centric AI）领域，系统梳理了其核心目标、方法、挑战及基准。
AI.motivation: 随着AI对高质量数据的依赖性增强，研究重点从模型设计转向数据质量与数量的提升，亟需系统性总结数据为中心的AI研究进展。
AI.method: 通过自动化与协作视角分类整理现有文献，归纳三大数据生命周期目标（训练数据开发、推理数据开发、数据维护），并总结典型方法与基准。
AI.result: 首次全面覆盖数据生命周期各阶段任务，提供技术框架、挑战分析及基准对比，辅助读者掌握数据工程系统化方法。

search_text: Data-centric Artificial Intelligence: A Survey 以数据为中心的人工智能：一项调查 Artificial Intelligence (AI) is making a profound impact in almost every domain. A vital enabler of its great success is the availability of abundant and high-quality data for building machine learning models. Recently, the role of data in AI has been significantly magnified, giving rise to the emerging concept of data-centric AI. The attention of researchers and practitioners has gradually shifted from advancing model design to enhancing the quality and quantity of the data. In this survey, we discuss the necessity of data-centric AI, followed by a holistic view of three general data-centric goals (training data development, inference data development, and data maintenance) and the representative methods. We also organize the existing literature from automation and collaboration perspectives, discuss the challenges, and tabulate the benchmarks for various tasks. We believe this is the first comprehensive survey that provides a global view of a spectrum of tasks across various stages of the data lifecycle. We hope it can help the readers efficiently grasp a broad picture of this field, and equip them with the techniques and further research ideas to systematically engineer data for building AI systems. A companion list of data-centric AI resources will be regularly updated on https://github.com/daochenzha/data-centric-AI 人工智能（AI）几乎在每个领域都产生着深远的影响。其取得巨大成功的一个重要推动因素是用于构建机器学习模型的丰富且高质量的数据。近年来，数据在人工智能中的作用被显着放大，催生了以数据为中心的人工智能这一新兴概念。研究人员和实践者的注意力逐渐从推进模型设计转向提高数据的质量和数量。在本次调查中，我们讨论了以数据为中心的人工智能的必要性，然后全面介绍了三个以数据为中心的通用目标（训练数据开发、推理数据开发和数据维护）和代表性方法。我们还从自动化和协作的角度整理现有文献，讨论挑战，并列出各种任务的基准。我们相信，这是第一个全面的调查，提供了数据生命周期各个阶段的一系列任务的全局视图。我们希望它能够帮助读者有效地掌握该领域的整体情况，并为他们提供技术和进一步的研究思路，以系统地设计用于构建人工智能系统的数据。以数据为中心的人工智能资源的配套列表将在 https://github.com/daochenzha/data-centric-AI 上定期更新 本文综述了数据为中心的人工智能（Data-centric AI）领域，系统梳理了其核心目标、方法、挑战及基准。 Daochen Zha,Zaid Pervaiz Bhat,Kwei-Herng Lai,Fan Yang,Zhimeng Jiang,Shaochen Zhong,Xia Hu cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.DB

authors_text: Mohamed Djallel Dilmi,Hanene Azzag,Mustapha Lebbah
title: Epigenetics Algorithms: Self-Reinforcement-Attention mechanism to regulate chromosomes expression
title_zh: 表观遗传学算法：自我强化-注意力机制调节染色体表达
abstract: Genetic algorithms are a well-known example of bio-inspired heuristic methods. They mimic natural selection by modeling several operators such as mutation, crossover, and selection. Recent discoveries about Epigenetics regulation processes that occur "on top of" or "in addition to" the genetic basis for inheritance involve changes that affect and improve gene expression. They raise the question of improving genetic algorithms (GAs) by modeling epigenetics operators. This paper proposes a new epigenetics algorithm that mimics the epigenetics phenomenon known as DNA methylation. The novelty of our epigenetics algorithms lies primarily in taking advantage of attention mechanisms and deep learning, which fits well with the genes enhancing/silencing concept. The paper develops theoretical arguments and presents empirical studies to exhibit the capability of the proposed epigenetics algorithms to solve more complex problems efficiently than has been possible with simple GAs; for example, facing two Non-convex (multi-peaks) optimization problems as presented in this paper, the proposed epigenetics algorithm provides good performances and shows an excellent ability to overcome the lack of local optimum and thus find the global optimum.
summary: Genetic algorithms are a well-known example of bio-inspired heuristic methods. They mimic natural selection by modeling several operators such as mutation, crossover, and selection. Recent discoveries about Epigenetics regulation processes that occur "on top of" or "in addition to" the genetic basis for inheritance involve changes that affect and improve gene expression. They raise the question of improving genetic algorithms (GAs) by modeling epigenetics operators. This paper proposes a new epigenetics algorithm that mimics the epigenetics phenomenon known as DNA methylation. The novelty of our epigenetics algorithms lies primarily in taking advantage of attention mechanisms and deep learning, which fits well with the genes enhancing/silencing concept. The paper develops theoretical arguments and presents empirical studies to exhibit the capability of the proposed epigenetics algorithms to solve more complex problems efficiently than has been possible with simple GAs; for example, facing two Non-convex (multi-peaks) optimization problems as presented in this paper, the proposed epigenetics algorithm provides good performances and shows an excellent ability to overcome the lack of local optimum and thus find the global optimum.
abstract_zh: 遗传算法是生物启发式方法的一个众所周知的例子。它们通过对突变、交叉和选择等多个算子进行建模来模仿自然选择。最近发现表观遗传学调控过程发生在遗传遗传基础“之上”或“之外”，涉及影响和改善基因表达的变化。他们提出了通过对表观遗传学算子建模来改进遗传算法（GA）的问题。本文提出了一种新的表观遗传学算法，模仿称为 DNA 甲基化的表观遗传学现象。我们的表观遗传学算法的新颖性主要在于利用注意力机制和深度学习，这非常适合基因增强/沉默的概念。本文提出了理论论证并提出了实证研究，以展示所提出的表观遗传学算法比简单遗传算法更有效地解决更复杂问题的能力；例如，面对本文提出的两个非凸（多峰）优化问题，所提出的表观遗传学算法提供了良好的性能，并显示出克服局部最优的缺乏并从而找到全局最优的出色能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合注意力机制和深度学习的表观遗传算法，通过模拟DNA甲基化过程改进传统遗传算法，以解决复杂优化问题。
AI.motivation: 传统遗传算法在处理多峰非凸优化问题时易陷入局部最优，而表观遗传调控机制（如DNA甲基化）能动态调节基因表达，启发了算法改进方向。
AI.method: 设计新型表观遗传算法，利用注意力机制与深度学习模拟DNA甲基化过程，通过动态增强/抑制基因表达实现参数优化。
AI.result: 实验表明该算法在两类非凸优化问题中表现优于传统遗传算法，能有效避免局部最优并找到全局最优解。
AI.conclusion: 结合注意力机制的表观遗传算法有效模拟了基因表达调控过程，为解决复杂优化问题提供了新方法和新思路。

authors_text: Galen O'Shea,Majid Komeili
title: Toward Super-Resolution for Appearance-Based Gaze Estimation
title_zh: 迈向基于外观的注视估计的超分辨率
abstract: Gaze tracking is a valuable tool with a broad range of applications in various fields, including medicine, psychology, virtual reality, marketing, and safety. Therefore, it is essential to have gaze tracking software that is cost-efficient and high-performing. Accurately predicting gaze remains a difficult task, particularly in real-world situations where images are affected by motion blur, video compression, and noise. Super-resolution has been shown to improve image quality from a visual perspective. This work examines the usefulness of super-resolution for improving appearance-based gaze tracking. We show that not all SR models preserve the gaze direction. We propose a two-step framework based on SwinIR super-resolution model. The proposed method consistently outperforms the state-of-the-art, particularly in scenarios involving low-resolution or degraded images. Furthermore, we examine the use of super-resolution through the lens of self-supervised learning for gaze prediction. Self-supervised learning aims to learn from unlabelled data to reduce the amount of required labeled data for downstream tasks. We propose a novel architecture called SuperVision by fusing an SR backbone network to a ResNet18 (with some skip connections). The proposed SuperVision method uses 5x less labeled data and yet outperforms, by 15%, the state-of-the-art method of GazeTR which uses 100% of training data.
summary: Gaze tracking is a valuable tool with a broad range of applications in various fields, including medicine, psychology, virtual reality, marketing, and safety. Therefore, it is essential to have gaze tracking software that is cost-efficient and high-performing. Accurately predicting gaze remains a difficult task, particularly in real-world situations where images are affected by motion blur, video compression, and noise. Super-resolution has been shown to improve image quality from a visual perspective. This work examines the usefulness of super-resolution for improving appearance-based gaze tracking. We show that not all SR models preserve the gaze direction. We propose a two-step framework based on SwinIR super-resolution model. The proposed method consistently outperforms the state-of-the-art, particularly in scenarios involving low-resolution or degraded images. Furthermore, we examine the use of super-resolution through the lens of self-supervised learning for gaze prediction. Self-supervised learning aims to learn from unlabelled data to reduce the amount of required labeled data for downstream tasks. We propose a novel architecture called SuperVision by fusing an SR backbone network to a ResNet18 (with some skip connections). The proposed SuperVision method uses 5x less labeled data and yet outperforms, by 15%, the state-of-the-art method of GazeTR which uses 100% of training data.
abstract_zh: 视线跟踪是一种有价值的工具，在医学、心理学、虚拟现实、营销和安全等各个领域具有广泛的应用。因此，拥有经济高效且高性能的视线跟踪软件至关重要。准确预测注视仍然是一项艰巨的任务，特别是在图像受到运动模糊、视频压缩和噪声影响的现实情况下。超分辨率已被证明可以从视觉角度提高图像质量。这项工作研究了超分辨率对于改进基于外观的注视跟踪的有用性。我们表明并非所有 SR 模型都保留注视方向。我们提出了一个基于 SwinIR 超分辨率模型的两步框架。所提出的方法始终优于最先进的方法，特别是在涉及低分辨率或退化图像的场景中。此外，我们通过自监督学习的视角来研究超分辨率在注视预测中的使用。自监督学习旨在从未标记的数据中学习，以减少下游任务所需的标记数据量。我们通过将 SR 主干网络融合到 ResNet18（带有一些跳跃连接），提出了一种称为 SuperVision 的新颖架构。所提出的 SuperVision 方法使用的标记数据少了 5 倍，但性能比使用 100% 训练数据的最先进的 GazeTR 方法高出 15%。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何通过超分辨率技术提升基于外观的注视估计性能，提出两种改进方法以应对低分辨率和退化图像的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有注视估计方法在现实场景中因运动模糊、压缩噪声等问题导致性能下降，且依赖大量标注数据，亟需更鲁棒且数据高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出两阶段框架：基于SwinIR超分模型提升图像质量，以及融合超分主干网络与ResNet18的自监督学习架构SuperVision，减少标注数据依赖。
AI.result: 在低分辨率/退化图像场景下，所提方法较现有最优模型性能提升15%，且仅需5%的标注数据即可达到同等效果。
AI.conclusion: 超分辨率技术可有效增强注视估计鲁棒性，结合自监督学习能显著降低数据需求，为实际应用提供新思路。

tldr: 本文研究如何通过超分辨率技术提升基于外观的注视估计性能，提出两种改进方法以应对低分辨率和退化图像的挑战。
motivation: 现有注视估计方法在现实场景中因运动模糊、压缩噪声等问题导致性能下降，且依赖大量标注数据，亟需更鲁棒且数据高效的解决方案。
method: 提出两阶段框架：基于SwinIR超分模型提升图像质量，以及融合超分主干网络与ResNet18的自监督学习架构SuperVision，减少标注数据依赖。
result: 在低分辨率/退化图像场景下，所提方法较现有最优模型性能提升15%，且仅需5%的标注数据即可达到同等效果。
conclusion: 超分辨率技术可有效增强注视估计鲁棒性，结合自监督学习能显著降低数据需求，为实际应用提供新思路。
search_text: Toward Super-Resolution for Appearance-Based Gaze Estimation 迈向基于外观的注视估计的超分辨率 Gaze tracking is a valuable tool with a broad range of applications in various fields, including medicine, psychology, virtual reality, marketing, and safety. Therefore, it is essential to have gaze tracking software that is cost-efficient and high-performing. Accurately predicting gaze remains a difficult task, particularly in real-world situations where images are affected by motion blur, video compression, and noise. Super-resolution has been shown to improve image quality from a visual perspective. This work examines the usefulness of super-resolution for improving appearance-based gaze tracking. We show that not all SR models preserve the gaze direction. We propose a two-step framework based on SwinIR super-resolution model. The proposed method consistently outperforms the state-of-the-art, particularly in scenarios involving low-resolution or degraded images. Furthermore, we examine the use of super-resolution through the lens of self-supervised learning for gaze prediction. Self-supervised learning aims to learn from unlabelled data to reduce the amount of required labeled data for downstream tasks. We propose a novel architecture called SuperVision by fusing an SR backbone network to a ResNet18 (with some skip connections). The proposed SuperVision method uses 5x less labeled data and yet outperforms, by 15%, the state-of-the-art method of GazeTR which uses 100% of training data. 视线跟踪是一种有价值的工具，在医学、心理学、虚拟现实、营销和安全等各个领域具有广泛的应用。因此，拥有经济高效且高性能的视线跟踪软件至关重要。准确预测注视仍然是一项艰巨的任务，特别是在图像受到运动模糊、视频压缩和噪声影响的现实情况下。超分辨率已被证明可以从视觉角度提高图像质量。这项工作研究了超分辨率对于改进基于外观的注视跟踪的有用性。我们表明并非所有 SR 模型都保留注视方向。我们提出了一个基于 SwinIR 超分辨率模型的两步框架。所提出的方法始终优于最先进的方法，特别是在涉及低分辨率或退化图像的场景中。此外，我们通过自监督学习的视角来研究超分辨率在注视预测中的使用。自监督学习旨在从未标记的数据中学习，以减少下游任务所需的标记数据量。我们通过将 SR 主干网络融合到 ResNet18（带有一些跳跃连接），提出了一种称为 SuperVision 的新颖架构。所提出的 SuperVision 方法使用的标记数据少了 5 倍，但性能比使用 100% 训练数据的最先进的 GazeTR 方法高出 15%。 本文研究如何通过超分辨率技术提升基于外观的注视估计性能，提出两种改进方法以应对低分辨率和退化图像的挑战。 Galen O'Shea,Majid Komeili cs.CV

authors_text: Niclas Vödisch,Daniele Cattaneo,Wolfram Burgard,Abhinav Valada
title: CoVIO: Online Continual Learning for Visual-Inertial Odometry
title_zh: CoVIO：视觉惯性里程计的在线持续学习
comment: ef:2023 IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition Workshops (CVPRW)
comments: ef:2023 IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition Workshops (CVPRW)
abstract: Visual odometry is a fundamental task for many applications on mobile devices and robotic platforms. Since such applications are oftentimes not limited to predefined target domains and learning-based vision systems are known to generalize poorly to unseen environments, methods for continual adaptation during inference time are of significant interest. In this work, we introduce CoVIO for online continual learning of visual-inertial odometry. CoVIO effectively adapts to new domains while mitigating catastrophic forgetting by exploiting experience replay. In particular, we propose a novel sampling strategy to maximize image diversity in a fixed-size replay buffer that targets the limited storage capacity of embedded devices. We further provide an asynchronous version that decouples the odometry estimation from the network weight update step enabling continuous inference in real time. We extensively evaluate CoVIO on various real-world datasets demonstrating that it successfully adapts to new domains while outperforming previous methods. The code of our work is publicly available at http://continual-slam.cs.uni-freiburg.de.
summary: Visual odometry is a fundamental task for many applications on mobile devices and robotic platforms. Since such applications are oftentimes not limited to predefined target domains and learning-based vision systems are known to generalize poorly to unseen environments, methods for continual adaptation during inference time are of significant interest. In this work, we introduce CoVIO for online continual learning of visual-inertial odometry. CoVIO effectively adapts to new domains while mitigating catastrophic forgetting by exploiting experience replay. In particular, we propose a novel sampling strategy to maximize image diversity in a fixed-size replay buffer that targets the limited storage capacity of embedded devices. We further provide an asynchronous version that decouples the odometry estimation from the network weight update step enabling continuous inference in real time. We extensively evaluate CoVIO on various real-world datasets demonstrating that it successfully adapts to new domains while outperforming previous methods. The code of our work is publicly available at http://continual-slam.cs.uni-freiburg.de.
abstract_zh: 视觉里程计是移动设备和机器人平台上许多应用程序的一项基本任务。由于此类应用通常不限于预定义的目标域，并且众所周知，基于学习的视觉系统对不可见环境的泛化能力很差，因此在推理时间内持续适应的方法引起了人们的极大兴趣。在这项工作中，我们引入了 CoVIO 来在线持续学习视觉惯性里程计。 CoVIO 可以有效地适应新领域，同时通过利用经验重放来减轻灾难性遗忘。特别是，我们提出了一种新颖的采样策略，以最大化固定大小重播缓冲区中的图像多样性，该缓冲区针对嵌入式设备的有限存储容量。我们进一步提供了一个异步版本，将里程计估计与网络权重更新步骤解耦，从而实现实时连续推理。我们在各种现实世界数据集上广泛评估 CoVIO，证明它成功适应新领域，同时优于以前的方法。我们的工作代码可在 http://continual-slam.cs.uni-freiburg.de 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CoVIO方法，用于在线持续学习的视觉惯性里程计，以适应新领域并减少灾难性遗忘。
AI.motivation: 视觉里程计在移动设备和机器人平台中至关重要，但基于学习的系统在未见过的环境中泛化能力差，需要推理时的持续适应方法。
AI.method: 通过经验回放机制结合新颖的采样策略优化固定大小的回放缓冲区图像多样性，并提出异步版本实现实时连续推理。
AI.result: 在多个真实世界数据集上验证CoVIO能有效适应新领域且优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: CoVIO成功解决了视觉惯性里程计中的持续学习挑战，为嵌入式设备提供了实时适应的解决方案。

authors_text: Niclas Vödisch,Kürsat Petek,Wolfram Burgard,Abhinav Valada
title: CoDEPS: Online Continual Learning for Depth Estimation and Panoptic Segmentation
title_zh: CoDEPS：深度估计和全景分割的在线持续学习
abstract: Operating a robot in the open world requires a high level of robustness with respect to previously unseen environments. Optimally, the robot is able to adapt by itself to new conditions without human supervision, e.g., automatically adjusting its perception system to changing lighting conditions. In this work, we address the task of continual learning for deep learning-based monocular depth estimation and panoptic segmentation in new environments in an online manner. We introduce CoDEPS to perform continual learning involving multiple real-world domains while mitigating catastrophic forgetting by leveraging experience replay. In particular, we propose a novel domain-mixing strategy to generate pseudo-labels to adapt panoptic segmentation. Furthermore, we explicitly address the limited storage capacity of robotic systems by leveraging sampling strategies for constructing a fixed-size replay buffer based on rare semantic class sampling and image diversity. We perform extensive evaluations of CoDEPS on various real-world datasets demonstrating that it successfully adapts to unseen environments without sacrificing performance on previous domains while achieving state-of-the-art results. The code of our work is publicly available at http://codeps.cs.uni-freiburg.de.
summary: Operating a robot in the open world requires a high level of robustness with respect to previously unseen environments. Optimally, the robot is able to adapt by itself to new conditions without human supervision, e.g., automatically adjusting its perception system to changing lighting conditions. In this work, we address the task of continual learning for deep learning-based monocular depth estimation and panoptic segmentation in new environments in an online manner. We introduce CoDEPS to perform continual learning involving multiple real-world domains while mitigating catastrophic forgetting by leveraging experience replay. In particular, we propose a novel domain-mixing strategy to generate pseudo-labels to adapt panoptic segmentation. Furthermore, we explicitly address the limited storage capacity of robotic systems by leveraging sampling strategies for constructing a fixed-size replay buffer based on rare semantic class sampling and image diversity. We perform extensive evaluations of CoDEPS on various real-world datasets demonstrating that it successfully adapts to unseen environments without sacrificing performance on previous domains while achieving state-of-the-art results. The code of our work is publicly available at http://codeps.cs.uni-freiburg.de.
abstract_zh: 在开放世界中操作机器人需要对以前未见过的环境具有高水平的鲁棒性。最理想的是，机器人能够在没有人类监督的情况下自行适应新的条件，例如，自动调整其感知系统以适应不断变化的照明条件。在这项工作中，我们以在线方式解决新环境中基于深度学习的单目深度估计和全景分割的持续学习任务。我们引入 CoDEPS 来执行涉及多个现实世界领域的持续学习，同时通过利用经验回放来减轻灾难性遗忘。特别是，我们提出了一种新颖的域混合策略来生成伪标签以适应全景分割。此外，我们通过利用采样策略来构建基于稀有语义类采样和图像多样性的固定大小重播缓冲区，明确解决了机器人系统的有限存储容量。我们对各种现实世界数据集对 CoDEPS 进行了广泛的评估，证明它可以成功适应未见过的环境，而不会牺牲之前领域的性能，同时实现最先进的结果。我们的工作代码可在 http://codeps.cs.uni-freiburg.de 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CoDEPS方法，在线持续学习用于单目深度估计和全景分割，以适应新环境并防止灾难性遗忘。
AI.motivation: 机器人在开放世界中需自主适应新环境，但传统深度学习模型在面对新领域时易发生灾难性遗忘，且机器人系统存储有限。
AI.method: 通过经验回放机制缓解遗忘，提出领域混合策略生成伪标签，并采用稀有语义类采样和图像多样性策略构建固定大小的回放缓冲区。
AI.result: 在多个真实数据集上验证，CoDEPS能在新环境中适应而不影响旧任务性能，达到最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: CoDEPS有效解决了机器人在线持续学习中的领域适应与存储限制问题，代码已开源。
