authors_text: Kitty Varghese,Sudarshan Rajagopalan,Mohit Lamba,Kaushik Mitra
title: Spectrum-inspired Low-light Image Translation for Saliency Detection
title_zh: 用于显着性检测的受光谱启发的低光图像转换
comment: Presented at The Indian Conference on Computer Vision, Graphics and Image Processing (ICVGIP) 2022
comments: Presented at The Indian Conference on Computer Vision, Graphics and Image Processing (ICVGIP) 2022
abstract: Saliency detection methods are central to several real-world applications such as robot navigation and satellite imagery. However, the performance of existing methods deteriorate under low-light conditions because training datasets mostly comprise of well-lit images. One possible solution is to collect a new dataset for low-light conditions. This involves pixel-level annotations, which is not only tedious and time-consuming but also infeasible if a huge training corpus is required. We propose a technique that performs classical band-pass filtering in the Fourier space to transform well-lit images to low-light images and use them as a proxy for real low-light images. Unlike popular deep learning approaches which require learning thousands of parameters and enormous amounts of training data, the proposed transformation is fast and simple and easy to extend to other tasks such as low-light depth estimation. Our experiments show that the state-of-the-art saliency detection and depth estimation networks trained on our proxy low-light images perform significantly better on real low-light images than networks trained using existing strategies.
summary: Saliency detection methods are central to several real-world applications such as robot navigation and satellite imagery. However, the performance of existing methods deteriorate under low-light conditions because training datasets mostly comprise of well-lit images. One possible solution is to collect a new dataset for low-light conditions. This involves pixel-level annotations, which is not only tedious and time-consuming but also infeasible if a huge training corpus is required. We propose a technique that performs classical band-pass filtering in the Fourier space to transform well-lit images to low-light images and use them as a proxy for real low-light images. Unlike popular deep learning approaches which require learning thousands of parameters and enormous amounts of training data, the proposed transformation is fast and simple and easy to extend to other tasks such as low-light depth estimation. Our experiments show that the state-of-the-art saliency detection and depth estimation networks trained on our proxy low-light images perform significantly better on real low-light images than networks trained using existing strategies.
abstract_zh: 显着性检测方法是机器人导航和卫星图像等多种现实应用的核心。然而，现有方法的性能在弱光条件下会恶化，因为训练数据集主要由光线充足的图像组成。一种可能的解决方案是收集低光照条件下的新数据集。这涉及到像素级标注，不仅繁琐耗时，而且如果需要庞大的训练语料库也是不可行的。我们提出了一种在傅里叶空间中执行经典带通滤波的技术，将明亮图像转换为低光图像，并将它们用作真实低光图像的代理。与需要学习数千个参数和大量训练数据的流行深度学习方法不同，所提出的转换快速而简单，并且易于扩展到其他任务，例如低光深度估计。我们的实验表明，在代理低光图像上训练的最先进的显着性检测和深度估计网络在真实低光图像上的表现明显优于使用现有策略训练的网络。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于频谱启发的低光照图像翻译方法，用于提升显著性检测在低光环境下的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有显著性检测方法在低光照条件下表现不佳，但收集真实低光训练数据成本高昂且耗时。
AI.method: 通过傅里叶空间中的经典带通滤波技术，将正常光照图像转换为合成低光图像，无需深度学习参数和大量标注数据。
AI.result: 使用合成低光图像训练的模型在真实低光场景中显著优于传统训练策略下的模型，且方法可扩展至深度估计等任务。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为低光照场景下的视觉任务提供了高效、低成本的训练数据生成方案，具有广泛的应用潜力。

authors_text: Vicente Moret-Bonillo,Eduardo Mosqueira-Rey,Samuel Magaz-Romero,Diego Alvarez-Estevez
title: Hybrid Classic-Quantum Computing for Staging of Invasive Ductal Carcinoma of Breast
title_zh: 用于乳腺癌浸润性导管癌分期的混合经典量子计算
abstract: Despite the great current relevance of Artificial Intelligence, and the extraordinary innovations that this discipline has brought to many fields -among which, without a doubt, medicine is found-, experts in medical applications of Artificial Intelligence are looking for new alternatives to solve problems for which current Artificial Intelligence programs do not provide with optimal solutions. For this, one promising option could be the use of the concepts and ideas of Quantum Mechanics, for the construction of quantum-based Artificial Intelligence systems. From a hybrid classical-quantum perspective, this article deals with the application of quantum computing techniques for the staging of Invasive Ductal Carcinoma of the breast. It includes: (1) a general explanation of a classical, and well-established, approach for medical reasoning, (2) a description of the clinical problem, (3) a conceptual model for staging invasive ductal carcinoma, (4) some basic notions about Quantum Rule-Based Systems, (5) a step-by-step explanation of the proposed approach for quantum staging of the invasive ductal carcinoma, and (6) the results obtained after running the quantum system on a significant number of use cases. A detailed discussion is also provided at the end of this paper.
summary: Despite the great current relevance of Artificial Intelligence, and the extraordinary innovations that this discipline has brought to many fields -among which, without a doubt, medicine is found-, experts in medical applications of Artificial Intelligence are looking for new alternatives to solve problems for which current Artificial Intelligence programs do not provide with optimal solutions. For this, one promising option could be the use of the concepts and ideas of Quantum Mechanics, for the construction of quantum-based Artificial Intelligence systems. From a hybrid classical-quantum perspective, this article deals with the application of quantum computing techniques for the staging of Invasive Ductal Carcinoma of the breast. It includes: (1) a general explanation of a classical, and well-established, approach for medical reasoning, (2) a description of the clinical problem, (3) a conceptual model for staging invasive ductal carcinoma, (4) some basic notions about Quantum Rule-Based Systems, (5) a step-by-step explanation of the proposed approach for quantum staging of the invasive ductal carcinoma, and (6) the results obtained after running the quantum system on a significant number of use cases. A detailed discussion is also provided at the end of this paper.
abstract_zh: 尽管人工智能目前具有很大的相关性，并且该学科为许多领域带来了非凡的创新（毫无疑问，其中包括医学），但人工智能医学应用的专家正在寻找新的替代方案来解决当前人工智能项目无法提供最佳解决方案的问题。为此，一个有前途的选择可能是使用量子力学的概念和思想来构建基于量子的人工智能系统。本文从经典量子混合的角度出发，讨论了量子计算技术在乳腺浸润性导管癌分期中的应用。它包括：（1）对经典且行之有效的医学推理方法的一般解释，（2）对临床问题的描述，（3）分期浸润性导管癌的概念模型，（4）关于基于量子规则的系统的一些基本概念，（5）对所提出的浸润性导管癌量子分期方法的逐步解释，以及（6）在大量用例上运行量子系统后获得的结果。本文末尾还提供了详细的讨论。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合经典计算与量子计算的混合方法，用于乳腺浸润性导管癌的分期诊断。
AI.motivation: 当前人工智能在医学领域存在局限性，难以提供最优解决方案，而量子计算可能为医疗AI提供新途径。
AI.method: 通过经典医学推理框架与量子规则系统结合，构建分期模型，并基于量子计算技术实现癌症分期的步骤化处理。
AI.result: 在大量临床案例中验证了量子系统的有效性，展示了其在癌症分期任务中的潜力。
AI.conclusion: 混合经典-量子计算方法在医疗诊断中具有可行性，为复杂医学问题提供了新的技术方向。

authors_text: Tamara Pereira,Erik Nascimento,Lucas E. Resck,Diego Mesquita,Amauri Souza
title: Distill n' Explain: explaining graph neural networks using simple surrogates
title_zh: Distill n'Explain：使用简单的代理解释图神经网络
abstract: Explaining node predictions in graph neural networks (GNNs) often boils down to finding graph substructures that preserve predictions. Finding these structures usually implies back-propagating through the GNN, bonding the complexity (e.g., number of layers) of the GNN to the cost of explaining it. This naturally begs the question: Can we break this bond by explaining a simpler surrogate GNN? To answer the question, we propose Distill n' Explain (DnX). First, DnX learns a surrogate GNN via knowledge distillation. Then, DnX extracts node or edge-level explanations by solving a simple convex program. We also propose FastDnX, a faster version of DnX that leverages the linear decomposition of our surrogate model. Experiments show that DnX and FastDnX often outperform state-of-the-art GNN explainers while being orders of magnitude faster. Additionally, we support our empirical findings with theoretical results linking the quality of the surrogate model (i.e., distillation error) to the faithfulness of explanations.
summary: Explaining node predictions in graph neural networks (GNNs) often boils down to finding graph substructures that preserve predictions. Finding these structures usually implies back-propagating through the GNN, bonding the complexity (e.g., number of layers) of the GNN to the cost of explaining it. This naturally begs the question: Can we break this bond by explaining a simpler surrogate GNN? To answer the question, we propose Distill n' Explain (DnX). First, DnX learns a surrogate GNN via knowledge distillation. Then, DnX extracts node or edge-level explanations by solving a simple convex program. We also propose FastDnX, a faster version of DnX that leverages the linear decomposition of our surrogate model. Experiments show that DnX and FastDnX often outperform state-of-the-art GNN explainers while being orders of magnitude faster. Additionally, we support our empirical findings with theoretical results linking the quality of the surrogate model (i.e., distillation error) to the faithfulness of explanations.
abstract_zh: 解释图神经网络（GNN）中的节点预测通常可以归结为寻找保留预测的图子结构。找到这些结构通常意味着通过 GNN 进行反向传播，将 GNN 的复杂性（例如层数）与解释它的成本联系起来。这自然引出了一个问题：我们可以通过解释一个更简单的代理 GNN 来打破这种联系吗？为了回答这个问题，我们提出了 Distill n'Explain (DnX)。首先，DnX 通过知识蒸馏学习代理 GNN。然后，DnX 通过求解简单的凸程序来提取节点或边缘级别的解释。我们还提出了 FastDnX，这是 DnX 的更快版本，它利用了我们代理模型的线性分解。实验表明，DnX 和 FastDnX 通常优于最先进的 GNN 解释器，同时速度要快几个数量级。此外，我们用理论结果支持我们的实证研究结果，将替代模型的质量（即蒸馏误差）与解释的可信度联系起来。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过知识蒸馏构建简单替代模型来解释图神经网络（GNN），并基于此设计高效解释方法DnX及加速版FastDnX。
AI.motivation: 现有GNN解释方法需反向传播，导致解释成本与网络复杂度强相关，难以实现高效解释。
AI.method: 通过知识蒸馏训练简化替代GNN模型，结合凸优化提取节点/边级解释；FastDnX进一步利用线性分解加速计算。
AI.result: 实验显示DnX/FastDnX在解释质量上优于SOTA方法，且速度提升多个数量级；理论分析证明替代模型质量与解释可信度相关。
AI.conclusion: 替代模型方法有效解耦了GNN复杂度与解释成本，为高效可解释GNN提供了新思路。

tldr: 本文提出通过知识蒸馏构建简单替代模型来解释图神经网络（GNN），并基于此设计高效解释方法DnX及加速版FastDnX。
motivation: 现有GNN解释方法需反向传播，导致解释成本与网络复杂度强相关，难以实现高效解释。
method: 通过知识蒸馏训练简化替代GNN模型，结合凸优化提取节点/边级解释；FastDnX进一步利用线性分解加速计算。
result: 实验显示DnX/FastDnX在解释质量上优于SOTA方法，且速度提升多个数量级；理论分析证明替代模型质量与解释可信度相关。
conclusion: 替代模型方法有效解耦了GNN复杂度与解释成本，为高效可解释GNN提供了新思路。
search_text: Distill n' Explain: explaining graph neural networks using simple surrogates Distill n'Explain：使用简单的代理解释图神经网络 Explaining node predictions in graph neural networks (GNNs) often boils down to finding graph substructures that preserve predictions. Finding these structures usually implies back-propagating through the GNN, bonding the complexity (e.g., number of layers) of the GNN to the cost of explaining it. This naturally begs the question: Can we break this bond by explaining a simpler surrogate GNN? To answer the question, we propose Distill n' Explain (DnX). First, DnX learns a surrogate GNN via knowledge distillation. Then, DnX extracts node or edge-level explanations by solving a simple convex program. We also propose FastDnX, a faster version of DnX that leverages the linear decomposition of our surrogate model. Experiments show that DnX and FastDnX often outperform state-of-the-art GNN explainers while being orders of magnitude faster. Additionally, we support our empirical findings with theoretical results linking the quality of the surrogate model (i.e., distillation error) to the faithfulness of explanations. 解释图神经网络（GNN）中的节点预测通常可以归结为寻找保留预测的图子结构。找到这些结构通常意味着通过 GNN 进行反向传播，将 GNN 的复杂性（例如层数）与解释它的成本联系起来。这自然引出了一个问题：我们可以通过解释一个更简单的代理 GNN 来打破这种联系吗？为了回答这个问题，我们提出了 Distill n'Explain (DnX)。首先，DnX 通过知识蒸馏学习代理 GNN。然后，DnX 通过求解简单的凸程序来提取节点或边缘级别的解释。我们还提出了 FastDnX，这是 DnX 的更快版本，它利用了我们代理模型的线性分解。实验表明，DnX 和 FastDnX 通常优于最先进的 GNN 解释器，同时速度要快几个数量级。此外，我们用理论结果支持我们的实证研究结果，将替代模型的质量（即蒸馏误差）与解释的可信度联系起来。 本文提出通过知识蒸馏构建简单替代模型来解释图神经网络（GNN），并基于此设计高效解释方法DnX及加速版FastDnX。 Tamara Pereira,Erik Nascimento,Lucas E. Resck,Diego Mesquita,Amauri Souza cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Carlos Gemmell,Jeffrey Dalton
title: Generate, Transform, Answer: Question Specific Tool Synthesis for Tabular Data
title_zh: 生成、转换、回答：表格数据的问题特定工具综合
abstract: Tabular question answering (TQA) presents a challenging setting for neural systems by requiring joint reasoning of natural language with large amounts of semi-structured data. Unlike humans who use programmatic tools like filters to transform data before processing, language models in TQA process tables directly, resulting in information loss as table size increases. In this paper we propose ToolWriter to generate query specific programs and detect when to apply them to transform tables and align them with the TQA model's capabilities. Focusing ToolWriter to generate row-filtering tools improves the state-of-the-art for WikiTableQuestions and WikiSQL with the most performance gained on long tables. By investigating headroom, our work highlights the broader potential for programmatic tools combined with neural components to manipulate large amounts of structured data.
summary: Tabular question answering (TQA) presents a challenging setting for neural systems by requiring joint reasoning of natural language with large amounts of semi-structured data. Unlike humans who use programmatic tools like filters to transform data before processing, language models in TQA process tables directly, resulting in information loss as table size increases. In this paper we propose ToolWriter to generate query specific programs and detect when to apply them to transform tables and align them with the TQA model's capabilities. Focusing ToolWriter to generate row-filtering tools improves the state-of-the-art for WikiTableQuestions and WikiSQL with the most performance gained on long tables. By investigating headroom, our work highlights the broader potential for programmatic tools combined with neural components to manipulate large amounts of structured data.
abstract_zh: 表格问答 (TQA) 需要对自然语言与大量半结构化数据进行联合推理，从而为神经系统提供了一个具有挑战性的环境。与人类在处理之前使用过滤器等编程工具来转换数据不同，TQA 中的语言模型直接处理表，导致随着表大小的增加而丢失信息。在本文中，我们建议使用 ToolWriter 来生成特定于查询的程序并检测何时将它们应用于转换表并使它们与 TQA 模型的功能保持一致。专注于 ToolWriter 来生成行过滤工具，提高了 WikiTableQuestions 和 WikiSQL 的最新技术，在长表上获得了最大的性能。通过研究余量，我们的工作凸显了编程工具与神经组件相结合来操纵大量结构化数据的更广泛潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ToolWriter工具，通过生成问题特定的程序来转换表格数据，以提升表格问答系统的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有模型直接处理表格导致信息丢失，尤其在处理大型表格时效果不佳，需结合程序工具提升性能。
AI.method: 提出ToolWriter方法，生成问题特定的行过滤程序，并检测何时应用这些程序以转换表格数据。
AI.result: 在WikiTableQuestions和WikiSQL数据集上，ToolWriter显著提升性能，尤其在长表格任务中效果最佳。
AI.conclusion: 结合程序工具与神经模型能有效处理大规模结构化数据，展示出更广泛的应用潜力。

authors_text: Yunqing Zhao,Tianyu Pang,Chao Du,Xiao Yang,Ngai-Man Cheung,Min Lin
title: A Recipe for Watermarking Diffusion Models
title_zh: 水印扩散模型的配方
abstract: Diffusion models (DMs) have demonstrated advantageous potential on generative tasks. Widespread interest exists in incorporating DMs into downstream applications, such as producing or editing photorealistic images. However, practical deployment and unprecedented power of DMs raise legal issues, including copyright protection and monitoring of generated content. In this regard, watermarking has been a proven solution for copyright protection and content monitoring, but it is underexplored in the DMs literature. Specifically, DMs generate samples from longer tracks and may have newly designed multimodal structures, necessitating the modification of conventional watermarking pipelines. To this end, we conduct comprehensive analyses and derive a recipe for efficiently watermarking state-of-the-art DMs (e.g., Stable Diffusion), via training from scratch or finetuning. Our recipe is straightforward but involves empirically ablated implementation details, providing a foundation for future research on watermarking DMs. The code is available at https://github.com/yunqing-me/WatermarkDM.
summary: Diffusion models (DMs) have demonstrated advantageous potential on generative tasks. Widespread interest exists in incorporating DMs into downstream applications, such as producing or editing photorealistic images. However, practical deployment and unprecedented power of DMs raise legal issues, including copyright protection and monitoring of generated content. In this regard, watermarking has been a proven solution for copyright protection and content monitoring, but it is underexplored in the DMs literature. Specifically, DMs generate samples from longer tracks and may have newly designed multimodal structures, necessitating the modification of conventional watermarking pipelines. To this end, we conduct comprehensive analyses and derive a recipe for efficiently watermarking state-of-the-art DMs (e.g., Stable Diffusion), via training from scratch or finetuning. Our recipe is straightforward but involves empirically ablated implementation details, providing a foundation for future research on watermarking DMs. The code is available at https://github.com/yunqing-me/WatermarkDM.
abstract_zh: 扩散模型（DM）已在生成任务中展现出优越的潜力。人们普遍对将 DM 纳入下游应用程序感兴趣，例如生成或编辑逼真的图像。然而，DM 的实际部署和前所未有的力量引发了法律问题，包括版权保护和生成内容的监控。在这方面，水印已成为版权保护和内容监控的行之有效的解决方案，但在 DM 文献中尚未对其进行充分探讨。具体来说，DM 从较长的轨道生成样本，并且可能具有新设计的多模态结构，因此需要修改传统的水印管道。为此，我们进行全面分析，并通过从头开始训练或微调，得出有效地对最先进的 DM 进行水印的方法（例如稳定扩散）。我们的方法很简单，但涉及经验丰富的实施细节，为未来的水印 DM 研究奠定了基础。代码可在 https://github.com/yunqing-me/WatermarkDM 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对扩散模型（DMs）的水印技术方案，解决其在版权保护和内容监控中的应用问题。
AI.motivation: 扩散模型在生成任务中表现出色，但其广泛应用引发版权保护和内容监控的法律问题，传统水印方法难以适配DMs的生成机制。
AI.method: 通过全面分析DMs特性，提出从头训练或微调的水印方案，结合经验性消融实验确定关键实现细节。
AI.result: 开发出适用于Stable Diffusion等先进DMs的实用水印框架，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 该方案为未来DMs水印研究奠定基础，提供可复用的技术路线和实现细节参考。

authors_text: Ziyu Wu,Quan Wan,Mingjie Zhao,Yi Ke,Yiran Fang,Zhen Liang,Fangting Xie,Jingyuan Cheng
title: MassNet: A Deep Learning Approach for Body Weight Extraction from A Single Pressure Image
title_zh: MassNet：一种从单个压力图像中提取体重的深度学习方法
abstract: Body weight, as an essential physiological trait, is of considerable significance in many applications like body management, rehabilitation, and drug dosing for patient-specific treatments. Previous works on the body weight estimation task are mainly vision-based, using 2D/3D, depth, or infrared images, facing problems in illumination, occlusions, and especially privacy issues. The pressure mapping mattress is a non-invasive and privacy-preserving tool to obtain the pressure distribution image over the bed surface, which strongly correlates with the body weight of the lying person. To extract the body weight from this image, we propose a deep learning-based model, including a dual-branch network to extract the deep features and pose features respectively. A contrastive learning module is also combined with the deep-feature branch to help mine the mutual factors across different postures of every single subject. The two groups of features are then concatenated for the body weight regression task. To test the model's performance over different hardware and posture settings, we create a pressure image dataset of 10 subjects and 23 postures, using a self-made pressure-sensing bedsheet. This dataset, which is made public together with this paper, together with a public dataset, are used for the validation. The results show that our model outperforms the state-of-the-art algorithms over both 2 datasets. Our research constitutes an important step toward fully automatic weight estimation in both clinical and at-home practice. Our dataset is available for research purposes at: https://github.com/USTCWzy/MassEstimation.
summary: Body weight, as an essential physiological trait, is of considerable significance in many applications like body management, rehabilitation, and drug dosing for patient-specific treatments. Previous works on the body weight estimation task are mainly vision-based, using 2D/3D, depth, or infrared images, facing problems in illumination, occlusions, and especially privacy issues. The pressure mapping mattress is a non-invasive and privacy-preserving tool to obtain the pressure distribution image over the bed surface, which strongly correlates with the body weight of the lying person. To extract the body weight from this image, we propose a deep learning-based model, including a dual-branch network to extract the deep features and pose features respectively. A contrastive learning module is also combined with the deep-feature branch to help mine the mutual factors across different postures of every single subject. The two groups of features are then concatenated for the body weight regression task. To test the model's performance over different hardware and posture settings, we create a pressure image dataset of 10 subjects and 23 postures, using a self-made pressure-sensing bedsheet. This dataset, which is made public together with this paper, together with a public dataset, are used for the validation. The results show that our model outperforms the state-of-the-art algorithms over both 2 datasets. Our research constitutes an important step toward fully automatic weight estimation in both clinical and at-home practice. Our dataset is available for research purposes at: https://github.com/USTCWzy/MassEstimation.
abstract_zh: 体重作为一项重要的生理特征，在身体管理、康复和针对患者特定治疗的药物剂量等许多应用中具有相当重要的意义。之前关于体重估计任务的工作主要是基于视觉的，使用2D/3D、深度或红外图像，面临照明、遮挡，尤其是隐私问题。压力测绘床垫是一种非侵入性且保护隐私的工具，用于获取床表面的压力分布图像，该图像与躺着的人的体重密切相关。为了从该图像中提取体重，我们提出了一种基于深度学习的模型，包括一个双分支网络来分别提取深度特征和姿势特征。对比学习模块还与深层特征分支相结合，以帮助挖掘每个受试者不同姿势之间的相互因素。然后将两组特征连接起来以进行体重回归任务。为了测试模型在不同硬件和姿势设置下的性能，我们使用自制的压力传感床单创建了包含 10 个受试者和 23 个姿势的压力图像数据集。该数据集与本文一起公开，与公共数据集一起用于验证。结果表明，我们的模型在两个数据集上都优于最先进的算法。我们的研究是临床和家庭实践中全自动体重估算的重要一步。我们的数据集可用于研究目的：https://github.com/USTCWzy/MassEstimation。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的MassNet模型，通过单张压力图像提取人体体重信息。
AI.motivation: 传统基于视觉的体重估计方法存在光照、遮挡和隐私问题，而压力传感床垫能提供隐私保护的压力分布图像，具有重要应用价值。
AI.method: 设计双分支网络分别提取深度特征和姿态特征，并结合对比学习模块挖掘不同体位的共性因素，最终通过特征拼接实现体重回归。
AI.result: 在自建数据集和公开数据集上均优于现有算法，验证了模型的有效性和泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为临床和家庭场景下的全自动体重估计提供了重要技术支撑，并公开了包含10名受试者23种体位的压力图像数据集。

search_text: MassNet: A Deep Learning Approach for Body Weight Extraction from A Single Pressure Image MassNet：一种从单个压力图像中提取体重的深度学习方法 Body weight, as an essential physiological trait, is of considerable significance in many applications like body management, rehabilitation, and drug dosing for patient-specific treatments. Previous works on the body weight estimation task are mainly vision-based, using 2D/3D, depth, or infrared images, facing problems in illumination, occlusions, and especially privacy issues. The pressure mapping mattress is a non-invasive and privacy-preserving tool to obtain the pressure distribution image over the bed surface, which strongly correlates with the body weight of the lying person. To extract the body weight from this image, we propose a deep learning-based model, including a dual-branch network to extract the deep features and pose features respectively. A contrastive learning module is also combined with the deep-feature branch to help mine the mutual factors across different postures of every single subject. The two groups of features are then concatenated for the body weight regression task. To test the model's performance over different hardware and posture settings, we create a pressure image dataset of 10 subjects and 23 postures, using a self-made pressure-sensing bedsheet. This dataset, which is made public together with this paper, together with a public dataset, are used for the validation. The results show that our model outperforms the state-of-the-art algorithms over both 2 datasets. Our research constitutes an important step toward fully automatic weight estimation in both clinical and at-home practice. Our dataset is available for research purposes at: https://github.com/USTCWzy/MassEstimation. 体重作为一项重要的生理特征，在身体管理、康复和针对患者特定治疗的药物剂量等许多应用中具有相当重要的意义。之前关于体重估计任务的工作主要是基于视觉的，使用2D/3D、深度或红外图像，面临照明、遮挡，尤其是隐私问题。压力测绘床垫是一种非侵入性且保护隐私的工具，用于获取床表面的压力分布图像，该图像与躺着的人的体重密切相关。为了从该图像中提取体重，我们提出了一种基于深度学习的模型，包括一个双分支网络来分别提取深度特征和姿势特征。对比学习模块还与深层特征分支相结合，以帮助挖掘每个受试者不同姿势之间的相互因素。然后将两组特征连接起来以进行体重回归任务。为了测试模型在不同硬件和姿势设置下的性能，我们使用自制的压力传感床单创建了包含 10 个受试者和 23 个姿势的压力图像数据集。该数据集与本文一起公开，与公共数据集一起用于验证。结果表明，我们的模型在两个数据集上都优于最先进的算法。我们的研究是临床和家庭实践中全自动体重估算的重要一步。我们的数据集可用于研究目的：https://github.com/USTCWzy/MassEstimation。 本文提出一种基于深度学习的MassNet模型，通过单张压力图像提取人体体重信息。 Ziyu Wu,Quan Wan,Mingjie Zhao,Yi Ke,Yiran Fang,Zhen Liang,Fangting Xie,Jingyuan Cheng cs.HC,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Matan Atad,Jianxiang Feng,Ismael Rodríguez,Maximilian Durner,Rudolph Triebel
title: Efficient and Feasible Robotic Assembly Sequence Planning via Graph Representation Learning
title_zh: 通过图表示学习进行高效可行的机器人装配顺序规划
comment: Accepted to IROS 2023. First two authors share equal contribution
comments: Accepted to IROS 2023. First two authors share equal contribution
abstract: Automatic Robotic Assembly Sequence Planning (RASP) can significantly improve productivity and resilience in modern manufacturing along with the growing need for greater product customization. One of the main challenges in realizing such automation resides in efficiently finding solutions from a growing number of potential sequences for increasingly complex assemblies. Besides, costly feasibility checks are always required for the robotic system. To address this, we propose a holistic graphical approach including a graph representation called Assembly Graph for product assemblies and a policy architecture, Graph Assembly Processing Network, dubbed GRACE for assembly sequence generation. With GRACE, we are able to extract meaningful information from the graph input and predict assembly sequences in a step-by-step manner. In experiments, we show that our approach can predict feasible assembly sequences across product variants of aluminum profiles based on data collected in simulation of a dual-armed robotic system. We further demonstrate that our method is capable of detecting infeasible assemblies, substantially alleviating the undesirable impacts from false predictions, and hence facilitating real-world deployment soon. Code and training data are available at https://github.com/DLR-RM/GRACE.
summary: Automatic Robotic Assembly Sequence Planning (RASP) can significantly improve productivity and resilience in modern manufacturing along with the growing need for greater product customization. One of the main challenges in realizing such automation resides in efficiently finding solutions from a growing number of potential sequences for increasingly complex assemblies. Besides, costly feasibility checks are always required for the robotic system. To address this, we propose a holistic graphical approach including a graph representation called Assembly Graph for product assemblies and a policy architecture, Graph Assembly Processing Network, dubbed GRACE for assembly sequence generation. With GRACE, we are able to extract meaningful information from the graph input and predict assembly sequences in a step-by-step manner. In experiments, we show that our approach can predict feasible assembly sequences across product variants of aluminum profiles based on data collected in simulation of a dual-armed robotic system. We further demonstrate that our method is capable of detecting infeasible assemblies, substantially alleviating the undesirable impacts from false predictions, and hence facilitating real-world deployment soon. Code and training data are available at https://github.com/DLR-RM/GRACE.
abstract_zh: 自动机器人装配序列规划 (RASP) 可以显着提高现代制造的生产力和弹性，同时满足日益增长的产品定制需求​​。实现这种自动化的主要挑战之一在于如何从越来越多的潜在序列中为日益复杂的装配高效地找到解决方案。此外，机器人系统始终需要进行昂贵的可行性检查。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种整体图形方法，包括用于产品组装的称为组装图的图形表示和用于组装序列生成的策略架构、图形组装处理网络（称为 GRACE）。借助 GRACE，我们能够从图形输入中提取有意义的信息，并逐步预测组装序列。在实验中，我们表明，我们的方法可以根据双臂机器人系统模拟中收集的数据来预测铝型材产品变体的可行组装顺序。我们进一步证明，我们的方法能够检测不可行的组件，大大减轻错误预测带来的不良影响，从而促进现实世界的部署。代码和训练数据可在 https://github.com/DLR-RM/GRACE 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于图表示学习的高效可行机器人装配序列规划方法，通过构建装配图和GRACE网络实现序列生成。
AI.motivation: 现代制造业需要应对产品定制化带来的复杂装配序列规划难题，传统方法存在效率低和可行性验证成本高的问题。
AI.method: 设计装配图表示产品结构，开发GRACE图神经网络架构，通过图神经网络逐步预测装配序列并检测不可行装配。
AI.result: 在双臂机器人仿真数据集上验证了方法有效性，能跨产品变体生成可行序列并检测不可行装配，代码和数据已开源。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过图表示学习显著提升了装配序列规划的效率和可行性，为实际工业部署提供了可靠解决方案。

authors_text: Senthil Hariharan Arul,Jong Jin Park,Dinesh Manocha
title: DS-MPEPC: Safe and Deadlock-Avoiding Robot Navigation in Cluttered Dynamic Scenes
title_zh: DS-MPEPC：杂乱动态场景中安全且避免死锁的机器人导航
abstract: We present an algorithm for safe robot navigation in complex dynamic environments using a variant of model predictive equilibrium point control. We use an optimization formulation to navigate robots gracefully in dynamic environments by optimizing over a trajectory cost function at each timestep. We present a novel trajectory cost formulation that significantly reduces the conservative and deadlock behaviors and generates smooth trajectories. In particular, we propose a new collision probability function that effectively captures the risk associated with a given configuration and the time to avoid collisions based on the velocity direction. Moreover, we propose a terminal state cost based on the expected time-to-goal and time-to-collision values that helps in avoiding trajectories that could result in deadlock. We evaluate our cost formulation in multiple simulated and real-world scenarios, including narrow corridors with dynamic obstacles, and observe significantly improved navigation behavior and reduced deadlocks as compared to prior methods.
summary: We present an algorithm for safe robot navigation in complex dynamic environments using a variant of model predictive equilibrium point control. We use an optimization formulation to navigate robots gracefully in dynamic environments by optimizing over a trajectory cost function at each timestep. We present a novel trajectory cost formulation that significantly reduces the conservative and deadlock behaviors and generates smooth trajectories. In particular, we propose a new collision probability function that effectively captures the risk associated with a given configuration and the time to avoid collisions based on the velocity direction. Moreover, we propose a terminal state cost based on the expected time-to-goal and time-to-collision values that helps in avoiding trajectories that could result in deadlock. We evaluate our cost formulation in multiple simulated and real-world scenarios, including narrow corridors with dynamic obstacles, and observe significantly improved navigation behavior and reduced deadlocks as compared to prior methods.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种使用模型预测平衡点控制的变体在复杂动态环境中安全机器人导航的算法。我们使用优化公式通过在每个时间步优化轨迹成本函数来在动态环境中优雅地导航机器人。我们提出了一种新颖的轨迹成本公式，可以显着减少保守和死锁行为并生成平滑的轨迹。特别是，我们提出了一种新的碰撞概率函数，可以有效地捕获与给定配置相关的风险以及基于速度方向避免碰撞的时间。此外，我们根据预期的目标时间和碰撞时间值提出了最终状态成本，这有助于避免可能导致死锁的轨迹。我们在多个模拟和现实场景中评估我们的成本公式，包括带有动态障碍物的狭窄走廊，并观察到与之前的方法相比，导航行为显着改善并减少了死锁。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为DS-MPEPC的算法，用于在复杂动态环境中实现安全且避免死锁的机器人导航。
AI.motivation: 现有导航方法在动态复杂场景中易出现保守行为和死锁，导致导航效率低下且轨迹不平滑。
AI.method: 基于模型预测平衡点控制（MPEPC），通过优化轨迹成本函数设计新碰撞概率模型与终端状态成本，结合速度方向与时间因素降低风险。
AI.result: 在仿真与真实场景（如狭窄走廊）测试中，相较传统方法显著减少死锁并生成更平滑的轨迹。
AI.conclusion: DS-MPEPC通过创新成本函数设计有效提升了动态环境下的机器人导航安全性与流畅性。

motivation: 现有导航方法在动态复杂场景中易出现保守行为和死锁，导致导航效率低下且轨迹不平滑。
method: 基于模型预测平衡点控制（MPEPC），通过优化轨迹成本函数设计新碰撞概率模型与终端状态成本，结合速度方向与时间因素降低风险。
result: 在仿真与真实场景（如狭窄走廊）测试中，相较传统方法显著减少死锁并生成更平滑的轨迹。
conclusion: DS-MPEPC通过创新成本函数设计有效提升了动态环境下的机器人导航安全性与流畅性。
search_text: DS-MPEPC: Safe and Deadlock-Avoiding Robot Navigation in Cluttered Dynamic Scenes DS-MPEPC：杂乱动态场景中安全且避免死锁的机器人导航 We present an algorithm for safe robot navigation in complex dynamic environments using a variant of model predictive equilibrium point control. We use an optimization formulation to navigate robots gracefully in dynamic environments by optimizing over a trajectory cost function at each timestep. We present a novel trajectory cost formulation that significantly reduces the conservative and deadlock behaviors and generates smooth trajectories. In particular, we propose a new collision probability function that effectively captures the risk associated with a given configuration and the time to avoid collisions based on the velocity direction. Moreover, we propose a terminal state cost based on the expected time-to-goal and time-to-collision values that helps in avoiding trajectories that could result in deadlock. We evaluate our cost formulation in multiple simulated and real-world scenarios, including narrow corridors with dynamic obstacles, and observe significantly improved navigation behavior and reduced deadlocks as compared to prior methods. 我们提出了一种使用模型预测平衡点控制的变体在复杂动态环境中安全机器人导航的算法。我们使用优化公式通过在每个时间步优化轨迹成本函数来在动态环境中优雅地导航机器人。我们提出了一种新颖的轨迹成本公式，可以显着减少保守和死锁行为并生成平滑的轨迹。特别是，我们提出了一种新的碰撞概率函数，可以有效地捕获与给定配置相关的风险以及基于速度方向避免碰撞的时间。此外，我们根据预期的目标时间和碰撞时间值提出了最终状态成本，这有助于避免可能导致死锁的轨迹。我们在多个模拟和现实场景中评估我们的成本公式，包括带有动态障碍物的狭窄走廊，并观察到与之前的方法相比，导航行为显着改善并减少了死锁。 本文提出一种名为DS-MPEPC的算法，用于在复杂动态环境中实现安全且避免死锁的机器人导航。 Senthil Hariharan Arul,Jong Jin Park,Dinesh Manocha cs.RO

authors_text: Christoph Treude,Hideaki Hata
title: She Elicits Requirements and He Tests: Software Engineering Gender Bias in Large Language Models
title_zh: 她引出需求，他测试：大型语言模型中的软件工程性别偏见
abstract: Implicit gender bias in software development is a well-documented issue, such as the association of technical roles with men. To address this bias, it is important to understand it in more detail. This study uses data mining techniques to investigate the extent to which 56 tasks related to software development, such as assigning GitHub issues and testing, are affected by implicit gender bias embedded in large language models. We systematically translated each task from English into a genderless language and back, and investigated the pronouns associated with each task. Based on translating each task 100 times in different permutations, we identify a significant disparity in the gendered pronoun associations with different tasks. Specifically, requirements elicitation was associated with the pronoun "he" in only 6% of cases, while testing was associated with "he" in 100% of cases. Additionally, tasks related to helping others had a 91% association with "he" while the same association for tasks related to asking coworkers was only 52%. These findings reveal a clear pattern of gender bias related to software development tasks and have important implications for addressing this issue both in the training of large language models and in broader society.
summary: Implicit gender bias in software development is a well-documented issue, such as the association of technical roles with men. To address this bias, it is important to understand it in more detail. Based on translating each task 100 times in different permutations, we identify a significant disparity in the gendered pronoun associations with different tasks. Specifically, requirements elicitation was associated with the pronoun "he" in only 6% of cases, while testing was associated with "he" in 100% of cases. Additionally, tasks related to helping others had a 91% association with "he" while the same association for tasks related to asking coworkers was only 52%. These findings reveal a clear pattern of gender bias related to software development tasks and have important implications for addressing this issue both in the training of large language models and in broader society.
abstract_zh: 软件开发中隐含的性别偏见是一个有据可查的问题，例如技术角色与男性的关联。为了解决这种偏见，更详细地了解它很重要。本研究使用数据挖掘技术来调查与软件开发相关的 56 项任务（例如分配 GitHub 问题和测试）受到大型语言模型中嵌入的隐性性别偏见的影响程度。我们系统地将每项任务从英语翻译成无性别语言，然后再翻译回来，并研究了与每项任务相关的代词。基于以不同排列方式翻译每个任务 100 次，我们发现不同任务的性别代词关联存在显着差异。具体来说，需求启发仅在 6% 的情况下与代词“he”相关，而测试在 100% 的情况下与“he”相关。此外，与帮助他人相关的任务与“他”的关联度为 91%，而与询问同事相关的任务的关联度仅为 52%。这些发现揭示了与软件开发任务相关的明显性别偏见模式，对于在大型语言模型的培训和更广泛的社会中解决这一问题具有重要意义。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究大型语言模型中软件工程任务的性别偏见，通过分析任务与代词的关联性揭示隐性性别偏差。
AI.motivation: 软件开发领域存在隐性性别偏见（如技术角色与男性关联），需深入理解并解决这一问题。
AI.method: 采用数据挖掘技术，将56项软件开发任务翻译为无性别语言并回译，分析不同任务与代词（如‘他’‘她’）的关联性。
AI.result: 测试任务100%关联‘他’，需求获取仅6%关联‘他’；帮助他人任务91%关联‘他’，而请求同事协助仅52%。
AI.conclusion: 结果表明大型语言模型中存在显著性别偏见，需在模型训练和社会层面采取措施以减少此类偏差。

authors_text: Tyna Eloundou,Sam Manning,Pamela Mishkin,Daniel Rock
title: GPTs are GPTs: An Early Look at the Labor Market Impact Potential of Large Language Models
title_zh: GPT 就是 GPT：大型语言模型对劳动力市场影响潜力的早期观察
abstract: We investigate the potential implications of large language models (LLMs), such as Generative Pre-trained Transformers (GPTs), on the U.S. labor market, focusing on the increased capabilities arising from LLM-powered software compared to LLMs on their own. Using a new rubric, we assess occupations based on their alignment with LLM capabilities, integrating both human expertise and GPT-4 classifications. Our findings reveal that around 80% of the U.S. workforce could have at least 10% of their work tasks affected by the introduction of LLMs, while approximately 19% of workers may see at least 50% of their tasks impacted. We do not make predictions about the development or adoption timeline of such LLMs. The projected effects span all wage levels, with higher-income jobs potentially facing greater exposure to LLM capabilities and LLM-powered software. Significantly, these impacts are not restricted to industries with higher recent productivity growth. Our analysis suggests that, with access to an LLM, about 15% of all worker tasks in the US could be completed significantly faster at the same level of quality. When incorporating software and tooling built on top of LLMs, this share increases to between 47 and 56% of all tasks. This finding implies that LLM-powered software will have a substantial effect on scaling the economic impacts of the underlying models. We conclude that LLMs such as GPTs exhibit traits of general-purpose technologies, indicating that they could have considerable economic, social, and policy implications.
summary: We investigate the potential implications of large language models (LLMs), such as Generative Pre-trained Transformers (GPTs), on the U.S. labor market, focusing on the increased capabilities arising from LLM-powered software compared to LLMs on their own. Using a new rubric, we assess occupations based on their alignment with LLM capabilities, integrating both human expertise and GPT-4 classifications. Our findings reveal that around 80% of the U.S. workforce could have at least 10% of their work tasks affected by the introduction of LLMs, while approximately 19% of workers may see at least 50% of their tasks impacted. We do not make predictions about the development or adoption timeline of such LLMs. The projected effects span all wage levels, with higher-income jobs potentially facing greater exposure to LLM capabilities and LLM-powered software. Significantly, these impacts are not restricted to industries with higher recent productivity growth. Our analysis suggests that, with access to an LLM, about 15% of all worker tasks in the US could be completed significantly faster at the same level of quality. When incorporating software and tooling built on top of LLMs, this share increases to between 47 and 56% of all tasks. This finding implies that LLM-powered software will have a substantial effect on scaling the economic impacts of the underlying models. We conclude that LLMs such as GPTs exhibit traits of general-purpose technologies, indicating that they could have considerable economic, social, and policy implications.
abstract_zh: 我们研究了大型语言模型 (LLM)（例如生成式预训练 Transformer (GPT)）对美国劳动力市场的潜在影响，重点关注与 LLM 本身相比，LLM 支持的软件所带来的增强功能。我们使用新的标准，根据职业与 LLM 能力的一致性来评估职业，整合人类专业知识和 GPT-4 分类。我们的研究结果显示，大约 80% 的美国劳动力的至少 10% 的工作任务可能会因引入法学硕士而受到影响，而大约 19% 的工人可能会看到至少 50% 的工作任务受到影响。我们不会对此类法学硕士的开发或采用时间表做出预测。预计的影响涵盖所有工资水平，收入较高的工作可能会更多地接触法学硕士能力和法学硕士支持的软件。值得注意的是，这些影响并不局限于近期生产率增长较高的行业。我们的分析表明，通过获得法学硕士学位，美国大约 15% 的工人任务可以在相同质量水平下更快地完成。当整合基于法学硕士构建的软件和工具时，这一比例会增加到所有任务的 47% 到 56%。这一发现意味着法学硕士支持的软件将对扩大基础模型的经济影响产生重大影响。我们的结论是，GPT 等法学硕士表现出通用技术的特征，表明它们可能具有相当大的经济、社会和政策影响。

AI.tldr: 该论文评估了大型语言模型（如GPT）及其驱动的软件对美国劳动力市场的影响潜力。
AI.motivation: 研究旨在理解大型语言模型（LLMs）可能对不同职业和工资水平的工作任务产生的影响，为经济和社会政策提供参考。
AI.method: 通过构建新的评估标准，结合人类专家判断和GPT-4分类，分析职业与LLM能力的匹配程度。
AI.result: 约80%的美国劳动力至少10%的任务可能受LLM影响，19%的工人至少50%的任务可能受影响；LLM驱动的软件可能影响47%-56%的任务。
AI.conclusion: LLMs表现出通用技术特征，可能对经济、社会和政策产生深远影响，需关注其广泛应用带来的变革。

When incorporating software and tooling built on top of LLMs, this share increases to between 47 and 56% of all tasks. This finding implies that LLM-powered software will have a substantial effect on scaling the economic impacts of the underlying models. We conclude that LLMs such as GPTs exhibit traits of general-purpose technologies, indicating that they could have considerable economic, social, and policy implications. 我们研究了大型语言模型 (LLM)（例如生成式预训练 Transformer (GPT)）对美国劳动力市场的潜在影响，重点关注与 LLM 本身相比，LLM 支持的软件所带来的增强功能。我们使用新的标准，根据职业与 LLM 能力的一致性来评估职业，整合人类专业知识和 GPT-4 分类。我们的研究结果显示，大约 80% 的美国劳动力的至少 10% 的工作任务可能会因引入法学硕士而受到影响，而大约 19% 的工人可能会看到至少 50% 的工作任务受到影响。我们不会对此类法学硕士的开发或采用时间表做出预测。预计的影响涵盖所有工资水平，收入较高的工作可能会更多地接触法学硕士能力和法学硕士支持的软件。值得注意的是，这些影响并不局限于近期生产率增长较高的行业。我们的分析表明，通过获得法学硕士学位，美国大约 15% 的工人任务可以在相同质量水平下更快地完成。当整合基于法学硕士构建的软件和工具时，这一比例会增加到所有任务的 47% 到 56%。这一发现意味着法学硕士支持的软件将对扩大基础模型的经济影响产生重大影响。我们的结论是，GPT 等法学硕士表现出通用技术的特征，表明它们可能具有相当大的经济、社会和政策影响。 该论文评估了大型语言模型（如GPT）及其驱动的软件对美国劳动力市场的影响潜力。 Tyna Eloundou,Sam Manning,Pamela Mishkin,Daniel Rock econ.GN,cs.AI,cs.CY

authors_text: Yidan Zhang,Ting Zhang,Dong Chen,Yujing Wang,Qi Chen,Xing Xie,Hao Sun,Weiwei Deng,Qi Zhang,Fan Yang,Mao Yang,Qingmin Liao,Jingdong Wang,Baining Guo
title: IRGen: Generative Modeling for Image Retrieval
title_zh: IRGen：图像检索的生成建模
abstract: While generative modeling has become prevalent across numerous research fields, its integration into the realm of image retrieval remains largely unexplored and underjustified. In this paper, we present a novel methodology, reframing image retrieval as a variant of generative modeling and employing a sequence-to-sequence model. This approach is harmoniously aligned with the current trend towards unification in research, presenting a cohesive framework that allows for end-to-end differentiable searching. This, in turn, facilitates superior performance via direct optimization techniques. The development of our model, dubbed IRGen, addresses the critical technical challenge of converting an image into a concise sequence of semantic units, which is pivotal for enabling efficient and effective search. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our model achieves state-of-the-art performance on three widely-used image retrieval benchmarks as well as two million-scale datasets, yielding significant improvement compared to prior competitive retrieval methods. In addition, the notable surge in precision scores facilitated by generative modeling presents the potential to bypass the reranking phase, which is traditionally indispensable in practical retrieval workflows.
summary: While generative modeling has become prevalent across numerous research fields, its integration into the realm of image retrieval remains largely unexplored and underjustified. In this paper, we present a novel methodology, reframing image retrieval as a variant of generative modeling and employing a sequence-to-sequence model. This approach is harmoniously aligned with the current trend towards unification in research, presenting a cohesive framework that allows for end-to-end differentiable searching. This, in turn, facilitates superior performance via direct optimization techniques. The development of our model, dubbed IRGen, addresses the critical technical challenge of converting an image into a concise sequence of semantic units, which is pivotal for enabling efficient and effective search. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our model achieves state-of-the-art performance on three widely-used image retrieval benchmarks as well as two million-scale datasets, yielding significant improvement compared to prior competitive retrieval methods. In addition, the notable surge in precision scores facilitated by generative modeling presents the potential to bypass the reranking phase, which is traditionally indispensable in practical retrieval workflows.
abstract_zh: 尽管生成建模已在众多研究领域中变得普遍，但其与图像检索领域的集成在很大程度上仍未得到探索且缺乏合理性。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的方法，将图像检索重新定义为生成建模的一种变体，并采用序列到序列模型。这种方法与当前研究统一的趋势和谐一致，提供了一个允许端到端可微搜索的有凝聚力的框架。反过来，这又通过直接优化技术促进了卓越的性能。我们的模型（称为 IRGen）的开发解决了将图像转换为简洁的语义单元序列的关键技术挑战，这对于实现高效和有效的搜索至关重要。大量的实验表明，我们的模型在三个广泛使用的图像检索基准以及 200 万规模的数据集上实现了最先进的性能，与之前的竞争性检索方法相比，取得了显着的改进。此外，生成模型促进的精确度分数显着增加，有可能绕过重新排名阶段，而重新排名阶段在实际检索工作流程中传统上是必不可少的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为IRGen的生成模型方法，将图像检索任务重新定义为生成模型问题，并通过序列到序列模型实现端到端的可微搜索。
AI.motivation: 尽管生成模型在多个领域广泛应用，但其在图像检索中的整合仍缺乏探索。传统方法依赖复杂流程且效果有限，需寻找更高效的统一框架。
AI.method: 设计序列到序列模型IRGen，将图像转换为语义单元序列，通过直接优化实现端到端检索，解决图像到语义序列的转换技术难题。
AI.result: 在三个主流基准数据集和两个百万级数据集上达到SOTA性能，显著优于现有方法，且生成模型带来的精度提升可省去传统重排序步骤。
AI.conclusion: IRGen通过生成模型统一框架实现了图像检索的性能与效率突破，验证了生成建模在该领域的潜力，为后续研究提供新方向。

authors_text: Susana Hahn,Orkunt Sabuncu,Torsten Schaub,Tobias Stolzmann
title: Clingraph: A System for ASP-based Visualization
title_zh: Clingraph：基于 ASP 的可视化系统
comment: Short version presented at the International Conference on Logic Programming and Non-monotonic Reasoning (LPNMR'22). Extended version under consideration in Theory and Practice of Logic Programming (TPLP'22), 24 pages, 10 figures
comments: Short version presented at the International Conference on Logic Programming and Non-monotonic Reasoning (LPNMR'22). Extended version under consideration in Theory and Practice of Logic Programming (TPLP'22), 24 pages, 10 figures
abstract: We present the ASP-based visualization tool, clingraph, which aims at visualizing various concepts of ASP by means of ASP itself. This idea traces back to the aspviz tool and clingraph redevelops and extends it in the context of modern ASP systems. More precisely, clingraph takes graph specifications in terms of ASP facts and hands them over to the graph visualization system graphviz. The use of ASP provides a great interface between logic programs and/or answer sets and their visualization. Also, clingraph offers a python API that extends this ease of interfacing to clingo's API, and in turn to connect and monitor various aspects of the solving process.
summary: We present the ASP-based visualization tool, clingraph, which aims at visualizing various concepts of ASP by means of ASP itself. This idea traces back to the aspviz tool and clingraph redevelops and extends it in the context of modern ASP systems. More precisely, clingraph takes graph specifications in terms of ASP facts and hands them over to the graph visualization system graphviz. The use of ASP provides a great interface between logic programs and/or answer sets and their visualization. Also, clingraph offers a python API that extends this ease of interfacing to clingo's API, and in turn to connect and monitor various aspects of the solving process.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了基于 ASP 的可视化工具 clingraph，旨在通过 ASP 本身来可视化 ASP 的各种概念。这个想法可以追溯到 aspviz 工具，而 clingraph 在现代 ASP 系统的背景下重新开发和扩展了它。更准确地说，clingraph 根据 ASP 事实获取图形规范，并将其交给图形可视化系统 graphviz。 ASP 的使用在逻辑程序和/或答案集及其可视化之间提供了良好的接口。此外，clingraph 还提供了一个 Python API，它将这种接口的易用性扩展到 clingo 的 API，进而连接和监控求解过程的各个方面。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个基于ASP的可视化工具cligraph，通过ASP事实生成图规格并利用graphviz进行可视化，同时提供Python API扩展接口。
AI.motivation: 为了解决ASP系统可视化需求，基于早期工具aspviz进行现代化重构，增强与现代ASP系统及求解过程的交互能力。
AI.method: 通过ASP事实定义图结构，转换为graphviz可处理的格式；开发Python API对接clingo API以实现求解过程监控。
AI.result: 实现了cligraph工具，支持ASP可视化并提供Python扩展接口，可连接和监控ASP求解过程的多个方面。
AI.conclusion: cligraph通过结合ASP自身与graphviz，提供了灵活的可视化方案及对ASP求解过程的深度交互能力。

authors_text: Vincent J. Straub,Deborah Morgan,Youmna Hashem,John Francis,Saba Esnaashari,Jonathan Bright
title: A multidomain relational framework to guide institutional AI research and adoption
title_zh: 指导机构人工智能研究和采用的多领域关系框架
abstract: Calls for new metrics, technical standards and governance mechanisms to guide the adoption of Artificial Intelligence (AI) in institutions and public administration are now commonplace. Yet, most research and policy efforts aimed at understanding the implications of adopting AI tend to prioritize only a handful of ideas; they do not fully connect all the different perspectives and topics that are potentially relevant. In this position paper, we contend that this omission stems, in part, from what we call the relational problem in socio-technical discourse: fundamental ontological issues have not yet been settled--including semantic ambiguity, a lack of clear relations between concepts and differing standard terminologies. This contributes to the persistence of disparate modes of reasoning to assess institutional AI systems, and the prevalence of conceptual isolation in the fields that study them including ML, human factors, social science and policy. After developing this critique, we offer a way forward by proposing a simple policy and research design tool in the form of a conceptual framework to organize terms across fields--consisting of three horizontal domains for grouping relevant concepts and related methods: Operational, Epistemic, and Normative. We first situate this framework against the backdrop of recent socio-technical discourse at two premier academic venues, AIES and FAccT, before illustrating how developing suitable metrics, standards, and mechanisms can be aided by operationalizing relevant concepts in each of these domains. Finally, we outline outstanding questions for developing this relational approach to institutional AI research and adoption.
summary: Calls for new metrics, technical standards and governance mechanisms to guide the adoption of Artificial Intelligence (AI) in institutions and public administration are now commonplace. Yet, most research and policy efforts aimed at understanding the implications of adopting AI tend to prioritize only a handful of ideas; they do not fully connect all the different perspectives and topics that are potentially relevant. In this position paper, we contend that this omission stems, in part, from what we call the relational problem in socio-technical discourse: fundamental ontological issues have not yet been settled--including semantic ambiguity, a lack of clear relations between concepts and differing standard terminologies. This contributes to the persistence of disparate modes of reasoning to assess institutional AI systems, and the prevalence of conceptual isolation in the fields that study them including ML, human factors, social science and policy. After developing this critique, we offer a way forward by proposing a simple policy and research design tool in the form of a conceptual framework to organize terms across fields--consisting of three horizontal domains for grouping relevant concepts and related methods: Operational, Epistemic, and Normative. We first situate this framework against the backdrop of recent socio-technical discourse at two premier academic venues, AIES and FAccT, before illustrating how developing suitable metrics, standards, and mechanisms can be aided by operationalizing relevant concepts in each of these domains. Finally, we outline outstanding questions for developing this relational approach to institutional AI research and adoption.
abstract_zh: 现在，人们普遍呼吁建立新的指标、技术标准和治理机制来指导人工智能（AI）在机构和公共管理中的采用。然而，大多数旨在了解采用人工智能的影响的研究和政策工作往往只优先考虑少数想法；它们没有完全连接所有可能相关的不同观点和主题。在这篇立场文件中，我们认为这种遗漏部分源于我们所说的社会技术话语中的关系问题：基本的本体论问题尚未得到解决——包括语义模糊、概念之间缺乏明确的关系和不同的标准术语。这导致了评估机构人工智能系统时不同推理模式的持续存在，以及机器学习、人为因素、社会科学和政策等研究领域普遍存在概念隔离。在提出这一批评之后，我们提出了一种前进的方向，提出了一种简单的政策和研究设计工具，以概念框架的形式组织跨领域的术语——由三个水平领域组成，用于对相关概念和相关方法进行分组：操作性、认知性和规范性。我们首先将这个框架置于最近在两个主要学术场所 AIES 和 FAccT 上进行的社会技术讨论的背景下，然后说明如何通过在每个领域实施相关概念来帮助制定合适的指标、标准和机制。最后，我们概述了开发这种关系方法以进行机构人工智能研究和采用的突出问题。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个多领域关系框架，以解决机构中人工智能（AI）研究和采用过程中存在的概念孤立问题。
AI.motivation: 当前AI在机构和公共管理中的研究与政策制定存在概念孤立，缺乏跨领域整合，导致评估AI系统的标准不统一。
AI.method: 构建包含操作性、认识论和规范性三个领域的概念框架，整合不同学科的术语与方法。
AI.result: 框架被应用于分析AIES和FAccT等学术会议的讨论，并为制定AI治理标准提供了理论工具。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有助于统一AI评估标准，但需进一步解决跨领域概念关联与术语标准化问题。

search_text: A multidomain relational framework to guide institutional AI research and adoption 指导机构人工智能研究和采用的多领域关系框架 Calls for new metrics, technical standards and governance mechanisms to guide the adoption of Artificial Intelligence (AI) in institutions and public administration are now commonplace. Yet, most research and policy efforts aimed at understanding the implications of adopting AI tend to prioritize only a handful of ideas; they do not fully connect all the different perspectives and topics that are potentially relevant. In this position paper, we contend that this omission stems, in part, from what we call the relational problem in socio-technical discourse: fundamental ontological issues have not yet been settled--including semantic ambiguity, a lack of clear relations between concepts and differing standard terminologies. This contributes to the persistence of disparate modes of reasoning to assess institutional AI systems, and the prevalence of conceptual isolation in the fields that study them including ML, human factors, social science and policy. After developing this critique, we offer a way forward by proposing a simple policy and research design tool in the form of a conceptual framework to organize terms across fields--consisting of three horizontal domains for grouping relevant concepts and related methods: Operational, Epistemic, and Normative. We first situate this framework against the backdrop of recent socio-technical discourse at two premier academic venues, AIES and FAccT, before illustrating how developing suitable metrics, standards, and mechanisms can be aided by operationalizing relevant concepts in each of these domains. Finally, we outline outstanding questions for developing this relational approach to institutional AI research and adoption. 现在，人们普遍呼吁建立新的指标、技术标准和治理机制来指导人工智能（AI）在机构和公共管理中的采用。然而，大多数旨在了解采用人工智能的影响的研究和政策工作往往只优先考虑少数想法；它们没有完全连接所有可能相关的不同观点和主题。在这篇立场文件中，我们认为这种遗漏部分源于我们所说的社会技术话语中的关系问题：基本的本体论问题尚未得到解决——包括语义模糊、概念之间缺乏明确的关系和不同的标准术语。这导致了评估机构人工智能系统时不同推理模式的持续存在，以及机器学习、人为因素、社会科学和政策等研究领域普遍存在概念隔离。在提出这一批评之后，我们提出了一种前进的方向，提出了一种简单的政策和研究设计工具，以概念框架的形式组织跨领域的术语——由三个水平领域组成，用于对相关概念和相关方法进行分组：操作性、认知性和规范性。我们首先将这个框架置于最近在两个主要学术场所 AIES 和 FAccT 上进行的社会技术讨论的背景下，然后说明如何通过在每个领域实施相关概念来帮助制定合适的指标、标准和机制。最后，我们概述了开发这种关系方法以进行机构人工智能研究和采用的突出问题。 本文提出一个多领域关系框架，以解决机构中人工智能（AI）研究和采用过程中存在的概念孤立问题。 Vincent J. Straub,Deborah Morgan,Youmna Hashem,John Francis,Saba Esnaashari,Jonathan Bright cs.CY,cs.AI

authors_text: John M. Ball,Christopher L. Horner
title: Image comparison and scaling via nonlinear elasticity
title_zh: 通过非线性弹性进行图像比较和缩放
comment: SSVM2023 Proceedings to appear. New references added plus related minor changes
comments: SSVM2023 Proceedings to appear. New references added plus related minor changes
abstract: A nonlinear elasticity model for comparing images is formulated and analyzed, in which optimal transformations between images are sought as minimizers of an integral functional. The existence of minimizers in a suitable class of homeomorphisms between image domains is established under natural hypotheses. We investigate whether for linearly related images the minimization algorithm delivers the linear transformation as the unique minimizer.
summary: A nonlinear elasticity model for comparing images is formulated and analyzed, in which optimal transformations between images are sought as minimizers of an integral functional. The existence of minimizers in a suitable class of homeomorphisms between image domains is established under natural hypotheses. We investigate whether for linearly related images the minimization algorithm delivers the linear transformation as the unique minimizer.
abstract_zh: 制定并分析了用于比较图像的非线性弹性模型，其中寻求图像之间的最佳变换作为积分函数的最小化。在自然假设下建立了图像域之间适当类别的同胚中最小化器的存在。我们研究对于线性相关图像，最小化算法是否将线性变换作为唯一的最小化器提供。

AI.tldr: 本文通过非线性弹性模型进行图像比较和缩放，寻找图像间最优变换作为积分泛函的极小值。
AI.motivation: 传统图像配准方法难以处理复杂形变，需建立更符合物理特性的数学模型以提升比较与缩放精度。
AI.method: 构建非线性弹性模型，将图像变换问题转化为积分泛函极小化问题，并证明在特定同胚类中极小值存在性。
AI.result: 证实了线性相关图像下极小化算法能唯一收敛于线性变换，且建立了非线性情形下的解存在性理论。
AI.conclusion: 该模型为图像比较提供了新的数学框架，既保证了解的存在性，又验证了线性变换在特定条件下的唯一性。

authors_text: Liulei Li,Wenguan Wang,Tianfei Zhou,Jianwu Li,Yi Yang
title: Unified Mask Embedding and Correspondence Learning for Self-Supervised Video Segmentation
title_zh: 用于自监督视频分割的统一掩模嵌入和对应学习
abstract: The objective of this paper is self-supervised learning of video object segmentation. We develop a unified framework which simultaneously models cross-frame dense correspondence for locally discriminative feature learning and embeds object-level context for target-mask decoding. As a result, it is able to directly learn to perform mask-guided sequential segmentation from unlabeled videos, in contrast to previous efforts usually relying on an oblique solution - cheaply "copying" labels according to pixel-wise correlations. Concretely, our algorithm alternates between i) clustering video pixels for creating pseudo segmentation labels ex nihilo; and ii) utilizing the pseudo labels to learn mask encoding and decoding for VOS. Unsupervised correspondence learning is further incorporated into this self-taught, mask embedding scheme, so as to ensure the generic nature of the learnt representation and avoid cluster degeneracy. Our algorithm sets state-of-the-arts on two standard benchmarks (i.e., DAVIS17 and YouTube-VOS), narrowing the gap between self- and fully-supervised VOS, in terms of both performance and network architecture design.
summary: The objective of this paper is self-supervised learning of video object segmentation. We develop a unified framework which simultaneously models cross-frame dense correspondence for locally discriminative feature learning and embeds object-level context for target-mask decoding. As a result, it is able to directly learn to perform mask-guided sequential segmentation from unlabeled videos, in contrast to previous efforts usually relying on an oblique solution - cheaply "copying" labels according to pixel-wise correlations. Concretely, our algorithm alternates between i) clustering video pixels for creating pseudo segmentation labels ex nihilo; and ii) utilizing the pseudo labels to learn mask encoding and decoding for VOS. Unsupervised correspondence learning is further incorporated into this self-taught, mask embedding scheme, so as to ensure the generic nature of the learnt representation and avoid cluster degeneracy. Our algorithm sets state-of-the-arts on two standard benchmarks (i.e., DAVIS17 and YouTube-VOS), narrowing the gap between self- and fully-supervised VOS, in terms of both performance and network architecture design.
abstract_zh: 本文的目标是视频对象分割的自监督学习。我们开发了一个统一的框架，它同时对跨帧密集对应进行局部判别特征学习建模，并嵌入用于目标掩模解码的对象级上下文。因此，它能够直接学习从未标记的视频中执行掩模引导的顺序分割，这与之前通常依赖于倾斜解决方案的努力形成鲜明对比 - 根据像素级相关性廉价地“复制”标签。具体来说，我们的算法在 i) 聚类视频像素以无中生有地创建伪分割标签； ii) 利用伪标签来学习 VOS 的掩码编码和解码。无监督对应学习进一步融入到这种自学的掩模嵌入方案中，以确保学习表示的通用性并避免集群简并。我们的算法在两个标准基准（即 DAVIS17 和 YouTube-VOS）上设置了最先进的算法，在性能和网络架构设计方面缩小了自监督 VOS 和完全监督 VOS 之间的差距。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种统一框架，用于自监督视频对象分割，通过跨帧对应学习和掩码嵌入实现无需标注的分割。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖像素级相关性复制标签效率低且不准确，需开发更有效的自监督学习方案以提升视频分割性能。
AI.method: 交替进行像素聚类生成伪标签与掩码编码解码，结合无监督对应学习防止聚类退化，直接从未标注视频中学习分割。
AI.result: 在DAVIS17和YouTube-VOS基准上达到SOTA，缩小自监督与全监督方法在性能和网络设计上的差距。
AI.conclusion: 统一框架通过掩码嵌入和对应学习有效提升自监督视频分割效果，为无标注数据利用提供新思路。

Concretely, our algorithm alternates between i) clustering video pixels for creating pseudo segmentation labels ex nihilo; and ii) utilizing the pseudo labels to learn mask encoding and decoding for VOS. Unsupervised correspondence learning is further incorporated into this self-taught, mask embedding scheme, so as to ensure the generic nature of the learnt representation and avoid cluster degeneracy. Our algorithm sets state-of-the-arts on two standard benchmarks (i.e., DAVIS17 and YouTube-VOS), narrowing the gap between self- and fully-supervised VOS, in terms of both performance and network architecture design. 本文的目标是视频对象分割的自监督学习。我们开发了一个统一的框架，它同时对跨帧密集对应进行局部判别特征学习建模，并嵌入用于目标掩模解码的对象级上下文。因此，它能够直接学习从未标记的视频中执行掩模引导的顺序分割，这与之前通常依赖于倾斜解决方案的努力形成鲜明对比 - 根据像素级相关性廉价地“复制”标签。具体来说，我们的算法在 i) 聚类视频像素以无中生有地创建伪分割标签； ii) 利用伪标签来学习 VOS 的掩码编码和解码。无监督对应学习进一步融入到这种自学的掩模嵌入方案中，以确保学习表示的通用性并避免集群简并。我们的算法在两个标准基准（即 DAVIS17 和 YouTube-VOS）上设置了最先进的算法，在性能和网络架构设计方面缩小了自监督 VOS 和完全监督 VOS 之间的差距。 本文提出一种统一框架，用于自监督视频对象分割，通过跨帧对应学习和掩码嵌入实现无需标注的分割。 Liulei Li,Wenguan Wang,Tianfei Zhou,Jianwu Li,Yi Yang cs.CV

authors_text: Karl Schrader,Pascal Peter,Niklas Kämper,Joachim Weickert
title: Efficient Neural Generation of 4K Masks for Homogeneous Diffusion Inpainting
title_zh: 用于均匀扩散修复的 4K 掩模的高效神经生成
comment: ef:In L. Calatroni, M. Donatelli, S. Morigi, M. Prato, M. Santavesaria (Eds.): Scale Space and Variational Methods in Computer Vision. Lecture Notes in Computer Science, Vol. 14009, Springer, Cham, 16-28, 2023
comments: ef:In L. Calatroni, M. Donatelli, S. Morigi, M. Prato, M. Santavesaria (Eds.): Scale Space and Variational Methods in Computer Vision. Lecture Notes in Computer Science, Vol. 14009, Springer, Cham, 16-28, 2023
abstract: With well-selected data, homogeneous diffusion inpainting can reconstruct images from sparse data with high quality. While 4K colour images of size 3840 x 2160 can already be inpainted in real time, optimising the known data for applications like image compression remains challenging: Widely used stochastic strategies can take days for a single 4K image. Recently, a first neural approach for this so-called mask optimisation problem offered high speed and good quality for small images. It trains a mask generation network with the help of a neural inpainting surrogate. However, these mask networks can only output masks for the resolution and mask density they were trained for. We solve these problems and enable mask optimisation for high-resolution images through a neuroexplicit coarse-to-fine strategy. Additionally, we improve the training and interpretability of mask networks by including a numerical inpainting solver directly into the network. This allows to generate masks for 4K images in around 0.6 seconds while exceeding the quality of stochastic methods on practically relevant densities. Compared to popular existing approaches, this is an acceleration of up to four orders of magnitude.
summary: With well-selected data, homogeneous diffusion inpainting can reconstruct images from sparse data with high quality. While 4K colour images of size 3840 x 2160 can already be inpainted in real time, optimising the known data for applications like image compression remains challenging: Widely used stochastic strategies can take days for a single 4K image. Recently, a first neural approach for this so-called mask optimisation problem offered high speed and good quality for small images. It trains a mask generation network with the help of a neural inpainting surrogate. However, these mask networks can only output masks for the resolution and mask density they were trained for. We solve these problems and enable mask optimisation for high-resolution images through a neuroexplicit coarse-to-fine strategy. Additionally, we improve the training and interpretability of mask networks by including a numerical inpainting solver directly into the network. This allows to generate masks for 4K images in around 0.6 seconds while exceeding the quality of stochastic methods on practically relevant densities. Compared to popular existing approaches, this is an acceleration of up to four orders of magnitude.
abstract_zh: 通过精心选择的数据，同质扩散修复可以从稀疏数据中高质量地重建图像。虽然尺寸为 3840 x 2160 的 4K 彩色图像已经可以实时修复，但优化图像压缩等应用程序的已知数据仍然具有挑战性：广泛使用的随机策略可能需要几天时间才能处理单个 4K 图像。最近，针对这种所谓的掩模优化问题的第一种神经方法为小图像提供了高速和良好的质量。它在神经修复代理的帮助下训练掩模生成网络。然而，这些掩模网络只能输出它们所训练的分辨率和掩模密度的掩模。我们解决了这些问题，并通过神经显式从粗到细的策略实现高分辨率图像的掩模优化。此外，我们通过将数值修复求解器直接添加到网络中来提高掩模网络的训练和可解释性。这允许在大约 0.6 秒内生成 4K 图像的掩模，同时超过实际相关密度的随机方法的质量。与流行的现有方法相比，速度提高了四个数量级。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高效生成4K分辨率掩码的方法，以提升同质扩散修复的效率。
AI.motivation: 现有随机策略处理4K图像耗时且质量不足，而神经网络方法受限于分辨率和密度，难以满足实际需求。
AI.method: 采用神经显式粗到细策略，并将数值修复求解器集成到网络中，提升生成速度与可解释性。
AI.result: 可在0.6秒内生成4K掩码，质量超越随机方法，速度较现有方法提升四阶数量级。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在保持高质量的同时显著加速掩码优化，适用于图像压缩等实际场景。

authors_text: Kyle Buettner,Adriana Kovashka
title: Investigating the Role of Attribute Context in Vision-Language Models for Object Recognition and Detection
title_zh: 研究属性上下文在目标识别和检测的视觉语言模型中的作用
comment: Accepted at Winter Conference on Applications of Computer Vision (WACV), 2024
comments: Accepted at Winter Conference on Applications of Computer Vision (WACV), 2024
abstract: Vision-language alignment learned from image-caption pairs has been shown to benefit tasks like object recognition and detection. Methods are mostly evaluated in terms of how well object class names are learned, but captions also contain rich attribute context that should be considered when learning object alignment. It is unclear how methods use this context in learning, as well as whether models succeed when tasks require attribute and object understanding. To address this gap, we conduct extensive analysis of the role of attributes in vision-language models. We specifically measure model sensitivity to the presence and meaning of attribute context, gauging influence on object embeddings through unsupervised phrase grounding and classification via description methods. We further evaluate the utility of attribute context in training for open-vocabulary object detection, fine-grained text-region retrieval, and attribution tasks. Our results show that attribute context can be wasted when learning alignment for detection, attribute meaning is not adequately considered in embeddings, and describing classes by only their attributes is ineffective. A viable strategy that we find to increase benefits from attributes is contrastive training with adjective-based negative captions.
summary: Vision-language alignment learned from image-caption pairs has been shown to benefit tasks like object recognition and detection. Methods are mostly evaluated in terms of how well object class names are learned, but captions also contain rich attribute context that should be considered when learning object alignment. It is unclear how methods use this context in learning, as well as whether models succeed when tasks require attribute and object understanding. To address this gap, we conduct extensive analysis of the role of attributes in vision-language models. We specifically measure model sensitivity to the presence and meaning of attribute context, gauging influence on object embeddings through unsupervised phrase grounding and classification via description methods. We further evaluate the utility of attribute context in training for open-vocabulary object detection, fine-grained text-region retrieval, and attribution tasks. Our results show that attribute context can be wasted when learning alignment for detection, attribute meaning is not adequately considered in embeddings, and describing classes by only their attributes is ineffective. A viable strategy that we find to increase benefits from attributes is contrastive training with adjective-based negative captions.
abstract_zh: 从图像标题对中学习的视觉语言对齐已被证明有益于对象识别和检测等任务。方法主要根据对象类名称的学习程度来评估，但标题也包含学习对象对齐时应考虑的丰富属性上下文。目前尚不清楚方法如何在学习中使用这种上下文，以及当任务需要属性和对象理解时模型是否成功。为了解决这一差距，我们对视觉语言模型中属性的作用进行了广泛的分析。我们专门测量模型对属性上下文的存在和含义的敏感性，通过无监督的短语基础和描述方法的分类来衡量对对象嵌入的影响。我们进一步评估了属性上下文在开放词汇对象检测、细粒度文本区域检索和归因任务训练中的效用。我们的结果表明，在学习检测对齐时，属性上下文可能会被浪费，嵌入中没有充分考虑属性含义，并且仅通过类的属性来描述类是无效的。我们发现，增加属性收益的一个可行策略是与基于形容词的负面标题进行对比训练。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究属性上下文在视觉-语言模型中对物体识别和检测任务的影响。
AI.motivation: 现有方法主要关注物体类别名称的学习，但忽视了图像描述中丰富的属性上下文信息，导致模型在需要属性理解的任务中表现不足。
AI.method: 通过无监督短语定位和描述分类方法评估模型对属性上下文的敏感性，并在开放词汇检测、细粒度文本区域检索和属性归因任务中验证属性上下文的效用，同时测试基于形容词的负样本对比训练策略。
AI.result: 属性上下文在检测任务中常被浪费，嵌入表示未能充分捕捉属性含义，仅用属性描述类别效果不佳；而使用形容词负样本的对比训练能有效提升属性利用效率。
AI.conclusion: 属性上下文对视觉-语言模型性能有重要影响，需通过对比训练等方法优化属性信息的建模与利用。

authors_text: Weiyi Zhang,Yushi Guo,Liting Niu,Peijun Li,Chun Zhang,Zeyu Wan,Jiaxiang Yan,Fasih Ud Din Farrukh,Debing Zhang
title: LP-SLAM: Language-Perceptive RGB-D SLAM system based on Large Language Model
title_zh: LP-SLAM：基于大语言模型的语言感知RGB-D SLAM系统
abstract: Simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM) is a critical technology that enables autonomous robots to be aware of their surrounding environment. With the development of deep learning, SLAM systems can achieve a higher level of perception of the environment, including the semantic and text levels. However, current works are limited in their ability to achieve a natural-language level of perception of the world. To address this limitation, we propose LP-SLAM, the first language-perceptive SLAM system that leverages large language models (LLMs). LP-SLAM has two major features: (a) it can detect text in the scene and determine whether it represents a landmark to be stored during the tracking and mapping phase, and (b) it can understand natural language input from humans and provide guidance based on the generated map. We illustrated three usages of the LLM in the system including text cluster, landmark judgment, and natural language navigation. Our proposed system represents an advancement in the field of LLMs based SLAM and opens up new possibilities for autonomous robots to interact with their environment in a more natural and intuitive way.
summary: Simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM) is a critical technology that enables autonomous robots to be aware of their surrounding environment. With the development of deep learning, SLAM systems can achieve a higher level of perception of the environment, including the semantic and text levels. However, current works are limited in their ability to achieve a natural-language level of perception of the world. To address this limitation, we propose LP-SLAM, the first language-perceptive SLAM system that leverages large language models (LLMs). LP-SLAM has two major features: (a) it can detect text in the scene and determine whether it represents a landmark to be stored during the tracking and mapping phase, and (b) it can understand natural language input from humans and provide guidance based on the generated map. We illustrated three usages of the LLM in the system including text cluster, landmark judgment, and natural language navigation. Our proposed system represents an advancement in the field of LLMs based SLAM and opens up new possibilities for autonomous robots to interact with their environment in a more natural and intuitive way.
abstract_zh: 同步定位与建图（SLAM）是一项关键技术，它使自主机器人能够了解周围环境。随着深度学习的发展，SLAM系统可以实现更高层次的环境感知，包括语义和文本层面。然而，当前的作品在实现自然语言水平的世界感知方面的能力有限。为了解决这个限制，我们提出了 LP-SLAM，这是第一个利用大型语言模型 (LLM) 的语言感知 SLAM 系统。 LP-SLAM有两大特点：（a）它可以检测场景中的文本并确定它是否代表要在跟踪和建图阶段存储的地标；（b）它可以理解人类的自然语言输入并根据生成的地图提供指导。我们展示了LLM在系统中的三种用法，包括文本聚类、地标判断和自然语言导航。我们提出的系统代表了基于 SLAM 的 LLM 领域的进步，并为自主机器人以更自然和直观的方式与其环境交互开辟了新的可能性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出LP-SLAM，一种基于大语言模型的语言感知RGB-D SLAM系统，通过整合文本检测与自然语言理解提升机器人环境感知能力。
AI.motivation: 现有SLAM系统在语义和文本层面的感知能力有限，难以实现自然语言级别的环境理解，需通过大语言模型（LLM）增强机器人对文本信息的识别与交互能力。
AI.method: 系统通过LLM实现文本聚类、地标判断及自然语言导航三大功能，在跟踪建图阶段检测场景文本并判定地标，同时解析人类自然语言指令生成导航路径。
AI.result: 验证了LLM在SLAM中的有效性，实现了机器人基于文本信息的环境建模与自然语言交互，为自主机器人开辟了更自然的交互方式。
AI.conclusion: LP-SLAM通过融合LLM与SLAM技术，推动了基于大语言模型的SLAM研究进展，为机器人自然语言环境交互提供了新方向。

search_text: LP-SLAM: Language-Perceptive RGB-D SLAM system based on Large Language Model LP-SLAM：基于大语言模型的语言感知RGB-D SLAM系统 Simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM) is a critical technology that enables autonomous robots to be aware of their surrounding environment. With the development of deep learning, SLAM systems can achieve a higher level of perception of the environment, including the semantic and text levels. However, current works are limited in their ability to achieve a natural-language level of perception of the world. To address this limitation, we propose LP-SLAM, the first language-perceptive SLAM system that leverages large language models (LLMs). LP-SLAM has two major features: (a) it can detect text in the scene and determine whether it represents a landmark to be stored during the tracking and mapping phase, and (b) it can understand natural language input from humans and provide guidance based on the generated map. We illustrated three usages of the LLM in the system including text cluster, landmark judgment, and natural language navigation. Our proposed system represents an advancement in the field of LLMs based SLAM and opens up new possibilities for autonomous robots to interact with their environment in a more natural and intuitive way. 同步定位与建图（SLAM）是一项关键技术，它使自主机器人能够了解周围环境。随着深度学习的发展，SLAM系统可以实现更高层次的环境感知，包括语义和文本层面。然而，当前的作品在实现自然语言水平的世界感知方面的能力有限。为了解决这个限制，我们提出了 LP-SLAM，这是第一个利用大型语言模型 (LLM) 的语言感知 SLAM 系统。 LP-SLAM有两大特点：（a）它可以检测场景中的文本并确定它是否代表要在跟踪和建图阶段存储的地标；（b）它可以理解人类的自然语言输入并根据生成的地图提供指导。我们展示了LLM在系统中的三种用法，包括文本聚类、地标判断和自然语言导航。我们提出的系统代表了基于 SLAM 的 LLM 领域的进步，并为自主机器人以更自然和直观的方式与其环境交互开辟了新的可能性。 本文提出LP-SLAM，一种基于大语言模型的语言感知RGB-D SLAM系统，通过整合文本检测与自然语言理解提升机器人环境感知能力。 Weiyi Zhang,Yushi Guo,Liting Niu,Peijun Li,Chun Zhang,Zeyu Wan,Jiaxiang Yan,Fasih Ud Din Farrukh,Debing Zhang cs.RO

authors_text: Shuai Chen,Yash Bhalgat,Xinghui Li,Jiawang Bian,Kejie Li,Zirui Wang,Victor Adrian Prisacariu
title: Neural Refinement for Absolute Pose Regression with Feature Synthesis
title_zh: 通过特征合成进行绝对姿势回归的神经细化
comment: Paper Accepted by CVPR 2024. Project Page: http://nefes.active.vision. Code will be released at https://github.com/ActiveVisionLab/NeFeS
comments: Paper Accepted by CVPR 2024. Project Page: http://nefes.active.vision. Code will be released at https://github.com/ActiveVisionLab/NeFeS
abstract: Absolute Pose Regression (APR) methods use deep neural networks to directly regress camera poses from RGB images. However, the predominant APR architectures only rely on 2D operations during inference, resulting in limited accuracy of pose estimation due to the lack of 3D geometry constraints or priors. In this work, we propose a test-time refinement pipeline that leverages implicit geometric constraints using a robust feature field to enhance the ability of APR methods to use 3D information during inference. We also introduce a novel Neural Feature Synthesizer (NeFeS) model, which encodes 3D geometric features during training and directly renders dense novel view features at test time to refine APR methods. To enhance the robustness of our model, we introduce a feature fusion module and a progressive training strategy. Our proposed method achieves state-of-the-art single-image APR accuracy on indoor and outdoor datasets.
summary: Absolute Pose Regression (APR) methods use deep neural networks to directly regress camera poses from RGB images. However, the predominant APR architectures only rely on 2D operations during inference, resulting in limited accuracy of pose estimation due to the lack of 3D geometry constraints or priors. In this work, we propose a test-time refinement pipeline that leverages implicit geometric constraints using a robust feature field to enhance the ability of APR methods to use 3D information during inference. We also introduce a novel Neural Feature Synthesizer (NeFeS) model, which encodes 3D geometric features during training and directly renders dense novel view features at test time to refine APR methods. To enhance the robustness of our model, we introduce a feature fusion module and a progressive training strategy. Our proposed method achieves state-of-the-art single-image APR accuracy on indoor and outdoor datasets.
abstract_zh: 绝对姿势回归 (APR) 方法使用深度神经网络直接从 RGB 图像中回归相机姿势。然而，主要的 APR 架构在推理过程中仅依赖于 2D 操作，由于缺乏 3D 几何约束或先验，导致姿态估计的准确性有限。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种测试时细化管道，该管道利用稳健的特征字段来利用隐式几何约束，以增强 APR 方法在推理过程中使用 3D 信息的能力。我们还引入了一种新颖的神经特征合成器（NeFeS）模型，该模型在训练期间对 3D 几何特征进行编码，并在测试时直接渲染密集的新颖视图特征以改进 APR 方法。为了增强模型的鲁棒性，我们引入了特征融合模块和渐进式训练策略。我们提出的方法在室内和室外数据集上实现了最先进的单图像 APR 精度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合神经网络与特征合成的绝对姿态回归优化方法，通过引入3D几何约束提升姿态估计精度。
AI.motivation: 现有绝对姿态回归方法因仅依赖2D操作而缺乏3D几何约束，导致姿态估计精度不足。
AI.method: 设计测试时优化流程与NeFeS模型，利用3D几何特征生成新视角特征，并引入特征融合模块与渐进式训练策略。
AI.result: 在室内外数据集上达到最先进的单图像绝对姿态回归精度。
AI.conclusion: 通过融合3D几何信息与神经特征合成，有效提升了绝对姿态回归的性能与鲁棒性。

authors_text: Tianhao Wu,Hanxue Liang,Fangcheng Zhong,Gernot Riegler,Shimon Vainer,Jiankang Deng,Cengiz Oztireli
title: $α$Surf: Implicit Surface Reconstruction for Semi-Transparent and Thin Objects with Decoupled Geometry and Opacity
title_zh: $α$Surf：具有解耦几何和不透明度的半透明和薄物体的隐式表面重建
abstract: Implicit surface representations such as the signed distance function (SDF) have emerged as a promising approach for image-based surface reconstruction. However, existing optimization methods assume solid surfaces and are therefore unable to properly reconstruct semi-transparent surfaces and thin structures, which also exhibit low opacity due to the blending effect with the background. While neural radiance field (NeRF) based methods can model semi-transparency and achieve photo-realistic quality in synthesized novel views, their volumetric geometry representation tightly couples geometry and opacity, and therefore cannot be easily converted into surfaces without introducing artifacts. We present $α$Surf, a novel surface representation with decoupled geometry and opacity for the reconstruction of semi-transparent and thin surfaces where the colors mix. Ray-surface intersections on our representation can be found in closed-form via analytical solutions of cubic polynomials, avoiding Monte-Carlo sampling and is fully differentiable by construction. Our qualitative and quantitative evaluations show that our approach can accurately reconstruct surfaces with semi-transparent and thin parts with fewer artifacts, achieving better reconstruction quality than state-of-the-art SDF and NeRF methods. Website: https://alphasurf.netlify.app/
summary: Implicit surface representations such as the signed distance function (SDF) have emerged as a promising approach for image-based surface reconstruction. However, existing optimization methods assume solid surfaces and are therefore unable to properly reconstruct semi-transparent surfaces and thin structures, which also exhibit low opacity due to the blending effect with the background. While neural radiance field (NeRF) based methods can model semi-transparency and achieve photo-realistic quality in synthesized novel views, their volumetric geometry representation tightly couples geometry and opacity, and therefore cannot be easily converted into surfaces without introducing artifacts. We present $α$Surf, a novel surface representation with decoupled geometry and opacity for the reconstruction of semi-transparent and thin surfaces where the colors mix. Ray-surface intersections on our representation can be found in closed-form via analytical solutions of cubic polynomials, avoiding Monte-Carlo sampling and is fully differentiable by construction. Our qualitative and quantitative evaluations show that our approach can accurately reconstruct surfaces with semi-transparent and thin parts with fewer artifacts, achieving better reconstruction quality than state-of-the-art SDF and NeRF methods. Website: https://alphasurf.netlify.app/
abstract_zh: 诸如符号距离函数（SDF）之类的隐式表面表示已经成为基于图像的表面重建的一种有前景的方法。然而，现有的优化方法假设实体表面，因此无法正确重建半透明表面和薄结构，由于与背景的混合效果，这些表面和薄结构也表现出低不透明度。虽然基于神经辐射场 (NeRF) 的方法可以对半透明进行建模并在合成的新颖视图中实现照片级真实感质量，但它们的体积几何表示将几何和不透明度紧密耦合，因此无法在不引入伪影的情况下轻松转换为表面。我们提出了$α$Surf，一种具有解耦几何和不透明度的新颖表面表示，用于重建颜色混合的半透明和薄表面。我们的表示中的光线表面交点可以通过三次多项式的解析解以封闭形式找到，避免了蒙特卡罗采样，并且可以通过构造完全微分。我们的定性和定量评估表明，我们的方法可以准确地重建半透明和薄部件的表面，且伪影更少，从而实现比最先进的 SDF 和 NeRF 方法更好的重建质量。网站：https://alphasurf.netlify.app/

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为$α$Surf的新方法，用于重建半透明和薄物体的隐式表面，通过解耦几何形状和不透明度来提高重建质量。
AI.motivation: 现有基于隐式表面表示（如SDF）的方法假设物体表面是实心的，无法准确重建半透明和薄结构；而基于NeRF的方法虽能处理半透明效果，但其几何与不透明度耦合紧密，难以直接转换为表面表示。
AI.method: $α$Surf通过解耦几何与不透明度，利用三次多项式的解析解直接计算光线与表面的交点，避免蒙特卡洛采样，并通过构造实现全微分。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在半透明和薄结构的重建中比现有SDF和NeRF方法具有更少的伪影和更高的重建质量。
AI.conclusion: $α$Surf通过解耦几何与不透明度，为半透明和薄物体的表面重建提供了更优的解决方案。
