authors_text: Shaoheng Fang,Zi Wang,Yiqi Zhong,Junhao Ge,Siheng Chen,Yanfeng Wang
title: TBP-Former: Learning Temporal Bird's-Eye-View Pyramid for Joint Perception and Prediction in Vision-Centric Autonomous Driving
title_zh: TBP-Former：学习时间鸟瞰金字塔以实现以视觉为中心的自动驾驶中的联合感知和预测
abstract: Vision-centric joint perception and prediction (PnP) has become an emerging trend in autonomous driving research. It predicts the future states of the traffic participants in the surrounding environment from raw RGB images. However, it is still a critical challenge to synchronize features obtained at multiple camera views and timestamps due to inevitable geometric distortions and further exploit those spatial-temporal features. To address this issue, we propose a temporal bird's-eye-view pyramid transformer (TBP-Former) for vision-centric PnP, which includes two novel designs. First, a pose-synchronized BEV encoder is proposed to map raw image inputs with any camera pose at any time to a shared and synchronized BEV space for better spatial-temporal synchronization. Second, a spatial-temporal pyramid transformer is introduced to comprehensively extract multi-scale BEV features and predict future BEV states with the support of spatial-temporal priors. Extensive experiments on nuScenes dataset show that our proposed framework overall outperforms all state-of-the-art vision-based prediction methods.
summary: Vision-centric joint perception and prediction (PnP) has become an emerging trend in autonomous driving research. It predicts the future states of the traffic participants in the surrounding environment from raw RGB images. However, it is still a critical challenge to synchronize features obtained at multiple camera views and timestamps due to inevitable geometric distortions and further exploit those spatial-temporal features. To address this issue, we propose a temporal bird's-eye-view pyramid transformer (TBP-Former) for vision-centric PnP, which includes two novel designs. First, a pose-synchronized BEV encoder is proposed to map raw image inputs with any camera pose at any time to a shared and synchronized BEV space for better spatial-temporal synchronization. Second, a spatial-temporal pyramid transformer is introduced to comprehensively extract multi-scale BEV features and predict future BEV states with the support of spatial-temporal priors. Extensive experiments on nuScenes dataset show that our proposed framework overall outperforms all state-of-the-art vision-based prediction methods.
abstract_zh: 以视觉为中心的联合感知与预测（PnP）已成为自动驾驶研究的新兴趋势。它根据原始 RGB 图像预测周围环境中交通参与者的未来状态。然而，由于不可避免的几何失真，同步在多个摄像机视图和时间戳上获得的特征并进一步利用这些时空特征仍然是一个严峻的挑战。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种用于以视觉为中心的 PnP 的时间鸟瞰金字塔变换器（TBP-Former），其中包括两种新颖的设计。首先，提出了一种姿态同步的 BEV 编码器，可以随时将具有任何相机姿态的原始图像输入映射到共享且同步的 BEV 空间，以实现更好的时空同步。其次，引入时空金字塔变换器来全面提取多尺度 BEV 特征，并在时空先验的支持下预测未来的 BEV 状态。对 nuScenes 数据集的大量实验表明，我们提出的框架总体优于所有最先进的基于视觉的预测方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TBP-Former模型，旨在通过视觉信息实现自动驾驶中的联合感知与预测任务，解决多视角和时间戳特征同步难题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理多摄像头视角和时间戳的特征同步时存在几何畸变问题，难以有效提取时空特征以进行准确的交通参与者状态预测。
AI.method: 设计了姿态同步的鸟瞰图（BEV）编码器，将任意视角和时间的图像映射到统一BEV空间；引入时空金字塔Transformer，多尺度提取BEV特征并结合时空先验预测未来状态。
AI.result: 在nuScenes数据集上，该框架整体性能优于所有基于视觉的预测方法。
AI.conclusion: TBP-Former通过时空同步与多尺度特征学习，有效提升了视觉中心自动驾驶系统的联合感知与预测能力。

authors_text: Mohammed Abouheaf,Wail Gueaieb,Davide Spinello,Salah Al-Sharhan
title: A Data-Driven Model-Reference Adaptive Control Approach Based on Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 基于强化学习的数据驱动模型参考自适应控制方法
abstract: Model-reference adaptive systems refer to a consortium of techniques that guide plants to track desired reference trajectories. Approaches based on theories like Lyapunov, sliding surfaces, and backstepping are typically employed to advise adaptive control strategies. The resulting solutions are often challenged by the complexity of the reference model and those of the derived control strategies. Additionally, the explicit dependence of the control strategies on the process dynamics and reference dynamical models may contribute in degrading their efficiency in the face of uncertain or unknown dynamics. A model-reference adaptive solution is developed here for autonomous systems where it solves the Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman equation of an error-based structure. The proposed approach describes the process with an integral temporal difference equation and solves it using an integral reinforcement learning mechanism. This is done in real-time without knowing or employing the dynamics of either the process or reference model in the control strategies. A class of aircraft is adopted to validate the proposed technique.
summary: Model-reference adaptive systems refer to a consortium of techniques that guide plants to track desired reference trajectories. Approaches based on theories like Lyapunov, sliding surfaces, and backstepping are typically employed to advise adaptive control strategies. The resulting solutions are often challenged by the complexity of the reference model and those of the derived control strategies. Additionally, the explicit dependence of the control strategies on the process dynamics and reference dynamical models may contribute in degrading their efficiency in the face of uncertain or unknown dynamics. A model-reference adaptive solution is developed here for autonomous systems where it solves the Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman equation of an error-based structure. The proposed approach describes the process with an integral temporal difference equation and solves it using an integral reinforcement learning mechanism. This is done in real-time without knowing or employing the dynamics of either the process or reference model in the control strategies. A class of aircraft is adopted to validate the proposed technique.
abstract_zh: 模型参考自适应系统是指指导植物跟踪所需参考轨迹的技术联盟。基于李雅普诺夫、滑动面和反步等理论的方法通常用于建议自适应控制策略。由此产生的解决方案常常受到参考模型和派生控制策略的复杂性的挑战。此外，控制策略对过程动态和参考动态模型的明确依赖可能会在面对不确定或未知的动态时降低其效率。这里为自治系统开发了模型参考自适应解决方案，它求解基于误差的结构的 Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman 方程。所提出的方法用积分时间差分方程描述该过程，并使用积分强化学习机制对其进行求解。这是实时完成的，无需了解或采用控制策略中的过程或参考模型的动态。采用一类飞机来验证所提出的技术。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于强化学习的数据驱动模型参考自适应控制方法，用于解决自主系统的哈密顿-雅可比-贝尔曼方程，无需依赖过程或参考模型的动力学特性。
AI.motivation: 传统模型参考自适应控制方法因参考模型复杂性和控制策略对动态模型的显式依赖，在面对不确定或未知动态时效率低下，需改进控制策略。
AI.method: 通过积分时间差分方程描述系统过程，并采用积分强化学习机制实时求解，无需预先知晓过程或参考模型的动力学信息。
AI.result: 该方法在一类飞行器上得到验证，证明其能有效解决误差结构下的哈密顿-雅可比-贝尔曼方程。
AI.conclusion: 该数据驱动方法通过消除对动态模型的依赖，为处理不确定系统的自适应控制提供了更高效的解决方案。

The resulting solutions are often challenged by the complexity of the reference model and those of the derived control strategies. The proposed approach describes the process with an integral temporal difference equation and solves it using an integral reinforcement learning mechanism. This is done in real-time without knowing or employing the dynamics of either the process or reference model in the control strategies. authors_text: Haixin Wang,Jianlong Chang,Xiao Luo,Jinan Sun,Zhouchen Lin,Qi Tian
title: LION: Implicit Vision Prompt Tuning
title_zh: LION：隐式视觉提示调整
comment: Accepted by AAAI2024; 9 pages, 3 figures, 4 tables
comments: Accepted by AAAI2024; 9 pages, 3 figures, 4 tables
abstract: Despite recent competitive performance across a range of vision tasks, vision Transformers still have an issue of heavy computational costs. Recently, vision prompt learning has provided an economic solution to this problem without fine-tuning the whole large-scale models. However, the efficiency of existing models are still far from satisfactory due to insertion of extensive prompts blocks and trick prompt designs. In this paper, we propose an efficient vision model named impLicit vIsion prOmpt tuNing (LION), which is motivated by deep implicit models with stable memory costs for various complex tasks. In particular, we merely insect two equilibrium implicit layers in two ends of the pre-trained main backbone with parameters in the backbone frozen. Moreover, we prune the parameters in these two layers according to lottery hypothesis. The performance obtained by our LION are promising on a wide range of datasets. In particular, our LION reduces up to 11.5% of training parameter numbers while obtaining higher performance compared with the state-of-the-art baseline VPT, especially under challenging scenes. Furthermore, we find that our proposed LION had a good generalization performance, making it an easy way to boost transfer learning in the future.
summary: Despite recent competitive performance across a range of vision tasks, vision Transformers still have an issue of heavy computational costs. Recently, vision prompt learning has provided an economic solution to this problem without fine-tuning the whole large-scale models. However, the efficiency of existing models are still far from satisfactory due to insertion of extensive prompts blocks and trick prompt designs. In this paper, we propose an efficient vision model named impLicit vIsion prOmpt tuNing (LION), which is motivated by deep implicit models with stable memory costs for various complex tasks. In particular, we merely insect two equilibrium implicit layers in two ends of the pre-trained main backbone with parameters in the backbone frozen. Moreover, we prune the parameters in these two layers according to lottery hypothesis. The performance obtained by our LION are promising on a wide range of datasets. In particular, our LION reduces up to 11.5% of training parameter numbers while obtaining higher performance compared with the state-of-the-art baseline VPT, especially under challenging scenes. Furthermore, we find that our proposed LION had a good generalization performance, making it an easy way to boost transfer learning in the future.
abstract_zh: 尽管最近在一系列视觉任务中取得了具有竞争力的性能，但视觉 Transformer 仍然存在计算成本高昂的问题。最近，视觉提示学习为这个问题提供了一种经济的解决方案，而无需对整个大规模模型进行微调。然而，由于插入了大量的提示块和技巧提示设计，现有模型的效率仍然远不能令人满意。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为隐式视觉提示调整（LION）的高效视觉模型，该模型的动机是深度隐式模型，对于各种复杂任务具有稳定的内存成本。特别是，我们仅在预训练主干的两端设置两个平衡隐式层，并冻结主干中的参数。此外，我们根据彩票假设修剪这两层中的参数。我们的 LION 在广泛的数据集上获得的性能是有希望的。特别是，与最先进的基线 VPT 相比，我们的 LION 减少了高达 11.5% 的训练参数数量，同时获得了更高的性能，尤其是在具有挑战性的场景下。此外，我们发现我们提出的 LION 具有良好的泛化性能，使其成为未来促进迁移学习的简单方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为LION的高效视觉模型，通过隐式视觉提示调优减少视觉Transformer的计算成本。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉提示学习方法因插入大量提示块和复杂设计导致效率不足，需寻求更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 在预训练主干网络两端插入两个平衡隐式层，冻结主干参数，并基于彩票假设对层参数进行剪枝。
AI.result: LION在多个数据集上表现优异，减少11.5%训练参数量且性能优于VPT基线，尤其在复杂场景下效果显著。
AI.conclusion: LION通过隐式调优实现了高效视觉任务处理，具备良好的泛化能力，为未来迁移学习提供了有效途径。

search_text: LION: Implicit Vision Prompt Tuning LION：隐式视觉提示调整 Despite recent competitive performance across a range of vision tasks, vision Transformers still have an issue of heavy computational costs. Recently, vision prompt learning has provided an economic solution to this problem without fine-tuning the whole large-scale models. However, the efficiency of existing models are still far from satisfactory due to insertion of extensive prompts blocks and trick prompt designs. In this paper, we propose an efficient vision model named impLicit vIsion prOmpt tuNing (LION), which is motivated by deep implicit models with stable memory costs for various complex tasks. In particular, we merely insect two equilibrium implicit layers in two ends of the pre-trained main backbone with parameters in the backbone frozen. Moreover, we prune the parameters in these two layers according to lottery hypothesis. The performance obtained by our LION are promising on a wide range of datasets. In particular, our LION reduces up to 11.5% of training parameter numbers while obtaining higher performance compared with the state-of-the-art baseline VPT, especially under challenging scenes. Furthermore, we find that our proposed LION had a good generalization performance, making it an easy way to boost transfer learning in the future. 尽管最近在一系列视觉任务中取得了具有竞争力的性能，但视觉 Transformer 仍然存在计算成本高昂的问题。最近，视觉提示学习为这个问题提供了一种经济的解决方案，而无需对整个大规模模型进行微调。然而，由于插入了大量的提示块和技巧提示设计，现有模型的效率仍然远不能令人满意。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为隐式视觉提示调整（LION）的高效视觉模型，该模型的动机是深度隐式模型，对于各种复杂任务具有稳定的内存成本。特别是，我们仅在预训练主干的两端设置两个平衡隐式层，并冻结主干中的参数。此外，我们根据彩票假设修剪这两层中的参数。我们的 LION 在广泛的数据集上获得的性能是有希望的。特别是，与最先进的基线 VPT 相比，我们的 LION 减少了高达 11.5% 的训练参数数量，同时获得了更高的性能，尤其是在具有挑战性的场景下。此外，我们发现我们提出的 LION 具有良好的泛化性能，使其成为未来促进迁移学习的简单方法。 本文提出了一种名为LION的高效视觉模型，通过隐式视觉提示调优减少视觉Transformer的计算成本。 Haixin Wang,Jianlong Chang,Xiao Luo,Jinan Sun,Zhouchen Lin,Qi Tian cs.CV

authors_text: Jiawei Mao,Yuanqi Chang,Xuesong Yin,Binling Nie
title: Star-Net: Improving Single Image Desnowing Model With More Efficient Connection and Diverse Feature Interaction
title_zh: Star-Net：通过更高效的连接和多样化的特征交互改进单图像除雪模型
abstract: Compared to other severe weather image restoration tasks, single image desnowing is a more challenging task. This is mainly due to the diversity and irregularity of snow shape, which makes it extremely difficult to restore images in snowy scenes. Moreover, snow particles also have a veiling effect similar to haze or mist. Although current works can effectively remove snow particles with various shapes, they also bring distortion to the restored image. To address these issues, we propose a novel single image desnowing network called Star-Net. First, we design a Star type Skip Connection (SSC) to establish information channels for all different scale features, which can deal with the complex shape of snow particles.Second, we present a Multi-Stage Interactive Transformer (MIT) as the base module of Star-Net, which is designed to better understand snow particle shapes and to address image distortion by explicitly modeling a variety of important image recovery features. Finally, we propose a Degenerate Filter Module (DFM) to filter the snow particle and snow fog residual in the SSC on the spatial and channel domains. Extensive experiments show that our Star-Net achieves state-of-the-art snow removal performances on three standard snow removal datasets and retains the original sharpness of the images.
summary: Compared to other severe weather image restoration tasks, single image desnowing is a more challenging task. This is mainly due to the diversity and irregularity of snow shape, which makes it extremely difficult to restore images in snowy scenes. Moreover, snow particles also have a veiling effect similar to haze or mist. Although current works can effectively remove snow particles with various shapes, they also bring distortion to the restored image. To address these issues, we propose a novel single image desnowing network called Star-Net. First, we design a Star type Skip Connection (SSC) to establish information channels for all different scale features, which can deal with the complex shape of snow particles.Second, we present a Multi-Stage Interactive Transformer (MIT) as the base module of Star-Net, which is designed to better understand snow particle shapes and to address image distortion by explicitly modeling a variety of important image recovery features. Finally, we propose a Degenerate Filter Module (DFM) to filter the snow particle and snow fog residual in the SSC on the spatial and channel domains. Extensive experiments show that our Star-Net achieves state-of-the-art snow removal performances on three standard snow removal datasets and retains the original sharpness of the images.
abstract_zh: 与其他恶劣天气图像恢复任务相比，单幅图像除雪是一项更具挑战性的任务。这主要是由于雪形状的多样性和不规则性，使得雪景图像的还原难度极大。此外，雪颗粒还具有类似于薄雾或薄雾的遮盖效果。虽然目前的工作可以有效去除各种形状的雪粒，但它们也给恢复的图像带来了失真。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种新颖的单图像除雪网络，称为 Star-Net。首先，我们设计了一个星型跳跃连接（SSC）来为所有不同尺度的特征建立信息通道，它可以处理雪颗粒的复杂形状。其次，我们提出了一个多级交互式变压器（MIT）作为Star-Net的基础模块，旨在更好地理解雪颗粒形状并通过显式建模各种重要的图像恢复特征来解决图像失真问题。最后，我们提出了一个退化滤波器模块（DFM）来过滤空间域和通道域上 SSC 中的雪粒子和雪雾残留。大量的实验表明，我们的星网在三个标准除雪数据集上实现了最先进的除雪性能，并保留了图像的原始清晰度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Star-Net的单图像去雪网络，通过更高效的连接方式和多样化的特征交互提升去雪效果。
AI.motivation: 现有去雪方法难以处理雪粒子形状的多样性和遮挡效应，且易导致图像失真，需设计更高效的特征交互机制以提升恢复质量。
AI.method: 设计星型跳跃连接（SSC）处理多尺度特征，引入多阶段交互变换器（MIT）建模雪粒子形状与恢复特征，并提出退化滤波模块（DFM）过滤残余雪雾。
AI.result: 在三个标准数据集上达到最先进的去雪性能，同时保留图像原始锐度。
AI.conclusion: Star-Net通过创新连接结构和特征交互机制，有效解决了雪粒子形状复杂性和图像失真问题，实现了更优的去雪效果。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Star-Net的单图像去雪网络，通过更高效的连接方式和多样化的特征交互提升去雪效果。
ai_content.motivation: 现有去雪方法难以处理雪粒子形状的多样性和遮挡效应，且易导致图像失真，需设计更高效的特征交互机制以提升恢复质量。

search_text: Star-Net: Improving Single Image Desnowing Model With More Efficient Connection and Diverse Feature Interaction Star-Net：通过更高效的连接和多样化的特征交互改进单图像除雪模型 Compared to other severe weather image restoration tasks, single image desnowing is a more challenging task. This is mainly due to the diversity and irregularity of snow shape, which makes it extremely difficult to restore images in snowy scenes. Moreover, snow particles also have a veiling effect similar to haze or mist. Although current works can effectively remove snow particles with various shapes, they also bring distortion to the restored image. To address these issues, we propose a novel single image desnowing network called Star-Net. First, we design a Star type Skip Connection (SSC) to establish information channels for all different scale features, which can deal with the complex shape of snow particles.Second, we present a Multi-Stage Interactive Transformer (MIT) as the base module of Star-Net, which is designed to better understand snow particle shapes and to address image distortion by explicitly modeling a variety of important image recovery features. Finally, we propose a Degenerate Filter Module (DFM) to filter the snow particle and snow fog residual in the SSC on the spatial and channel domains. Extensive experiments show that our Star-Net achieves state-of-the-art snow removal performances on three standard snow removal datasets and retains the original sharpness of the images. 与其他恶劣天气图像恢复任务相比，单幅图像除雪是一项更具挑战性的任务。这主要是由于雪形状的多样性和不规则性，使得雪景图像的还原难度极大。此外，雪颗粒还具有类似于薄雾或薄雾的遮盖效果。虽然目前的工作可以有效去除各种形状的雪粒，但它们也给恢复的图像带来了失真。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种新颖的单图像除雪网络，称为 Star-Net。首先，我们设计了一个星型跳跃连接（SSC）来为所有不同尺度的特征建立信息通道，它可以处理雪颗粒的复杂形状。其次，我们提出了一个多级交互式变压器（MIT）作为Star-Net的基础模块，旨在更好地理解雪颗粒形状并通过显式建模各种重要的图像恢复特征来解决图像失真问题。最后，我们提出了一个退化滤波器模块（DFM）来过滤空间域和通道域上 SSC 中的雪粒子和雪雾残留。大量的实验表明，我们的星网在三个标准除雪数据集上实现了最先进的除雪性能，并保留了图像的原始清晰度。 本文提出一种名为Star-Net的单图像去雪网络，通过更高效的连接方式和多样化的特征交互提升去雪效果。 Jiawei Mao,Yuanqi Chang,Xuesong Yin,Binling Nie cs.CV

authors_text: Md Mamunur Rahaman,Ewan K. A. Millar,Erik Meijering
title: Breast Cancer Histopathology Image based Gene Expression Prediction using Spatial Transcriptomics data and Deep Learning
title_zh: 使用空间转录组学数据和深度学习进行基于图像的乳腺癌组织病理学基因表达预测
abstract: Tumour heterogeneity in breast cancer poses challenges in predicting outcome and response to therapy. Spatial transcriptomics technologies may address these challenges, as they provide a wealth of information about gene expression at the cell level, but they are expensive, hindering their use in large-scale clinical oncology studies. Predicting gene expression from hematoxylin and eosin stained histology images provides a more affordable alternative for such studies. Here we present BrST-Net, a deep learning framework for predicting gene expression from histopathology images using spatial transcriptomics data. Using this framework, we trained and evaluated 10 state-of-the-art deep learning models without utilizing pretrained weights for the prediction of 250 genes. To enhance the generalisation performance of the main network, we introduce an auxiliary network into the framework. Our methodology outperforms previous studies, with 237 genes identified with positive correlation, including 24 genes with a median correlation coefficient greater than 0.50. This is a notable improvement over previous studies, which could predict only 102 genes with positive correlation, with the highest correlation values ranging from 0.29 to 0.34.
summary: Tumour heterogeneity in breast cancer poses challenges in predicting outcome and response to therapy. Spatial transcriptomics technologies may address these challenges, as they provide a wealth of information about gene expression at the cell level, but they are expensive, hindering their use in large-scale clinical oncology studies. Predicting gene expression from hematoxylin and eosin stained histology images provides a more affordable alternative for such studies. Here we present BrST-Net, a deep learning framework for predicting gene expression from histopathology images using spatial transcriptomics data. Using this framework, we trained and evaluated 10 state-of-the-art deep learning models without utilizing pretrained weights for the prediction of 250 genes. To enhance the generalisation performance of the main network, we introduce an auxiliary network into the framework. Our methodology outperforms previous studies, with 237 genes identified with positive correlation, including 24 genes with a median correlation coefficient greater than 0.50. This is a notable improvement over previous studies, which could predict only 102 genes with positive correlation, with the highest correlation values ranging from 0.29 to 0.34.
abstract_zh: 乳腺癌的肿瘤异质性给预测结果和治疗反应带来了挑战。空间转录组学技术可以解决这些挑战，因为它们提供了有关细胞水平基因表达的大量信息，但它们价格昂贵，阻碍了它们在大规模临床肿瘤学研究中的使用。从苏木精和伊红染色的组织学图像预测基因表达为此类研究提供了更经济的替代方案。在这里，我们提出了 BrST-Net，这是一个深度学习框架，用于使用空间转录组数据从组织病理学图像中预测基因表达。使用这个框架，我们训练并评估了 10 个最先进的深度学习模型，而无需使用预训练权重来预测 250 个基因。为了增强主网络的泛化性能，我们在框架中引入了辅助网络。我们的方法优于之前的研究，确定了 237 个基因具有正相关性，其中 24 个基因的中位相关系数大于 0.50。这比之前的研究有了显着的进步，之前的研究只能预测 102 个正相关基因，最高相关值在 0.29 到 0.34 之间。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于空间转录组数据和深度学习的框架BrST-Net，用于从乳腺癌组织病理学图像预测基因表达。
AI.motivation: 乳腺癌肿瘤异质性导致预后和治疗反应预测困难，而空间转录组技术虽能提供细胞水平基因表达信息但成本高昂，需寻找更经济的替代方案。
AI.method: 开发BrST-Net深度学习框架，结合空间转录组数据训练10种无预训练权重的模型，并引入辅助网络提升泛化能力。
AI.result: 成功预测237个基因的正相关表达，其中24个基因中位数相关系数超过0.50，显著优于此前仅能预测102个基因（相关系数0.29-0.34）的研究。
AI.conclusion: BrST-Net在基因表达预测任务中表现优于现有方法，为大规模临床研究提供了更高效且经济的解决方案。

authors_text: Nat Wannawas,A. Aldo Faisal
title: Towards AI-controlled FES-restoration of movements: Learning cycling stimulation pattern with reinforcement learning
title_zh: 迈向人工智能控制的 FES 运动恢复：通过强化学习学习自行车刺激模式
abstract: Functional electrical stimulation (FES) has been increasingly integrated with other rehabilitation devices, including robots. FES cycling is one of the common FES applications in rehabilitation, which is performed by stimulating leg muscles in a certain pattern. The appropriate pattern varies across individuals and requires manual tuning which can be time-consuming and challenging for the individual user. Here, we present an AI-based method for finding the patterns, which requires no extra hardware or sensors. Our method has two phases, starting with finding model-based patterns using reinforcement learning and detailed musculoskeletal models. The models, built using open-source software, can be customised through our automated script and can be therefore used by non-technical individuals without extra cost. Next, our method fine-tunes the pattern using real cycling data. We test our both in simulation and experimentally on a stationary tricycle. In the simulation test, our method can robustly deliver model-based patterns for different cycling configurations. The experimental evaluation shows that our method can find a model-based pattern that induces higher cycling speed than an EMG-based pattern. By using just 100 seconds of cycling data, our method can deliver a fine-tuned pattern that gives better cycling performance. Beyond FES cycling, this work is a showcase, displaying the feasibility and potential of human-in-the-loop AI in real-world rehabilitation.
summary: Functional electrical stimulation (FES) has been increasingly integrated with other rehabilitation devices, including robots. FES cycling is one of the common FES applications in rehabilitation, which is performed by stimulating leg muscles in a certain pattern. The appropriate pattern varies across individuals and requires manual tuning which can be time-consuming and challenging for the individual user. Here, we present an AI-based method for finding the patterns, which requires no extra hardware or sensors. Our method has two phases, starting with finding model-based patterns using reinforcement learning and detailed musculoskeletal models. The models, built using open-source software, can be customised through our automated script and can be therefore used by non-technical individuals without extra cost. Next, our method fine-tunes the pattern using real cycling data. We test our both in simulation and experimentally on a stationary tricycle. In the simulation test, our method can robustly deliver model-based patterns for different cycling configurations. The experimental evaluation shows that our method can find a model-based pattern that induces higher cycling speed than an EMG-based pattern. By using just 100 seconds of cycling data, our method can deliver a fine-tuned pattern that gives better cycling performance. Beyond FES cycling, this work is a showcase, displaying the feasibility and potential of human-in-the-loop AI in real-world rehabilitation.
abstract_zh: 功能性电刺激 (FES) 已越来越多地与其他康复设备（包括机器人）集成。 FES循环是FES在康复中常见的应用之一，通过以一定的模式刺激腿部肌肉来进行。合适的模式因人而异，需要手动调整，这对于个人用户来说可能既耗时又具有挑战性。在这里，我们提出了一种基于人工智能的方法来查找模式，该方法不需要额外的硬件或传感器。我们的方法有两个阶段，首先使用强化学习和详细的肌肉骨骼模型寻找基于模型的模式。这些模型是使用开源软件构建的，可以通过我们的自动化脚本进行定制，因此非技术人员可以使用而无需额外费用。接下来，我们的方法使用真实的骑行数据微调模式。我们在固定三轮车上进行模拟和实验测试。在模拟测试中，我们的方法可以为不同的自行车配置稳健地提供基于模型的模式。实验评估表明，我们的方法可以找到一种基于模型的模式，该模式比基于 EMG 的模式具有更高的循环速度。通过仅使用 100 秒的骑行数据，我们的方法可以提供微调模式，从而提供更好的骑行性能。除了 FES 自行车之外，这项工作也是一个展示，展示了人机循环人工智能在现实世界康复中的可行性和潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于人工智能的强化学习方法，用于自动寻找功能性电刺激（FES）骑行中的肌肉刺激模式，无需额外硬件或传感器。
AI.motivation: 传统FES骑行需要手动调整刺激模式，耗时且难以适应个体差异，亟需自动化解决方案以提高康复效率。
AI.method: 分两阶段：首先通过强化学习和开源肌肉骨骼模型生成模型驱动的刺激模式；随后利用真实骑行数据微调模式，结合仿真与实验验证。
AI.result: 仿真显示方法可稳健生成不同骑行配置的模型模式；实验表明其诱导的骑行速度优于基于肌电信号的方法，且仅需100秒数据即可优化性能。
AI.conclusion: 该工作验证了人机协同AI在康复领域的可行性，为FES及其他康复场景提供了自动化模式优化的新思路。

result: 仿真显示方法可稳健生成不同骑行配置的模型模式；实验表明其诱导的骑行速度优于基于肌电信号的方法，且仅需100秒数据即可优化性能。
conclusion: 该工作验证了人机协同AI在康复领域的可行性，为FES及其他康复场景提供了自动化模式优化的新思路。
search_text: Towards AI-controlled FES-restoration of movements: Learning cycling stimulation pattern with reinforcement learning 迈向人工智能控制的 FES 运动恢复：通过强化学习学习自行车刺激模式 Functional electrical stimulation (FES) has been increasingly integrated with other rehabilitation devices, including robots. FES cycling is one of the common FES applications in rehabilitation, which is performed by stimulating leg muscles in a certain pattern. The appropriate pattern varies across individuals and requires manual tuning which can be time-consuming and challenging for the individual user. Here, we present an AI-based method for finding the patterns, which requires no extra hardware or sensors. Our method has two phases, starting with finding model-based patterns using reinforcement learning and detailed musculoskeletal models. The models, built using open-source software, can be customised through our automated script and can be therefore used by non-technical individuals without extra cost. Next, our method fine-tunes the pattern using real cycling data. We test our both in simulation and experimentally on a stationary tricycle. In the simulation test, our method can robustly deliver model-based patterns for different cycling configurations. The experimental evaluation shows that our method can find a model-based pattern that induces higher cycling speed than an EMG-based pattern. By using just 100 seconds of cycling data, our method can deliver a fine-tuned pattern that gives better cycling performance. Beyond FES cycling, this work is a showcase, displaying the feasibility and potential of human-in-the-loop AI in real-world rehabilitation. 功能性电刺激 (FES) 已越来越多地与其他康复设备（包括机器人）集成。 FES循环是FES在康复中常见的应用之一，通过以一定的模式刺激腿部肌肉来进行。合适的模式因人而异，需要手动调整，这对于个人用户来说可能既耗时又具有挑战性。在这里，我们提出了一种基于人工智能的方法来查找模式，该方法不需要额外的硬件或传感器。我们的方法有两个阶段，首先使用强化学习和详细的肌肉骨骼模型寻找基于模型的模式。这些模型是使用开源软件构建的，可以通过我们的自动化脚本进行定制，因此非技术人员可以使用而无需额外费用。接下来，我们的方法使用真实的骑行数据微调模式。我们在固定三轮车上进行模拟和实验测试。在模拟测试中，我们的方法可以为不同的自行车配置稳健地提供基于模型的模式。实验评估表明，我们的方法可以找到一种基于模型的模式，该模式比基于 EMG 的模式具有更高的循环速度。通过仅使用 100 秒的骑行数据，我们的方法可以提供微调模式，从而提供更好的骑行性能。除了 FES 自行车之外，这项工作也是一个展示，展示了人机循环人工智能在现实世界康复中的可行性和潜力。 本文提出一种基于人工智能的强化学习方法，用于自动寻找功能性电刺激（FES）骑行中的肌肉刺激模式，无需额外硬件或传感器。 Nat Wannawas,A. Aldo Faisal cs.RO,cs.LG,eess.SY

authors_text: Fengyun Wang,Dong Zhang,Hanwang Zhang,Jinhui Tang,Qianru Sun
title: Semantic Scene Completion with Cleaner Self
title_zh: 具有更清晰自我的语义场景完成
abstract: Semantic Scene Completion (SSC) transforms an image of single-view depth and/or RGB 2D pixels into 3D voxels, each of whose semantic labels are predicted. SSC is a well-known ill-posed problem as the prediction model has to "imagine" what is behind the visible surface, which is usually represented by Truncated Signed Distance Function (TSDF). Due to the sensory imperfection of the depth camera, most existing methods based on the noisy TSDF estimated from depth values suffer from 1) incomplete volumetric predictions and 2) confused semantic labels. To this end, we use the ground-truth 3D voxels to generate a perfect visible surface, called TSDF-CAD, and then train a "cleaner" SSC model. As the model is noise-free, it is expected to focus more on the "imagination" of unseen voxels. Then, we propose to distill the intermediate "cleaner" knowledge into another model with noisy TSDF input. In particular, we use the 3D occupancy feature and the semantic relations of the "cleaner self" to supervise the counterparts of the "noisy self" to respectively address the above two incorrect predictions. Experimental results validate that our method improves the noisy counterparts with 3.1% IoU and 2.2% mIoU for measuring scene completion and SSC, and also achieves new state-of-the-art accuracy on the popular NYU dataset.
summary: Semantic Scene Completion (SSC) transforms an image of single-view depth and/or RGB 2D pixels into 3D voxels, each of whose semantic labels are predicted. SSC is a well-known ill-posed problem as the prediction model has to "imagine" what is behind the visible surface, which is usually represented by Truncated Signed Distance Function (TSDF). Due to the sensory imperfection of the depth camera, most existing methods based on the noisy TSDF estimated from depth values suffer from 1) incomplete volumetric predictions and 2) confused semantic labels. To this end, we use the ground-truth 3D voxels to generate a perfect visible surface, called TSDF-CAD, and then train a "cleaner" SSC model. As the model is noise-free, it is expected to focus more on the "imagination" of unseen voxels. Then, we propose to distill the intermediate "cleaner" knowledge into another model with noisy TSDF input. In particular, we use the 3D occupancy feature and the semantic relations of the "cleaner self" to supervise the counterparts of the "noisy self" to respectively address the above two incorrect predictions. Experimental results validate that our method improves the noisy counterparts with 3.1% IoU and 2.2% mIoU for measuring scene completion and SSC, and also achieves new state-of-the-art accuracy on the popular NYU dataset.
abstract_zh: 语义场景完成 (SSC) 将单视图深度和/或 RGB 2D 像素的图像转换为 3D 体素，每个体素的语义标签都被预测。 SSC 是一个众所周知的不适定问题，因为预测模型必须“想象”可见表面后面的东西，通常用截断符号距离函数（TSDF）表示。由于深度相机的感官缺陷，大多数基于从深度值估计的噪声 TSDF 的现有方法都存在 1）不完整的体积预测和 2）混乱的语义标签。为此，我们使用真实的 3D 体素来生成完美的可见表面，称为 TSDF-CAD，然后训练“更干净”的 SSC 模型。由于该模型是无噪声的，因此预计将更多地关注看不见的体素的“想象力”。然后，我们建议将中间“更干净”的知识提炼到另一个具有噪声 TSDF 输入的模型中。特别是，我们使用 3D 占用特征和“清洁自我”的语义关系来监督“嘈杂自我”的对应部分，以分别解决上述两个错误的预测。实验结果验证了我们的方法在测量场景完成度和 SSC 方面将噪声对应物提高了 3.1% IoU 和 2.2% mIoU，并且还在流行的 NYU 数据集上实现了新的最先进的精度。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出一种改进语义场景补全（SSC）的方法，通过生成无噪声的TSDF-CAD表面并训练‘清洁’模型，解决现有方法因深度相机噪声导致的预测不完整和语义混淆问题。
AI.motivation: 现有SSC方法因深度相机噪声导致TSDF估计不准确，进而引发体素预测不完整和语义标签混乱，需通过无噪声数据训练更精准的模型。
AI.method: 利用真实3D体素生成完美可见表面TSDF-CAD，训练无噪声‘清洁’SSC模型；随后通过知识蒸馏将清洁模型的中间特征（3D占用特征和语义关系）传递至处理噪声TSDF的模型，分别优化预测完整性与语义准确性。
AI.result: 在NYU数据集上，该方法使场景补全和SSC的IoU提升3.1%、mIoU提升2.2%，达到当时最先进的精度。
AI.conclusion: 通过分离噪声与清洁模型并进行知识蒸馏，有效解决了SSC中因噪声导致的预测缺陷，显著提升了补全效果与语义准确性。

authors_text: Saikat Roy,Gregor Koehler,Constantin Ulrich,Michael Baumgartner,Jens Petersen,Fabian Isensee,Paul F. Jaeger,Klaus Maier-Hein
title: MedNeXt: Transformer-driven Scaling of ConvNets for Medical Image Segmentation
title_zh: MedNeXt：用于医学图像分割的变压器驱动的卷积网络扩展
abstract: There has been exploding interest in embracing Transformer-based architectures for medical image segmentation. However, the lack of large-scale annotated medical datasets make achieving performances equivalent to those in natural images challenging. Convolutional networks, in contrast, have higher inductive biases and consequently, are easily trainable to high performance. Recently, the ConvNeXt architecture attempted to modernize the standard ConvNet by mirroring Transformer blocks. In this work, we improve upon this to design a modernized and scalable convolutional architecture customized to challenges of data-scarce medical settings. We introduce MedNeXt, a Transformer-inspired large kernel segmentation network which introduces - 1) A fully ConvNeXt 3D Encoder-Decoder Network for medical image segmentation, 2) Residual ConvNeXt up and downsampling blocks to preserve semantic richness across scales, 3) A novel technique to iteratively increase kernel sizes by upsampling small kernel networks, to prevent performance saturation on limited medical data, 4) Compound scaling at multiple levels (depth, width, kernel size) of MedNeXt. This leads to state-of-the-art performance on 4 tasks on CT and MRI modalities and varying dataset sizes, representing a modernized deep architecture for medical image segmentation. Our code is made publicly available at: https://github.com/MIC-DKFZ/MedNeXt.
summary: There has been exploding interest in embracing Transformer-based architectures for medical image segmentation. However, the lack of large-scale annotated medical datasets make achieving performances equivalent to those in natural images challenging. Convolutional networks, in contrast, have higher inductive biases and consequently, are easily trainable to high performance. Recently, the ConvNeXt architecture attempted to modernize the standard ConvNet by mirroring Transformer blocks. In this work, we improve upon this to design a modernized and scalable convolutional architecture customized to challenges of data-scarce medical settings. We introduce MedNeXt, a Transformer-inspired large kernel segmentation network which introduces - 1) A fully ConvNeXt 3D Encoder-Decoder Network for medical image segmentation, 2) Residual ConvNeXt up and downsampling blocks to preserve semantic richness across scales, 3) A novel technique to iteratively increase kernel sizes by upsampling small kernel networks, to prevent performance saturation on limited medical data, 4) Compound scaling at multiple levels (depth, width, kernel size) of MedNeXt. This leads to state-of-the-art performance on 4 tasks on CT and MRI modalities and varying dataset sizes, representing a modernized deep architecture for medical image segmentation. Our code is made publicly available at: https://github.com/MIC-DKFZ/MedNeXt.
abstract_zh: 人们对采用基于 Transformer 的架构进行医学图像分割的兴趣日益浓厚。然而，缺乏大规模带注释的医学数据集使得实现与自然图像相当的性能具有挑战性。相比之下，卷积网络具有更高的归纳偏差，因此很容易训练到高性能。最近，ConvNeXt 架构尝试通过镜像 Transformer 块来实现标准 ConvNet 的现代化。在这项工作中，我们对此进行了改进，设计了一种现代化且可扩展的卷积架构，该架构针对数据稀缺的医疗环境的挑战而定制。我们介绍了 MedNeXt，一种受 Transformer 启发的大型内核分割网络，它引入了 - 1）用于医学图像分割的完全 ConvNeXt 3D 编码器-解码器网络，2）剩余 ConvNeXt 上采样和下采样块以保持跨尺度的语义丰富性，3）一种通过对小内核网络进行上采样来迭代增加内核大小的新技术，以防止有限医疗数据的性能饱和，4）多个级别（深度， MedNeXt 的宽度、内核大小）。这使得在 CT 和 MRI 模式以及不同数据集大小的 4 项任务上实现了最先进的性能，代表了医学图像分割的现代化深度架构。我们的代码公开于：https://github.com/MIC-DKFZ/MedNeXt。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MedNeXt，一种受Transformer启发的卷积网络，用于解决医学图像分割中数据稀缺的问题。
AI.motivation: 尽管Transformer在医学图像分割中受到关注，但医学数据标注稀缺且规模小，难以达到自然图像的性能。传统卷积网络因归纳偏置强而更易训练，但需改进以适应医学场景。
AI.method: 设计包含3D编码器-解码器结构、残差卷积块、迭代核尺寸扩展及多级复合缩放的MedNeXt网络，结合Transformer思想优化卷积操作。
AI.result: 在CT和MRI的4种任务中，无论数据集规模大小均达到最先进性能，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: MedNeXt通过现代卷积架构改进，有效解决了医学图像数据稀缺下的分割难题，为该领域提供了新范式。

method: 设计包含3D编码器-解码器结构、残差卷积块、迭代核尺寸扩展及多级复合缩放的MedNeXt网络，结合Transformer思想优化卷积操作。
result: 在CT和MRI的4种任务中，无论数据集规模大小均达到最先进性能，代码已开源。
conclusion: MedNeXt通过现代卷积架构改进，有效解决了医学图像数据稀缺下的分割难题，为该领域提供了新范式。
search_text: MedNeXt: Transformer-driven Scaling of ConvNets for Medical Image Segmentation MedNeXt：用于医学图像分割的变压器驱动的卷积网络扩展 There has been exploding interest in embracing Transformer-based architectures for medical image segmentation. However, the lack of large-scale annotated medical datasets make achieving performances equivalent to those in natural images challenging. Convolutional networks, in contrast, have higher inductive biases and consequently, are easily trainable to high performance. Recently, the ConvNeXt architecture attempted to modernize the standard ConvNet by mirroring Transformer blocks. In this work, we improve upon this to design a modernized and scalable convolutional architecture customized to challenges of data-scarce medical settings. We introduce MedNeXt, a Transformer-inspired large kernel segmentation network which introduces - 1) A fully ConvNeXt 3D Encoder-Decoder Network for medical image segmentation, 2) Residual ConvNeXt up and downsampling blocks to preserve semantic richness across scales, 3) A novel technique to iteratively increase kernel sizes by upsampling small kernel networks, to prevent performance saturation on limited medical data, 4) Compound scaling at multiple levels (depth, width, kernel size) of MedNeXt. This leads to state-of-the-art performance on 4 tasks on CT and MRI modalities and varying dataset sizes, representing a modernized deep architecture for medical image segmentation. Our code is made publicly available at: https://github.com/MIC-DKFZ/MedNeXt. 人们对采用基于 Transformer 的架构进行医学图像分割的兴趣日益浓厚。然而，缺乏大规模带注释的医学数据集使得实现与自然图像相当的性能具有挑战性。相比之下，卷积网络具有更高的归纳偏差，因此很容易训练到高性能。最近，ConvNeXt 架构尝试通过镜像 Transformer 块来实现标准 ConvNet 的现代化。在这项工作中，我们对此进行了改进，设计了一种现代化且可扩展的卷积架构，该架构针对数据稀缺的医疗环境的挑战而定制。我们介绍了 MedNeXt，一种受 Transformer 启发的大型内核分割网络，它引入了 - 1）用于医学图像分割的完全 ConvNeXt 3D 编码器-解码器网络，2）剩余 ConvNeXt 上采样和下采样块以保持跨尺度的语义丰富性，3）一种通过对小内核网络进行上采样来迭代增加内核大小的新技术，以防止有限医疗数据的性能饱和，4）多个级别（深度， MedNeXt 的宽度、内核大小）。这使得在 CT 和 MRI 模式以及不同数据集大小的 4 项任务上实现了最先进的性能，代表了医学图像分割的现代化深度架构。我们的代码公开于：https://github.com/MIC-DKFZ/MedNeXt。 本文提出MedNeXt，一种受Transformer启发的卷积网络，用于解决医学图像分割中数据稀缺的问题。 Saikat Roy,Gregor Koehler,Constantin Ulrich,Michael Baumgartner,Jens Petersen,Fabian Isensee,Paul F. Jaeger,Klaus Maier-Hein eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Jiawei Yang,Susanto Rahardja,Pasi Franti
title: Neighborhood Averaging for Improving Outlier Detectors
title_zh: 用于改进离群值检测器的邻域平均
abstract: We hypothesize that similar objects should have similar outlier scores. To our knowledge, all existing outlier detectors calculate the outlier score for each object independently regardless of the outlier scores of the other objects. Therefore, they do not guarantee that similar objects have similar outlier scores. To verify our proposed hypothesis, we propose an outlier score post-processing technique for outlier detectors, called neighborhood averaging(NA), which pays attention to objects and their neighbors and guarantees them to have more similar outlier scores than their original scores. Given an object and its outlier score from any outlier detector, NA modifies its outlier score by combining it with its k nearest neighbors' scores. We demonstrate the effectivity of NA by using the well-known k-nearest neighbors (k-NN). Experimental results show that NA improves all 10 tested baseline detectors by 13% (from 0.70 to 0.79 AUC) on average evaluated on nine real-world datasets. Moreover, even outlier detectors that are already based on k-NN are also improved. The experiments also show that in some applications, the choice of detector is no more significant when detectors are jointly used with NA, which may pose a challenge to the generally considered idea that the data model is the most important factor. We open our code on www.outlierNet.com for reproducibility.
summary: We hypothesize that similar objects should have similar outlier scores. To our knowledge, all existing outlier detectors calculate the outlier score for each object independently regardless of the outlier scores of the other objects. Therefore, they do not guarantee that similar objects have similar outlier scores. To verify our proposed hypothesis, we propose an outlier score post-processing technique for outlier detectors, called neighborhood averaging(NA), which pays attention to objects and their neighbors and guarantees them to have more similar outlier scores than their original scores. Given an object and its outlier score from any outlier detector, NA modifies its outlier score by combining it with its k nearest neighbors' scores. We demonstrate the effectivity of NA by using the well-known k-nearest neighbors (k-NN). Experimental results show that NA improves all 10 tested baseline detectors by 13% (from 0.70 to 0.79 AUC) on average evaluated on nine real-world datasets. Moreover, even outlier detectors that are already based on k-NN are also improved. The experiments also show that in some applications, the choice of detector is no more significant when detectors are jointly used with NA, which may pose a challenge to the generally considered idea that the data model is the most important factor. We open our code on www.outlierNet.com for reproducibility.
abstract_zh: 我们假设相似的对象应该具有相似的异常值分数。据我们所知，所有现有的异常值检测器都独立计算每个对象的异常值分数，而不管其他对象的异常值分数。因此，他们不保证相似的对象具有相似的异常值分数。为了验证我们提出的假设，我们提出了一种用于离群值检测器的离群值后处理技术，称为邻域平均（NA），它关注对象及其邻居并保证它们具有比原始分数更相似的离群值。给定一个对象及其来自任何异常值检测器的异常值得分，NA 通过将其与其 k 个最近邻居的得分相结合来修改其异常值得分。我们通过使用众所周知的 k-近邻 (k-NN) 证明了 NA 的有效性。实验结果表明，NA 在 9 个真实世界数据集上的评估平均将所有 10 个测试的基线检测器提高了 13%（从 0.70 AUC 到 0.79 AUC）。此外，甚至已经基于 k-NN 的异常值检测器也得到了改进。实验还表明，在某些应用中，当检测器与NA联合使用时，检测器的选择不再重要，这可能对普遍认为的数据模型是最重要因素的观点提出挑战。我们在 www.outlierNet.com 上开放我们的代码以实现可重复性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为邻域平均（NA）的后处理技术，通过结合对象与其k近邻的异常分数，提升现有异常检测器的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有异常检测方法独立计算每个对象的异常分数，无法保证相似对象具有相似的分数，导致结果不一致。
AI.method: 提出邻域平均（NA）方法，利用k近邻的异常分数对原始分数进行加权平均，确保相似对象的分数更接近。
AI.result: 在九个真实数据集上，NA使10种基线检测器的AUC平均提升13%（从0.70到0.79），且对基于k-NN的检测器也有提升。
AI.conclusion: NA通过邻域信息增强检测一致性，表明数据模型的重要性可能被方法改进所削弱，代码已开源以供复现。

authors_text: Johannes M. Arend,Christoph Pörschmann,Stefan Weinzierl,Fabian Brinkmann
title: Magnitude-Corrected and Time-Aligned Interpolation of Head-Related Transfer Functions
title_zh: 头部相关传递函数的幅度校正和时间对齐插值
comment: ef:IEEE/ACM Trans. Audio Speech and Lang. Proc., 31, 3783--3799 (2023)
comments: ef:IEEE/ACM Trans. Audio Speech and Lang. Proc., 31, 3783--3799 (2023)
abstract: Head-related transfer functions (HRTFs) are essential for virtual acoustic realities, as they contain all cues for localizing sound sources in three-dimensional space. Acoustic measurements are one way to obtain high-quality HRTFs. To reduce measurement time, cost, and complexity of measurement systems, a promising approach is to capture only a few HRTFs on a sparse sampling grid and then upsample them to a dense HRTF set by interpolation. However, HRTF interpolation is challenging because small changes in source position can result in significant changes in the HRTF phase and magnitude response. Previous studies greatly improved the interpolation by time-aligning the HRTFs in preprocessing, but magnitude interpolation errors, especially in contralateral regions, remain a problem. Building upon the time-alignment approaches, we propose an additional post-interpolation magnitude correction derived from a frequency-smoothed HRTF representation. Employing all 96 individual simulated HRTF sets of the HUTUBS database, we show that the magnitude correction significantly reduces interpolation errors compared to state-of-the-art interpolation methods applying only time alignment. Our analysis shows that when upsampling very sparse HRTF sets, the subject-averaged magnitude error in the critical higher frequency range is up to 1.5 dB lower when averaged over all directions and even up to 4 dB lower in the contralateral region. As a result, the interaural level differences in the upsampled HRTFs are considerably improved. The proposed algorithm thus has the potential to further reduce the minimum number of HRTFs required for perceptually transparent interpolation.
summary: Head-related transfer functions (HRTFs) are essential for virtual acoustic realities, as they contain all cues for localizing sound sources in three-dimensional space. Acoustic measurements are one way to obtain high-quality HRTFs. To reduce measurement time, cost, and complexity of measurement systems, a promising approach is to capture only a few HRTFs on a sparse sampling grid and then upsample them to a dense HRTF set by interpolation. However, HRTF interpolation is challenging because small changes in source position can result in significant changes in the HRTF phase and magnitude response. Previous studies greatly improved the interpolation by time-aligning the HRTFs in preprocessing, but magnitude interpolation errors, especially in contralateral regions, remain a problem. Building upon the time-alignment approaches, we propose an additional post-interpolation magnitude correction derived from a frequency-smoothed HRTF representation. Employing all 96 individual simulated HRTF sets of the HUTUBS database, we show that the magnitude correction significantly reduces interpolation errors compared to state-of-the-art interpolation methods applying only time alignment. Our analysis shows that when upsampling very sparse HRTF sets, the subject-averaged magnitude error in the critical higher frequency range is up to 1.5 dB lower when averaged over all directions and even up to 4 dB lower in the contralateral region. As a result, the interaural level differences in the upsampled HRTFs are considerably improved. The proposed algorithm thus has the potential to further reduce the minimum number of HRTFs required for perceptually transparent interpolation.
abstract_zh: 头部相关传递函数 (HRTF) 对于虚拟声学现实至关重要，因为它们包含在三维空间中定位声源的所有线索。声学测量是获得高质量 HRTF 的一种方法。为了减少测量时间、成本和测量系统的复杂性，一种有前景的方法是在稀疏采样网格上仅捕获少量 HRTF，然后通过插值将它们上采样为密集 HRTF 集。然而，HRTF 插值具有挑战性，因为源位置的微小变化可能会导致 HRTF 相位和幅度响应发生显着变化。先前的研究通过在预处理中对 HRTF 进行时间对齐，极大地改进了插值，但幅度插值误差，特别是在对侧区域，仍然是一个问题。基于时间对齐方法，我们提出了从频率平滑 HRTF 表示中导出的附加后插值幅度校正。利用 HUTUBS 数据库的所有 96 个单独的模拟 HRTF 集，我们表明，与仅应用时间对齐的最先进的插值方法相比，幅度校正显着减少了插值误差。我们的分析表明，当对非常稀疏的 HRTF 集进行上采样时，在所有方向上进行平均时，关键较高频率范围内的主体平均幅度误差最多可降低 1.5 dB，甚至在对侧区域可降低最多 4 dB。因此，上采样 HRTF 中的耳间电平差异得到了显着改善。因此，所提出的算法有可能进一步减少感知透明插值所需的最小 HRTF 数量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合时序对齐和幅度校正的插值方法，以提高头部相关传递函数（HRTF）的插值精度。
AI.motivation: HRTF插值需减少测量时间和成本，但现有方法在对侧区域存在显著幅度误差，影响声源定位准确性。
AI.method: 在时序对齐预处理基础上，提出基于频率平滑HRTF表示的后插值幅度校正方法，并使用HUTUBS数据库的96组数据验证。
AI.result: 在高频段和对侧区域，平均幅度误差分别降低1.5dB和4dB，显著提升双耳声级差准确性。
AI.conclusion: 该算法可减少实现感知透明插值所需的HRTF数量，为虚拟声学应用提供更高效解决方案。

Our analysis shows that when upsampling very sparse HRTF sets, the subject-averaged magnitude error in the critical higher frequency range is up to 1.5 dB lower when averaged over all directions and even up to 4 dB lower in the contralateral region. As a result, the interaural level differences in the upsampled HRTFs are considerably improved. The proposed algorithm thus has the potential to further reduce the minimum number of HRTFs required for perceptually transparent interpolation. 头部相关传递函数 (HRTF) 对于虚拟声学现实至关重要，因为它们包含在三维空间中定位声源的所有线索。声学测量是获得高质量 HRTF 的一种方法。为了减少测量时间、成本和测量系统的复杂性，一种有前景的方法是在稀疏采样网格上仅捕获少量 HRTF，然后通过插值将它们上采样为密集 HRTF 集。然而，HRTF 插值具有挑战性，因为源位置的微小变化可能会导致 HRTF 相位和幅度响应发生显着变化。先前的研究通过在预处理中对 HRTF 进行时间对齐，极大地改进了插值，但幅度插值误差，特别是在对侧区域，仍然是一个问题。基于时间对齐方法，我们提出了从频率平滑 HRTF 表示中导出的附加后插值幅度校正。利用 HUTUBS 数据库的所有 96 个单独的模拟 HRTF 集，我们表明，与仅应用时间对齐的最先进的插值方法相比，幅度校正显着减少了插值误差。我们的分析表明，当对非常稀疏的 HRTF 集进行上采样时，在所有方向上进行平均时，关键较高频率范围内的主体平均幅度误差最多可降低 1.5 dB，甚至在对侧区域可降低最多 4 dB。因此，上采样 HRTF 中的耳间电平差异得到了显着改善。因此，所提出的算法有可能进一步减少感知透明插值所需的最小 HRTF 数量。 本文提出了一种结合时序对齐和幅度校正的插值方法，以提高头部相关传递函数（HRTF）的插值精度。 Johannes M. Arend,Christoph Pörschmann,Stefan Weinzierl,Fabian Brinkmann eess.AS,cs.SD

authors_text: Guillaume Jeanneret,Loïc Simon,Frédéric Jurie
title: Adversarial Counterfactual Visual Explanations
title_zh: 对抗性反事实视觉解释
comment: CVPR 2023 camera-ready; Main manuscript + supplementary material
comments: CVPR 2023 camera-ready; Main manuscript + supplementary material
abstract: Counterfactual explanations and adversarial attacks have a related goal: flipping output labels with minimal perturbations regardless of their characteristics. Yet, adversarial attacks cannot be used directly in a counterfactual explanation perspective, as such perturbations are perceived as noise and not as actionable and understandable image modifications. Building on the robust learning literature, this paper proposes an elegant method to turn adversarial attacks into semantically meaningful perturbations, without modifying the classifiers to explain. The proposed approach hypothesizes that Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Models are excellent regularizers for avoiding high-frequency and out-of-distribution perturbations when generating adversarial attacks. The paper's key idea is to build attacks through a diffusion model to polish them. This allows studying the target model regardless of its robustification level. Extensive experimentation shows the advantages of our counterfactual explanation approach over current State-of-the-Art in multiple testbeds.
summary: Counterfactual explanations and adversarial attacks have a related goal: flipping output labels with minimal perturbations regardless of their characteristics. Yet, adversarial attacks cannot be used directly in a counterfactual explanation perspective, as such perturbations are perceived as noise and not as actionable and understandable image modifications. Building on the robust learning literature, this paper proposes an elegant method to turn adversarial attacks into semantically meaningful perturbations, without modifying the classifiers to explain. The proposed approach hypothesizes that Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Models are excellent regularizers for avoiding high-frequency and out-of-distribution perturbations when generating adversarial attacks. The paper's key idea is to build attacks through a diffusion model to polish them. This allows studying the target model regardless of its robustification level. Extensive experimentation shows the advantages of our counterfactual explanation approach over current State-of-the-Art in multiple testbeds.
abstract_zh: 反事实解释和对抗性攻击有一个相关的目标：无论其特征如何，都以最小的扰动翻转输出标签。然而，对抗性攻击不能直接用于反事实解释的角度，因为这种扰动被视为噪声，而不是可操作和可理解的图像修改。基于强大的学习文献，本文提出了一种优雅的方法，可以将对抗性攻击转化为语义上有意义的扰动，而无需修改分类器来解释。所提出的方法假设去噪扩散概率模型是优秀的正则化器，可以在生成对抗性攻击时避免高频和分布外的扰动。该论文的关键思想是通过扩散模型构建攻击来完善它们。这允许研究目标模型，无论其稳健性水平如何。广泛的实验表明，我们的反事实解释方法在多个测试平台上相对于当前最先进的方法具有优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种将对抗攻击转化为语义有意义的反事实视觉解释的方法，通过扩散模型生成可操作的图像扰动。
AI.motivation: 对抗攻击生成的扰动被视为噪声而非可解释的修改，现有方法难以生成符合人类理解的反事实解释。
AI.method: 利用去噪扩散概率模型作为正则化器，通过扩散过程生成避免高频和分布外扰动的对抗样本。
AI.result: 在多个测试平台中，该方法在生成可解释反事实解释方面优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 扩散模型能有效生成符合语义的对抗扰动，为模型解释提供新思路，且无需修改目标分类器。

authors_text: Gözde Özcan,Stratis Ioannidis
title: Stochastic Submodular Maximization via Polynomial Estimators
title_zh: 通过多项式估计器实现随机子模最大化
comment: 23 pages, accepted to 27th Pasific-Asian Conference on Knowledge Discovery and Data Mining
comments: 23 pages, accepted to 27th Pasific-Asian Conference on Knowledge Discovery and Data Mining
abstract: In this paper, we study stochastic submodular maximization problems with general matroid constraints, that naturally arise in online learning, team formation, facility location, influence maximization, active learning and sensing objective functions. In other words, we focus on maximizing submodular functions that are defined as expectations over a class of submodular functions with an unknown distribution. We show that for monotone functions of this form, the stochastic continuous greedy algorithm attains an approximation ratio (in expectation) arbitrarily close to $(1-1/e) \approx 63\%$ using a polynomial estimation of the gradient. We argue that using this polynomial estimator instead of the prior art that uses sampling eliminates a source of randomness and experimentally reduces execution time.
summary: In this paper, we study stochastic submodular maximization problems with general matroid constraints, that naturally arise in online learning, team formation, facility location, influence maximization, active learning and sensing objective functions. In other words, we focus on maximizing submodular functions that are defined as expectations over a class of submodular functions with an unknown distribution. We show that for monotone functions of this form, the stochastic continuous greedy algorithm attains an approximation ratio (in expectation) arbitrarily close to $(1-1/e) \approx 63\%$ using a polynomial estimation of the gradient. We argue that using this polynomial estimator instead of the prior art that uses sampling eliminates a source of randomness and experimentally reduces execution time.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们研究了具有一般拟阵约束的随机子模最大化问题，这些问题自然出现在在线学习、团队组建、设施选址、影响力最大化、主动学习和感知目标函数中。换句话说，我们专注于最大化子模函数，这些函数被定义为对一类具有未知分布的子模函数的期望。我们证明，对于这种形式的单调函数，随机连续贪婪算法使用梯度的多项式估计获得任意接近 $(1-1/e) \approx 63\%$ 的近似率（在期望中）。我们认为，使用该多项式估计器代替使用采样的现有技术消除了随机性来源并通过实验减少了执行时间。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在一般matroid约束下的随机子模最大化问题，提出使用多项式估计器替代传统采样方法以提高效率。
AI.motivation: 子模最大化问题广泛应用于在线学习、团队组建等场景，但现有方法依赖采样导致随机性和时间开销较大，需更优解决方案。
AI.method: 采用多项式估计器近似梯度，结合随机连续贪心算法，在无需采样的情况下优化单调子模函数的期望最大化。
AI.result: 理论证明算法可达到接近(1-1/e)的近似比，实验表明相比采样方法执行时间显著减少。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过多项式估计器降低了随机性，提升了计算效率，为随机子模优化提供了新的理论与实践方案。

authors_text: Yang-Fan Zhou,Kai-Lang Yao,Wu-Jun Li
title: GNNFormer: A Graph-based Framework for Cytopathology Report Generation
title_zh: GNNFormer：基于图形的细胞病理学报告生成框架
abstract: Cytopathology report generation is a necessary step for the standardized examination of pathology images. However, manually writing detailed reports brings heavy workloads for pathologists. To improve efficiency, some existing works have studied automatic generation of cytopathology reports, mainly by applying image caption generation frameworks with visual encoders originally proposed for natural images. A common weakness of these works is that they do not explicitly model the structural information among cells, which is a key feature of pathology images and provides significant information for making diagnoses. In this paper, we propose a novel graph-based framework called GNNFormer, which seamlessly integrates graph neural network (GNN) and Transformer into the same framework, for cytopathology report generation. To the best of our knowledge, GNNFormer is the first report generation method that explicitly models the structural information among cells in pathology images. It also effectively fuses structural information among cells, fine-grained morphology features of cells and background features to generate high-quality reports. Experimental results on the NMI-WSI dataset show that GNNFormer can outperform other state-of-the-art baselines.
summary: Cytopathology report generation is a necessary step for the standardized examination of pathology images. However, manually writing detailed reports brings heavy workloads for pathologists. To improve efficiency, some existing works have studied automatic generation of cytopathology reports, mainly by applying image caption generation frameworks with visual encoders originally proposed for natural images. A common weakness of these works is that they do not explicitly model the structural information among cells, which is a key feature of pathology images and provides significant information for making diagnoses. In this paper, we propose a novel graph-based framework called GNNFormer, which seamlessly integrates graph neural network (GNN) and Transformer into the same framework, for cytopathology report generation. To the best of our knowledge, GNNFormer is the first report generation method that explicitly models the structural information among cells in pathology images. It also effectively fuses structural information among cells, fine-grained morphology features of cells and background features to generate high-quality reports. Experimental results on the NMI-WSI dataset show that GNNFormer can outperform other state-of-the-art baselines.
abstract_zh: 细胞病理学报告的生成是病理图像标准化检查的必要步骤。然而，手动撰写详细报告给病理学家带来了繁重的工作量。为了提高效率，一些现有的工作研究了细胞病理学报告的自动生成，主要是应用最初为自然图像提出的带有视觉编码器的图像标题生成框架。这些工作的一个共同弱点是它们没有明确地模拟细胞间的结构信息，这是病理图像的关键特征，并为诊断提供重要信息。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为 GNNFormer 的新型基于图的框架，它将图神经网络（GNN）和 Transformer 无缝集成到同一框架中，用于生成细胞病理学报告。据我们所知，GNNFormer 是第一个对病理图像中细胞之间的结构信息进行显式建模的报告生成方法。它还有效地融合了细胞间的结构信息、细胞的细粒度形态特征和背景特征，以生成高质量的报告。 NMI-WSI 数据集上的实验结果表明，GNNFormer 可以优于其他最先进的基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于图神经网络（GNN）和Transformer的新型框架GNNFormer，用于生成细胞病理学报告。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在生成细胞病理学报告时未显式建模细胞间的结构信息，而这一信息对诊断至关重要。
AI.method: 通过将图神经网络与Transformer结合，GNNFormer同时捕捉细胞结构关系、细粒度形态特征及背景信息。
AI.result: 在NMI-WSI数据集上的实验表明，GNNFormer优于其他先进方法。
AI.conclusion: GNNFormer是首个显式建模病理图像中细胞结构信息的报告生成方法，有效提升了生成质量。

ai_content.conclusion: GNNFormer是首个显式建模病理图像中细胞结构信息的报告生成方法，有效提升了生成质量。

tldr: 本文提出了一种基于图神经网络（GNN）和Transformer的新型框架GNNFormer，用于生成细胞病理学报告。
motivation: 现有方法在生成细胞病理学报告时未显式建模细胞间的结构信息，而这一信息对诊断至关重要。
method: 通过将图神经网络与Transformer结合，GNNFormer同时捕捉细胞结构关系、细粒度形态特征及背景信息。
result: 在NMI-WSI数据集上的实验表明，GNNFormer优于其他先进方法。
conclusion: GNNFormer是首个显式建模病理图像中细胞结构信息的报告生成方法，有效提升了生成质量。
search_text: GNNFormer: A Graph-based Framework for Cytopathology Report Generation GNNFormer：基于图形的细胞病理学报告生成框架 Cytopathology report generation is a necessary step for the standardized examination of pathology images. However, manually writing detailed reports brings heavy workloads for pathologists. To improve efficiency, some existing works have studied automatic generation of cytopathology reports, mainly by applying image caption generation frameworks with visual encoders originally proposed for natural images. A common weakness of these works is that they do not explicitly model the structural information among cells, which is a key feature of pathology images and provides significant information for making diagnoses. In this paper, we propose a novel graph-based framework called GNNFormer, which seamlessly integrates graph neural network (GNN) and Transformer into the same framework, for cytopathology report generation. To the best of our knowledge, GNNFormer is the first report generation method that explicitly models the structural information among cells in pathology images. It also effectively fuses structural information among cells, fine-grained morphology features of cells and background features to generate high-quality reports. Experimental results on the NMI-WSI dataset show that GNNFormer can outperform other state-of-the-art baselines. 细胞病理学报告的生成是病理图像标准化检查的必要步骤。然而，手动撰写详细报告给病理学家带来了繁重的工作量。为了提高效率，一些现有的工作研究了细胞病理学报告的自动生成，主要是应用最初为自然图像提出的带有视觉编码器的图像标题生成框架。这些工作的一个共同弱点是它们没有明确地模拟细胞间的结构信息，这是病理图像的关键特征，并为诊断提供重要信息。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为 GNNFormer 的新型基于图的框架，它将图神经网络（GNN）和 Transformer 无缝集成到同一框架中，用于生成细胞病理学报告。据我们所知，GNNFormer 是第一个对病理图像中细胞之间的结构信息进行显式建模的报告生成方法。它还有效地融合了细胞间的结构信息、细胞的细粒度形态特征和背景特征，以生成高质量的报告。 NMI-WSI 数据集上的实验结果表明，GNNFormer 可以优于其他最先进的基线。 本文提出了一种基于图神经网络（GNN）和Transformer的新型框架GNNFormer，用于生成细胞病理学报告。 Yang-Fan Zhou,Kai-Lang Yao,Wu-Jun Li cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Yurui Chen,Chun Gu,Feihu Zhang,Li Zhang
title: Single-view Neural Radiance Fields with Depth Teacher
title_zh: 具有深度教师的单视图神经辐射场
abstract: Neural Radiance Fields (NeRF) have been proposed for photorealistic novel view rendering. However, it requires many different views of one scene for training. Moreover, it has poor generalizations to new scenes and requires retraining or fine-tuning on each scene. In this paper, we develop a new NeRF model for novel view synthesis using only a single image as input. We propose to combine the (coarse) planar rendering and the (fine) volume rendering to achieve higher rendering quality and better generalizations. We also design a depth teacher net that predicts dense pseudo depth maps to supervise the joint rendering mechanism and boost the learning of consistent 3D geometry. We evaluate our method on three challenging datasets. It outperforms state-of-the-art single-view NeRFs by achieving 5$\sim$20\% improvements in PSNR and reducing 20$\sim$50\% of the errors in the depth rendering. It also shows excellent generalization abilities to unseen data without the need to fine-tune on each new scene.
summary: Neural Radiance Fields (NeRF) have been proposed for photorealistic novel view rendering. However, it requires many different views of one scene for training. Moreover, it has poor generalizations to new scenes and requires retraining or fine-tuning on each scene. In this paper, we develop a new NeRF model for novel view synthesis using only a single image as input. We propose to combine the (coarse) planar rendering and the (fine) volume rendering to achieve higher rendering quality and better generalizations. We also design a depth teacher net that predicts dense pseudo depth maps to supervise the joint rendering mechanism and boost the learning of consistent 3D geometry. We evaluate our method on three challenging datasets. It outperforms state-of-the-art single-view NeRFs by achieving 5$\sim$20\% improvements in PSNR and reducing 20$\sim$50\% of the errors in the depth rendering. It also shows excellent generalization abilities to unseen data without the need to fine-tune on each new scene.
abstract_zh: 神经辐射场 (NeRF) 已被提议用于逼真的新颖视图渲染。然而，它需要一个场景的许多不同视图来进行训练。此外，它对新场景的泛化能力很差，需要对每个场景进行重新训练或微调。在本文中，我们开发了一种新的 NeRF 模型，仅使用单个图像作为输入来进行新颖的视图合成。我们建议将（粗略）平面渲染和（精细）体渲染结合起来，以实现更高的渲染质量和更好的泛化。我们还设计了一个深度教师网络，可以预测密集的伪深度图，以监督联合渲染机制并促进一致 3D 几何的学习。我们在三个具有挑战性的数据集上评估我们的方法。它在 PSNR 方面实现了 5$\sim$20\% 的改进，并在深度渲染中减少了 20$\sim$50\% 的错误，从而超越了最先进的单视图 NeRF。它还对未见过的数据表现出出色的泛化能力，而无需对每个新场景进行微调。

AI.tldr: 开发一种基于单张图像的神经辐射场模型，用于高质量的新视角合成。
AI.motivation: 传统NeRF需要多视角训练且泛化能力差，需针对新场景重新训练或微调。
AI.method: 结合平面渲染与体积渲染，并设计深度教师网络预测伪深度图以监督联合渲染机制，提升3D几何一致性。
AI.result: 在三个数据集上PSNR提升5-20%，深度误差减少20-50%，且无需微调即可泛化至新场景。
AI.conclusion: 提出的模型在渲染质量与泛化能力上显著优于现有方法，无需针对新场景微调。

authors_text: Zheng Qin,Hao Yu,Changjian Wang,Yuxing Peng,Kai Xu
title: Deep Graph-based Spatial Consistency for Robust Non-rigid Point Cloud Registration
title_zh: 基于深度图的空间一致性，用于鲁棒非刚性点云配准
comment: Accepted by CVPR 2023. Our code and models are available at https://github.com/qinzheng93/GraphSCNet
comments: Accepted by CVPR 2023. Our code and models are available at https://github.com/qinzheng93/GraphSCNet
abstract: We study the problem of outlier correspondence pruning for non-rigid point cloud registration. In rigid registration, spatial consistency has been a commonly used criterion to discriminate outliers from inliers. It measures the compatibility of two correspondences by the discrepancy between the respective distances in two point clouds. However, spatial consistency no longer holds in non-rigid cases and outlier rejection for non-rigid registration has not been well studied. In this work, we propose Graph-based Spatial Consistency Network (GraphSCNet) to filter outliers for non-rigid registration. Our method is based on the fact that non-rigid deformations are usually locally rigid, or local shape preserving. We first design a local spatial consistency measure over the deformation graph of the point cloud, which evaluates the spatial compatibility only between the correspondences in the vicinity of a graph node. An attention-based non-rigid correspondence embedding module is then devised to learn a robust representation of non-rigid correspondences from local spatial consistency. Despite its simplicity, GraphSCNet effectively improves the quality of the putative correspondences and attains state-of-the-art performance on three challenging benchmarks. Our code and models are available at https://github.com/qinzheng93/GraphSCNet.
summary: We study the problem of outlier correspondence pruning for non-rigid point cloud registration. In rigid registration, spatial consistency has been a commonly used criterion to discriminate outliers from inliers. It measures the compatibility of two correspondences by the discrepancy between the respective distances in two point clouds. However, spatial consistency no longer holds in non-rigid cases and outlier rejection for non-rigid registration has not been well studied. In this work, we propose Graph-based Spatial Consistency Network (GraphSCNet) to filter outliers for non-rigid registration. Our method is based on the fact that non-rigid deformations are usually locally rigid, or local shape preserving. We first design a local spatial consistency measure over the deformation graph of the point cloud, which evaluates the spatial compatibility only between the correspondences in the vicinity of a graph node. An attention-based non-rigid correspondence embedding module is then devised to learn a robust representation of non-rigid correspondences from local spatial consistency. Despite its simplicity, GraphSCNet effectively improves the quality of the putative correspondences and attains state-of-the-art performance on three challenging benchmarks. Our code and models are available at https://github.com/qinzheng93/GraphSCNet.
abstract_zh: 我们研究非刚性点云配准的异常值对应修剪问题。在严格配准中，空间一致性是区分异常值和内部值的常用标准。它通过两个点云中各自距离之间的差异来衡量两个对应关系的兼容性。然而，空间一致性在非刚性情况下不再成立，并且非刚性配准的异常值拒绝尚未得到充分研究。在这项工作中，我们提出基于图的空间一致性网络（GraphSCNet）来过滤非刚性配准的异常值。我们的方法基于以下事实：非刚性变形通常是局部刚性的，或局部形状保持的。我们首先在点云的变形图上设计一个局部空间一致性度量，它仅评估图节点附近的对应关系之间的空间兼容性。然后设计了一种基于注意力的非刚性对应嵌入模块，以从局部空间一致性中学习非刚性对应的鲁棒表示。尽管很简单，GraphSCNet 有效地提高了假定对应的质量，并在三个具有挑战性的基准上获得了最先进的性能。我们的代码和模型可在 https://github.com/qinzheng93/GraphSCNet 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于图的空一致性网络（GraphSCNet），用于解决非刚性点云配准中的异常对应关系过滤问题。
AI.motivation: 传统刚性配准中空间一致性准则无法直接应用于非刚性场景，而现有非刚性配准方法对异常值的鲁棒性不足，亟需新的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过构建点云变形图并设计局部空间一致性度量，结合注意力机制学习非刚性对应关系的鲁棒表示，利用局部刚性特性过滤异常值。
AI.result: 在三个具有挑战性的基准数据集上达到最先进性能，显著提升非刚性配准的对应关系质量。
AI.conclusion: GraphSCNet通过局部刚性假设与图结构建模有效解决了非刚性点云配准的异常值过滤问题，为相关研究提供新思路。

search_text: Deep Graph-based Spatial Consistency for Robust Non-rigid Point Cloud Registration 基于深度图的空间一致性，用于鲁棒非刚性点云配准 We study the problem of outlier correspondence pruning for non-rigid point cloud registration. In rigid registration, spatial consistency has been a commonly used criterion to discriminate outliers from inliers. It measures the compatibility of two correspondences by the discrepancy between the respective distances in two point clouds. However, spatial consistency no longer holds in non-rigid cases and outlier rejection for non-rigid registration has not been well studied. In this work, we propose Graph-based Spatial Consistency Network (GraphSCNet) to filter outliers for non-rigid registration. Our method is based on the fact that non-rigid deformations are usually locally rigid, or local shape preserving. We first design a local spatial consistency measure over the deformation graph of the point cloud, which evaluates the spatial compatibility only between the correspondences in the vicinity of a graph node. An attention-based non-rigid correspondence embedding module is then devised to learn a robust representation of non-rigid correspondences from local spatial consistency. Despite its simplicity, GraphSCNet effectively improves the quality of the putative correspondences and attains state-of-the-art performance on three challenging benchmarks. authors_text: Shuzheng Qu,Mohammed Abouheaf,Wail Gueaieb,Davide Spinello
title: An Adaptive Fuzzy Reinforcement Learning Cooperative Approach for the Autonomous Control of Flock Systems
title_zh: 羊群系统自主控制的自适应模糊强化学习协作方法
abstract: The flock-guidance problem enjoys a challenging structure where multiple optimization objectives are solved simultaneously. This usually necessitates different control approaches to tackle various objectives, such as guidance, collision avoidance, and cohesion. The guidance schemes, in particular, have long suffered from complex tracking-error dynamics. Furthermore, techniques that are based on linear feedback strategies obtained at equilibrium conditions either may not hold or degrade when applied to uncertain dynamic environments. Pre-tuned fuzzy inference architectures lack robustness under such unmodeled conditions. This work introduces an adaptive distributed technique for the autonomous control of flock systems. Its relatively flexible structure is based on online fuzzy reinforcement learning schemes which simultaneously target a number of objectives; namely, following a leader, avoiding collision, and reaching a flock velocity consensus. In addition to its resilience in the face of dynamic disturbances, the algorithm does not require more than the agent position as a feedback signal. The effectiveness of the proposed method is validated with two simulation scenarios and benchmarked against a similar technique from the literature.
summary: The flock-guidance problem enjoys a challenging structure where multiple optimization objectives are solved simultaneously. This usually necessitates different control approaches to tackle various objectives, such as guidance, collision avoidance, and cohesion. The guidance schemes, in particular, have long suffered from complex tracking-error dynamics. Furthermore, techniques that are based on linear feedback strategies obtained at equilibrium conditions either may not hold or degrade when applied to uncertain dynamic environments. Pre-tuned fuzzy inference architectures lack robustness under such unmodeled conditions. This work introduces an adaptive distributed technique for the autonomous control of flock systems. Its relatively flexible structure is based on online fuzzy reinforcement learning schemes which simultaneously target a number of objectives; namely, following a leader, avoiding collision, and reaching a flock velocity consensus. In addition to its resilience in the face of dynamic disturbances, the algorithm does not require more than the agent position as a feedback signal. The effectiveness of the proposed method is validated with two simulation scenarios and benchmarked against a similar technique from the literature.
abstract_zh: 群体引导问题具有挑战性的结构，需要同时解决多个优化目标。这通常需要不同的控制方法来解决不同的目标，例如引导、避免碰撞和凝聚力。特别是制导方案长期以来一直受到复杂的跟踪误差动态的影响。此外，基于在平衡条件下获得的线性反馈策略的技术在应用于不确定的动态环境时可能无法保持或退化。在这种未建模的条件下，预先调整的模糊推理架构缺乏鲁棒性。这项工作介绍了一种用于群体系统自主控制的自适应分布式技术。其相对灵活的结构基于在线模糊强化学习方案，同时针对多个目标；即跟随领导者，避免碰撞，并达成群体速度共识。除了面对动态干扰时的弹性之外，该算法不需要代理位置作为反馈信号。该方法的有效性通过两个模拟场景进行了验证，并与文献中的类似技术进行了基准测试。

AI.tldr: 提出一种自适应模糊强化学习方法，用于群体系统的自主控制，解决跟随领导者、避障和速度共识等多目标问题。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在动态不确定环境中存在鲁棒性不足、依赖预设参数等问题，需开发更灵活的控制策略以应对复杂动态场景。
AI.method: 基于在线模糊强化学习的自适应分布式控制算法，无需额外反馈信号，同时处理多个控制目标。
AI.result: 通过仿真验证了方法在动态干扰下的有效性，且性能优于文献中对比方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在动态干扰下表现出良好的鲁棒性，结构灵活，适用于群体系统的自主控制。

search_text: An Adaptive Fuzzy Reinforcement Learning Cooperative Approach for the Autonomous Control of Flock Systems 羊群系统自主控制的自适应模糊强化学习协作方法 The flock-guidance problem enjoys a challenging structure where multiple optimization objectives are solved simultaneously. This usually necessitates different control approaches to tackle various objectives, such as guidance, collision avoidance, and cohesion. The guidance schemes, in particular, have long suffered from complex tracking-error dynamics. Furthermore, techniques that are based on linear feedback strategies obtained at equilibrium conditions either may not hold or degrade when applied to uncertain dynamic environments. Pre-tuned fuzzy inference architectures lack robustness under such unmodeled conditions. This work introduces an adaptive distributed technique for the autonomous control of flock systems. Its relatively flexible structure is based on online fuzzy reinforcement learning schemes which simultaneously target a number of objectives; namely, following a leader, avoiding collision, and reaching a flock velocity consensus. In addition to its resilience in the face of dynamic disturbances, the algorithm does not require more than the agent position as a feedback signal. The effectiveness of the proposed method is validated with two simulation scenarios and benchmarked against a similar technique from the literature. 群体引导问题具有挑战性的结构，需要同时解决多个优化目标。这通常需要不同的控制方法来解决不同的目标，例如引导、避免碰撞和凝聚力。特别是制导方案长期以来一直受到复杂的跟踪误差动态的影响。此外，基于在平衡条件下获得的线性反馈策略的技术在应用于不确定的动态环境时可能无法保持或退化。在这种未建模的条件下，预先调整的模糊推理架构缺乏鲁棒性。这项工作介绍了一种用于群体系统自主控制的自适应分布式技术。其相对灵活的结构基于在线模糊强化学习方案，同时针对多个目标；即跟随领导者，避免碰撞，并达成群体速度共识。除了面对动态干扰时的弹性之外，该算法不需要代理位置作为反馈信号。该方法的有效性通过两个模拟场景进行了验证，并与文献中的类似技术进行了基准测试。 提出一种自适应模糊强化学习方法，用于群体系统的自主控制，解决跟随领导者、避障和速度共识等多目标问题。 Shuzheng Qu,Mohammed Abouheaf,Wail Gueaieb,Davide Spinello eess.SY,cs.LG,cs.MA,cs.RO

authors_text: Alexandros Stergiou,Nikos Deligiannis
title: Leaping Into Memories: Space-Time Deep Feature Synthesis
title_zh: 跃入记忆：时空深度特征合成
comment: Accepted at IEEE/CVF International Conference on Computer Vision (ICCV) 2023
comments: Accepted at IEEE/CVF International Conference on Computer Vision (ICCV) 2023
abstract: The success of deep learning models has led to their adaptation and adoption by prominent video understanding methods. The majority of these approaches encode features in a joint space-time modality for which the inner workings and learned representations are difficult to visually interpret. We propose LEArned Preconscious Synthesis (LEAPS), an architecture-independent method for synthesizing videos from the internal spatiotemporal representations of models. Using a stimulus video and a target class, we prime a fixed space-time model and iteratively optimize a video initialized with random noise. Additional regularizers are used to improve the feature diversity of the synthesized videos alongside the cross-frame temporal coherence of motions. We quantitatively and qualitatively evaluate the applicability of LEAPS by inverting a range of spatiotemporal convolutional and attention-based architectures trained on Kinetics-400, which to the best of our knowledge has not been previously accomplished.
summary: The success of deep learning models has led to their adaptation and adoption by prominent video understanding methods. The majority of these approaches encode features in a joint space-time modality for which the inner workings and learned representations are difficult to visually interpret. We propose LEArned Preconscious Synthesis (LEAPS), an architecture-independent method for synthesizing videos from the internal spatiotemporal representations of models. Using a stimulus video and a target class, we prime a fixed space-time model and iteratively optimize a video initialized with random noise. Additional regularizers are used to improve the feature diversity of the synthesized videos alongside the cross-frame temporal coherence of motions. We quantitatively and qualitatively evaluate the applicability of LEAPS by inverting a range of spatiotemporal convolutional and attention-based architectures trained on Kinetics-400, which to the best of our knowledge has not been previously accomplished.
abstract_zh: 深度学习模型的成功导致了著名的视频理解方法对其进行调整和采用。这些方法中的大多数以联合时空模态编码特征，其内部工作原理和学习的表示很难直观地解释。我们提出了 LEArned 前意识合成（LEAPS），这是一种独立于架构的方法，用于从模型的内部时空表示合成视频。使用刺激视频和目标类，我们启动固定时空模型并迭代优化用随机噪声初始化的视频。额外的正则化器用于提高合成视频的特征多样性以及运动的跨帧时间一致性。我们通过反转在 Kinetics-400 上训练的一系列时空卷积和基于注意力的架构，定量和定性地评估了 LEAPS 的适用性，据我们所知，此前尚未实现这一目标。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种与架构无关的视频合成方法LEAPS，能够从深度学习模型的内部时空表示中生成视频，无需依赖特定模型结构。
AI.motivation: 现有视频理解模型的时空特征表示难以直观解释，亟需一种通用方法从模型内部状态生成可解释视频以分析其表示机制。
AI.method: 通过输入刺激视频和目标类别，对固定时空模型进行初始化，迭代优化随机噪声生成的视频，结合特征多样性与时间一致性正则化约束，实现跨架构的时空特征合成。
AI.result: 成功在Kinetics-400数据集上对多种时空卷积及注意力模型进行特征反转，验证了LEAPS方法的通用性与有效性。
AI.conclusion: LEAPS方法证明了从模型内部表示生成视频的可行性，为分析深度视频模型的表示机制提供了新工具，推动模型可解释性研究。

authors_text: Mathew Mithra Noel,Arindam Banerjee,Yug Oswal,Geraldine Bessie Amali D,Venkataraman Muthiah-Nakarajan
title: Alternate Loss Functions for Classification and Robust Regression Can Improve the Accuracy of Artificial Neural Networks
title_zh: 用于分类和鲁棒回归的交替损失函数可以提高人工神经网络的准确性
abstract: All machine learning algorithms use a loss, cost, utility or reward function to encode the learning objective and oversee the learning process. This function that supervises learning is a frequently unrecognized hyperparameter that determines how incorrect outputs are penalized and can be tuned to improve performance. This paper shows that training speed and final accuracy of neural networks can significantly depend on the loss function used to train neural networks. In particular derivative values can be significantly different with different loss functions leading to significantly different performance after gradient descent based Backpropagation (BP) training. This paper explores the effect on performance of using new loss functions that are also convex but penalize errors differently compared to the popular Cross-entropy loss. Two new classification loss functions that significantly improve performance on a wide variety of benchmark tasks are proposed. A new loss function call smooth absolute error that outperforms the Squared error, Huber and Log-Cosh losses on datasets with significantly many outliers is proposed. This smooth absolute error loss function is infinitely differentiable and more closely approximates the absolute error loss compared to the Huber and Log-Cosh losses used for robust regression.
summary: All machine learning algorithms use a loss, cost, utility or reward function to encode the learning objective and oversee the learning process. This function that supervises learning is a frequently unrecognized hyperparameter that determines how incorrect outputs are penalized and can be tuned to improve performance. This paper shows that training speed and final accuracy of neural networks can significantly depend on the loss function used to train neural networks. In particular derivative values can be significantly different with different loss functions leading to significantly different performance after gradient descent based Backpropagation (BP) training. This paper explores the effect on performance of using new loss functions that are also convex but penalize errors differently compared to the popular Cross-entropy loss. Two new classification loss functions that significantly improve performance on a wide variety of benchmark tasks are proposed. A new loss function call smooth absolute error that outperforms the Squared error, Huber and Log-Cosh losses on datasets with significantly many outliers is proposed. This smooth absolute error loss function is infinitely differentiable and more closely approximates the absolute error loss compared to the Huber and Log-Cosh losses used for robust regression.
abstract_zh: 所有机器学习算法都使用损失、成本、效用或奖励函数来编码学习目标并监督学习过程。这个监督学习的函数是一个经常被忽视的超参数，它决定如何惩罚不正确的输出，并可以进行调整以提高性能。本文表明，神经网络的训练速度和最终精度很大程度上取决于用于训练神经网络的损失函数。特别是，不同损失函数的导数值可能显着不同，导致基于梯度下降的反向传播 (BP) 训练后的性能显着不同。本文探讨了使用新的损失函数对性能的影响，这些函数也是凸的，但与流行的交叉熵损失相比，对错误的惩罚不同。提出了两种新的分类损失函数，可以显着提高各种基准任务的性能。提出了一种称为平滑绝对误差的新损失函数，该函数在具有大量异常值的数据集上优于平方误差、Huber 和 Log-Cosh 损失。与用于鲁棒回归的 Huber 和 Log-Cosh 损失相比，这种平滑的绝对误差损失函数是无限可微的，并且更接近绝对误差损失。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了使用不同的损失函数对神经网络训练速度和最终准确性的影响，并提出了两种新的分类损失函数和一种新的鲁棒回归损失函数。
AI.motivation: 损失函数是机器学习算法中决定如何惩罚错误输出的重要超参数，不同损失函数可能导致不同的训练效果，因此需要探索更有效的损失函数以提升性能。
AI.method: 本文通过分析不同损失函数的导数差异，提出了两种新的分类损失函数和一种称为smooth absolute error的新回归损失函数，并在多个基准任务上进行了实验验证。
AI.result: 新提出的损失函数在多个基准任务上显著提升了性能，尤其是在存在大量异常值的数据集上，smooth absolute error损失函数优于平方误差、Huber和Log-Cosh损失。
AI.conclusion: 选择适当的损失函数可以显著提高神经网络的训练速度和准确性，本文提出的损失函数在不同任务中表现出良好的性能。
