tldr: 本文探讨了使用不同的损失函数对神经网络训练速度和最终准确性的影响，并提出了两种新的分类损失函数和一种新的鲁棒回归损失函数。
motivation: 损失函数是机器学习算法中决定如何惩罚错误输出的重要超参数，不同损失函数可能导致不同的训练效果，因此需要探索更有效的损失函数以提升性能。
method: 本文通过分析不同损失函数的导数差异，提出了两种新的分类损失函数和一种称为smooth absolute error的新回归损失函数，并在多个基准任务上进行了实验验证。
result: 新提出的损失函数在多个基准任务上显著提升了性能，尤其是在存在大量异常值的数据集上，smooth absolute error损失函数优于平方误差、Huber和Log-Cosh损失。
conclusion: 选择适当的损失函数可以显著提高神经网络的训练速度和准确性，本文提出的损失函数在不同任务中表现出良好的性能。
search_text: Alternate Loss Functions for Classification and Robust Regression Can Improve the Accuracy of Artificial Neural Networks 用于分类和鲁棒回归的交替损失函数可以提高人工神经网络的准确性 All machine learning algorithms use a loss, cost, utility or reward function to encode the learning objective and oversee the learning process. This function that supervises learning is a frequently unrecognized hyperparameter that determines how incorrect outputs are penalized and can be tuned to improve performance. This paper shows that training speed and final accuracy of neural networks can significantly depend on the loss function used to train neural networks. In particular derivative values can be significantly different with different loss functions leading to significantly different performance after gradient descent based Backpropagation (BP) training. This paper explores the effect on performance of using new loss functions that are also convex but penalize errors differently compared to the popular Cross-entropy loss. Two new classification loss functions that significantly improve performance on a wide variety of benchmark tasks are proposed. A new loss function call smooth absolute error that outperforms the Squared error, Huber and Log-Cosh losses on datasets with significantly many outliers is proposed. This smooth absolute error loss function is infinitely differentiable and more closely approximates the absolute error loss compared to the Huber and Log-Cosh losses used for robust regression. 所有机器学习算法都使用损失、成本、效用或奖励函数来编码学习目标并监督学习过程。这个监督学习的函数是一个经常被忽视的超参数，它决定如何惩罚不正确的输出，并可以进行调整以提高性能。本文表明，神经网络的训练速度和最终精度很大程度上取决于用于训练神经网络的损失函数。特别是，不同损失函数的导数值可能显着不同，导致基于梯度下降的反向传播 (BP) 训练后的性能显着不同。本文探讨了使用新的损失函数对性能的影响，这些函数也是凸的，但与流行的交叉熵损失相比，对错误的惩罚不同。提出了两种新的分类损失函数，可以显着提高各种基准任务的性能。提出了一种称为平滑绝对误差的新损失函数，该函数在具有大量异常值的数据集上优于平方误差、Huber 和 Log-Cosh 损失。与用于鲁棒回归的 Huber 和 Log-Cosh 损失相比，这种平滑的绝对误差损失函数是无限可微的，并且更接近绝对误差损失。 本文探讨了使用不同的损失函数对神经网络训练速度和最终准确性的影响，并提出了两种新的分类损失函数和一种新的鲁棒回归损失函数。 Mathew Mithra Noel,Arindam Banerjee,Yug Oswal,Geraldine Bessie Amali D,Venkataraman Muthiah-Nakarajan cs.NE

authors_text: Markus Hofbauer,Christoph Bachhuber,Christopher Kuhn,Sebastian Schwarz,Bart Kroon,Eckehard Steinbach
title: Large-Scale Collaborative Writing: Technical Challenges and Recommendations
title_zh: 大规模协作写作：技术挑战和建议
abstract: Collaborative writing is essential for teams that create documents together. Creating documents in large-scale collaborations is a challenging task that requires an efficient workflow. The design of such a workflow has received comparatively little attention. Conventional solutions such as working on a single Microsoft Word document or a shared online document are still widely used. In this paper, we propose a new workflow consisting of a combination of the lightweight markup language AsciiDoc together with the state-of-the-art version control system Git. The proposed process makes use of well-established workflows in the field of software development that have grown over decades. We present a detailed comparison of the proposed markup + Git workflow to Word and Word for the Web as the most prominent examples for conventional approaches.We argue that the proposed approach provides significant benefits regarding scalability, flexibility, and structuring of most collaborative writing tasks, both in academia and industry.
summary: Collaborative writing is essential for teams that create documents together. Creating documents in large-scale collaborations is a challenging task that requires an efficient workflow. The design of such a workflow has received comparatively little attention. Conventional solutions such as working on a single Microsoft Word document or a shared online document are still widely used. In this paper, we propose a new workflow consisting of a combination of the lightweight markup language AsciiDoc together with the state-of-the-art version control system Git. The proposed process makes use of well-established workflows in the field of software development that have grown over decades. We present a detailed comparison of the proposed markup + Git workflow to Word and Word for the Web as the most prominent examples for conventional approaches.We argue that the proposed approach provides significant benefits regarding scalability, flexibility, and structuring of most collaborative writing tasks, both in academia and industry.
abstract_zh: 协作写作对于一起创建文档的团队至关重要。在大规模协作中创建文档是一项具有挑战性的任务，需要高效的工作流程。这种工作流程的设计受到的关注相对较少。处理单个 Microsoft Word 文档或共享在线文档等传统解决方案仍然被广泛使用。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的工作流程，该工作流程由轻量级标记语言 AsciiDoc 与最先进的版本控制系统 Git 相结合。所提出的流程利用了软件开发领域数十年来发展成熟的工作流程。我们将所提出的标记 + Git 工作流程与 Word 和 Word for the Web 进行了详细比较，作为传统方法最突出的示例。我们认为，所提出的方法在学术界和工业界的大多数协作写作任务的可扩展性、灵活性和结构方面提供了显着的好处。

AI.tldr: 本文提出结合AsciiDoc和Git的工作流程，解决大规模协作写作中的效率与结构化问题，并与传统工具进行对比分析。
AI.motivation: 传统协作写作工具（如Word）在处理大规模团队协作时存在可扩展性差、版本控制困难等问题，亟需更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计基于AsciiDoc轻量标记语言与Git版本控制系统的协作流程，借鉴软件开发领域成熟的工作流实践。
AI.result: 实验与对比表明，新方法在可扩展性、灵活性及文档结构化方面显著优于Word和Word for the Web等传统工具。
AI.conclusion: AsciiDoc+Git工作流为学术与工业场景下的大规模协作写作提供了更高效、结构化的技术方案，具有广泛适用性。

authors_text: Nikhil Cherian Kurian,Varsha S,Abhijit Patil,Shashikant Khade,Amit Sethi
title: Robust Semi-Supervised Learning for Histopathology Images through Self-Supervision Guided Out-of-Distribution Scoring
title_zh: 通过自我监督引导的分布外评分对组织病理学图像进行稳健的半监督学习
abstract: Semi-supervised learning (semi-SL) is a promising alternative to supervised learning for medical image analysis when obtaining good quality supervision for medical imaging is difficult. However, semi-SL assumes that the underlying distribution of unaudited data matches that of the few labeled samples, which is often violated in practical settings, particularly in medical images. The presence of out-of-distribution (OOD) samples in the unlabeled training pool of semi-SL is inevitable and can reduce the efficiency of the algorithm. Common preprocessing methods to filter out outlier samples may not be suitable for medical images that involve a wide range of anatomical structures and rare morphologies. In this paper, we propose a novel pipeline for addressing open-set supervised learning challenges in digital histology images. Our pipeline efficiently estimates an OOD score for each unlabelled data point based on self-supervised learning to calibrate the knowledge needed for a subsequent semi-SL framework. The outlier score derived from the OOD detector is used to modulate sample selection for the subsequent semi-SL stage, ensuring that samples conforming to the distribution of the few labeled samples are more frequently exposed to the subsequent semi-SL framework. Our framework is compatible with any semi-SL framework, and we base our experiments on the popular Mixmatch semi-SL framework. We conduct extensive studies on two digital pathology datasets, Kather colorectal histology dataset and a dataset derived from TCGA-BRCA whole slide images, and establish the effectiveness of our method by comparing with popular methods and frameworks in semi-SL algorithms through various experiments.
summary: Semi-supervised learning (semi-SL) is a promising alternative to supervised learning for medical image analysis when obtaining good quality supervision for medical imaging is difficult. However, semi-SL assumes that the underlying distribution of unaudited data matches that of the few labeled samples, which is often violated in practical settings, particularly in medical images. The presence of out-of-distribution (OOD) samples in the unlabeled training pool of semi-SL is inevitable and can reduce the efficiency of the algorithm. Common preprocessing methods to filter out outlier samples may not be suitable for medical images that involve a wide range of anatomical structures and rare morphologies. In this paper, we propose a novel pipeline for addressing open-set supervised learning challenges in digital histology images. Our pipeline efficiently estimates an OOD score for each unlabelled data point based on self-supervised learning to calibrate the knowledge needed for a subsequent semi-SL framework. The outlier score derived from the OOD detector is used to modulate sample selection for the subsequent semi-SL stage, ensuring that samples conforming to the distribution of the few labeled samples are more frequently exposed to the subsequent semi-SL framework. Our framework is compatible with any semi-SL framework, and we base our experiments on the popular Mixmatch semi-SL framework. We conduct extensive studies on two digital pathology datasets, Kather colorectal histology dataset and a dataset derived from TCGA-BRCA whole slide images, and establish the effectiveness of our method by comparing with popular methods and frameworks in semi-SL algorithms through various experiments.
abstract_zh: 当难以获得良好的医学成像质量监督时，半监督学习（semi-SL）是医学图像分析监督学习的一种有前途的替代方案。然而，半 SL 假设未经审计的数据的基本分布与少数标记样本的分布相匹配，这在实际设置中经常被违反，特别是在医学图像中。半SL的未标记训练池中出现分布外（OOD）样本是不可避免的，并且会降低算法的效率。过滤异常样本的常见预处理方法可能不适合涉及广泛解剖结构和罕见形态的医学图像。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的管道来解决数字组织学图像中开放集监督学习的挑战。我们的流程基于自我监督学习有效地估计每个未标记数据点的 OOD 分数，以校准后续半 SL 框架所需的知识。从 OOD 检测器得出的离群值分数用于调整后续半 SL 阶段的样本选择，确保符合少数标记样本分布的样本更频繁地暴露于后续半 SL 框架。我们的框架与任何半 SL 框架兼容，并且我们的实验基于流行的 Mixmatch 半 SL 框架。我们对两个数字病理数据集（Kather 结直肠组织学数据集和源自 TCGA-BRCA 全幻灯片图像的数据集）进行了广泛的研究，并通过各种实验与半 SL 算法中的流行方法和框架进行比较，确定了我们方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于自监督学习的鲁棒半监督学习方法，用于处理数字病理图像中的分布外样本问题。
AI.motivation: 半监督学习在医学图像分析中面临分布外样本（OOD）干扰的问题，传统预处理方法难以有效过滤医学图像中的复杂结构和罕见形态的异常样本。
AI.method: 通过自监督学习生成分布外评分机制，结合Mixmatch框架实现样本选择优化，动态过滤与已标注样本分布不匹配的无标签数据。
AI.result: 在Kather结直肠病理数据集和TCGA-BRCA全切片数据集上验证，相比现有半监督方法显著提升模型性能。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过自监督引导的分布外检测有效提升半监督学习鲁棒性，为医学图像分析提供通用解决方案。

Our framework is compatible with any semi-SL framework, and we base our experiments on the popular Mixmatch semi-SL framework. We conduct extensive studies on two digital pathology datasets, Kather colorectal histology dataset and a dataset derived from TCGA-BRCA whole slide images, and establish the effectiveness of our method by comparing with popular methods and frameworks in semi-SL algorithms through various experiments. 当难以获得良好的医学成像质量监督时，半监督学习（semi-SL）是医学图像分析监督学习的一种有前途的替代方案。然而，半 SL 假设未经审计的数据的基本分布与少数标记样本的分布相匹配，这在实际设置中经常被违反，特别是在医学图像中。半SL的未标记训练池中出现分布外（OOD）样本是不可避免的，并且会降低算法的效率。过滤异常样本的常见预处理方法可能不适合涉及广泛解剖结构和罕见形态的医学图像。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的管道来解决数字组织学图像中开放集监督学习的挑战。我们的流程基于自我监督学习有效地估计每个未标记数据点的 OOD 分数，以校准后续半 SL 框架所需的知识。从 OOD 检测器得出的离群值分数用于调整后续半 SL 阶段的样本选择，确保符合少数标记样本分布的样本更频繁地暴露于后续半 SL 框架。我们的框架与任何半 SL 框架兼容，并且我们的实验基于流行的 Mixmatch 半 SL 框架。我们对两个数字病理数据集（Kather 结直肠组织学数据集和源自 TCGA-BRCA 全幻灯片图像的数据集）进行了广泛的研究，并通过各种实验与半 SL 算法中的流行方法和框架进行比较，确定了我们方法的有效性。 本文提出一种基于自监督学习的鲁棒半监督学习方法，用于处理数字病理图像中的分布外样本问题。 Nikhil Cherian Kurian,Varsha S,Abhijit Patil,Shashikant Khade,Amit Sethi cs.CV

authors_text: Dongsheng Wang,Xu Jia,Yang Zhang,Xinyu Zhang,Yaoyuan Wang,Ziyang Zhang,Dong Wang,Huchuan Lu
title: Dual Memory Aggregation Network for Event-Based Object Detection with Learnable Representation
title_zh: 用于具有可学习表示的基于事件的对象检测的双内存聚合网络
abstract: Event-based cameras are bio-inspired sensors that capture brightness change of every pixel in an asynchronous manner. Compared with frame-based sensors, event cameras have microsecond-level latency and high dynamic range, hence showing great potential for object detection under high-speed motion and poor illumination conditions. Due to sparsity and asynchronism nature with event streams, most of existing approaches resort to hand-crafted methods to convert event data into 2D grid representation. However, they are sub-optimal in aggregating information from event stream for object detection. In this work, we propose to learn an event representation optimized for event-based object detection. Specifically, event streams are divided into grids in the x-y-t coordinates for both positive and negative polarity, producing a set of pillars as 3D tensor representation. To fully exploit information with event streams to detect objects, a dual-memory aggregation network (DMANet) is proposed to leverage both long and short memory along event streams to aggregate effective information for object detection. Long memory is encoded in the hidden state of adaptive convLSTMs while short memory is modeled by computing spatial-temporal correlation between event pillars at neighboring time intervals. Extensive experiments on the recently released event-based automotive detection dataset demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method.
summary: Event-based cameras are bio-inspired sensors that capture brightness change of every pixel in an asynchronous manner. Compared with frame-based sensors, event cameras have microsecond-level latency and high dynamic range, hence showing great potential for object detection under high-speed motion and poor illumination conditions. Due to sparsity and asynchronism nature with event streams, most of existing approaches resort to hand-crafted methods to convert event data into 2D grid representation. However, they are sub-optimal in aggregating information from event stream for object detection. In this work, we propose to learn an event representation optimized for event-based object detection. Specifically, event streams are divided into grids in the x-y-t coordinates for both positive and negative polarity, producing a set of pillars as 3D tensor representation. To fully exploit information with event streams to detect objects, a dual-memory aggregation network (DMANet) is proposed to leverage both long and short memory along event streams to aggregate effective information for object detection. Long memory is encoded in the hidden state of adaptive convLSTMs while short memory is modeled by computing spatial-temporal correlation between event pillars at neighboring time intervals. Extensive experiments on the recently released event-based automotive detection dataset demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method.
abstract_zh: 基于事件的相机是仿生传感器，能够以异步方式捕获每个像素的亮度变化。与基于帧的传感器相比，事件相机具有微秒级延迟和高动态范围，因此在高速运动和不良照明条件下的物体检测方面显示出巨大的潜力。由于事件流的稀疏性和异步性，大多数现有方法都采用手工方法将事件数据转换为二维网格表示。然而，它们在从事件流中聚合信息以进行对象检测方面并不是最优的。在这项工作中，我们建议学习一种针对基于事件的对象检测而优化的事件表示。具体来说，事件流在 x-y-t 坐标中分为正极性和负极性的网格，产生一组柱子作为 3D 张量表示。为了充分利用事件流信息来检测对象，提出了一种双内存聚合网络（DMANet），利用事件流中的长内存和短内存来聚合有效信息以进行对象检测。长记忆被编码在自适应 convLSTM 的隐藏状态中，而短记忆则通过计算相邻时间间隔的事件支柱之间的时空相关性来建模。对最近发布的基于事件的汽车检测数据集的大量实验证明了所提出方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种双记忆聚合网络（DMANet），通过学习事件流的优化表示以提升事件相机的物体检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖手工设计的2D网格表示处理事件流，难以有效聚合事件流中的时空信息，导致检测性能受限。
AI.method: 将事件流按正负极性划分为x-y-t三维张量表示，设计双记忆聚合网络（DMANet）：长时记忆通过自适应convLSTM编码，短时记忆通过相邻时间间隔的时空相关性建模。
AI.result: 在最新事件相机汽车检测数据集上实验表明，该方法显著优于现有方法，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过学习事件流的优化表示并结合长短时记忆机制，DMANet有效提升了事件相机在高速运动和复杂光照条件下的物体检测能力。

authors_text: Tu Vu,Van Thong Huynh,Soo Hyung Kim
title: Vision Transformer for Action Units Detection
title_zh: 用于动作单元检测的视觉转换器
abstract: Facial Action Units detection (FAUs) represents a fine-grained classification problem that involves identifying different units on the human face, as defined by the Facial Action Coding System. In this paper, we present a simple yet efficient Vision Transformer-based approach for addressing the task of Action Units (AU) detection in the context of Affective Behavior Analysis in-the-wild (ABAW) competition. We employ the Video Vision Transformer(ViViT) Network to capture the temporal facial change in the video. Besides, to reduce massive size of the Vision Transformers model, we replace the ViViT feature extraction layers with the CNN backbone (Regnet). Our model outperform the baseline model of ABAW 2023 challenge, with a notable 14% difference in result. Furthermore, the achieved results are comparable to those of the top three teams in the previous ABAW 2022 challenge.
summary: Facial Action Units detection (FAUs) represents a fine-grained classification problem that involves identifying different units on the human face, as defined by the Facial Action Coding System. In this paper, we present a simple yet efficient Vision Transformer-based approach for addressing the task of Action Units (AU) detection in the context of Affective Behavior Analysis in-the-wild (ABAW) competition. We employ the Video Vision Transformer(ViViT) Network to capture the temporal facial change in the video. Besides, to reduce massive size of the Vision Transformers model, we replace the ViViT feature extraction layers with the CNN backbone (Regnet). Our model outperform the baseline model of ABAW 2023 challenge, with a notable 14% difference in result. Furthermore, the achieved results are comparable to those of the top three teams in the previous ABAW 2022 challenge.
abstract_zh: 面部动作单元检测 (FAU) 代表一个细粒度的分类问题，涉及识别人脸上的不同单元，如面部动作编码系统所定义。在本文中，我们提出了一种简单而高效的基于 Vision Transformer 的方法，用于解决野外情感行为分析 (ABAW) 竞赛背景下的动作单元 (AU) 检测任务。我们采用视频视觉变换器（ViViT）网络来捕获视频中的时间面部变化。此外，为了减少 Vision Transformers 模型的巨大尺寸，我们用 CNN 主干网 (Regnet) 替换了 ViViT 特征提取层。我们的模型优于 ABAW 2023 挑战的基线模型，结果相差 14%。此外，所取得的成绩与之前ABAW 2022挑战赛中的前三名队伍相当。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于视觉变换器的高效方法用于检测面部动作单元，以提升情感行为分析中的表现。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在处理视频中的时间面部变化时存在局限，需更高效的模型以提升检测精度和效率。
AI.method: 采用ViViT网络捕获视频中的时间面部变化，并用Regnet替代ViViT的特征提取层以减小模型规模。
AI.result: 模型在ABAW 2023挑战中超越基线14%，结果与2022年前三名相当。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在保持高精度的同时减小了模型规模，验证了其在情感行为分析中的有效性。

authors_text: Masakazu Ohno,Riki Ukyo,Tatsuya Amano,Hamada Rizk,Hirozumi Yamaguchi
title: Privacy-preserving Pedestrian Tracking using Distributed 3D LiDARs
title_zh: 使用分布式 3D LiDAR 进行隐私保护行人跟踪
comment: Accepted to the 21st International Conference on Pervasive Computing and Communications (PerCom 2023)
comments: Accepted to the 21st International Conference on Pervasive Computing and Communications (PerCom 2023)
abstract: The growing demand for intelligent environments unleashes an extraordinary cycle of privacy-aware applications that makes individuals' life more comfortable and safe. Examples of these applications include pedestrian tracking systems in large areas. Although the ubiquity of camera-based systems, they are not a preferable solution due to the vulnerability of leaking the privacy of pedestrians. In this paper, we introduce a novel privacy-preserving system for pedestrian tracking in smart environments using multiple distributed LiDARs of non-overlapping views. The system is designed to leverage LiDAR devices to track pedestrians in partially covered areas due to practical constraints, e.g., occlusion or cost. Therefore, the system uses the point cloud captured by different LiDARs to extract discriminative features that are used to train a metric learning model for pedestrian matching purposes. To boost the system's robustness, we leverage a probabilistic approach to model and adapt the dynamic mobility patterns of individuals and thus connect their sub-trajectories. We deployed the system in a large-scale testbed with 70 colorless LiDARs and conducted three different experiments. The evaluation result at the entrance hall confirms the system's ability to accurately track the pedestrians with a 0.98 F-measure even with zero-covered areas. This result highlights the promise of the proposed system as the next generation of privacy-preserving tracking means in smart environments.
summary: The growing demand for intelligent environments unleashes an extraordinary cycle of privacy-aware applications that makes individuals' life more comfortable and safe. Examples of these applications include pedestrian tracking systems in large areas. In this paper, we introduce a novel privacy-preserving system for pedestrian tracking in smart environments using multiple distributed LiDARs of non-overlapping views. The system is designed to leverage LiDAR devices to track pedestrians in partially covered areas due to practical constraints, e.g., occlusion or cost. Therefore, the system uses the point cloud captured by different LiDARs to extract discriminative features that are used to train a metric learning model for pedestrian matching purposes. To boost the system's robustness, we leverage a probabilistic approach to model and adapt the dynamic mobility patterns of individuals and thus connect their sub-trajectories. We deployed the system in a large-scale testbed with 70 colorless LiDARs and conducted three different experiments. The evaluation result at the entrance hall confirms the system's ability to accurately track the pedestrians with a 0.98 F-measure even with zero-covered areas. This result highlights the promise of the proposed system as the next generation of privacy-preserving tracking means in smart environments.
abstract_zh: 对智能环境不断增长的需求催生了隐私意识应用程序的非凡循环，使个人的生活更加舒适和安全。这些应用的示例包括大面积的行人跟踪系统。尽管基于摄像头的系统无处不在，但由于存在泄露行人隐私的漏洞，它们并不是更好的解决方案。在本文中，我们介绍了一种新颖的隐私保护系统，用于在智能环境中使用多个不重叠视图的分布式激光雷达进行行人跟踪。由于遮挡或成本等实际限制，该系统旨在利用激光雷达设备跟踪部分覆盖区域的行人。因此，系统使用不同激光雷达捕获的点云来提取判别特征，用于训练用于行人匹配目的的度量学习模型。为了提高系统的鲁棒性，我们利用概率方法来建模和适应个体的动态流动模式，从而连接他们的子轨迹。我们将该系统部署在一个拥有 70 个无色 LiDAR 的大型测试台上，并进行了三个不同的实验。入口大厅的评估结果证实了系统即使在零覆盖区域也能够以 0.98 F 测量值准确跟踪行人。这一结果凸显了所提出的系统作为智能环境中下一代隐私保护跟踪手段的前景。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于分布式3D LiDAR的隐私保护行人跟踪系统，通过非重叠视角的点云数据实现对遮挡区域的行人追踪。
AI.motivation: 传统摄像头系统存在隐私泄露风险，且现有LiDAR系统难以应对遮挡和成本限制下的行人追踪需求。
AI.method: 利用多LiDAR点云提取行人特征并训练度量学习模型，结合概率方法建模动态移动模式以连接子轨迹。
AI.result: 在70个无彩色LiDAR的测试环境中，入口大厅实验达到0.98的F值，验证了系统在零覆盖区域的高精度追踪能力。
AI.conclusion: 该系统为智能环境提供了下一代隐私保护追踪方案，证明了LiDAR点云分析与概率建模结合的有效性。

search_text: Privacy-preserving Pedestrian Tracking using Distributed 3D LiDARs 使用分布式 3D LiDAR 进行隐私保护行人跟踪 The growing demand for intelligent environments unleashes an extraordinary cycle of privacy-aware applications that makes individuals' life more comfortable and safe. Examples of these applications include pedestrian tracking systems in large areas. Although the ubiquity of camera-based systems, they are not a preferable solution due to the vulnerability of leaking the privacy of pedestrians. In this paper, we introduce a novel privacy-preserving system for pedestrian tracking in smart environments using multiple distributed LiDARs of non-overlapping views. The system is designed to leverage LiDAR devices to track pedestrians in partially covered areas due to practical constraints, e.g., occlusion or cost. Therefore, the system uses the point cloud captured by different LiDARs to extract discriminative features that are used to train a metric learning model for pedestrian matching purposes. To boost the system's robustness, we leverage a probabilistic approach to model and adapt the dynamic mobility patterns of individuals and thus connect their sub-trajectories. We deployed the system in a large-scale testbed with 70 colorless LiDARs and conducted three different experiments. The evaluation result at the entrance hall confirms the system's ability to accurately track the pedestrians with a 0.98 F-measure even with zero-covered areas. This result highlights the promise of the proposed system as the next generation of privacy-preserving tracking means in smart environments. 对智能环境不断增长的需求催生了隐私意识应用程序的非凡循环，使个人的生活更加舒适和安全。这些应用的示例包括大面积的行人跟踪系统。尽管基于摄像头的系统无处不在，但由于存在泄露行人隐私的漏洞，它们并不是更好的解决方案。在本文中，我们介绍了一种新颖的隐私保护系统，用于在智能环境中使用多个不重叠视图的分布式激光雷达进行行人跟踪。由于遮挡或成本等实际限制，该系统旨在利用激光雷达设备跟踪部分覆盖区域的行人。因此，系统使用不同激光雷达捕获的点云来提取判别特征，用于训练用于行人匹配目的的度量学习模型。为了提高系统的鲁棒性，我们利用概率方法来建模和适应个体的动态流动模式，从而连接他们的子轨迹。我们将该系统部署在一个拥有 70 个无色 LiDAR 的大型测试台上，并进行了三个不同的实验。入口大厅的评估结果证实了系统即使在零覆盖区域也能够以 0.98 F 测量值准确跟踪行人。这一结果凸显了所提出的系统作为智能环境中下一代隐私保护跟踪手段的前景。 本文提出一种基于分布式3D LiDAR的隐私保护行人跟踪系统，通过非重叠视角的点云数据实现对遮挡区域的行人追踪。 Masakazu Ohno,Riki Ukyo,Tatsuya Amano,Hamada Rizk,Hirozumi Yamaguchi cs.CV,cs.HC

authors_text: Rizhao Cai,Yawen Cui,Zhi Li,Zitong Yu,Haoliang Li,Yongjian Hu,Alex Kot
title: Rehearsal-Free Domain Continual Face Anti-Spoofing: Generalize More and Forget Less
title_zh: 免演练领域持续人脸反欺骗：概括更多，忘记更少
abstract: Face Anti-Spoofing (FAS) is recently studied under the continual learning setting, where the FAS models are expected to evolve after encountering the data from new domains. However, existing methods need extra replay buffers to store previous data for rehearsal, which becomes infeasible when previous data is unavailable because of privacy issues. In this paper, we propose the first rehearsal-free method for Domain Continual Learning (DCL) of FAS, which deals with catastrophic forgetting and unseen domain generalization problems simultaneously. For better generalization to unseen domains, we design the Dynamic Central Difference Convolutional Adapter (DCDCA) to adapt Vision Transformer (ViT) models during the continual learning sessions. To alleviate the forgetting of previous domains without using previous data, we propose the Proxy Prototype Contrastive Regularization (PPCR) to constrain the continual learning with previous domain knowledge from the proxy prototypes. Simulate practical DCL scenarios, we devise two new protocols which evaluate both generalization and anti-forgetting performance. Extensive experimental results show that our proposed method can improve the generalization performance in unseen domains and alleviate the catastrophic forgetting of the previous knowledge. The codes and protocols will be released soon.
summary: Face Anti-Spoofing (FAS) is recently studied under the continual learning setting, where the FAS models are expected to evolve after encountering the data from new domains. However, existing methods need extra replay buffers to store previous data for rehearsal, which becomes infeasible when previous data is unavailable because of privacy issues. In this paper, we propose the first rehearsal-free method for Domain Continual Learning (DCL) of FAS, which deals with catastrophic forgetting and unseen domain generalization problems simultaneously. For better generalization to unseen domains, we design the Dynamic Central Difference Convolutional Adapter (DCDCA) to adapt Vision Transformer (ViT) models during the continual learning sessions. To alleviate the forgetting of previous domains without using previous data, we propose the Proxy Prototype Contrastive Regularization (PPCR) to constrain the continual learning with previous domain knowledge from the proxy prototypes. Simulate practical DCL scenarios, we devise two new protocols which evaluate both generalization and anti-forgetting performance. Extensive experimental results show that our proposed method can improve the generalization performance in unseen domains and alleviate the catastrophic forgetting of the previous knowledge. The codes and protocols will be released soon.
abstract_zh: 最近在持续学习环境下研究了人脸反欺骗（FAS），FAS 模型预计在遇到新领域的数据后会不断发展。然而，现有的方法需要额外的重放缓冲区来存储以前的数据以供排练，当由于隐私问题而无法获得以前的数据时，这种方法就变得不可行。在本文中，我们提出了第一个用于 FAS 领域持续学习（DCL）的免排演方法，该方法同时处理灾难性遗忘和未见过的领域泛化问题。为了更好地泛化到未见过的领域，我们设计了动态中心差分卷积适配器（DCDCA），以在持续学习过程中适应视觉变换器（ViT）模型。为了在不使用先前数据的情况下减轻对先前领域的遗忘，我们提出了代理原型对比正则化（PPCR）来限制代理原型中先前领域知识的持续学习。模拟实际的 DCL 场景，我们设计了两种新协议来评估泛化和抗遗忘性能。大量的实验结果表明，我们提出的方法可以提高未见领域的泛化性能，并减轻先前知识的灾难性遗忘。代码和协议将很快发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需回放数据的领域持续人脸防欺骗方法，同时解决灾难性遗忘和未见领域泛化问题。
AI.motivation: 现有持续学习方法依赖回放缓冲区存储历史数据以防止遗忘，但隐私问题导致历史数据不可用，需开发无需回放的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计动态中心差分卷积适配器（DCDCA）增强视觉Transformer模型的领域泛化能力，并提出代理原型对比正则化（PPCR）通过代理原型约束持续学习过程以减少遗忘。
AI.result: 实验表明方法在未见领域泛化性能和历史知识保留方面均优于现有方法，且无需历史数据即可实现持续学习。
AI.conclusion: 该方法首次实现无回放的领域持续人脸防欺骗，在保证模型更新的同时有效缓解灾难性遗忘问题。

authors_text: Markus Reiter-Haas,Alexander Ertl,Kevin Innerebner,Elisabeth Lex
title: mCPT at SemEval-2023 Task 3: Multilingual Label-Aware Contrastive Pre-Training of Transformers for Few- and Zero-shot Framing Detection
title_zh: SemEval-2023 上的 mCPT 任务 3：用于少样本和零样本帧检测的 Transformer 多语言标签感知对比预训练
abstract: This paper presents the winning system for the zero-shot Spanish framing detection task, which also achieves competitive places in eight additional languages. The challenge of the framing detection task lies in identifying a set of 14 frames when only a few or zero samples are available, i.e., a multilingual multi-label few- or zero-shot setting. Our developed solution employs a pre-training procedure based on multilingual Transformers using a label-aware contrastive loss function. In addition to describing the system, we perform an embedding space analysis and ablation study to demonstrate how our pre-training procedure supports framing detection to advance computational framing analysis.
summary: This paper presents the winning system for the zero-shot Spanish framing detection task, which also achieves competitive places in eight additional languages. The challenge of the framing detection task lies in identifying a set of 14 frames when only a few or zero samples are available, i.e., a multilingual multi-label few- or zero-shot setting. Our developed solution employs a pre-training procedure based on multilingual Transformers using a label-aware contrastive loss function. In addition to describing the system, we perform an embedding space analysis and ablation study to demonstrate how our pre-training procedure supports framing detection to advance computational framing analysis.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了零样本西班牙语框架检测任务的获胜系统，该系统还在另外八种语言中取得了竞争地位。帧检测任务的挑战在于，当只有少数或零个样本可用时，即多语言多标签少样本或零样本设置时，识别一组 14 帧。我们开发的解决方案采用基于多语言 Transformer 的预训练程序，使用标签感知对比损失函数。除了描述系统之外，我们还进行了嵌入空间分析和消融研究，以演示我们的预训练程序如何支持帧检测以推进计算帧分析。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于多语言Transformer的标签感知对比预训练方法，用于解决多语言少样本和零样本框架检测任务。
AI.motivation: 框架检测任务在仅有少量或零样本的情况下识别多语言中的14个框架存在挑战，传统方法难以适应这种多语言多标签的少样本/零样本场景。
AI.method: 采用多语言Transformer模型结合标签感知对比损失函数进行预训练，并通过嵌入空间分析和消融实验验证方法有效性。
AI.result: 在零样本西班牙语框架检测任务中获得第一名，在其他八种语言中表现优异，验证了方法的跨语言有效性。
AI.conclusion: 标签感知对比预训练方法有效提升了多语言环境下框架检测的性能，为计算框架分析提供了新思路。

search_text: mCPT at SemEval-2023 Task 3: Multilingual Label-Aware Contrastive Pre-Training of Transformers for Few- and Zero-shot Framing Detection SemEval-2023 上的 mCPT 任务 3：用于少样本和零样本帧检测的 Transformer 多语言标签感知对比预训练 This paper presents the winning system for the zero-shot Spanish framing detection task, which also achieves competitive places in eight additional languages. The challenge of the framing detection task lies in identifying a set of 14 frames when only a few or zero samples are available, i.e., a multilingual multi-label few- or zero-shot setting. Our developed solution employs a pre-training procedure based on multilingual Transformers using a label-aware contrastive loss function. In addition to describing the system, we perform an embedding space analysis and ablation study to demonstrate how our pre-training procedure supports framing detection to advance computational framing analysis. 本文介绍了零样本西班牙语框架检测任务的获胜系统，该系统还在另外八种语言中取得了竞争地位。帧检测任务的挑战在于，当只有少数或零个样本可用时，即多语言多标签少样本或零样本设置时，识别一组 14 帧。我们开发的解决方案采用基于多语言 Transformer 的预训练程序，使用标签感知对比损失函数。除了描述系统之外，我们还进行了嵌入空间分析和消融研究，以演示我们的预训练程序如何支持帧检测以推进计算帧分析。 本文提出了一种基于多语言Transformer的标签感知对比预训练方法，用于解决多语言少样本和零样本框架检测任务。 Markus Reiter-Haas,Alexander Ertl,Kevin Innerebner,Elisabeth Lex cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Daniel J. Trosten,Sigurd Løkse,Robert Jenssen,Michael C. Kampffmeyer
title: On the Effects of Self-supervision and Contrastive Alignment in Deep Multi-view Clustering
title_zh: 深度多视图聚类中自监督和对比对齐的影响
abstract: Self-supervised learning is a central component in recent approaches to deep multi-view clustering (MVC). However, we find large variations in the development of self-supervision-based methods for deep MVC, potentially slowing the progress of the field. To address this, we present DeepMVC, a unified framework for deep MVC that includes many recent methods as instances. We leverage our framework to make key observations about the effect of self-supervision, and in particular, drawbacks of aligning representations with contrastive learning. Further, we prove that contrastive alignment can negatively influence cluster separability, and that this effect becomes worse when the number of views increases. Motivated by our findings, we develop several new DeepMVC instances with new forms of self-supervision. We conduct extensive experiments and find that (i) in line with our theoretical findings, contrastive alignments decreases performance on datasets with many views; (ii) all methods benefit from some form of self-supervision; and (iii) our new instances outperform previous methods on several datasets. Based on our results, we suggest several promising directions for future research. To enhance the openness of the field, we provide an open-source implementation of DeepMVC, including recent models and our new instances. Our implementation includes a consistent evaluation protocol, facilitating fair and accurate evaluation of methods and components.
summary: Self-supervised learning is a central component in recent approaches to deep multi-view clustering (MVC). However, we find large variations in the development of self-supervision-based methods for deep MVC, potentially slowing the progress of the field. To address this, we present DeepMVC, a unified framework for deep MVC that includes many recent methods as instances. We leverage our framework to make key observations about the effect of self-supervision, and in particular, drawbacks of aligning representations with contrastive learning. Further, we prove that contrastive alignment can negatively influence cluster separability, and that this effect becomes worse when the number of views increases. Motivated by our findings, we develop several new DeepMVC instances with new forms of self-supervision. We conduct extensive experiments and find that (i) in line with our theoretical findings, contrastive alignments decreases performance on datasets with many views; (ii) all methods benefit from some form of self-supervision; and (iii) our new instances outperform previous methods on several datasets. Based on our results, we suggest several promising directions for future research. To enhance the openness of the field, we provide an open-source implementation of DeepMVC, including recent models and our new instances. Our implementation includes a consistent evaluation protocol, facilitating fair and accurate evaluation of methods and components.
abstract_zh: 自监督学习是最新深度多视图聚类 (MVC) 方法的核心组成部分。然而，我们发现基于自我监督的深度 MVC 方法的开发存在很大差异，这可能会减缓该领域的进展。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 DeepMVC，这是一个深度 MVC 的统一框架，其中包括许多最新的方法作为实例。我们利用我们的框架对自我监督的效果进行关键观察，特别是将表征与对比学习相结合的缺点。此外，我们证明对比对齐会对聚类可分离性产生负面影响，并且当视图数量增加时，这种影响会变得更糟。受我们的发现的启发，我们开发了几个具有新形式自我监督的新 DeepMVC 实例。我们进行了广泛的实验，发现（i）与我们的理论发现一致，对比对齐会降低具有许多视图的数据集的性能； (ii) 所有方法都受益于某种形式的自我监督； (iii) 我们的新实例在多个数据集上优于以前的方法。根据我们的结果，我们提出了未来研究的几个有希望的方向。为了增强该领域的开放性，我们提供了 DeepMVC 的开源实现，包括最新的模型和我们的新实例。我们的实施包括一致的评估协议，促进对方法和组件的公平和准确的评估。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DeepMVC框架，研究自监督学习与对比对齐在深度多视图聚类中的影响，并设计新方法提升性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于自监督的深度多视图聚类方法发展不一致，对比对齐可能损害聚类可分性，需统一框架分析并改进。
AI.method: 构建DeepMVC统一框架，理论证明对比对齐的负面影响，设计新型自监督方法并进行广泛实验验证。
AI.result: 对比对齐在多视图数据中表现下降，所有方法均受益于自监督，新方法在多个数据集上优于现有技术。
AI.conclusion: 建议未来研究方向，开源实现促进公平评估，强调自监督与对齐策略优化的重要性。

authors_text: Xiaotao Hu,Zhewei Huang,Ailin Huang,Jun Xu,Shuchang Zhou
title: A Dynamic Multi-Scale Voxel Flow Network for Video Prediction
title_zh: 用于视频预测的动态多尺度体素流网络
abstract: The performance of video prediction has been greatly boosted by advanced deep neural networks. However, most of the current methods suffer from large model sizes and require extra inputs, e.g., semantic/depth maps, for promising performance. For efficiency consideration, in this paper, we propose a Dynamic Multi-scale Voxel Flow Network (DMVFN) to achieve better video prediction performance at lower computational costs with only RGB images, than previous methods. The core of our DMVFN is a differentiable routing module that can effectively perceive the motion scales of video frames. Once trained, our DMVFN selects adaptive sub-networks for different inputs at the inference stage. Experiments on several benchmarks demonstrate that our DMVFN is an order of magnitude faster than Deep Voxel Flow and surpasses the state-of-the-art iterative-based OPT on generated image quality. Our code and demo are available at https://huxiaotaostasy.github.io/DMVFN/.
summary: The performance of video prediction has been greatly boosted by advanced deep neural networks. However, most of the current methods suffer from large model sizes and require extra inputs, e.g., semantic/depth maps, for promising performance. For efficiency consideration, in this paper, we propose a Dynamic Multi-scale Voxel Flow Network (DMVFN) to achieve better video prediction performance at lower computational costs with only RGB images, than previous methods. The core of our DMVFN is a differentiable routing module that can effectively perceive the motion scales of video frames. Once trained, our DMVFN selects adaptive sub-networks for different inputs at the inference stage. Experiments on several benchmarks demonstrate that our DMVFN is an order of magnitude faster than Deep Voxel Flow and surpasses the state-of-the-art iterative-based OPT on generated image quality. Our code and demo are available at https://huxiaotaostasy.github.io/DMVFN/.
abstract_zh: 先进的深度神经网络极大地提高了视频预测的性能。然而，当前的大多数方法都存在模型尺寸较大的问题，并且需要额外的输入（例如语义/深度图）才能获得有希望的性能。出于效率考虑，在本文中，我们提出了动态多尺度体素流网络（DMVFN），与以前的方法相比，仅使用 RGB 图像以更低的计算成本实现更好的视频预测性能。我们的DMVFN的核心是可微分路由模块，可以有效感知视频帧的运动尺度。经过训练后，我们的 DMVFN 会在推理阶段为不同的输入选择自适应子网络。多个基准测试的实验表明，我们的 DMVFN 比 Deep Voxel Flow 快一个数量级，并且在生成的图像质量上超越了最先进的基于迭代的 OPT。我们的代码和演示可在 https://huxiaotaostasy.github.io/DMVFN/ 获取。

AI.tldr: 提出一种动态多尺度体素流网络（DMVFN），仅使用RGB图像进行高效视频预测
AI.motivation: 现有方法模型大且依赖额外输入，需更高效且仅依赖RGB图像的视频预测方法
AI.method: 设计可微分路由模块感知运动尺度，推理时选择自适应子网络
AI.result: 比Deep Voxel Flow快10倍，图像质量优于OPT
AI.conclusion: DMVFN在计算效率和预测质量上优于现有方法，适合实际应用

authors_text: Alexander Hepburn,Valero Laparra,Raúl Santos-Rodriguez,Jesús Malo
title: Image Statistics Predict the Sensitivity of Perceptual Quality Metrics
title_zh: 图像统计预测感知质量指标的敏感性
abstract: Previously, Barlow and Attneave hypothesised a link between biological vision and information maximisation. Following Shannon, information was defined using the probability of natural images. Several physiological and psychophysical phenomena have been derived from principles like info-max, efficient coding, or optimal denoising. However, it remains unclear how this link is expressed in mathematical terms from image probability. Classical derivations were subjected to strong assumptions on the probability models and on the behaviour of the sensors. Moreover, the direct evaluation of the hypothesis was limited by the inability of classical image models to deliver accurate estimates of the probability. Here, we directly evaluate image probabilities using a generative model for natural images, and analyse how probability-related factors can be combined to predict the sensitivity of state-of-the-art subjective image quality metrics, a proxy for human perception. We use information theory and regression analysis to find a simple model that when combining just two probability-related factors achieves 0.77 correlation with subjective metrics. This probability-based model is validated in two ways: through direct comparison with the opinion of real observers in a subjective quality experiment, and by reproducing basic trends of classical psychophysical facts such as the Contrast Sensitivity Function, the Weber-law, and contrast masking.
summary: Previously, Barlow and Attneave hypothesised a link between biological vision and information maximisation. Following Shannon, information was defined using the probability of natural images. Several physiological and psychophysical phenomena have been derived from principles like info-max, efficient coding, or optimal denoising. However, it remains unclear how this link is expressed in mathematical terms from image probability. Classical derivations were subjected to strong assumptions on the probability models and on the behaviour of the sensors. Moreover, the direct evaluation of the hypothesis was limited by the inability of classical image models to deliver accurate estimates of the probability. Here, we directly evaluate image probabilities using a generative model for natural images, and analyse how probability-related factors can be combined to predict the sensitivity of state-of-the-art subjective image quality metrics, a proxy for human perception. We use information theory and regression analysis to find a simple model that when combining just two probability-related factors achieves 0.77 correlation with subjective metrics. This probability-based model is validated in two ways: through direct comparison with the opinion of real observers in a subjective quality experiment, and by reproducing basic trends of classical psychophysical facts such as the Contrast Sensitivity Function, the Weber-law, and contrast masking.
abstract_zh: 此前，巴洛和阿特尼夫假设了生物视觉和信息最大化之间的联系。继香农之后，信息是使用自然图像的概率来定义的。一些生理和心理物理现象是从信息最大化、高效编码或最佳去噪等原理中衍生出来的。然而，目前尚不清楚这种联系如何用图像概率的数学术语来表达。经典推导受到对概率模型和传感器行为的强烈假设的影响。此外，由于经典图像模型无法提供准确的概率估计，对假设的直接评估受到限制。在这里，我们使用自然图像的生成模型直接评估图像概率，并分析如何组合概率相关因素来预测最先进的主观图像质量指标（人类感知的代理）的敏感性。我们使用信息论和回归分析来找到一个简单的模型，当仅组合两个概率相关因素时，与主观指标的相关性达到 0.77。这种基于概率的模型通过两种方式得到验证：通过在主观质量实验中直接与真实观察者的意见进行比较，以及通过再现经典心理物理学事实的基本趋势，例如对比敏感度函数、韦伯定律和对比掩蔽。

AI.tldr: 本论文利用图像统计量预测感知质量度量的敏感性，通过生成模型和信息理论建立数学模型。
AI.motivation: 传统模型因强假设和概率估计不准确难以验证生物视觉与信息最大化理论的关联，需新方法直接评估图像概率。
AI.method: 采用生成模型估计自然图像概率，结合信息论与回归分析，提取两个概率相关因素构建预测模型。
AI.result: 所建模型与主观质量指标达0.77相关性，通过主观实验及经典心理物理现象（如对比敏感度函数）验证有效性。
AI.conclusion: 图像统计量可有效预测感知质量度量敏感性，揭示了生物视觉机制与信息理论的数学联系，为质量评估提供新视角。

search_text: Image Statistics Predict the Sensitivity of Perceptual Quality Metrics 图像统计预测感知质量指标的敏感性 Previously, Barlow and Attneave hypothesised a link between biological vision and information maximisation. Following Shannon, information was defined using the probability of natural images. Several physiological and psychophysical phenomena have been derived from principles like info-max, efficient coding, or optimal denoising. However, it remains unclear how this link is expressed in mathematical terms from image probability. Classical derivations were subjected to strong assumptions on the probability models and on the behaviour of the sensors. Moreover, the direct evaluation of the hypothesis was limited by the inability of classical image models to deliver accurate estimates of the probability. Here, we directly evaluate image probabilities using a generative model for natural images, and analyse how probability-related factors can be combined to predict the sensitivity of state-of-the-art subjective image quality metrics, a proxy for human perception. We use information theory and regression analysis to find a simple model that when combining just two probability-related factors achieves 0.77 correlation with subjective metrics. This probability-based model is validated in two ways: through direct comparison with the opinion of real observers in a subjective quality experiment, and by reproducing basic trends of classical psychophysical facts such as the Contrast Sensitivity Function, the Weber-law, and contrast masking. 此前，巴洛和阿特尼夫假设了生物视觉和信息最大化之间的联系。继香农之后，信息是使用自然图像的概率来定义的。一些生理和心理物理现象是从信息最大化、高效编码或最佳去噪等原理中衍生出来的。然而，目前尚不清楚这种联系如何用图像概率的数学术语来表达。经典推导受到对概率模型和传感器行为的强烈假设的影响。此外，由于经典图像模型无法提供准确的概率估计，对假设的直接评估受到限制。在这里，我们使用自然图像的生成模型直接评估图像概率，并分析如何组合概率相关因素来预测最先进的主观图像质量指标（人类感知的代理）的敏感性。我们使用信息论和回归分析来找到一个简单的模型，当仅组合两个概率相关因素时，与主观指标的相关性达到 0.77。这种基于概率的模型通过两种方式得到验证：通过在主观质量实验中直接与真实观察者的意见进行比较，以及通过再现经典心理物理学事实的基本趋势，例如对比敏感度函数、韦伯定律和对比掩蔽。 本论文利用图像统计量预测感知质量度量的敏感性，通过生成模型和信息理论建立数学模型。 Alexander Hepburn,Valero Laparra,Raúl Santos-Rodriguez,Jesús Malo cs.CV,cs.LG,q-bio.NC

authors_text: Daniele Baieri,Stefano Esposito,Filippo Maggioli,Emanuele Rodolà
title: Fluid Dynamics Network: Topology-Agnostic 4D Reconstruction via Fluid Dynamics Priors
title_zh: 流体动力学网络：通过流体动力学先验进行拓扑无关的 4D 重建
abstract: Representing 3D surfaces as level sets of continuous functions over $\mathbb{R}^3$ is the common denominator of neural implicit representations, which recently enabled remarkable progress in geometric deep learning and computer vision tasks. In order to represent 3D motion within this framework, it is often assumed (either explicitly or implicitly) that the transformations which a surface may undergo are homeomorphic: this is not necessarily true, for instance, in the case of fluid dynamics. In order to represent more general classes of deformations, we propose to apply this theoretical framework as regularizers for the optimization of simple 4D implicit functions (such as signed distance fields). We show that our representation is capable of capturing both homeomorphic and topology-changing deformations, while also defining correspondences over the continuously-reconstructed surfaces.
summary: Representing 3D surfaces as level sets of continuous functions over $\mathbb{R}^3$ is the common denominator of neural implicit representations, which recently enabled remarkable progress in geometric deep learning and computer vision tasks. In order to represent 3D motion within this framework, it is often assumed (either explicitly or implicitly) that the transformations which a surface may undergo are homeomorphic: this is not necessarily true, for instance, in the case of fluid dynamics. In order to represent more general classes of deformations, we propose to apply this theoretical framework as regularizers for the optimization of simple 4D implicit functions (such as signed distance fields). We show that our representation is capable of capturing both homeomorphic and topology-changing deformations, while also defining correspondences over the continuously-reconstructed surfaces.
abstract_zh: 将 3D 表面表示为 $\mathbb{R}^3$ 上连续函数的水平集是神经隐式表示的共同点，最近在几何深度学习和计算机视觉任务中取得了显着进展。为了在这个框架内表示 3D 运动，通常假设（显式或隐式地）表面可能经历的变换是同胚的：例如，在流体动力学的情况下，这不一定是正确的。为了表示更一般的变形类别，我们建议应用这个理论框架作为正则化器来优化简单的 4D 隐式函数（例如带符号的距离场）。我们表明，我们的表示能够捕获同胚和拓扑变化的变形，同时还定义连续重建表面上的对应关系。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于流体动力学先验的4D重建方法，能够处理拓扑结构变化的变形。
AI.motivation: 传统神经隐式表示假设表面变形是同胚的，无法处理流体动力学中的拓扑变化问题。
AI.method: 将流体动力学先验作为正则化项，优化简单的4D隐式函数（如符号距离场）进行重建。
AI.result: 方法能够捕捉同胚和拓扑变化变形，并在连续重建的表面间建立对应关系。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为处理复杂动态场景提供了有效的4D重建解决方案。

authors_text: Devavrat Tomar,Guillaume Vray,Behzad Bozorgtabar,Jean-Philippe Thiran
title: TeSLA: Test-Time Self-Learning With Automatic Adversarial Augmentation
title_zh: TeSLA：具有自动对抗性增强的测试时自学习
abstract: Most recent test-time adaptation methods focus on only classification tasks, use specialized network architectures, destroy model calibration or rely on lightweight information from the source domain. To tackle these issues, this paper proposes a novel Test-time Self-Learning method with automatic Adversarial augmentation dubbed TeSLA for adapting a pre-trained source model to the unlabeled streaming test data. In contrast to conventional self-learning methods based on cross-entropy, we introduce a new test-time loss function through an implicitly tight connection with the mutual information and online knowledge distillation. Furthermore, we propose a learnable efficient adversarial augmentation module that further enhances online knowledge distillation by simulating high entropy augmented images. Our method achieves state-of-the-art classification and segmentation results on several benchmarks and types of domain shifts, particularly on challenging measurement shifts of medical images. TeSLA also benefits from several desirable properties compared to competing methods in terms of calibration, uncertainty metrics, insensitivity to model architectures, and source training strategies, all supported by extensive ablations. Our code and models are available on GitHub.
summary: Most recent test-time adaptation methods focus on only classification tasks, use specialized network architectures, destroy model calibration or rely on lightweight information from the source domain. To tackle these issues, this paper proposes a novel Test-time Self-Learning method with automatic Adversarial augmentation dubbed TeSLA for adapting a pre-trained source model to the unlabeled streaming test data. In contrast to conventional self-learning methods based on cross-entropy, we introduce a new test-time loss function through an implicitly tight connection with the mutual information and online knowledge distillation. Furthermore, we propose a learnable efficient adversarial augmentation module that further enhances online knowledge distillation by simulating high entropy augmented images. Our method achieves state-of-the-art classification and segmentation results on several benchmarks and types of domain shifts, particularly on challenging measurement shifts of medical images. TeSLA also benefits from several desirable properties compared to competing methods in terms of calibration, uncertainty metrics, insensitivity to model architectures, and source training strategies, all supported by extensive ablations. Our code and models are available on GitHub.
abstract_zh: 最近的测试时适应方法仅关注分类任务，使用专门的网络架构，破坏模型校准或依赖来自源域的轻量级信息。为了解决这些问题，本文提出了一种新颖的测试时自学习方法，具有自动对抗增强功能，称为 TeSLA，用于使预训练的源模型适应未标记的流测试数据。与基于交叉熵的传统自学习方法相比，我们通过与互信息和在线知识蒸馏的隐式紧密连接引入了新的测试时间损失函数。此外，我们提出了一种可学习的高效对抗增强模块，通过模拟高熵增强图像进一步增强在线知识蒸馏。我们的方法在多个基准和域移位类型上实现了最先进的分类和分割结果，特别是在医学图像的挑战性测量移位上。与竞争方法相比，TeSLA 在校准、不确定性度量、对模型架构不敏感以及源训练策略方面还受益于几个理想的特性，所有这些都得到了广泛消融的支持。我们的代码和模型可在 GitHub 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TeSLA方法，通过测试时自学习与自动对抗增强，解决预训练模型适应未标记流式测试数据的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有测试时适配方法局限于分类任务、依赖专用网络结构、破坏模型校准或仅使用源域轻量信息，存在显著局限性。
AI.method: 设计新型测试时损失函数，结合互信息与在线知识蒸馏；引入可学习的高效对抗增强模块，生成高熵图像以提升知识蒸馏效果。
AI.result: 在多个基准和领域转移场景中取得分类与分割SOTA结果，尤其在医疗图像测量转移任务中表现突出。
AI.conclusion: TeSLA在模型校准、不确定性度量、架构鲁棒性等方面优于竞品方法，且代码模型已开源。

Our method achieves state-of-the-art classification and segmentation results on several benchmarks and types of domain shifts, particularly on challenging measurement shifts of medical images. TeSLA also benefits from several desirable properties compared to competing methods in terms of calibration, uncertainty metrics, insensitivity to model architectures, and source training strategies, all supported by extensive ablations. Our code and models are available on GitHub. 最近的测试时适应方法仅关注分类任务，使用专门的网络架构，破坏模型校准或依赖来自源域的轻量级信息。为了解决这些问题，本文提出了一种新颖的测试时自学习方法，具有自动对抗增强功能，称为 TeSLA，用于使预训练的源模型适应未标记的流测试数据。与基于交叉熵的传统自学习方法相比，我们通过与互信息和在线知识蒸馏的隐式紧密连接引入了新的测试时间损失函数。此外，我们提出了一种可学习的高效对抗增强模块，通过模拟高熵增强图像进一步增强在线知识蒸馏。我们的方法在多个基准和域移位类型上实现了最先进的分类和分割结果，特别是在医学图像的挑战性测量移位上。与竞争方法相比，TeSLA 在校准、不确定性度量、对模型架构不敏感以及源训练策略方面还受益于几个理想的特性，所有这些都得到了广泛消融的支持。我们的代码和模型可在 GitHub 上获取。 本文提出TeSLA方法，通过测试时自学习与自动对抗增强，解决预训练模型适应未标记流式测试数据的问题。 Devavrat Tomar,Guillaume Vray,Behzad Bozorgtabar,Jean-Philippe Thiran cs.CV

authors_text: Peng Jin,Hao Li,Zesen Cheng,Kehan Li,Xiangyang Ji,Chang Liu,Li Yuan,Jie Chen
title: DiffusionRet: Generative Text-Video Retrieval with Diffusion Model
title_zh: DiffusionRet：使用扩散模型生成文本视频检索
abstract: Existing text-video retrieval solutions are, in essence, discriminant models focused on maximizing the conditional likelihood, i.e., p(candidates|query). While straightforward, this de facto paradigm overlooks the underlying data distribution p(query), which makes it challenging to identify out-of-distribution data. To address this limitation, we creatively tackle this task from a generative viewpoint and model the correlation between the text and the video as their joint probability p(candidates,query). This is accomplished through a diffusion-based text-video retrieval framework (DiffusionRet), which models the retrieval task as a process of gradually generating joint distribution from noise. During training, DiffusionRet is optimized from both the generation and discrimination perspectives, with the generator being optimized by generation loss and the feature extractor trained with contrastive loss. In this way, DiffusionRet cleverly leverages the strengths of both generative and discriminative methods. Extensive experiments on five commonly used text-video retrieval benchmarks, including MSRVTT, LSMDC, MSVD, ActivityNet Captions, and DiDeMo, with superior performances, justify the efficacy of our method. More encouragingly, without any modification, DiffusionRet even performs well in out-domain retrieval settings. We believe this work brings fundamental insights into the related fields. Code is available at https://github.com/jpthu17/DiffusionRet.
summary: Existing text-video retrieval solutions are, in essence, discriminant models focused on maximizing the conditional likelihood, i.e., p(candidates|query). While straightforward, this de facto paradigm overlooks the underlying data distribution p(query), which makes it challenging to identify out-of-distribution data. To address this limitation, we creatively tackle this task from a generative viewpoint and model the correlation between the text and the video as their joint probability p(candidates,query). This is accomplished through a diffusion-based text-video retrieval framework (DiffusionRet), which models the retrieval task as a process of gradually generating joint distribution from noise. During training, DiffusionRet is optimized from both the generation and discrimination perspectives, with the generator being optimized by generation loss and the feature extractor trained with contrastive loss. In this way, DiffusionRet cleverly leverages the strengths of both generative and discriminative methods. Extensive experiments on five commonly used text-video retrieval benchmarks, including MSRVTT, LSMDC, MSVD, ActivityNet Captions, and DiDeMo, with superior performances, justify the efficacy of our method. More encouragingly, without any modification, DiffusionRet even performs well in out-domain retrieval settings. We believe this work brings fundamental insights into the related fields. Code is available at https://github.com/jpthu17/DiffusionRet.
abstract_zh: 现有的文本视频检索解决方案本质上是专注于最大化条件似然的判别模型，即 p(candidates|query)。虽然很简单，但这种事实上的范式忽略了底层数据分布 p(query)，这使得识别分布外数据变得困难。为了解决这个限制，我们创造性地从生成的角度来解决这个任务，并将文本和视频之间的相关性建模为它们的联合概率 p(candidates,query)。这是通过基于扩散的文本视频检索框架（DiffusionRet）来完成的，该框架将检索任务建模为从噪声中逐渐生成联合分布的过程。在训练过程中，DiffusionRet从生成和判别两个角度进行优化，生成器通过生成损失进行优化，特征提取器通过对比损失进行训练。通过这种方式，DiffusionRet 巧妙地利用了生成方法和判别方法的优点。对五个常用文本视频检索基准（包括 MSRVTT、LSMDC、MSVD、ActivityNet Captions 和 DiDeMo）进行的广泛实验，具有卓越的性能，证明了我们方法的有效性。更令人鼓舞的是，无需任何修改，DiffusionRet 甚至在域外检索设置中也表现良好。我们相信这项工作为相关领域带来了基本的见解。代码可在 https://github.com/jpthu17/DiffusionRet 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于扩散模型的生成式文本-视频检索框架DiffusionRet，通过联合建模文本与视频的联合概率分布来提升检索效果。
AI.motivation: 现有文本-视频检索方法仅关注条件似然p(candidates|query)，忽视了查询分布p(query)，导致难以处理分布外数据。本文从生成视角出发，通过联合概率建模解决这一问题。
AI.method: 构建扩散模型框架DiffusionRet，通过逐步生成联合分布实现检索任务。训练时同时优化生成损失（生成器）和对比损失（特征提取器），结合生成与判别方法的优势。
AI.result: 在MSRVTT等五个基准数据集上取得优越性能，且无需修改即可有效处理分布外检索任务。
AI.conclusion: 本文通过联合概率建模为文本-视频检索领域提供了基础性见解，展示了生成与判别方法结合的有效性。

authors_text: Zhanchi Wang,Nikolaos M. Freris,Xi Wei
title: SpiRobs: Logarithmic Spiral-shaped Robots for Versatile Grasping Across Scales
title_zh: SpiRobs：用于跨尺度多功能抓取的对数螺旋形机器人
abstract: Realizing a soft manipulator with biologically comparable flexibility and versatility often requires careful selection of materials and actuation, as well as attentive design of its structure, perception, and control. Here, we report a new class of soft robots (SpiRobs) that morphologically replicates the logarithmic spiral pattern observed in natural appendages (e.g., octopus arms, elephant trunks, etc.). This allows for a common design principle across different scales and a speedy and inexpensive fabrication process. We further present a grasping strategy inspired by the octopus that can automatically adapt to a target object's size and shape. We illustrate the dexterity of SpiRobs and the ability to tightly grasp objects that vary in size by more than two orders of magnitude and up to 260 times self-weight. We demonstrate scalability via three additional variants: a miniaturized gripper (mm), a one-meter-long manipulator, and an array of SpiRobs that can tangle up various objects.
summary: Realizing a soft manipulator with biologically comparable flexibility and versatility often requires careful selection of materials and actuation, as well as attentive design of its structure, perception, and control. Here, we report a new class of soft robots (SpiRobs) that morphologically replicates the logarithmic spiral pattern observed in natural appendages (e.g., octopus arms, elephant trunks, etc.). This allows for a common design principle across different scales and a speedy and inexpensive fabrication process. We further present a grasping strategy inspired by the octopus that can automatically adapt to a target object's size and shape. We illustrate the dexterity of SpiRobs and the ability to tightly grasp objects that vary in size by more than two orders of magnitude and up to 260 times self-weight. We demonstrate scalability via three additional variants: a miniaturized gripper (mm), a one-meter-long manipulator, and an array of SpiRobs that can tangle up various objects.
abstract_zh: 实现具有生物可比灵活性和多功能性的软机械臂通常需要仔细选择材料和驱动，以及对其结构、感知和控制进行精心设计。在这里，我们报告了一类新型软机器人（SpiRobs），它在形态上复制了在自然附肢（例如章鱼手臂、象鼻等）中观察到的对数螺旋图案。这允许跨不同规模的通用设计原则以及快速且廉价的制造过程。我们进一步提出了一种受章鱼启发的抓取策略，可以自动适应目标物体的大小和形状。我们展示了 SpiRob 的灵巧性以及紧紧抓住尺寸变化超过两个数量级和高达自重 260 倍的物体的能力。我们通过三个附加变体展示了可扩展性：微型夹具（毫米）、一米长的操纵器和一系列可以缠结各种物体的 SpiRob。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SpiRobs的软体机器人，其形态模仿自然附肢的对数螺旋结构，实现跨尺度的灵活抓取。
AI.motivation: 传统软体机械手在材料、驱动和结构设计上难以兼顾生物体的灵活性与多尺度适应性，需寻找通用设计原则以提升抓取性能。
AI.method: 基于对数螺旋结构设计软体机器人，结合章鱼抓取策略实现自适应抓取，并通过微型化、长臂和阵列化方案验证跨尺度适应性。
AI.result: SpiRobs可抓取尺寸差异达两个数量级（最大260倍自重）的物体，成功展示毫米级微型夹爪、1米长机械臂及多机器人协同抓取能力。
AI.conclusion: 对数螺旋结构为软体机器人提供了可扩展的设计范式，其仿生抓取策略有效解决了多尺度物体抓取的灵活性与适应性问题。

authors_text: Alexander Kobelski,Pavel Osinenko,Stefan Streif
title: Experimental verification of an online traction parameter identification method
title_zh: 牵引力参数在线辨识方法的实验验证
abstract: Traction parameters, that characterize the ground-wheel contact dynamics, are the central factor in the energy efficiency of vehicles. To optimize fuel consumption, reduce wear of tires, increase productivity etc., knowledge of current traction parameters is unavoidable. Unfortunately, these parameters are difficult to measure and require expensive force and torque sensors. An alternative way is to use system identification to determine them. In this work, we validate such a method in field experiments with a mobile robot. The method is based on an adaptive Kalman filter. We show how it estimates the traction parameters online, during the motion on the field, and compare them to their values determined via a 6-directional force-torque sensor installed for verification. Data of adhesion slip ratio curves is recorded and compared to curves from literature for additional validation of the method. The results can establish a foundation for a number of optimal traction methods.
summary: Traction parameters, that characterize the ground-wheel contact dynamics, are the central factor in the energy efficiency of vehicles. To optimize fuel consumption, reduce wear of tires, increase productivity etc., knowledge of current traction parameters is unavoidable. Unfortunately, these parameters are difficult to measure and require expensive force and torque sensors. An alternative way is to use system identification to determine them. In this work, we validate such a method in field experiments with a mobile robot. The method is based on an adaptive Kalman filter. We show how it estimates the traction parameters online, during the motion on the field, and compare them to their values determined via a 6-directional force-torque sensor installed for verification. Data of adhesion slip ratio curves is recorded and compared to curves from literature for additional validation of the method. The results can establish a foundation for a number of optimal traction methods.
abstract_zh: 表征地轮接触动力学特征的牵引参数是车辆能源效率的核心因素。为了优化燃油消耗、减少轮胎磨损、提高生产率等，了解当前牵引参数是不可避免的。不幸的是，这些参数很难测量并且需要昂贵的力和扭矩传感器。另一种方法是使用系统识别来确定它们。在这项工作中，我们在移动机器人的现场实验中验证了这种方法。该方法基于自适应卡尔曼滤波器。我们展示了它如何在场上运动期间在线估计牵引力参数，并将它们与通过安装的 6 向力扭矩传感器确定的值进行比较以进行验证。记录粘附滑移率曲线的数据并与文献中的曲线进行比较，以进一步验证该方法。结果可以为许多最佳牵引方法奠定基础。

AI.tldr: 本文提出并验证了一种在线牵引参数识别方法，用于实时估计车辆地面-轮子接触动态特性。
AI.motivation: 牵引参数对车辆能量效率至关重要，但传统测量方法依赖昂贵传感器且难以直接获取，需开发低成本替代方案以优化燃油消耗和轮胎磨损。
AI.method: 基于自适应卡尔曼滤波器的系统识别方法，在移动机器人实地实验中实时估计牵引参数，并通过六向力扭矩传感器数据及文献中的附着滑移率曲线进行验证。
AI.result: 方法成功实现了运动过程中牵引参数的在线估计，结果与传感器测量值及理论曲线一致，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为开发最优牵引控制策略提供了可靠基础，具有降低传感器依赖性和提升车辆效率的潜力。

authors_text: Xingxing Wei,Bangzheng Pu,Shiji Zhao,Chen Chi,Huazhu Fu
title: Preventing Unauthorized AI Over-Analysis by Medical Image Adversarial Watermarking
title_zh: 通过医学图像对抗性水印防止未经授权的人工智能过度分析
abstract: The advancement of deep learning has facilitated the integration of Artificial Intelligence (AI) into clinical practices, particularly in computer-aided diagnosis. Given the pivotal role of medical images in various diagnostic procedures, it becomes imperative to ensure the responsible and secure utilization of AI techniques. However, the unauthorized utilization of AI for image analysis raises significant concerns regarding patient privacy and potential infringement on the proprietary rights of data custodians. Consequently, the development of pragmatic and cost-effective strategies that safeguard patient privacy and uphold medical image copyrights emerges as a critical necessity. In direct response to this pressing demand, we present a pioneering solution named Medical Image Adversarial watermarking (MIAD-MARK). Our approach introduces watermarks that strategically mislead unauthorized AI diagnostic models, inducing erroneous predictions without compromising the integrity of the visual content. Importantly, our method integrates an authorization protocol tailored for legitimate users, enabling the removal of the MIAD-MARK through encryption-generated keys. Through extensive experiments, we validate the efficacy of MIAD-MARK across three prominent medical image datasets. The empirical outcomes demonstrate the substantial impact of our approach, notably reducing the accuracy of standard AI diagnostic models to a mere 8.57% under white box conditions and 45.83% in the more challenging black box scenario. Additionally, our solution effectively mitigates unauthorized exploitation of medical images even in the presence of sophisticated watermark removal networks. Notably, those AI diagnosis networks exhibit a meager average accuracy of 38.59% when applied to images protected by MIAD-MARK, underscoring the robustness of our safeguarding mechanism.
summary: The advancement of deep learning has facilitated the integration of Artificial Intelligence (AI) into clinical practices, particularly in computer-aided diagnosis. Given the pivotal role of medical images in various diagnostic procedures, it becomes imperative to ensure the responsible and secure utilization of AI techniques. However, the unauthorized utilization of AI for image analysis raises significant concerns regarding patient privacy and potential infringement on the proprietary rights of data custodians. Consequently, the development of pragmatic and cost-effective strategies that safeguard patient privacy and uphold medical image copyrights emerges as a critical necessity. In direct response to this pressing demand, we present a pioneering solution named Medical Image Adversarial watermarking (MIAD-MARK). Our approach introduces watermarks that strategically mislead unauthorized AI diagnostic models, inducing erroneous predictions without compromising the integrity of the visual content. Importantly, our method integrates an authorization protocol tailored for legitimate users, enabling the removal of the MIAD-MARK through encryption-generated keys. Through extensive experiments, we validate the efficacy of MIAD-MARK across three prominent medical image datasets. The empirical outcomes demonstrate the substantial impact of our approach, notably reducing the accuracy of standard AI diagnostic models to a mere 8.57% under white box conditions and 45.83% in the more challenging black box scenario. Additionally, our solution effectively mitigates unauthorized exploitation of medical images even in the presence of sophisticated watermark removal networks. Notably, those AI diagnosis networks exhibit a meager average accuracy of 38.59% when applied to images protected by MIAD-MARK, underscoring the robustness of our safeguarding mechanism.
abstract_zh: 深度学习的进步促进了人工智能（AI）融入临床实践，特别是计算机辅助诊断。鉴于医学图像在各种诊断程序中的关键作用，确保负责任且安全地利用人工智能技术变得势在必行。然而，未经授权使用人工智能进行图像分析引起了对患者隐私和对数据保管人专有权利的潜在侵犯的严重担忧。因此，制定务实且具有成本效益的策略来保护患者隐私和维护医学图像版权就显得至关重要。为了直接响应这一紧迫需求，我们提出了一种名为医学图像对抗水印（MIAD-MARK）的开创性解决方案。我们的方法引入了水印，可以战略性地误导未经授权的人工智能诊断模型，在不损害视觉内容完整性的情况下引发错误的预测。重要的是，我们的方法集成了为合法用户量身定制的授权协议，可以通过加密生成的密钥来删除 MIAD-MARK。通过广泛的实验，我们在三个著名的医学图像数据集上验证了 MIAD-MARK 的功效。实证结果证明了我们的方法的重大影响，特别是在白盒条件下将标准人工智能诊断模型的准确性降低至仅 8.57%，在更具挑战性的黑盒场景中降低至 45.83%。此外，即使存在复杂的水印去除网络，我们的解决方案也能有效地减少对医学图像的未经授权的利用。值得注意的是，这些人工智能诊断网络在应用于受 MIAD-MARK 保护的图像时，平均准确率仅为 38.59%，这凸显了我们保护机制的稳健性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为MIAD-MARK的医疗图像对抗水印技术，通过添加特殊水印阻止未经授权的AI对医疗图像进行过度分析，同时允许授权用户通过加密密钥移除水印。
AI.motivation: 深度学习在医疗诊断中的应用引发患者隐私泄露和数据版权被侵犯的风险，亟需一种既能保护隐私又不干扰合法使用的AI安全方案。
AI.method: 设计具有误导性的对抗水印，使未经授权的AI模型产生错误诊断结果；结合加密授权协议，允许合法用户通过密钥移除水印，且水印在复杂去除网络下仍保持有效性。
AI.result: 实验显示，MIAD-MARK在白盒场景下使标准AI模型准确率降至8.57%，黑盒场景下降至45.83%；即使面对先进去除网络，受保护图像的AI诊断准确率仍仅为38.59%。
AI.conclusion: MIAD-MARK有效防止医疗图像被非法AI分析，在保障数据安全的同时兼顾合法使用需求，为医疗AI安全提供了一种实用且高效的解决方案。

authors_text: Jungin Park,Jiyoung Lee,Kwanghoon Sohn
title: Dual-path Adaptation from Image to Video Transformers
title_zh: 从图像到视频转换器的双路径适应
comment: CVPR 2023. Code is available at https://github.com/park-jungin/DualPath
comments: CVPR 2023. Code is available at https://github.com/park-jungin/DualPath
abstract: In this paper, we efficiently transfer the surpassing representation power of the vision foundation models, such as ViT and Swin, for video understanding with only a few trainable parameters. Previous adaptation methods have simultaneously considered spatial and temporal modeling with a unified learnable module but still suffered from fully leveraging the representative capabilities of image transformers. We argue that the popular dual-path (two-stream) architecture in video models can mitigate this problem. We propose a novel DualPath adaptation separated into spatial and temporal adaptation paths, where a lightweight bottleneck adapter is employed in each transformer block. Especially for temporal dynamic modeling, we incorporate consecutive frames into a grid-like frameset to precisely imitate vision transformers' capability that extrapolates relationships between tokens. In addition, we extensively investigate the multiple baselines from a unified perspective in video understanding and compare them with DualPath. Experimental results on four action recognition benchmarks prove that pretrained image transformers with DualPath can be effectively generalized beyond the data domain.
summary: In this paper, we efficiently transfer the surpassing representation power of the vision foundation models, such as ViT and Swin, for video understanding with only a few trainable parameters. Previous adaptation methods have simultaneously considered spatial and temporal modeling with a unified learnable module but still suffered from fully leveraging the representative capabilities of image transformers. We argue that the popular dual-path (two-stream) architecture in video models can mitigate this problem. We propose a novel DualPath adaptation separated into spatial and temporal adaptation paths, where a lightweight bottleneck adapter is employed in each transformer block. Especially for temporal dynamic modeling, we incorporate consecutive frames into a grid-like frameset to precisely imitate vision transformers' capability that extrapolates relationships between tokens. In addition, we extensively investigate the multiple baselines from a unified perspective in video understanding and compare them with DualPath. Experimental results on four action recognition benchmarks prove that pretrained image transformers with DualPath can be effectively generalized beyond the data domain.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们仅用很少的可训练参数，就可以有效地将 ViT 和 Swin 等视觉基础模型的卓越表示能力转移到视频理解上。以前的适应方法同时考虑了具有统一可学习模块的空间和时间建模，但仍然无法充分利用图像变换器的代表性能力。我们认为视频模型中流行的双路径（双流）架构可以缓解这个问题。我们提出了一种新颖的双路径适应，分为空间和时间适应路径，其中每个变压器块中采用轻量级瓶颈适配器。特别是对于时间动态建模，我们将连续帧合并到类似网格的框架集中，以精确模仿视觉变换器推断标记之间关系的能力。此外，我们从视频理解的统一角度广泛研究了多个基线，并将它们与 DualPath 进行比较。四个动作识别基准的实验结果证明，使用 DualPath 进行预训练的图像转换器可以有效地推广到数据域之外。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种双路径自适应方法，将图像Transformer模型高效迁移到视频理解任务中，仅需少量可训练参数。
AI.motivation: 现有视频模型同时处理时空建模时未能充分挖掘图像Transformer的表征能力，而双路径架构可缓解这一问题。
AI.method: 设计分离的空间与时间自适应路径，每个Transformer块中使用轻量瓶颈适配器，并通过网格化连续帧模拟图像Transformer的token关系建模能力。
AI.result: 在四个动作识别基准测试中，使用DualPath的预训练图像Transformer模型在跨领域泛化能力上表现优异。
AI.conclusion: DualPath架构有效实现了图像Transformer到视频任务的参数高效迁移，验证了其在时空建模中的优越性。

search_text: Dual-path Adaptation from Image to Video Transformers 从图像到视频转换器的双路径适应 In this paper, we efficiently transfer the surpassing representation power of the vision foundation models, such as ViT and Swin, for video understanding with only a few trainable parameters. Previous adaptation methods have simultaneously considered spatial and temporal modeling with a unified learnable module but still suffered from fully leveraging the representative capabilities of image transformers. We argue that the popular dual-path (two-stream) architecture in video models can mitigate this problem. We propose a novel DualPath adaptation separated into spatial and temporal adaptation paths, where a lightweight bottleneck adapter is employed in each transformer block. Especially for temporal dynamic modeling, we incorporate consecutive frames into a grid-like frameset to precisely imitate vision transformers' capability that extrapolates relationships between tokens. In addition, we extensively investigate the multiple baselines from a unified perspective in video understanding and compare them with DualPath. Experimental results on four action recognition benchmarks prove that pretrained image transformers with DualPath can be effectively generalized beyond the data domain. 在本文中，我们仅用很少的可训练参数，就可以有效地将 ViT 和 Swin 等视觉基础模型的卓越表示能力转移到视频理解上。以前的适应方法同时考虑了具有统一可学习模块的空间和时间建模，但仍然无法充分利用图像变换器的代表性能力。我们认为视频模型中流行的双路径（双流）架构可以缓解这个问题。我们提出了一种新颖的双路径适应，分为空间和时间适应路径，其中每个变压器块中采用轻量级瓶颈适配器。特别是对于时间动态建模，我们将连续帧合并到类似网格的框架集中，以精确模仿视觉变换器推断标记之间关系的能力。此外，我们从视频理解的统一角度广泛研究了多个基线，并将它们与 DualPath 进行比较。四个动作识别基准的实验结果证明，使用 DualPath 进行预训练的图像转换器可以有效地推广到数据域之外。 本文提出一种双路径自适应方法，将图像Transformer模型高效迁移到视频理解任务中，仅需少量可训练参数。 Jungin Park,Jiyoung Lee,Kwanghoon Sohn cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Jianyang Gao,Cheng Long
title: High-Dimensional Approximate Nearest Neighbor Search: with Reliable and Efficient Distance Comparison Operations
title_zh: 高维近似最近邻搜索：具有可靠且高效的距离比较操作
comment: This paper has been accepted by SIGMOD 2023
comments: This paper has been accepted by SIGMOD 2023
abstract: Approximate K nearest neighbor (AKNN) search is a fundamental and challenging problem. We observe that in high-dimensional space, the time consumption of nearly all AKNN algorithms is dominated by that of the distance comparison operations (DCOs). For each operation, it scans full dimensions of an object and thus, runs in linear time wrt the dimensionality. To speed it up, we propose a randomized algorithm named ADSampling which runs in logarithmic time wrt to the dimensionality for the majority of DCOs and succeeds with high probability. In addition, based on ADSampling we develop one general and two algorithm-specific techniques as plugins to enhance existing AKNN algorithms. Both theoretical and empirical studies confirm that: (1) our techniques introduce nearly no accuracy loss and (2) they consistently improve the efficiency.
summary: Approximate K nearest neighbor (AKNN) search is a fundamental and challenging problem. We observe that in high-dimensional space, the time consumption of nearly all AKNN algorithms is dominated by that of the distance comparison operations (DCOs). For each operation, it scans full dimensions of an object and thus, runs in linear time wrt the dimensionality. To speed it up, we propose a randomized algorithm named ADSampling which runs in logarithmic time wrt to the dimensionality for the majority of DCOs and succeeds with high probability. In addition, based on ADSampling we develop one general and two algorithm-specific techniques as plugins to enhance existing AKNN algorithms. Both theoretical and empirical studies confirm that: (1) our techniques introduce nearly no accuracy loss and (2) they consistently improve the efficiency.
abstract_zh: 近似 K 最近邻（AKNN）搜索是一个基本且具有挑战性的问题。我们观察到，在高维空间中，几乎所有 AKNN 算法的时间消耗主要由距离比较操作（DCO）的时间消耗决定。对于每个操作，它都会扫描对象的完整维度，因此在维度上以线性时间运行。为了加快速度，我们提出了一种名为 ADSampling 的随机算法，该算法在大多数 DCO 的维度上以对数时间运行，并且成功的概率很高。此外，基于 ADSampling，我们开发了一种通用技术和两种特定于算法的技术作为插件，以增强现有的 AKNN 算法。理论和实证研究都证实：（1）我们的技术几乎不会造成准确性损失；（2）它们持续提高效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种高维近似最近邻搜索方法，通过优化距离比较操作提升算法效率。
AI.motivation: 高维空间中现有AKNN算法的距离比较操作耗时过高，导致整体效率低下，亟需更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计随机化算法ADSampling，将多数距离比较操作时间复杂度降至对数级别，并开发通用及算法特定技术作为插件增强现有方法。
AI.result: 理论与实验验证表明，新技术几乎无精度损失且显著提升计算效率。
AI.conclusion: ADSampling及相关技术为高维近似最近邻搜索提供了可靠且高效的解决方案。

authors_text: Zhengbo Wang,Jian Liang,Zilei Wang,Tieniu Tan
title: Exploiting Semantic Attributes for Transductive Zero-Shot Learning
title_zh: 利用语义属性进行传导零样本学习
abstract: Zero-shot learning (ZSL) aims to recognize unseen classes by generalizing the relation between visual features and semantic attributes learned from the seen classes. A recent paradigm called transductive zero-shot learning further leverages unlabeled unseen data during training and has obtained impressive results. These methods always synthesize unseen features from attributes through a generative adversarial network to mitigate the bias towards seen classes. However, they neglect the semantic information in the unlabeled unseen data and thus fail to generate high-fidelity attribute-consistent unseen features. To address this issue, we present a novel transductive ZSL method that produces semantic attributes of the unseen data and imposes them on the generative process. In particular, we first train an attribute decoder that learns the mapping from visual features to semantic attributes. Then, from the attribute decoder, we obtain pseudo-attributes of unlabeled data and integrate them into the generative model, which helps capture the detailed differences within unseen classes so as to synthesize more discriminative features. Experiments on five standard benchmarks show that our method yields state-of-the-art results for zero-shot learning.
summary: Zero-shot learning (ZSL) aims to recognize unseen classes by generalizing the relation between visual features and semantic attributes learned from the seen classes. A recent paradigm called transductive zero-shot learning further leverages unlabeled unseen data during training and has obtained impressive results. These methods always synthesize unseen features from attributes through a generative adversarial network to mitigate the bias towards seen classes. However, they neglect the semantic information in the unlabeled unseen data and thus fail to generate high-fidelity attribute-consistent unseen features. To address this issue, we present a novel transductive ZSL method that produces semantic attributes of the unseen data and imposes them on the generative process. In particular, we first train an attribute decoder that learns the mapping from visual features to semantic attributes. Then, from the attribute decoder, we obtain pseudo-attributes of unlabeled data and integrate them into the generative model, which helps capture the detailed differences within unseen classes so as to synthesize more discriminative features. Experiments on five standard benchmarks show that our method yields state-of-the-art results for zero-shot learning.
abstract_zh: 零样本学习（ZSL）旨在通过概括从已见类别中学习到的视觉特征和语义属性之间的关系来识别未见类别。最近一种称为转导式零样本学习的范式进一步利用了训练过程中未标记的未见数据，并取得了令人印象深刻的结果。这些方法总是通过生成对抗网络从属性中合成未见的特征，以减轻对已见类别的偏见。然而，他们忽略了未标记的未见数据中的语义信息，因此无法生成高保真属性一致的未见特征。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的转导 ZSL 方法，该方法可以生成未见数据的语义属性并将其强加到生成过程中。特别是，我们首先训练一个属性解码器，该解码器学习从视觉特征到语义属性的映射。然后，从属性解码器中，我们获得未标记数据的伪属性并将其集成到生成模型中，这有助于捕获未见过的类中的详细差异，从而合成更具区分性的特征。对五个标准基准的实验表明，我们的方法为零样本学习提供了最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种利用语义属性的归纳零样本学习方法，通过结合未标记的不可见数据提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在生成不可见类特征时忽视了未标记数据中的语义信息，导致生成的特征不够准确且与属性不一致。
AI.method: 训练一个属性解码器将视觉特征映射到语义属性，利用该解码器获取未标记数据的伪属性，并将其整合到生成模型中以增强特征判别性。
AI.result: 在五个标准基准数据集上取得零样本学习的最先进结果。
AI.conclusion: 通过挖掘未标记数据的语义属性并约束生成过程，可显著提升零样本学习中不可见类特征的生成质量与分类性能。
