In particular, we first train an attribute decoder that learns the mapping from visual features to semantic attributes. Then, from the attribute decoder, we obtain pseudo-attributes of unlabeled data and integrate them into the generative model, which helps capture the detailed differences within unseen classes so as to synthesize more discriminative features. Experiments on five standard benchmarks show that our method yields state-of-the-art results for zero-shot learning. 零样本学习（ZSL）旨在通过概括从已见类别中学习到的视觉特征和语义属性之间的关系来识别未见类别。最近一种称为转导式零样本学习的范式进一步利用了训练过程中未标记的未见数据，并取得了令人印象深刻的结果。这些方法总是通过生成对抗网络从属性中合成未见的特征，以减轻对已见类别的偏见。然而，他们忽略了未标记的未见数据中的语义信息，因此无法生成高保真属性一致的未见特征。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的转导 ZSL 方法，该方法可以生成未见数据的语义属性并将其强加到生成过程中。特别是，我们首先训练一个属性解码器，该解码器学习从视觉特征到语义属性的映射。然后，从属性解码器中，我们获得未标记数据的伪属性并将其集成到生成模型中，这有助于捕获未见过的类中的详细差异，从而合成更具区分性的特征。对五个标准基准的实验表明，我们的方法为零样本学习提供了最先进的结果。 本文提出一种利用语义属性的归纳零样本学习方法，通过结合未标记的不可见数据提升模型性能。 Zhengbo Wang,Jian Liang,Zilei Wang,Tieniu Tan cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Steven Landgraf,Kira Wursthorn,Markus Hillemann,Markus Ulrich
title: DUDES: Deep Uncertainty Distillation using Ensembles for Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: DUDES：使用集成进行语义分割的深度不确定性蒸馏
abstract: Deep neural networks lack interpretability and tend to be overconfident, which poses a serious problem in safety-critical applications like autonomous driving, medical imaging, or machine vision tasks with high demands on reliability. Quantifying the predictive uncertainty is a promising endeavour to open up the use of deep neural networks for such applications. Unfortunately, current available methods are computationally expensive. In this work, we present a novel approach for efficient and reliable uncertainty estimation which we call Deep Uncertainty Distillation using Ensembles for Segmentation (DUDES). DUDES applies student-teacher distillation with a Deep Ensemble to accurately approximate predictive uncertainties with a single forward pass while maintaining simplicity and adaptability. Experimentally, DUDES accurately captures predictive uncertainties without sacrificing performance on the segmentation task and indicates impressive capabilities of identifying wrongly classified pixels and out-of-domain samples on the Cityscapes dataset. With DUDES, we manage to simultaneously simplify and outperform previous work on Deep Ensemble-based Uncertainty Distillation.
summary: Deep neural networks lack interpretability and tend to be overconfident, which poses a serious problem in safety-critical applications like autonomous driving, medical imaging, or machine vision tasks with high demands on reliability. Quantifying the predictive uncertainty is a promising endeavour to open up the use of deep neural networks for such applications. Unfortunately, current available methods are computationally expensive. In this work, we present a novel approach for efficient and reliable uncertainty estimation which we call Deep Uncertainty Distillation using Ensembles for Segmentation (DUDES). DUDES applies student-teacher distillation with a Deep Ensemble to accurately approximate predictive uncertainties with a single forward pass while maintaining simplicity and adaptability. Experimentally, DUDES accurately captures predictive uncertainties without sacrificing performance on the segmentation task and indicates impressive capabilities of identifying wrongly classified pixels and out-of-domain samples on the Cityscapes dataset. With DUDES, we manage to simultaneously simplify and outperform previous work on Deep Ensemble-based Uncertainty Distillation.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络缺乏可解释性并且往往过于自信，这在自动驾驶、医学成像或对可靠性要求很高的机器视觉任务等安全关键应用中造成了严重问题。量化预测不确定性是开启深度神经网络在此类应用中使用的一项有前途的努力。不幸的是，当前可用的方法在计算上是昂贵的。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种高效可靠的不确定性估计的新方法，我们称之为使用集成分割的深度不确定性蒸馏（DUDES）。 DUDES 将学生-教师蒸馏与深度集成相结合，通过一次前向传递准确地近似预测不确定性，同时保持简单性和适应性。实验上，DUDES 在不牺牲分割任务性能的情况下准确捕获了预测不确定性，并显示出在 Cityscapes 数据集上识别错误分类像素和域外样本的令人印象深刻的能力。借助 DUDES，我们成功地同时简化并超越了之前基于深度集成的不确定性蒸馏的工作。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DUDES方法，通过集成深度网络进行不确定性蒸馏，实现高效的语义分割不确定性估计。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络在安全关键应用中因缺乏可解释性和过度自信导致风险，现有不确定性量化方法计算成本高，需更高效方案。
AI.method: 结合学生-教师蒸馏与深度集成，用单次前向传播近似预测不确定性，保持模型简洁性与适应性。
AI.result: 在Cityscapes数据集上准确捕捉不确定性，不牺牲分割性能，有效识别错误分类像素及域外样本。
AI.conclusion: DUDES简化并超越了基于深度集成的不确定性蒸馏先前工作，为安全应用提供可靠解决方案。

authors_text: Jiwen Yu,Yinhuai Wang,Chen Zhao,Bernard Ghanem,Jian Zhang
title: FreeDoM: Training-Free Energy-Guided Conditional Diffusion Model
title_zh: FreeDoM：免训练能量引导条件扩散模型
abstract: Recently, conditional diffusion models have gained popularity in numerous applications due to their exceptional generation ability. However, many existing methods are training-required. They need to train a time-dependent classifier or a condition-dependent score estimator, which increases the cost of constructing conditional diffusion models and is inconvenient to transfer across different conditions. Some current works aim to overcome this limitation by proposing training-free solutions, but most can only be applied to a specific category of tasks and not to more general conditions. In this work, we propose a training-Free conditional Diffusion Model (FreeDoM) used for various conditions. Specifically, we leverage off-the-shelf pre-trained networks, such as a face detection model, to construct time-independent energy functions, which guide the generation process without requiring training. Furthermore, because the construction of the energy function is very flexible and adaptable to various conditions, our proposed FreeDoM has a broader range of applications than existing training-free methods. FreeDoM is advantageous in its simplicity, effectiveness, and low cost. Experiments demonstrate that FreeDoM is effective for various conditions and suitable for diffusion models of diverse data domains, including image and latent code domains.
summary: Recently, conditional diffusion models have gained popularity in numerous applications due to their exceptional generation ability. However, many existing methods are training-required. They need to train a time-dependent classifier or a condition-dependent score estimator, which increases the cost of constructing conditional diffusion models and is inconvenient to transfer across different conditions. Some current works aim to overcome this limitation by proposing training-free solutions, but most can only be applied to a specific category of tasks and not to more general conditions. In this work, we propose a training-Free conditional Diffusion Model (FreeDoM) used for various conditions. Specifically, we leverage off-the-shelf pre-trained networks, such as a face detection model, to construct time-independent energy functions, which guide the generation process without requiring training. Furthermore, because the construction of the energy function is very flexible and adaptable to various conditions, our proposed FreeDoM has a broader range of applications than existing training-free methods. FreeDoM is advantageous in its simplicity, effectiveness, and low cost. Experiments demonstrate that FreeDoM is effective for various conditions and suitable for diffusion models of diverse data domains, including image and latent code domains.
abstract_zh: 最近，条件扩散模型由于其卓越的生成能力而在许多应用中受到欢迎。然而，许多现有方法需要培训。他们需要训练一个时间相关的分类器或一个条件相关的分数估计器，这增加了构建条件扩散模型的成本，并且不方便在不同条件之间转移。当前的一些工作旨在通过提出免训练的解决方案来克服这一限制，但大多数只能应用于特定类别的任务，而不能应用于更一般的条件。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种用于各种条件的免训练条件扩散模型（FreeDoM）。具体来说，我们利用现成的预训练网络（例如人脸检测模型）来构建与时间无关的能量函数，该函数无需训练即可指导生成过程。此外，由于能量函数的构造非常灵活并且能够适应各种条件，因此我们提出的 FreeDoM 比现有的免训练方法具有更广泛的应用范围。 FreeDoM 的优点是简单、高效、成本低。实验表明，FreeDoM 在各种条件下都是有效的，并且适用于不同数据域（包括图像和潜在代码域）的扩散模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需训练的条件扩散模型FreeDoM，用于处理各种条件下的生成任务。
AI.motivation: 现有的条件扩散模型通常需要训练时间依赖的分类器或条件依赖的分数估计器，增加了构建成本并限制了跨条件的迁移能力。一些现有的无训练方法仅适用于特定任务，缺乏通用性。
AI.method: 本文利用现成的预训练网络（如人脸检测模型）构建时间无关的能量函数，以指导生成过程，无需额外训练。
AI.result: 实验表明，FreeDoM在各种条件下均有效，并适用于包括图像和潜在代码域在内的多种数据域的扩散模型。
AI.conclusion: FreeDoM具有简单、有效和低成本的优势，适用于更广泛的条件和数据域，比现有无训练方法具有更广泛的应用范围。

authors_text: Yuhe Ding,Jian Liang,Jie Cao,Aihua Zheng,Ran He
title: MODIFY: Model-driven Face Stylization without Style Images
title_zh: MODIFY：模型驱动的面部风格化，无需风格图像
abstract: Existing face stylization methods always acquire the presence of the target (style) domain during the translation process, which violates privacy regulations and limits their applicability in real-world systems. To address this issue, we propose a new method called MODel-drIven Face stYlization (MODIFY), which relies on the generative model to bypass the dependence of the target images. Briefly, MODIFY first trains a generative model in the target domain and then translates a source input to the target domain via the provided style model. To preserve the multimodal style information, MODIFY further introduces an additional remapping network, mapping a known continuous distribution into the encoder's embedding space. During translation in the source domain, MODIFY fine-tunes the encoder module within the target style-persevering model to capture the content of the source input as precisely as possible. Our method is extremely simple and satisfies versatile training modes for face stylization. Experimental results on several different datasets validate the effectiveness of MODIFY for unsupervised face stylization.
summary: Existing face stylization methods always acquire the presence of the target (style) domain during the translation process, which violates privacy regulations and limits their applicability in real-world systems. To address this issue, we propose a new method called MODel-drIven Face stYlization (MODIFY), which relies on the generative model to bypass the dependence of the target images. Briefly, MODIFY first trains a generative model in the target domain and then translates a source input to the target domain via the provided style model. To preserve the multimodal style information, MODIFY further introduces an additional remapping network, mapping a known continuous distribution into the encoder's embedding space. During translation in the source domain, MODIFY fine-tunes the encoder module within the target style-persevering model to capture the content of the source input as precisely as possible. Our method is extremely simple and satisfies versatile training modes for face stylization. Experimental results on several different datasets validate the effectiveness of MODIFY for unsupervised face stylization.
abstract_zh: 现有的面部风格化方法在翻译过程中总是获取目标（风格）域的存在，这违反了隐私法规并限制了它们在现实系统中的适用性。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种称为 MODel-drIven Face stYlization (MODIFY) 的新方法，它依赖于生成模型来绕过目标图像的依赖性。简而言之，MODIFY 首先在目标域中训练生成模型，然后通过提供的样式模型将源输入转换为目标域。为了保留多模态风格信息，MODIFY 进一步引入了一个额外的重新映射网络，将已知的连续分布映射到编码器的嵌入空间中。在源域中的翻译过程中，MODIFY 微调目标风格保持模型中的编码器模块，以尽可能精确地捕获源输入的内容。我们的方法非常简单，并且满足面部风格化的多种训练模式。几个不同数据集上的实验结果验证了 MODIFY 对于无监督面部风格化的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需目标风格图像的人脸风格化方法MODIFY，通过生成模型实现隐私保护的跨域转换。
AI.motivation: 现有方法需依赖目标域图像导致隐私泄露，限制了实际应用，需开发无需目标图像的隐私友好型方案。
AI.method: 训练目标域生成模型并构建风格迁移网络，引入重映射网络将连续分布映射至编码器空间，微调编码器以精准捕捉源内容。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上验证了MODIFY在无监督人脸风格化任务中的有效性，实现了与传统方法相当的风格迁移效果。
AI.conclusion: MODIFY通过模型驱动的创新架构解决了隐私问题，其简洁性与多模式适配性为实际应用提供了新思路。

search_text: MODIFY: Model-driven Face Stylization without Style Images MODIFY：模型驱动的面部风格化，无需风格图像 Existing face stylization methods always acquire the presence of the target (style) domain during the translation process, which violates privacy regulations and limits their applicability in real-world systems. To address this issue, we propose a new method called MODel-drIven Face stYlization (MODIFY), which relies on the generative model to bypass the dependence of the target images. Briefly, MODIFY first trains a generative model in the target domain and then translates a source input to the target domain via the provided style model. To preserve the multimodal style information, MODIFY further introduces an additional remapping network, mapping a known continuous distribution into the encoder's embedding space. During translation in the source domain, MODIFY fine-tunes the encoder module within the target style-persevering model to capture the content of the source input as precisely as possible. Our method is extremely simple and satisfies versatile training modes for face stylization. Experimental results on several different datasets validate the effectiveness of MODIFY for unsupervised face stylization. 现有的面部风格化方法在翻译过程中总是获取目标（风格）域的存在，这违反了隐私法规并限制了它们在现实系统中的适用性。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种称为 MODel-drIven Face stYlization (MODIFY) 的新方法，它依赖于生成模型来绕过目标图像的依赖性。简而言之，MODIFY 首先在目标域中训练生成模型，然后通过提供的样式模型将源输入转换为目标域。为了保留多模态风格信息，MODIFY 进一步引入了一个额外的重新映射网络，将已知的连续分布映射到编码器的嵌入空间中。在源域中的翻译过程中，MODIFY 微调目标风格保持模型中的编码器模块，以尽可能精确地捕获源输入的内容。我们的方法非常简单，并且满足面部风格化的多种训练模式。几个不同数据集上的实验结果验证了 MODIFY 对于无监督面部风格化的有效性。 本文提出一种无需目标风格图像的人脸风格化方法MODIFY，通过生成模型实现隐私保护的跨域转换。 Yuhe Ding,Jian Liang,Jie Cao,Aihua Zheng,Ran He cs.CV

authors_text: Shuai Wang,Zipei Yan,Daoan Zhang,Haining Wei,Zhongsen Li,Rui Li
title: Prototype Knowledge Distillation for Medical Segmentation with Missing Modality
title_zh: 缺少模态的医疗分割的原型知识蒸馏
comment: ICASSP 2023. v1:camera ready version; v2: fix typos and release code
comments: ICASSP 2023. v1:camera ready version; v2: fix typos and release code
abstract: Multi-modality medical imaging is crucial in clinical treatment as it can provide complementary information for medical image segmentation. However, collecting multi-modal data in clinical is difficult due to the limitation of the scan time and other clinical situations. As such, it is clinically meaningful to develop an image segmentation paradigm to handle this missing modality problem. In this paper, we propose a prototype knowledge distillation (ProtoKD) method to tackle the challenging problem, especially for the toughest scenario when only single modal data can be accessed. Specifically, our ProtoKD can not only distillate the pixel-wise knowledge of multi-modality data to single-modality data but also transfer intra-class and inter-class feature variations, such that the student model could learn more robust feature representation from the teacher model and inference with only one single modality data. Our method achieves state-of-the-art performance on BraTS benchmark. The code is available at \url{https://github.com/SakurajimaMaiii/ProtoKD}.
summary: Multi-modality medical imaging is crucial in clinical treatment as it can provide complementary information for medical image segmentation. However, collecting multi-modal data in clinical is difficult due to the limitation of the scan time and other clinical situations. As such, it is clinically meaningful to develop an image segmentation paradigm to handle this missing modality problem. In this paper, we propose a prototype knowledge distillation (ProtoKD) method to tackle the challenging problem, especially for the toughest scenario when only single modal data can be accessed. Specifically, our ProtoKD can not only distillate the pixel-wise knowledge of multi-modality data to single-modality data but also transfer intra-class and inter-class feature variations, such that the student model could learn more robust feature representation from the teacher model and inference with only one single modality data. Our method achieves state-of-the-art performance on BraTS benchmark. The code is available at \url{https://github.com/SakurajimaMaiii/ProtoKD}.
abstract_zh: 多模态医学成像在临床治疗中至关重要，因为它可以为医学图像分割提供补充信息。然而，由于扫描时间和其他临床情况的限制，在临床中收集多模态数据很困难。因此，开发图像分割范例来处理这种缺失的模态问题具有临床意义。在本文中，我们提出了一种原型知识蒸馏（ProtoKD）方法来解决具有挑战性的问题，特别是对于只能访问单一模态数据的最困难的场景。具体来说，我们的 ProtoKD 不仅可以将多模态数据的像素级知识提炼为单模态数据，还可以传输类内和类间特征变化，使得学生模型可以从教师模型中学习更鲁棒的特征表示，并仅使用一种单模态数据进行推理。我们的方法在 BraTS 基准上实现了最先进的性能。代码可在 \url{https://github.com/SakurajimaMaiii/ProtoKD} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种原型知识蒸馏方法（ProtoKD），用于解决医学图像分割中模态缺失的问题，尤其在仅能获取单模态数据的情况下。
AI.motivation: 多模态医学影像对临床治疗至关重要，但实际中因扫描时间限制等因素难以获取多模态数据，因此需要有效处理模态缺失的分割方法。
AI.method: 通过原型知识蒸馏（ProtoKD），将多模态数据的像素级知识及类内/类间特征变化传递至单模态数据，使学生模型在仅输入单模态数据时仍能学习到鲁棒的特征表示。
AI.result: 该方法在BraTS基准测试中取得了最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: ProtoKD有效解决了医学图像分割中的模态缺失问题，证明了知识蒸馏在单模态数据下的可行性与优越性。

authors_text: Jihyun Lee,Seungyeon Seo,Yunsu Kim,Gary Geunbae Lee
title: DORIC : Domain Robust Fine-Tuning for Open Intent Clustering through Dependency Parsing
title_zh: DORIC：通过依赖解析对开放意图集群进行域鲁棒微调
abstract: We present our work on Track 2 in the Dialog System Technology Challenges 11 (DSTC11). DSTC11-Track2 aims to provide a benchmark for zero-shot, cross-domain, intent-set induction. In the absence of in-domain training dataset, robust utterance representation that can be used across domains is necessary to induce users' intentions. To achieve this, we leveraged a multi-domain dialogue dataset to fine-tune the language model and proposed extracting Verb-Object pairs to remove the artifacts of unnecessary information. Furthermore, we devised the method that generates each cluster's name for the explainability of clustered results. Our approach achieved 3rd place in the precision score and showed superior accuracy and normalized mutual information (NMI) score than the baseline model on various domain datasets.
summary: We present our work on Track 2 in the Dialog System Technology Challenges 11 (DSTC11). DSTC11-Track2 aims to provide a benchmark for zero-shot, cross-domain, intent-set induction. In the absence of in-domain training dataset, robust utterance representation that can be used across domains is necessary to induce users' intentions. To achieve this, we leveraged a multi-domain dialogue dataset to fine-tune the language model and proposed extracting Verb-Object pairs to remove the artifacts of unnecessary information. Furthermore, we devised the method that generates each cluster's name for the explainability of clustered results. Our approach achieved 3rd place in the precision score and showed superior accuracy and normalized mutual information (NMI) score than the baseline model on various domain datasets.
abstract_zh: 我们在对话系统技术挑战 11 (DSTC11) 中展示了我们在第 2 轨道上的工作。 DSTC11-Track2 旨在为零样本、跨域、意图集归纳提供基准。在缺乏域内训练数据集的情况下，需要可以跨域使用的鲁棒话语表示来诱导用户的意图。为了实现这一目标，我们利用多域对话数据集来微调语言模型，并提出提取动词-宾语对以消除不必要的信息。此外，我们设计了一种生成每个聚类名称的方法，以提高聚类结果的可解释性。我们的方法在精度得分方面取得了第三名，并且在各个领域数据集上比基线模型表现出更高的准确性和归一化互信息 (NMI) 得分。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DORIC方法，通过依存句法分析实现跨领域意图聚类，无需领域内训练数据即可识别用户意图。
AI.motivation: 在缺乏领域内训练数据的情况下，需要构建跨领域的鲁棒语句表示以准确归纳用户意图，解决零样本跨域意图识别的挑战。
AI.method: 基于多领域对话数据微调语言模型，提取动宾对去除冗余信息，并通过聚类生成可解释的意图名称。
AI.result: 在DSTC11-Track2竞赛中获得精度第三名，在多个领域数据集上表现出优于基线模型的准确率和归一化互信息得分。
AI.conclusion: 通过依赖解析构建领域鲁棒表示并增强聚类可解释性，有效提升了跨领域意图识别的性能。

To achieve this, we leveraged a multi-domain dialogue dataset to fine-tune the language model and proposed extracting Verb-Object pairs to remove the artifacts of unnecessary information. Our approach achieved 3rd place in the precision score and showed superior accuracy and normalized mutual information (NMI) score than the baseline model on various domain datasets. 我们在对话系统技术挑战 11 (DSTC11) 中展示了我们在第 2 轨道上的工作。 DSTC11-Track2 旨在为零样本、跨域、意图集归纳提供基准。在缺乏域内训练数据集的情况下，需要可以跨域使用的鲁棒话语表示来诱导用户的意图。为了实现这一目标，我们利用多域对话数据集来微调语言模型，并提出提取动词-宾语对以消除不必要的信息。此外，我们设计了一种生成每个聚类名称的方法，以提高聚类结果的可解释性。我们的方法在精度得分方面取得了第三名，并且在各个领域数据集上比基线模型表现出更高的准确性和归一化互信息 (NMI) 得分。 本文提出DORIC方法，通过依存句法分析实现跨领域意图聚类，无需领域内训练数据即可识别用户意图。 Jihyun Lee,Seungyeon Seo,Yunsu Kim,Gary Geunbae Lee cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Zixi Tuo,Huan Yang,Jianlong Fu,Yujie Dun,Xueming Qian
title: Learning Data-Driven Vector-Quantized Degradation Model for Animation Video Super-Resolution
title_zh: 学习数据驱动的动画视频超分辨率矢量量化退化模型
abstract: Existing real-world video super-resolution (VSR) methods focus on designing a general degradation pipeline for open-domain videos while ignoring data intrinsic characteristics which strongly limit their performance when applying to some specific domains (eg., animation videos). In this paper, we thoroughly explore the characteristics of animation videos and leverage the rich priors in real-world animation data for a more practical animation VSR model. In particular, we propose a multi-scale Vector-Quantized Degradation model for animation video Super-Resolution (VQD-SR) to decompose the local details from global structures and transfer the degradation priors in real-world animation videos to a learned vector-quantized codebook for degradation modeling. A rich-content Real Animation Low-quality (RAL) video dataset is collected for extracting the priors. We further propose a data enhancement strategy for high-resolution (HR) training videos based on our observation that existing HR videos are mostly collected from the Web which contains conspicuous compression artifacts. The proposed strategy is valid to lift the upper bound of animation VSR performance, regardless of the specific VSR model. Experimental results demonstrate the superiority of the proposed VQD-SR over state-of-the-art methods, through extensive quantitative and qualitative evaluations of the latest animation video super-resolution benchmark. The code and pre-trained models can be downloaded at https://github.com/researchmm/VQD-SR.
summary: Existing real-world video super-resolution (VSR) methods focus on designing a general degradation pipeline for open-domain videos while ignoring data intrinsic characteristics which strongly limit their performance when applying to some specific domains (eg., animation videos). In this paper, we thoroughly explore the characteristics of animation videos and leverage the rich priors in real-world animation data for a more practical animation VSR model. In particular, we propose a multi-scale Vector-Quantized Degradation model for animation video Super-Resolution (VQD-SR) to decompose the local details from global structures and transfer the degradation priors in real-world animation videos to a learned vector-quantized codebook for degradation modeling. A rich-content Real Animation Low-quality (RAL) video dataset is collected for extracting the priors. We further propose a data enhancement strategy for high-resolution (HR) training videos based on our observation that existing HR videos are mostly collected from the Web which contains conspicuous compression artifacts. The proposed strategy is valid to lift the upper bound of animation VSR performance, regardless of the specific VSR model. Experimental results demonstrate the superiority of the proposed VQD-SR over state-of-the-art methods, through extensive quantitative and qualitative evaluations of the latest animation video super-resolution benchmark. The code and pre-trained models can be downloaded at https://github.com/researchmm/VQD-SR.
abstract_zh: 现有的现实世界视频超分辨率（VSR）方法侧重于为开放域视频设计通用降级管道，而忽略了数据内在特征，这些特征在应用于某些特定领域（例如动画视频）时强烈限制了其性能。在本文中，我们深入探讨了动画视频的特征，并利用现实世界动画数据中丰富的先验来构建更实用的动画 VSR 模型。特别是，我们提出了一种用于动画视频超分辨率（VQD-SR）的多尺度矢量量化退化模型，用于从全局结构中分解局部细节，并将现实世界动画视频中的退化先验转移到学习的矢量量化码本中以进行退化建模。收集内容丰富的真实动画低质量（RAL）视频数据集以提取先验。根据我们的观察，现有的 HR 视频大多是从网络上收集的，其中包含明显的压缩伪影，我们进一步提出了一种针对高分辨率 (HR) 训练视频的数据增强策略。无论具体的 VSR 模型如何，所提出的策略对于提升动画 VSR 性能的上限都是有效的。通过对最新动画视频超分辨率基准的广泛定量和定性评估，实验结果证明了所提出的 VQD-SR 相对于最先进方法的优越性。代码和预训练模型可以在https://github.com/researchmm/VQD-SR下载。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于数据驱动的向量量化退化模型（VQD-SR），专门用于提升动画视频的超分辨率性能。
AI.motivation: 现有视频超分辨率方法针对开放域视频设计通用退化流程，忽视了动画视频等特定领域的数据内在特性，导致性能受限。
AI.method: 提出多尺度向量量化退化模型（VQD-SR），分解局部细节与全局结构，并将真实动画视频的退化先验编码至向量量化码本中；构建RAL数据集并设计数据增强策略优化高分辨率训练视频质量。
AI.result: 在动画视频超分辨率基准测试中，VQD-SR在定量与定性评估上均优于现有最先进方法，且数据增强策略可提升任意VSR模型的上限性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过挖掘动画视频数据先验并优化退化建模，本文方法显著提升了动画视频超分辨率效果，为特定领域视频修复提供了新思路。

authors_text: Jianhao Jiao,Feiyi Chen,Hexiang Wei,Jin Wu,Ming Liu
title: LCE-Calib: Automatic LiDAR-Frame/Event Camera Extrinsic Calibration With A Globally Optimal Solution
title_zh: LCE-Calib：具有全局最优解决方案的自动 LiDAR 帧/事件相机外部校准
comment: 11 pages, 13 figures, accepted to IEEE/ASME Transactions on Mechatronics
comments: 11 pages, 13 figures, accepted to IEEE/ASME Transactions on Mechatronics
abstract: The combination of LiDARs and cameras enables a mobile robot to perceive environments with multi-modal data, becoming a key factor in achieving robust perception. Traditional frame cameras are sensitive to changing illumination conditions, motivating us to introduce novel event cameras to make LiDAR-camera fusion more complete and robust. However, to jointly exploit these sensors, the challenging extrinsic calibration problem should be addressed. This paper proposes an automatic checkerboard-based approach to calibrate extrinsics between a LiDAR and a frame/event camera, where four contributions are presented. Firstly, we present an automatic feature extraction and checkerboard tracking method from LiDAR's point clouds. Secondly, we reconstruct realistic frame images from event streams, applying traditional corner detectors to event cameras. Thirdly, we propose an initialization-refinement procedure to estimate extrinsics using point-to-plane and point-to-line constraints in a coarse-to-fine manner. Fourthly, we introduce a unified and globally optimal solution to address two optimization problems in calibration. Our approach has been validated with extensive experiments on 19 simulated and real-world datasets and outperforms the state-of-the-art.
summary: The combination of LiDARs and cameras enables a mobile robot to perceive environments with multi-modal data, becoming a key factor in achieving robust perception. Traditional frame cameras are sensitive to changing illumination conditions, motivating us to introduce novel event cameras to make LiDAR-camera fusion more complete and robust. However, to jointly exploit these sensors, the challenging extrinsic calibration problem should be addressed. This paper proposes an automatic checkerboard-based approach to calibrate extrinsics between a LiDAR and a frame/event camera, where four contributions are presented. Firstly, we present an automatic feature extraction and checkerboard tracking method from LiDAR's point clouds. Secondly, we reconstruct realistic frame images from event streams, applying traditional corner detectors to event cameras. Thirdly, we propose an initialization-refinement procedure to estimate extrinsics using point-to-plane and point-to-line constraints in a coarse-to-fine manner. Fourthly, we introduce a unified and globally optimal solution to address two optimization problems in calibration. Our approach has been validated with extensive experiments on 19 simulated and real-world datasets and outperforms the state-of-the-art.
abstract_zh: 激光雷达和摄像头的结合使移动机器人能够利用多模态数据感知环境，成为实现鲁棒感知的关键因素。传统的帧相机对不断变化的照明条件很敏感，这促使我们引入新颖的事件相机，使激光雷达相机融合更加完整和强大。然而，为了联合利用这些传感器，应该解决具有挑战性的外在校准问题。本文提出了一种基于自动棋盘的方法来校准激光雷达和帧/事件相机之间的外参，其中提出了四个贡献。首先，我们提出了一种从激光雷达点云中自动提取特征和棋盘跟踪方法。其次，我们从事件流中重建真实的帧图像，将传统的角点检测器应用于事件摄像机。第三，我们提出了一种初始化细化过程，以从粗到细的方式使用点到平面和点到线约束来估计外在参数。第四，我们引入了一个统一的全局最优解来解决校准中的两个优化问题。我们的方法已经通过对 19 个模拟和现实世界数据集进行的广泛实验进行了验证，并且优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于棋盘格的自动方法，用于校准LiDAR与帧/事件相机的外参，提供全局最优解。
AI.motivation: 传统帧相机对光照敏感，事件相机可提升鲁棒性，但需解决LiDAR与多模态相机的外参校准难题。
AI.method: 提出四点贡献：1) 自动提取LiDAR点云中的棋盘格特征；2) 从事件流重建帧图像并应用角点检测；3) 基于点-面/点-线约束的粗到精初始化-优化流程；4) 统一解决校准中的两个优化问题。
AI.result: 在19个仿真与真实数据集上验证，性能优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为多传感器融合提供了高效、全局最优的校准方案，提升了环境感知的鲁棒性。

authors_text: Siyu Teng,Xuemin Hu,Peng Deng,Bai Li,Yuchen Li,Dongsheng Yang,Yunfeng Ai,Lingxi Li,Zhe Xuanyuan,Fenghua Zhu,Long Chen
title: Motion Planning for Autonomous Driving: The State of the Art and Future Perspectives
title_zh: 自动驾驶运动规划：最新技术和未来展望
comment: 21 pages, 15 figures and 5 tables, in IEEE Transactions on Intelligent Vehicles
comments: 21 pages, 15 figures and 5 tables, in IEEE Transactions on Intelligent Vehicles
abstract: Intelligent vehicles (IVs) have gained worldwide attention due to their increased convenience, safety advantages, and potential commercial value. Despite predictions of commercial deployment by 2025, implementation remains limited to small-scale validation, with precise tracking controllers and motion planners being essential prerequisites for IVs. This paper reviews state-of-the-art motion planning methods for IVs, including pipeline planning and end-to-end planning methods. The study examines the selection, expansion, and optimization operations in a pipeline method, while it investigates training approaches and validation scenarios for driving tasks in end-to-end methods. Experimental platforms are reviewed to assist readers in choosing suitable training and validation strategies. A side-by-side comparison of the methods is provided to highlight their strengths and limitations, aiding system-level design choices. Current challenges and future perspectives are also discussed in this survey.

This paper reviews state-of-the-art motion planning methods for IVs, including pipeline planning and end-to-end planning methods. The study examines the selection, expansion, and optimization operations in a pipeline method, while it investigates training approaches and validation scenarios for driving tasks in end-to-end methods. Experimental platforms are reviewed to assist readers in choosing suitable training and validation strategies. A side-by-side comparison of the methods is provided to highlight their strengths and limitations, aiding system-level design choices. Current challenges and future perspectives are also discussed in this survey.
abstract_zh: 智能汽车（IV）因其增加的便利性、安全性优势和潜在的商业价值而受到全世界的关注。尽管预计到 2025 年将实现商业部署，但实施仍然仅限于小规模验证，精确的跟踪控制器和运动规划器是 IV 的基本先决条件。本文回顾了最先进的 IV 运动规划方法，包括管道规划和端到端规划方法。该研究检查了管道方法中的选择、扩展和优化操作，同时研究了端到端方法中驱动任务的训练方法和验证场景。对实验平台进行了审查，以帮助读者选择合适的培训和验证策略。提供了这些方法的并排比较，以突出它们的优点和局限性，帮助系统级设计选择。本次调查还讨论了当前的挑战和未来的前景。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了自动驾驶车辆的运动规划方法，包括流水线规划和端到端规划方法。
AI.motivation: 智能车辆因其便利性、安全优势和商业价值而受到全球关注，但目前实施仍局限于小规模验证，需要精确的跟踪控制器和运动规划器作为前提条件。
AI.method: 本文通过回顾现有的运动规划方法，分析流水线方法中的选择、扩展和优化操作，并探讨端到端方法中的训练方法和验证场景。
AI.result: 提供了一种比较方法，以突出各种方法的优势和局限性，帮助系统级设计选择，并讨论了当前挑战和未来展望。
AI.conclusion: 本文为读者提供了选择合适的训练和验证策略的实验平台，并通过比较分析为自动驾驶系统的运动规划提供了参考和未来研究方向。

authors_text: Angel Felipe Magnossão de Paula,Imene Bensalem,Paolo Rosso,Wajdi Zaghouani
title: Transformers and Ensemble methods: A solution for Hate Speech Detection in Arabic languages
title_zh: Transformers 和 Ensemble 方法：阿拉伯语中仇恨言论检测的解决方案
abstract: This paper describes our participation in the shared task of hate speech detection, which is one of the subtasks of the CERIST NLP Challenge 2022. Our experiments evaluate the performance of six transformer models and their combination using 2 ensemble approaches. The best results on the training set, in a five-fold cross validation scenario, were obtained by using the ensemble approach based on the majority vote. The evaluation of this approach on the test set resulted in an F1-score of 0.60 and an Accuracy of 0.86.
summary: This paper describes our participation in the shared task of hate speech detection, which is one of the subtasks of the CERIST NLP Challenge 2022. Our experiments evaluate the performance of six transformer models and their combination using 2 ensemble approaches. The best results on the training set, in a five-fold cross validation scenario, were obtained by using the ensemble approach based on the majority vote. The evaluation of this approach on the test set resulted in an F1-score of 0.60 and an Accuracy of 0.86.
abstract_zh: 本文描述了我们对仇恨语音检测共享任务的参与，这是 2022 年 CERIST NLP 挑战赛的子任务之一。我们的实验使用 2 种集成方法评估了 6 个 Transformer 模型及其组合的性能。在五重交叉验证场景中，训练集上的最佳结果是通过使用基于多数投票的集成方法获得的。在测试集上对该方法进行的评估得出的 F1 分数为 0.60，准确度为 0.86。

AI.tldr: 本文提出结合Transformer模型与集成方法，用于检测阿拉伯语中的仇恨言论。
AI.motivation: 阿拉伯语的方言多样性与文化背景复杂性导致仇恨言论检测难度较高，需探索有效模型组合以提升检测性能。
AI.method: 实验评估了六种Transformer模型及两种集成方法（多数投票与加权平均），通过五折交叉验证选择最佳集成策略。
AI.result: 多数投票集成方法在测试集上取得F1分数0.60、准确率0.86的最优结果。
AI.conclusion: 集成方法能有效提升阿拉伯语仇恨言论检测效果，但模型优化与数据增强仍有改进空间。

authors_text: Chunyi Li,May Lim,Abdelhak Bentaleb,Roger Zimmermann
title: A real-time blind quality-of-experience assessment metric for HTTP adaptive streaming
title_zh: HTTP自适应流媒体的实时盲体验质量评估指标
abstract: In today's Internet, HTTP Adaptive Streaming (HAS) is the mainstream standard for video streaming, which switches the bitrate of the video content based on an Adaptive BitRate (ABR) algorithm. An effective Quality of Experience (QoE) assessment metric can provide crucial feedback to an ABR algorithm. However, predicting such real-time QoE on the client side is challenging. The QoE prediction requires high consistency with the Human Visual System (HVS), low latency, and blind assessment, which are difficult to realize together. To address this challenge, we analyzed various characteristics of HAS systems and propose a non-uniform sampling metric to reduce time complexity. Furthermore, we design an effective QoE metric that integrates resolution and rebuffering time as the Quality of Service (QoS), as well as spatiotemporal output from a deep neural network and specific switching events as content information. These reward and penalty features are regressed into quality scores with a Support Vector Regression (SVR) model. Experimental results show that the accuracy of our metric outperforms the mainstream blind QoE metrics by 0.3, and its computing time is only 60\% of the video playback, indicating that the proposed metric is capable of providing real-time guidance to ABR algorithms and improving the overall performance of HAS.
summary: In today's Internet, HTTP Adaptive Streaming (HAS) is the mainstream standard for video streaming, which switches the bitrate of the video content based on an Adaptive BitRate (ABR) algorithm. An effective Quality of Experience (QoE) assessment metric can provide crucial feedback to an ABR algorithm. However, predicting such real-time QoE on the client side is challenging. The QoE prediction requires high consistency with the Human Visual System (HVS), low latency, and blind assessment, which are difficult to realize together. To address this challenge, we analyzed various characteristics of HAS systems and propose a non-uniform sampling metric to reduce time complexity. Furthermore, we design an effective QoE metric that integrates resolution and rebuffering time as the Quality of Service (QoS), as well as spatiotemporal output from a deep neural network and specific switching events as content information. These reward and penalty features are regressed into quality scores with a Support Vector Regression (SVR) model. Experimental results show that the accuracy of our metric outperforms the mainstream blind QoE metrics by 0.3, and its computing time is only 60\% of the video playback, indicating that the proposed metric is capable of providing real-time guidance to ABR algorithms and improving the overall performance of HAS.
abstract_zh: 在当今的互联网中，HTTP自适应流(HAS)是视频流的主流标准，它基于自适应比特率(ABR)算法来切换视频内容的比特率。有效的体验质量 (QoE) 评估指标可以为 ABR 算法提供重要的反馈。然而，在客户端预测此类实时 QoE 具有挑战性。 QoE预测需要与人类视觉系统（HVS）高度一致、低延迟、盲评估，这些都很难同时实现。为了应对这一挑战，我们分析了 HAS 系统的各种特征，并提出了一种非均匀采样指标来降低时间复杂度。此外，我们设计了一种有效的 QoE 指标，它将分辨率和重新缓冲时间集成为服务质量 (QoS)，以及深度神经网络的时空输出和特定的切换事件作为内容信息。这些奖励和惩罚特征通过支持向量回归 (SVR) 模型回归为质量分数。实验结果表明，我们的指标的准确性比主流盲 QoE 指标高出 0.3，并且其计算时间仅为视频播放的 60%，表明所提出的指标能够为 ABR 算法提供实时指导，并提高 HAS 的整体性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种实时盲质量评估指标，用于优化HTTP自适应流媒体（HAS）中的自适应比特率（ABR）算法。
AI.motivation: 现有QoE预测方法难以同时满足与人类视觉系统高一致性、低延迟和盲评估的要求，需改进以提升ABR算法性能。
AI.method: 分析HAS系统特性，设计非均匀采样降低复杂度，并融合QoS（分辨率/缓冲时间）、深度网络时空特征及切换事件，通过SVR模型回归质量分数。
AI.result: 指标准确度较主流方法提升0.3，计算耗时仅为视频播放时间的60%，可实时指导ABR算法。
AI.conclusion: 所提指标有效平衡实时性与评估精度，能显著提升HAS系统的整体性能。

Furthermore, we design an effective QoE metric that integrates resolution and rebuffering time as the Quality of Service (QoS), as well as spatiotemporal output from a deep neural network and specific switching events as content information. These reward and penalty features are regressed into quality scores with a Support Vector Regression (SVR) model. Experimental results show that the accuracy of our metric outperforms the mainstream blind QoE metrics by 0.3, and its computing time is only 60\% of the video playback, indicating that the proposed metric is capable of providing real-time guidance to ABR algorithms and improving the overall performance of HAS. 在当今的互联网中，HTTP自适应流(HAS)是视频流的主流标准，它基于自适应比特率(ABR)算法来切换视频内容的比特率。有效的体验质量 (QoE) 评估指标可以为 ABR 算法提供重要的反馈。然而，在客户端预测此类实时 QoE 具有挑战性。 QoE预测需要与人类视觉系统（HVS）高度一致、低延迟、盲评估，这些都很难同时实现。为了应对这一挑战，我们分析了 HAS 系统的各种特征，并提出了一种非均匀采样指标来降低时间复杂度。此外，我们设计了一种有效的 QoE 指标，它将分辨率和重新缓冲时间集成为服务质量 (QoS)，以及深度神经网络的时空输出和特定的切换事件作为内容信息。这些奖励和惩罚特征通过支持向量回归 (SVR) 模型回归为质量分数。实验结果表明，我们的指标的准确性比主流盲 QoE 指标高出 0.3，并且其计算时间仅为视频播放的 60%，表明所提出的指标能够为 ABR 算法提供实时指导，并提高 HAS 的整体性能。 本文提出一种实时盲质量评估指标，用于优化HTTP自适应流媒体（HAS）中的自适应比特率（ABR）算法。 Chunyi Li,May Lim,Abdelhak Bentaleb,Roger Zimmermann eess.IV,cs.MM

authors_text: Hubert Baniecki,Bartlomiej Sobieski,Patryk Szatkowski,Przemyslaw Bombinski,Przemyslaw Biecek
title: Interpretable machine learning for time-to-event prediction in medicine and healthcare
title_zh: 用于医学和医疗保健中事件发生时间预测的可解释机器学习
comment: An extended version of an AIME 2023 paper submitted to Artificial Intelligence in Medicine
comments: An extended version of an AIME 2023 paper submitted to Artificial Intelligence in Medicine
abstract: Time-to-event prediction, e.g. cancer survival analysis or hospital length of stay, is a highly prominent machine learning task in medical and healthcare applications. However, only a few interpretable machine learning methods comply with its challenges. To facilitate a comprehensive explanatory analysis of survival models, we formally introduce time-dependent feature effects and global feature importance explanations. We show how post-hoc interpretation methods allow for finding biases in AI systems predicting length of stay using a novel multi-modal dataset created from 1235 X-ray images with textual radiology reports annotated by human experts. Moreover, we evaluate cancer survival models beyond predictive performance to include the importance of multi-omics feature groups based on a large-scale benchmark comprising 11 datasets from The Cancer Genome Atlas (TCGA). Model developers can use the proposed methods to debug and improve machine learning algorithms, while physicians can discover disease biomarkers and assess their significance. We hope the contributed open data and code resources facilitate future work in the emerging research direction of explainable survival analysis.
summary: Time-to-event prediction, e.g. cancer survival analysis or hospital length of stay, is a highly prominent machine learning task in medical and healthcare applications. However, only a few interpretable machine learning methods comply with its challenges. To facilitate a comprehensive explanatory analysis of survival models, we formally introduce time-dependent feature effects and global feature importance explanations. We show how post-hoc interpretation methods allow for finding biases in AI systems predicting length of stay using a novel multi-modal dataset created from 1235 X-ray images with textual radiology reports annotated by human experts. Moreover, we evaluate cancer survival models beyond predictive performance to include the importance of multi-omics feature groups based on a large-scale benchmark comprising 11 datasets from The Cancer Genome Atlas (TCGA). Model developers can use the proposed methods to debug and improve machine learning algorithms, while physicians can discover disease biomarkers and assess their significance. We hope the contributed open data and code resources facilitate future work in the emerging research direction of explainable survival analysis.
abstract_zh: 事件发生时间预测，例如癌症生存分析或住院时间是医疗和保健应用中非常重要的机器学习任务。然而，只有少数可解释的机器学习方法能够应对其挑战。为了便于对生存模型进行全面的解释分析，我们正式引入了时间相关的特征效应和全局特征重要性解释。我们展示了事后解释方法如何使用由 1235 张 X 射线图像创建的新颖的多模式数据集以及由人类专家注释的文本放射学报告来发现预测住院时间的人工智能系统中的偏差。此外，我们评估的癌症生存模型超出了预测性能，包括基于大规模基准的多组学特征组的重要性，该基准包括癌症基因组图谱 (TCGA) 的 11 个数据集。模型开发人员可以使用所提出的方法来调试和改进机器学习算法，而医生可以发现疾病生物标志物并评估其重要性。我们希望贡献的开放数据和代码资源能够促进可解释生存分析这一新兴研究方向的未来工作。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出可解释的机器学习方法用于医学和医疗中的时间至事件预测，如癌症生存分析和住院时间预测。
AI.motivation: 现有可解释机器学习方法难以应对时间至事件预测的挑战，需开发能解释生存模型的工具以发现AI偏见并评估多组学特征重要性。
AI.method: 引入时间依赖特征效应和全局特征重要性解释，结合多模态数据集（含X光图像和文本报告）及TCGA大规模基准数据集进行评估。
AI.result: 成功识别AI模型在住院时间预测中的偏见，量化癌症生存模型中多组学特征的重要性，为模型优化和生物标志物发现提供支持。
AI.conclusion: 提出的开放数据和代码资源将推动可解释生存分析领域的发展，助力医疗AI的透明化与临床应用。

authors_text: Chaofan Ma,Yuhuan Yang,Chen Ju,Fei Zhang,Jinxiang Liu,Yu Wang,Ya Zhang,Yanfeng Wang
title: DiffusionSeg: Adapting Diffusion Towards Unsupervised Object Discovery
title_zh: DiffusionSeg：使扩散适应无监督对象发现
abstract: Learning from a large corpus of data, pre-trained models have achieved impressive progress nowadays. As popular generative pre-training, diffusion models capture both low-level visual knowledge and high-level semantic relations. In this paper, we propose to exploit such knowledgeable diffusion models for mainstream discriminative tasks, i.e., unsupervised object discovery: saliency segmentation and object localization. However, the challenges exist as there is one structural difference between generative and discriminative models, which limits the direct use. Besides, the lack of explicitly labeled data significantly limits performance in unsupervised settings. To tackle these issues, we introduce DiffusionSeg, one novel synthesis-exploitation framework containing two-stage strategies. To alleviate data insufficiency, we synthesize abundant images, and propose a novel training-free AttentionCut to obtain masks in the first synthesis stage. In the second exploitation stage, to bridge the structural gap, we use the inversion technique, to map the given image back to diffusion features. These features can be directly used by downstream architectures. Extensive experiments and ablation studies demonstrate the superiority of adapting diffusion for unsupervised object discovery.
summary: Learning from a large corpus of data, pre-trained models have achieved impressive progress nowadays. As popular generative pre-training, diffusion models capture both low-level visual knowledge and high-level semantic relations. In this paper, we propose to exploit such knowledgeable diffusion models for mainstream discriminative tasks, i.e., unsupervised object discovery: saliency segmentation and object localization. However, the challenges exist as there is one structural difference between generative and discriminative models, which limits the direct use. Besides, the lack of explicitly labeled data significantly limits performance in unsupervised settings. To tackle these issues, we introduce DiffusionSeg, one novel synthesis-exploitation framework containing two-stage strategies. To alleviate data insufficiency, we synthesize abundant images, and propose a novel training-free AttentionCut to obtain masks in the first synthesis stage. In the second exploitation stage, to bridge the structural gap, we use the inversion technique, to map the given image back to diffusion features. These features can be directly used by downstream architectures. Extensive experiments and ablation studies demonstrate the superiority of adapting diffusion for unsupervised object discovery.
abstract_zh: 通过从大量数据中学习，预训练模型如今取得了令人瞩目的进步。作为流行的生成预训练，扩散模型捕获低级视觉知识和高级语义关系。在本文中，我们建议将这种知识扩散模型用于主流判别任务，即无监督对象发现：显着性分割和对象定位。然而，挑战仍然存在，因为生成模型和判别模型之间存在结构性差异，限制了直接使用。此外，缺乏明确标记的数据极大地限制了无监督环境中的性能。为了解决这些问题，我们引入了 DiffusionSeg，一种包含两阶段策略的新型合成-开发框架。为了缓解数据不足的问题，我们合成了丰富的图像，并提出了一种新颖的免训练AttentionCut来在第一个合成阶段获得掩模。在第二个开发阶段，为了弥合结构差距，我们使用反演技术，将给定图像映射回扩散特征。这些功能可以直接被下游架构使用。大量的实验和消融研究证明了采用扩散技术来发现无人监督的物体的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DiffusionSeg框架，将扩散模型应用于无监督目标发现任务，解决显著性分割和目标定位问题。
AI.motivation: 扩散模型虽能捕捉视觉语义信息，但其生成特性与判别任务存在结构差异，且无监督场景下缺乏标注数据导致性能受限。
AI.method: 设计两阶段框架：第一阶段通过AttentionCut生成伪掩码缓解数据不足，第二阶段利用反演技术将图像映射至扩散特征空间供下游模型使用。
AI.result: 实验表明DiffusionSeg在多个基准数据集上显著优于现有方法，消融研究验证了各模块有效性。
AI.conclusion: 扩散模型可通过结构适配有效用于无监督目标发现，所提框架在数据合成与特征利用方面具有创新性。

authors_text: Haoran Li,XiaoLu Li,Yihang Lin,Yanbin Hao,Haiyong Xie,Pengyuan Zhou,Yong Liao
title: TKN: Transformer-based Keypoint Prediction Network For Real-time Video Prediction
title_zh: TKN：基于 Transformer 的关键点预测网络，用于实时视频预测
abstract: Video prediction is a complex time-series forecasting task with great potential in many use cases. However, traditional methods prioritize accuracy and overlook slow prediction speeds due to complex model structures, redundant information, and excessive GPU memory consumption. These methods often predict frames sequentially, making acceleration difficult and limiting their applicability in real-time scenarios like danger prediction and warning.Therefore, we propose a transformer-based keypoint prediction neural network (TKN). TKN extracts dynamic content from video frames in an unsupervised manner, reducing redundant feature computation. And, TKN uses an acceleration matrix to reduce the computational cost of attention and employs a parallel computing structure for prediction acceleration. To the best of our knowledge, TKN is the first real-time video prediction solution that achieves a prediction rate of 1,176 fps, significantly reducing computation costs while maintaining other performance. Qualitative and quantitative experiments on multiple datasets have demonstrated the superiority of our method, suggesting that TKN has great application potential.
summary: Video prediction is a complex time-series forecasting task with great potential in many use cases. However, traditional methods prioritize accuracy and overlook slow prediction speeds due to complex model structures, redundant information, and excessive GPU memory consumption. These methods often predict frames sequentially, making acceleration difficult and limiting their applicability in real-time scenarios like danger prediction and warning.Therefore, we propose a transformer-based keypoint prediction neural network (TKN). TKN extracts dynamic content from video frames in an unsupervised manner, reducing redundant feature computation. And, TKN uses an acceleration matrix to reduce the computational cost of attention and employs a parallel computing structure for prediction acceleration. To the best of our knowledge, TKN is the first real-time video prediction solution that achieves a prediction rate of 1,176 fps, significantly reducing computation costs while maintaining other performance. Qualitative and quantitative experiments on multiple datasets have demonstrated the superiority of our method, suggesting that TKN has great application potential.
abstract_zh: 视频预测是一项复杂的时间序列预测任务，在许多用例中具有巨大潜力。然而，由于模型结构复杂、信息冗余、GPU内存消耗过多，传统方法优先考虑准确性，而忽视了预测速度慢。这些方法通常顺序预测帧，导致加速困难，并限制了它们在危险预测和警告等实时场景中的适用性。因此，我们提出了一种基于 Transformer 的关键点预测神经网络（TKN）。 TKN 以无监督的方式从视频帧中提取动态内容，减少冗余特征计算。并且，TKN使用加速矩阵来降低注意力的计算成本，并采用并行计算结构来进行预测加速。据我们所知，TKN 是第一个实现 1,176 fps 预测速率的实时视频预测解决方案，在保持其他性能的同时显着降低了计算成本。对多个数据集的定性和定量实验证明了我们方法的优越性，表明 TKN 具有巨大的应用潜力。

AI.result: TKN在多个数据集上实现1,176 fps的预测速度，在保持性能的同时显著降低计算成本。
AI.conclusion: TKN是首个实现高效实时视频预测的解决方案，具有广泛的应用潜力。

search_text: TKN: Transformer-based Keypoint Prediction Network For Real-time Video Prediction TKN：基于 Transformer 的关键点预测网络，用于实时视频预测 Video prediction is a complex time-series forecasting task with great potential in many use cases. However, traditional methods prioritize accuracy and overlook slow prediction speeds due to complex model structures, redundant information, and excessive GPU memory consumption. These methods often predict frames sequentially, making acceleration difficult and limiting their applicability in real-time scenarios like danger prediction and warning.Therefore, we propose a transformer-based keypoint prediction neural network (TKN). TKN extracts dynamic content from video frames in an unsupervised manner, reducing redundant feature computation. And, TKN uses an acceleration matrix to reduce the computational cost of attention and employs a parallel computing structure for prediction acceleration. To the best of our knowledge, TKN is the first real-time video prediction solution that achieves a prediction rate of 1,176 fps, significantly reducing computation costs while maintaining other performance. Qualitative and quantitative experiments on multiple datasets have demonstrated the superiority of our method, suggesting that TKN has great application potential. 视频预测是一项复杂的时间序列预测任务，在许多用例中具有巨大潜力。然而，由于模型结构复杂、信息冗余、GPU内存消耗过多，传统方法优先考虑准确性，而忽视了预测速度慢。这些方法通常顺序预测帧，导致加速困难，并限制了它们在危险预测和警告等实时场景中的适用性。因此，我们提出了一种基于 Transformer 的关键点预测神经网络（TKN）。 TKN 以无监督的方式从视频帧中提取动态内容，减少冗余特征计算。并且，TKN使用加速矩阵来降低注意力的计算成本，并采用并行计算结构来进行预测加速。据我们所知，TKN 是第一个实现 1,176 fps 预测速率的实时视频预测解决方案，在保持其他性能的同时显着降低了计算成本。对多个数据集的定性和定量实验证明了我们方法的优越性，表明 TKN 具有巨大的应用潜力。 本文提出了一种基于Transformer的关键点预测网络TKN，用于实现实时视频预测。 Haoran Li,XiaoLu Li,Yihang Lin,Yanbin Hao,Haiyong Xie,Pengyuan Zhou,Yong Liao cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Qingtao Liu,Yu Cui,Qi Ye,Zhengnan Sun,Haoming Li,Gaofeng Li,Lin Shao,Jiming Chen
title: DexRepNet: Learning Dexterous Robotic Grasping Network with Geometric and Spatial Hand-Object Representations
title_zh: DexRepNet：学习具有几何和空间手部物体表示的灵巧机器人抓取网络
abstract: Robotic dexterous grasping is a challenging problem due to the high degree of freedom (DoF) and complex contacts of multi-fingered robotic hands. Existing deep reinforcement learning (DRL) based methods leverage human demonstrations to reduce sample complexity due to the high dimensional action space with dexterous grasping. However, less attention has been paid to hand-object interaction representations for high-level generalization. In this paper, we propose a novel geometric and spatial hand-object interaction representation, named DexRep, to capture dynamic object shape features and the spatial relations between hands and objects during grasping. DexRep comprises Occupancy Feature for rough shapes within sensing range by moving hands, Surface Feature for changing hand-object surface distances, and Local-Geo Feature for local geometric surface features most related to potential contacts. Based on the new representation, we propose a dexterous deep reinforcement learning method to learn a generalizable grasping policy DexRepNet. Experimental results show that our method outperforms baselines using existing representations for robotic grasping dramatically both in grasp success rate and convergence speed. It achieves a 93% grasping success rate on seen objects and higher than 80% grasping success rates on diverse objects of unseen categories in both simulation and real-world experiments.
summary: Robotic dexterous grasping is a challenging problem due to the high degree of freedom (DoF) and complex contacts of multi-fingered robotic hands. Existing deep reinforcement learning (DRL) based methods leverage human demonstrations to reduce sample complexity due to the high dimensional action space with dexterous grasping. However, less attention has been paid to hand-object interaction representations for high-level generalization. In this paper, we propose a novel geometric and spatial hand-object interaction representation, named DexRep, to capture dynamic object shape features and the spatial relations between hands and objects during grasping. DexRep comprises Occupancy Feature for rough shapes within sensing range by moving hands, Surface Feature for changing hand-object surface distances, and Local-Geo Feature for local geometric surface features most related to potential contacts. Based on the new representation, we propose a dexterous deep reinforcement learning method to learn a generalizable grasping policy DexRepNet. Experimental results show that our method outperforms baselines using existing representations for robotic grasping dramatically both in grasp success rate and convergence speed. It achieves a 93% grasping success rate on seen objects and higher than 80% grasping success rates on diverse objects of unseen categories in both simulation and real-world experiments.
abstract_zh: 由于多指机器人手的高自由度（DoF）和复杂的接触，机器人灵巧抓取是一个具有挑战性的问题。现有的基于深度强化学习（DRL）的方法利用人类演示来降低样本复杂性，因为高维动作空间具有灵巧的抓取能力。然而，对于高级泛化的手-对象交互表示的关注较少。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的几何和空间手与物体交互表示，称为 DexRep，以捕获动态物体形状特征以及抓取过程中手与物体之间的空间关系。 DexRep 包括通过移动手来感知范围内的粗糙形状的占用特征、用于改变手部物体表面距离的表面特征以及用于与潜在接触最相关的局部几何表面特征的局部地理特征。基于新的表示，我们提出了一种灵巧的深度强化学习方法来学习可泛化的抓取策略 DexRepNet。实验结果表明，我们的方法在抓取成功率和收敛速度方面都显着优于使用现有机器人抓取表示的基线。在模拟和现实实验中，它对可见物体的抓取成功率达到 93%，对不可见类别的各种物体的抓取成功率高于 80%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DexRepNet，一种基于几何和空间手-物交互表示的灵巧机械手抓取网络，以解决多指机械手的高自由度和复杂接触问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于深度强化学习的方法依赖人类演示减少样本复杂度，但缺乏对手-物交互表示的关注，导致高阶泛化能力不足。
AI.method: 设计DexRep表示，包含占用特征（Occupancy Feature）、表面距离特征（Surface Feature）和局部几何特征（Local-Geo Feature），结合动态物体形状与手-物空间关系，构建灵巧抓取策略DexRepNet。
AI.result: 在仿真和真实环境中，DexRepNet在已见物体上达到93%抓取成功率，未见类别物体成功率超80%，显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: DexRepNet通过创新的几何空间表示有效提升了机械手抓取的泛化能力与收敛速度，为灵巧操作提供了新思路。

authors_text: Tony Lindeberg
title: Covariance properties under natural image transformations for the generalized Gaussian derivative model for visual receptive fields
title_zh: 视觉感受野广义高斯导数模型自然图像变换下的协方差特性
abstract: This paper presents a theory for how geometric image transformations can be handled by a first layer of linear receptive fields, in terms of true covariance properties, which, in turn, enable geometric invariance properties at higher levels in the visual hierarchy. Specifically, we develop this theory for a generalized Gaussian derivative model for visual receptive fields, which is derived in an axiomatic manner from first principles, that reflect symmetry properties of the environment, complemented by structural assumptions to guarantee internally consistent treatment of image structures over multiple spatio-temporal scales. It is shown how the studied generalized Gaussian derivative model for visual receptive fields obeys true covariance properties under spatial scaling transformations, spatial affine transformations, Galilean transformations and temporal scaling transformations, implying that a vision system, based on image and video measurements in terms of the receptive fields according to this model, can to first order of approximation handle the image and video deformations between multiple views of objects delimited by smooth surfaces, as well as between multiple views of spatio-temporal events, under varying relative motions between the objects and events in the world and the observer. We conclude by describing implications of the presented theory for biological vision, regarding connections between the variabilities of the shapes of biological visual receptive fields and the variabilities of spatial and spatio-temporal image structures under natural image transformations.
summary: This paper presents a theory for how geometric image transformations can be handled by a first layer of linear receptive fields, in terms of true covariance properties, which, in turn, enable geometric invariance properties at higher levels in the visual hierarchy. Specifically, we develop this theory for a generalized Gaussian derivative model for visual receptive fields, which is derived in an axiomatic manner from first principles, that reflect symmetry properties of the environment, complemented by structural assumptions to guarantee internally consistent treatment of image structures over multiple spatio-temporal scales. It is shown how the studied generalized Gaussian derivative model for visual receptive fields obeys true covariance properties under spatial scaling transformations, spatial affine transformations, Galilean transformations and temporal scaling transformations, implying that a vision system, based on image and video measurements in terms of the receptive fields according to this model, can to first order of approximation handle the image and video deformations between multiple views of objects delimited by smooth surfaces, as well as between multiple views of spatio-temporal events, under varying relative motions between the objects and events in the world and the observer. We conclude by describing implications of the presented theory for biological vision, regarding connections between the variabilities of the shapes of biological visual receptive fields and the variabilities of spatial and spatio-temporal image structures under natural image transformations.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种理论，说明第一层线性感受野如何根据真实协方差属性来处理几何图像变换，从而在视觉层次结构中的更高级别上实现几何不变性属性。具体来说，我们为视觉感受野的广义高斯导数模型开发了这一理论，该模型以公理化的方式从第一原理推导出来，反映了环境的对称性，并辅以结构假设，以保证在多个时空尺度上对图像结构进行内部一致的处理。展示了所研究的视觉感受野的广义高斯导数模型如何在空间尺度变换、空间仿射变换、伽利略变换和时间尺度变换下遵循真正的协方差特性，这意味着视觉系统基于根据该模型的感受野的图像和视频测量，可以一阶近似处理由光滑表面界定的物体的多个视图之间以及物体的多个视图之间的图像和视频变形。时空事件，在世界中的物体和事件与观察者之间不同的相对运动下。最后，我们描述了所提出的生物视觉理论的含义，关于生物视觉感受野形状的可变性与自然图像变换下的空间和时空图像结构的可变性之间的联系。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了广义高斯导数模型在自然图像变换下的协方差特性，为视觉感受野如何处理几何变换提供了理论支持。
AI.motivation: 理解视觉系统如何通过感受野实现对图像几何变换的不变性，是构建鲁棒视觉模型和解释生物视觉机制的关键。
AI.method: 基于环境对称性公理推导广义高斯导数模型，结合多尺度结构假设，分析其在空间缩放、仿射变换、伽利略变换及时间缩放下的协方差性质。
AI.result: 证明该模型在多种几何变换下保持协方差特性，表明基于该模型的视觉系统可处理物体表面和时空事件在不同视角下的形变。
AI.conclusion: 理论揭示了生物视觉感受野形状变异与自然图像变换下结构变异之间的关联，为理解视觉系统的演化适应性提供新视角。

search_text: Covariance properties under natural image transformations for the generalized Gaussian derivative model for visual receptive fields 视觉感受野广义高斯导数模型自然图像变换下的协方差特性 This paper presents a theory for how geometric image transformations can be handled by a first layer of linear receptive fields, in terms of true covariance properties, which, in turn, enable geometric invariance properties at higher levels in the visual hierarchy. Specifically, we develop this theory for a generalized Gaussian derivative model for visual receptive fields, which is derived in an axiomatic manner from first principles, that reflect symmetry properties of the environment, complemented by structural assumptions to guarantee internally consistent treatment of image structures over multiple spatio-temporal scales. It is shown how the studied generalized Gaussian derivative model for visual receptive fields obeys true covariance properties under spatial scaling transformations, spatial affine transformations, Galilean transformations and temporal scaling transformations, implying that a vision system, based on image and video measurements in terms of the receptive fields according to this model, can to first order of approximation handle the image and video deformations between multiple views of objects delimited by smooth surfaces, as well as between multiple views of spatio-temporal events, under varying relative motions between the objects and events in the world and the observer. We conclude by describing implications of the presented theory for biological vision, regarding connections between the variabilities of the shapes of biological visual receptive fields and the variabilities of spatial and spatio-temporal image structures under natural image transformations. 本文提出了一种理论，说明第一层线性感受野如何根据真实协方差属性来处理几何图像变换，从而在视觉层次结构中的更高级别上实现几何不变性属性。具体来说，我们为视觉感受野的广义高斯导数模型开发了这一理论，该模型以公理化的方式从第一原理推导出来，反映了环境的对称性，并辅以结构假设，以保证在多个时空尺度上对图像结构进行内部一致的处理。展示了所研究的视觉感受野的广义高斯导数模型如何在空间尺度变换、空间仿射变换、伽利略变换和时间尺度变换下遵循真正的协方差特性，这意味着视觉系统基于根据该模型的感受野的图像和视频测量，可以一阶近似处理由光滑表面界定的物体的多个视图之间以及物体的多个视图之间的图像和视频变形。时空事件，在世界中的物体和事件与观察者之间不同的相对运动下。最后，我们描述了所提出的生物视觉理论的含义，关于生物视觉感受野形状的可变性与自然图像变换下的空间和时空图像结构的可变性之间的联系。 本文研究了广义高斯导数模型在自然图像变换下的协方差特性，为视觉感受野如何处理几何变换提供了理论支持。 Tony Lindeberg q-bio.NC,cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Yongwoo Lee,Minhyeok Lee,Suhwan Cho,Sangyoun Lee
title: Adaptive Graph Convolution Module for Salient Object Detection
title_zh: 用于显着目标检测的自适应图卷积模块
abstract: Salient object detection (SOD) is a task that involves identifying and segmenting the most visually prominent object in an image. Existing solutions can accomplish this use a multi-scale feature fusion mechanism to detect the global context of an image. However, as there is no consideration of the structures in the image nor the relations between distant pixels, conventional methods cannot deal with complex scenes effectively. In this paper, we propose an adaptive graph convolution module (AGCM) to overcome these limitations. Prototype features are initially extracted from the input image using a learnable region generation layer that spatially groups features in the image. The prototype features are then refined by propagating information between them based on a graph architecture, where each feature is regarded as a node. Experimental results show that the proposed AGCM dramatically improves the SOD performance both quantitatively and quantitatively.
summary: Salient object detection (SOD) is a task that involves identifying and segmenting the most visually prominent object in an image. Existing solutions can accomplish this use a multi-scale feature fusion mechanism to detect the global context of an image. However, as there is no consideration of the structures in the image nor the relations between distant pixels, conventional methods cannot deal with complex scenes effectively. In this paper, we propose an adaptive graph convolution module (AGCM) to overcome these limitations. Prototype features are initially extracted from the input image using a learnable region generation layer that spatially groups features in the image. The prototype features are then refined by propagating information between them based on a graph architecture, where each feature is regarded as a node. Experimental results show that the proposed AGCM dramatically improves the SOD performance both quantitatively and quantitatively.
abstract_zh: 显着对象检测 (SOD) 是一项涉及识别和分割图像中视觉上最突出的对象的任务。现有的解决方案可以使用多尺度特征融合机制来检测图像的全局上下文来实现这一点。然而，由于没有考虑图像中的结构以及远处像素之间的关系，传统方法无法有效处理复杂场景。在本文中，我们提出了一种自适应图卷积模块（AGCM）来克服这些限制。最初使用可学习区域生成层从输入图像中提取原型特征，该可学习区域生成层对图像中的特征进行空间分组。然后，通过基于图架构在原型特征之间传播信息来细化原型特征，其中每个特征被视为一个节点。实验结果表明，所提出的 AGCM 在数量和数量上都显着提高了 SOD 性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出自适应图卷积模块（AGCM），用于改进显著物体检测任务中复杂场景的处理效果。
AI.motivation: 现有方法未充分考虑图像结构及远距离像素关系，导致复杂场景下显著物体检测效果不佳。
AI.method: 通过可学习区域生成层提取原型特征，并基于图结构进行特征间信息传播，将每个特征视为图节点进行优化。
AI.result: 实验表明AGCM在定量指标和视觉效果上均显著提升显著物体检测性能。
AI.conclusion: AGCM通过建模像素间关系有效解决了复杂场景下的显著物体检测难题。

authors_text: Bingqi Shen,Shuwei Dai,Yuyin Chen,Rong Xiong,Yue Wang,Yanmei Jiao
title: GOOD: General Optimization-based Fusion for 3D Object Detection via LiDAR-Camera Object Candidates
title_zh: 好：通过 LiDAR 相机候​​选对象进行 3D 对象检测的基于通用优化的融合
abstract: 3D object detection serves as the core basis of the perception tasks in autonomous driving. Recent years have seen the rapid progress of multi-modal fusion strategies for more robust and accurate 3D object detection. However, current researches for robust fusion are all learning-based frameworks, which demand a large amount of training data and are inconvenient to implement in new scenes. In this paper, we propose GOOD, a general optimization-based fusion framework that can achieve satisfying detection without training additional models and is available for any combinations of 2D and 3D detectors to improve the accuracy and robustness of 3D detection. First we apply the mutual-sided nearest-neighbor probability model to achieve the 3D-2D data association. Then we design an optimization pipeline that can optimize different kinds of instances separately based on the matching result. Apart from this, the 3D MOT method is also introduced to enhance the performance aided by previous frames. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first optimization-based late fusion framework for multi-modal 3D object detection which can be served as a baseline for subsequent research. Experiments on both nuScenes and KITTI datasets are carried out and the results show that GOOD outperforms by 9.1\% on mAP score compared with PointPillars and achieves competitive results with the learning-based late fusion CLOCs.
summary: 3D object detection serves as the core basis of the perception tasks in autonomous driving. Recent years have seen the rapid progress of multi-modal fusion strategies for more robust and accurate 3D object detection. However, current researches for robust fusion are all learning-based frameworks, which demand a large amount of training data and are inconvenient to implement in new scenes. In this paper, we propose GOOD, a general optimization-based fusion framework that can achieve satisfying detection without training additional models and is available for any combinations of 2D and 3D detectors to improve the accuracy and robustness of 3D detection. First we apply the mutual-sided nearest-neighbor probability model to achieve the 3D-2D data association. Then we design an optimization pipeline that can optimize different kinds of instances separately based on the matching result. Apart from this, the 3D MOT method is also introduced to enhance the performance aided by previous frames. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first optimization-based late fusion framework for multi-modal 3D object detection which can be served as a baseline for subsequent research. Experiments on both nuScenes and KITTI datasets are carried out and the results show that GOOD outperforms by 9.1\% on mAP score compared with PointPillars and achieves competitive results with the learning-based late fusion CLOCs.
abstract_zh: 3D物体检测是自动驾驶感知任务的核心基础。近年来，多模态融合策略取得了快速进展，以实现更稳健、更准确的 3D 物体检测。然而，目前鲁棒融合的研究都是基于学习的框架，需要大量的训练数据，并且不方便在新的场景中实现。在本文中，我们提出了 GOOD，一种基于优化的通用融合框架，无需训练额外的模型即可实现令人满意的检测，并且可用于 2D 和 3D 检测器的任意组合，以提高 3D 检测的准确性和鲁棒性。首先我们应用双向最近邻概率模型来实现3D-2D数据关联。然后我们设计了一个优化管道，可以根据匹配结果分别优化不同类型的实例。除此之外，还引入了 3D MOT 方法来增强先前帧的性能。据我们所知，这是第一个基于优化的多模态 3D 物体检测后期融合框架，可以作为后续研究的基线。在 nuScenes 和 KITTI 数据集上进行了实验，结果表明，与 PointPillars 相比，GOOD 在 mAP 分数上表现优于 PointPillars 9.1%，并取得了与基于学习的后期融合 CLOC 竞争的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出GOOD，一种基于优化的多模态融合框架，用于提升3D目标检测的准确性和鲁棒性，无需额外训练模型。
AI.motivation: 现有基于学习的多模态融合方法依赖大量训练数据且难以适应新场景，亟需一种通用且无需额外训练的优化方法。
AI.method: 采用双向最近邻概率模型实现3D-2D数据关联，设计分实例优化流程，并引入3D MOT方法利用历史帧信息增强性能。
AI.result: 在nuScenes和KITTI数据集上，GOOD较PointPillars提升9.1% mAP，且性能与基于学习的CLOCs方法相当。
AI.conclusion: GOOD是首个通用优化型晚期融合框架，为后续研究提供了有效基准，具有广泛适用性。

authors_text: Trong-Thang Pham,Nhat Le,Tuong Do,Hung Nguyen,Erman Tjiputra,Quang D. Tran,Anh Nguyen
title: Style Transfer for 2D Talking Head Animation
title_zh: 2D 头部说话动画的风格迁移
abstract: Audio-driven talking head animation is a challenging research topic with many real-world applications. Recent works have focused on creating photo-realistic 2D animation, while learning different talking or singing styles remains an open problem. In this paper, we present a new method to generate talking head animation with learnable style references. Given a set of style reference frames, our framework can reconstruct 2D talking head animation based on a single input image and an audio stream. Our method first produces facial landmarks motion from the audio stream and constructs the intermediate style patterns from the style reference images. We then feed both outputs into a style-aware image generator to generate the photo-realistic and fidelity 2D animation. In practice, our framework can extract the style information of a specific character and transfer it to any new static image for talking head animation. The intensive experimental results show that our method achieves better results than recent state-of-the-art approaches qualitatively and quantitatively.
summary: Audio-driven talking head animation is a challenging research topic with many real-world applications. Recent works have focused on creating photo-realistic 2D animation, while learning different talking or singing styles remains an open problem. In this paper, we present a new method to generate talking head animation with learnable style references. Given a set of style reference frames, our framework can reconstruct 2D talking head animation based on a single input image and an audio stream. Our method first produces facial landmarks motion from the audio stream and constructs the intermediate style patterns from the style reference images. We then feed both outputs into a style-aware image generator to generate the photo-realistic and fidelity 2D animation. In practice, our framework can extract the style information of a specific character and transfer it to any new static image for talking head animation. The intensive experimental results show that our method achieves better results than recent state-of-the-art approaches qualitatively and quantitatively.
abstract_zh: 音频驱动的头部说话动画是一个具有挑战性的研究课题，具有许多实际应用。最近的工作重点是创建逼真的 2D 动画，而学习不同的说话或唱歌风格仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。在本文中，我们提出了一种使用可学习风格参考生成头部说话动画的新方法。给定一组风格参考帧，我们的框架可以基于单个输入图像和音频流重建 2D 头部说话动画。我们的方法首先从音频流中产生面部标志运动，并从风格参考图像构建中间风格模式。然后，我们将两个输出输入风格感知图像生成器，以生成逼真且保真度的 2D 动画。在实践中，我们的框架可以提取特定角色的风格信息并将其转移到任何新的静态图像以用于头部动画。大量的实验结果表明，我们的方法在定性和定量上都比最近最先进的方法取得了更好的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于可学习风格参考的2D talking head 动画生成方法，通过音频和静态图像生成具有特定风格的动态人脸动画。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在生成逼真2D动画方面取得进展，但如何学习并迁移不同说话/唱歌风格仍存在挑战，需探索更灵活的风格控制方案。
AI.method: 方法分为三步：1) 从音频生成面部关键点运动；2) 从风格参考帧提取中间风格模式；3) 将两者输入风格感知生成器合成最终动画，实现风格迁移。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在视觉质量和定量指标上均优于现有SOTA方法，能有效将目标角色风格迁移到任意静态图像中。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法通过解耦风格与内容实现灵活的风格迁移，为音频驱动动画生成提供了新思路，未来可扩展至更多应用场景。

Recent works have focused on creating photo-realistic 2D animation, while learning different talking or singing styles remains an open problem. In this paper, we present a new method to generate talking head animation with learnable style references. Given a set of style reference frames, our framework can reconstruct 2D talking head animation based on a single input image and an audio stream. Our method first produces facial landmarks motion from the audio stream and constructs the intermediate style patterns from the style reference images. We then feed both outputs into a style-aware image generator to generate the photo-realistic and fidelity 2D animation. In practice, our framework can extract the style information of a specific character and transfer it to any new static image for talking head animation. Tran,Anh Nguyen cs.CV

authors_text: Haozhe Wu,Jia Jia,Junliang Xing,Hongwei Xu,Xiangyuan Wang,Jelo Wang
title: MMFace4D: A Large-Scale Multi-Modal 4D Face Dataset for Audio-Driven 3D Face Animation
title_zh: MMFace4D：用于音频驱动 3D 面部动画的大规模多模态 4D 面部数据集
comment: 10 pages, 8 figures. This paper has been submitted to IEEE Transaction on MultiMedia, which is the extension of our MM2023 paper arXiv:2308.05428. The dataset is now publicly available, see Project page at https://wuhaozhe.github.io/mmface4d/
comments: 10 pages, 8 figures. This paper has been submitted to IEEE Transaction on MultiMedia, which is the extension of our MM2023 paper arXiv:2308.05428. The dataset is now publicly available, see Project page at https://wuhaozhe.github.io/mmface4d/
abstract: Audio-Driven Face Animation is an eagerly anticipated technique for applications such as VR/AR, games, and movie making. With the rapid development of 3D engines, there is an increasing demand for driving 3D faces with audio. However, currently available 3D face animation datasets are either scale-limited or quality-unsatisfied, which hampers further developments of audio-driven 3D face animation. To address this challenge, we propose MMFace4D, a large-scale multi-modal 4D (3D sequence) face dataset consisting of 431 identities, 35,904 sequences, and 3.9 million frames. MMFace4D exhibits two compelling characteristics: 1) a remarkably diverse set of subjects and corpus, encompassing actors spanning ages 15 to 68, and recorded sentences with durations ranging from 0.7 to 11.4 seconds. 2) It features synchronized audio and 3D mesh sequences with high-resolution face details. To capture the subtle nuances of 3D facial expressions, we leverage three synchronized RGBD cameras during the recording process. Upon MMFace4D, we construct a non-autoregressive framework for audio-driven 3D face animation. Our framework considers the regional and composite natures of facial animations, and surpasses contemporary state-of-the-art approaches both qualitatively and quantitatively. The code, model, and dataset will be publicly available.
summary: Audio-Driven Face Animation is an eagerly anticipated technique for applications such as VR/AR, games, and movie making. With the rapid development of 3D engines, there is an increasing demand for driving 3D faces with audio. However, currently available 3D face animation datasets are either scale-limited or quality-unsatisfied, which hampers further developments of audio-driven 3D face animation. To address this challenge, we propose MMFace4D, a large-scale multi-modal 4D (3D sequence) face dataset consisting of 431 identities, 35,904 sequences, and 3.9 million frames. MMFace4D exhibits two compelling characteristics: 1) a remarkably diverse set of subjects and corpus, encompassing actors spanning ages 15 to 68, and recorded sentences with durations ranging from 0.7 to 11.4 seconds. 2) It features synchronized audio and 3D mesh sequences with high-resolution face details. To capture the subtle nuances of 3D facial expressions, we leverage three synchronized RGBD cameras during the recording process. Upon MMFace4D, we construct a non-autoregressive framework for audio-driven 3D face animation. Our framework considers the regional and composite natures of facial animations, and surpasses contemporary state-of-the-art approaches both qualitatively and quantitatively. The code, model, and dataset will be publicly available.
abstract_zh: 音频驱动的面部动画是一项备受期待的技术，适用于 VR/AR、游戏和电影制作等应用。随着3D引擎的快速发展，用音频驱动3D人脸的需求越来越大。然而，目前可用的3D人脸动画数据集要么规模有限，要么质量不理想，这阻碍了音频驱动的3D人脸动画的进一步发展。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了 MMFace4D，这是一个大规模多模态 4D（3D 序列）人脸数据集，由 431 个身份、35,904 个序列和 390 万帧组成。 MMFace4D 表现出两个引人注目的特征：1）一组非常多样化的主题和语料库，涵盖年龄从 15 岁到 68 岁的演员，录制的句子持续时间从 0.7 到 11.4 秒不等。 2) 它具有同步音频和 3D 网格序列以及高分辨率面部细节。为了捕捉 3D 面部表情的细微差别，我们在录制过程中利用三个同步 RGBD 摄像机。在 MMFace4D 上，我们构建了一个用于音频驱动的 3D 面部动画的非自回归框架。我们的框架考虑了面部动画的区域性和复合性，并且在质量和数量上都超越了当代最先进的方法。代码、模型和数据集将公开。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MMFace4D，一个大规模多模态4D人脸数据集，用于音频驱动的3D人脸动画生成。
AI.motivation: 现有3D人脸动画数据集存在规模有限或质量不足的问题，难以支持音频驱动技术的发展，需构建更高质量且多样化的数据集。
AI.method: 通过三台同步RGBD相机捕捉高分辨率3D人脸细节，构建包含音频与3D网格序列的同步数据集，并设计非自回归框架处理面部动画的区域与复合特性。
AI.result: 数据集包含431个身份、35,904个序列及390万帧，框架在定性和定量指标上均优于现有方法，代码与模型将公开。
AI.conclusion: MMFace4D为音频驱动3D人脸动画提供了高质量数据支持，并通过新框架推动了该领域技术进步。

authors_text: Yuhao Lin,Haiming Xu,Lingqiao Liu,Jinan Zou,Javen Qinfeng Shi
title: Revisiting Image Reconstruction for Semi-supervised Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 重新审视半监督语义分割的图像重建
abstract: Autoencoding, which aims to reconstruct the input images through a bottleneck latent representation, is one of the classic feature representation learning strategies. It has been shown effective as an auxiliary task for semi-supervised learning but has become less popular as more sophisticated methods have been proposed in recent years. In this paper, we revisit the idea of using image reconstruction as the auxiliary task and incorporate it with a modern semi-supervised semantic segmentation framework. Surprisingly, we discover that such an old idea in semi-supervised learning can produce results competitive with state-of-the-art semantic segmentation algorithms. By visualizing the intermediate layer activations of the image reconstruction module, we show that the feature map channel could correlate well with the semantic concept, which explains why joint training with the reconstruction task is helpful for the segmentation task. Motivated by our observation, we further proposed a modification to the image reconstruction task, aiming to further disentangle the object clue from the background patterns. From experiment evaluation on various datasets, we show that using reconstruction as auxiliary loss can lead to consistent improvements in various datasets and methods. The proposed method can further lead to significant improvement in object-centric segmentation tasks.
summary: Autoencoding, which aims to reconstruct the input images through a bottleneck latent representation, is one of the classic feature representation learning strategies. It has been shown effective as an auxiliary task for semi-supervised learning but has become less popular as more sophisticated methods have been proposed in recent years. In this paper, we revisit the idea of using image reconstruction as the auxiliary task and incorporate it with a modern semi-supervised semantic segmentation framework. Surprisingly, we discover that such an old idea in semi-supervised learning can produce results competitive with state-of-the-art semantic segmentation algorithms. By visualizing the intermediate layer activations of the image reconstruction module, we show that the feature map channel could correlate well with the semantic concept, which explains why joint training with the reconstruction task is helpful for the segmentation task. Motivated by our observation, we further proposed a modification to the image reconstruction task, aiming to further disentangle the object clue from the background patterns. From experiment evaluation on various datasets, we show that using reconstruction as auxiliary loss can lead to consistent improvements in various datasets and methods. The proposed method can further lead to significant improvement in object-centric segmentation tasks.
abstract_zh: 自动编码旨在通过瓶颈潜在表示重建输入图像，是经典的特征表示学习策略之一。它已被证明作为半监督学习的辅助任务是有效的，但随着近年来提出更复杂的方法，它变得不那么受欢迎了。在本文中，我们重新审视使​​用图像重建作为辅助任务的想法，并将其与现代半监督语义分割框架相结合。令人惊讶的是，我们发现半监督学习中的这种古老想法可以产生与最先进的语义分割算法相媲美的结果。通过可视化图像重建模块的中间层激活，我们表明特征图通道可以与语义概念很好地相关，这解释了为什么与重建任务的联合训练有助于分割任务。受我们观察的启发，我们进一步提出了对图像重建任务的修改，旨在进一步将对象线索与背景图案分开。通过对各种数据集的实验评估，我们表明使用重建作为辅助损失可以导致各种数据集和方法的一致改进。所提出的方法可以进一步显着改进以对象为中心的分割任务。

AI.tldr: 本文重新审视图像重建作为半监督语义分割的辅助任务，并将其与现代框架结合，证明其有效性。
AI.motivation: 尽管图像重建在半监督学习中曾被广泛使用，但随着更复杂方法的出现逐渐被忽视。作者发现其仍具有潜力，尤其在特征解耦和语义关联方面。
AI.method: 将自编码器与半监督分割框架结合，通过可视化中间层激活验证特征图与语义的相关性，并提出改进的重建任务以分离物体与背景模式。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上实验表明，使用重建作为辅助损失可提升分割性能，尤其在以物体为中心的任务中效果显著。
AI.conclusion: 传统图像重建方法通过现代框架改进后，仍能有效提升半监督语义分割性能，尤其在特征解耦方面具有优势。
