search_text: Revisiting Image Reconstruction for Semi-supervised Semantic Segmentation 重新审视半监督语义分割的图像重建 Autoencoding, which aims to reconstruct the input images through a bottleneck latent representation, is one of the classic feature representation learning strategies. It has been shown effective as an auxiliary task for semi-supervised learning but has become less popular as more sophisticated methods have been proposed in recent years. In this paper, we revisit the idea of using image reconstruction as the auxiliary task and incorporate it with a modern semi-supervised semantic segmentation framework. Surprisingly, we discover that such an old idea in semi-supervised learning can produce results competitive with state-of-the-art semantic segmentation algorithms. By visualizing the intermediate layer activations of the image reconstruction module, we show that the feature map channel could correlate well with the semantic concept, which explains why joint training with the reconstruction task is helpful for the segmentation task. Motivated by our observation, we further proposed a modification to the image reconstruction task, aiming to further disentangle the object clue from the background patterns. From experiment evaluation on various datasets, we show that using reconstruction as auxiliary loss can lead to consistent improvements in various datasets and methods. The proposed method can further lead to significant improvement in object-centric segmentation tasks. 自动编码旨在通过瓶颈潜在表示重建输入图像，是经典的特征表示学习策略之一。它已被证明作为半监督学习的辅助任务是有效的，但随着近年来提出更复杂的方法，它变得不那么受欢迎了。在本文中，我们重新审视使​​用图像重建作为辅助任务的想法，并将其与现代半监督语义分割框架相结合。令人惊讶的是，我们发现半监督学习中的这种古老想法可以产生与最先进的语义分割算法相媲美的结果。通过可视化图像重建模块的中间层激活，我们表明特征图通道可以与语义概念很好地相关，这解释了为什么与重建任务的联合训练有助于分割任务。受我们观察的启发，我们进一步提出了对图像重建任务的修改，旨在进一步将对象线索与背景图案分开。通过对各种数据集的实验评估，我们表明使用重建作为辅助损失可以导致各种数据集和方法的一致改进。所提出的方法可以进一步显着改进以对象为中心的分割任务。 本文重新审视图像重建作为半监督语义分割的辅助任务，并将其与现代框架结合，证明其有效性。 Yuhao Lin,Haiming Xu,Lingqiao Liu,Jinan Zou,Javen Qinfeng Shi cs.CV

authors_text: Senqiao Yang,Jiarui Wu,Jiaming Liu,Xiaoqi Li,Qizhe Zhang,Mingjie Pan,Yulu Gan,Zehui Chen,Shanghang Zhang
title: Exploring Sparse Visual Prompt for Domain Adaptive Dense Prediction
title_zh: 探索域自适应密集预测的稀疏视觉提示
abstract: The visual prompts have provided an efficient manner in addressing visual cross-domain problems. In previous works, Visual Domain Prompt (VDP) first introduces domain prompts to tackle the classification Test-Time Adaptation (TTA) problem by warping image-level prompts on the input and fine-tuning prompts for each target domain. However, since the image-level prompts mask out continuous spatial details in the prompt-allocated region, it will suffer from inaccurate contextual information and limited domain knowledge extraction, particularly when dealing with dense prediction TTA problems. To overcome these challenges, we propose a novel Sparse Visual Domain Prompts (SVDP) approach, which holds minimal trainable parameters (e.g., 0.1\%) in the image-level prompt and reserves more spatial information of the input. To better apply SVDP in extracting domain-specific knowledge, we introduce the Domain Prompt Placement (DPP) method to adaptively allocates trainable parameters of SVDP on the pixels with large distribution shifts. Furthermore, recognizing that each target domain sample exhibits a unique domain shift, we design Domain Prompt Updating (DPU) strategy to optimize prompt parameters differently for each sample, facilitating efficient adaptation to the target domain. Extensive experiments were conducted on widely-used TTA and continual TTA benchmarks, and our proposed method achieves state-of-the-art performance in both semantic segmentation and depth estimation tasks.
summary: The visual prompts have provided an efficient manner in addressing visual cross-domain problems. In previous works, Visual Domain Prompt (VDP) first introduces domain prompts to tackle the classification Test-Time Adaptation (TTA) problem by warping image-level prompts on the input and fine-tuning prompts for each target domain. However, since the image-level prompts mask out continuous spatial details in the prompt-allocated region, it will suffer from inaccurate contextual information and limited domain knowledge extraction, particularly when dealing with dense prediction TTA problems. To overcome these challenges, we propose a novel Sparse Visual Domain Prompts (SVDP) approach, which holds minimal trainable parameters (e.g., 0.1\%) in the image-level prompt and reserves more spatial information of the input. To better apply SVDP in extracting domain-specific knowledge, we introduce the Domain Prompt Placement (DPP) method to adaptively allocates trainable parameters of SVDP on the pixels with large distribution shifts. Furthermore, recognizing that each target domain sample exhibits a unique domain shift, we design Domain Prompt Updating (DPU) strategy to optimize prompt parameters differently for each sample, facilitating efficient adaptation to the target domain. Extensive experiments were conducted on widely-used TTA and continual TTA benchmarks, and our proposed method achieves state-of-the-art performance in both semantic segmentation and depth estimation tasks.
abstract_zh: 视觉提示为解决视觉跨域问题提供了一种有效的方式。在之前的工作中，视觉域提示（VDP）首先引入域提示，通过在输入上扭曲图像级提示并针对每个目标域微调提示来解决分类测试时间适应（TTA）问题。然而，由于图像级提示掩盖了提示分配区域中的连续空间细节，因此它将遭受不准确的上下文信息和有限的领域知识提取的影响，特别是在处理密集预测 TTA 问题时。为了克服这些挑战，我们提出了一种新颖的稀疏视觉域提示（SVDP）方法，该方法在图像级提示中保留最小的可训练参数（例如 0.1%），并保留更多的输入空间信息。为了更好地应用 SVDP 来提取特定领域的知识，我们引入了域提示放置（DPP）方法，在分布偏移较大的像素上自适应地分配 SVDP 的可训练参数。此外，认识到每个目标域样本都表现出独特的域转移，我们设计了域提示更新（DPU）策略，以针对每个样本不同地优化提示参数，从而促进对目标域的有效适应。在广泛使用的 TTA 和连续 TTA 基准上进行了大量的实验，我们提出的方法在语义分割和深度估计任务中实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种稀疏视觉域提示（SVDP）方法，用于解决领域自适应密集预测任务中的跨领域问题。
AI.motivation: 传统视觉域提示（VDP）在密集预测任务中因掩码连续空间细节导致上下文信息不准确和领域知识提取有限，需改进以提升适应效果。
AI.method: 设计稀疏视觉域提示（SVDP）减少参数量并保留更多空间信息，结合领域提示放置（DPP）和领域提示更新（DPU）策略，自适应分配和优化提示参数。
AI.result: 在TTA和持续TTA基准测试中，SVDP在语义分割和深度估计任务中均达到最先进性能。
AI.conclusion: SVDP通过稀疏提示与自适应策略有效提升了目标领域的适应能力，为密集预测任务提供了高效解决方案。

authors_text: Shuai Fu,Tim Dwyer,Peter J. Stuckey,Jackson Wain,Jesse Linossier
title: ChameleonIDE: Untangling Type Errors Through Interactive Visualization and Exploration
title_zh: ChameleonIDE：通过交互式可视化和探索来理清类型错误
abstract: Dynamically typed programming languages are popular in education and the software industry. While presenting a low barrier to entry, they suffer from run-time type errors and longer-term problems in code quality and maintainability. Statically typed languages, while showing strength in these aspects, lack in learnability and ease of use. In particular, fixing type errors poses challenges to both novice users and experts. Further, compiler-type error messages are presented in a static way that is biased toward the first occurrence of the error in the program code. To help users resolve such type errors, we introduce ChameleonIDE, a type debugging tool that presents type errors to the user in an unbiased way, allowing them to explore the full context of where the errors could occur. Programmers can interactively verify the steps of reasoning against their intention. Through three studies involving real programmers, we showed that ChameleonIDE is more effective in fixing type errors than traditional text-based error messages. This difference is more significant in harder tasks. Further, programmers actively using ChameleonIDE's interactive features are shown to be more efficient in fixing type errors than passively reading the type error output.
summary: Dynamically typed programming languages are popular in education and the software industry. While presenting a low barrier to entry, they suffer from run-time type errors and longer-term problems in code quality and maintainability. Statically typed languages, while showing strength in these aspects, lack in learnability and ease of use. In particular, fixing type errors poses challenges to both novice users and experts. Further, compiler-type error messages are presented in a static way that is biased toward the first occurrence of the error in the program code. To help users resolve such type errors, we introduce ChameleonIDE, a type debugging tool that presents type errors to the user in an unbiased way, allowing them to explore the full context of where the errors could occur. Programmers can interactively verify the steps of reasoning against their intention. Through three studies involving real programmers, we showed that ChameleonIDE is more effective in fixing type errors than traditional text-based error messages. This difference is more significant in harder tasks. Further, programmers actively using ChameleonIDE's interactive features are shown to be more efficient in fixing type errors than passively reading the type error output.
abstract_zh: 动态类型编程语言在教育和软件行业很流行。虽然进入门槛较低，但它们会遭受运行时类型错误以及代码质量和可维护性方面的长期问题。静态类型语言虽然在这些方面表现出优势，但缺乏可学习性和易用性。特别是，修复类型错误对新手用户和专家都提出了挑战。此外，编译器类型的错误消息以静态方式呈现，该方式偏向于程序代码中第一次出现错误。为了帮助用户解决此类类型错误，我们引入了 ChameleonIDE，这是一种类型调试工具，它以公正的方式向用户呈现类型错误，使他们能够探索可能发生错误的完整上下文。程序员可以交互地验证推理步骤是否违背他们的意图。通过涉及真实程序员的三项研究，我们表明 ChameleonIDE 在修复类型错误方面比传统的基于文本的错误消息更有效。这种差异在较困难的任务中更为显着。此外，事实证明，主动使用 ChameleonIDE 交互功能的程序员在修复类型错误方面比被动读取类型错误输出更有效。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ChameleonIDE，一种通过交互式可视化和探索帮助程序员解决类型错误的工具。
AI.motivation: 动态类型语言存在运行时类型错误和代码质量下降问题，静态类型语言虽更可靠但学习门槛高。传统编译器错误信息静态且偏向首次错误，难以有效指导调试。
AI.method: 开发ChameleonIDE工具，以交互式可视化方式展示类型错误的全貌，允许程序员主动探索错误上下文并验证推理步骤。
AI.result: 三项实验证明，ChameleonIDE在修复类型错误上比传统文本错误信息更有效，尤其在复杂任务中效果显著，主动使用交互功能的程序员效率更高。
AI.conclusion: 交互式可视化工具能有效提升类型错误调试效率，ChameleonIDE通过支持主动探索和验证，显著优于传统静态错误提示方式。

search_text: ChameleonIDE: Untangling Type Errors Through Interactive Visualization and Exploration ChameleonIDE：通过交互式可视化和探索来理清类型错误 Dynamically typed programming languages are popular in education and the software industry. While presenting a low barrier to entry, they suffer from run-time type errors and longer-term problems in code quality and maintainability. Statically typed languages, while showing strength in these aspects, lack in learnability and ease of use. In particular, fixing type errors poses challenges to both novice users and experts. Further, compiler-type error messages are presented in a static way that is biased toward the first occurrence of the error in the program code. To help users resolve such type errors, we introduce ChameleonIDE, a type debugging tool that presents type errors to the user in an unbiased way, allowing them to explore the full context of where the errors could occur. Programmers can interactively verify the steps of reasoning against their intention. Through three studies involving real programmers, we showed that ChameleonIDE is more effective in fixing type errors than traditional text-based error messages. This difference is more significant in harder tasks. Further, programmers actively using ChameleonIDE's interactive features are shown to be more efficient in fixing type errors than passively reading the type error output. 动态类型编程语言在教育和软件行业很流行。虽然进入门槛较低，但它们会遭受运行时类型错误以及代码质量和可维护性方面的长期问题。静态类型语言虽然在这些方面表现出优势，但缺乏可学习性和易用性。特别是，修复类型错误对新手用户和专家都提出了挑战。此外，编译器类型的错误消息以静态方式呈现，该方式偏向于程序代码中第一次出现错误。为了帮助用户解决此类类型错误，我们引入了 ChameleonIDE，这是一种类型调试工具，它以公正的方式向用户呈现类型错误，使他们能够探索可能发生错误的完整上下文。程序员可以交互地验证推理步骤是否违背他们的意图。通过涉及真实程序员的三项研究，我们表明 ChameleonIDE 在修复类型错误方面比传统的基于文本的错误消息更有效。这种差异在较困难的任务中更为显着。此外，事实证明，主动使用 ChameleonIDE 交互功能的程序员在修复类型错误方面比被动读取类型错误输出更有效。 本文提出ChameleonIDE，一种通过交互式可视化和探索帮助程序员解决类型错误的工具。 Shuai Fu,Tim Dwyer,Peter J. Stuckey,Jackson Wain,Jesse Linossier cs.HC,cs.PL

authors_text: Ke Zou,Tian Lin,Xuedong Yuan,Haoyu Chen,Xiaojing Shen,Meng Wang,Huazhu Fu
title: Reliable Multimodality Eye Disease Screening via Mixture of Student's t Distributions
title_zh: 通过混合学生 t 分布进行可靠的多模态眼部疾病筛查
abstract: Multimodality eye disease screening is crucial in ophthalmology as it integrates information from diverse sources to complement their respective performances. However, the existing methods are weak in assessing the reliability of each unimodality, and directly fusing an unreliable modality may cause screening errors. To address this issue, we introduce a novel multimodality evidential fusion pipeline for eye disease screening, EyeMoSt, which provides a measure of confidence for unimodality and elegantly integrates the multimodality information from a multi-distribution fusion perspective. Specifically, our model estimates both local uncertainty for unimodality and global uncertainty for the fusion modality to produce reliable classification results. More importantly, the proposed mixture of Student's $t$ distributions adaptively integrates different modalities to endow the model with heavy-tailed properties, increasing robustness and reliability. Our experimental findings on both public and in-house datasets show that our model is more reliable than current methods. Additionally, EyeMost has the potential ability to serve as a data quality discriminator, enabling reliable decision-making for multimodality eye disease screening.
summary: Multimodality eye disease screening is crucial in ophthalmology as it integrates information from diverse sources to complement their respective performances. However, the existing methods are weak in assessing the reliability of each unimodality, and directly fusing an unreliable modality may cause screening errors. To address this issue, we introduce a novel multimodality evidential fusion pipeline for eye disease screening, EyeMoSt, which provides a measure of confidence for unimodality and elegantly integrates the multimodality information from a multi-distribution fusion perspective. Specifically, our model estimates both local uncertainty for unimodality and global uncertainty for the fusion modality to produce reliable classification results. More importantly, the proposed mixture of Student's $t$ distributions adaptively integrates different modalities to endow the model with heavy-tailed properties, increasing robustness and reliability. Our experimental findings on both public and in-house datasets show that our model is more reliable than current methods. Additionally, EyeMost has the potential ability to serve as a data quality discriminator, enabling reliable decision-making for multimodality eye disease screening.
abstract_zh: 多模态眼病筛查在眼科中至关重要，因为它整合了不同来源的信息以补充各自的表现。然而，现有方法在评估每个单模态的可靠性方面较弱，直接融合不可靠的模态可能会导致筛选错误。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了一种用于眼部疾病筛查的新型多模态证据融合管道，EyeMoSt，它提供了单模态的置信度度量，并从多分布融合的角度优雅地集成了多模态信息。具体来说，我们的模型估计单峰的局部不确定性和融合模态的全局不确定性，以产生可靠的分类结果。更重要的是，所提出的学生 $t$ 分布的混合自适应地集成了不同的模式，赋予模型重尾属性，从而提高了鲁棒性和可靠性。我们对公共和内部数据集的实验结果表明，我们的模型比当前的方法更可靠。此外，EyeMost 有潜力充当数据质量鉴别器，为多模态眼病筛查提供可靠的决策。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Student's t分布混合模型的多模态眼病筛查方法EyeMoSt，通过评估单模态可靠性并融合多模态信息提升筛查结果的可靠性。
AI.motivation: 现有多模态眼病筛查方法难以准确评估单模态可靠性，直接融合不可靠模态易导致误诊，需开发能有效衡量并融合多模态信息的可靠方法。
AI.method: 设计EyeMoSt框架，通过估计单模态局部不确定性与融合模态全局不确定性，结合Student's t分布混合模型实现自适应模态融合，增强模型鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在公开数据集和自建数据集实验中，该方法较现有技术更具可靠性，并展现出作为数据质量判别器的潜力。
AI.conclusion: 提出的混合Student's t分布方法有效提升了多模态眼病筛查的可靠性，为临床决策提供了更可信的多模态信息融合方案。

authors_text: Kuo Wang,Lingbo Liu,Yang Liu,Guanbin Li,Fan Zhou,Liang Lin
title: Urban Regional Function Guided Traffic Flow Prediction
title_zh: 城市区域功能引导的交通流预测
comment: 15 pages, 8 figures.This work has been accepted by Information Sciences
comments: 15 pages, 8 figures.This work has been accepted by Information Sciences
abstract: The prediction of traffic flow is a challenging yet crucial problem in spatial-temporal analysis, which has recently gained increasing interest. In addition to spatial-temporal correlations, the functionality of urban areas also plays a crucial role in traffic flow prediction. However, the exploration of regional functional attributes mainly focuses on adding additional topological structures, ignoring the influence of functional attributes on regional traffic patterns. Different from the existing works, we propose a novel module named POI-MetaBlock, which utilizes the functionality of each region (represented by Point of Interest distribution) as metadata to further mine different traffic characteristics in areas with different functions. Specifically, the proposed POI-MetaBlock employs a self-attention architecture and incorporates POI and time information to generate dynamic attention parameters for each region, which enables the model to fit different traffic patterns of various areas at different times. Furthermore, our lightweight POI-MetaBlock can be easily integrated into conventional traffic flow prediction models. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our module significantly improves the performance of traffic flow prediction and outperforms state-of-the-art methods that use metadata.
summary: The prediction of traffic flow is a challenging yet crucial problem in spatial-temporal analysis, which has recently gained increasing interest. In addition to spatial-temporal correlations, the functionality of urban areas also plays a crucial role in traffic flow prediction. However, the exploration of regional functional attributes mainly focuses on adding additional topological structures, ignoring the influence of functional attributes on regional traffic patterns. Different from the existing works, we propose a novel module named POI-MetaBlock, which utilizes the functionality of each region (represented by Point of Interest distribution) as metadata to further mine different traffic characteristics in areas with different functions. Specifically, the proposed POI-MetaBlock employs a self-attention architecture and incorporates POI and time information to generate dynamic attention parameters for each region, which enables the model to fit different traffic patterns of various areas at different times. Furthermore, our lightweight POI-MetaBlock can be easily integrated into conventional traffic flow prediction models. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our module significantly improves the performance of traffic flow prediction and outperforms state-of-the-art methods that use metadata.
abstract_zh: 交通流预测是时空分析中一个具有挑战性但又至关重要的问题，最近引起了越来越多的关注。除了时空相关性之外，城市地区的功能在交通流预测中也起着至关重要的作用。然而，区域功能属性的探索主要集中于添加额外的拓扑结构，忽视了功能属性对区域交通格局的影响。与现有的工作不同，我们提出了一种名为 POI-MetaBlock 的新颖模块，该模块利用每个区域的功能（以兴趣点分布表示）作为元数据，以进一步挖掘不同功能区域中的不同流量特征。具体来说，所提出的 POI-MetaBlock 采用自注意力架构，并结合 POI 和时间信息为每个区域生成动态注意力参数，这使得模型能够适应不同区域在不同时间的不同流量模式。此外，我们的轻量级 POI-MetaBlock 可以轻松集成到传统的交通流预测模型中。大量的实验表明，我们的模块显着提高了交通流预测的性能，并且优于使用元数据的最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于城市区域功能的交通流量预测方法
AI.motivation: 现有研究多关注时空相关性，忽视区域功能属性对交通模式的影响，需探索功能属性在预测中的作用
AI.method: 设计POI-MetaBlock模块，结合POI分布与时间信息，通过自注意力机制生成动态参数，捕捉不同区域的交通特征
AI.result: 实验表明模块显著提升预测准确率，优于现有方法
AI.conclusion: 证明区域功能属性有效提升预测效果，模块可集成到常规模型中

authors_text: Darshan Gera,Badveeti Naveen Siva Kumar,Bobbili Veerendra Raj Kumar,S Balasubramanian
title: ABAW : Facial Expression Recognition in the wild
title_zh: ABAW：野外面部表情识别
abstract: The fifth Affective Behavior Analysis in-the-wild (ABAW) competition has multiple challenges such as Valence-Arousal Estimation Challenge, Expression Classification Challenge, Action Unit Detection Challenge, Emotional Reaction Intensity Estimation Challenge. In this paper we have dealt only expression classification challenge using multiple approaches such as fully supervised, semi-supervised and noisy label approach. Our approach using noise aware model has performed better than baseline model by 10.46% and semi supervised model has performed better than baseline model by 9.38% and the fully supervised model has performed better than the baseline by 9.34%
summary: The fifth Affective Behavior Analysis in-the-wild (ABAW) competition has multiple challenges such as Valence-Arousal Estimation Challenge, Expression Classification Challenge, Action Unit Detection Challenge, Emotional Reaction Intensity Estimation Challenge. In this paper we have dealt only expression classification challenge using multiple approaches such as fully supervised, semi-supervised and noisy label approach. Our approach using noise aware model has performed better than baseline model by 10.46% and semi supervised model has performed better than baseline model by 9.38% and the fully supervised model has performed better than the baseline by 9.34%
abstract_zh: 第五届野外情感行为分析（ABAW）竞赛设有效价唤醒估计挑战、表情分类挑战、动作单元检测挑战、情绪反应强度估计挑战等多项挑战。在本文中，我们仅使用多种方法（例如完全监督、半监督和噪声标签方法）处理表达分类挑战。我们使用噪声感知模型的方法比基线模型的性能好 10.46%，半监督模型的性能比基线模型好 9.38%，完全监督模型的性能比基线好 9.34%

AI.tldr: 本文针对ABAW竞赛中的表情分类挑战，提出了多种方法进行解决。
AI.motivation: 野外环境下面部表情识别面临标注噪声和复杂场景的挑战，需探索更鲁棒的模型方法。
AI.method: 采用全监督、半监督学习及噪声感知模型三种方法处理表情分类任务。
AI.result: 噪声感知模型优于基线10.46%，半监督模型提升9.38%，全监督模型提升9.34%。
AI.conclusion: 噪声感知方法在处理标注噪声时表现最优，验证了其在野外表情识别中的有效性。

authors_text: Anh Duy Nguyen,Huy Hieu Pham,Huynh Thanh Trung,Quoc Viet Hung Nguyen,Thao Nguyen Truong,Phi Le Nguyen
title: High Accurate and Explainable Multi-Pill Detection Framework with Graph Neural Network-Assisted Multimodal Data Fusion
title_zh: 具有图神经网络辅助多模态数据融合的高精度且可解释的多药丸检测框架
comment: Under review by Plos ONE journal
comments: Under review by Plos ONE journal
abstract: Due to the significant resemblance in visual appearance, pill misuse is prevalent and has become a critical issue, responsible for one-third of all deaths worldwide. Pill identification, thus, is a crucial concern needed to be investigated thoroughly. Recently, several attempts have been made to exploit deep learning to tackle the pill identification problem. However, most published works consider only single-pill identification and fail to distinguish hard samples with identical appearances. Also, most existing pill image datasets only feature single pill images captured in carefully controlled environments under ideal lighting conditions and clean backgrounds. In this work, we are the first to tackle the multi-pill detection problem in real-world settings, aiming at localizing and identifying pills captured by users in a pill intake. Moreover, we also introduce a multi-pill image dataset taken in unconstrained conditions. To handle hard samples, we propose a novel method for constructing heterogeneous a priori graphs incorporating three forms of inter-pill relationships, including co-occurrence likelihood, relative size, and visual semantic correlation. We then offer a framework for integrating a priori with pills' visual features to enhance detection accuracy. Our experimental results have proved the robustness, reliability, and explainability of the proposed framework. Experimentally, it outperforms all detection benchmarks in terms of all evaluation metrics. Specifically, our proposed framework improves COCO mAP metrics by 9.4% over Faster R-CNN and 12.0% compared to vanilla YOLOv5. Our study opens up new opportunities for protecting patients from medication errors using an AI-based pill identification solution.

Pill identification, thus, is a crucial concern needed to be investigated thoroughly. Recently, several attempts have been made to exploit deep learning to tackle the pill identification problem. However, most published works consider only single-pill identification and fail to distinguish hard samples with identical appearances. Also, most existing pill image datasets only feature single pill images captured in carefully controlled environments under ideal lighting conditions and clean backgrounds. In this work, we are the first to tackle the multi-pill detection problem in real-world settings, aiming at localizing and identifying pills captured by users in a pill intake. Moreover, we also introduce a multi-pill image dataset taken in unconstrained conditions. To handle hard samples, we propose a novel method for constructing heterogeneous a priori graphs incorporating three forms of inter-pill relationships, including co-occurrence likelihood, relative size, and visual semantic correlation. We then offer a framework for integrating a priori with pills' visual features to enhance detection accuracy. Our experimental results have proved the robustness, reliability, and explainability of the proposed framework. Experimentally, it outperforms all detection benchmarks in terms of all evaluation metrics. Specifically, our proposed framework improves COCO mAP metrics by 9.4% over Faster R-CNN and 12.0% compared to vanilla YOLOv5. Our study opens up new opportunities for protecting patients from medication errors using an AI-based pill identification solution.
abstract_zh: 由于视觉外观显着相似，药物滥用十分普遍，并已成为一个严重问题，占全球死亡人数的三分之一。因此，药丸鉴定是需要彻底调查的一个关键问题。最近，人们尝试利用深度学习来解决药丸识别问题。然而，大多数已发表的作品仅考虑单药丸识别，无法区分具有相同外观的硬样品。此外，大多数现有的药丸图像数据集仅包含在理想照明条件和干净背景下精心控制的环境中捕获的单个药丸图像。在这项工作中，我们是第一个解决现实世界中的多药丸检测问题的人，旨在定位和识别用户在服用药丸时捕获的药丸。此外，我们还引入了在不受约束的条件下拍摄的多药丸图像数据集。为了处理困难样本，我们提出了一种构建异构先验图的新方法，该方法结合了三种形式的药丸间关系，包括共现可能性、相对大小和视觉语义相关性。然后，我们提供了一个将先验与药丸视觉特征相结合的框架，以提高检测准确性。我们的实验结果证明了所提出框架的稳健性、可靠性和可解释性。实验上，它在所有评估指标方面都优于所有检测基准。具体来说，我们提出的框架将 COCO mAP 指标比 Faster R-CNN 提高了 9.4%，与普通 YOLOv5 相比提高了 12.0%。我们的研究为使用基于人工智能的药丸识别解决方案保护患者免受用药错误带来了新的机会。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于图神经网络辅助多模态数据融合的高精度可解释多药片检测框架，旨在解决真实场景下的多药片识别问题。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多聚焦于单药片识别，难以处理外观相似的药片样本，且数据集多为受控环境下的单药片图像，无法满足实际用药场景需求。
AI.method: 构建包含共现概率、相对尺寸和视觉语义关联的异构先验图，通过图神经网络融合多模态数据，结合视觉特征提升检测精度。
AI.result: 在COCO数据集上，该框架较Faster R-CNN提升9.4% mAP，较YOLOv5提升12.0%，并在鲁棒性、可靠性和可解释性方面表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 本研究为基于AI的药品识别提供了新方法，有助于减少用药错误，推动医疗安全领域的技术应用。

authors_text: Yubiao Yue,Minghua Jiang,Xinyue Zhang,Jialong Xu,Huacong Ye,Fan Zhang,Zhenzhang Li,Yang Li
title: Mpox-AISM: AI-Mediated Super Monitoring for Mpox and Like-Mpox
title_zh: Mpox-AISM：人工智能介导的 Mpox 和 Like-Mpox 超级监测
abstract: Swift and accurate diagnosis for earlier-stage monkeypox (mpox) patients is crucial to avoiding its spread. However, the similarities between common skin disorders and mpox and the need for professional diagnosis unavoidably impaired the diagnosis of earlier-stage mpox patients and contributed to mpox outbreak. To address the challenge, we proposed "Super Monitoring", a real-time visualization technique employing artificial intelligence (AI) and Internet technology to diagnose earlier-stage mpox cheaply, conveniently, and quickly. Concretely, AI-mediated "Super Monitoring" (mpox-AISM) integrates deep learning models, data augmentation, self-supervised learning, and cloud services. According to publicly accessible datasets, mpox-AISM's Precision, Recall, Specificity, and F1-score in diagnosing mpox reach 99.3%, 94.1%, 99.9%, and 96.6%, respectively, and it achieves 94.51% accuracy in diagnosing mpox, six like-mpox skin disorders, and normal skin. With the Internet and communication terminal, mpox-AISM has the potential to perform real-time and accurate diagnosis for earlier-stage mpox in real-world scenarios, thereby preventing mpox outbreak.
summary: Swift and accurate diagnosis for earlier-stage monkeypox (mpox) patients is crucial to avoiding its spread. However, the similarities between common skin disorders and mpox and the need for professional diagnosis unavoidably impaired the diagnosis of earlier-stage mpox patients and contributed to mpox outbreak. To address the challenge, we proposed "Super Monitoring", a real-time visualization technique employing artificial intelligence (AI) and Internet technology to diagnose earlier-stage mpox cheaply, conveniently, and quickly. Concretely, AI-mediated "Super Monitoring" (mpox-AISM) integrates deep learning models, data augmentation, self-supervised learning, and cloud services. According to publicly accessible datasets, mpox-AISM's Precision, Recall, Specificity, and F1-score in diagnosing mpox reach 99.3%, 94.1%, 99.9%, and 96.6%, respectively, and it achieves 94.51% accuracy in diagnosing mpox, six like-mpox skin disorders, and normal skin. With the Internet and communication terminal, mpox-AISM has the potential to perform real-time and accurate diagnosis for earlier-stage mpox in real-world scenarios, thereby preventing mpox outbreak.
abstract_zh: 对早期猴痘 (mpox) 患者进行快速、准确的诊断对于避免其传播至关重要。然而，常见皮肤病与MPOX的相似性以及专业诊断的需要不可避免地损害了早期MPOX患者的诊断并导致MPOX的爆发。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了“超级监测”，一种利用人工智能（AI）和互联网技术的实时可视化技术，可以廉价、方便、快速地诊断早期MPOX。具体来说，人工智能介导的“超级监控”（mpox-AISM）集成了深度学习模型、数据增强、自我监督学习和云服务。根据公开数据集，mpox-AISM 在诊断 mpox 方面的精确度、召回率、特异性和 F1 分数分别达到 99.3%、94.1%、99.9% 和 96.6%，在诊断 mpox、六种类似 mpox 皮肤病和正常皮肤方面达到 94.51% 的准确率。借助互联网和通信终端，mpox-AISM有可能在现实场景中对早期mpox进行实时、准确的诊断，从而预防mpox的爆发。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于人工智能的实时可视化技术Mpox-AISM，用于廉价、便捷、快速地诊断早期猴痘（mpox）患者。
AI.motivation: 早期猴痘患者的快速准确诊断对于防止其传播至关重要，但常见皮肤病与猴痘的相似性及需专业诊断的限制导致早期诊断困难，进而加剧疫情爆发风险。
AI.method: Mpox-AISM整合深度学习模型、数据增强、自监督学习和云服务，利用公开数据集进行训练与验证。
AI.result: 在诊断猴痘时，Mpox-AISM的精确率、召回率、特异性及F1分数分别达到99.3%、94.1%、99.9%和96.6%，在诊断猴痘、六种类似猴痘皮肤病及正常皮肤时准确率达94.51%。
AI.conclusion: Mpox-AISM通过互联网和通信终端可实现早期猴痘的实时准确诊断，具有在现实场景中预防猴痘爆发的潜力。

search_text: Mpox-AISM: AI-Mediated Super Monitoring for Mpox and Like-Mpox Mpox-AISM：人工智能介导的 Mpox 和 Like-Mpox 超级监测 Swift and accurate diagnosis for earlier-stage monkeypox (mpox) patients is crucial to avoiding its spread. However, the similarities between common skin disorders and mpox and the need for professional diagnosis unavoidably impaired the diagnosis of earlier-stage mpox patients and contributed to mpox outbreak. To address the challenge, we proposed "Super Monitoring", a real-time visualization technique employing artificial intelligence (AI) and Internet technology to diagnose earlier-stage mpox cheaply, conveniently, and quickly. Concretely, AI-mediated "Super Monitoring" (mpox-AISM) integrates deep learning models, data augmentation, self-supervised learning, and cloud services. According to publicly accessible datasets, mpox-AISM's Precision, Recall, Specificity, and F1-score in diagnosing mpox reach 99.3%, 94.1%, 99.9%, and 96.6%, respectively, and it achieves 94.51% accuracy in diagnosing mpox, six like-mpox skin disorders, and normal skin. With the Internet and communication terminal, mpox-AISM has the potential to perform real-time and accurate diagnosis for earlier-stage mpox in real-world scenarios, thereby preventing mpox outbreak. 对早期猴痘 (mpox) 患者进行快速、准确的诊断对于避免其传播至关重要。然而，常见皮肤病与MPOX的相似性以及专业诊断的需要不可避免地损害了早期MPOX患者的诊断并导致MPOX的爆发。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了“超级监测”，一种利用人工智能（AI）和互联网技术的实时可视化技术，可以廉价、方便、快速地诊断早期MPOX。具体来说，人工智能介导的“超级监控”（mpox-AISM）集成了深度学习模型、数据增强、自我监督学习和云服务。根据公开数据集，mpox-AISM 在诊断 mpox 方面的精确度、召回率、特异性和 F1 分数分别达到 99.3%、94.1%、99.9% 和 96.6%，在诊断 mpox、六种类似 mpox 皮肤病和正常皮肤方面达到 94.51% 的准确率。借助互联网和通信终端，mpox-AISM有可能在现实场景中对早期mpox进行实时、准确的诊断，从而预防mpox的爆发。 本文提出了一种基于人工智能的实时可视化技术Mpox-AISM，用于廉价、便捷、快速地诊断早期猴痘（mpox）患者。 Yubiao Yue,Minghua Jiang,Xinyue Zhang,Jialong Xu,Huacong Ye,Fan Zhang,Zhenzhang Li,Yang Li eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Daehan Kim,Minseok Seo,Kwanyong Park,Inkyu Shin,Sanghyun Woo,In-So Kweon,Dong-Geol Choi
title: Bidirectional Domain Mixup for Domain Adaptive Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 用于域自适应语义分割的双向域混合
abstract: Mixup provides interpolated training samples and allows the model to obtain smoother decision boundaries for better generalization. The idea can be naturally applied to the domain adaptation task, where we can mix the source and target samples to obtain domain-mixed samples for better adaptation. However, the extension of the idea from classification to segmentation (i.e., structured output) is nontrivial. This paper systematically studies the impact of mixup under the domain adaptaive semantic segmentation task and presents a simple yet effective mixup strategy called Bidirectional Domain Mixup (BDM). In specific, we achieve domain mixup in two-step: cut and paste. Given the warm-up model trained from any adaptation techniques, we forward the source and target samples and perform a simple threshold-based cut out of the unconfident regions (cut). After then, we fill-in the dropped regions with the other domain region patches (paste). In doing so, we jointly consider class distribution, spatial structure, and pseudo label confidence. Based on our analysis, we found that BDM leaves domain transferable regions by cutting, balances the dataset-level class distribution while preserving natural scene context by pasting. We coupled our proposal with various state-of-the-art adaptation models and observe significant improvement consistently. We also provide extensive ablation experiments to empirically verify our main components of the framework. Visit our project page with the code at https://sites.google.com/view/bidirectional-domain-mixup
summary: Mixup provides interpolated training samples and allows the model to obtain smoother decision boundaries for better generalization. The idea can be naturally applied to the domain adaptation task, where we can mix the source and target samples to obtain domain-mixed samples for better adaptation. However, the extension of the idea from classification to segmentation (i.e., structured output) is nontrivial. This paper systematically studies the impact of mixup under the domain adaptaive semantic segmentation task and presents a simple yet effective mixup strategy called Bidirectional Domain Mixup (BDM). In specific, we achieve domain mixup in two-step: cut and paste. Given the warm-up model trained from any adaptation techniques, we forward the source and target samples and perform a simple threshold-based cut out of the unconfident regions (cut). After then, we fill-in the dropped regions with the other domain region patches (paste). In doing so, we jointly consider class distribution, spatial structure, and pseudo label confidence. Based on our analysis, we found that BDM leaves domain transferable regions by cutting, balances the dataset-level class distribution while preserving natural scene context by pasting. We coupled our proposal with various state-of-the-art adaptation models and observe significant improvement consistently. We also provide extensive ablation experiments to empirically verify our main components of the framework. Visit our project page with the code at https://sites.google.com/view/bidirectional-domain-mixup
abstract_zh: Mixup 提供插值训练样本，并允许模型获得更平滑的决策边界，以实现更好的泛化。这个想法可以自然地应用于域适应任务，我们可以混合源样本和目标样本以获得域混合样本以实现更好的适应。然而，将这个想法从分类扩展到分割（即结构化输出）是很重要的。本文系统地研究了域自适应语义分割任务下混合的影响，并提出了一种简单而有效的混合策略，称为双向域混合（BDM）。具体来说，我们通过两步实现域混合：剪切和粘贴。给定通过任何适应技术训练的预热模型，我们转发源样本和目标样本，并对不自信区域执行简单的基于阈值的剪切（剪切）。之后，我们用其他域区域补丁填充删除的区域（粘贴）。在此过程中，我们共同考虑类分布、空间结构和伪标签置信度。根据我们的分析，我们发现 BDM 通过剪切留下域可转移区域，平衡数据集级别的类分布，同时通过粘贴保留自然场景上下文。我们将我们的提案与各种最先进的适应模型结合起来，并持续观察到显着的改进。我们还提供广泛的消融实验来凭经验验证我们框架的主要组成部分。使用代码访问我们的项目页面：https://sites.google.com/view/bidirection-domain-mixup

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为双向领域混合（BDM）的策略，用于改进领域自适应语义分割任务中的模型泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 传统Mixup方法在分类任务中有效，但直接应用于分割任务时面临结构化输出的挑战，需考虑类别分布、空间结构和伪标签置信度的平衡。
AI.method: BDM通过两步法实现领域混合：首先基于置信度阈值裁剪源/目标域的不确定区域（cut），再用另一域的区域补全（paste），同时保持类别分布和场景上下文。
AI.result: 与多种先进自适应模型结合后显著提升性能，消融实验证明方法各组件的有效性。
AI.conclusion: BDM通过结构化混合策略有效提升领域自适应分割效果，为相关研究提供通用且高效的解决方案。

authors_text: Dongcheng Zou,Hao Peng,Xiang Huang,Renyu Yang,Jianxin Li,Jia Wu,Chunyang Liu,Philip S. Yu
title: SE-GSL: A General and Effective Graph Structure Learning Framework through Structural Entropy Optimization
title_zh: SE-GSL：通过结构熵优化的通用且有效的图结构学习框架
abstract: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) are de facto solutions to structural data learning. However, it is susceptible to low-quality and unreliable structure, which has been a norm rather than an exception in real-world graphs. Existing graph structure learning (GSL) frameworks still lack robustness and interpretability. This paper proposes a general GSL framework, SE-GSL, through structural entropy and the graph hierarchy abstracted in the encoding tree. Particularly, we exploit the one-dimensional structural entropy to maximize embedded information content when auxiliary neighbourhood attributes are fused to enhance the original graph. A new scheme of constructing optimal encoding trees is proposed to minimize the uncertainty and noises in the graph whilst assuring proper community partition in hierarchical abstraction. We present a novel sample-based mechanism for restoring the graph structure via node structural entropy distribution. It increases the connectivity among nodes with larger uncertainty in lower-level communities. SE-GSL is compatible with various GNN models and enhances the robustness towards noisy and heterophily structures. Extensive experiments show significant improvements in the effectiveness and robustness of structure learning and node representation learning.
summary: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) are de facto solutions to structural data learning. However, it is susceptible to low-quality and unreliable structure, which has been a norm rather than an exception in real-world graphs. Existing graph structure learning (GSL) frameworks still lack robustness and interpretability. This paper proposes a general GSL framework, SE-GSL, through structural entropy and the graph hierarchy abstracted in the encoding tree. Particularly, we exploit the one-dimensional structural entropy to maximize embedded information content when auxiliary neighbourhood attributes are fused to enhance the original graph. A new scheme of constructing optimal encoding trees is proposed to minimize the uncertainty and noises in the graph whilst assuring proper community partition in hierarchical abstraction. We present a novel sample-based mechanism for restoring the graph structure via node structural entropy distribution. It increases the connectivity among nodes with larger uncertainty in lower-level communities. SE-GSL is compatible with various GNN models and enhances the robustness towards noisy and heterophily structures. Extensive experiments show significant improvements in the effectiveness and robustness of structure learning and node representation learning.
abstract_zh: 图神经网络（GNN）是结构数据学习事实上的解决方案。然而，它很容易受到低质量和不可靠结构的影响，这在现实世界的图中是一种常态，而不是例外。现有的图结构学习（GSL）框架仍然缺乏鲁棒性和可解释性。本文通过结构熵和编码树中抽象的图层次结构，提出了一种通用的GSL框架SE-GSL。特别是，当融合辅助邻域属性来增强原始图时，我们利用一维结构熵来最大化嵌入信息内容。提出了一种构建最佳编码树的新方案，以最大限度地减少图中的不确定性和噪声，同时确保分层抽象中正确的社区划分。我们提出了一种新颖的基于样本的机制，用于通过节点结构熵分布恢复图结构。它增加了较低级别社区中不确定性较大的节点之间的连通性。 SE-GSL 与各种 GNN 模型兼容，增强了对噪声和异质结构的鲁棒性。大量的实验表明结构学习和节点表示学习的有效性和鲁棒性有了显着的提高。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过结构熵优化的通用且高效的图结构学习框架SE-GSL，以提升图神经网络在噪声和不可靠图结构下的鲁棒性和可解释性。
AI.motivation: 现有图结构学习方法在处理低质量、噪声或异质性图结构时缺乏鲁棒性和可解释性，亟需一种通用框架来增强图结构学习的稳定性与有效性。
AI.method: 通过结构熵最大化嵌入信息内容，结合辅助邻域属性增强原始图；提出基于编码树的优化构建方案以降低噪声并保证层次化社区划分；设计基于节点结构熵分布的样本机制恢复图结构，增强不确定社区节点的连通性。
AI.result: 实验表明，SE-GSL在结构学习和节点表示学习任务中显著提升了鲁棒性，尤其在噪声和异质性图结构上表现优异，且兼容多种GNN模型。
AI.conclusion: SE-GSL通过结构熵优化和层次化编码树设计，有效解决了图结构学习中的噪声敏感性和可解释性问题，为通用图结构学习提供了新思路。

search_text: SE-GSL: A General and Effective Graph Structure Learning Framework through Structural Entropy Optimization SE-GSL：通过结构熵优化的通用且有效的图结构学习框架 Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) are de facto solutions to structural data learning. However, it is susceptible to low-quality and unreliable structure, which has been a norm rather than an exception in real-world graphs. Existing graph structure learning (GSL) frameworks still lack robustness and interpretability. This paper proposes a general GSL framework, SE-GSL, through structural entropy and the graph hierarchy abstracted in the encoding tree. Particularly, we exploit the one-dimensional structural entropy to maximize embedded information content when auxiliary neighbourhood attributes are fused to enhance the original graph. A new scheme of constructing optimal encoding trees is proposed to minimize the uncertainty and noises in the graph whilst assuring proper community partition in hierarchical abstraction. We present a novel sample-based mechanism for restoring the graph structure via node structural entropy distribution. It increases the connectivity among nodes with larger uncertainty in lower-level communities. SE-GSL is compatible with various GNN models and enhances the robustness towards noisy and heterophily structures. Extensive experiments show significant improvements in the effectiveness and robustness of structure learning and node representation learning. 图神经网络（GNN）是结构数据学习事实上的解决方案。然而，它很容易受到低质量和不可靠结构的影响，这在现实世界的图中是一种常态，而不是例外。现有的图结构学习（GSL）框架仍然缺乏鲁棒性和可解释性。本文通过结构熵和编码树中抽象的图层次结构，提出了一种通用的GSL框架SE-GSL。特别是，当融合辅助邻域属性来增强原始图时，我们利用一维结构熵来最大化嵌入信息内容。提出了一种构建最佳编码树的新方案，以最大限度地减少图中的不确定性和噪声，同时确保分层抽象中正确的社区划分。我们提出了一种新颖的基于样本的机制，用于通过节点结构熵分布恢复图结构。它增加了较低级别社区中不确定性较大的节点之间的连通性。 SE-GSL 与各种 GNN 模型兼容，增强了对噪声和异质结构的鲁棒性。大量的实验表明结构学习和节点表示学习的有效性和鲁棒性有了显着的提高。 本文提出了一种通过结构熵优化的通用且高效的图结构学习框架SE-GSL，以提升图神经网络在噪声和不可靠图结构下的鲁棒性和可解释性。 Dongcheng Zou,Hao Peng,Xiang Huang,Renyu Yang,Jianxin Li,Jia Wu,Chunyang Liu,Philip S. authors_text: Xuanyu Zhang,Bin Chen,Wenzhen Zou,Shuai Liu,Yongbing Zhang,Ruiqin Xiong,Jian Zhang
title: Progressive Content-aware Coded Hyperspectral Compressive Imaging
title_zh: 渐进式内容感知编码高光谱压缩成像
comment: a novel hyperspectral snapshot compressive imaging and restoration framework
comments: a novel hyperspectral snapshot compressive imaging and restoration framework
abstract: Hyperspectral imaging plays a pivotal role in a wide range of applications, like remote sensing, medicine, and cytology. By acquiring 3D hyperspectral images (HSIs) via 2D sensors, the coded aperture snapshot spectral imaging (CASSI) has achieved great success due to its hardware-friendly implementation and fast imaging speed. However, for some less spectrally sparse scenes, single snapshot and unreasonable coded aperture design tend to make HSI recovery more ill-posed and yield poor spatial and spectral fidelity. In this paper, we propose a novel Progressive Content-Aware CASSI framework, dubbed PCA-CASSI, which captures HSIs with multiple optimized content-aware coded apertures and fuses all the snapshots for reconstruction progressively. Simultaneously, by mapping the Range-Null space Decomposition (RND) into a deep network with several phases, an RND-HRNet is proposed for HSI recovery. Each recovery phase can fully exploit the hidden physical information in the coded apertures via explicit $\mathcal{R}$$-$$\mathcal{N}$ decomposition and explore the spatial-spectral correlation by dual transformer blocks. Our method is validated to surpass other state-of-the-art methods on both multiple- and single-shot HSI imaging tasks by large margins.
summary: Hyperspectral imaging plays a pivotal role in a wide range of applications, like remote sensing, medicine, and cytology. By acquiring 3D hyperspectral images (HSIs) via 2D sensors, the coded aperture snapshot spectral imaging (CASSI) has achieved great success due to its hardware-friendly implementation and fast imaging speed. However, for some less spectrally sparse scenes, single snapshot and unreasonable coded aperture design tend to make HSI recovery more ill-posed and yield poor spatial and spectral fidelity. In this paper, we propose a novel Progressive Content-Aware CASSI framework, dubbed PCA-CASSI, which captures HSIs with multiple optimized content-aware coded apertures and fuses all the snapshots for reconstruction progressively. Simultaneously, by mapping the Range-Null space Decomposition (RND) into a deep network with several phases, an RND-HRNet is proposed for HSI recovery. Each recovery phase can fully exploit the hidden physical information in the coded apertures via explicit $\mathcal{R}$$-$$\mathcal{N}$ decomposition and explore the spatial-spectral correlation by dual transformer blocks. Our method is validated to surpass other state-of-the-art methods on both multiple- and single-shot HSI imaging tasks by large margins.
abstract_zh: 高光谱成像在遥感、医学和细胞学等广泛应用中发挥着关键作用。通过2D传感器获取3D高光谱图像（HSI），编码孔径快照光谱成像（CASSI）由于其硬件友好的实现和快速的成像速度而取得了巨大的成功。然而，对于一些光谱稀疏的场景，单一快照和不合理的编码孔径设计往往会使HSI恢复更加不适定，并产生较差的空间和光谱保真度。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的渐进式内容感知CASSI框架，称为PCA-CASSI，它捕获具有多个优化的内容感知编码孔径的HSI，并融合所有快照以逐步重建。同时，通过将范围零空间分解（RND）映射到具有多个阶段的深度网络，提出了用于 HSI 恢复的 RND-HRNet。每个恢复阶段都可以通过显式 $\mathcal{R}$$-$$\mathcal{N}$ 分解充分利用编码孔径中隐藏的物理信息，并通过双变换器块探索空间频谱相关性。经过验证，我们的方法在多次和单次 HSI 成像任务上都大幅超越了其他最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种渐进式内容感知的编码高光谱压缩成像框架（PCA-CASSI），通过多优化编码孔径和RND-HRNet网络提升高光谱图像重建质量。
AI.motivation: 传统CASSI方法在非稀疏光谱场景下存在重建病态问题，导致空谱保真度不足，需改进编码孔径设计和重建算法。
AI.method: 设计PCA-CASSI框架，采用多优化内容感知编码孔径分步融合快照，并提出RND-HRNet网络通过显式R-N分解和双Transformer块挖掘空谱相关性。
AI.result: 在单次和多次快照任务中，PCA-CASSI显著优于现有最先进方法，重建精度和空谱保真度大幅提升。
AI.conclusion: PCA-CASSI通过内容感知编码与深度网络结合，有效解决了非稀疏场景下的高光谱成像重建难题。

authors_text: Weilai Xiang,Hongyu Yang,Di Huang,Yunhong Wang
title: Denoising Diffusion Autoencoders are Unified Self-supervised Learners
title_zh: 去噪扩散自动编码器是统一的自监督学习器
abstract: Inspired by recent advances in diffusion models, which are reminiscent of denoising autoencoders, we investigate whether they can acquire discriminative representations for classification via generative pre-training. This paper shows that the networks in diffusion models, namely denoising diffusion autoencoders (DDAE), are unified self-supervised learners: by pre-training on unconditional image generation, DDAE has already learned strongly linear-separable representations within its intermediate layers without auxiliary encoders, thus making diffusion pre-training emerge as a general approach for generative-and-discriminative dual learning. To validate this, we conduct linear probe and fine-tuning evaluations. Our diffusion-based approach achieves 95.9% and 50.0% linear evaluation accuracies on CIFAR-10 and Tiny-ImageNet, respectively, and is comparable to contrastive learning and masked autoencoders for the first time. Transfer learning from ImageNet also confirms the suitability of DDAE for Vision Transformers, suggesting the potential to scale DDAEs as unified foundation models. Code is available at github.com/FutureXiang/ddae.
summary: Inspired by recent advances in diffusion models, which are reminiscent of denoising autoencoders, we investigate whether they can acquire discriminative representations for classification via generative pre-training. This paper shows that the networks in diffusion models, namely denoising diffusion autoencoders (DDAE), are unified self-supervised learners: by pre-training on unconditional image generation, DDAE has already learned strongly linear-separable representations within its intermediate layers without auxiliary encoders, thus making diffusion pre-training emerge as a general approach for generative-and-discriminative dual learning. To validate this, we conduct linear probe and fine-tuning evaluations. Our diffusion-based approach achieves 95.9% and 50.0% linear evaluation accuracies on CIFAR-10 and Tiny-ImageNet, respectively, and is comparable to contrastive learning and masked autoencoders for the first time. Transfer learning from ImageNet also confirms the suitability of DDAE for Vision Transformers, suggesting the potential to scale DDAEs as unified foundation models. Code is available at github.com/FutureXiang/ddae.
abstract_zh: 受扩散模型最新进展的启发（这让人想起去噪自动编码器），我们研究了它们是否可以通过生成预训练获得用于分类的判别表示。本文表明，扩散模型中的网络，即去噪扩散自动编码器（DDAE），是统一的自监督学习器：通过对无条件图像生成的预训练，DDAE 已经在其中间层中学习了强线性可分离表示，而无需辅助编码器，从而使扩散预训练成为生成和判别双重学习的通用方法。为了验证这一点，我们进行了线性探针和微调评估。我们基于扩散的方法在 CIFAR-10 和 Tiny-ImageNet 上分别实现了 95.9% 和 50.0% 的线性评估精度，并且首次与对比学习和掩模自动编码器相当。 Transfer learning from ImageNet also confirms the suitability of DDAE for Vision Transformers, suggesting the potential to scale DDAEs as unified foundation models.代码可在 github.com/FutureXiang/ddae 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文研究去噪扩散自编码器（DDAE）是否能通过生成式预训练获得判别性表示用于分类任务，并验证其作为统一自监督学习方法的有效性。
AI.motivation: 受扩散模型进展启发，探索生成式预训练能否替代对比学习等方法，实现无需辅助编码器的自监督表征学习。
AI.method: 通过无条件图像生成预训练DDAE，利用其中间层的线性可分表征进行线性探针和微调评估，并测试在Vision Transformers上的迁移学习效果。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10和Tiny-ImageNet上分别达到95.9%和50.0%的线性评估准确率，性能可比对比学习和掩码自编码器；ImageNet迁移学习验证了其对Vision Transformers的适用性。
AI.conclusion: DDAE通过生成式预训练可学习强判别表征，成为统一的自监督学习框架，具备扩展为多任务基础模型的潜力。

search_text: Denoising Diffusion Autoencoders are Unified Self-supervised Learners 去噪扩散自动编码器是统一的自监督学习器 Inspired by recent advances in diffusion models, which are reminiscent of denoising autoencoders, we investigate whether they can acquire discriminative representations for classification via generative pre-training. This paper shows that the networks in diffusion models, namely denoising diffusion autoencoders (DDAE), are unified self-supervised learners: by pre-training on unconditional image generation, DDAE has already learned strongly linear-separable representations within its intermediate layers without auxiliary encoders, thus making diffusion pre-training emerge as a general approach for generative-and-discriminative dual learning. To validate this, we conduct linear probe and fine-tuning evaluations. Our diffusion-based approach achieves 95.9% and 50.0% linear evaluation accuracies on CIFAR-10 and Tiny-ImageNet, respectively, and is comparable to contrastive learning and masked autoencoders for the first time. Transfer learning from ImageNet also confirms the suitability of DDAE for Vision Transformers, suggesting the potential to scale DDAEs as unified foundation models. Code is available at github.com/FutureXiang/ddae. 受扩散模型最新进展的启发（这让人想起去噪自动编码器），我们研究了它们是否可以通过生成预训练获得用于分类的判别表示。本文表明，扩散模型中的网络，即去噪扩散自动编码器（DDAE），是统一的自监督学习器：通过对无条件图像生成的预训练，DDAE 已经在其中间层中学习了强线性可分离表示，而无需辅助编码器，从而使扩散预训练成为生成和判别双重学习的通用方法。为了验证这一点，我们进行了线性探针和微调评估。我们基于扩散的方法在 CIFAR-10 和 Tiny-ImageNet 上分别实现了 95.9% 和 50.0% 的线性评估精度，并且首次与对比学习和掩模自动编码器相当。 Transfer learning from ImageNet also confirms the suitability of DDAE for Vision Transformers, suggesting the potential to scale DDAEs as unified foundation models.代码可在 github.com/FutureXiang/ddae 获取。 本文研究去噪扩散自编码器（DDAE）是否能通过生成式预训练获得判别性表示用于分类任务，并验证其作为统一自监督学习方法的有效性。 Weilai Xiang,Hongyu Yang,Di Huang,Yunhong Wang cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Chunlin Ren,Qingshan Xu,Shikun Zhang,Jiaqi Yang
title: Hierarchical Prior Mining for Non-local Multi-View Stereo
title_zh: 非局部多视立体的分层先验挖掘
abstract: As a fundamental problem in computer vision, multi-view stereo (MVS) aims at recovering the 3D geometry of a target from a set of 2D images. Recent advances in MVS have shown that it is important to perceive non-local structured information for recovering geometry in low-textured areas. In this work, we propose a Hierarchical Prior Mining for Non-local Multi-View Stereo (HPM-MVS). The key characteristics are the following techniques that exploit non-local information to assist MVS: 1) A Non-local Extensible Sampling Pattern (NESP), which is able to adaptively change the size of sampled areas without becoming snared in locally optimal solutions. 2) A new approach to leverage non-local reliable points and construct a planar prior model based on K-Nearest Neighbor (KNN), to obtain potential hypotheses for the regions where prior construction is challenging. 3) A Hierarchical Prior Mining (HPM) framework, which is used to mine extensive non-local prior information at different scales to assist 3D model recovery, this strategy can achieve a considerable balance between the reconstruction of details and low-textured areas. Experimental results on the ETH3D and Tanks \& Temples have verified the superior performance and strong generalization capability of our method. Our code will be released.
summary: As a fundamental problem in computer vision, multi-view stereo (MVS) aims at recovering the 3D geometry of a target from a set of 2D images. Recent advances in MVS have shown that it is important to perceive non-local structured information for recovering geometry in low-textured areas. In this work, we propose a Hierarchical Prior Mining for Non-local Multi-View Stereo (HPM-MVS). The key characteristics are the following techniques that exploit non-local information to assist MVS: 1) A Non-local Extensible Sampling Pattern (NESP), which is able to adaptively change the size of sampled areas without becoming snared in locally optimal solutions. 2) A new approach to leverage non-local reliable points and construct a planar prior model based on K-Nearest Neighbor (KNN), to obtain potential hypotheses for the regions where prior construction is challenging. 3) A Hierarchical Prior Mining (HPM) framework, which is used to mine extensive non-local prior information at different scales to assist 3D model recovery, this strategy can achieve a considerable balance between the reconstruction of details and low-textured areas. Experimental results on the ETH3D and Tanks \& Temples have verified the superior performance and strong generalization capability of our method. Our code will be released.
abstract_zh: 作为计算机视觉中的一个基本问题，多视图立体（MVS）旨在从一组 2D 图像中恢复目标的 3D 几何形状。 MVS 的最新进展表明，感知非局部结构化信息对于恢复低纹理区域中的几何形状非常重要。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种非局部多视图立体分层先验挖掘（HPM-MVS）。关键特征是以下利用非局部信息来辅助 MVS 的技术： 1）非局部可扩展采样模式（NESP），它能够自适应地改变采样区域的大小，而不会陷入局部最优解决方案。 2）一种利用非局部可靠点并构建基于K最近邻（KNN）的平面先验模型的新方法，以获得先验构建具有挑战性的区域的潜在假设。 3）分层先验挖掘（HPM）框架，用于挖掘不同尺度的广泛非局部先验信息以辅助3D模型恢复，该策略可以在细节和低纹理区域的重建之间实现相当大的平衡。在ETH3D和Tanks \& Temples上的实验结果验证了我们方法的优越性能和强大的泛化能力。我们的代码将被发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于非局部信息的多视角立体视觉方法HPM-MVS，以解决低纹理区域的3D重建问题。
AI.motivation: 传统多视角立体视觉在低纹理区域易出现重建失败，需利用非局部结构信息提升几何恢复效果。
AI.method: 提出三种技术：1) 自适应非局部采样模式NESP；2) 基于KNN的平面先验模型；3) 分层先验挖掘框架HPM，从多尺度提取非局部先验信息。
AI.result: 在ETH3D和Tanks & Temples数据集上验证了方法的优越性能和强泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过分层挖掘非局部先验信息，在细节重建与低纹理区域处理间取得良好平衡。

authors_text: Jiaqi Xu,Xiaowei Hu,Lei Zhu,Qi Dou,Jifeng Dai,Yu Qiao,Pheng-Ann Heng
title: Video Dehazing via a Multi-Range Temporal Alignment Network with Physical Prior
title_zh: 通过具有物理先验的多范围时间对齐网络进行视频去雾
abstract: Video dehazing aims to recover haze-free frames with high visibility and contrast. This paper presents a novel framework to effectively explore the physical haze priors and aggregate temporal information. Specifically, we design a memory-based physical prior guidance module to encode the prior-related features into long-range memory. Besides, we formulate a multi-range scene radiance recovery module to capture space-time dependencies in multiple space-time ranges, which helps to effectively aggregate temporal information from adjacent frames. Moreover, we construct the first large-scale outdoor video dehazing benchmark dataset, which contains videos in various real-world scenarios. Experimental results on both synthetic and real conditions show the superiority of our proposed method.
summary: Video dehazing aims to recover haze-free frames with high visibility and contrast. This paper presents a novel framework to effectively explore the physical haze priors and aggregate temporal information. Specifically, we design a memory-based physical prior guidance module to encode the prior-related features into long-range memory. Besides, we formulate a multi-range scene radiance recovery module to capture space-time dependencies in multiple space-time ranges, which helps to effectively aggregate temporal information from adjacent frames. Moreover, we construct the first large-scale outdoor video dehazing benchmark dataset, which contains videos in various real-world scenarios. Experimental results on both synthetic and real conditions show the superiority of our proposed method.
abstract_zh: 视频去雾旨在恢复具有高可见度和对比度的无雾帧。本文提出了一种新颖的框架来有效探索物理雾霾先验并聚合时间信息。具体来说，我们设计了一个基于内存的物理先验指导模块，将先验相关特征编码到远程内存中。此外，我们制定了多范围场景辐射恢复模块来捕获多个时空范围内的时空依赖性，这有助于有效聚合相邻帧的时间信息。此外，我们构建了第一个大规模室外视频去雾基准数据集，其中包含各种现实场景中的视频。合成和实际条件下的实验结果表明了我们提出的方法的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多范围时间对齐网络和物理先验的视频去雾方法，通过编码物理先验特征和聚合时空信息提升去雾效果。
AI.motivation: 现有视频去雾方法难以有效融合物理雾化先验与多帧时空信息，导致恢复图像对比度不足且存在伪影。
AI.method: 设计基于内存的物理先验引导模块编码长距离特征，构建多范围场景辐射恢复模块捕捉时空依赖关系，并创建首个大规模户外视频去雾基准数据集。
AI.result: 在合成与真实场景数据集上均取得优于现有方法的去雾效果，显著提升图像对比度和视觉清晰度。
AI.conclusion: 通过物理先验与多范围时空信息的联合建模，提出的方法在视频去雾任务中展现出优越性，为相关研究提供新思路。

motivation: 现有视频去雾方法难以有效融合物理雾化先验与多帧时空信息，导致恢复图像对比度不足且存在伪影。
method: 设计基于内存的物理先验引导模块编码长距离特征，构建多范围场景辐射恢复模块捕捉时空依赖关系，并创建首个大规模户外视频去雾基准数据集。
result: 在合成与真实场景数据集上均取得优于现有方法的去雾效果，显著提升图像对比度和视觉清晰度。
conclusion: 通过物理先验与多范围时空信息的联合建模，提出的方法在视频去雾任务中展现出优越性，为相关研究提供新思路。
search_text: Video Dehazing via a Multi-Range Temporal Alignment Network with Physical Prior 通过具有物理先验的多范围时间对齐网络进行视频去雾 Video dehazing aims to recover haze-free frames with high visibility and contrast. This paper presents a novel framework to effectively explore the physical haze priors and aggregate temporal information. Specifically, we design a memory-based physical prior guidance module to encode the prior-related features into long-range memory. Besides, we formulate a multi-range scene radiance recovery module to capture space-time dependencies in multiple space-time ranges, which helps to effectively aggregate temporal information from adjacent frames. Moreover, we construct the first large-scale outdoor video dehazing benchmark dataset, which contains videos in various real-world scenarios. Experimental results on both synthetic and real conditions show the superiority of our proposed method. 视频去雾旨在恢复具有高可见度和对比度的无雾帧。本文提出了一种新颖的框架来有效探索物理雾霾先验并聚合时间信息。具体来说，我们设计了一个基于内存的物理先验指导模块，将先验相关特征编码到远程内存中。此外，我们制定了多范围场景辐射恢复模块来捕获多个时空范围内的时空依赖性，这有助于有效聚合相邻帧的时间信息。此外，我们构建了第一个大规模室外视频去雾基准数据集，其中包含各种现实场景中的视频。合成和实际条件下的实验结果表明了我们提出的方法的优越性。 本文提出一种基于多范围时间对齐网络和物理先验的视频去雾方法，通过编码物理先验特征和聚合时空信息提升去雾效果。 Jiaqi Xu,Xiaowei Hu,Lei Zhu,Qi Dou,Jifeng Dai,Yu Qiao,Pheng-Ann Heng cs.CV

authors_text: Yifei Chen,Dapeng Chen,Ruijin Liu,Hao Li,Wei Peng
title: Video Action Recognition with Attentive Semantic Units
title_zh: 使用注意力语义单元的视频动作识别
abstract: Visual-Language Models (VLMs) have significantly advanced action video recognition. Supervised by the semantics of action labels, recent works adapt the visual branch of VLMs to learn video representations. Despite the effectiveness proved by these works, we believe that the potential of VLMs has yet to be fully harnessed. In light of this, we exploit the semantic units (SU) hiding behind the action labels and leverage their correlations with fine-grained items in frames for more accurate action recognition. SUs are entities extracted from the language descriptions of the entire action set, including body parts, objects, scenes, and motions. To further enhance the alignments between visual contents and the SUs, we introduce a multi-region module (MRA) to the visual branch of the VLM. The MRA allows the perception of region-aware visual features beyond the original global feature. Our method adaptively attends to and selects relevant SUs with visual features of frames. With a cross-modal decoder, the selected SUs serve to decode spatiotemporal video representations. In summary, the SUs as the medium can boost discriminative ability and transferability. Specifically, in fully-supervised learning, our method achieved 87.8% top-1 accuracy on Kinetics-400. In K=2 few-shot experiments, our method surpassed the previous state-of-the-art by +7.1% and +15.0% on HMDB-51 and UCF-101, respectively.
summary: Visual-Language Models (VLMs) have significantly advanced action video recognition. Supervised by the semantics of action labels, recent works adapt the visual branch of VLMs to learn video representations. Despite the effectiveness proved by these works, we believe that the potential of VLMs has yet to be fully harnessed. In light of this, we exploit the semantic units (SU) hiding behind the action labels and leverage their correlations with fine-grained items in frames for more accurate action recognition. SUs are entities extracted from the language descriptions of the entire action set, including body parts, objects, scenes, and motions. To further enhance the alignments between visual contents and the SUs, we introduce a multi-region module (MRA) to the visual branch of the VLM. The MRA allows the perception of region-aware visual features beyond the original global feature. Our method adaptively attends to and selects relevant SUs with visual features of frames. With a cross-modal decoder, the selected SUs serve to decode spatiotemporal video representations. In summary, the SUs as the medium can boost discriminative ability and transferability. Specifically, in fully-supervised learning, our method achieved 87.8% top-1 accuracy on Kinetics-400. In K=2 few-shot experiments, our method surpassed the previous state-of-the-art by +7.1% and +15.0% on HMDB-51 and UCF-101, respectively.
abstract_zh: 视觉语言模型 (VLM) 具有显着先进的动作视频识别能力。在动作标签语义的监督下，最近的工作采用 VLM 的视觉分支来学习视频表示。尽管这些工作证明了有效性，但我们认为 VLM 的潜力尚未得到充分利用。有鉴于此，我们利用隐藏在动作标签后面的语义单元（SU），并利用它们与帧中细粒度项目的相关性来实现更准确的动作识别。 SU 是从整个动作集的语言描述中提取的实体，包括身体部位、物体、场景和动作。为了进一步增强视觉内容和 SU 之间的一致性，我们在 VLM 的视觉分支中引入了多区域模块（MRA）。 MRA 允许感知超出原始全局特征的区域感知视觉特征。我们的方法自适应地关注并选择具有帧视觉特征的相关 SU。使用跨模式解码器，所选 SU 用于解码时空视频表示。综上所述，SU作为媒介可以提高辨别能力和可迁移性。具体来说，在完全监督学习中，我们的方法在 Kinetics-400 上实现了 87.8% 的 top-1 准确率。在 K=2 的小样本实验中，我们的方法在 HMDB-51 和 UCF-101 上分别超越了之前最先进的方法 +7.1% 和 +15.0%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于注意力语义单元的视频动作识别方法，通过提取动作标签中的语义单元并结合多区域模块提升识别准确率。
AI.motivation: 尽管现有视觉-语言模型在动作视频识别中表现良好，但其潜力尚未完全挖掘，需进一步利用动作标签中的细粒度语义信息以提高识别性能。
AI.method: 提取动作标签中的语义单元（SU），包括身体部位、物体、场景和动作，并引入多区域模块（MRA）增强视觉特征与SU的对齐，通过跨模态解码器生成时空视频表示。
AI.result: 在Kinetics-400数据集上达到87.8%的top-1准确率，在K=2的少样本实验中，分别比现有方法提升7.1%和15.0%。
AI.conclusion: 语义单元作为媒介显著提升了模型的判别能力和迁移能力，所提方法在多个基准数据集上均取得优异结果。

authors_text: Jinggang Chen,Xiaoyang Qu,Junjie Li,Jianzong Wang,Jiguang Wan,Jing Xiao
title: Detecting Out-of-distribution Examples via Class-conditional Impressions Reappearing
title_zh: 通过类条件印象重新出现来检测分布外的示例
abstract: Out-of-distribution (OOD) detection aims at enhancing standard deep neural networks to distinguish anomalous inputs from original training data. Previous progress has introduced various approaches where the in-distribution training data and even several OOD examples are prerequisites. However, due to privacy and security, auxiliary data tends to be impractical in a real-world scenario. In this paper, we propose a data-free method without training on natural data, called Class-Conditional Impressions Reappearing (C2IR), which utilizes image impressions from the fixed model to recover class-conditional feature statistics. Based on that, we introduce Integral Probability Metrics to estimate layer-wise class-conditional deviations and obtain layer weights by Measuring Gradient-based Importance (MGI). The experiments verify the effectiveness of our method and indicate that C2IR outperforms other post-hoc methods and reaches comparable performance to the full access (ID and OOD) detection method, especially in the far-OOD dataset (SVHN).
summary: Out-of-distribution (OOD) detection aims at enhancing standard deep neural networks to distinguish anomalous inputs from original training data. Previous progress has introduced various approaches where the in-distribution training data and even several OOD examples are prerequisites. However, due to privacy and security, auxiliary data tends to be impractical in a real-world scenario. In this paper, we propose a data-free method without training on natural data, called Class-Conditional Impressions Reappearing (C2IR), which utilizes image impressions from the fixed model to recover class-conditional feature statistics. Based on that, we introduce Integral Probability Metrics to estimate layer-wise class-conditional deviations and obtain layer weights by Measuring Gradient-based Importance (MGI). The experiments verify the effectiveness of our method and indicate that C2IR outperforms other post-hoc methods and reaches comparable performance to the full access (ID and OOD) detection method, especially in the far-OOD dataset (SVHN).
abstract_zh: 分布外（OOD）检测旨在增强标准深度神经网络，以区分异常输入和原始训练数据。之前的进展已经引入了各种方法，其中分布训练数据甚至几个 OOD 示例是先决条件。然而，由于隐私和安全的原因，辅助数据在现实场景中往往不切实际。在本文中，我们提出了一种无需对自然数据进行训练的无数据方法，称为类条件印象再现（C2IR），它利用固定模型中的图像印象来恢复类条件特征统计。在此基础上，我们引入积分概率度量来估计分层的类条件偏差，并通过测量基于梯度的重要性（MGI）来获得层权重。实验验证了我们方法的有效性，并表明 C2IR 优于其他事后方法，并达到与完全访问（ID 和 OOD）检测方法相当的性能，特别是在远 OOD 数据集（SVHN）中。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需依赖训练数据和辅助数据的分布外检测方法C2IR，通过模型固定印象恢复类条件特征统计实现异常检测。
AI.motivation: 传统OOD检测方法依赖训练数据和辅助数据，但实际场景中因隐私和安全问题难以获取，需开发数据无关的检测方案。
AI.method: 利用固定模型生成的图像印象恢复类条件特征分布，结合积分概率度量计算层间偏差，并通过梯度重要性评估确定层权重。
AI.result: 实验表明C2IR在远分布外数据集（如SVHN）上性能优于其他后验方法，接近拥有完整数据的检测方法效果。
AI.conclusion: C2IR验证了数据无关的OOD检测可行性，在隐私敏感场景下具有应用潜力，尤其对远分布外样本检测效果显著。

authors_text: Tzu-Sheng Kuo,Hong Shen,Jisoo Geum,Nev Jones,Jason I. Hong,Haiyi Zhu,Kenneth Holstein
title: Understanding Frontline Workers' and Unhoused Individuals' Perspectives on AI Used in Homeless Services
title_zh: 了解一线工人和无家可归者对无家可归者服务中使用人工智能的看法
comment: ef:Proceedings of the 2023 CHI Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems (CHI '23)
comments: ef:Proceedings of the 2023 CHI Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems (CHI '23)
abstract: Recent years have seen growing adoption of AI-based decision-support systems (ADS) in homeless services, yet we know little about stakeholder desires and concerns surrounding their use. In this work, we aim to understand impacted stakeholders' perspectives on a deployed ADS that prioritizes scarce housing resources. We employed AI lifecycle comicboarding, an adapted version of the comicboarding method, to elicit stakeholder feedback and design ideas across various components of an AI system's design. We elicited feedback from county workers who operate the ADS daily, service providers whose work is directly impacted by the ADS, and unhoused individuals in the region. Our participants shared concerns and design suggestions around the AI system's overall objective, specific model design choices, dataset selection, and use in deployment. Our findings demonstrate that stakeholders, even without AI knowledge, can provide specific and critical feedback on an AI system's design and deployment, if empowered to do so.
summary: Recent years have seen growing adoption of AI-based decision-support systems (ADS) in homeless services, yet we know little about stakeholder desires and concerns surrounding their use. In this work, we aim to understand impacted stakeholders' perspectives on a deployed ADS that prioritizes scarce housing resources. We employed AI lifecycle comicboarding, an adapted version of the comicboarding method, to elicit stakeholder feedback and design ideas across various components of an AI system's design. We elicited feedback from county workers who operate the ADS daily, service providers whose work is directly impacted by the ADS, and unhoused individuals in the region. Our participants shared concerns and design suggestions around the AI system's overall objective, specific model design choices, dataset selection, and use in deployment. Our findings demonstrate that stakeholders, even without AI knowledge, can provide specific and critical feedback on an AI system's design and deployment, if empowered to do so.
abstract_zh: 近年来，无家可归者服务中越来越多地采用基于人工智能的决策支持系统（ADS），但我们对利益相关者对其使用的愿望和担忧知之甚少。在这项工作中，我们的目标是了解受影响的利益相关者对优先考虑稀缺住房资源的已部署 ADS 的看法。我们采用人工智能生命周期漫画板（漫画板方法的改编版本）来征求利益相关者对人工智能系统设计各个组件的反馈和设计想法。我们收集了日常操作 ADS 的县工作人员、工作直接受 ADS 影响的服务提供商以及该地区无家可归者的反馈。我们的参与者围绕人工智能系统的总体目标、具体模型设计选择、数据集选择和部署使用分享了关注点和设计建议。我们的研究结果表明，即使没有人工智能知识，利益相关者也可以在获得授权的情况下就人工智能系统的设计和部署提供具体且关键的反馈。

AI.tldr: 本文通过漫画板方法收集前线工作者和无家可归者对AI在流浪者服务中应用的反馈，分析其设计与部署中的关键问题。
AI.motivation: 尽管AI决策系统在流浪者服务中应用增加，但缺乏对利益相关者需求与担忧的系统性研究，需确保技术设计符合实际需求。
AI.method: 采用改编的AI生命周期漫画板方法，对县工作人员、服务提供者及无家可归者进行多轮反馈收集与设计建议分析。
AI.result: 参与者针对AI目标、模型设计、数据选择及部署提出具体建议，证明非技术人员在赋权下能提供关键反馈。
AI.conclusion: 利益相关者的深度参与可优化AI系统设计，推动更公平有效的流浪者服务技术应用。

authors_text: Jun-Hyung Park,Yeachan Kim,Junho Kim,Joon-Young Choi,SangKeun Lee
title: Dynamic Structure Pruning for Compressing CNNs
title_zh: 用于压缩 CNN 的动态结构剪枝
abstract: Structure pruning is an effective method to compress and accelerate neural networks. While filter and channel pruning are preferable to other structure pruning methods in terms of realistic acceleration and hardware compatibility, pruning methods with a finer granularity, such as intra-channel pruning, are expected to be capable of yielding more compact and computationally efficient networks. Typical intra-channel pruning methods utilize a static and hand-crafted pruning granularity due to a large search space, which leaves room for improvement in their pruning performance. In this work, we introduce a novel structure pruning method, termed as dynamic structure pruning, to identify optimal pruning granularities for intra-channel pruning. In contrast to existing intra-channel pruning methods, the proposed method automatically optimizes dynamic pruning granularities in each layer while training deep neural networks. To achieve this, we propose a differentiable group learning method designed to efficiently learn a pruning granularity based on gradient-based learning of filter groups. The experimental results show that dynamic structure pruning achieves state-of-the-art pruning performance and better realistic acceleration on a GPU compared with channel pruning. In particular, it reduces the FLOPs of ResNet50 by 71.85% without accuracy degradation on the ImageNet dataset. Our code is available at https://github.com/irishev/DSP.
summary: Structure pruning is an effective method to compress and accelerate neural networks. While filter and channel pruning are preferable to other structure pruning methods in terms of realistic acceleration and hardware compatibility, pruning methods with a finer granularity, such as intra-channel pruning, are expected to be capable of yielding more compact and computationally efficient networks. Typical intra-channel pruning methods utilize a static and hand-crafted pruning granularity due to a large search space, which leaves room for improvement in their pruning performance. In this work, we introduce a novel structure pruning method, termed as dynamic structure pruning, to identify optimal pruning granularities for intra-channel pruning. In contrast to existing intra-channel pruning methods, the proposed method automatically optimizes dynamic pruning granularities in each layer while training deep neural networks. To achieve this, we propose a differentiable group learning method designed to efficiently learn a pruning granularity based on gradient-based learning of filter groups. The experimental results show that dynamic structure pruning achieves state-of-the-art pruning performance and better realistic acceleration on a GPU compared with channel pruning. In particular, it reduces the FLOPs of ResNet50 by 71.85% without accuracy degradation on the ImageNet dataset. Our code is available at https://github.com/irishev/DSP.
abstract_zh: 结构剪枝是压缩和加速神经网络的有效方法。虽然滤波器和通道剪枝在实际加速和硬件兼容性方面优于其他结构剪枝方法，但具有更细粒度的剪枝方法（例如通道内剪枝）预计能够产生更紧凑和计算效率更高的网络。由于搜索空间较大，典型的通道内剪枝方法采用静态和手工剪枝粒度，这为其剪枝性能留下了改进的空间。在这项工作中，我们引入了一种新颖的结构剪枝方法，称为动态结构剪枝，来确定通道内剪枝的最佳剪枝粒度。与现有的通道内剪枝方法相比，该方法在训练深度神经网络时自动优化每层的动态剪枝粒度。为了实现这一目标，我们提出了一种可微分组学习方法，旨在有效地学习基于滤波器组梯度学习的剪枝粒度。实验结果表明，与通道剪枝相比，动态结构剪枝在 GPU 上实现了最先进的剪枝性能和更好的真实加速。特别是，它将 ResNet50 的 FLOP 减少了 71.85%，而在 ImageNet 数据集上的精度没有下降。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/irishev/DSP 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种动态结构剪枝方法，用于压缩卷积神经网络。
AI.motivation: 现有的通道剪枝方法在实际加速和硬件兼容性方面表现较好，但更细粒度的剪枝方法（如通道内剪枝）仍有提升空间。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种动态结构剪枝方法，通过可微分的组学习方法，在训练过程中自动优化每一层的剪枝粒度。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，动态结构剪枝在GPU上实现了最先进的剪枝性能和更好的实际加速效果，将ResNet50的FLOPs减少了71.85%，且在ImageNet数据集上未出现准确率下降。
AI.conclusion: 动态结构剪枝是一种有效的网络压缩方法，能够在保持准确率的同时显著减少计算量。

ai_content.result: 实验结果表明，动态结构剪枝在GPU上实现了最先进的剪枝性能和更好的实际加速效果，将ResNet50的FLOPs减少了71.85%，且在ImageNet数据集上未出现准确率下降。

authors_text: Yupeng Zhou,Zhen Li,Chun-Le Guo,Li Liu,Ming-Ming Cheng,Qibin Hou
title: SRFormerV2: Taking a Closer Look at Permuted Self-Attention for Image Super-Resolution
title_zh: SRFormerV2：仔细研究图像超分辨率的排列自注意力
comment: Previous version has been accepted by ICCV2023
comments: Previous version has been accepted by ICCV2023
abstract: Previous works have shown that increasing the window size for Transformer-based image super-resolution models (e.g., SwinIR) can significantly improve the model performance. Still, the computation overhead is also considerable when the window size gradually increases. In this paper, we present SRFormer, a simple but novel method that can enjoy the benefit of large window self-attention but introduces even less computational burden. The core of our SRFormer is the permuted self-attention (PSA), which strikes an appropriate balance between the channel and spatial information for self-attention. Without any bells and whistles, we show that our SRFormer achieves a 33.86dB PSNR score on the Urban100 dataset, which is 0.46dB higher than that of SwinIR but uses fewer parameters and computations. In addition, we also attempt to scale up the model by further enlarging the window size and channel numbers to explore the potential of Transformer-based models. Experiments show that our scaled model, named SRFormerV2, can further improve the results and achieves state-of-the-art. We hope our simple and effective approach could be useful for future research in super-resolution model design. The homepage is https://z-yupeng.github.io/SRFormer/.
summary: Previous works have shown that increasing the window size for Transformer-based image super-resolution models (e.g., SwinIR) can significantly improve the model performance. Still, the computation overhead is also considerable when the window size gradually increases. In this paper, we present SRFormer, a simple but novel method that can enjoy the benefit of large window self-attention but introduces even less computational burden. The core of our SRFormer is the permuted self-attention (PSA), which strikes an appropriate balance between the channel and spatial information for self-attention. Without any bells and whistles, we show that our SRFormer achieves a 33.86dB PSNR score on the Urban100 dataset, which is 0.46dB higher than that of SwinIR but uses fewer parameters and computations. In addition, we also attempt to scale up the model by further enlarging the window size and channel numbers to explore the potential of Transformer-based models. Experiments show that our scaled model, named SRFormerV2, can further improve the results and achieves state-of-the-art. We hope our simple and effective approach could be useful for future research in super-resolution model design. The homepage is https://z-yupeng.github.io/SRFormer/.
abstract_zh: 之前的工作表明，增加基于 Transformer 的图像超分辨率模型（例如 SwinIR）的窗口大小可以显着提高模型性能。尽管如此，当窗口大小逐渐增大时，计算开销也相当大。在本文中，我们提出了 SRFormer，这是一种简单但新颖的方法，可以享受大窗口自注意力的好处，但引入的计算负担甚至更少。我们SRFormer的核心是排列自注意力（PSA），它在自注意力的通道和空间信息之间取得适当的平衡。在没有任何附加功能的情况下，我们表明我们的 SRFormer 在 Urban100 数据集上实现了 33.86dB PSNR 得分，比 SwinIR 高 0.46dB，但使用的参数和计算更少。此外，我们还尝试通过进一步扩大窗口大小和通道数来扩大模型规模，以探索基于 Transformer 的模型的潜力。实验表明，我们的缩放模型（名为 SRFormerV2）可以进一步改进结果并达到最先进的水平。我们希望我们简单有效的方法能够对超分辨率模型设计的未来研究有用。主页是https://z-yupeng.github.io/SRFormer/。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SRFormerV2模型，通过改进自注意力机制实现更高效的图像超分辨率。
AI.motivation: 现有基于Transformer的超分模型（如SwinIR）虽通过扩大窗口尺寸提升性能，但计算成本过高，需在性能与效率间寻求平衡。
AI.method: 设计一种称为置换自注意力（PSA）的新机制，在通道与空间信息间取得平衡，同时通过扩大窗口尺寸和通道数构建SRFormerV2。
AI.result: SRFormer在Urban100数据集上达到33.86dB PSNR，较SwinIR提升0.46dB且参数和计算量更少；SRFormerV2进一步取得最先进性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法以简洁有效的方式为超分模型设计提供了新思路，具有重要研究价值。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出SRFormerV2模型，通过改进自注意力机制实现更高效的图像超分辨率。
ai_content.motivation: 现有基于Transformer的超分模型（如SwinIR）虽通过扩大窗口尺寸提升性能，但计算成本过高，需在性能与效率间寻求平衡。
ai_content.method: 设计一种称为置换自注意力（PSA）的新机制，在通道与空间信息间取得平衡，同时通过扩大窗口尺寸和通道数构建SRFormerV2。
ai_content.result: SRFormer在Urban100数据集上达到33.86dB PSNR，较SwinIR提升0.46dB且参数和计算量更少；SRFormerV2进一步取得最先进性能。
ai_content.conclusion: 该方法以简洁有效的方式为超分模型设计提供了新思路，具有重要研究价值。

search_text: SRFormerV2: Taking a Closer Look at Permuted Self-Attention for Image Super-Resolution SRFormerV2：仔细研究图像超分辨率的排列自注意力 Previous works have shown that increasing the window size for Transformer-based image super-resolution models (e.g., SwinIR) can significantly improve the model performance. Still, the computation overhead is also considerable when the window size gradually increases. In this paper, we present SRFormer, a simple but novel method that can enjoy the benefit of large window self-attention but introduces even less computational burden. The core of our SRFormer is the permuted self-attention (PSA), which strikes an appropriate balance between the channel and spatial information for self-attention. Without any bells and whistles, we show that our SRFormer achieves a 33.86dB PSNR score on the Urban100 dataset, which is 0.46dB higher than that of SwinIR but uses fewer parameters and computations. In addition, we also attempt to scale up the model by further enlarging the window size and channel numbers to explore the potential of Transformer-based models. Experiments show that our scaled model, named SRFormerV2, can further improve the results and achieves state-of-the-art. We hope our simple and effective approach could be useful for future research in super-resolution model design. The homepage is https://z-yupeng.github.io/SRFormer/. 之前的工作表明，增加基于 Transformer 的图像超分辨率模型（例如 SwinIR）的窗口大小可以显着提高模型性能。尽管如此，当窗口大小逐渐增大时，计算开销也相当大。在本文中，我们提出了 SRFormer，这是一种简单但新颖的方法，可以享受大窗口自注意力的好处，但引入的计算负担甚至更少。我们SRFormer的核心是排列自注意力（PSA），它在自注意力的通道和空间信息之间取得适当的平衡。在没有任何附加功能的情况下，我们表明我们的 SRFormer 在 Urban100 数据集上实现了 33.86dB PSNR 得分，比 SwinIR 高 0.46dB，但使用的参数和计算更少。此外，我们还尝试通过进一步扩大窗口大小和通道数来扩大模型规模，以探索基于 Transformer 的模型的潜力。实验表明，我们的缩放模型（名为 SRFormerV2）可以进一步改进结果并达到最先进的水平。我们希望我们简单有效的方法能够对超分辨率模型设计的未来研究有用。主页是https://z-yupeng.github.io/SRFormer/。 本文提出SRFormerV2模型，通过改进自注意力机制实现更高效的图像超分辨率。 Yupeng Zhou,Zhen Li,Chun-Le Guo,Li Liu,Ming-Ming Cheng,Qibin Hou cs.CV

authors_text: Zhengyi Liu,Xiaoshen Huang,Guanghui Zhang,Xianyong Fang,Linbo Wang,Bin Tang
title: Scribble-Supervised RGB-T Salient Object Detection
title_zh: 涂鸦监督 RGB-T 显着目标检测
abstract: Salient object detection segments attractive objects in scenes. RGB and thermal modalities provide complementary information and scribble annotations alleviate large amounts of human labor. Based on the above facts, we propose a scribble-supervised RGB-T salient object detection model. By a four-step solution (expansion, prediction, aggregation, and supervision), label-sparse challenge of scribble-supervised method is solved. To expand scribble annotations, we collect the superpixels that foreground scribbles pass through in RGB and thermal images, respectively. The expanded multi-modal labels provide the coarse object boundary. To further polish the expanded labels, we propose a prediction module to alleviate the sharpness of boundary. To play the complementary roles of two modalities, we combine the two into aggregated pseudo labels. Supervised by scribble annotations and pseudo labels, our model achieves the state-of-the-art performance on the relabeled RGBT-S dataset. Furthermore, the model is applied to RGB-D and video scribble-supervised applications, achieving consistently excellent performance.
summary: Salient object detection segments attractive objects in scenes. RGB and thermal modalities provide complementary information and scribble annotations alleviate large amounts of human labor. Based on the above facts, we propose a scribble-supervised RGB-T salient object detection model. By a four-step solution (expansion, prediction, aggregation, and supervision), label-sparse challenge of scribble-supervised method is solved. To expand scribble annotations, we collect the superpixels that foreground scribbles pass through in RGB and thermal images, respectively. The expanded multi-modal labels provide the coarse object boundary. To further polish the expanded labels, we propose a prediction module to alleviate the sharpness of boundary. To play the complementary roles of two modalities, we combine the two into aggregated pseudo labels. Supervised by scribble annotations and pseudo labels, our model achieves the state-of-the-art performance on the relabeled RGBT-S dataset. Furthermore, the model is applied to RGB-D and video scribble-supervised applications, achieving consistently excellent performance.
abstract_zh: 显着对象检测分割场景中有吸引力的对象。 RGB 和热模态提供了补充信息，涂鸦注释减轻了大量的人力。基于上述事实，我们提出了一种涂鸦监督的 RGB-T 显着目标检测模型。通过四步解决方案（扩展、预测、聚合和监督），解决了涂鸦监督方法的标签稀疏挑战。为了扩展涂鸦注释，我们分别收集前景涂鸦在 RGB 和热图像中穿过的超像素。扩展的多模态标签提供了粗略的对象边界。为了进一步完善扩展的标签，我们提出了一个预测模块来减轻边界的清晰度。为了发挥两种模式的互补作用，我们将两者组合成聚合的伪标签。在涂鸦注释和伪标签的监督下，我们的模型在重新标记的 RGBT-S 数据集上实现了最先进的性能。此外，该模型还应用于 RGB-D 和视频涂鸦监督应用，实现了始终如一的卓越性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于涂鸦监督的RGB-T显著性目标检测模型，通过四步解决方案解决标签稀疏问题。
AI.motivation: 传统显著性检测依赖大量人工标注，而涂鸦标注可减少人力成本。RGB与热成像模态互补，但现有方法在标签稀疏性上存在挑战。
AI.method: 采用四步法：1) 扩展涂鸦标注至多模态超像素；2) 预测模块优化边界锐度；3) 聚合双模态伪标签；4) 联合涂鸦与伪标签进行监督训练。
AI.result: 在重标定的RGBT-S数据集上达到SOTA性能，并成功扩展至RGB-D和视频场景。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过多模态协同与标签扩展策略，有效解决了涂鸦监督下的显著性检测难题。
