authors_text: Qifan Xiao,Xudong Pan,Yifan Lu,Mi Zhang,Jiarun Dai,Min Yang
title: Exorcising ''Wraith'': Protecting LiDAR-based Object Detector in Automated Driving System from Appearing Attacks
title_zh: 驱除“幽灵”：保护自动驾驶系统中基于激光雷达的物体检测器免受潜在攻击
abstract: Automated driving systems rely on 3D object detectors to recognize possible obstacles from LiDAR point clouds. However, recent works show the adversary can forge non-existent cars in the prediction results with a few fake points (i.e., appearing attack). By removing statistical outliers, existing defenses are however designed for specific attacks or biased by predefined heuristic rules. Towards more comprehensive mitigation, we first systematically inspect the mechanism of recent appearing attacks: Their common weaknesses are observed in crafting fake obstacles which (i) have obvious differences in the local parts compared with real obstacles and (ii) violate the physical relation between depth and point density. In this paper, we propose a novel plug-and-play defensive module which works by side of a trained LiDAR-based object detector to eliminate forged obstacles where a major proportion of local parts have low objectness, i.e., to what degree it belongs to a real object. At the core of our module is a local objectness predictor, which explicitly incorporates the depth information to model the relation between depth and point density, and predicts each local part of an obstacle with an objectness score. Extensive experiments show, our proposed defense eliminates at least 70% cars forged by three known appearing attacks in most cases, while, for the best previous defense, less than 30% forged cars are eliminated. Meanwhile, under the same circumstance, our defense incurs less overhead for AP/precision on cars compared with existing defenses. Furthermore, We validate the effectiveness of our proposed defense on simulation-based closed-loop control driving tests in the open-source system of Baidu's Apollo.
summary: Automated driving systems rely on 3D object detectors to recognize possible obstacles from LiDAR point clouds. However, recent works show the adversary can forge non-existent cars in the prediction results with a few fake points (i.e., appearing attack). By removing statistical outliers, existing defenses are however designed for specific attacks or biased by predefined heuristic rules. Towards more comprehensive mitigation, we first systematically inspect the mechanism of recent appearing attacks: Their common weaknesses are observed in crafting fake obstacles which (i) have obvious differences in the local parts compared with real obstacles and (ii) violate the physical relation between depth and point density. In this paper, we propose a novel plug-and-play defensive module which works by side of a trained LiDAR-based object detector to eliminate forged obstacles where a major proportion of local parts have low objectness, i.e., to what degree it belongs to a real object. At the core of our module is a local objectness predictor, which explicitly incorporates the depth information to model the relation between depth and point density, and predicts each local part of an obstacle with an objectness score. Extensive experiments show, our proposed defense eliminates at least 70% cars forged by three known appearing attacks in most cases, while, for the best previous defense, less than 30% forged cars are eliminated. Meanwhile, under the same circumstance, our defense incurs less overhead for AP/precision on cars compared with existing defenses. Furthermore, We validate the effectiveness of our proposed defense on simulation-based closed-loop control driving tests in the open-source system of Baidu's Apollo.
abstract_zh: 自动驾驶系统依靠 3D 物体探测器从 LiDAR 点云中识别可能的障碍物。然而，最近的研究表明，对手可以通过一些假点（即出现攻击）在预测结果中伪造不存在的汽车。然而，通过消除统计异常值，现有的防御措施是针对特定攻击而设计的，或者受预定义的启发式规则的影响。 Towards more comprehensive mitigation, we first systematically inspect the mechanism of recent appearing attacks: Their common weaknesses are observed in crafting fake obstacles which (i) have obvious differences in the local parts compared with real obstacles and (ii) violate the physical relation between depth and point density. In this paper, we propose a novel plug-and-play defensive module which works by side of a trained LiDAR-based object detector to eliminate forged obstacles where a major proportion of local parts have low objectness, i.e., to what degree it belongs to a real object. At the core of our module is a local objectness predictor, which explicitly incorporates the depth information to model the relation between depth and point density, and predicts each local part of an obstacle with an objectness score. Extensive experiments show, our proposed defense eliminates at least 70% cars forged by three known appearing attacks in most cases, while, for the best previous defense, less than 30% forged cars are eliminated.同时，在相同情况下，与现有防御相比，我们的防御在汽车上的AP/精度方面产生的开销更少。 Furthermore, We validate the effectiveness of our proposed defense on simulation-based closed-loop control driving tests in the open-source system of Baidu's Apollo.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新型防御模块，用于保护基于LiDAR的自动驾驶系统物体检测器免受虚假目标攻击。
AI.motivation: 现有防御方法针对特定攻击或依赖预定义规则，无法全面应对虚假目标攻击中伪造障碍物的局部特征差异和深度-点密度物理关系违规问题。
AI.method: 设计可插拔防御模块，通过局部物体性预测器结合深度信息建模深度与点密度关系，对障碍物各局部区域进行物体性评分以识别伪造目标。
AI.result: 在三种已知攻击下消除至少70%伪造车辆，相较最佳现有防御方法提升超40%；在保持AP/精度指标下产生更小计算开销，并通过Apollo系统闭环测试验证有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过深度感知的局部物体性分析有效防御虚假目标攻击，在检测精度与计算效率间取得平衡，为自动驾驶系统提供更鲁棒的LiDAR安全防护方案。

conclusion: 该方法通过深度感知的局部物体性分析有效防御虚假目标攻击，在检测精度与计算效率间取得平衡，为自动驾驶系统提供更鲁棒的LiDAR安全防护方案。
search_text: Exorcising ''Wraith'': Protecting LiDAR-based Object Detector in Automated Driving System from Appearing Attacks 驱除“幽灵”：保护自动驾驶系统中基于激光雷达的物体检测器免受潜在攻击 Automated driving systems rely on 3D object detectors to recognize possible obstacles from LiDAR point clouds. However, recent works show the adversary can forge non-existent cars in the prediction results with a few fake points (i.e., appearing attack). By removing statistical outliers, existing defenses are however designed for specific attacks or biased by predefined heuristic rules. Towards more comprehensive mitigation, we first systematically inspect the mechanism of recent appearing attacks: Their common weaknesses are observed in crafting fake obstacles which (i) have obvious differences in the local parts compared with real obstacles and (ii) violate the physical relation between depth and point density. In this paper, we propose a novel plug-and-play defensive module which works by side of a trained LiDAR-based object detector to eliminate forged obstacles where a major proportion of local parts have low objectness, i.e., to what degree it belongs to a real object. At the core of our module is a local objectness predictor, which explicitly incorporates the depth information to model the relation between depth and point density, and predicts each local part of an obstacle with an objectness score. Extensive experiments show, our proposed defense eliminates at least 70% cars forged by three known appearing attacks in most cases, while, for the best previous defense, less than 30% forged cars are eliminated. Meanwhile, under the same circumstance, our defense incurs less overhead for AP/precision on cars compared with existing defenses. Furthermore, We validate the effectiveness of our proposed defense on simulation-based closed-loop control driving tests in the open-source system of Baidu's Apollo. 自动驾驶系统依靠 3D 物体探测器从 LiDAR 点云中识别可能的障碍物。然而，最近的研究表明，对手可以通过一些假点（即出现攻击）在预测结果中伪造不存在的汽车。然而，通过消除统计异常值，现有的防御措施是针对特定攻击而设计的，或者受预定义的启发式规则的影响。 Towards more comprehensive mitigation, we first systematically inspect the mechanism of recent appearing attacks: Their common weaknesses are observed in crafting fake obstacles which (i) have obvious differences in the local parts compared with real obstacles and (ii) violate the physical relation between depth and point density. In this paper, we propose a novel plug-and-play defensive module which works by side of a trained LiDAR-based object detector to eliminate forged obstacles where a major proportion of local parts have low objectness, i.e., to what degree it belongs to a real object. At the core of our module is a local objectness predictor, which explicitly incorporates the depth information to model the relation between depth and point density, and predicts each local part of an obstacle with an objectness score. Extensive experiments show, our proposed defense eliminates at least 70% cars forged by three known appearing attacks in most cases, while, for the best previous defense, less than 30% forged cars are eliminated.同时，在相同情况下，与现有防御相比，我们的防御在汽车上的AP/精度方面产生的开销更少。 Furthermore, We validate the effectiveness of our proposed defense on simulation-based closed-loop control driving tests in the open-source system of Baidu's Apollo. 本文提出一种新型防御模块，用于保护基于LiDAR的自动驾驶系统物体检测器免受虚假目标攻击。 Qifan Xiao,Xudong Pan,Yifan Lu,Mi Zhang,Jiarun Dai,Min Yang cs.CR,cs.AI

authors_text: Chen Tang,Li Lyna Zhang,Huiqiang Jiang,Jiahang Xu,Ting Cao,Quanlu Zhang,Yuqing Yang,Zhi Wang,Mao Yang
title: ElasticViT: Conflict-aware Supernet Training for Deploying Fast Vision Transformer on Diverse Mobile Devices
title_zh: ElasticViT：用于在各种移动设备上部署 Fast Vision Transformer 的冲突感知超网训练
abstract: Neural Architecture Search (NAS) has shown promising performance in the automatic design of vision transformers (ViT) exceeding 1G FLOPs. However, designing lightweight and low-latency ViT models for diverse mobile devices remains a big challenge. In this work, we propose ElasticViT, a two-stage NAS approach that trains a high-quality ViT supernet over a very large search space that supports a wide range of mobile devices, and then searches an optimal sub-network (subnet) for direct deployment. However, prior supernet training methods that rely on uniform sampling suffer from the gradient conflict issue: the sampled subnets can have vastly different model sizes (e.g., 50M vs. 2G FLOPs), leading to different optimization directions and inferior performance. To address this challenge, we propose two novel sampling techniques: complexity-aware sampling and performance-aware sampling. Complexity-aware sampling limits the FLOPs difference among the subnets sampled across adjacent training steps, while covering different-sized subnets in the search space. Performance-aware sampling further selects subnets that have good accuracy, which can reduce gradient conflicts and improve supernet quality. Our discovered models, ElasticViT models, achieve top-1 accuracy from 67.2% to 80.0% on ImageNet from 60M to 800M FLOPs without extra retraining, outperforming all prior CNNs and ViTs in terms of accuracy and latency. Our tiny and small models are also the first ViT models that surpass state-of-the-art CNNs with significantly lower latency on mobile devices. For instance, ElasticViT-S1 runs 2.62x faster than EfficientNet-B0 with 0.1% higher accuracy.
summary: Neural Architecture Search (NAS) has shown promising performance in the automatic design of vision transformers (ViT) exceeding 1G FLOPs. However, designing lightweight and low-latency ViT models for diverse mobile devices remains a big challenge. In this work, we propose ElasticViT, a two-stage NAS approach that trains a high-quality ViT supernet over a very large search space that supports a wide range of mobile devices, and then searches an optimal sub-network (subnet) for direct deployment. However, prior supernet training methods that rely on uniform sampling suffer from the gradient conflict issue: the sampled subnets can have vastly different model sizes (e.g., 50M vs. 2G FLOPs), leading to different optimization directions and inferior performance. To address this challenge, we propose two novel sampling techniques: complexity-aware sampling and performance-aware sampling. Complexity-aware sampling limits the FLOPs difference among the subnets sampled across adjacent training steps, while covering different-sized subnets in the search space. Performance-aware sampling further selects subnets that have good accuracy, which can reduce gradient conflicts and improve supernet quality. Our discovered models, ElasticViT models, achieve top-1 accuracy from 67.2% to 80.0% on ImageNet from 60M to 800M FLOPs without extra retraining, outperforming all prior CNNs and ViTs in terms of accuracy and latency. Our tiny and small models are also the first ViT models that surpass state-of-the-art CNNs with significantly lower latency on mobile devices. For instance, ElasticViT-S1 runs 2.62x faster than EfficientNet-B0 with 0.1% higher accuracy.
abstract_zh: 神经架构搜索 (NAS) 在超过 1G FLOP 的视觉变换器 (ViT) 自动设计中表现出了良好的性能。然而，为不同的移动设备设计轻量级、低延迟的 ViT 模型仍然是一个巨大的挑战。在这项工作中，我们提出了 ElasticViT，这是一种两阶段 NAS 方法，可在支持各种移动设备的非常大的搜索空间上训练高质量的 ViT 超网，然后搜索最佳子网（子网）以进行直接部署。然而，先前依赖均匀采样的超网训练方法存在梯度冲突问题：采样的子网可能具有截然不同的模型大小（例如，50M 与 2G FLOP），导致不同的优化方向和较差的性能。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了两种新颖的采样技术：复杂性感知采样和性能感知采样。复杂性感知采样限制了相邻训练步骤中采样的子网之间的 FLOP 差异，同时覆盖搜索空间中不同大小的子网。性能感知采样进一步选择精度较好的子网，可以减少梯度冲突，提高超网质量。我们发现的模型 ElasticViT 模型在 ImageNet 上从 60M 到 800M FLOP 实现了 67.2% 到 80.0% 的 top-1 准确度，无需额外的再训练，在准确度和延迟方面优于所有先前的 CNN 和 ViT。我们的微型模型也是第一个超越最先进的 CNN 的 ViT 模型，在移动设备上的延迟显着降低。例如，ElasticViT-S1 的运行速度比 EfficientNet-B0 快 2.62 倍，准确度高 0.1%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ElasticViT方法，通过冲突感知的超网络训练，解决在多样化移动设备上部署快速视觉Transformer（ViT）模型的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有神经架构搜索（NAS）方法在设计低计算量ViT模型时，因子网络梯度冲突导致性能下降，难以满足移动设备对轻量化和低延迟的需求。
AI.method: 提出两阶段NAS框架：首先训练覆盖广泛搜索空间的高质量ViT超网络，再通过复杂度感知采样（限制子网络FLOPs差异）和性能感知采样（筛选高精度子网络）解决梯度冲突问题，最终搜索最优子网络。
AI.result: ElasticViT模型在ImageNet上实现67.2%-80.0%的Top-1准确率（60M-800M FLOPs），在移动设备上以更低延迟超越现有CNN和ViT模型，例如ElasticViT-S1比EfficientNet-B0快2.62倍且精度高0.1%。
AI.conclusion: ElasticViT通过创新采样技术有效缓解梯度冲突，实现了在多样化移动设备上高效部署高性能ViT模型的目标，为轻量化视觉模型设计提供新思路。

authors_text: Gongpei Zhao,Tao Wang,Yidong Li,Yi Jin,Congyan Lang,Haibin Ling
title: The Cascaded Forward Algorithm for Neural Network Training
title_zh: 用于神经网络训练的级联前向算法
abstract: Backpropagation algorithm has been widely used as a mainstream learning procedure for neural networks in the past decade, and has played a significant role in the development of deep learning. However, there exist some limitations associated with this algorithm, such as getting stuck in local minima and experiencing vanishing/exploding gradients, which have led to questions about its biological plausibility. To address these limitations, alternative algorithms to backpropagation have been preliminarily explored, with the Forward-Forward (FF) algorithm being one of the most well-known. In this paper we propose a new learning framework for neural networks, namely Cascaded Forward (CaFo) algorithm, which does not rely on BP optimization as that in FF. Unlike FF, our framework directly outputs label distributions at each cascaded block, which does not require generation of additional negative samples and thus leads to a more efficient process at both training and testing. Moreover, in our framework each block can be trained independently, so it can be easily deployed into parallel acceleration systems. The proposed method is evaluated on four public image classification benchmarks, and the experimental results illustrate significant improvement in prediction accuracy in comparison with the baseline.
summary: Backpropagation algorithm has been widely used as a mainstream learning procedure for neural networks in the past decade, and has played a significant role in the development of deep learning. However, there exist some limitations associated with this algorithm, such as getting stuck in local minima and experiencing vanishing/exploding gradients, which have led to questions about its biological plausibility. To address these limitations, alternative algorithms to backpropagation have been preliminarily explored, with the Forward-Forward (FF) algorithm being one of the most well-known. In this paper we propose a new learning framework for neural networks, namely Cascaded Forward (CaFo) algorithm, which does not rely on BP optimization as that in FF. Unlike FF, our framework directly outputs label distributions at each cascaded block, which does not require generation of additional negative samples and thus leads to a more efficient process at both training and testing. Moreover, in our framework each block can be trained independently, so it can be easily deployed into parallel acceleration systems. The proposed method is evaluated on four public image classification benchmarks, and the experimental results illustrate significant improvement in prediction accuracy in comparison with the baseline.
abstract_zh: 反向传播算法在过去十年中作为神经网络的主流学习过程被广泛应用，并在深度学习的发展中发挥了重要作用。然而，该算法存在一些局限性，例如陷入局部极小值和经历梯度消失/爆炸，这导致了对其生物学合理性的质疑。为了解决这些限制，人们已经初步探索了反向传播的替代算法，其中前向-前向（FF）算法是最著名的算法之一。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的神经网络学习框架，即级联前向（CaFo）算法，该算法不像FF中那样依赖BP优化。与 FF 不同，我们的框架直接输出每个级联块的标签分布，这不需要生成额外的负样本，因此可以在训练和测试方面实现更高效的过程。此外，在我们的框架中，每个块都可以独立训练，因此可以轻松部署到并行加速系统中。该方法在四个公共图像分类基准上进行了评估，实验结果表明与基线相比，预测精度有了显着提高。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Cascaded Forward (CaFo)的神经网络训练新框架，旨在克服反向传播算法的局限性。
AI.motivation: 反向传播算法存在陷入局部极小值、梯度消失/爆炸等问题，且生物合理性存疑；现有前向-前向算法需生成额外负样本效率较低。
AI.method: CaFo框架通过级联模块直接输出标签分布，无需生成负样本，且各模块可独立训练并行加速，摆脱对反向传播优化的依赖。
AI.result: 在四个图像分类基准测试中，CaFo在预测准确率上显著优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: CaFo为神经网络训练提供了更高效、可并行的替代方案，在保持性能的同时优化了训练流程。

tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Cascaded Forward (CaFo)的神经网络训练新框架，旨在克服反向传播算法的局限性。
motivation: 反向传播算法存在陷入局部极小值、梯度消失/爆炸等问题，且生物合理性存疑；现有前向-前向算法需生成额外负样本效率较低。
method: CaFo框架通过级联模块直接输出标签分布，无需生成负样本，且各模块可独立训练并行加速，摆脱对反向传播优化的依赖。
result: 在四个图像分类基准测试中，CaFo在预测准确率上显著优于基线方法。
conclusion: CaFo为神经网络训练提供了更高效、可并行的替代方案，在保持性能的同时优化了训练流程。
search_text: The Cascaded Forward Algorithm for Neural Network Training 用于神经网络训练的级联前向算法 Backpropagation algorithm has been widely used as a mainstream learning procedure for neural networks in the past decade, and has played a significant role in the development of deep learning. However, there exist some limitations associated with this algorithm, such as getting stuck in local minima and experiencing vanishing/exploding gradients, which have led to questions about its biological plausibility. To address these limitations, alternative algorithms to backpropagation have been preliminarily explored, with the Forward-Forward (FF) algorithm being one of the most well-known. In this paper we propose a new learning framework for neural networks, namely Cascaded Forward (CaFo) algorithm, which does not rely on BP optimization as that in FF. Unlike FF, our framework directly outputs label distributions at each cascaded block, which does not require generation of additional negative samples and thus leads to a more efficient process at both training and testing. Moreover, in our framework each block can be trained independently, so it can be easily deployed into parallel acceleration systems. The proposed method is evaluated on four public image classification benchmarks, and the experimental results illustrate significant improvement in prediction accuracy in comparison with the baseline. 反向传播算法在过去十年中作为神经网络的主流学习过程被广泛应用，并在深度学习的发展中发挥了重要作用。然而，该算法存在一些局限性，例如陷入局部极小值和经历梯度消失/爆炸，这导致了对其生物学合理性的质疑。为了解决这些限制，人们已经初步探索了反向传播的替代算法，其中前向-前向（FF）算法是最著名的算法之一。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的神经网络学习框架，即级联前向（CaFo）算法，该算法不像FF中那样依赖BP优化。与 FF 不同，我们的框架直接输出每个级联块的标签分布，这不需要生成额外的负样本，因此可以在训练和测试方面实现更高效的过程。此外，在我们的框架中，每个块都可以独立训练，因此可以轻松部署到并行加速系统中。该方法在四个公共图像分类基准上进行了评估，实验结果表明与基线相比，预测精度有了显着提高。 本文提出了一种名为Cascaded Forward (CaFo)的神经网络训练新框架，旨在克服反向传播算法的局限性。 Gongpei Zhao,Tao Wang,Yidong Li,Yi Jin,Congyan Lang,Haibin Ling cs.CV

authors_text: Anna Winnicki,R. Srikant
title: A New Policy Iteration Algorithm For Reinforcement Learning in Zero-Sum Markov Games
title_zh: 零和马尔可夫博弈中强化学习的新策略迭代算法
abstract: Optimal policies in standard MDPs can be obtained using either value iteration or policy iteration. However, in the case of zero-sum Markov games, there is no efficient policy iteration algorithm; e.g., it has been shown that one has to solve Omega(1/(1-alpha)) MDPs, where alpha is the discount factor, to implement the only known convergent version of policy iteration. Another algorithm, called naive policy iteration, is easy to implement but is only provably convergent under very restrictive assumptions. Prior attempts to fix naive policy iteration algorithm have several limitations. Here, we show that a simple variant of naive policy iteration for games converges exponentially fast. The only addition we propose to naive policy iteration is the use of lookahead policies, which are anyway used in practical algorithms. We further show that lookahead can be implemented efficiently in the function approximation setting of linear Markov games, which are the counterpart of the much-studied linear MDPs. We illustrate the application of our algorithm by providing bounds for policy-based RL (reinforcement learning) algorithms. We extend the results to the function approximation setting.
summary: Optimal policies in standard MDPs can be obtained using either value iteration or policy iteration. However, in the case of zero-sum Markov games, there is no efficient policy iteration algorithm; e.g., it has been shown that one has to solve Omega(1/(1-alpha)) MDPs, where alpha is the discount factor, to implement the only known convergent version of policy iteration. Another algorithm, called naive policy iteration, is easy to implement but is only provably convergent under very restrictive assumptions. Prior attempts to fix naive policy iteration algorithm have several limitations. Here, we show that a simple variant of naive policy iteration for games converges exponentially fast. The only addition we propose to naive policy iteration is the use of lookahead policies, which are anyway used in practical algorithms. We further show that lookahead can be implemented efficiently in the function approximation setting of linear Markov games, which are the counterpart of the much-studied linear MDPs. We illustrate the application of our algorithm by providing bounds for policy-based RL (reinforcement learning) algorithms. We extend the results to the function approximation setting.
abstract_zh: 标准 MDP 中的最优策略可以使用值迭代或策略迭代来获得。然而，在零和马尔可夫博弈的情况下，不存在高效的策略迭代算法；例如，已经表明，必须解决 Omega(1/(1-alpha)) MDP（其中 alpha 是折扣因子）才能实现策略迭代的唯一已知收敛版本。另一种算法称为朴素策略迭代，很容易实现，但只有在非常严格的假设下才能证明收敛。之前修复朴素策略迭代算法的尝试有几个局限性。在这里，我们展示了游戏的朴素策略迭代的简单变体以指数速度收敛。我们建议对朴素策略迭代的唯一补充是使用前瞻策略，无论如何，这些策略都会在实际算法中使用。我们进一步表明，前瞻可以在线性马尔可夫游戏的函数逼近设置中有效地实现，线性马尔可夫游戏是广泛研究的线性 MDP 的对应部分。我们通过提供基于策略的 RL（强化学习）算法的范围来说明我们的算法的应用。我们将结果扩展到函数逼近设置。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种改进的策略迭代算法，用于解决零和马尔可夫博弈中的强化学习问题，通过引入前瞻策略实现高效收敛。
AI.motivation: 现有零和马尔可夫博弈的策略迭代算法存在收敛速度慢或收敛条件过于严格的问题，亟需更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 在朴素策略迭代基础上引入前瞻策略，并证明其在函数逼近场景下的高效性，同时扩展至策略梯度强化学习方法。
AI.result: 新算法实现指数级收敛，且在函数逼近设置中可高效实施，为策略梯度RL提供了理论界分析。
AI.conclusion: 通过简单改进朴素策略迭代，提出的新算法解决了零和博弈中的收敛效率问题，并拓展了其在函数逼近场景的应用范围。

authors_text: Alejandro Rodriguez Pascual,Ishan Mehta,Muhammad Khan,Frank Rodriz,Rose Yu
title: Understanding why shooters shoot -- An AI-powered engine for basketball performance profiling
title_zh: 了解射手为何投篮——人工智能驱动的篮球表现分析引擎
comment: 12 pages, 6 figures, to be published at MIT Sloan Sports Analytics Conference, March 4-5 2022
comments: 12 pages, 6 figures, to be published at MIT Sloan Sports Analytics Conference, March 4-5 2022
abstract: Understanding player shooting profiles is an essential part of basketball analysis: knowing where certain opposing players like to shoot from can help coaches neutralize offensive gameplans from their opponents; understanding where their players are most comfortable can lead them to developing more effective offensive strategies. An automatic tool that can provide these performance profiles in a timely manner can become invaluable for coaches to maximize both the effectiveness of their game plan as well as the time dedicated to practice and other related activities. Additionally, basketball is dictated by many variables, such as playstyle and game dynamics, that can change the flow of the game and, by extension, player performance profiles. It is crucial that the performance profiles can reflect the diverse playstyles, as well as the fast-changing dynamics of the game. We present a tool that can visualize player performance profiles in a timely manner while taking into account factors such as play-style and game dynamics. Our approach generates interpretable heatmaps that allow us to identify and analyze how non-spatial factors, such as game dynamics or playstyle, affect player performance profiles.
summary: Understanding player shooting profiles is an essential part of basketball analysis: knowing where certain opposing players like to shoot from can help coaches neutralize offensive gameplans from their opponents; understanding where their players are most comfortable can lead them to developing more effective offensive strategies. An automatic tool that can provide these performance profiles in a timely manner can become invaluable for coaches to maximize both the effectiveness of their game plan as well as the time dedicated to practice and other related activities. Additionally, basketball is dictated by many variables, such as playstyle and game dynamics, that can change the flow of the game and, by extension, player performance profiles. It is crucial that the performance profiles can reflect the diverse playstyles, as well as the fast-changing dynamics of the game. We present a tool that can visualize player performance profiles in a timely manner while taking into account factors such as play-style and game dynamics. Our approach generates interpretable heatmaps that allow us to identify and analyze how non-spatial factors, such as game dynamics or playstyle, affect player performance profiles.
abstract_zh: 了解球员投篮概况是篮球分析的重要组成部分：了解某些对方球员喜欢从哪里投篮可以帮助教练抵消对手的进攻性比赛计划；了解球员最舒服的位置可以帮助他们制定更有效的进攻策略。能够及时提供这些表现概况的自动工具对于教练来说非常宝贵，可以最大限度地提高他们的比赛计划的有效性以及专门用于练习和其他相关活动的时间。此外，篮球运动受到许多变量的影响，例如比赛风格和比赛动态，这些变量可以改变比赛的流程，进而改变球员的表现。至关重要的是，性能配置文件能够反映不同的游戏风格以及快速变化的游戏动态。我们提出了一种工具，可以及时可视化玩家表现档案，同时考虑游戏风格和游戏动态等因素。我们的方法生成可解释的热图，使我们能够识别和分析非空间因素（例如游戏动态或游戏风格）如何影响玩家的表现档案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于AI的篮球运动员投射表现分析工具，通过可视化热力图展示球员在不同比赛动态和打法下的投篮偏好。
AI.motivation: 篮球比赛中球员的投篮选择受多种非空间因素（如比赛节奏、战术风格）影响，传统分析方法难以实时捕捉动态变化，需开发能反映复杂比赛情境的性能分析工具。
AI.method: 构建AI驱动的分析引擎，结合球员投篮数据与比赛动态特征，生成可解释的热力图以可视化非空间因素对投篮表现的影响。
AI.result: 实现了能够实时生成球员性能热力图的工具，验证了比赛动态和战术风格对投篮热点分布的显著影响。
AI.conclusion: 该工具为教练团队提供了动态化、个性化的战术分析支持，有助于优化训练策略和比赛应对方案。

It is crucial that the performance profiles can reflect the diverse playstyles, as well as the fast-changing dynamics of the game. We present a tool that can visualize player performance profiles in a timely manner while taking into account factors such as play-style and game dynamics. Our approach generates interpretable heatmaps that allow us to identify and analyze how non-spatial factors, such as game dynamics or playstyle, affect player performance profiles. 了解球员投篮概况是篮球分析的重要组成部分：了解某些对方球员喜欢从哪里投篮可以帮助教练抵消对手的进攻性比赛计划；了解球员最舒服的位置可以帮助他们制定更有效的进攻策略。能够及时提供这些表现概况的自动工具对于教练来说非常宝贵，可以最大限度地提高他们的比赛计划的有效性以及专门用于练习和其他相关活动的时间。此外，篮球运动受到许多变量的影响，例如比赛风格和比赛动态，这些变量可以改变比赛的流程，进而改变球员的表现。至关重要的是，性能配置文件能够反映不同的游戏风格以及快速变化的游戏动态。我们提出了一种工具，可以及时可视化玩家表现档案，同时考虑游戏风格和游戏动态等因素。我们的方法生成可解释的热图，使我们能够识别和分析非空间因素（例如游戏动态或游戏风格）如何影响玩家的表现档案。 本文提出了一种基于AI的篮球运动员投射表现分析工具，通过可视化热力图展示球员在不同比赛动态和打法下的投篮偏好。 Alejandro Rodriguez Pascual,Ishan Mehta,Muhammad Khan,Frank Rodriz,Rose Yu cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Seungju Han,Jack Hessel,Nouha Dziri,Yejin Choi,Youngjae Yu
title: CHAMPAGNE: Learning Real-world Conversation from Large-Scale Web Videos
title_zh: CHAMPAGNE：从大规模网络视频中学习现实世界的对话
abstract: Visual information is central to conversation: body gestures and physical behaviour, for example, contribute to meaning that transcends words alone. To date, however, most neural conversational models are limited to just text. We introduce CHAMPAGNE, a generative model of conversations that can account for visual contexts. To train CHAMPAGNE, we collect and release YTD-18M, a large-scale corpus of 18M video-based dialogues. YTD-18M is constructed from web videos: crucial to our data collection pipeline is a pretrained language model that converts error-prone automatic transcripts to a cleaner dialogue format while maintaining meaning. Human evaluation reveals that YTD-18M is more sensible and specific than prior resources (MMDialog, 1M dialogues), while maintaining visual-groundedness. Experiments demonstrate that 1) CHAMPAGNE learns to conduct conversation from YTD-18M; and 2) when fine-tuned, it achieves state-of-the-art results on four vision-language tasks focused on real-world conversations. We release data, models, and code.
summary: Visual information is central to conversation: body gestures and physical behaviour, for example, contribute to meaning that transcends words alone. To date, however, most neural conversational models are limited to just text. We introduce CHAMPAGNE, a generative model of conversations that can account for visual contexts. To train CHAMPAGNE, we collect and release YTD-18M, a large-scale corpus of 18M video-based dialogues. YTD-18M is constructed from web videos: crucial to our data collection pipeline is a pretrained language model that converts error-prone automatic transcripts to a cleaner dialogue format while maintaining meaning. Human evaluation reveals that YTD-18M is more sensible and specific than prior resources (MMDialog, 1M dialogues), while maintaining visual-groundedness. Experiments demonstrate that 1) CHAMPAGNE learns to conduct conversation from YTD-18M; and 2) when fine-tuned, it achieves state-of-the-art results on four vision-language tasks focused on real-world conversations. We release data, models, and code.
abstract_zh: 视觉信息是对话的核心：例如，身体姿势和身体行为有助于超越言语本身的意义。然而，迄今为止，大多数神经对话模型仅限于文本。我们介绍 CHAMPAGNE，一种可以解释视觉上下文的对话生成模型。为了训练 CHAMPAGNE，我们收集并发布了 YTD-18M，这是一个包含 1800 万个基于视频的对话的大型语料库。 YTD-18M 由网络视频构建：对我们的数据收集管道至关重要的是预训练的语言模型，该模型可以将容易出错的自动转录文本转换为更清晰的对话格式，同时保持含义。人类评估表明，YTD-18M 比之前的资源（MMDialog、1M 对话）更明智、更具体，同时保持了视觉基础。实验表明：1）CHAMPAGNE 学会了从 YTD-18M 中进行对话； 2）经过微调，它在专注于现实世界对话的四种视觉语言任务上取得了最先进的结果。我们发布数据、模型和代码。

AI.tldr: 开发能够结合视觉上下文的对话生成模型CHAMPAGNE，并构建大规模视频对话数据集YTD-18M。
AI.motivation: 现有对话模型仅依赖文本信息，无法有效利用视觉信息（如肢体语言、场景等）对对话意义的增强作用。
AI.method: 通过预训练语言模型清洗网络视频自动字幕生成对话数据，构建包含18M视频对话的YTD-18M数据集，训练结合视觉和文本信息的生成式对话模型CHAMPAGNE。
AI.result: CHAMPAGNE在四个视觉语言任务中达到SOTA性能，YTD-18M数据集在语义合理性和视觉关联性上优于现有数据集。
AI.conclusion: 结合视觉信息的多模态对话模型能更准确理解现实场景对话，大规模高质量数据集的构建是关键突破点。

authors_text: Shashank Mehrotra,Jacob G Hunter,Matthew Konishi,Kumar Akash,Zhaobo Zheng,Teruhisa Misu,Anil Kumar,Tahira Reid,Neera Jain
title: Trust in Shared Automated Vehicles: Study on Two Mobility Platforms
title_zh: 对共享自动驾驶汽车的信任：两个移动平台的研究
abstract: The ever-increasing adoption of shared transportation modalities across the United States has the potential to fundamentally change the preferences and usage of different mobilities. It also raises several challenges with respect to the design and development of automated mobilities that can enable a large population to take advantage of this emergent technology. One such challenge is the lack of understanding of how trust in one automated mobility may impact trust in another. Without this understanding, it is difficult for researchers to determine whether future mobility solutions will have acceptance within different population groups. This study focuses on identifying the differences in trust across different mobility and how trust evolves across their use for participants who preferred an aggressive driving style. A dual mobility simulator study was designed in which 48 participants experienced two different automated mobilities (car and sidewalk). The results found that participants showed increasing levels of trust when they transitioned from the car to the sidewalk mobility. In comparison, participants showed decreasing levels of trust when they transitioned from the sidewalk to the car mobility. The findings from the study help inform and identify how people can develop trust in future mobility platforms and could inform the design of interventions that may help improve the trust and acceptance of future mobility.
summary: The ever-increasing adoption of shared transportation modalities across the United States has the potential to fundamentally change the preferences and usage of different mobilities. It also raises several challenges with respect to the design and development of automated mobilities that can enable a large population to take advantage of this emergent technology. One such challenge is the lack of understanding of how trust in one automated mobility may impact trust in another. Without this understanding, it is difficult for researchers to determine whether future mobility solutions will have acceptance within different population groups. This study focuses on identifying the differences in trust across different mobility and how trust evolves across their use for participants who preferred an aggressive driving style. A dual mobility simulator study was designed in which 48 participants experienced two different automated mobilities (car and sidewalk). The results found that participants showed increasing levels of trust when they transitioned from the car to the sidewalk mobility. In comparison, participants showed decreasing levels of trust when they transitioned from the sidewalk to the car mobility. The findings from the study help inform and identify how people can develop trust in future mobility platforms and could inform the design of interventions that may help improve the trust and acceptance of future mobility.
abstract_zh: 美国各地越来越多地采用共享交通方式，有可能从根本上改变不同出行方式的偏好和使用。它还对自动交通的设计和开发提出了一些挑战，使大量人口能够利用这种新兴技术。其中一个挑战是缺乏对一种自动移动性的信任如何影响另一种自动移动性的信任的了解。如果没有这种理解，研究人员就很难确定未来的出行解决方案是否会被不同人群所接受。本研究的重点是确定不同移动方式之间信任的差异，以及对于喜欢激进驾驶风格的参与者来说，信任如何随着移动方式的使用而演变。设计了一项双移动模拟器研究，其中 48 名参与者体验了两种不同的自动移动方式（汽车和人行道）。结果发现，当参与者从汽车转向人行道出行时，他们表现出越来越高的信任度。相比之下，当参与者从人行道转向汽车出行时，他们的信任度下降。该研究的结果有助于了解和确定人们如何建立对未来移动平台的信任，并可以为干预措施的设计提供信息，从而有助于提高对未来移动的信任和接受度。

AI.tldr: 本研究探讨了共享自动驾驶车辆在两种不同移动平台（汽车和人行道）中用户信任度的差异及其演变，特别关注偏好激进驾驶风格的参与者。
AI.motivation: 随着共享交通模式的普及，设计被广泛接受的自动驾驶系统面临挑战，尤其是不同移动平台间的信任转移机制尚不明确，影响未来技术的推广。
AI.method: 通过双平台移动模拟器实验，48名参与者分别体验汽车和人行道两种自动化移动方式，分析其在平台切换前后的信任度变化。
AI.result: 参与者从汽车切换到人行道平台时信任度提升，而从人行道切换到汽车时信任度下降，表明平台切换顺序显著影响信任演变。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果为未来移动平台设计提供了信任构建的参考，提示通过优化用户过渡体验可增强自动驾驶技术的接受度。

authors_text: Pengfei Zhu,Mengshi Qi,Xia Li,Weijian Li,Huadong Ma
title: Unsupervised Self-Driving Attention Prediction via Uncertainty Mining and Knowledge Embedding
title_zh: 通过不确定性挖掘和知识嵌入进行无监督自我驱动注意力预测
abstract: Predicting attention regions of interest is an important yet challenging task for self-driving systems. Existing methodologies rely on large-scale labeled traffic datasets that are labor-intensive to obtain. Besides, the huge domain gap between natural scenes and traffic scenes in current datasets also limits the potential for model training. To address these challenges, we are the first to introduce an unsupervised way to predict self-driving attention by uncertainty modeling and driving knowledge integration. Our approach's Uncertainty Mining Branch (UMB) discovers commonalities and differences from multiple generated pseudo-labels achieved from models pre-trained on natural scenes by actively measuring the uncertainty. Meanwhile, our Knowledge Embedding Block (KEB) bridges the domain gap by incorporating driving knowledge to adaptively refine the generated pseudo-labels. Quantitative and qualitative results with equivalent or even more impressive performance compared to fully-supervised state-of-the-art approaches across all three public datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method and the potential of this direction. The code will be made publicly available.
summary: Predicting attention regions of interest is an important yet challenging task for self-driving systems. Existing methodologies rely on large-scale labeled traffic datasets that are labor-intensive to obtain. Besides, the huge domain gap between natural scenes and traffic scenes in current datasets also limits the potential for model training. To address these challenges, we are the first to introduce an unsupervised way to predict self-driving attention by uncertainty modeling and driving knowledge integration. Our approach's Uncertainty Mining Branch (UMB) discovers commonalities and differences from multiple generated pseudo-labels achieved from models pre-trained on natural scenes by actively measuring the uncertainty. Meanwhile, our Knowledge Embedding Block (KEB) bridges the domain gap by incorporating driving knowledge to adaptively refine the generated pseudo-labels. Quantitative and qualitative results with equivalent or even more impressive performance compared to fully-supervised state-of-the-art approaches across all three public datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method and the potential of this direction. The code will be made publicly available.
abstract_zh: 对于自动驾驶系统来说，预测注意力感兴趣区域是一项重要但具有挑战性的任务。现有方法依赖于获取大规模标记流量数据集，而这些数据集的获取需要耗费大量劳动力。此外，当前数据集中自然场景和交通场景之间巨大的领域差距也限制了模型训练的潜力。为了应对这些挑战，我们率先引入了一种无监督的方法，通过不确定性建模和驱动知识整合来预测自动驾驶注意力。我们的方法的不确定性挖掘分支（UMB）通过主动测量不确定性，发现了在自然场景上预训练的模型所生成的多个伪标签的共性和差异。同时，我们的知识嵌入块（KEB）通过结合驱动知识来自适应地细化生成的伪标签，从而弥合了领域差距。与所有三个公共数据集的完全监督的最先进方法相比，定量和定性结果具有相同甚至更令人印象深刻的性能，证明了所提出方法的有效性以及该方向的潜力。该代码将公开。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需标注数据的自动驾驶注意力预测方法，通过不确定性挖掘和知识嵌入解决现有方法依赖大量标注数据及领域差异的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有自动驾驶注意力预测方法依赖劳动密集型标注数据，且因自然场景与交通场景的领域差异限制了模型训练潜力。
AI.method: 提出不确定性挖掘分支（UMB）通过多模型伪标签的不确定性度量发现共性与差异，并设计知识嵌入模块（KEB）融合驾驶知识以缩小领域差距。
AI.result: 在三个公开数据集上达到甚至超越全监督方法的性能，验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文证明了通过不确定性建模与领域知识融合实现无监督自动驾驶注意力预测的可行性，为减少对标注数据的依赖提供了新方向。

search_text: Unsupervised Self-Driving Attention Prediction via Uncertainty Mining and Knowledge Embedding 通过不确定性挖掘和知识嵌入进行无监督自我驱动注意力预测 Predicting attention regions of interest is an important yet challenging task for self-driving systems. Existing methodologies rely on large-scale labeled traffic datasets that are labor-intensive to obtain. Besides, the huge domain gap between natural scenes and traffic scenes in current datasets also limits the potential for model training. To address these challenges, we are the first to introduce an unsupervised way to predict self-driving attention by uncertainty modeling and driving knowledge integration. Our approach's Uncertainty Mining Branch (UMB) discovers commonalities and differences from multiple generated pseudo-labels achieved from models pre-trained on natural scenes by actively measuring the uncertainty. Meanwhile, our Knowledge Embedding Block (KEB) bridges the domain gap by incorporating driving knowledge to adaptively refine the generated pseudo-labels. Quantitative and qualitative results with equivalent or even more impressive performance compared to fully-supervised state-of-the-art approaches across all three public datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method and the potential of this direction. The code will be made publicly available. 对于自动驾驶系统来说，预测注意力感兴趣区域是一项重要但具有挑战性的任务。现有方法依赖于获取大规模标记流量数据集，而这些数据集的获取需要耗费大量劳动力。此外，当前数据集中自然场景和交通场景之间巨大的领域差距也限制了模型训练的潜力。为了应对这些挑战，我们率先引入了一种无监督的方法，通过不确定性建模和驱动知识整合来预测自动驾驶注意力。我们的方法的不确定性挖掘分支（UMB）通过主动测量不确定性，发现了在自然场景上预训练的模型所生成的多个伪标签的共性和差异。同时，我们的知识嵌入块（KEB）通过结合驱动知识来自适应地细化生成的伪标签，从而弥合了领域差距。与所有三个公共数据集的完全监督的最先进方法相比，定量和定性结果具有相同甚至更令人印象深刻的性能，证明了所提出方法的有效性以及该方向的潜力。该代码将公开。 本文提出一种无需标注数据的自动驾驶注意力预测方法，通过不确定性挖掘和知识嵌入解决现有方法依赖大量标注数据及领域差异的问题。 Pengfei Zhu,Mengshi Qi,Xia Li,Weijian Li,Huadong Ma cs.CV

authors_text: Han Zhang,Shangen Lu,Yixin Wang,Mihaela Curmei
title: Delayed and Indirect Impacts of Link Recommendations
title_zh: 链接推荐的延迟和间接影响
abstract: The impacts of link recommendations on social networks are challenging to evaluate, and so far they have been studied in limited settings. Observational studies are restricted in the kinds of causal questions they can answer and naive A/B tests often lead to biased evaluations due to unaccounted network interference. Furthermore, evaluations in simulation settings are often limited to static network models that do not take into account the potential feedback loops between link recommendation and organic network evolution. To this end, we study the impacts of recommendations on social networks in dynamic settings. Adopting a simulation-based approach, we consider an explicit dynamic formation model -- an extension of the celebrated Jackson-Rogers model -- and investigate how link recommendations affect network evolution over time. Empirically, we find that link recommendations have surprising delayed and indirect effects on the structural properties of networks. Specifically, we find that link recommendations can exhibit considerably different impacts in the immediate term and in the long term. For instance, we observe that friend-of-friend recommendations can have an immediate effect in decreasing degree inequality, but in the long term, they can make the degree distribution substantially more unequal. Moreover, we show that the effects of recommendations can persist in networks, in part due to their indirect impacts on natural dynamics even after recommendations are turned off. We show that, in counterfactual simulations, removing the indirect effects of link recommendations can make the network trend faster toward what it would have been under natural growth dynamics.
summary: The impacts of link recommendations on social networks are challenging to evaluate, and so far they have been studied in limited settings. Observational studies are restricted in the kinds of causal questions they can answer and naive A/B tests often lead to biased evaluations due to unaccounted network interference. Furthermore, evaluations in simulation settings are often limited to static network models that do not take into account the potential feedback loops between link recommendation and organic network evolution. To this end, we study the impacts of recommendations on social networks in dynamic settings. Adopting a simulation-based approach, we consider an explicit dynamic formation model -- an extension of the celebrated Jackson-Rogers model -- and investigate how link recommendations affect network evolution over time. Empirically, we find that link recommendations have surprising delayed and indirect effects on the structural properties of networks. Specifically, we find that link recommendations can exhibit considerably different impacts in the immediate term and in the long term. For instance, we observe that friend-of-friend recommendations can have an immediate effect in decreasing degree inequality, but in the long term, they can make the degree distribution substantially more unequal. Moreover, we show that the effects of recommendations can persist in networks, in part due to their indirect impacts on natural dynamics even after recommendations are turned off. We show that, in counterfactual simulations, removing the indirect effects of link recommendations can make the network trend faster toward what it would have been under natural growth dynamics.
abstract_zh: 链接推荐对社交网络的影响很难评估，到目前为止，它们只是在有限的环境下进行了研究。观察性研究能够回答的因果问题类型受到限制，而天真的 A/B 测试往往会因未考虑到的网络干扰而导致评估出现偏差。此外，模拟设置中的评估通常仅限于静态网络模型，而没有考虑链路推荐和有机网络演化之间的潜在反馈循环。为此，我们研究动态环境中推荐对社交网络的影响。采用基于模拟的方法，我们考虑显式动态形成模型（著名的 Jackson-Rogers 模型的扩展），并研究链接推荐如何影响网络随时间的演化。根据经验，我们发现链接推荐对网络的结构特性具有令人惊讶的延迟和间接影响。具体来说，我们发现链接推荐在短期和长期内可以表现出截然不同的影响。例如，我们观察到朋友的朋友的推荐可以对减少学位不平等产生立竿见影的效果，但从长远来看，它们可能会使学位分布更加不平等。此外，我们表明，推荐的影响可以在网络中持续存在，部分原因是即使在推荐关闭后，它们也会对自然动态产生间接影响。我们表明，在反事实模拟中，消除链接推荐的间接影响可以使网络趋势更快地达到自然增长动态下的水平。

AI.tldr: 研究链接推荐在动态社交网络中的延迟和间接影响，揭示其对网络结构的长期效应。
AI.motivation: 现有研究难以准确评估链接推荐的影响，受限于观察性研究的因果局限、A/B测试的偏差及静态模拟模型的不足。
AI.method: 采用扩展的Jackson-Rogers动态网络模型，通过模拟实验分析推荐机制对网络演化的影响。
AI.result: 发现推荐机制存在短期与长期效果差异，如朋友推荐短期内降低度不平等但长期加剧不平等，且间接效应在推荐停止后仍持续。
AI.conclusion: 动态模型能揭示推荐的延迟与间接效应，强调需考虑网络反馈循环对长期结构的影响。

authors_text: Sauradip Nag,Anran Qi,Xiatian Zhu,Ariel Shamir
title: PersonalTailor: Personalizing 2D Pattern Design from 3D Garment Point Clouds
title_zh: PersonalTailor：根据 3D 服装点云进行个性化 2D 图案设计
abstract: Garment pattern design aims to convert a 3D garment to the corresponding 2D panels and their sewing structure. Existing methods rely either on template fitting with heuristics and prior assumptions, or on model learning with complicated shape parameterization. Importantly, both approaches do not allow for personalization of the output garment, which today has increasing demands. To fill this demand, we introduce PersonalTailor: a personalized 2D pattern design method, where the user can input specific constraints or demands (in language or sketch) for personal 2D panel fabrication from 3D point clouds. PersonalTailor first learns a multi-modal panel embeddings based on unsupervised cross-modal association and attentive fusion. It then predicts a binary panel masks individually using a transformer encoder-decoder framework. Extensive experiments show that our PersonalTailor excels on both personalized and standard pattern fabrication tasks.
summary: Garment pattern design aims to convert a 3D garment to the corresponding 2D panels and their sewing structure. Existing methods rely either on template fitting with heuristics and prior assumptions, or on model learning with complicated shape parameterization. Importantly, both approaches do not allow for personalization of the output garment, which today has increasing demands. To fill this demand, we introduce PersonalTailor: a personalized 2D pattern design method, where the user can input specific constraints or demands (in language or sketch) for personal 2D panel fabrication from 3D point clouds. PersonalTailor first learns a multi-modal panel embeddings based on unsupervised cross-modal association and attentive fusion. It then predicts a binary panel masks individually using a transformer encoder-decoder framework. Extensive experiments show that our PersonalTailor excels on both personalized and standard pattern fabrication tasks.
abstract_zh: 服装纸样设计的目的是将3D服装转换为相应的2D面板及其缝制结构。现有方法要么依赖于启发式和先验假设的模板拟合，要么依赖于具有复杂形状参数化的模型学习。重要的是，这两种方法都不允许输出服装的个性化，而当今对服装的需求不断增加。为了满足这一需求，我们引入了 PersonalTailor：一种个性化 2D 图案设计方法，用户可以输入特定的约束或要求（以语言或草图），从 3D 点云进行个人 2D 面板制造。 PersonalTailor 首先学习基于无监督跨模态关联和注意力融合的多模态面板嵌入。然后，它使用变压器编码器-解码器框架单独预测二进制面板掩模。大量实验表明，我们的 PersonalTailor 在个性化和标准图案制作任务方面均表现出色。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PersonalTailor方法，通过3D服装点云生成可个性化定制的2D裁剪图案。
AI.motivation: 现有服装图案设计方法无法满足用户对个性化定制的需求，缺乏对语言或草图约束的适应能力。
AI.method: 基于多模态嵌入学习与注意力融合技术，结合Transformer编码器-解码器框架预测二值化面板掩码。
AI.result: 在个性化与标准图案生成任务中均表现出色，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: PersonalTailor通过融合用户约束实现了3D到2D服装图案的个性化生成，填补了现有技术空白。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出PersonalTailor方法，通过3D服装点云生成可个性化定制的2D裁剪图案。
ai_content.motivation: 现有服装图案设计方法无法满足用户对个性化定制的需求，缺乏对语言或草图约束的适应能力。
ai_content.method: 基于多模态嵌入学习与注意力融合技术，结合Transformer编码器-解码器框架预测二值化面板掩码。
ai_content.result: 在个性化与标准图案生成任务中均表现出色，验证了方法的有效性。
ai_content.conclusion: PersonalTailor通过融合用户约束实现了3D到2D服装图案的个性化生成，填补了现有技术空白。

search_text: PersonalTailor: Personalizing 2D Pattern Design from 3D Garment Point Clouds PersonalTailor：根据 3D 服装点云进行个性化 2D 图案设计 Garment pattern design aims to convert a 3D garment to the corresponding 2D panels and their sewing structure. Existing methods rely either on template fitting with heuristics and prior assumptions, or on model learning with complicated shape parameterization. Importantly, both approaches do not allow for personalization of the output garment, which today has increasing demands. To fill this demand, we introduce PersonalTailor: a personalized 2D pattern design method, where the user can input specific constraints or demands (in language or sketch) for personal 2D panel fabrication from 3D point clouds. PersonalTailor first learns a multi-modal panel embeddings based on unsupervised cross-modal association and attentive fusion. It then predicts a binary panel masks individually using a transformer encoder-decoder framework. Extensive experiments show that our PersonalTailor excels on both personalized and standard pattern fabrication tasks. 服装纸样设计的目的是将3D服装转换为相应的2D面板及其缝制结构。现有方法要么依赖于启发式和先验假设的模板拟合，要么依赖于具有复杂形状参数化的模型学习。重要的是，这两种方法都不允许输出服装的个性化，而当今对服装的需求不断增加。为了满足这一需求，我们引入了 PersonalTailor：一种个性化 2D 图案设计方法，用户可以输入特定的约束或要求（以语言或草图），从 3D 点云进行个人 2D 面板制造。 PersonalTailor 首先学习基于无监督跨模态关联和注意力融合的多模态面板嵌入。然后，它使用变压器编码器-解码器框架单独预测二进制面板掩模。大量实验表明，我们的 PersonalTailor 在个性化和标准图案制作任务方面均表现出色。 本文提出PersonalTailor方法，通过3D服装点云生成可个性化定制的2D裁剪图案。 Sauradip Nag,Anran Qi,Xiatian Zhu,Ariel Shamir cs.CV,cs.GR,cs.MM

authors_text: Shilong Guo,Balsam Alkouz,Babar Shahzaad,Abdallah Lakhdari,Athman Bouguettaya
title: Drone Formation for Efficient Swarm Energy Consumption
title_zh: 无人机编队以实现高效群体能量消耗
comment: 3 pages, 7 figures. This is an accepted demo paper and it will appear in The 21st International Conference on Pervasive Computing and Communications (PerCom 2023)
comments: 3 pages, 7 figures. This is an accepted demo paper and it will appear in The 21st International Conference on Pervasive Computing and Communications (PerCom 2023)
abstract: We demonstrate formation flying for drone swarm services. A set of drones fly in four different swarm formations. A dataset is collected to study the effect of formation flying on energy consumption. We conduct a set of experiments to study the effect of wind on formation flying. We examine the forces the drones exert on each other when flying in a formation. We finally identify and classify the formations that conserve most energy under varying wind conditions. The collected dataset aims at providing researchers data to conduct further research in swarm-based drone service delivery. Demo: https://youtu.be/NnucUWhUwLs
summary: We demonstrate formation flying for drone swarm services. A set of drones fly in four different swarm formations. A dataset is collected to study the effect of formation flying on energy consumption. We conduct a set of experiments to study the effect of wind on formation flying. We examine the forces the drones exert on each other when flying in a formation. We finally identify and classify the formations that conserve most energy under varying wind conditions. The collected dataset aims at providing researchers data to conduct further research in swarm-based drone service delivery. Demo: https://youtu.be/NnucUWhUwLs
abstract_zh: 我们演示了无人机群服务的编队飞行。一组无人机以四种不同的蜂群编队飞行。收集数据集来研究编队飞行对能量消耗的影响。我们进行了一系列实验来研究风对编队飞行的影响。我们检查无人机在编队飞行时相互施加的力。我们最终识别并分类了在不同风力条件下保存最多能量的结构。收集的数据集旨在为研究人员提供数据，以便对基于群体的无人机服务交付进行进一步研究。演示：https://youtu.be/NnucUWhUwLs

AI.tldr: 本文研究无人机群在不同编队形式下的能耗效率，通过实验分析风力影响并建立数据集。
AI.motivation: 无人机群服务需要降低能耗以提高续航能力，但现有研究缺乏对编队形式与能耗关系的系统分析。
AI.method: 测试四种编队形式，收集能耗数据；通过风力实验分析环境影响；计算无人机间相互作用力并分类最优编队。
AI.result: 确定了不同风况下能耗最低的编队模式，并公开数据集支持后续研究。
AI.conclusion: 特定编队可显著降低群组能耗，数据集为无人机群服务优化提供研究基础。

authors_text: Hemanth Manjunatha,Shrey Pareek,Amirhossein H. Memar,Thenkurussi Kesavadas,Ehsan T. Esfahani
title: Effect of Haptic Assistance Strategy on Mental Engagement in Fine Motor Tasks
title_zh: 触觉辅助策略对精细运动任务中心理参与的影响
abstract: This study investigates the effect of haptic control strategies on a subject's mental engagement during a fine motor handwriting rehabilitation task. The considered control strategies include an error-reduction (ER) and an error-augmentation (EA), which are tested on both dominant and non-dominant hand. A non-invasive brain-computer interface is used to monitor the electroencephalogram (EEG) activities of the subjects and evaluate the subject's mental engagement using the power of multiple frequency bands (theta, alpha, and beta). Statistical analysis of the effect of the control strategy on mental engagement revealed that the choice of the haptic control strategy has a significant effect (p < 0.001) on mental engagement depending on the type of hand (dominant or non-dominant). Among the evaluated strategies, EA is shown to be more mentally engaging when compared with the ER under the non-dominant hand.
summary: This study investigates the effect of haptic control strategies on a subject's mental engagement during a fine motor handwriting rehabilitation task. The considered control strategies include an error-reduction (ER) and an error-augmentation (EA), which are tested on both dominant and non-dominant hand. A non-invasive brain-computer interface is used to monitor the electroencephalogram (EEG) activities of the subjects and evaluate the subject's mental engagement using the power of multiple frequency bands (theta, alpha, and beta). Statistical analysis of the effect of the control strategy on mental engagement revealed that the choice of the haptic control strategy has a significant effect (p < 0.001) on mental engagement depending on the type of hand (dominant or non-dominant). Among the evaluated strategies, EA is shown to be more mentally engaging when compared with the ER under the non-dominant hand.
abstract_zh: 本研究调查了触觉控制策略对精细运动手写康复任务期间受试者心理参与的影响。所考虑的控制策略包括误差减少（ER）和误差增大（EA），并在优势手和非优势手上进行了测试。非侵入性脑机接口用于监测受试者的脑电图（EEG）活动，并利用多个频段（θ、α和β）的功率来评估受试者的心理参与度。控制策略对心理投入影响的统计分析表明，触觉控制策略的选择对心理投入有显着影响（p < 0.001），具体取决于手的类型（主导手或非主导手）。在评估的策略中，与非惯用手下的 ER 相比，EA 更具有精神参与性。

AI.tldr: 本研究探讨了触觉控制策略（误差减少和误差增强）对精细运动手写康复任务中受试者心理参与度的影响，并比较了优势手和非优势手的差异。
AI.motivation: 通过优化触觉辅助策略提升康复训练的心理参与度，从而提高精细运动功能恢复效果。
AI.method: 采用非侵入式脑机接口监测脑电图（EEG），分析theta、alpha和beta频段功率变化，结合统计分析比较不同触觉策略对心理参与度的影响。
AI.result: 误差增强（EA）策略在非优势手任务中显著提升心理参与度（p<0.001），优于误差减少（ER）策略。
AI.conclusion: 针对非优势手的精细运动康复，误差增强触觉策略能更有效提高心理参与度，为康复方案设计提供依据。

authors_text: Miqing Li,Manuel López-Ibáñez,Xin Yao
title: Multi-Objective Archiving
title_zh: 多目标归档
abstract: Most multi-objective optimisation algorithms maintain an archive explicitly or implicitly during their search. Such an archive can be solely used to store high-quality solutions presented to the decision maker, but in many cases may participate in the search process (e.g., as the population in evolutionary computation). Over the last two decades, archiving, the process of comparing new solutions with previous ones and deciding how to update the archive/population, stands as an important issue in evolutionary multi-objective optimisation (EMO). This is evidenced by constant efforts from the community on developing various effective archiving methods, ranging from conventional Pareto-based methods to more recent indicator-based and decomposition-based ones. However, the focus of these efforts is on empirical performance comparison in terms of specific quality indicators; there is lack of systematic study of archiving methods from a general theoretical perspective. In this paper, we attempt to conduct a systematic overview of multi-objective archiving, in the hope of paving the way to understand archiving algorithms from a holistic perspective of theory and practice, and more importantly providing a guidance on how to design theoretically desirable and practically useful archiving algorithms. In doing so, we also present that archiving algorithms based on weakly Pareto compliant indicators (e.g., epsilon-indicator), as long as designed properly, can achieve the same theoretical desirables as archivers based on Pareto compliant indicators (e.g., hypervolume indicator). Such desirables include the property limit-optimal, the limit form of the possible optimal property that a bounded archiving algorithm can have with respect to the most general form of superiority between solution sets.
summary: Most multi-objective optimisation algorithms maintain an archive explicitly or implicitly during their search. Such an archive can be solely used to store high-quality solutions presented to the decision maker, but in many cases may participate in the search process (e.g., as the population in evolutionary computation). Over the last two decades, archiving, the process of comparing new solutions with previous ones and deciding how to update the archive/population, stands as an important issue in evolutionary multi-objective optimisation (EMO). This is evidenced by constant efforts from the community on developing various effective archiving methods, ranging from conventional Pareto-based methods to more recent indicator-based and decomposition-based ones. However, the focus of these efforts is on empirical performance comparison in terms of specific quality indicators; there is lack of systematic study of archiving methods from a general theoretical perspective. In this paper, we attempt to conduct a systematic overview of multi-objective archiving, in the hope of paving the way to understand archiving algorithms from a holistic perspective of theory and practice, and more importantly providing a guidance on how to design theoretically desirable and practically useful archiving algorithms. In doing so, we also present that archiving algorithms based on weakly Pareto compliant indicators (e.g., epsilon-indicator), as long as designed properly, can achieve the same theoretical desirables as archivers based on Pareto compliant indicators (e.g., hypervolume indicator). Such desirables include the property limit-optimal, the limit form of the possible optimal property that a bounded archiving algorithm can have with respect to the most general form of superiority between solution sets.
abstract_zh: 大多数多目标优化算法在搜索过程中显式或隐式地维护档案。这样的档案可以单独用于存储向决策者提供的高质量解决方案，但在许多情况下可以参与搜索过程（例如，作为进化计算中的群体）。在过去的二十年中，存档，即将新解决方案与以前的解决方案进行比较并决定如何更新存档/总体的过程，是进化多目标优化（EMO）中的一个重要问题。社区不断努力开发各种有效的归档方法就证明了这一点，从传统的基于帕累托的方法到最近的基于指标和基于分解的方法。然而，这些努力的重点是在具体质量指标方面的实证绩效比较；缺乏从一般理论角度对归档方法进行系统研究。在本文中，我们试图对多目标归档进行系统的概述，希望为从理论和实践的整体角度理解归档算法铺平道路，更重要的是为如何设计理论上理想且实用的归档算法提供指导。在此过程中，我们还提出，基于弱帕累托指标（例如，epsilon-指标）的归档算法，只要设计得当，就可以实现与基于帕累托指标（例如，超容量指标）的归档器相同的理论期望。这些期望包括属性极限最优，即有界归档算法相对于解集之间最一般形式的优越性可以具有的可能最优属性的极限形式。

AI.tldr: 本文系统综述了多目标优化中的存档方法，旨在从理论和实践角度提供全面理解并指导设计高效的存档算法。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多关注存档方法的实证性能比较，缺乏从理论角度的系统性分析，导致设计原则不明确。
AI.method: 通过理论分析与比较，梳理了传统Pareto方法、指标驱动方法及分解方法，并探讨弱Pareto兼容指标的理论性质。
AI.result: 证明基于弱Pareto兼容指标（如epsilon指标）的存档算法，在合理设计下可达到与Pareto兼容指标（如超体积指标）相同的理论最优性。
AI.conclusion: 本文为多目标存档算法的设计提供了理论指导，强调弱Pareto兼容指标的潜力，推动理论与实践的结合。

search_text: Multi-Objective Archiving 多目标归档 Most multi-objective optimisation algorithms maintain an archive explicitly or implicitly during their search. Such an archive can be solely used to store high-quality solutions presented to the decision maker, but in many cases may participate in the search process (e.g., as the population in evolutionary computation). Over the last two decades, archiving, the process of comparing new solutions with previous ones and deciding how to update the archive/population, stands as an important issue in evolutionary multi-objective optimisation (EMO). This is evidenced by constant efforts from the community on developing various effective archiving methods, ranging from conventional Pareto-based methods to more recent indicator-based and decomposition-based ones. However, the focus of these efforts is on empirical performance comparison in terms of specific quality indicators; there is lack of systematic study of archiving methods from a general theoretical perspective. In this paper, we attempt to conduct a systematic overview of multi-objective archiving, in the hope of paving the way to understand archiving algorithms from a holistic perspective of theory and practice, and more importantly providing a guidance on how to design theoretically desirable and practically useful archiving algorithms. In doing so, we also present that archiving algorithms based on weakly Pareto compliant indicators (e.g., epsilon-indicator), as long as designed properly, can achieve the same theoretical desirables as archivers based on Pareto compliant indicators (e.g., hypervolume indicator). Such desirables include the property limit-optimal, the limit form of the possible optimal property that a bounded archiving algorithm can have with respect to the most general form of superiority between solution sets. 大多数多目标优化算法在搜索过程中显式或隐式地维护档案。这样的档案可以单独用于存储向决策者提供的高质量解决方案，但在许多情况下可以参与搜索过程（例如，作为进化计算中的群体）。在过去的二十年中，存档，即将新解决方案与以前的解决方案进行比较并决定如何更新存档/总体的过程，是进化多目标优化（EMO）中的一个重要问题。社区不断努力开发各种有效的归档方法就证明了这一点，从传统的基于帕累托的方法到最近的基于指标和基于分解的方法。然而，这些努力的重点是在具体质量指标方面的实证绩效比较；缺乏从一般理论角度对归档方法进行系统研究。在本文中，我们试图对多目标归档进行系统的概述，希望为从理论和实践的整体角度理解归档算法铺平道路，更重要的是为如何设计理论上理想且实用的归档算法提供指导。在此过程中，我们还提出，基于弱帕累托指标（例如，epsilon-指标）的归档算法，只要设计得当，就可以实现与基于帕累托指标（例如，超容量指标）的归档器相同的理论期望。这些期望包括属性极限最优，即有界归档算法相对于解集之间最一般形式的优越性可以具有的可能最优属性的极限形式。 本文系统综述了多目标优化中的存档方法，旨在从理论和实践角度提供全面理解并指导设计高效的存档算法。 Miqing Li,Manuel López-Ibáñez,Xin Yao cs.NE

authors_text: Annie Thomas
title: Three dimensional chaos game representation of protein sequences
title_zh: 蛋白质序列的三维混沌游戏表示
abstract: A new three dimensional approach to the chaos game representation of protein sequences is explored in this thesis. The basics of DNA, the synthesis of proteins from DNA, protein structure and functionality and sequence alignment techniques are presented. The mathematical background needed for understanding the chaos game representation and fractal analysis are briefly discussed. An account of the existing literature on the chaos game representation of DNA sequences and a detailed account of the chaos game representation of protein sequences in two dimensions with its advantages and limitations are presented. We explore a new three dimensional approach to the chaos game representation of protein sequences (3D-CGR) and study its ability a) to determine protein sequence similarity and differences, b) to study the effect of dinucleotide biases at amino acid level on the 3D-CGR derived protein homology, and c) to identify sequence similarity based on shuffled motifs that could be used for studying protein evolution due to exon shuffling.
summary: A new three dimensional approach to the chaos game representation of protein sequences is explored in this thesis. The basics of DNA, the synthesis of proteins from DNA, protein structure and functionality and sequence alignment techniques are presented. The mathematical background needed for understanding the chaos game representation and fractal analysis are briefly discussed. An account of the existing literature on the chaos game representation of DNA sequences and a detailed account of the chaos game representation of protein sequences in two dimensions with its advantages and limitations are presented. We explore a new three dimensional approach to the chaos game representation of protein sequences (3D-CGR) and study its ability a) to determine protein sequence similarity and differences, b) to study the effect of dinucleotide biases at amino acid level on the 3D-CGR derived protein homology, and c) to identify sequence similarity based on shuffled motifs that could be used for studying protein evolution due to exon shuffling.
abstract_zh: 本论文探讨了一种新的三维蛋白质序列混沌游戏表示方法。介绍了 DNA 的基础知识、从 DNA 合成蛋白质、蛋白质结构和功能以及序列比对技术。简要讨论了理解混沌博弈表示和分形分析所需的数学背景。介绍了关于 DNA 序列的混沌博弈表示的现有文献，并详细介绍了二维蛋白质序列的混沌博弈表示及其优点和局限性。我们探索了一种新的蛋白质序列混沌游戏表示（3D-CGR）的三维方法，并研究其a）确定蛋白质序列相似性和差异的能力，b）研究氨基酸水平上的二核苷酸偏差对3D-CGR衍生蛋白质同源性的影响，以及c）基于改组图案识别序列相似性，可用于研究外显子改组导致的蛋白质进化。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种三维混沌游戏表示法（3D-CGR）用于分析蛋白质序列，并研究其在序列相似性、二核苷酸偏差影响及洗牌基序识别中的应用。
AI.motivation: 现有二维混沌游戏表示法在蛋白质序列分析中存在局限性，需通过三维方法提升对序列特征和进化关系的表达能力。
AI.method: 构建三维混沌游戏表示模型，通过分形分析和序列比对技术，研究其在蛋白质相似性判定、二核苷酸偏差影响分析及洗牌基序识别中的效果。
AI.result: 3D-CGR能有效区分蛋白质序列相似性，揭示二核苷酸偏差对同源性的影响，并成功识别与外显子洗牌相关的序列模式。
AI.conclusion: 三维混沌游戏表示法为蛋白质序列分析提供了更精确的工具，尤其在进化关系和结构功能研究中具有显著优势。

authors_text: Shihao Zou,Yuxuan Mu,Wei Ji,Zi-An Wang,Xinxin Zuo,Sen Wang,Weixin Si,Li Cheng
title: Highly Efficient 3D Human Pose Tracking from Events with Spiking Spatiotemporal Transformer
title_zh: 使用尖峰时空变压器对事件进行高效 3D 人体姿势跟踪
abstract: Event camera, as an asynchronous vision sensor capturing scene dynamics, presents new opportunities for highly efficient 3D human pose tracking. Existing approaches typically adopt modern-day Artificial Neural Networks (ANNs), such as CNNs or Transformer, where sparse events are converted into dense images or paired with additional gray-scale images as input. Such practices, however, ignore the inherent sparsity of events, resulting in redundant computations, increased energy consumption, and potentially degraded performance. Motivated by these observations, we introduce the first sparse Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) framework for 3D human pose tracking based solely on events. Our approach eliminates the need to convert sparse data to dense formats or incorporate additional images, thereby fully exploiting the innate sparsity of input events. Central to our framework is a novel Spiking Spatiotemporal Transformer, which enables bi-directional spatiotemporal fusion of spike pose features and provides a guaranteed similarity measurement between binary spike features in spiking attention. Moreover, we have constructed a large-scale synthetic dataset, SynEventHPD, that features a broad and diverse set of 3D human motions, as well as much longer hours of event streams. Empirical experiments demonstrate the superiority of our approach over existing state-of-the-art (SOTA) ANN-based methods, requiring only 19.1% FLOPs and 3.6% energy cost. Furthermore, our approach outperforms existing SNN-based benchmarks in this task, highlighting the effectiveness of our proposed SNN framework. The dataset will be released upon acceptance, and code can be found at https://github.com/JimmyZou/HumanPoseTracking_SNN.
summary: Event camera, as an asynchronous vision sensor capturing scene dynamics, presents new opportunities for highly efficient 3D human pose tracking. Existing approaches typically adopt modern-day Artificial Neural Networks (ANNs), such as CNNs or Transformer, where sparse events are converted into dense images or paired with additional gray-scale images as input. Such practices, however, ignore the inherent sparsity of events, resulting in redundant computations, increased energy consumption, and potentially degraded performance. Motivated by these observations, we introduce the first sparse Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) framework for 3D human pose tracking based solely on events. Our approach eliminates the need to convert sparse data to dense formats or incorporate additional images, thereby fully exploiting the innate sparsity of input events. Central to our framework is a novel Spiking Spatiotemporal Transformer, which enables bi-directional spatiotemporal fusion of spike pose features and provides a guaranteed similarity measurement between binary spike features in spiking attention. Moreover, we have constructed a large-scale synthetic dataset, SynEventHPD, that features a broad and diverse set of 3D human motions, as well as much longer hours of event streams. Empirical experiments demonstrate the superiority of our approach over existing state-of-the-art (SOTA) ANN-based methods, requiring only 19.1% FLOPs and 3.6% energy cost. Furthermore, our approach outperforms existing SNN-based benchmarks in this task, highlighting the effectiveness of our proposed SNN framework. The dataset will be released upon acceptance, and code can be found at https://github.com/JimmyZou/HumanPoseTracking_SNN.
abstract_zh: 事件相机作为捕捉场景动态的异步视觉传感器，为高效 3D 人体姿势跟踪提供了新的机会。现有方法通常采用现代人工神经网络 (ANN)，例如 CNN 或 Transformer，其中稀疏事件被转换为密集图像或与额外的灰度图像配对作为输入。然而，这种做法忽略了事件固有的稀疏性，导致冗余计算、增加的能耗以及潜在的性能下降。受这些观察的启发，我们引入了第一个稀疏尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 框架，用于仅基于事件的 3D 人体姿势跟踪。我们的方法不需要将稀疏数据转换为密集格式或合并附加图像，从而充分利用输入事件固有的稀疏性。我们框架的核心是一种新颖的尖峰时空变换器，它能够实现尖峰姿势特征的双向时空融合，并在尖峰注意力中提供二进制尖峰特征之间有保证的相似性测量。此外，我们构建了一个大规模合成数据集 SynEventHPD，它具有广泛且多样化的 3D 人体动作集，以及更长的事件流时间。实证实验证明了我们的方法优于现有最先进的 (SOTA) 基于 ANN 的方法，仅需要 19.1% 的 FLOP 和 3.6% 的能源成本。此外，我们的方法在此任务中优于现有的基于 SNN 的基准，凸显了我们提出的 SNN 框架的有效性。该数据集将在接受后发布，代码可以在 https://github.com/JimmyZou/HumanPoseTracking_SNN 找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于事件相机的高效3D人体姿态跟踪方法，利用脉冲时空变换器直接处理稀疏事件数据。
AI.motivation: 现有方法将稀疏事件转换为密集图像或结合灰度图像，导致计算冗余和能耗增加，未能充分利用事件数据的固有稀疏性。
AI.method: 设计了首个无需数据转换的脉冲神经网络（SNN）框架，核心是脉冲时空变换器，实现双向时空特征融合，并构建了大规模合成数据集SynEventHPD。
AI.result: 相比现有ANN方法，计算量降低80.9%（19.1% FLOPs），能耗降低96.4%（3.6%），在SNN基准中也表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 提出的SNN框架有效解决了事件数据处理中的效率问题，数据集和代码已公开。

search_text: Highly Efficient 3D Human Pose Tracking from Events with Spiking Spatiotemporal Transformer 使用尖峰时空变压器对事件进行高效 3D 人体姿势跟踪 Event camera, as an asynchronous vision sensor capturing scene dynamics, presents new opportunities for highly efficient 3D human pose tracking. Existing approaches typically adopt modern-day Artificial Neural Networks (ANNs), such as CNNs or Transformer, where sparse events are converted into dense images or paired with additional gray-scale images as input. Such practices, however, ignore the inherent sparsity of events, resulting in redundant computations, increased energy consumption, and potentially degraded performance. Motivated by these observations, we introduce the first sparse Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) framework for 3D human pose tracking based solely on events. Our approach eliminates the need to convert sparse data to dense formats or incorporate additional images, thereby fully exploiting the innate sparsity of input events. Central to our framework is a novel Spiking Spatiotemporal Transformer, which enables bi-directional spatiotemporal fusion of spike pose features and provides a guaranteed similarity measurement between binary spike features in spiking attention. Moreover, we have constructed a large-scale synthetic dataset, SynEventHPD, that features a broad and diverse set of 3D human motions, as well as much longer hours of event streams. Empirical experiments demonstrate the superiority of our approach over existing state-of-the-art (SOTA) ANN-based methods, requiring only 19.1% FLOPs and 3.6% energy cost. Furthermore, our approach outperforms existing SNN-based benchmarks in this task, highlighting the effectiveness of our proposed SNN framework. The dataset will be released upon acceptance, and code can be found at https://github.com/JimmyZou/HumanPoseTracking_SNN. 事件相机作为捕捉场景动态的异步视觉传感器，为高效 3D 人体姿势跟踪提供了新的机会。现有方法通常采用现代人工神经网络 (ANN)，例如 CNN 或 Transformer，其中稀疏事件被转换为密集图像或与额外的灰度图像配对作为输入。然而，这种做法忽略了事件固有的稀疏性，导致冗余计算、增加的能耗以及潜在的性能下降。受这些观察的启发，我们引入了第一个稀疏尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 框架，用于仅基于事件的 3D 人体姿势跟踪。我们的方法不需要将稀疏数据转换为密集格式或合并附加图像，从而充分利用输入事件固有的稀疏性。我们框架的核心是一种新颖的尖峰时空变换器，它能够实现尖峰姿势特征的双向时空融合，并在尖峰注意力中提供二进制尖峰特征之间有保证的相似性测量。此外，我们构建了一个大规模合成数据集 SynEventHPD，它具有广泛且多样化的 3D 人体动作集，以及更长的事件流时间。实证实验证明了我们的方法优于现有最先进的 (SOTA) 基于 ANN 的方法，仅需要 19.1% 的 FLOP 和 3.6% 的能源成本。此外，我们的方法在此任务中优于现有的基于 SNN 的基准，凸显了我们提出的 SNN 框架的有效性。该数据集将在接受后发布，代码可以在 https://github.com/JimmyZou/HumanPoseTracking_SNN 找到。 本文提出了一种基于事件相机的高效3D人体姿态跟踪方法，利用脉冲时空变换器直接处理稀疏事件数据。 Shihao Zou,Yuxuan Mu,Wei Ji,Zi-An Wang,Xinxin Zuo,Sen Wang,Weixin Si,Li Cheng cs.CV

authors_text: Ifeyinwa Linda Anene,Yongmin Li
title: Segmentation of Retinal Blood Vessels Using Deep Learning
title_zh: 使用深度学习分割视网膜血管
abstract: The morphology of retinal blood vessels can indicate various diseases in the human body, and researchers have been working on automatic scanning and segmentation of retinal images to aid diagnosis. This project compares the performance of four neural network architectures in segmenting retinal images, using a combined dataset from different databases, namely the UNet, DR-VNet, UNet-ResNet and UNet-VGG.
summary: The morphology of retinal blood vessels can indicate various diseases in the human body, and researchers have been working on automatic scanning and segmentation of retinal images to aid diagnosis. This project compares the performance of four neural network architectures in segmenting retinal images, using a combined dataset from different databases, namely the UNet, DR-VNet, UNet-ResNet and UNet-VGG.
abstract_zh: 视网膜血管的形态可以提示人体的各种疾病，研究人员一直致力于视网膜图像的自动扫描和分割以辅助诊断。该项目使用来自不同数据库（即 UNet、DR-VNet、UNet-ResNet 和 UNet-VGG）的组合数据集，比较了四种神经网络架构在分割视网膜图像方面的性能。

AI.tldr: 使用深度学习方法对视网膜血管进行分割
AI.motivation: 视网膜血管形态可反映多种疾病，需通过自动分割技术辅助诊断，但不同神经网络架构的性能需验证
AI.method: 比较UNet、DR-VNet、UNet-ResNet和UNet-VGG四种模型在多数据库组合数据集上的分割效果
AI.result: 不同架构模型在视网膜血管分割任务中表现出性能差异
AI.conclusion: 深度学习模型可有效分割视网膜血管，不同架构的性能比较为实际应用提供参考

authors_text: Pietro Astolfi,Arantxa Casanova,Jakob Verbeek,Pascal Vincent,Adriana Romero-Soriano,Michal Drozdzal
title: Instance-Conditioned GAN Data Augmentation for Representation Learning
title_zh: 用于表示学习的实例条件 GAN 数据增强
abstract: Data augmentation has become a crucial component to train state-of-the-art visual representation models. However, handcrafting combinations of transformations that lead to improved performances is a laborious task, which can result in visually unrealistic samples. To overcome these limitations, recent works have explored the use of generative models as learnable data augmentation tools, showing promising results in narrow application domains, e.g., few-shot learning and low-data medical imaging. In this paper, we introduce a data augmentation module, called DA_IC-GAN, which leverages instance-conditioned GAN generations and can be used off-the-shelf in conjunction with most state-of-the-art training recipes. We showcase the benefits of DA_IC-GAN by plugging it out-of-the-box into the supervised training of ResNets and DeiT models on the ImageNet dataset, and achieving accuracy boosts up to between 1%p and 2%p with the highest capacity models. Moreover, the learnt representations are shown to be more robust than the baselines when transferred to a handful of out-of-distribution datasets, and exhibit increased invariance to variations of instance and viewpoints. We additionally couple DA_IC-GAN with a self-supervised training recipe and show that we can also achieve an improvement of 1%p in accuracy in some settings. With this work, we strengthen the evidence on the potential of learnable data augmentations to improve visual representation learning, paving the road towards non-handcrafted augmentations in model training.
summary: Data augmentation has become a crucial component to train state-of-the-art visual representation models. However, handcrafting combinations of transformations that lead to improved performances is a laborious task, which can result in visually unrealistic samples. To overcome these limitations, recent works have explored the use of generative models as learnable data augmentation tools, showing promising results in narrow application domains, e.g., few-shot learning and low-data medical imaging. In this paper, we introduce a data augmentation module, called DA_IC-GAN, which leverages instance-conditioned GAN generations and can be used off-the-shelf in conjunction with most state-of-the-art training recipes. We showcase the benefits of DA_IC-GAN by plugging it out-of-the-box into the supervised training of ResNets and DeiT models on the ImageNet dataset, and achieving accuracy boosts up to between 1%p and 2%p with the highest capacity models. Moreover, the learnt representations are shown to be more robust than the baselines when transferred to a handful of out-of-distribution datasets, and exhibit increased invariance to variations of instance and viewpoints. We additionally couple DA_IC-GAN with a self-supervised training recipe and show that we can also achieve an improvement of 1%p in accuracy in some settings. With this work, we strengthen the evidence on the potential of learnable data augmentations to improve visual representation learning, paving the road towards non-handcrafted augmentations in model training.
abstract_zh: 数据增强已成为训练最先进的视觉表示模型的关键组成部分。然而，手工制作可提高性能的转换组合是一项艰巨的任务，这可能会导致视觉上不切实际的样本。为了克服这些限制，最近的工作探索了使用生成模型作为可学习的数据增强工具，在狭窄的应用领域（例如少样本学习和低数据医学成像）显示出有希望的结果。在本文中，我们介绍了一个名为 DA_IC-GAN 的数据增强模块，它利用实例条件 GAN 生成，并且可以与大多数最先进的训练方法结合使用。我们通过将 DA_IC-GAN 开箱即用地插入到 ImageNet 数据集上的 ResNets 和 DeiT 模型的监督训练中来展示 DA_IC-GAN 的优势，并通过最高容量的模型实现高达 1%p 到 2%p 的精度提升。此外，当转移到少数分布外数据集时，学习到的表示比基线更稳健，并且对实例和观点的变化表现出更大的不变性。我们还将 DA_IC-GAN 与自监督训练方案结合起来，并表明在某些设置下我们还可以将准确度提高 1%p。通过这项工作，我们加强了可学习数据增强在改善视觉表示学习方面的潜力的证据，为模型训练中的非手工增强铺平了道路。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于实例条件生成对抗网络（DA_IC-GAN）的数据增强模块，用于改进视觉表征学习。
AI.motivation: 传统数据增强方法依赖人工设计的变换组合，难以兼顾性能与视觉真实性，而现有生成模型在特定领域效果有限，需更通用的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计实例条件GAN生成器作为可插拔的数据增强模块，结合监督与自监督训练框架，在ImageNet等数据集上验证其有效性。
AI.result: 在ResNet和DeiT模型上实现1%-2%的准确率提升，表征鲁棒性优于基线，在分布外数据集和视角变化下表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 可学习的数据增强方法能有效提升视觉表征学习，为非手工设计的增强策略提供了可行路径。

ai_content.motivation: 传统数据增强方法依赖人工设计的变换组合，难以兼顾性能与视觉真实性，而现有生成模型在特定领域效果有限，需更通用的解决方案。

ai_content.conclusion: 可学习的数据增强方法能有效提升视觉表征学习，为非手工设计的增强策略提供了可行路径。

authors_text: Jiawei Ma,Yulei Niu,Jincheng Xu,Shiyuan Huang,Guangxing Han,Shih-Fu Chang
title: DiGeo: Discriminative Geometry-Aware Learning for Generalized Few-Shot Object Detection
title_zh: DiGeo：用于广义少样本目标检测的判别性几何感知学习
comment: CVPR 2023 Camera Ready (Supp Attached). Code Link: https://github.com/Phoenix-V/DiGeo
comments: CVPR 2023 Camera Ready (Supp Attached). Code Link: https://github.com/Phoenix-V/DiGeo
abstract: Generalized few-shot object detection aims to achieve precise detection on both base classes with abundant annotations and novel classes with limited training data. Existing approaches enhance few-shot generalization with the sacrifice of base-class performance, or maintain high precision in base-class detection with limited improvement in novel-class adaptation. In this paper, we point out the reason is insufficient Discriminative feature learning for all of the classes. As such, we propose a new training framework, DiGeo, to learn Geometry-aware features of inter-class separation and intra-class compactness. To guide the separation of feature clusters, we derive an offline simplex equiangular tight frame (ETF) classifier whose weights serve as class centers and are maximally and equally separated. To tighten the cluster for each class, we include adaptive class-specific margins into the classification loss and encourage the features close to the class centers. Experimental studies on two few-shot benchmark datasets (VOC, COCO) and one long-tail dataset (LVIS) demonstrate that, with a single model, our method can effectively improve generalization on novel classes without hurting the detection of base classes.
summary: Generalized few-shot object detection aims to achieve precise detection on both base classes with abundant annotations and novel classes with limited training data. Existing approaches enhance few-shot generalization with the sacrifice of base-class performance, or maintain high precision in base-class detection with limited improvement in novel-class adaptation. In this paper, we point out the reason is insufficient Discriminative feature learning for all of the classes. As such, we propose a new training framework, DiGeo, to learn Geometry-aware features of inter-class separation and intra-class compactness. To guide the separation of feature clusters, we derive an offline simplex equiangular tight frame (ETF) classifier whose weights serve as class centers and are maximally and equally separated. To tighten the cluster for each class, we include adaptive class-specific margins into the classification loss and encourage the features close to the class centers. Experimental studies on two few-shot benchmark datasets (VOC, COCO) and one long-tail dataset (LVIS) demonstrate that, with a single model, our method can effectively improve generalization on novel classes without hurting the detection of base classes.
abstract_zh: 广义少镜头目标检测旨在实现对具有丰富注释的基类和具有有限训练数据的新类的精确检测。现有的方法通过牺牲基类性能来增强小样本泛化，或者在新类适应方面的改进有限的情况下保持基类检测的高精度。在本文中，我们指出原因是所有类别的判别特征学习不足。因此，我们提出了一个新的训练框架 DiGeo，来学习类间分离和类内紧凑性的几何感知特征。为了指导特征簇的分离，我们推导了一个离线单纯形等角紧框架（ETF）分类器，其权重作为类中心，并且最大程度地等角分离。为了收紧每个类的聚类，我们将自适应类特定边距纳入分类损失中，并鼓励靠近类中心的特征。对两个少镜头基准数据集（VOC、COCO）和一个长尾数据集（LVIS）的实验研究表明，使用单一模型，我们的方法可以有效地提高新类的泛化能力，而不会损害基类的检测。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为DiGeo的新框架，用于解决广义少样本目标检测问题，旨在在不损害基础类检测性能的前提下提升新型类的检测能力。
AI.motivation: 现有的方法在提升少样本泛化能力时往往牺牲基础类的性能，或在保持基础类检测精度的同时新型类的改进有限，原因在于对所有类别的判别性特征学习不足。
AI.method: 提出DiGeo框架，学习具有几何感知特性的特征，包括类间分离性和类内紧凑性。通过离线生成简单等角紧框架（ETF）分类器，最大化和等距分离类别中心，并引入自适应类别特定边距以收紧每个类别的特征簇。
AI.result: 在VOC、COCO和LVIS三个数据集上的实验表明，该方法能够有效提升新型类的泛化性能，同时不损害基础类的检测效果。
AI.conclusion: DiGeo通过几何感知的特征学习和自适应边距优化，成功解决了广义少样本目标检测中的性能平衡问题，为相关研究提供了新的思路。

As such, we propose a new training framework, DiGeo, to learn Geometry-aware features of inter-class separation and intra-class compactness.
