authors_text: Yukuan Zhang,Yunhua Jia,Housheng Xie,Mengzhen Li,Limin Zhao,Yang Yang,Shan Zhao
title: Rt-Track: Robust Tricks for Multi-Pedestrian Tracking
title_zh: Rt-Track：多人跟踪的强大技巧
abstract: Object tracking is divided into single-object tracking (SOT) and multi-object tracking (MOT). MOT aims to maintain the identities of multiple objects across a series of continuous video sequences. In recent years, MOT has made rapid progress. However, modeling the motion and appearance models of objects in complex scenes still faces various challenging issues. In this paper, we design a novel direction consistency method for smooth trajectory prediction (STP-DC) to increase the modeling of motion information and overcome the lack of robustness in previous methods in complex scenes. Existing methods use pedestrian re-identification (Re-ID) to model appearance, however, they extract more background information which lacks discriminability in occlusion and crowded scenes. We propose a hyper-grain feature embedding network (HG-FEN) to enhance the modeling of appearance models, thus generating robust appearance descriptors. We also proposed other robustness techniques, including CF-ECM for storing robust appearance information and SK-AS for improving association accuracy. To achieve state-of-the-art performance in MOT, we propose a robust tracker named Rt-track, incorporating various tricks and techniques. It achieves 79.5 MOTA, 76.0 IDF1 and 62.1 HOTA on the test set of MOT17.Rt-track also achieves 77.9 MOTA, 78.4 IDF1 and 63.3 HOTA on MOT20, surpassing all published methods.
summary: Object tracking is divided into single-object tracking (SOT) and multi-object tracking (MOT). MOT aims to maintain the identities of multiple objects across a series of continuous video sequences. In recent years, MOT has made rapid progress. However, modeling the motion and appearance models of objects in complex scenes still faces various challenging issues. In this paper, we design a novel direction consistency method for smooth trajectory prediction (STP-DC) to increase the modeling of motion information and overcome the lack of robustness in previous methods in complex scenes. Existing methods use pedestrian re-identification (Re-ID) to model appearance, however, they extract more background information which lacks discriminability in occlusion and crowded scenes. We propose a hyper-grain feature embedding network (HG-FEN) to enhance the modeling of appearance models, thus generating robust appearance descriptors. We also proposed other robustness techniques, including CF-ECM for storing robust appearance information and SK-AS for improving association accuracy. To achieve state-of-the-art performance in MOT, we propose a robust tracker named Rt-track, incorporating various tricks and techniques. It achieves 79.5 MOTA, 76.0 IDF1 and 62.1 HOTA on the test set of MOT17.Rt-track also achieves 77.9 MOTA, 78.4 IDF1 and 63.3 HOTA on MOT20, surpassing all published methods.
abstract_zh: 目标跟踪分为单目标跟踪（SOT）和多目标跟踪（MOT）。 MOT 旨在维护一系列连续视频序列中多个对象的身份。近年来，交通运输部取得了长足的进步。然而，对复杂场景中物体的运动和外观模型进行建模仍然面临着各种具有挑战性的问题。在本文中，我们设计了一种新颖的平滑轨迹预测方向一致性方法（STP-DC），以增加运动信息的建模，并克服先前方法在复杂场景中缺乏鲁棒性的问题。现有方法使用行人重新识别（Re-ID）来建模外观，然而，它们提取了更多的背景信息，而这些背景信息在遮挡和拥挤的场景中缺乏区分性。我们提出了一种超粒度特征嵌入网络（HG-FEN）来增强外观模型的建模，从而生成鲁棒的外观描述符。我们还提出了其他鲁棒性技术，包括用于存储鲁棒外观信息的 CF-ECM 和用于提高关联准确性的 SK-AS。为了在 MOT 中实现最先进的性能，我们提出了一种名为 Rt-track 的强大跟踪器，结合了各种技巧和技术。它在MOT17的测试集上取得了79.5 MOTA、76.0 IDF1和62.1 HOTA。Rt-track还在MOT20上取得了77.9 MOTA、78.4 IDF1和63.3 HOTA，超越了所有已发布的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Rt-Track的多行人跟踪方法，旨在通过改进运动和外观建模来提升复杂场景下的跟踪鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在复杂场景（如遮挡和拥挤）中存在运动信息建模不足及外观特征区分度低的问题，导致跟踪鲁棒性不足。
AI.method: 设计了方向一致性方法STP-DC增强运动建模，提出高粒度特征嵌入网络HG-FEN优化外观描述子，并结合CF-ECM和SK-AS等技术提升关联准确性。
AI.result: 在MOT17数据集上达到79.5 MOTA、76.0 IDF1和62.1 HOTA，在MOT20数据集上达到77.9 MOTA、78.4 IDF1和63.3 HOTA，超越现有所有方法。
AI.conclusion: Rt-Track通过多技术融合有效提升了复杂场景下的多行人跟踪性能，为MOT任务设立了新基准。

authors_text: Gen Li,Varun Jampani,Deqing Sun,Laura Sevilla-Lara
title: LOCATE: Localize and Transfer Object Parts for Weakly Supervised Affordance Grounding
title_zh: 定位：定位并转移对象部件以实现弱监督可供性接地
abstract: Humans excel at acquiring knowledge through observation. For example, we can learn to use new tools by watching demonstrations. This skill is fundamental for intelligent systems to interact with the world. A key step to acquire this skill is to identify what part of the object affords each action, which is called affordance grounding. In this paper, we address this problem and propose a framework called LOCATE that can identify matching object parts across images, to transfer knowledge from images where an object is being used (exocentric images used for learning), to images where the object is inactive (egocentric ones used to test). To this end, we first find interaction areas and extract their feature embeddings. Then we learn to aggregate the embeddings into compact prototypes (human, object part, and background), and select the one representing the object part. Finally, we use the selected prototype to guide affordance grounding. We do this in a weakly supervised manner, learning only from image-level affordance and object labels. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach outperforms state-of-the-art methods by a large margin on both seen and unseen objects.
summary: Humans excel at acquiring knowledge through observation. For example, we can learn to use new tools by watching demonstrations. This skill is fundamental for intelligent systems to interact with the world. A key step to acquire this skill is to identify what part of the object affords each action, which is called affordance grounding. In this paper, we address this problem and propose a framework called LOCATE that can identify matching object parts across images, to transfer knowledge from images where an object is being used (exocentric images used for learning), to images where the object is inactive (egocentric ones used to test). To this end, we first find interaction areas and extract their feature embeddings. Then we learn to aggregate the embeddings into compact prototypes (human, object part, and background), and select the one representing the object part. Finally, we use the selected prototype to guide affordance grounding. We do this in a weakly supervised manner, learning only from image-level affordance and object labels. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach outperforms state-of-the-art methods by a large margin on both seen and unseen objects.
abstract_zh: 人类擅长通过观察获取知识。例如，我们可以通过观看演示来学习使用新工具。这项技能是智能系统与世界交互的基础。获得这项技能的关键步骤是确定物体的哪个部分提供每个动作，这称为可供性基础。在本文中，我们解决了这个问题，并提出了一个名为 LOCATE 的框架，它可以识别图像中匹配的对象部分，将知识从正在使用对象的图像（用于学习的外心图像）转移到对象不活动的图像（用于测试的自我中心图像）。为此，我们首先找到交互区域并提取其特征嵌入。然后我们学习将嵌入聚合成紧凑的原型（人、物体部分和背景），并选择代表物体部分的一个。最后，我们使用选定的原型来指导可供性接地。我们以弱监督的方式做到这一点，仅从图像级可供性和对象标签中学习。大量的实验表明，我们的方法在可见和不可见的物体上都远远优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出LOCATE框架，在弱监督条件下通过定位和迁移物体部件实现仿射接地，解决智能系统如何从观察中学习物体使用方式的问题。
AI.motivation: 人类通过观察学习工具使用技能，关键在于识别物体各部分的功能（仿射接地）。现有方法依赖强监督，而智能系统需在弱监督下实现知识迁移。
AI.method: 通过定位交互区域提取特征嵌入，聚合为人类、物体部件和背景原型，筛选物体部件原型指导仿射接地，仅使用图像级标签进行弱监督学习。
AI.result: 在可见和不可见物体数据集上显著优于现有方法，验证了跨图像知识迁移的有效性。
AI.conclusion: LOCATE框架通过部件级原型迁移实现了高效的弱监督仿射接地，为智能系统环境交互提供了新思路。

search_text: LOCATE: Localize and Transfer Object Parts for Weakly Supervised Affordance Grounding 定位：定位并转移对象部件以实现弱监督可供性接地 Humans excel at acquiring knowledge through observation. For example, we can learn to use new tools by watching demonstrations. This skill is fundamental for intelligent systems to interact with the world. A key step to acquire this skill is to identify what part of the object affords each action, which is called affordance grounding. In this paper, we address this problem and propose a framework called LOCATE that can identify matching object parts across images, to transfer knowledge from images where an object is being used (exocentric images used for learning), to images where the object is inactive (egocentric ones used to test). To this end, we first find interaction areas and extract their feature embeddings. Then we learn to aggregate the embeddings into compact prototypes (human, object part, and background), and select the one representing the object part. Finally, we use the selected prototype to guide affordance grounding. We do this in a weakly supervised manner, learning only from image-level affordance and object labels. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach outperforms state-of-the-art methods by a large margin on both seen and unseen objects. 人类擅长通过观察获取知识。例如，我们可以通过观看演示来学习使用新工具。这项技能是智能系统与世界交互的基础。获得这项技能的关键步骤是确定物体的哪个部分提供每个动作，这称为可供性基础。在本文中，我们解决了这个问题，并提出了一个名为 LOCATE 的框架，它可以识别图像中匹配的对象部分，将知识从正在使用对象的图像（用于学习的外心图像）转移到对象不活动的图像（用于测试的自我中心图像）。为此，我们首先找到交互区域并提取其特征嵌入。然后我们学习将嵌入聚合成紧凑的原型（人、物体部分和背景），并选择代表物体部分的一个。最后，我们使用选定的原型来指导可供性接地。我们以弱监督的方式做到这一点，仅从图像级可供性和对象标签中学习。大量的实验表明，我们的方法在可见和不可见的物体上都远远优于最先进的方法。 本文提出LOCATE框架，在弱监督条件下通过定位和迁移物体部件实现仿射接地，解决智能系统如何从观察中学习物体使用方式的问题。 Gen Li,Varun Jampani,Deqing Sun,Laura Sevilla-Lara cs.CV

authors_text: Yongsu Ahn,Muheng Yan,Yu-Ru Lin,Wen-Ting Chung,Rebecca Hwa
title: Tribe or Not? Critical Inspection of Group Differences Using TribalGram
title_zh: 部落与否？使用 TribalGram 严格检查群体差异
abstract: With the rise of AI and data mining techniques, group profiling and group-level analysis have been increasingly used in many domains including policy making and direct marketing. In some cases, the statistics extracted from data may provide insights to a group's shared characteristics; in others, the group-level analysis can lead to problems including stereotyping and systematic oppression. How can analytic tools facilitate a more conscientious process in group analysis? In this work, we identify a set of accountable group analytics design guidelines to explicate the needs for group differentiation and preventing overgeneralization of a group. Following the design guidelines, we develop TribalGram, a visual analytic suite that leverages interpretable machine learning algorithms and visualization to offer inference assessment, model explanation, data corroboration, and sense-making. Through the interviews with domain experts, we showcase how our design and tools can bring a richer understanding of "groups" mined from the data.
summary: With the rise of AI and data mining techniques, group profiling and group-level analysis have been increasingly used in many domains including policy making and direct marketing. In some cases, the statistics extracted from data may provide insights to a group's shared characteristics; in others, the group-level analysis can lead to problems including stereotyping and systematic oppression. How can analytic tools facilitate a more conscientious process in group analysis? In this work, we identify a set of accountable group analytics design guidelines to explicate the needs for group differentiation and preventing overgeneralization of a group. Following the design guidelines, we develop TribalGram, a visual analytic suite that leverages interpretable machine learning algorithms and visualization to offer inference assessment, model explanation, data corroboration, and sense-making. Through the interviews with domain experts, we showcase how our design and tools can bring a richer understanding of "groups" mined from the data.
abstract_zh: 随着人工智能和数据挖掘技术的兴起，群体分析和群体层面的分析越来越多地应用于包括政策制定和直接营销在内的许多领域。在某些情况下，从数据中提取的统计数据可以提供对群体共同特征的洞察；在另一些情况下，群体层面的分析可能会导致包括陈规定型观念和系统性压迫在内的问题。分析工具如何促进更认真的群体分析过程？在这项工作中，我们确定了一套负责任的群体分析设计指南，以阐明群体差异化和防止群体过度概括的需求。遵循设计指南，我们开发了 TribalGram，这是一个视觉分析套件，利用可解释的机器学习算法和可视化来提供推理评估、模型解释、数据验证和意义构建。通过对领域专家的采访，我们展示了我们的设计和工具如何能够更丰富地理解从数据中挖掘的“群体”。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TribalGram可视化分析工具，旨在通过可解释的机器学习算法和可视化技术，对群体差异进行批判性分析，避免群体特征的过度概括。
AI.motivation: 随着AI和数据挖掘技术的发展，群体分析在政策制定和营销等领域广泛应用，但可能引发刻板印象和系统性压迫，需设计更负责任的分析工具。
AI.method: 基于可解释机器学习算法和可视化技术，开发TribalGram工具套件，包含推断评估、模型解释、数据验证和意义建构功能，并通过领域专家访谈验证设计有效性。
AI.result: 通过专家访谈展示TribalGram能提供更丰富的群体理解，帮助识别数据挖掘中群体特征的合理性和潜在偏差。
AI.conclusion: TribalGram为群体分析提供了可问责的设计指南和工具，有助于避免过度概括并促进更审慎的群体差异分析。

authors_text: Sara Shoouri,Mingyu Yang,Zichen Fan,Hun-Seok Kim
title: Efficient Computation Sharing for Multi-Task Visual Scene Understanding
title_zh: 多任务视觉场景理解的高效计算共享
abstract: Solving multiple visual tasks using individual models can be resource-intensive, while multi-task learning can conserve resources by sharing knowledge across different tasks. Despite the benefits of multi-task learning, such techniques can struggle with balancing the loss for each task, leading to potential performance degradation. We present a novel computation- and parameter-sharing framework that balances efficiency and accuracy to perform multiple visual tasks utilizing individually-trained single-task transformers. Our method is motivated by transfer learning schemes to reduce computational and parameter storage costs while maintaining the desired performance. Our approach involves splitting the tasks into a base task and the other sub-tasks, and sharing a significant portion of activations and parameters/weights between the base and sub-tasks to decrease inter-task redundancies and enhance knowledge sharing. The evaluation conducted on NYUD-v2 and PASCAL-context datasets shows that our method is superior to the state-of-the-art transformer-based multi-task learning techniques with higher accuracy and reduced computational resources. Moreover, our method is extended to video stream inputs, further reducing computational costs by efficiently sharing information across the temporal domain as well as the task domain. Our codes and models will be publicly available.
summary: Solving multiple visual tasks using individual models can be resource-intensive, while multi-task learning can conserve resources by sharing knowledge across different tasks. Despite the benefits of multi-task learning, such techniques can struggle with balancing the loss for each task, leading to potential performance degradation. We present a novel computation- and parameter-sharing framework that balances efficiency and accuracy to perform multiple visual tasks utilizing individually-trained single-task transformers. Our method is motivated by transfer learning schemes to reduce computational and parameter storage costs while maintaining the desired performance. Our approach involves splitting the tasks into a base task and the other sub-tasks, and sharing a significant portion of activations and parameters/weights between the base and sub-tasks to decrease inter-task redundancies and enhance knowledge sharing. The evaluation conducted on NYUD-v2 and PASCAL-context datasets shows that our method is superior to the state-of-the-art transformer-based multi-task learning techniques with higher accuracy and reduced computational resources. Moreover, our method is extended to video stream inputs, further reducing computational costs by efficiently sharing information across the temporal domain as well as the task domain. Our codes and models will be publicly available.
abstract_zh: 使用单个模型解决多个视觉任务可能会占用大量资源，而多任务学习可以通过在不同任务之间共享知识来节省资源。尽管多任务学习有很多好处，但此类技术可能难以平衡每个任务的损失，从而导致潜在的性能下降。我们提出了一种新颖的计算和参数共享框架，可以平衡效率和准确性，以利用单独训练的单任务变压器执行多个视觉任务。我们的方法的动机是转移学习方案，以减少计算和参数存储成本，同时保持所需的性能。我们的方法包括将任务分为基本任务和其他子任务，并在基本任务和子任务之间共享大部分激活和参数/权重，以减少任务间冗余并增强知识共享。对 NYUD-v2 和 PASCAL-context 数据集进行的评估表明，我们的方法优于最先进的基于 Transformer 的多任务学习技术，具有更高的准确性和更少的计算资源。此外，我们的方法扩展到视频流输入，通过跨时域和任务域有效共享信息来进一步降低计算成本。我们的代码和模型将公开。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种高效计算共享框架，通过共享单任务训练的Transformer模型参数和激活，实现多任务视觉场景理解。
AI.motivation: 多任务学习虽能节省资源，但存在任务间损失不平衡导致性能下降的问题，需在降低计算和参数存储成本的同时保持性能。
AI.method: 将任务分为基任务和子任务，共享大量激活和参数；扩展至视频流输入，跨时间域和任务域共享信息。
AI.result: 在NYUD-v2和PASCAL-context数据集上优于现有Transformer多任务方法，准确率更高且计算资源更少。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效平衡效率与精度，代码和模型将公开，为多任务视觉理解提供新思路。

search_text: Efficient Computation Sharing for Multi-Task Visual Scene Understanding 多任务视觉场景理解的高效计算共享 Solving multiple visual tasks using individual models can be resource-intensive, while multi-task learning can conserve resources by sharing knowledge across different tasks. Despite the benefits of multi-task learning, such techniques can struggle with balancing the loss for each task, leading to potential performance degradation. We present a novel computation- and parameter-sharing framework that balances efficiency and accuracy to perform multiple visual tasks utilizing individually-trained single-task transformers. Our method is motivated by transfer learning schemes to reduce computational and parameter storage costs while maintaining the desired performance. Our approach involves splitting the tasks into a base task and the other sub-tasks, and sharing a significant portion of activations and parameters/weights between the base and sub-tasks to decrease inter-task redundancies and enhance knowledge sharing. The evaluation conducted on NYUD-v2 and PASCAL-context datasets shows that our method is superior to the state-of-the-art transformer-based multi-task learning techniques with higher accuracy and reduced computational resources. Moreover, our method is extended to video stream inputs, further reducing computational costs by efficiently sharing information across the temporal domain as well as the task domain. Our codes and models will be publicly available. 使用单个模型解决多个视觉任务可能会占用大量资源，而多任务学习可以通过在不同任务之间共享知识来节省资源。尽管多任务学习有很多好处，但此类技术可能难以平衡每个任务的损失，从而导致潜在的性能下降。我们提出了一种新颖的计算和参数共享框架，可以平衡效率和准确性，以利用单独训练的单任务变压器执行多个视觉任务。我们的方法的动机是转移学习方案，以减少计算和参数存储成本，同时保持所需的性能。我们的方法包括将任务分为基本任务和其他子任务，并在基本任务和子任务之间共享大部分激活和参数/权重，以减少任务间冗余并增强知识共享。对 NYUD-v2 和 PASCAL-context 数据集进行的评估表明，我们的方法优于最先进的基于 Transformer 的多任务学习技术，具有更高的准确性和更少的计算资源。此外，我们的方法扩展到视频流输入，通过跨时域和任务域有效共享信息来进一步降低计算成本。我们的代码和模型将公开。 本文提出一种高效计算共享框架，通过共享单任务训练的Transformer模型参数和激活，实现多任务视觉场景理解。 Sara Shoouri,Mingyu Yang,Zichen Fan,Hun-Seok Kim cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Chia-Yu Hsu,Wenwen Li
title: Explainable GeoAI: Can saliency maps help interpret artificial intelligence's learning process? An empirical study on natural feature detection
title_zh: 可解释的 GeoAI：显着图可以帮助解释人工智能的学习过程吗？自然特征检测的实证研究
comment: 24 Pages, 7 Figures, Accepted to International Journal of Geographical Information Science, 2023
comments: 24 Pages, 7 Figures, Accepted to International Journal of Geographical Information Science, 2023
abstract: Improving the interpretability of geospatial artificial intelligence (GeoAI) models has become critically important to open the "black box" of complex AI models, such as deep learning. This paper compares popular saliency map generation techniques and their strengths and weaknesses in interpreting GeoAI and deep learning models' reasoning behaviors, particularly when applied to geospatial analysis and image processing tasks. We surveyed two broad classes of model explanation methods: perturbation-based and gradient-based methods. The former identifies important image areas, which help machines make predictions by modifying a localized area of the input image. The latter evaluates the contribution of every single pixel of the input image to the model's prediction results through gradient backpropagation. In this study, three algorithms-the occlusion method, the integrated gradients method, and the class activation map method-are examined for a natural feature detection task using deep learning. The algorithms' strengths and weaknesses are discussed, and the consistency between model-learned and human-understandable concepts for object recognition is also compared. The experiments used two GeoAI-ready datasets to demonstrate the generalizability of the research findings.
summary: Improving the interpretability of geospatial artificial intelligence (GeoAI) models has become critically important to open the "black box" of complex AI models, such as deep learning. This paper compares popular saliency map generation techniques and their strengths and weaknesses in interpreting GeoAI and deep learning models' reasoning behaviors, particularly when applied to geospatial analysis and image processing tasks. We surveyed two broad classes of model explanation methods: perturbation-based and gradient-based methods. The former identifies important image areas, which help machines make predictions by modifying a localized area of the input image. The latter evaluates the contribution of every single pixel of the input image to the model's prediction results through gradient backpropagation. In this study, three algorithms-the occlusion method, the integrated gradients method, and the class activation map method-are examined for a natural feature detection task using deep learning. The algorithms' strengths and weaknesses are discussed, and the consistency between model-learned and human-understandable concepts for object recognition is also compared. The experiments used two GeoAI-ready datasets to demonstrate the generalizability of the research findings.
abstract_zh: 提高地理空间人工智能 (GeoAI) 模型的可解释性对于打开深度学习等复杂人工智能模型的“黑匣子”至关重要。本文比较了流行的显着图生成技术及其在解释 GeoAI 和深度学习模型的推理行为方面的优缺点，特别是在应用于地理空间分析和图像处理任务时。我们调查了两大类模型解释方法：基于扰动的方法和基于梯度的方法。前者识别重要的图像区域，帮助机器通过修改输入图像的局部区域进行预测。后者通过梯度反向传播来评估输入图像的每个像素对模型预测结果的贡献。在本研究中，使用深度学习对自然特征检测任务中的三种算法（遮挡法、集成梯度法和类激活图法）进行了检查。讨论了算法的优点和缺点，并比较了模型学习的目标识别概念与人类可理解的概念之间的一致性。实验使用了两个 GeoAI 就绪的数据集来证明研究结果的普遍性。

AI.tldr: 本文通过比较三种主流显著性图生成技术（遮挡法、集成梯度法和类激活映射法），探讨其在地理空间人工智能（GeoAI）模型解释中的有效性，特别是在自然特征检测任务中的表现。
AI.motivation: 地理空间AI模型常被视为'黑箱'，其决策过程缺乏可解释性。为提升模型透明度，需验证显著性图技术是否能有效揭示GeoAI模型的学习逻辑，尤其在地理空间分析和图像处理任务中。
AI.method: 调研基于扰动和梯度的两类模型解释方法，选取三种算法在两个GeoAI数据集上进行实验，对比分析其在自然特征检测任务中解释模型推理行为的能力及优缺点。
AI.result: 实验表明，三种方法在解释GeoAI模型时各有优劣：遮挡法直观但计算成本高，集成梯度法精度较高但依赖梯度信息，类激活映射法能定位关键区域但可能忽略细微特征。模型学习概念与人类认知的一致性存在差异。
AI.conclusion: 显著性图技术可有效辅助解释GeoAI模型，但需根据任务需求选择合适方法。研究为提升地理空间AI的可解释性提供了实证依据和方法对比参考。

An empirical study on natural feature detection 可解释的 GeoAI：显着图可以帮助解释人工智能的学习过程吗？自然特征检测的实证研究 Improving the interpretability of geospatial artificial intelligence (GeoAI) models has become critically important to open the "black box" of complex AI models, such as deep learning. The latter evaluates the contribution of every single pixel of the input image to the model's prediction results through gradient backpropagation. In this study, three algorithms-the occlusion method, the integrated gradients method, and the class activation map method-are examined for a natural feature detection task using deep learning. The algorithms' strengths and weaknesses are discussed, and the consistency between model-learned and human-understandable concepts for object recognition is also compared. authors_text: Min Hua,Cetengfei Zhang,Fanggang Zhang,Zhi Li,Xiaoli Yu,Hongming Xu,Quan Zhou
title: Energy Management of Multi-mode Plug-in Hybrid Electric Vehicle using Multi-agent Deep Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 使用多智能体深度强化学习的多模式插电式混合动力汽车的能量管理
abstract: The recently emerging multi-mode plug-in hybrid electric vehicle (PHEV) technology is one of the pathways making contributions to decarbonization, and its energy management requires multiple-input and multipleoutput (MIMO) control. At the present, the existing methods usually decouple the MIMO control into singleoutput (MISO) control and can only achieve its local optimal performance. To optimize the multi-mode vehicle globally, this paper studies a MIMO control method for energy management of the multi-mode PHEV based on multi-agent deep reinforcement learning (MADRL). By introducing a relevance ratio, a hand-shaking strategy is proposed to enable two learning agents to work collaboratively under the MADRL framework using the deep deterministic policy gradient (DDPG) algorithm. Unified settings for the DDPG agents are obtained through a sensitivity analysis of the influencing factors to the learning performance. The optimal working mode for the hand-shaking strategy is attained through a parametric study on the relevance ratio. The advantage of the proposed energy management method is demonstrated on a software-in-the-loop testing platform. The result of the study indicates that the learning rate of the DDPG agents is the greatest influencing factor for learning performance. Using the unified DDPG settings and a relevance ratio of 0.2, the proposed MADRL system can save up to 4% energy compared to the single-agent learning system and up to 23.54% energy compared to the conventional rule-based system.
summary: The recently emerging multi-mode plug-in hybrid electric vehicle (PHEV) technology is one of the pathways making contributions to decarbonization, and its energy management requires multiple-input and multipleoutput (MIMO) control. At the present, the existing methods usually decouple the MIMO control into singleoutput (MISO) control and can only achieve its local optimal performance. To optimize the multi-mode vehicle globally, this paper studies a MIMO control method for energy management of the multi-mode PHEV based on multi-agent deep reinforcement learning (MADRL). By introducing a relevance ratio, a hand-shaking strategy is proposed to enable two learning agents to work collaboratively under the MADRL framework using the deep deterministic policy gradient (DDPG) algorithm. Unified settings for the DDPG agents are obtained through a sensitivity analysis of the influencing factors to the learning performance. The optimal working mode for the hand-shaking strategy is attained through a parametric study on the relevance ratio. The advantage of the proposed energy management method is demonstrated on a software-in-the-loop testing platform. The result of the study indicates that the learning rate of the DDPG agents is the greatest influencing factor for learning performance. Using the unified DDPG settings and a relevance ratio of 0.2, the proposed MADRL system can save up to 4% energy compared to the single-agent learning system and up to 23.54% energy compared to the conventional rule-based system.
abstract_zh: 最近新兴的多模式插电式混合动力汽车（PHEV）技术是为脱碳做出贡献的途径之一，其能量管理需要多输入多输出（MIMO）控制。目前，现有方法通常将MIMO控制解耦为单输出（MISO）控制，并且只能实现其局部最优性能。为了对多模式车辆进行全局优化，本文研究了一种基于多智能体深度强化学习（MADRL）的多模式插电式混合动力汽车能量管理的MIMO控制方法。通过引入相关性比率，提出了一种握手策略，使两个学习代理能够使用深度确定性策略梯度（DDPG）算法在 MADRL 框架下协同工作。通过对学习绩效影响因素的敏感性分析，得到DDPG智能体的统一设置。通过相关率的参数研究，得到了握手策略的最优工作模式。所提出的能源管理方法的优点在软件在环测试平台上得到了证明。研究结果表明，DDPG智能体的学习率是学习性能的最大影响因素。使用统一的DDPG设置和0.2的相关比，所提出的MADRL系统与单代理学习系统相比可以节省高达4%的能量，与传统的基于规则的系统相比可以节省高达23.54%的能量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于多智能体深度强化学习（MADRL）的多模式插电式混合动力汽车（PHEV）能量管理方法。
AI.motivation: 现有的多输入多输出（MIMO）控制方法通常将问题分解为单输出（MISO）控制，只能实现局部最优性能，无法全局优化多模式PHEV的能量管理。
AI.method: 本文引入相关性比率，提出了一种握手策略，使两个学习代理在MADRL框架下协同工作，使用深度确定性策略梯度（DDPG）算法，并通过敏感性分析获得统一的DDPG代理设置。
AI.result: 研究结果表明，DDPG代理的学习率是影响学习性能的最大因素。使用统一的DDPG设置和相关性比率为0.2时，所提出的MADRL系统相比单智能体学习系统节能4%，相比传统基于规则的系统节能23.54%。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的MADRL能量管理方法在软件在环测试平台上得到了验证，显示出显著的节能效果，为多模式PHEV的全局优化提供了有效解决方案。

tldr: 本文提出了一种基于多智能体深度强化学习（MADRL）的多模式插电式混合动力汽车（PHEV）能量管理方法。
motivation: 现有的多输入多输出（MIMO）控制方法通常将问题分解为单输出（MISO）控制，只能实现局部最优性能，无法全局优化多模式PHEV的能量管理。
method: 本文引入相关性比率，提出了一种握手策略，使两个学习代理在MADRL框架下协同工作，使用深度确定性策略梯度（DDPG）算法，并通过敏感性分析获得统一的DDPG代理设置。
result: 研究结果表明，DDPG代理的学习率是影响学习性能的最大因素。使用统一的DDPG设置和相关性比率为0.2时，所提出的MADRL系统相比单智能体学习系统节能4%，相比传统基于规则的系统节能23.54%。
conclusion: 所提出的MADRL能量管理方法在软件在环测试平台上得到了验证，显示出显著的节能效果，为多模式PHEV的全局优化提供了有效解决方案。
search_text: Energy Management of Multi-mode Plug-in Hybrid Electric Vehicle using Multi-agent Deep Reinforcement Learning 使用多智能体深度强化学习的多模式插电式混合动力汽车的能量管理 The recently emerging multi-mode plug-in hybrid electric vehicle (PHEV) technology is one of the pathways making contributions to decarbonization, and its energy management requires multiple-input and multipleoutput (MIMO) control. At the present, the existing methods usually decouple the MIMO control into singleoutput (MISO) control and can only achieve its local optimal performance. To optimize the multi-mode vehicle globally, this paper studies a MIMO control method for energy management of the multi-mode PHEV based on multi-agent deep reinforcement learning (MADRL). By introducing a relevance ratio, a hand-shaking strategy is proposed to enable two learning agents to work collaboratively under the MADRL framework using the deep deterministic policy gradient (DDPG) algorithm. Unified settings for the DDPG agents are obtained through a sensitivity analysis of the influencing factors to the learning performance. The optimal working mode for the hand-shaking strategy is attained through a parametric study on the relevance ratio. The advantage of the proposed energy management method is demonstrated on a software-in-the-loop testing platform. The result of the study indicates that the learning rate of the DDPG agents is the greatest influencing factor for learning performance. Using the unified DDPG settings and a relevance ratio of 0.2, the proposed MADRL system can save up to 4% energy compared to the single-agent learning system and up to 23.54% energy compared to the conventional rule-based system. 最近新兴的多模式插电式混合动力汽车（PHEV）技术是为脱碳做出贡献的途径之一，其能量管理需要多输入多输出（MIMO）控制。目前，现有方法通常将MIMO控制解耦为单输出（MISO）控制，并且只能实现其局部最优性能。为了对多模式车辆进行全局优化，本文研究了一种基于多智能体深度强化学习（MADRL）的多模式插电式混合动力汽车能量管理的MIMO控制方法。通过引入相关性比率，提出了一种握手策略，使两个学习代理能够使用深度确定性策略梯度（DDPG）算法在 MADRL 框架下协同工作。通过对学习绩效影响因素的敏感性分析，得到DDPG智能体的统一设置。通过相关率的参数研究，得到了握手策略的最优工作模式。所提出的能源管理方法的优点在软件在环测试平台上得到了证明。研究结果表明，DDPG智能体的学习率是学习性能的最大影响因素。使用统一的DDPG设置和0.2的相关比，所提出的MADRL系统与单代理学习系统相比可以节省高达4%的能量，与传统的基于规则的系统相比可以节省高达23.54%的能量。 本文提出了一种基于多智能体深度强化学习（MADRL）的多模式插电式混合动力汽车（PHEV）能量管理方法。 Min Hua,Cetengfei Zhang,Fanggang Zhang,Zhi Li,Xiaoli Yu,Hongming Xu,Quan Zhou cs.RO,cs.LG,eess.SY

authors_text: Yongsu Ahn,Yu-Ru Lin,Panpan Xu,Zeng Dai
title: ESCAPE: Countering Systematic Errors from Machine's Blind Spots via Interactive Visual Analysis
title_zh: ESCAPE：通过交互式视觉分析应对机器盲点的系统错误
abstract: Classification models learn to generalize the associations between data samples and their target classes. However, researchers have increasingly observed that machine learning practice easily leads to systematic errors in AI applications, a phenomenon referred to as AI blindspots. Such blindspots arise when a model is trained with training samples (e.g., cat/dog classification) where important patterns (e.g., black cats) are missing or periphery/undesirable patterns (e.g., dogs with grass background) are misleading towards a certain class. Even more sophisticated techniques cannot guarantee to capture, reason about, and prevent the spurious associations. In this work, we propose ESCAPE, a visual analytic system that promotes a human-in-the-loop workflow for countering systematic errors. By allowing human users to easily inspect spurious associations, the system facilitates users to spontaneously recognize concepts associated misclassifications and evaluate mitigation strategies that can reduce biased associations. We also propose two statistical approaches, relative concept association to better quantify the associations between a concept and instances, and debias method to mitigate spurious associations. We demonstrate the utility of our proposed ESCAPE system and statistical measures through extensive evaluation including quantitative experiments, usage scenarios, expert interviews, and controlled user experiments.
summary: Classification models learn to generalize the associations between data samples and their target classes. However, researchers have increasingly observed that machine learning practice easily leads to systematic errors in AI applications, a phenomenon referred to as AI blindspots. Such blindspots arise when a model is trained with training samples (e.g., cat/dog classification) where important patterns (e.g., black cats) are missing or periphery/undesirable patterns (e.g., dogs with grass background) are misleading towards a certain class. Even more sophisticated techniques cannot guarantee to capture, reason about, and prevent the spurious associations. In this work, we propose ESCAPE, a visual analytic system that promotes a human-in-the-loop workflow for countering systematic errors. By allowing human users to easily inspect spurious associations, the system facilitates users to spontaneously recognize concepts associated misclassifications and evaluate mitigation strategies that can reduce biased associations. We also propose two statistical approaches, relative concept association to better quantify the associations between a concept and instances, and debias method to mitigate spurious associations. We demonstrate the utility of our proposed ESCAPE system and statistical measures through extensive evaluation including quantitative experiments, usage scenarios, expert interviews, and controlled user experiments.
abstract_zh: 分类模型学习概括数据样本与其目标类别之间的关联。然而，研究人员越来越多地观察到，机器学习实践很容易导致人工智能应用出现系统性错误，这种现象被称为人工智能盲点。当使用训练样本（例如猫/狗分类）训练模型时，会出现这种盲点，其中重要模式（例如黑猫）丢失，或者外围/不良模式（例如草背景的狗）误导某个类别。即使更复杂的技术也不能保证捕获、推理和防止虚假关联。在这项工作中，我们提出了 ESCAPE，这是一种视觉分析系统，可促进人机交互工作流程以应对系统错误。通过允许人类用户轻松检查虚假关联，该系统有助于用户自发地识别与错误分类相关的概念，并评估可以减少有偏见关联的缓解策略。我们还提出了两种统计方法，即相对概念关联以更好地量化概念和实例之间的关联，以及去偏差方法以减轻虚假关联。我们通过广泛的评估（包括定量实验、使用场景、专家访谈和受控用户实验）展示了我们提出的 ESCAPE 系统和统计测量的实用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ESCAPE系统，通过交互式可视化分析解决机器学习模型中的系统性错误（AI盲点）问题。
AI.motivation: 现有机器学习模型易因训练数据中缺失的关键模式或误导性模式产生系统性错误，传统方法难以有效识别和消除这些错误。
AI.method: 设计ESCAPE系统，结合可视化分析与人类反馈机制，并提出相对概念关联度统计方法及去偏算法以量化并减少虚假关联。
AI.result: 通过定量实验、使用场景测试、专家访谈及用户实验验证，ESCAPE能有效帮助用户发现错误关联并评估缓解策略。
AI.conclusion: ESCAPE系统通过人机协作与统计方法可显著降低模型系统性错误，提升AI可靠性与可解释性。

authors_text: Miikka Kuutila,Carita Kiili,Reijo Kupiainen,Eetu Huusko,Junhao Li,Simo Hosio,Mika Mäntylä,Julie Coiro,Kristian Kiili
title: Revealing complexities when adult readers engage in the credibility evaluation of social media posts
title_zh: 当成人读者参与社交媒体帖子的可信度评估时，揭示出复杂性
comment: 25 pages, 5 figures including the appendix. Accepted to Computers in Human Behavior
comments: 25 pages, 5 figures including the appendix. Accepted to Computers in Human Behavior
abstract: The present study investigates the role of source characteristics, evidence quality, crowdsourcing platform, and prior beliefs of the topic in adult readers' credibility evaluations of short healthrelated social media posts. Researchers designed content for the posts concerning five health topics by manipulating source characteristics (source's expertise, gender, and ethnicity), accuracy of the claims, and evidence quality (research evidence, testimony, consensus, and personal experience) in the posts. Then, accurate and inaccurate posts varying in these other manipulated aspects were computer-generated. Crowdworkers (N = 844) recruited from two platforms were asked to evaluate the credibility of ten social media posts, resulting in 8380 evaluations. Before credibility evaluation, participants' prior beliefs on the topics of the posts were assessed. Results showed that prior belief consistency and source expertise most affected the perceived credibility of accurate and inaccurate social media posts after controlling for the topic of the post. In contrast, the quality of evidence supporting the health claim mattered relatively little. In addition, the data collection platform had a notable impact, such that posts containing inaccurate claims were much more likely to be rated higher on one platform compared to the other. Implications for credibility evaluation theory and research are discussed.
summary: The present study investigates the role of source characteristics, evidence quality, crowdsourcing platform, and prior beliefs of the topic in adult readers' credibility evaluations of short healthrelated social media posts. Researchers designed content for the posts concerning five health topics by manipulating source characteristics (source's expertise, gender, and ethnicity), accuracy of the claims, and evidence quality (research evidence, testimony, consensus, and personal experience) in the posts. Then, accurate and inaccurate posts varying in these other manipulated aspects were computer-generated. Crowdworkers (N = 844) recruited from two platforms were asked to evaluate the credibility of ten social media posts, resulting in 8380 evaluations. Before credibility evaluation, participants' prior beliefs on the topics of the posts were assessed. Results showed that prior belief consistency and source expertise most affected the perceived credibility of accurate and inaccurate social media posts after controlling for the topic of the post. In contrast, the quality of evidence supporting the health claim mattered relatively little. In addition, the data collection platform had a notable impact, such that posts containing inaccurate claims were much more likely to be rated higher on one platform compared to the other. Implications for credibility evaluation theory and research are discussed.
abstract_zh: 本研究调查了来源特征、证据质量、众包平台和主题的先验信念在成人读者对健康相关社交媒体短文的可信度评估中的作用。研究人员通过操纵帖子中的来源特征（来源的专业知识、性别和种族）、声明的准确性和证据质量（研究证据、证词、共识和个人经验）来设计涉及五个健康主题的帖子内容。然后，在这些其他被操纵的方面有所不同的准确和不准确的帖子是计算机生成的。从两个平台招募的众包工作者 (N = 844) 被要求评估 10 个社交媒体帖子的可信度，得出 8380 条评估。在可信度评估之前，先评估参与者对帖子主题的先前信念。结果表明，在控制帖子主题后，先前的信念一致性和来源专业知识对准确和不准确的社交媒体帖子的感知可信度影响最大。相比之下，支持健康主张的证据质量相对不那么重要。此外，数据收集平台产生了显着的影响，与另一个平台相比，包含不准确说法的帖子更有可能在一个平台上获得更高的评级。讨论了对可信度评估理论和研究的影响。

AI.tldr: 本研究探讨成人读者在评估社交媒体健康相关帖子可信度时，受来源特征、证据质量、平台及先验信念的影响。
AI.motivation: 随着社交媒体信息泛滥，理解公众如何判断信息可信度对遏制虚假信息传播至关重要。
AI.method: 通过操控帖子来源特征（专业性、性别、种族）、声明准确性及证据类型（研究证据、证词等），生成844名参与者在两个平台上的8380次可信度评估数据。
AI.result: 先验信念一致性与来源专业性对可信度判断影响最大，证据质量作用较小；数据平台差异显著，某平台对不实信息评分偏高。
AI.conclusion: 可信度评估理论需纳入先验信念与来源因素，平台差异提示评估结果受情境影响。

search_text: Revealing complexities when adult readers engage in the credibility evaluation of social media posts 当成人读者参与社交媒体帖子的可信度评估时，揭示出复杂性 The present study investigates the role of source characteristics, evidence quality, crowdsourcing platform, and prior beliefs of the topic in adult readers' credibility evaluations of short healthrelated social media posts. Researchers designed content for the posts concerning five health topics by manipulating source characteristics (source's expertise, gender, and ethnicity), accuracy of the claims, and evidence quality (research evidence, testimony, consensus, and personal experience) in the posts. Then, accurate and inaccurate posts varying in these other manipulated aspects were computer-generated. Crowdworkers (N = 844) recruited from two platforms were asked to evaluate the credibility of ten social media posts, resulting in 8380 evaluations. Before credibility evaluation, participants' prior beliefs on the topics of the posts were assessed. Results showed that prior belief consistency and source expertise most affected the perceived credibility of accurate and inaccurate social media posts after controlling for the topic of the post. In contrast, the quality of evidence supporting the health claim mattered relatively little. In addition, the data collection platform had a notable impact, such that posts containing inaccurate claims were much more likely to be rated higher on one platform compared to the other. Implications for credibility evaluation theory and research are discussed. 本研究调查了来源特征、证据质量、众包平台和主题的先验信念在成人读者对健康相关社交媒体短文的可信度评估中的作用。研究人员通过操纵帖子中的来源特征（来源的专业知识、性别和种族）、声明的准确性和证据质量（研究证据、证词、共识和个人经验）来设计涉及五个健康主题的帖子内容。然后，在这些其他被操纵的方面有所不同的准确和不准确的帖子是计算机生成的。从两个平台招募的众包工作者 (N = 844) 被要求评估 10 个社交媒体帖子的可信度，得出 8380 条评估。在可信度评估之前，先评估参与者对帖子主题的先前信念。结果表明，在控制帖子主题后，先前的信念一致性和来源专业知识对准确和不准确的社交媒体帖子的感知可信度影响最大。相比之下，支持健康主张的证据质量相对不那么重要。此外，数据收集平台产生了显着的影响，与另一个平台相比，包含不准确说法的帖子更有可能在一个平台上获得更高的评级。讨论了对可信度评估理论和研究的影响。 本研究探讨成人读者在评估社交媒体健康相关帖子可信度时，受来源特征、证据质量、平台及先验信念的影响。 Miikka Kuutila,Carita Kiili,Reijo Kupiainen,Eetu Huusko,Junhao Li,Simo Hosio,Mika Mäntylä,Julie Coiro,Kristian Kiili cs.SI,cs.HC

authors_text: Jiamian Wang,Huan Wang,Yulun Zhang,Yun Fu,Zhiqiang Tao
title: Iterative Soft Shrinkage Learning for Efficient Image Super-Resolution
title_zh: 用于高效图像超分辨率的迭代软收缩学习
comment: Accepted by ICCV 2023, code released at https://github.com/Jiamian-Wang/Iterative-Soft-Shrinkage-SR
comments: Accepted by ICCV 2023, code released at https://github.com/Jiamian-Wang/Iterative-Soft-Shrinkage-SR
abstract: Image super-resolution (SR) has witnessed extensive neural network designs from CNN to transformer architectures. However, prevailing SR models suffer from prohibitive memory footprint and intensive computations, which limits further deployment on edge devices. This work investigates the potential of network pruning for super-resolution to take advantage of off-the-shelf network designs and reduce the underlying computational overhead. Two main challenges remain in applying pruning methods for SR. First, the widely-used filter pruning technique reflects limited granularity and restricted adaptability to diverse network structures. Second, existing pruning methods generally operate upon a pre-trained network for the sparse structure determination, hard to get rid of dense model training in the traditional SR paradigm. To address these challenges, we adopt unstructured pruning with sparse models directly trained from scratch. Specifically, we propose a novel Iterative Soft Shrinkage-Percentage (ISS-P) method by optimizing the sparse structure of a randomly initialized network at each iteration and tweaking unimportant weights with a small amount proportional to the magnitude scale on-the-fly. We observe that the proposed ISS-P can dynamically learn sparse structures adapting to the optimization process and preserve the sparse model's trainability by yielding a more regularized gradient throughput. Experiments on benchmark datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed ISS-P over diverse network architectures. Code is available at https://github.com/Jiamian-Wang/Iterative-Soft-Shrinkage-SR
summary: Image super-resolution (SR) has witnessed extensive neural network designs from CNN to transformer architectures. However, prevailing SR models suffer from prohibitive memory footprint and intensive computations, which limits further deployment on edge devices. This work investigates the potential of network pruning for super-resolution to take advantage of off-the-shelf network designs and reduce the underlying computational overhead. Two main challenges remain in applying pruning methods for SR. First, the widely-used filter pruning technique reflects limited granularity and restricted adaptability to diverse network structures. Second, existing pruning methods generally operate upon a pre-trained network for the sparse structure determination, hard to get rid of dense model training in the traditional SR paradigm. To address these challenges, we adopt unstructured pruning with sparse models directly trained from scratch. Specifically, we propose a novel Iterative Soft Shrinkage-Percentage (ISS-P) method by optimizing the sparse structure of a randomly initialized network at each iteration and tweaking unimportant weights with a small amount proportional to the magnitude scale on-the-fly. We observe that the proposed ISS-P can dynamically learn sparse structures adapting to the optimization process and preserve the sparse model's trainability by yielding a more regularized gradient throughput. Experiments on benchmark datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed ISS-P over diverse network architectures. Code is available at https://github.com/Jiamian-Wang/Iterative-Soft-Shrinkage-SR
abstract_zh: 图像超分辨率 (SR) 见证了从 CNN 到 Transformer 架构的广泛神经网络设计。然而，流行的 SR 模型存在内存占用过高和计算密集的问题，这限制了在边缘设备上的进一步部署。这项工作研究了超分辨率网络修剪的潜力，以利用现成的网络设计并减少潜在的计算开销。应用 SR 剪枝方法仍然存在两个主要挑战。首先，广泛使用的过滤器剪枝技术反映了有限的粒度和对不同网络结构的有限适应性。其次，现有的剪枝方法通常在预先训练的网络上进行稀疏结构确定，很难摆脱传统 SR 范式中的密集模型训练。为了应对这些挑战，我们采用非结构化剪枝，并直接从头开始训练稀疏模型。具体来说，我们提出了一种新颖的迭代软收缩百分比（ISS-P）方法，通过在每次迭代时优化随机初始化网络的稀疏结构，并以与动态幅度比例成比例的少量调整不重要的权重。我们观察到，所提出的 ISS-P 可以动态学习适应优化过程的稀疏结构，并通过产生更正则化的梯度吞吐量来保持稀疏模型的可训练性。基准数据集上的实验证明了所提出的 ISS-P 在不同网络架构上的有效性。代码可在 https://github.com/Jiamian-Wang/Iterative-Soft-Shrinkage-SR 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种称为迭代软收缩百分比（ISS-P）的方法，通过直接训练稀疏模型来实现高效的图像超分辨率，以减少计算开销。
AI.motivation: 现有的超分辨率模型存在内存占用高和计算量大的问题，难以部署到边缘设备。传统剪枝方法适应性差且依赖预训练模型，无法有效降低计算复杂度。
AI.method: 采用无结构剪枝技术，从随机初始化网络开始直接训练稀疏模型。通过迭代优化网络稀疏结构，并按权重幅度动态调整不重要参数，实现更正则化的梯度传输。
AI.result: 在基准数据集上的实验表明，ISS-P方法在多种网络架构中均能有效提升剪枝效率，同时保持模型性能。
AI.conclusion: ISS-P方法通过动态学习稀疏结构，在保证模型可训练性的前提下显著降低计算成本，为边缘设备部署提供了可行方案。

However, prevailing SR models suffer from prohibitive memory footprint and intensive computations, which limits further deployment on edge devices. This work investigates the potential of network pruning for super-resolution to take advantage of off-the-shelf network designs and reduce the underlying computational overhead. Two main challenges remain in applying pruning methods for SR. First, the widely-used filter pruning technique reflects limited granularity and restricted adaptability to diverse network structures. Second, existing pruning methods generally operate upon a pre-trained network for the sparse structure determination, hard to get rid of dense model training in the traditional SR paradigm. To address these challenges, we adopt unstructured pruning with sparse models directly trained from scratch. Specifically, we propose a novel Iterative Soft Shrinkage-Percentage (ISS-P) method by optimizing the sparse structure of a randomly initialized network at each iteration and tweaking unimportant weights with a small amount proportional to the magnitude scale on-the-fly. We observe that the proposed ISS-P can dynamically learn sparse structures adapting to the optimization process and preserve the sparse model's trainability by yielding a more regularized gradient throughput. Experiments on benchmark datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed ISS-P over diverse network architectures. authors_text: Jinfan Zhou,William Muirhead,Simon C. Williams,Danail Stoyanov,Hani J. Marcus,Evangelos B. Mazomenos
title: Shifted-Windows Transformers for the Detection of Cerebral Aneurysms in Microsurgery
title_zh: 用于显微外科手术中脑动脉瘤检测的移窗变压器
abstract: Purpose: Microsurgical Aneurysm Clipping Surgery (MACS) carries a high risk for intraoperative aneurysm rupture. Automated recognition of instances when the aneurysm is exposed in the surgical video would be a valuable reference point for neuronavigation, indicating phase transitioning and more importantly designating moments of high risk for rupture. This article introduces the MACS dataset containing 16 surgical videos with frame-level expert annotations and proposes a learning methodology for surgical scene understanding identifying video frames with the aneurysm present in the operating microscope's field-of-view. Methods: Despite the dataset imbalance (80% no presence, 20% presence) and developed without explicit annotations, we demonstrate the applicability of Transformer-based deep learning architectures (MACSSwin-T, vidMACSSwin-T) to detect the aneurysm and classify MACS frames accordingly. We evaluate the proposed models in multiple-fold cross-validation experiments with independent sets and in an unseen set of 15 images against 10 human experts (neurosurgeons). Results: Average (across folds) accuracy of 80.8% (range 78.5%-82.4%) and 87.1% (range 85.1%-91.3%) is obtained for the image- and video-level approach respectively, demonstrating that the models effectively learn the classification task. Qualitative evaluation of the models' class activation maps show these to be localized on the aneurysm's actual location. Depending on the decision threshold, MACSWin-T achieves 66.7% to 86.7% accuracy in the unseen images, compared to 82% of human raters, with moderate to strong correlation.
summary: Purpose: Microsurgical Aneurysm Clipping Surgery (MACS) carries a high risk for intraoperative aneurysm rupture. Automated recognition of instances when the aneurysm is exposed in the surgical video would be a valuable reference point for neuronavigation, indicating phase transitioning and more importantly designating moments of high risk for rupture. This article introduces the MACS dataset containing 16 surgical videos with frame-level expert annotations and proposes a learning methodology for surgical scene understanding identifying video frames with the aneurysm present in the operating microscope's field-of-view. Methods: Despite the dataset imbalance (80% no presence, 20% presence) and developed without explicit annotations, we demonstrate the applicability of Transformer-based deep learning architectures (MACSSwin-T, vidMACSSwin-T) to detect the aneurysm and classify MACS frames accordingly. We evaluate the proposed models in multiple-fold cross-validation experiments with independent sets and in an unseen set of 15 images against 10 human experts (neurosurgeons). Results: Average (across folds) accuracy of 80.8% (range 78.5%-82.4%) and 87.1% (range 85.1%-91.3%) is obtained for the image- and video-level approach respectively, demonstrating that the models effectively learn the classification task. Qualitative evaluation of the models' class activation maps show these to be localized on the aneurysm's actual location. Depending on the decision threshold, MACSWin-T achieves 66.7% to 86.7% accuracy in the unseen images, compared to 82% of human raters, with moderate to strong correlation.
abstract_zh: 目的：显微动脉瘤夹闭手术 (MACS) 术中动脉瘤破裂的风险很高。自动识别手术视频中动脉瘤暴露的情况将是神经导航的一个有价值的参考点，指示相变，更重要的是指定破裂高风险时刻。本文介绍了包含 16 个带有帧级专家注释的手术视频的 MACS 数据集，并提出了一种用于手术场景理解的学习方法，用于识别手术显微镜视野中存在动脉瘤的视频帧。方法：尽管数据集不平衡（80% 不存在，20% 存在）并且在没有明确注释的情况下开发，我们证明了基于 Transformer 的深度学习架构（MCSSwin-T、vidMCSSwin-T）的适用性来检测动脉瘤并相应地对 MACS 帧进行分类。我们在独立组的多重交叉验证实验中以及针对 10 名人类专家（神经外科医生）的未见过的 15 张图像组中评估了所提出的模型。结果：图像和视频级方法的平均（跨折叠）准确率分别为 80.8%（范围 78.5%-82.4%）和 87.1%（范围 85.1%-91.3%），表明模型有效地学习了分类任务。模型类激活图的定性评估表明这些激活图位于动脉瘤的实际位置。根据决策阈值，MACSWin-T 在未见过的图像中实现了 66.7% 至 86.7% 的准确度，而人类评分者的准确度为 82%，具有中等到强的相关性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于Shifted-Windows Transformer的模型，用于在显微手术视频中检测颅内动脉瘤，以辅助神经导航和风险预警。
AI.motivation: 显微动脉瘤夹闭术中动脉瘤破裂风险高，需实时识别术中暴露的动脉瘤帧以辅助导航并预警高风险时刻。
AI.method: 构建包含16个手术视频的MACS数据集，采用Transformer架构（MACSSwin-T、vidMACSSwin-T）处理数据不平衡问题，并通过交叉验证与专家标注对比评估模型。
AI.conclusion: 所提模型能有效学习分类任务，激活图定位准确，为术中实时监测提供可行方案。

search_text: Shifted-Windows Transformers for the Detection of Cerebral Aneurysms in Microsurgery 用于显微外科手术中脑动脉瘤检测的移窗变压器 Purpose: Microsurgical Aneurysm Clipping Surgery (MACS) carries a high risk for intraoperative aneurysm rupture. Automated recognition of instances when the aneurysm is exposed in the surgical video would be a valuable reference point for neuronavigation, indicating phase transitioning and more importantly designating moments of high risk for rupture. This article introduces the MACS dataset containing 16 surgical videos with frame-level expert annotations and proposes a learning methodology for surgical scene understanding identifying video frames with the aneurysm present in the operating microscope's field-of-view. Methods: Despite the dataset imbalance (80% no presence, 20% presence) and developed without explicit annotations, we demonstrate the applicability of Transformer-based deep learning architectures (MACSSwin-T, vidMACSSwin-T) to detect the aneurysm and classify MACS frames accordingly. We evaluate the proposed models in multiple-fold cross-validation experiments with independent sets and in an unseen set of 15 images against 10 human experts (neurosurgeons). Results: Average (across folds) accuracy of 80.8% (range 78.5%-82.4%) and 87.1% (range 85.1%-91.3%) is obtained for the image- and video-level approach respectively, demonstrating that the models effectively learn the classification task. Qualitative evaluation of the models' class activation maps show these to be localized on the aneurysm's actual location. Depending on the decision threshold, MACSWin-T achieves 66.7% to 86.7% accuracy in the unseen images, compared to 82% of human raters, with moderate to strong correlation. 目的：显微动脉瘤夹闭手术 (MACS) 术中动脉瘤破裂的风险很高。自动识别手术视频中动脉瘤暴露的情况将是神经导航的一个有价值的参考点，指示相变，更重要的是指定破裂高风险时刻。本文介绍了包含 16 个带有帧级专家注释的手术视频的 MACS 数据集，并提出了一种用于手术场景理解的学习方法，用于识别手术显微镜视野中存在动脉瘤的视频帧。方法：尽管数据集不平衡（80% 不存在，20% 存在）并且在没有明确注释的情况下开发，我们证明了基于 Transformer 的深度学习架构（MCSSwin-T、vidMCSSwin-T）的适用性来检测动脉瘤并相应地对 MACS 帧进行分类。我们在独立组的多重交叉验证实验中以及针对 10 名人类专家（神经外科医生）的未见过的 15 张图像组中评估了所提出的模型。结果：图像和视频级方法的平均（跨折叠）准确率分别为 80.8%（范围 78.5%-82.4%）和 87.1%（范围 85.1%-91.3%），表明模型有效地学习了分类任务。模型类激活图的定性评估表明这些激活图位于动脉瘤的实际位置。根据决策阈值，MACSWin-T 在未见过的图像中实现了 66.7% 至 86.7% 的准确度，而人类评分者的准确度为 82%，具有中等到强的相关性。 本文提出基于Shifted-Windows Transformer的模型，用于在显微手术视频中检测颅内动脉瘤，以辅助神经导航和风险预警。 Jinfan Zhou,William Muirhead,Simon C. Williams,Danail Stoyanov,Hani J. Marcus,Evangelos B. Mazomenos cs.CV

authors_text: Matthew Ubl,Benjamin D. Robinson,Matthew T. Hale
title: Anomaly Search Over Many Sequences With Switching Costs
title_zh: 具有切换成本的多个序列的异常搜索
abstract: This paper considers the quickest search problem to identify anomalies among large numbers of data streams. These streams can model, for example, disjoint regions monitored by a mobile robot. A particular challenge is a version of the problem in which the experimenter must suffer a cost each time the data stream being sampled changes, such as the time the robot must spend moving between regions. In this paper, we propose an algorithm which accounts for switching costs by varying a confidence threshold that governs when the algorithm switches to a new data stream. Our main contributions are easily computable approximations for both the optimal value of this threshold and the optimal value of the parameter that determines when a stream must be re-sampled. Further, we empirically show (i) a uniform improvement for switching costs of interest and (ii) roughly equivalent performance for small switching costs when comparing to the closest available algorithm.
summary: This paper considers the quickest search problem to identify anomalies among large numbers of data streams. These streams can model, for example, disjoint regions monitored by a mobile robot. A particular challenge is a version of the problem in which the experimenter must suffer a cost each time the data stream being sampled changes, such as the time the robot must spend moving between regions. In this paper, we propose an algorithm which accounts for switching costs by varying a confidence threshold that governs when the algorithm switches to a new data stream. Our main contributions are easily computable approximations for both the optimal value of this threshold and the optimal value of the parameter that determines when a stream must be re-sampled. Further, we empirically show (i) a uniform improvement for switching costs of interest and (ii) roughly equivalent performance for small switching costs when comparing to the closest available algorithm.
abstract_zh: 本文考虑了识别大量数据流中的异常的最快搜索问题。例如，这些流可以对移动机器人监控的不相交区域进行建模。一个特殊的挑战是该问题的一个版本，其中每次采样的数据流发生变化时，实验者都必须承受成本，例如机器人必须在区域之间移动所花费的时间。在本文中，我们提出了一种算法，该算法通过改变控制算法何时切换到新数据流的置信阈值来考虑切换成本。我们的主要贡献是可以轻松计算该阈值的最佳值和确定何时必须对流重新采样的参数的最佳值。此外，我们凭经验证明（i）与最接近的可用算法相比，（i）对感兴趣的转换成本有统一的改进，以及（ii）小转换成本的性能大致相当。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在存在切换成本的情况下，如何高效搜索多个数据流中的异常问题，并提出了一种考虑切换成本的算法。
AI.motivation: 当监控多个数据流时，切换数据流会产生额外成本（如机器人移动时间），传统方法未有效处理此问题，导致效率低下。
AI.method: 提出一种动态调整置信阈值的算法，通过近似计算最优阈值和重采样参数，平衡异常检测与切换成本。
AI.result: 实验表明，该算法在切换成本较高时性能优于现有方法，小成本下表现接近最优。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效解决了切换成本下的异常搜索问题，为多流监控提供了实用解决方案。

authors_text: Akkas U. Haque,Humayun Kabir,S. C. Banik,M. T. Islam
title: Development of a Voice Controlled Robotic Arm
title_zh: 语音控制机械臂的开发
abstract: This paper describes a robotic arm with 5 degrees-of-freedom (DOF) which is controlled by human voice and has been developed in the Mechatronics Laboratory, CUET. This robotic arm is interfaced with a PC by serial communication (RS-232). Users' voice command is captured by a microphone, and this voice is processed by software which is made by Microsoft visual studio. Then the specific signal (obtained by signal processing) is sent to control unit. The main control unit that is used in the robotic arm is a microcontroller whose model no. is PIC18f452. Then Control unit drives the actuators, (Hitec HS-422, HS-81) according to the signal or signals to give required motion of the robotic arm. At present the robotic arm can perform a set action like pick & pull, gripping, holding & releasing, and some other extra function like dance-like movement, and can turn according to the voice commands.
summary: This paper describes a robotic arm with 5 degrees-of-freedom (DOF) which is controlled by human voice and has been developed in the Mechatronics Laboratory, CUET. This robotic arm is interfaced with a PC by serial communication (RS-232). Users' voice command is captured by a microphone, and this voice is processed by software which is made by Microsoft visual studio. Then the specific signal (obtained by signal processing) is sent to control unit. The main control unit that is used in the robotic arm is a microcontroller whose model no. is PIC18f452. Then Control unit drives the actuators, (Hitec HS-422, HS-81) according to the signal or signals to give required motion of the robotic arm. At present the robotic arm can perform a set action like pick & pull, gripping, holding & releasing, and some other extra function like dance-like movement, and can turn according to the voice commands.
abstract_zh: 本文描述了一种由人声控制的 5 自由度 (DOF) 机械臂，由 CUET 机电一体化实验室开发。该机械臂通过串行通信 (RS-232) 与 PC 连接。用户的语音命令由麦克风捕获，并且该语音由Microsoft Visual Studio制作的软件处理。然后将特定信号（通过信号处理获得）发送到控制单元。机械臂中使用的主控制单元是微控制器，其型号为。是PIC18f452。然后控制单元根据一个或多个信号驱动执行器（Hitec HS-422、HS-81），以给出机械臂所需的运动。目前，机械臂可以执行拾取、拉动、抓握、握持和释放等设定动作，以及一些其他如舞蹈般的额外功能，并可以根据语音命令进行转动。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一种通过语音控制的5自由度机械臂的开发，该机械臂通过串口通信与PC连接，并使用PIC18f452微控制器驱动执行器。
AI.motivation: 开发一种更直观、便捷的机械臂控制方式，通过语音指令实现对机械臂的操控，以提高人机交互的效率和适用性。
AI.method: 通过麦克风采集用户语音指令，利用Microsoft Visual Studio开发的软件进行信号处理，经RS-232串口通信将信号传递至PIC18f452微控制器，驱动HITEC HS-422和HS-81执行器完成机械臂运动控制。
AI.result: 机械臂可执行抓取、拉拽、夹持释放等基本动作，并实现舞蹈动作和转向等附加功能，能够根据语音指令完成预设操作。
AI.conclusion: 该系统验证了语音控制机械臂的可行性，为未来智能机器人的人机交互提供了有效技术方案。

authors_text: Matthew A. Chan,Sean I. Young,Christopher A. Metzler
title: SUD$^2$: Supervision by Denoising Diffusion Models for Image Reconstruction
title_zh: SUD$^2$：通过去噪扩散模型进行图像重建的监督
abstract: Many imaging inverse problems$\unicode{x2014}$such as image-dependent in-painting and dehazing$\unicode{x2014}$are challenging because their forward models are unknown or depend on unknown latent parameters. While one can solve such problems by training a neural network with vast quantities of paired training data, such paired training data is often unavailable. In this paper, we propose a generalized framework for training image reconstruction networks when paired training data is scarce. In particular, we demonstrate the ability of image denoising algorithms and, by extension, denoising diffusion models to supervise network training in the absence of paired training data.
summary: Many imaging inverse problems$\unicode{x2014}$such as image-dependent in-painting and dehazing$\unicode{x2014}$are challenging because their forward models are unknown or depend on unknown latent parameters. While one can solve such problems by training a neural network with vast quantities of paired training data, such paired training data is often unavailable. In this paper, we propose a generalized framework for training image reconstruction networks when paired training data is scarce. In particular, we demonstrate the ability of image denoising algorithms and, by extension, denoising diffusion models to supervise network training in the absence of paired training data.
abstract_zh: 许多成像逆问题$\unicode{x2014}$例如图像相关的修复和去雾$\unicode{x2014}$都具有挑战性，因为它们的正向模型是未知的或依赖于未知的潜在参数。虽然可以通过使用大量配对训练数据训练神经网络来解决此类问题，但此类配对训练数据通常是无法获得的。在本文中，我们提出了一种在配对训练数据稀缺时训练图像重建网络的通用框架。特别是，我们展示了图像去噪算法以及去噪扩散模型在缺乏配对训练数据的情况下监督网络训练的能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种利用去噪扩散模型进行图像重建的框架，解决配对训练数据稀缺的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统图像重建方法依赖大量配对训练数据，但实际场景中此类数据常难以获取，导致模型训练受限。
AI.method: 通过将去噪扩散模型作为监督信号，替代传统配对数据，指导图像重建网络的训练过程。
AI.result: 实验表明该框架在图像修复、去雾等任务中有效，无需配对数据即可实现高质量重建。
AI.conclusion: 本文为数据稀缺场景下的图像重建提供了通用解决方案，拓展了扩散模型的应用边界。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种利用去噪扩散模型进行图像重建的框架，解决配对训练数据稀缺的问题。
ai_content.motivation: 传统图像重建方法依赖大量配对训练数据，但实际场景中此类数据常难以获取，导致模型训练受限。
ai_content.method: 通过将去噪扩散模型作为监督信号，替代传统配对数据，指导图像重建网络的训练过程。
ai_content.result: 实验表明该框架在图像修复、去雾等任务中有效，无需配对数据即可实现高质量重建。
ai_content.conclusion: 本文为数据稀缺场景下的图像重建提供了通用解决方案，拓展了扩散模型的应用边界。

search_text: SUD$^2$: Supervision by Denoising Diffusion Models for Image Reconstruction SUD$^2$：通过去噪扩散模型进行图像重建的监督 Many imaging inverse problems$\unicode{x2014}$such as image-dependent in-painting and dehazing$\unicode{x2014}$are challenging because their forward models are unknown or depend on unknown latent parameters. While one can solve such problems by training a neural network with vast quantities of paired training data, such paired training data is often unavailable. In this paper, we propose a generalized framework for training image reconstruction networks when paired training data is scarce. In particular, we demonstrate the ability of image denoising algorithms and, by extension, denoising diffusion models to supervise network training in the absence of paired training data. 许多成像逆问题$\unicode{x2014}$例如图像相关的修复和去雾$\unicode{x2014}$都具有挑战性，因为它们的正向模型是未知的或依赖于未知的潜在参数。虽然可以通过使用大量配对训练数据训练神经网络来解决此类问题，但此类配对训练数据通常是无法获得的。在本文中，我们提出了一种在配对训练数据稀缺时训练图像重建网络的通用框架。特别是，我们展示了图像去噪算法以及去噪扩散模型在缺乏配对训练数据的情况下监督网络训练的能力。 本文提出一种利用去噪扩散模型进行图像重建的框架，解决配对训练数据稀缺的问题。 Matthew A. Chan,Sean I. Young,Christopher A. Metzler cs.CV,cs.LG,eess.IV

authors_text: Lu Niu,Jeremy Speth,Nathan Vance,Benjamin Sporrer,Adam Czajka,Patrick Flynn
title: Full-Body Cardiovascular Sensing with Remote Photoplethysmography
title_zh: 通过远程光电容积描记法进行全身心血管传感
abstract: Remote photoplethysmography (rPPG) allows for noncontact monitoring of blood volume changes from a camera by detecting minor fluctuations in reflected light. Prior applications of rPPG focused on face videos. In this paper we explored the feasibility of rPPG from non-face body regions such as the arms, legs, and hands. We collected a new dataset titled Multi-Site Physiological Monitoring (MSPM), which will be released with this paper. The dataset consists of 90 frames per second video of exposed arms, legs, and face, along with 10 synchronized PPG recordings. We performed baseline heart rate estimation experiments from non-face regions with several state-of-the-art rPPG approaches, including chrominance-based (CHROM), plane-orthogonal-to-skin (POS) and RemotePulseNet (RPNet). To our knowledge, this is the first evaluation of the fidelity of rPPG signals simultaneously obtained from multiple regions of a human body. Our experiments showed that skin pixels from arms, legs, and hands are all potential sources of the blood volume pulse. The best-performing approach, POS, achieved a mean absolute error peaking at 7.11 beats per minute from non-facial body parts compared to 1.38 beats per minute from the face. Additionally, we performed experiments on pulse transit time (PTT) from both the contact PPG and rPPG signals. We found that remote PTT is possible with moderately high frame rate video when distal locations on the body are visible. These findings and the supporting dataset should facilitate new research on non-face rPPG and monitoring blood flow dynamics over the whole body with a camera.

The dataset consists of 90 frames per second video of exposed arms, legs, and face, along with 10 synchronized PPG recordings. We performed baseline heart rate estimation experiments from non-face regions with several state-of-the-art rPPG approaches, including chrominance-based (CHROM), plane-orthogonal-to-skin (POS) and RemotePulseNet (RPNet). To our knowledge, this is the first evaluation of the fidelity of rPPG signals simultaneously obtained from multiple regions of a human body. Our experiments showed that skin pixels from arms, legs, and hands are all potential sources of the blood volume pulse. The best-performing approach, POS, achieved a mean absolute error peaking at 7.11 beats per minute from non-facial body parts compared to 1.38 beats per minute from the face. Additionally, we performed experiments on pulse transit time (PTT) from both the contact PPG and rPPG signals. We found that remote PTT is possible with moderately high frame rate video when distal locations on the body are visible. These findings and the supporting dataset should facilitate new research on non-face rPPG and monitoring blood flow dynamics over the whole body with a camera.
abstract_zh: 远程光电体积描记法 (rPPG) 通过检测反射光的微小波动，可以通过摄像头非接触式监测血量变化。 rPPG 之前的应用主要集中在人脸视频上。在本文中，我们探讨了从手臂、腿和手等非面部身体区域进行 rPPG 的可行性。我们收集了一个名为多站点生理监测（MSPM）的新数据集，该数据集将与本文一起发布。该数据集包含每秒 90 帧的裸露手臂、腿和脸部视频，以及 10 个同步 PPG 记录。我们使用几种最先进的 rPPG 方法从非面部区域进行基线心率估计实验，包括基于色度的 (CHROM)、平面正交到皮肤 (POS) 和 RemotePulseNet (RPNet)。据我们所知，这是首次对从人体多个区域同时获得的 rPPG 信号的保真度进行评估。我们的实验表明，手臂、腿和手的皮肤像素都是血量脉冲的潜在来源。性能最好的方法 POS，非面部身体部位的平均绝对误差峰值为每分钟 7.11 次，而面部的平均绝对误差为每分钟 1.38 次。此外，我们还对接触 PPG 和 rPPG 信号的脉冲传输时间 (PTT) 进行了实验。我们发现，当身体远端位置可见时，可以通过中等高帧速率的视频进行远程 PTT。这些发现和支持数据集应该有助于非面部 rPPG 的新研究以及用摄像头监测整个身体的血流动力学。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了通过非面部身体部位（如手臂、腿部和手部）进行远程光电容积描记法（rPPG）的可行性，并构建了一个包含多部位生理信号的数据集。
AI.motivation: 传统rPPG主要依赖面部视频，限制了其应用场景。本文旨在拓展rPPG至全身监测，为非接触式心血管传感提供更全面的解决方案。
AI.method: 采集包含手臂、腿部和面部视频的Multi-Site Physiological Monitoring（MSPM）数据集，结合10路同步PPG信号；采用CHROM、POS和RPNet等方法评估非面部区域的心率估计性能，并分析脉搏波传导时间（PTT）。
AI.result: 非面部区域的rPPG信号可有效反映血容量变化，其中POS方法在非面部区域的平均绝对误差为7.11 BPM，显著高于面部的1.38 BPM；当可见远端身体部位时，远程PTT测量可行。
AI.conclusion: 非面部区域可作为rPPG信号源，但精度低于面部；MSPM数据集为全身血流动力学研究提供了基础，未来需优化算法以提升非面部区域的测量精度。

authors_text: Loïc Crombez,Guilherme D. da Fonseca,Florian Fontan,Yan Gerard,Aldo Gonzalez-Lorenzo,Pascal Lafourcade,Luc Libralesso,Benjamin Momège,Jack Spalding-Jamieson,Brandon Zhang,Da Wei Zheng
title: Conflict Optimization for Binary CSP Applied to Minimum Partition into Plane Subgraphs and Graph Coloring
title_zh: 应用于平面子图最小划分和图着色的二元CSP冲突优化
comment: To appear at ACM Journal of Experimental Algorithmics
comments: To appear at ACM Journal of Experimental Algorithmics
abstract: CG:SHOP is an annual geometric optimization challenge and the 2022 edition proposed the problem of coloring a certain geometric graph defined by line segments. Surprisingly, the top three teams used the same technique, called conflict optimization. This technique has been introduced in the 2021 edition of the challenge, to solve a coordinated motion planning problem. In this paper, we present the technique in the more general framework of binary constraint satisfaction problems (binary CSP). Then, the top three teams describe their different implementations of the same underlying strategy. We evaluate the performance of those implementations to vertex color not only geometric graphs, but also other types of graphs.
summary: CG:SHOP is an annual geometric optimization challenge and the 2022 edition proposed the problem of coloring a certain geometric graph defined by line segments. Surprisingly, the top three teams used the same technique, called conflict optimization. This technique has been introduced in the 2021 edition of the challenge, to solve a coordinated motion planning problem. In this paper, we present the technique in the more general framework of binary constraint satisfaction problems (binary CSP). Then, the top three teams describe their different implementations of the same underlying strategy. We evaluate the performance of those implementations to vertex color not only geometric graphs, but also other types of graphs.
abstract_zh: CG:SHOP是一年一度的几何优化挑战赛，2022年版提出了对由线段定义的某个几何图形进行着色的问题。令人惊讶的是，排名前三的团队使用了相同的技术，称为冲突优化。该技术已在 2021 年版挑战赛中引入，用于解决协调运动规划问题。在本文中，我们在二元约束满足问题（二元 CSP）的更通用框架中介绍了该技术。然后，排名前三的团队描述了他们对同一底层策略的不同实现。我们不仅评估几何图的顶点颜色实现的性能，还评估其他类型图的顶点颜色的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文将冲突优化技术推广到二元约束满足问题（binary CSP）框架，并应用于图着色和最小平面子图划分问题。
AI.motivation: 为了解决CG:SHOP 2022几何图着色问题，作者发现顶尖团队均采用冲突优化技术，但该技术此前仅用于运动规划，需将其推广到更通用的CSP框架并验证其广泛适用性。
AI.method: 在二元CSP框架下形式化冲突优化技术，分析三支顶尖团队的不同实现方式，并通过实验评估其在几何图及其他类型图的顶点着色性能。
AI.result: 实验表明冲突优化技术能有效解决几何图着色问题，且在不同图类型上均表现出良好的性能，验证了该方法的通用性。
AI.conclusion: 冲突优化是解决二元CSP的高效方法，尤其适用于图着色和子图划分问题，为相关领域提供了一种通用求解范式。

result: 实验表明冲突优化技术能有效解决几何图着色问题，且在不同图类型上均表现出良好的性能，验证了该方法的通用性。
conclusion: 冲突优化是解决二元CSP的高效方法，尤其适用于图着色和子图划分问题，为相关领域提供了一种通用求解范式。
search_text: Conflict Optimization for Binary CSP Applied to Minimum Partition into Plane Subgraphs and Graph Coloring 应用于平面子图最小划分和图着色的二元CSP冲突优化 CG:SHOP is an annual geometric optimization challenge and the 2022 edition proposed the problem of coloring a certain geometric graph defined by line segments. Surprisingly, the top three teams used the same technique, called conflict optimization. This technique has been introduced in the 2021 edition of the challenge, to solve a coordinated motion planning problem. In this paper, we present the technique in the more general framework of binary constraint satisfaction problems (binary CSP). Then, the top three teams describe their different implementations of the same underlying strategy. We evaluate the performance of those implementations to vertex color not only geometric graphs, but also other types of graphs. CG:SHOP是一年一度的几何优化挑战赛，2022年版提出了对由线段定义的某个几何图形进行着色的问题。令人惊讶的是，排名前三的团队使用了相同的技术，称为冲突优化。该技术已在 2021 年版挑战赛中引入，用于解决协调运动规划问题。在本文中，我们在二元约束满足问题（二元 CSP）的更通用框架中介绍了该技术。然后，排名前三的团队描述了他们对同一底层策略的不同实现。我们不仅评估几何图的顶点颜色实现的性能，还评估其他类型图的顶点颜色的性能。 本文将冲突优化技术推广到二元约束满足问题（binary CSP）框架，并应用于图着色和最小平面子图划分问题。 Loïc Crombez,Guilherme D. da Fonseca,Florian Fontan,Yan Gerard,Aldo Gonzalez-Lorenzo,Pascal Lafourcade,Luc Libralesso,Benjamin Momège,Jack Spalding-Jamieson,Brandon Zhang,Da Wei Zheng cs.CG,cs.DS

authors_text: Ayush Aniket,Arpan Chattopadhyay
title: Online Reinforcement Learning in Periodic MDP
title_zh: 定期 MDP 中的在线强化学习
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2207.12045
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2207.12045
abstract: We study learning in periodic Markov Decision Process (MDP), a special type of non-stationary MDP where both the state transition probabilities and reward functions vary periodically, under the average reward maximization setting. We formulate the problem as a stationary MDP by augmenting the state space with the period index, and propose a periodic upper confidence bound reinforcement learning-2 (PUCRL2) algorithm. We show that the regret of PUCRL2 varies linearly with the period $N$ and as $\mathcal{O}(\sqrt{Tlog T})$ with the horizon length $T$. Utilizing the information about the sparsity of transition matrix of augmented MDP, we propose another algorithm PUCRLB which enhances upon PUCRL2, both in terms of regret ($O(\sqrt{N})$ dependency on period) and empirical performance. Finally, we propose two other algorithms U-PUCRL2 and U-PUCRLB for extended uncertainty in the environment in which the period is unknown but a set of candidate periods are known. Numerical results demonstrate the efficacy of all the algorithms.
summary: We study learning in periodic Markov Decision Process (MDP), a special type of non-stationary MDP where both the state transition probabilities and reward functions vary periodically, under the average reward maximization setting. We formulate the problem as a stationary MDP by augmenting the state space with the period index, and propose a periodic upper confidence bound reinforcement learning-2 (PUCRL2) algorithm. We show that the regret of PUCRL2 varies linearly with the period $N$ and as $\mathcal{O}(\sqrt{Tlog T})$ with the horizon length $T$. Utilizing the information about the sparsity of transition matrix of augmented MDP, we propose another algorithm PUCRLB which enhances upon PUCRL2, both in terms of regret ($O(\sqrt{N})$ dependency on period) and empirical performance. Finally, we propose two other algorithms U-PUCRL2 and U-PUCRLB for extended uncertainty in the environment in which the period is unknown but a set of candidate periods are known. Numerical results demonstrate the efficacy of all the algorithms.
abstract_zh: 我们研究周期性马尔可夫决策过程（MDP）中的学习，这是一种特殊类型的非平稳 MDP，其中状态转换概率和奖励函数在平均奖励最大化设置下周期性变化。我们通过用周期索引增强状态空间，将问题表述为平稳 MDP，并提出周期性置信上限强化学习 2 (PUCRL2) 算法。我们表明，PUCRL2 的遗憾随周期 $N$ 呈线性变化，并且随着 $\mathcal{O}(\sqrt{Tlog T})$ 随水平线长度 $T$ 呈线性变化。利用有关增强 MDP 转移矩阵稀疏性的信息，我们提出了另一种算法 PUCRLB，该算法在 PUCRL2 的基础上进行了增强，无论是在遗憾度（$O(\sqrt{N})$ 对周期的依赖）和经验性能方面。最后，我们提出了另外两种算法 U-PUCRL2 和 U-PUCRLB，用于在周期未知但一组候选周期已知的环境中扩展不确定性。数值结果证明了所有算法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了周期性马尔可夫决策过程（MDP）中的在线强化学习问题，提出了一种新的算法框架以处理状态转移和奖励函数随时间周期性变化的非平稳环境。
AI.motivation: 传统强化学习方法假设环境是平稳的，但在实际应用中，环境可能呈现周期性变化特性，现有算法难以有效应对这种非平稳性带来的挑战。
AI.method: 通过将周期索引扩展到状态空间将周期性MDP转化为平稳MDP，提出PUCRL2算法，并利用转移矩阵稀疏性改进为PUCRLB算法；进一步设计U-PUCRL2/U-PUCRLB算法处理周期未知但候选周期已知的场景。
AI.result: 理论分析表明算法的遗憾度随周期长度N线性增长且与时间跨度T的平方根相关，改进算法PUCRLB在周期依赖性上表现更优；数值实验验证了各算法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的算法框架有效解决了周期性非平稳MDP的强化学习问题，通过状态空间扩展和稀疏性利用实现了理论保证与实际性能的平衡，为处理未知周期场景提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Núria Armengol Urpí,Marco Bagatella,Otmar Hilliges,Georg Martius,Stelian Coros
title: Efficient Learning of High Level Plans from Play
title_zh: 从游戏中有效学习高级计划
comment: Accepted to the International Conference on Robotics and Automation 2023
comments: Accepted to the International Conference on Robotics and Automation 2023
abstract: Real-world robotic manipulation tasks remain an elusive challenge, since they involve both fine-grained environment interaction, as well as the ability to plan for long-horizon goals. Although deep reinforcement learning (RL) methods have shown encouraging results when planning end-to-end in high-dimensional environments, they remain fundamentally limited by poor sample efficiency due to inefficient exploration, and by the complexity of credit assignment over long horizons. In this work, we present Efficient Learning of High-Level Plans from Play (ELF-P), a framework for robotic learning that bridges motion planning and deep RL to achieve long-horizon complex manipulation tasks. We leverage task-agnostic play data to learn a discrete behavioral prior over object-centric primitives, modeling their feasibility given the current context. We then design a high-level goal-conditioned policy which (1) uses primitives as building blocks to scaffold complex long-horizon tasks and (2) leverages the behavioral prior to accelerate learning. We demonstrate that ELF-P has significantly better sample efficiency than relevant baselines over multiple realistic manipulation tasks and learns policies that can be easily transferred to physical hardware.
summary: Real-world robotic manipulation tasks remain an elusive challenge, since they involve both fine-grained environment interaction, as well as the ability to plan for long-horizon goals. Although deep reinforcement learning (RL) methods have shown encouraging results when planning end-to-end in high-dimensional environments, they remain fundamentally limited by poor sample efficiency due to inefficient exploration, and by the complexity of credit assignment over long horizons. In this work, we present Efficient Learning of High-Level Plans from Play (ELF-P), a framework for robotic learning that bridges motion planning and deep RL to achieve long-horizon complex manipulation tasks. We leverage task-agnostic play data to learn a discrete behavioral prior over object-centric primitives, modeling their feasibility given the current context. We then design a high-level goal-conditioned policy which (1) uses primitives as building blocks to scaffold complex long-horizon tasks and (2) leverages the behavioral prior to accelerate learning. We demonstrate that ELF-P has significantly better sample efficiency than relevant baselines over multiple realistic manipulation tasks and learns policies that can be easily transferred to physical hardware.
abstract_zh: 现实世界的机器人操作任务仍然是一个难以捉摸的挑战，因为它们既涉及细粒度的环境交互，也涉及规划长期目标的能力。尽管深度强化学习（RL）方法在高维环境中进行端到端规划时显示出令人鼓舞的结果，但它们仍然从根本上受到由于低效探索导致的样本效率低下以及长期信用分配的复杂性的限制。在这项工作中，我们提出了从游戏中高效学习高级计划 (ELF-P)，这是一个机器人学习框架，它将运动规划和深度强化学习联系起来，以实现长期复杂的操作任务。我们利用与任务无关的游戏数据来学习先于以对象为中心的原语的离散行为，并在给定当前上下文的情况下对其可行性进行建模。然后，我们设计了一个高级目标条件策略，该策略（1）使用原语作为构建块来构建复杂的长期任务，（2）在加速学习之前利用行为。我们证明，ELF-P 在多个实际操作任务中比相关基线具有显着更好的样本效率，并且学习可以轻松转移到物理硬件的策略。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ELF-P框架，通过结合运动规划与深度强化学习，利用玩耍数据学习离散行为先验，解决复杂长期机器人操作任务的高效学习问题。
AI.motivation: 现有深度强化学习方法在样本效率和长期目标规划上存在局限，难以应对现实复杂机器人操作任务的需求。
AI.method: 基于任务无关的玩耍数据学习对象中心的离散行为先验，构建高层目标条件策略，利用行为先验加速复杂任务学习过程。
AI.result: 在多个现实操作任务中展现显著优于基线的样本效率，并成功迁移至物理硬件验证有效性。
AI.conclusion: ELF-P框架通过行为先验与高层策略设计，有效提升复杂任务学习效率与泛化能力，为机器人长期规划提供新思路。
