We leverage task-agnostic play data to learn a discrete behavioral prior over object-centric primitives, modeling their feasibility given the current context. We then design a high-level goal-conditioned policy which (1) uses primitives as building blocks to scaffold complex long-horizon tasks and (2) leverages the behavioral prior to accelerate learning. We demonstrate that ELF-P has significantly better sample efficiency than relevant baselines over multiple realistic manipulation tasks and learns policies that can be easily transferred to physical hardware. 现实世界的机器人操作任务仍然是一个难以捉摸的挑战，因为它们既涉及细粒度的环境交互，也涉及规划长期目标的能力。尽管深度强化学习（RL）方法在高维环境中进行端到端规划时显示出令人鼓舞的结果，但它们仍然从根本上受到由于低效探索导致的样本效率低下以及长期信用分配的复杂性的限制。在这项工作中，我们提出了从游戏中高效学习高级计划 (ELF-P)，这是一个机器人学习框架，它将运动规划和深度强化学习联系起来，以实现长期复杂的操作任务。我们利用与任务无关的游戏数据来学习先于以对象为中心的原语的离散行为，并在给定当前上下文的情况下对其可行性进行建模。然后，我们设计了一个高级目标条件策略，该策略（1）使用原语作为构建块来构建复杂的长期任务，（2）在加速学习之前利用行为。我们证明，ELF-P 在多个实际操作任务中比相关基线具有显着更好的样本效率，并且学习可以轻松转移到物理硬件的策略。 本文提出ELF-P框架，通过结合运动规划与深度强化学习，利用玩耍数据学习离散行为先验，解决复杂长期机器人操作任务的高效学习问题。 Núria Armengol Urpí,Marco Bagatella,Otmar Hilliges,Georg Martius,Stelian Coros cs.LG,cs.RO

authors_text: Savvas Panagiotou,Anna S. Bosman
title: Denoising Diffusion Post-Processing for Low-Light Image Enhancement
title_zh: 用于低光图像增强的去噪扩散后处理
abstract: Low-light image enhancement (LLIE) techniques attempt to increase the visibility of images captured in low-light scenarios. However, as a result of enhancement, a variety of image degradations such as noise and color bias are revealed. Furthermore, each particular LLIE approach may introduce a different form of flaw within its enhanced results. To combat these image degradations, post-processing denoisers have widely been used, which often yield oversmoothed results lacking detail. We propose using a diffusion model as a post-processing approach, and we introduce Low-light Post-processing Diffusion Model (LPDM) in order to model the conditional distribution between under-exposed and normally-exposed images. We apply LPDM in a manner which avoids the computationally expensive generative reverse process of typical diffusion models, and post-process images in one pass through LPDM. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach outperforms competing post-processing denoisers by increasing the perceptual quality of enhanced low-light images on a variety of challenging low-light datasets. Source code is available at https://github.com/savvaki/LPDM.
summary: Low-light image enhancement (LLIE) techniques attempt to increase the visibility of images captured in low-light scenarios. However, as a result of enhancement, a variety of image degradations such as noise and color bias are revealed. Furthermore, each particular LLIE approach may introduce a different form of flaw within its enhanced results. To combat these image degradations, post-processing denoisers have widely been used, which often yield oversmoothed results lacking detail. We propose using a diffusion model as a post-processing approach, and we introduce Low-light Post-processing Diffusion Model (LPDM) in order to model the conditional distribution between under-exposed and normally-exposed images. We apply LPDM in a manner which avoids the computationally expensive generative reverse process of typical diffusion models, and post-process images in one pass through LPDM. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach outperforms competing post-processing denoisers by increasing the perceptual quality of enhanced low-light images on a variety of challenging low-light datasets. Source code is available at https://github.com/savvaki/LPDM.
abstract_zh: 低光图像增强 (LLIE) 技术试图提高在低光场景下捕获的图像的可见度。然而，增强的结果是，各种图像质量下降，例如噪声和颜色偏差。此外，每种特定的 LLIE 方法都可能在其增强结果中引入不同形式的缺陷。为了对抗这些图像质量下降，后处理降噪器已被广泛使用，这通常会产生缺乏细节的过度平滑结果。我们建议使用扩散模型作为后处理方法，并引入低光后处理扩散模型（LPDM）来模拟曝光不足和正常曝光图像之间的条件分布。我们应用 LPDM 的方式避免了典型扩散模型的计算成本昂贵的生成逆过程，并通过 LPDM 一次性对图像进行后处理。大量的实验表明，我们的方法通过提高各种具有挑战性的低光数据集上增强型低光图像的感知质量，优于竞争的后处理降噪器。源代码可在 https://github.com/savvaki/LPDM 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于扩散模型的低光图像增强后处理方法LPDM，用于解决传统增强方法导致的噪声、颜色偏差及过度平滑问题。
AI.motivation: 现有低光图像增强技术易引入噪声、颜色偏差等退化问题，而传统后处理去噪器常导致过度平滑、细节丢失，需更有效的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计低光后处理扩散模型（LPDM），通过建模欠曝光与正常曝光图像的条件分布，避免传统扩散模型的生成反向过程，以单次前向传播完成高效后处理。
AI.result: 在多个低光数据集上实验表明，LPDM在感知质量上优于现有后处理去噪方法，有效抑制噪声同时保留细节。
AI.conclusion: LPDM通过扩散模型后处理有效解决了低光增强的退化问题，代码开源便于复现与应用。

authors_text: Fragiskos Fourlas,Vignesh Kottayam Viswanathan,Sumeet Satpute,George Nikolakopoulos
title: Vision Based Docking of Multiple Satellites with an Uncooperative Target
title_zh: 多卫星与不合作目标的基于视觉的对接
comment: ©2023 Fragiskos Fourlas, Vignesh Kottayam Viswanathan, Sumeet Satpute and George Nikolakopoulos. This work has been accepted to IFAC for publication under a Creative Commons Licence CC-BY-NC-ND
comments: ©2023 Fragiskos Fourlas, Vignesh Kottayam Viswanathan, Sumeet Satpute and George Nikolakopoulos. This work has been accepted to IFAC for publication under a Creative Commons Licence CC-BY-NC-ND
abstract: With the ever growing number of space debris in orbit, the need to prevent further space population is becoming more and more apparent. Refueling, servicing, inspection and deorbiting of spacecraft are some example missions that require precise navigation and docking in space. Having multiple, collaborating robots handling these tasks can greatly increase the efficiency of the mission in terms of time and cost. This article will introduce a modern and efficient control architecture for satellites on collaborative docking missions. The proposed architecture uses a centralized scheme that combines state-of-the-art, ad-hoc implementations of algorithms and techniques to maximize robustness and flexibility. It is based on a Model Predictive Controller (MPC) for which efficient cost function and constraint sets are designed to ensure a safe and accurate docking. A simulation environment is also presented to validate and test the proposed control scheme.
summary: With the ever growing number of space debris in orbit, the need to prevent further space population is becoming more and more apparent. Refueling, servicing, inspection and deorbiting of spacecraft are some example missions that require precise navigation and docking in space. Having multiple, collaborating robots handling these tasks can greatly increase the efficiency of the mission in terms of time and cost. This article will introduce a modern and efficient control architecture for satellites on collaborative docking missions. The proposed architecture uses a centralized scheme that combines state-of-the-art, ad-hoc implementations of algorithms and techniques to maximize robustness and flexibility. It is based on a Model Predictive Controller (MPC) for which efficient cost function and constraint sets are designed to ensure a safe and accurate docking. A simulation environment is also presented to validate and test the proposed control scheme.
abstract_zh: 随着轨道上的空间碎片数量不断增加，防止太空人口进一步增加的必要性变得越来越明显。航天器的加油、维修、检查和离轨是需要在太空中进行精确导航和对接的一些示例任务。让多个协作机器人处理这些任务可以在时间和成本方面大大提高任务效率。本文将介绍一种用于协作对接任务的卫星的现代高效控制架构。 The proposed architecture uses a centralized scheme that combines state-of-the-art, ad-hoc implementations of algorithms and techniques to maximize robustness and flexibility. It is based on a Model Predictive Controller (MPC) for which efficient cost function and constraint sets are designed to ensure a safe and accurate docking.还提供了一个仿真环境来验证和测试所提出的控制方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于视觉的多卫星与非合作目标对接的控制架构，旨在提高太空任务的效率和安全性。
AI.motivation: 随着轨道空间碎片日益增多，需要通过精准的对接任务（如加油、检测和脱轨）来减少太空拥挤，而多机器人协作可提升任务效率。
AI.method: 采用集中式控制架构，结合先进的模型预测控制器（MPC），设计高效成本函数和约束集，并构建仿真环境验证方案。
AI.result: 通过仿真验证了所提控制方案在安全性和对接精度上的有效性，证明其适用于复杂太空任务。
AI.conclusion: 该架构通过MPC优化和仿真验证，为多卫星协作对接提供了鲁棒且灵活的解决方案，有助于未来太空服务任务的实施。

authors_text: Shu Zhang,Xinyi Yang,Yihao Feng,Can Qin,Chia-Chih Chen,Ning Yu,Zeyuan Chen,Huan Wang,Silvio Savarese,Stefano Ermon,Caiming Xiong,Ran Xu
title: HIVE: Harnessing Human Feedback for Instructional Visual Editing
title_zh: HIVE：利用人类反馈进行教学视觉编辑
abstract: Incorporating human feedback has been shown to be crucial to align text generated by large language models to human preferences. We hypothesize that state-of-the-art instructional image editing models, where outputs are generated based on an input image and an editing instruction, could similarly benefit from human feedback, as their outputs may not adhere to the correct instructions and preferences of users. In this paper, we present a novel framework to harness human feedback for instructional visual editing (HIVE). Specifically, we collect human feedback on the edited images and learn a reward function to capture the underlying user preferences. We then introduce scalable diffusion model fine-tuning methods that can incorporate human preferences based on the estimated reward. Besides, to mitigate the bias brought by the limitation of data, we contribute a new 1M training dataset, a 3.6K reward dataset for rewards learning, and a 1K evaluation dataset to boost the performance of instructional image editing. We conduct extensive empirical experiments quantitatively and qualitatively, showing that HIVE is favored over previous state-of-the-art instructional image editing approaches by a large margin.
summary: Incorporating human feedback has been shown to be crucial to align text generated by large language models to human preferences. We hypothesize that state-of-the-art instructional image editing models, where outputs are generated based on an input image and an editing instruction, could similarly benefit from human feedback, as their outputs may not adhere to the correct instructions and preferences of users. In this paper, we present a novel framework to harness human feedback for instructional visual editing (HIVE). Specifically, we collect human feedback on the edited images and learn a reward function to capture the underlying user preferences. We then introduce scalable diffusion model fine-tuning methods that can incorporate human preferences based on the estimated reward. Besides, to mitigate the bias brought by the limitation of data, we contribute a new 1M training dataset, a 3.6K reward dataset for rewards learning, and a 1K evaluation dataset to boost the performance of instructional image editing. We conduct extensive empirical experiments quantitatively and qualitatively, showing that HIVE is favored over previous state-of-the-art instructional image editing approaches by a large margin.
abstract_zh: 事实证明，结合人类反馈对于使大型语言模型生成的文本与人类偏好保持一致至关重要。我们假设最先进的教学图像编辑模型（根据输入图像和编辑指令生成输出）同样可以从人类反馈中受益，因为它们的输出可能不符合用户的正确指令和偏好。在本文中，我们提出了一种利用人类反馈进行教学视觉编辑（HIVE）的新颖框架。具体来说，我们收集对编辑图像的人类反馈，并学习奖励函数来捕获潜在的用户偏好。然后，我们引入可扩展的扩散模型微调方法，可以根据估计的奖励纳入人类偏好。此外，为了减轻数据限制带来的偏差，我们贡献了一个新的 1M 训练数据集、一个用于奖励学习的 3.6K 奖励数据集和一个 1K 评估数据集来提高教学图像编辑的性能。我们进行了广泛的定量和定性实证实验，结果表明 HIVE 比以前最先进的教学图像编辑方法在很大程度上受到青睐。

AI.tldr: 本文提出HIVE框架，通过整合人类反馈优化指令驱动的视觉编辑任务，提升图像编辑模型与用户偏好的对齐度。
AI.motivation: 现有指令图像编辑模型生成结果可能偏离用户指令及偏好，需引入人类反馈机制以提升模型输出质量。
AI.method: 收集人类对编辑图像的反馈，构建奖励函数学习用户偏好；设计扩散模型微调方法整合偏好，并发布1M训练数据、3.6K奖励数据及1K评估数据集。
AI.result: 实验表明HIVE在定量与定性指标上显著优于现有最先进方法，验证了人类反馈整合的有效性。
AI.conclusion: HIVE框架通过人类反馈有效提升指令图像编辑性能，所构建的数据集为后续研究提供重要资源。

search_text: HIVE: Harnessing Human Feedback for Instructional Visual Editing HIVE：利用人类反馈进行教学视觉编辑 Incorporating human feedback has been shown to be crucial to align text generated by large language models to human preferences. We hypothesize that state-of-the-art instructional image editing models, where outputs are generated based on an input image and an editing instruction, could similarly benefit from human feedback, as their outputs may not adhere to the correct instructions and preferences of users. In this paper, we present a novel framework to harness human feedback for instructional visual editing (HIVE). Specifically, we collect human feedback on the edited images and learn a reward function to capture the underlying user preferences. We then introduce scalable diffusion model fine-tuning methods that can incorporate human preferences based on the estimated reward. Besides, to mitigate the bias brought by the limitation of data, we contribute a new 1M training dataset, a 3.6K reward dataset for rewards learning, and a 1K evaluation dataset to boost the performance of instructional image editing. We conduct extensive empirical experiments quantitatively and qualitatively, showing that HIVE is favored over previous state-of-the-art instructional image editing approaches by a large margin. 事实证明，结合人类反馈对于使大型语言模型生成的文本与人类偏好保持一致至关重要。我们假设最先进的教学图像编辑模型（根据输入图像和编辑指令生成输出）同样可以从人类反馈中受益，因为它们的输出可能不符合用户的正确指令和偏好。在本文中，我们提出了一种利用人类反馈进行教学视觉编辑（HIVE）的新颖框架。具体来说，我们收集对编辑图像的人类反馈，并学习奖励函数来捕获潜在的用户偏好。然后，我们引入可扩展的扩散模型微调方法，可以根据估计的奖励纳入人类偏好。此外，为了减轻数据限制带来的偏差，我们贡献了一个新的 1M 训练数据集、一个用于奖励学习的 3.6K 奖励数据集和一个 1K 评估数据集来提高教学图像编辑的性能。我们进行了广泛的定量和定性实证实验，结果表明 HIVE 比以前最先进的教学图像编辑方法在很大程度上受到青睐。 本文提出HIVE框架，通过整合人类反馈优化指令驱动的视觉编辑任务，提升图像编辑模型与用户偏好的对齐度。 Shu Zhang,Xinyi Yang,Yihao Feng,Can Qin,Chia-Chih Chen,Ning Yu,Zeyuan Chen,Huan Wang,Silvio Savarese,Stefano Ermon,Caiming Xiong,Ran Xu cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.CL,cs.HC,cs.LG

authors_text: William Aiken,Paul K. Mvula,Paula Branco,Guy-Vincent Jourdan,Mehrdad Sabetzadeh,Herna Viktor
title: Measuring Improvement of F$_1$-Scores in Detection of Self-Admitted Technical Debt
title_zh: 衡量自认技术债务检测中 F$_1$ 分数的改进
abstract: Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning have witnessed rapid, significant improvements in Natural Language Processing (NLP) tasks. Utilizing Deep Learning, researchers have taken advantage of repository comments in Software Engineering to produce accurate methods for detecting Self-Admitted Technical Debt (SATD) from 20 open-source Java projects' code. In this work, we improve SATD detection with a novel approach that leverages the Bidirectional Encoder Representations from Transformers (BERT) architecture. For comparison, we re-evaluated previous deep learning methods and applied stratified 10-fold cross-validation to report reliable F$_1$-scores. We examine our model in both cross-project and intra-project contexts. For each context, we use re-sampling and duplication as augmentation strategies to account for data imbalance. We find that our trained BERT model improves over the best performance of all previous methods in 19 of the 20 projects in cross-project scenarios. However, the data augmentation techniques were not sufficient to overcome the lack of data present in the intra-project scenarios, and existing methods still perform better. Future research will look into ways to diversify SATD datasets in order to maximize the latent power in large BERT models.
summary: Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning have witnessed rapid, significant improvements in Natural Language Processing (NLP) tasks. Utilizing Deep Learning, researchers have taken advantage of repository comments in Software Engineering to produce accurate methods for detecting Self-Admitted Technical Debt (SATD) from 20 open-source Java projects' code. In this work, we improve SATD detection with a novel approach that leverages the Bidirectional Encoder Representations from Transformers (BERT) architecture. For comparison, we re-evaluated previous deep learning methods and applied stratified 10-fold cross-validation to report reliable F$_1$-scores. We examine our model in both cross-project and intra-project contexts. For each context, we use re-sampling and duplication as augmentation strategies to account for data imbalance. We find that our trained BERT model improves over the best performance of all previous methods in 19 of the 20 projects in cross-project scenarios. However, the data augmentation techniques were not sufficient to overcome the lack of data present in the intra-project scenarios, and existing methods still perform better. Future research will look into ways to diversify SATD datasets in order to maximize the latent power in large BERT models.
abstract_zh: 人工智能和机器学习见证了自然语言处理 (NLP) 任务的快速、显着改进。利用深度学习，研究人员利用软件工程中的存储库注释来生成准确的方法，用于从 20 个开源 Java 项目的代码中检测自我承认的技术债务 (SATD)。在这项工作中，我们通过一种利用 Transformers 双向编码器表示 (BERT) 架构的新颖方法来改进 SATD 检测。为了进行比较，我们重新评估了之前的深度学习方法，并应用分层 10 倍交叉验证来报告可靠的 F$_1$ 分数。我们在跨项目和项目内环境中检查我们的模型。对于每种情况，我们使用重新采样和复制作为增强策略来解决数据不平衡的问题。我们发现，在跨项目场景的 20 个项目中，有 19 个项目中，经过训练的 BERT 模型比之前所有方法的最佳性能都有所提高。然而，数据增强技术不足以克服项目内场景中数据缺乏的问题，并且现有方法仍然表现更好。未来的研究将探讨如何使 SATD 数据集多样化，以便最大限度地发挥大型 BERT 模型的潜在能力。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出利用BERT模型改进自承技术债务（SATD）检测，并通过跨项目和项目内场景评估其效果。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法在SATD检测中存在数据不平衡问题，需探索更有效的模型和数据增强策略以提升检测性能。
AI.method: 基于BERT架构构建模型，采用分层10折交叉验证，结合重采样和复制策略进行数据增强，对比跨项目与项目内场景下的检测效果。
AI.result: BERT模型在跨项目场景中19个项目的F1分数超越传统方法，但项目内场景因数据不足仍需改进。
AI.conclusion: BERT在跨项目SATD检测中表现优异，但需进一步多样化数据以提升项目内场景的模型效果。

authors_text: Arushi Rai,Adriana Kovashka
title: VEIL: Vetting Extracted Image Labels from In-the-Wild Captions for Weakly-Supervised Object Detection
title_zh: VEIL：审查从野外字幕中提取的图像标签以进行弱监督对象检测
comment: 18th Conference of the European Chapter of the Association for Computational Linguistics (EACL) 2024 camera-ready
comments: 18th Conference of the European Chapter of the Association for Computational Linguistics (EACL) 2024 camera-ready
abstract: The use of large-scale vision-language datasets is limited for object detection due to the negative impact of label noise on localization. Prior methods have shown how such large-scale datasets can be used for pretraining, which can provide initial signal for localization, but is insufficient without clean bounding-box data for at least some categories. We propose a technique to "vet" labels extracted from noisy captions, and use them for weakly-supervised object detection (WSOD), without any bounding boxes. We analyze and annotate the types of label noise in captions in our Caption Label Noise dataset, and train a classifier that predicts if an extracted label is actually present in the image or not. Our classifier generalizes across dataset boundaries and across categories. We compare the classifier to nine baselines on five datasets, and demonstrate that it can improve WSOD without label vetting by 30% (31.2 to 40.5 mAP when evaluated on PASCAL VOC). See dataset at: https://github.com/arushirai1/CLaNDataset.
summary: The use of large-scale vision-language datasets is limited for object detection due to the negative impact of label noise on localization. Prior methods have shown how such large-scale datasets can be used for pretraining, which can provide initial signal for localization, but is insufficient without clean bounding-box data for at least some categories. We propose a technique to "vet" labels extracted from noisy captions, and use them for weakly-supervised object detection (WSOD), without any bounding boxes. We analyze and annotate the types of label noise in captions in our Caption Label Noise dataset, and train a classifier that predicts if an extracted label is actually present in the image or not. Our classifier generalizes across dataset boundaries and across categories. We compare the classifier to nine baselines on five datasets, and demonstrate that it can improve WSOD without label vetting by 30% (31.2 to 40.5 mAP when evaluated on PASCAL VOC). See dataset at: https://github.com/arushirai1/CLaNDataset.
abstract_zh: 由于标签噪声对定位的负面影响，大规模视觉语言数据集在目标检测中的使用受到限制。先前的方法已经展示了如何将如此大规模的数据集用于预训练，这可以为定位提供初始信号，但如果没有至少某些类别的干净边界框数据，这是不够的。我们提出了一种技术来“审查”从噪声字幕中提取的标签，并将它们用于弱监督对象检测（WSOD），而无需任何边界框。我们分析和注释我们的标题标签噪声数据集中的标题中的标签噪声类型，并训练一个分类器来预测提取的标签是否确实存在于图像中。我们的分类器可以跨数据集边界和跨类别进行概括。我们将分类器与五个数据集上的九个基线进行比较，并证明它可以在没有标签审查的情况下将 WSOD 提高 30%（在 PASCAL VOC 上评估时为 31.2 到 40.5 mAP）。请参阅数据集：https://github.com/arushirai1/CLaNDataset。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种从真实世界图像字幕中筛选有效标签的方法，用于弱监督目标检测。
AI.motivation: 大规模视觉-语言数据集因标签噪声影响定位效果，现有方法依赖预训练但缺乏足够干净的边界框数据。
AI.method: 构建Caption Label Noise数据集分析字幕标签噪声类型，训练跨数据集和类别的分类器判断提取标签是否真实存在于图像中。
AI.result: 在PASCAL VOC数据集上，该方法使弱监督目标检测mAP提升30%（31.2至40.5）。
AI.conclusion: 通过筛选字幕标签噪声，可在无边界框数据情况下显著提升弱监督目标检测性能，且方法具有跨数据集泛化能力。

tldr: 本文提出一种从真实世界图像字幕中筛选有效标签的方法，用于弱监督目标检测。
motivation: 大规模视觉-语言数据集因标签噪声影响定位效果，现有方法依赖预训练但缺乏足够干净的边界框数据。
method: 构建Caption Label Noise数据集分析字幕标签噪声类型，训练跨数据集和类别的分类器判断提取标签是否真实存在于图像中。
result: 在PASCAL VOC数据集上，该方法使弱监督目标检测mAP提升30%（31.2至40.5）。
conclusion: 通过筛选字幕标签噪声，可在无边界框数据情况下显著提升弱监督目标检测性能，且方法具有跨数据集泛化能力。
search_text: VEIL: Vetting Extracted Image Labels from In-the-Wild Captions for Weakly-Supervised Object Detection VEIL：审查从野外字幕中提取的图像标签以进行弱监督对象检测 The use of large-scale vision-language datasets is limited for object detection due to the negative impact of label noise on localization. Prior methods have shown how such large-scale datasets can be used for pretraining, which can provide initial signal for localization, but is insufficient without clean bounding-box data for at least some categories. We propose a technique to "vet" labels extracted from noisy captions, and use them for weakly-supervised object detection (WSOD), without any bounding boxes. We analyze and annotate the types of label noise in captions in our Caption Label Noise dataset, and train a classifier that predicts if an extracted label is actually present in the image or not. Our classifier generalizes across dataset boundaries and across categories. We compare the classifier to nine baselines on five datasets, and demonstrate that it can improve WSOD without label vetting by 30% (31.2 to 40.5 mAP when evaluated on PASCAL VOC). See dataset at: https://github.com/arushirai1/CLaNDataset. 由于标签噪声对定位的负面影响，大规模视觉语言数据集在目标检测中的使用受到限制。先前的方法已经展示了如何将如此大规模的数据集用于预训练，这可以为定位提供初始信号，但如果没有至少某些类别的干净边界框数据，这是不够的。我们提出了一种技术来“审查”从噪声字幕中提取的标签，并将它们用于弱监督对象检测（WSOD），而无需任何边界框。我们分析和注释我们的标题标签噪声数据集中的标题中的标签噪声类型，并训练一个分类器来预测提取的标签是否确实存在于图像中。我们的分类器可以跨数据集边界和跨类别进行概括。我们将分类器与五个数据集上的九个基线进行比较，并证明它可以在没有标签审查的情况下将 WSOD 提高 30%（在 PASCAL VOC 上评估时为 31.2 到 40.5 mAP）。请参阅数据集：https://github.com/arushirai1/CLaNDataset。 本文提出一种从真实世界图像字幕中筛选有效标签的方法，用于弱监督目标检测。 Arushi Rai,Adriana Kovashka cs.CV

authors_text: Maham Tanveer,Yizhi Wang,Ali Mahdavi-Amiri,Hao Zhang
title: DS-Fusion: Artistic Typography via Discriminated and Stylized Diffusion
title_zh: DS-Fusion：通过区分和风格化扩散的艺术版式
abstract: We introduce a novel method to automatically generate an artistic typography by stylizing one or more letter fonts to visually convey the semantics of an input word, while ensuring that the output remains readable. To address an assortment of challenges with our task at hand including conflicting goals (artistic stylization vs. legibility), lack of ground truth, and immense search space, our approach utilizes large language models to bridge texts and visual images for stylization and build an unsupervised generative model with a diffusion model backbone. Specifically, we employ the denoising generator in Latent Diffusion Model (LDM), with the key addition of a CNN-based discriminator to adapt the input style onto the input text. The discriminator uses rasterized images of a given letter/word font as real samples and output of the denoising generator as fake samples. Our model is coined DS-Fusion for discriminated and stylized diffusion. We showcase the quality and versatility of our method through numerous examples, qualitative and quantitative evaluation, as well as ablation studies. User studies comparing to strong baselines including CLIPDraw and DALL-E 2, as well as artist-crafted typographies, demonstrate strong performance of DS-Fusion.
summary: We introduce a novel method to automatically generate an artistic typography by stylizing one or more letter fonts to visually convey the semantics of an input word, while ensuring that the output remains readable. To address an assortment of challenges with our task at hand including conflicting goals (artistic stylization vs. legibility), lack of ground truth, and immense search space, our approach utilizes large language models to bridge texts and visual images for stylization and build an unsupervised generative model with a diffusion model backbone. Specifically, we employ the denoising generator in Latent Diffusion Model (LDM), with the key addition of a CNN-based discriminator to adapt the input style onto the input text. The discriminator uses rasterized images of a given letter/word font as real samples and output of the denoising generator as fake samples. Our model is coined DS-Fusion for discriminated and stylized diffusion. We showcase the quality and versatility of our method through numerous examples, qualitative and quantitative evaluation, as well as ablation studies. User studies comparing to strong baselines including CLIPDraw and DALL-E 2, as well as artist-crafted typographies, demonstrate strong performance of DS-Fusion.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了一种新颖的方法，通过对一个或多个字母字体进行风格化来自动生成艺术版式，以直观地传达输入单词的语义，同时确保输出保持可读。为了解决我们手头的任务面临的各种挑战，包括相互冲突的目标（艺术风格化与易读性）、缺乏基本事实和巨大的搜索空间，我们的方法利用大型语言模型来桥接文本和视觉图像以实现风格化，并构建一个具有扩散模型主干的无监督生成模型。具体来说，我们在潜在扩散模型 (LDM) 中使用了去噪生成器，并添加了基于 CNN 的判别器，以将输入样式适应输入文本。鉴别器使用给定字母/单词字体的光栅化图像作为真实样本，并将去噪生成器的输出作为假样本。我们的模型被称为 DS-Fusion，用于区分和风格化扩散。我们通过大量示例、定性和定量评估以及消融研究来展示我们方法的质量和多功能性。与 CLIPDraw 和 DALL-E 2 等强大基线以及艺术家制作的版式进行比较的用户研究证明了 DS-Fusion 的强大性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DS-Fusion方法，通过风格化一个或多个字母字体自动生成具有语义表达且可读的艺术字体。
AI.motivation: 传统艺术字体生成面临风格化与可读性冲突、缺乏真实标注数据及搜索空间巨大的挑战，需探索无监督生成方法。
AI.method: 基于潜空间扩散模型（LDM）的去噪生成器，结合CNN判别器，利用字体图像作为真实样本与生成样本进行对抗训练，实现风格迁移。
AI.result: 通过大量实验与用户研究验证，DS-Fusion在生成质量、多样性及可读性上优于CLIPDraw、DALL-E 2等基线方法及人工设计字体。
AI.conclusion: DS-Fusion通过融合判别与风格化扩散机制，有效解决了艺术字体生成中的核心难题，展现出广泛的应用潜力。

authors_text: Baihan Lin,Guillermo Cecchi,Djallel Bouneffouf
title: Psychotherapy AI Companion with Reinforcement Learning Recommendations and Interpretable Policy Dynamics
title_zh: 具有强化学习建议和可解释政策动态的心理治疗人工智能伴侣
comment: WWW 2023. This work supersede our prior work arxiv:2208.13077 by studying the interpretability of RL-based therapy agents with policy visualizations
comments: WWW 2023. This work supersede our prior work arxiv:2208.13077 by studying the interpretability of RL-based therapy agents with policy visualizations
abstract: We introduce a Reinforcement Learning Psychotherapy AI Companion that generates topic recommendations for therapists based on patient responses. The system uses Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) to generate multi-objective policies for four different psychiatric conditions: anxiety, depression, schizophrenia, and suicidal cases. We present our experimental results on the accuracy of recommended topics using three different scales of working alliance ratings: task, bond, and goal. We show that the system is able to capture the real data (historical topics discussed by the therapists) relatively well, and that the best performing models vary by disorder and rating scale. To gain interpretable insights into the learned policies, we visualize policy trajectories in a 2D principal component analysis space and transition matrices. These visualizations reveal distinct patterns in the policies trained with different reward signals and trained on different clinical diagnoses. Our system's success in generating DIsorder-Specific Multi-Objective Policies (DISMOP) and interpretable policy dynamics demonstrates the potential of DRL in providing personalized and efficient therapeutic recommendations.
summary: We introduce a Reinforcement Learning Psychotherapy AI Companion that generates topic recommendations for therapists based on patient responses. The system uses Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) to generate multi-objective policies for four different psychiatric conditions: anxiety, depression, schizophrenia, and suicidal cases. We present our experimental results on the accuracy of recommended topics using three different scales of working alliance ratings: task, bond, and goal. We show that the system is able to capture the real data (historical topics discussed by the therapists) relatively well, and that the best performing models vary by disorder and rating scale. To gain interpretable insights into the learned policies, we visualize policy trajectories in a 2D principal component analysis space and transition matrices. These visualizations reveal distinct patterns in the policies trained with different reward signals and trained on different clinical diagnoses. Our system's success in generating DIsorder-Specific Multi-Objective Policies (DISMOP) and interpretable policy dynamics demonstrates the potential of DRL in providing personalized and efficient therapeutic recommendations.
abstract_zh: 我们推出了强化学习心理治疗人工智能伴侣，它可以根据患者的反应为治疗师生成主题建议。该系统使用深度强化学习 (DRL) 为四种不同的精神疾病生成多目标策略：焦虑、抑郁、精神分裂症和自杀病例。我们使用三种不同的工作联盟评级尺度（任务、纽带和目标）展示推荐主题准确性的实验结果。我们表明，该系统能够相对较好地捕获真实数据（治疗师讨论的历史主题），并且表现最佳的模型因疾病和评分量表而异。为了获得对学习策略的可解释的见解，我们在二维主成分分析空间和转换矩阵中可视化策略轨迹。这些可视化揭示了用不同奖励信号训练并针对不同临床诊断训练的策略的不同模式。我们的系统成功生成了针对疾病的多目标策略 (DISMOP) 和可解释的策略动态，这证明了 DRL 在提供个性化且高效的治疗建议方面的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于深度强化学习（DRL）的心理治疗AI伴侣系统，可根据患者反馈为不同精神疾病（焦虑、抑郁、精神分裂症、自杀倾向）生成个性化治疗主题推荐。
AI.motivation: 传统心理治疗面临资源不足、个性化程度低及疗效难以量化等问题，需借助AI提供可解释的动态治疗策略辅助工具。
AI.method: 采用深度强化学习框架构建多目标策略模型，结合三种工作联盟评分量表（任务、关系、目标）评估推荐效果，并通过PCA可视化及转移矩阵分析策略可解释性。
AI.result: 系统能有效拟合历史治疗主题数据，不同疾病及评分量表对应最佳模型存在差异，可视化结果揭示了奖励信号与临床诊断对策略模式的影响差异。
AI.conclusion: DRL在生成疾病特异性多目标治疗策略（DISMOP）及策略动态可解释性方面表现优异，验证了AI辅助心理治疗的可行性与个性化潜力。

To gain interpretable insights into the learned policies, we visualize policy trajectories in a 2D principal component analysis space and transition matrices. These visualizations reveal distinct patterns in the policies trained with different reward signals and trained on different clinical diagnoses. Our system's success in generating DIsorder-Specific Multi-Objective Policies (DISMOP) and interpretable policy dynamics demonstrates the potential of DRL in providing personalized and efficient therapeutic recommendations. 我们推出了强化学习心理治疗人工智能伴侣，它可以根据患者的反应为治疗师生成主题建议。该系统使用深度强化学习 (DRL) 为四种不同的精神疾病生成多目标策略：焦虑、抑郁、精神分裂症和自杀病例。我们使用三种不同的工作联盟评级尺度（任务、纽带和目标）展示推荐主题准确性的实验结果。我们表明，该系统能够相对较好地捕获真实数据（治疗师讨论的历史主题），并且表现最佳的模型因疾病和评分量表而异。为了获得对学习策略的可解释的见解，我们在二维主成分分析空间和转换矩阵中可视化策略轨迹。这些可视化揭示了用不同奖励信号训练并针对不同临床诊断训练的策略的不同模式。我们的系统成功生成了针对疾病的多目标策略 (DISMOP) 和可解释的策略动态，这证明了 DRL 在提供个性化且高效的治疗建议方面的潜力。 本文提出基于深度强化学习（DRL）的心理治疗AI伴侣系统，可根据患者反馈为不同精神疾病（焦虑、抑郁、精神分裂症、自杀倾向）生成个性化治疗主题推荐。 Baihan Lin,Guillermo Cecchi,Djallel Bouneffouf cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CL,cs.HC,q-bio.NC

authors_text: Nitish Sontakke,Hosik Chae,Sangjoon Lee,Tianle Huang,Dennis W. Hong,Sehoon Ha
title: Residual Physics Learning and System Identification for Sim-to-real Transfer of Policies on Buoyancy Assisted Legged Robots
title_zh: 浮力辅助腿式机器人策略模拟到真实迁移的残差物理学习和系统识别
abstract: The light and soft characteristics of Buoyancy Assisted Lightweight Legged Unit (BALLU) robots have a great potential to provide intrinsically safe interactions in environments involving humans, unlike many heavy and rigid robots. However, their unique and sensitive dynamics impose challenges to obtaining robust control policies in the real world. In this work, we demonstrate robust sim-to-real transfer of control policies on the BALLU robots via system identification and our novel residual physics learning method, Environment Mimic (EnvMimic). First, we model the nonlinear dynamics of the actuators by collecting hardware data and optimizing the simulation parameters. Rather than relying on standard supervised learning formulations, we utilize deep reinforcement learning to train an external force policy to match real-world trajectories, which enables us to model residual physics with greater fidelity. We analyze the improved simulation fidelity by comparing the simulation trajectories against the real-world ones. We finally demonstrate that the improved simulator allows us to learn better walking and turning policies that can be successfully deployed on the hardware of BALLU.
summary: The light and soft characteristics of Buoyancy Assisted Lightweight Legged Unit (BALLU) robots have a great potential to provide intrinsically safe interactions in environments involving humans, unlike many heavy and rigid robots. However, their unique and sensitive dynamics impose challenges to obtaining robust control policies in the real world. In this work, we demonstrate robust sim-to-real transfer of control policies on the BALLU robots via system identification and our novel residual physics learning method, Environment Mimic (EnvMimic). First, we model the nonlinear dynamics of the actuators by collecting hardware data and optimizing the simulation parameters. Rather than relying on standard supervised learning formulations, we utilize deep reinforcement learning to train an external force policy to match real-world trajectories, which enables us to model residual physics with greater fidelity. We analyze the improved simulation fidelity by comparing the simulation trajectories against the real-world ones. We finally demonstrate that the improved simulator allows us to learn better walking and turning policies that can be successfully deployed on the hardware of BALLU.
abstract_zh: 与许多重型和刚性机器人不同，浮力辅助轻型腿单元（BALLU）机器人具有轻质和柔软的特性，具有在涉及人类的环境中提供本质安全交互的巨大潜力。然而，它们独特且敏感的动态给在现实世界中获得强有力的控制政策带来了挑战。在这项工作中，我们通过系统识别和我们新颖的剩余物理学习方法环境模拟（EnvMimic）展示了 BALLU 机器人上控制策略的鲁棒模拟到真实的转换。首先，我们通过收集硬件数据并优化仿真参数来对执行器的非线性动力学进行建模。我们不依赖标准的监督学习公式，而是利用深度强化学习来训练外力策略以匹配现实世界的轨迹，这使我们能够以更高的保真度对残差物理进行建模。我们通过将模拟轨迹与现实世界的轨迹进行比较来分析改进的模拟保真度。我们最终证明，改进的模拟器使我们能够学习更好的行走和转向策略，这些策略可以成功部署在 BALLU 的硬件上。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合系统识别与残差物理学习的方法，解决浮力辅助腿部机器人（BALLU）在模拟到现实环境中的策略迁移问题。
AI.motivation: BALLU机器人因轻量化和柔软特性适合人机交互，但其复杂动态特性导致传统控制策略难以在真实环境中稳健运行。
AI.method: 通过系统识别优化仿真参数，并设计EnvMimic方法利用深度强化学习训练外部力策略，以高保真建模残差物理特性，提升仿真与真实轨迹的一致性。
AI.result: 改进后的仿真环境成功实现了更优的行走与转向策略，并在BALLU硬件上验证了策略的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了BALLU机器人模拟到现实的策略迁移难题，为轻型仿生机器人控制提供了新思路。

authors_text: Hsiao-Ying Lu,Takanori Fujiwara,Ming-Yi Chang,Yang-chih Fu,Anders Ynnerman,Kwan-Liu Ma
title: Visual Analytics of Multivariate Networks with Representation Learning and Composite Variable Construction
title_zh: 具有表示学习和复合变量构建的多元网络可视化分析
comment: To appear in IEEE Transactions on Visualization and Computer Graphics
comments: To appear in IEEE Transactions on Visualization and Computer Graphics
abstract: Multivariate networks are commonly found in real-world data-driven applications. Uncovering and understanding the relations of interest in multivariate networks is not a trivial task. This paper presents a visual analytics workflow for studying multivariate networks to extract associations between different structural and semantic characteristics of the networks (e.g., what are the combinations of attributes largely relating to the density of a social network?). The workflow consists of a neural-network-based learning phase to classify the data based on the chosen input and output attributes, a dimensionality reduction and optimization phase to produce a simplified set of results for examination, and finally an interpreting phase conducted by the user through an interactive visualization interface. A key part of our design is a composite variable construction step that remodels nonlinear features obtained by neural networks into linear features that are intuitive to interpret. We demonstrate the capabilities of this workflow with multiple case studies on networks derived from social media usage and also evaluate the workflow with qualitative feedback from experts.
summary: Multivariate networks are commonly found in real-world data-driven applications. Uncovering and understanding the relations of interest in multivariate networks is not a trivial task. This paper presents a visual analytics workflow for studying multivariate networks to extract associations between different structural and semantic characteristics of the networks (e.g., what are the combinations of attributes largely relating to the density of a social network?). The workflow consists of a neural-network-based learning phase to classify the data based on the chosen input and output attributes, a dimensionality reduction and optimization phase to produce a simplified set of results for examination, and finally an interpreting phase conducted by the user through an interactive visualization interface. A key part of our design is a composite variable construction step that remodels nonlinear features obtained by neural networks into linear features that are intuitive to interpret. We demonstrate the capabilities of this workflow with multiple case studies on networks derived from social media usage and also evaluate the workflow with qualitative feedback from experts.
abstract_zh: 多元网络常见于现实世界的数据驱动应用程序中。发现和理解多元网络中的兴趣关系并不是一项简单的任务。本文提出了一种可视化分析工作流程，用于研究多元网络，以提取网络的不同结构和语义特征之间的关联（例如，主要与社交网络的密度相关的属性组合是什么？）。该工作流程包括基于神经网络的学习阶段，根据所选的输入和输出属性对数据进行分类；降维和优化阶段，生成一组简化的结果以供检查；最后是用户通过交互式可视化界面进行的解释阶段。我们设计的关键部分是复合变量构建步骤，它将神经网络获得的非线性特征重塑为易于解释的线性特征。我们通过对源自社交媒体使用的网络的多个案例研究来展示此工作流程的功能，并通过专家的定性反馈来评估该工作流程。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合表示学习和复合变量构建的可视化分析工作流，用于研究多变量网络中结构与语义特征的关联。
AI.motivation: 多变量网络中结构与语义特征的复杂关系难以直接分析，需通过自动化工具辅助发现关键关联并支持直观解释。
AI.method: 基于神经网络分类数据，通过降维优化生成简化结果，并借助交互式可视化界面进行用户解释，核心创新为将非线性特征转化为可解释的复合变量。
AI.result: 通过社交媒体网络案例验证了方法有效性，并获得专家定性反馈认可其分析能力。
AI.conclusion: 该工作流通过机器学习与可视化结合，有效支持多变量网络的复杂关系挖掘与可解释性分析。

authors_text: Wojciech Dudek,Narcis Miguel,Tomasz Winiarski
title: A SysML-based language for evaluating the integrity of simulation and physical embodiments of Cyber-Physical systems
title_zh: 一种基于 SysML 的语言，用于评估网络物理系统的模拟和物理实施例的完整性
comment: ef:Robotics and Autonomous Systems, vol. 185, pp. 104884, 2025
comments: ef:Robotics and Autonomous Systems, vol. 185, pp. 104884, 2025
abstract: Evaluating early design concepts is crucial as it impacts quality and cost. This process is often hindered by vague and uncertain design information. This article introduces the SysML-based Simulated-Physical Systems Modelling Language (SPSysML). It is a Domain-Specification Language for evaluating component reusability in Cyber-Physical Systems incorporating Digital Twins and other simulated parts. The proposed factors assess the design quantitatively. SPSysML uses a requirement-based system structuring method to couple simulated and physical parts with requirements. SPSysML-based systems incorporate DTs that perceive exogenous actions in the simulated world. SPSysML validation is survey- and application-based. First, we develop a robotic system for an assisted living project. We propose an SPSysML application procedure called SPSysAP that manages the considered system development by evaluating the system designs with the proposed quantitative factors. As a result of the SPSysML application, we observed an integrity improvement between the simulated and physical parts of the system. Thus, more system components are shared between the simulated and physical setups. The system was deployed on the physical robot and two simulators based on ROS and ROS2. Additionally, we share a questionnaire for SPSysML assessment. The feedback that we already received is published in this article.

Thus, more system components are shared between the simulated and physical setups. The system was deployed on the physical robot and two simulators based on ROS and ROS2. Additionally, we share a questionnaire for SPSysML assessment. The feedback that we already received is published in this article.
abstract_zh: 评估早期设计概念至关重要，因为它会影响质量和成本。这一过程常常受到模糊和不确定的设计信息的阻碍。本文介绍基于 SysML 的模拟物理系统建模语言 (SPSysML)。它是一种领域规范语言，用于评估包含数字孪生和其他模拟部件的网络物理系统中的组件可重用性。所提出的因素对设计进行定量评估。 SPSysML 使用基于需求的系统结构化方法将模拟和物理部件与需求耦合起来。基于 SPSysML 的系统包含感知模拟世界中的外源行为的 DT。 SPSysML 验证基于调查和应用。首先，我们为辅助生活项目开发机器人系统。我们提出了一个称为 SPSysAP 的 SPSysML 应用程序，它通过使用建议的定量因素评估系统设计来管理所考虑的系统开发。 SPSysML 应用的结果是，我们观察到系统的模拟部分和物理部分之间的完整性得到了改善。因此，更多的系统组件在模拟和物理设置之间共享。该系统部署在实体机器人和两个基于ROS和ROS2的模拟器上。此外，我们还分享了一份用于 SPSysML 评估的调查问卷。我们已经收到的反馈已发布在本文中。

AI.method: 提出SPSysML作为领域特定语言，结合数字孪生和其他仿真部分，通过需求导向的系统结构方法耦合仿真和物理部分。
AI.result: 应用SPSysML后，仿真与物理部分的完整性得到提升，系统组件在仿真和物理设置之间共享。
AI.conclusion: SPSysML为评估网络物理系统的仿真与物理实现提供了有效的方法，并通过实际应用验证了其有效性。

search_text: A SysML-based language for evaluating the integrity of simulation and physical embodiments of Cyber-Physical systems 一种基于 SysML 的语言，用于评估网络物理系统的模拟和物理实施例的完整性 Evaluating early design concepts is crucial as it impacts quality and cost. This process is often hindered by vague and uncertain design information. This article introduces the SysML-based Simulated-Physical Systems Modelling Language (SPSysML). It is a Domain-Specification Language for evaluating component reusability in Cyber-Physical Systems incorporating Digital Twins and other simulated parts. The proposed factors assess the design quantitatively. SPSysML uses a requirement-based system structuring method to couple simulated and physical parts with requirements. SPSysML-based systems incorporate DTs that perceive exogenous actions in the simulated world. SPSysML validation is survey- and application-based. First, we develop a robotic system for an assisted living project. We propose an SPSysML application procedure called SPSysAP that manages the considered system development by evaluating the system designs with the proposed quantitative factors. As a result of the SPSysML application, we observed an integrity improvement between the simulated and physical parts of the system. Thus, more system components are shared between the simulated and physical setups. The system was deployed on the physical robot and two simulators based on ROS and ROS2. Additionally, we share a questionnaire for SPSysML assessment. The feedback that we already received is published in this article. 评估早期设计概念至关重要，因为它会影响质量和成本。这一过程常常受到模糊和不确定的设计信息的阻碍。本文介绍基于 SysML 的模拟物理系统建模语言 (SPSysML)。它是一种领域规范语言，用于评估包含数字孪生和其他模拟部件的网络物理系统中的组件可重用性。所提出的因素对设计进行定量评估。 SPSysML 使用基于需求的系统结构化方法将模拟和物理部件与需求耦合起来。基于 SPSysML 的系统包含感知模拟世界中的外源行为的 DT。 SPSysML 验证基于调查和应用。首先，我们为辅助生活项目开发机器人系统。我们提出了一个称为 SPSysAP 的 SPSysML 应用程序，它通过使用建议的定量因素评估系统设计来管理所考虑的系统开发。 SPSysML 应用的结果是，我们观察到系统的模拟部分和物理部分之间的完整性得到了改善。因此，更多的系统组件在模拟和物理设置之间共享。该系统部署在实体机器人和两个基于ROS和ROS2的模拟器上。此外，我们还分享了一份用于 SPSysML 评估的调查问卷。我们已经收到的反馈已发布在本文中。 本文提出了一种基于SysML的建模语言SPSysML，用于评估网络物理系统仿真与物理实现的完整性。 Wojciech Dudek,Narcis Miguel,Tomasz Winiarski cs.SE,cs.AR,cs.MA,cs.RO,eess.SY
